Name: The Economist
Description:
News and analysis with a global perspective. We’re here to help you understand the world around you.

To subscribe to The Economist go to: https://econ.st/3PqwRhp

To make a request about your personal data visit: https://econ.st/2OZnq92

Name: The Wall Street Journal
Description:
Winner of 40 Pulitzer Prizes for outstanding journalism, The Wall Street Journal includes coverage of U.S. and world news, politics, arts, culture, lifestyle, sports, health and more. It's a critical resource of curated content in print, online and mobile apps, complete with breaking news streams, interactive features, video, online columns and blogs. Since 1889, readers have trusted the Journal for accurate, objective information to fuel their decisions as well as enlighten, educate and inspire them. 
 
On LinkedIn, we will share articles to help you navigate your career, including stories from our business, management, leisure and technology sections.

Subscribe: http://on.wsj.com/1n1uvCH

Job opportunities: http://www.dowjones.com/careers

Name: Financial Times
Description:
About the Financial Times
The Financial Times is one of the world’s leading business news organisations, recognised internationally for its authority, integrity and accuracy. The FT has a record paying readership of one million, three-quarters of which are digital subscriptions. It is part of Nikkei Inc., which provides a broad range of information, news and services for the global business community.

Learn more about the FT, including announcements and career opportunities, at aboutus.ft.com.

Subscribe at subs.ft.com.

Name: The New York Times
Description:
The New York Times is powered by the idea that independent, deeply reported journalism fuels a healthy and engaged society. 

Our reporters, columnists, editors, engineers, designers, data analysts, developers and marketers breathe life into the most important topics of our time and tell stories that might otherwise go untold.

Whether bringing new truths to light with our reporting, building innovative products that deliver a best-in-class digital experience, or analyzing data to understand how we can best serve our readers, our people power the world’s top destination for journalism.

Working at The Times means envisioning and developing the future of journalism. Bring your passion, perspective and experience and join us as we seek the truth and help people understand the world. 

Check out our career opportunities (nytco.com/careers) and follow our page to connect with Times employees, journalists and readers.

Name: The Economic Times
Description: Official account of The Economic Times, India's No. 1 Destination for Business News, Economy, Politics and More | A Times Internet Product : feedback@economictimes.com

Name: Folha de S.Paulo
Description:
Fundada em 1921, a Folha de S.Paulo é, desde a década de 80, o jornal mais vendido do país entre os diários nacionais de interesse geral. 
Founded in 1921, Folha has been, since the 80's, the best-selling newspaper in the country among national dailies of general interest. Contact Folha: http://www1.folha.uol.com.br/falecomafolha/.

Name: The Washington Post
Description: The Washington Post is an award-winning news leader whose mission is to connect, inform, and enlighten local, national and global readers with trustworthy reporting, in-depth analysis and engaging opinions. The Post is as much a tech company as it is a media company, combining world-class journalism with the latest technology and tools so readers can interact with The Post anytime, anywhere. Our approach is always the same– shape ideas, redefine speed, take ownership and lead. Every employee, every project, every day.

Name: Valor Econômico S/A
Description:
O Valor Econômico é o maior veículo de economia, finanças e negócios do Brasil. Sua equipe de jornalistas altamente especializada produz um noticiário que ajuda a identificar oportunidades e apoia decisões que levam a grandes negócios. 
No mercado desde 2000, o Valor conquistou a credibilidade e a confiança dos principais executivos e formadores de opinião do país, tornando-se referência para leitores altamente qualificados. Seu conteúdo está disponível em plataformas digitais em versões para desktop e mobile. 
O lançamento mais recente é o Valor PRO, serviço em tempo real que informa antes as notícias, análises, dados e indicadores que fazem preço no mercado.

Name: Le Monde
Description:
LeMonde.fr est présent sur Internet depuis le 19 décembre 1995, 51 ans jour pour jour après la création du journal papier. Le site et ses applications mobiles sont parmi les plus consultés en France pour suivre l'actualité en temps réel (international, économie, politique, société,...)

Leading news website in French.

Name: ESTADÃO
Description: O Estadão é uma das maiores e mais importantes empresas de informação e comunicação do Brasil, atuando nos segmentos de jornalismo, serviços de informação, divulgação de publicidade e entretenimento. É uma organização que se sente responsável pela promoção do desenvolvimento humano, político, econômico, social e cultural do País. Como uma empresa dinâmica e em constante renovação, o Estadão está sempre atento e aberto a profissionais talentosos que se alinhem aos propósitos e à cultura da organização.

Name: Hindustan Times
Description:
Welcome to the Hindustan Times on LinkedIn -- we bring you news that matters, from around world and across all platforms. 

We are one of India’s leading English dailies, with a newspaper circulation of over 40 lakhs and an online readership of over 10 million unique users monthly.

Our reporters cover a wide range of sections including politics, education, business, technology, automobiles, sports, lifestyle, cities, world and entertainment. 

We're here to ensure you miss nothing that matters - from stories that make headlines across the world to those that affect your professional life.

Stay connected!

Name: Les Echos
Description: Retrouvez sur LesEchos.fr toute l'actualité économique et financière en France et dans le monde, découvrez des analyses exclusives, dossiers spéciaux, décryptages, chroniques et grands formats.

Name: Handelsblatt
Description: Das Handelsblatt ist die größte Wirtschafts- und Finanzzeitung in deutscher Sprache. Rund 200 Redakteure und Korrespondenten weltweit stehen für einen fundierten und unabhängigen Qualitätsjournalismus, der zu nationalen und globalen Themen und Anlässen exklusiv und aktuell recherchiert und analysiert. Mit rund 40 Korrespondenten im Ausland ist das Handelsblatt in allen Wirtschaftszentren der Welt vor Ort.

Name: The Australian Financial Review
Description:
The Financial Review boasts the largest dedicated business newsroom in Australia with over 200 specialist journalists writing unrivalled in-depth analysis of business and financial markets. 

You can find the Financial Review at your local newsagent and online at www.afr.com. Follow us on Twitter at @FinancialReview or on Facebook facebook.com/financialreview.

Name: Nikkei Asia
Description:
Nikkei Asia brings you news and insights on the region's most influential companies, plus comprehensive coverage of politics, the economy, markets and trends - all from a uniquely Asian perspective.

For more than 140 years, Nikkei has been providing unparalleled coverage of Japan's economy, industries and markets. The group's business portfolio includes publishing, broadcasting and the Nikkei 225 stock index. Its flagship newspaper, The Nikkei, has a circulation of approximately 3 million. With 37 global bureaus and over 1,500 journalists, Nikkei is ideally positioned to provide Asian news and analysis to a global audience. The Financial Times(FT), the global business newspaper, joined the Nikkei group in 2015. As content partners, Nikkei Asia and the FT share select articles with their respective audiences and collaborate editorially on joint projects.

For more information visit: https://asia.nikkei.com

Name: South China Morning Post SCMP
Description:
The South China Morning Post is a leading news media company that has reported on China and Asia for more than a century with global impact. Founded in 1903, SCMP is headquartered in Hong Kong, where it is the city’s newspaper of record, with a growing correspondent staff across Asia and the United States. Our vision is to “Elevate Thought”, and our mission is to “Lead the global conversation about China”. The South China Morning Post is a global digital news leader with a unique role in championing the plurality of voices in Asia through its breadth and depth of news coverage. SCMP is committed to informing and inspiring through journalism of the highest standards. Apart from its flagship newspaper, SCMP also publishes news 24/7 on SCMP.com. In 2020, SCMP became the first news organisation in Asia to join the Trust Project, a consortium of top news companies developing global transparency standards for credible journalism.  
 
Additionally, SCMP publishes a portfolio of premium lifestyle and fashion titles in Hong Kong including Cosmopolitan, ELLE, Esquire and, Harper’s BAZAAR. SCMP is also home to Abacus, a digital news brand focused on China's tech industry; Inkstone, a daily news brief for those curious about China's growing impact around the world; and Goldthread, a content platform with a focus on food, travel and culture in China.

For more information, please visit us at www.scmp.com.
 
Our Privacy Notice aims to comply with all relevant data privacy and protection laws. You should read the Privacy Notice in full at http://corp.scmp.com/privacy-policy

Name: Business Standard
Description:
Business Standard is India's leading business daily and the preferred choice of serious business readers. It is published from 12 centres – New Delhi, Mumbai, Kolkata, Bengaluru, Chennai, Ahmedabad, Hyderabad, Chandigarh, Lucknow, Pune, Kochi and Bhubaneswar. It is also printed from Bhopal.
www.business-standard.com, the online property of Business Standard, attracts over 15 million unique visitors every month, the highest such number for any standalone business newspaper website in India.
Business Standard stands for reporting that stresses accuracy and credibility, commentary that is informed, independent and fair, and journalism that is rooted in ethical conduct and defined by a sacrosanct bond with the reader. Business Standard's editorial team is led by Shailesh Dobhal.
The Hindi Business Standard is published from six centres across India – New Delhi, Mumbai, Kolkata, Lucknow, Bhopal and Chandigarh. Its content can be accessed at www.bshindi.com.

Name: WirtschaftsWoche
Description:
WirtschaftsWoche - Nichts ist spannender als Wirtschaft!
Mit rund einer Million Leserinnen und Lesern ist die WirtschaftsWoche das große und aktuelle Wirtschaftsmagazin für Entscheider in Deutschland. Jede Woche analysieren rund 100 Experten in Deutschland und rund um die Welt die wichtigsten Entwicklungen in Politik und Weltwirtschaft, Unternehmen und Branchen, Technik und Wissen, Beruf und Management sowie Börse und Geldanlage.

Name: Diario Gestión
Description: Gestión es el diario de Economía, Finanzas y Negocios más importante del país y medio referente para el sector empresarial. La marca cuenta con sus ediciones impresas como el Diario, la Revista G y los suplementos especializados. Además, va al ritmo de los ejecutivos y ofrece en sus contenidos digitales,  información actualizada y especializada en tiempo real.

Name: manager magazin
Description: Das manager magazin steht seit 1971 für unabhängigen, erstklassigen Wirtschaftsjournalismus. Online liefern wir täglich das, was Sie monatlich in der Druckausgabe finden: Unternehmensanalysen, CEO-Porträts, Trendreports – kurz: Wirtschaft aus erster Hand.

Name: Jeune Afrique
Description:
Since 1960, Groupe Jeune Afrique has been contributing to the political, economic and social development of the continent through independent, reliable and clear information.

As a leader in press, internet, publishing and consulting, Groupe Jeune Afrique is expanding into new media areas, while respecting and promoting its core values: editorial independence, sense of responsibility, uncompromising quality and passion for information.

Thanks to its editorial expertise and steady focus on innovation and diversification, Groupe Jeune Afrique has strengthened its position as the number one press and communication group specialising in the African continent.

Groupe Jeune Afrique :

A multimedia group with activities in press, publishing, internet and consulting. 
A team of 130 employees in 15 countries.

Name: Neuroscience News
Description:
Neuroscience News is a website focused on neuroscience related content.

Research news related to neuroscience, neurology, psychology, mental health, artificial intelligence, brain research, neurogenetics, AI and other cognitive science fields is featured.

A free neuroscience social network at NeuroscienceNews.com allows science students, neuroscience professors, patients, psychologists and science enthusiasts to interact in forums, support groups, science article comments and earn rewards for their activity.  Neuroscience jobs, student resources, book reviews, lab equipment, gifts, videos and lab lists are also included.

Name: The Chronicle of Higher Education
Description:
Since its founding in 1966, The Chronicle has grown to serve millions of educators, administrators, researchers, and policymakers who rely on insights from The Chronicle to lead, teach, learn, and innovate.
 
The Chronicle’s independent newsroom – the nation’s largest dedicated to covering colleges and universities – is home to award-winning journalists, experts, and data analysts with a passion for serving audiences with indispensable news and actionable insights on issues that matter.

Name: Khaleej Times
Description:
Khaleej Times on LinkedIn is your destination for news, analysis and insights to help you succeed. 

Follow our page for breaking news, connect with Khaleej Times journalists and readers – a growing community of more than 2.4 million unique users. Now offering WhatsApp alerts: http://khaleejtimes.com/whatsapp 

The oldest and one of the most widely recognised media brands, khaleejtimes.com clearly leads as UAE’s No. 1 news website. 
Khaleej Times is the essential read for new ways of thinking and fresh content.

Name: Le Figaro
Description:
Le Figaro, la culture de la liberté depuis 1826, 1er quotidien généraliste et 1er site d’information le plus consulté en France. Affichant une audience de plus de 9 millions visiteurs uniques (source : Médiamétrie/NetRatings), le site se caractérise par la qualité et la profondeur de ses contenus, fruit de la complémentarité entre ses rédactions papier (quotidien et magazines) et sa rédaction web; par ses usages Internet 2.0 et l'importance de la vidéo devenue un élément central de l'offre de contenus. Lefigaro.fr appuie également son développement sur les synergies construites avec les autres sites du groupe Figaro (Figaro Classifields, Meteoconsult, Le Particulier, Ticketac, Vodeo, Cplussur…) qui touchent au total plus de 14 millions de visiteurs uniques soit 1 internaute sur 3.

http://www.lefigaro.fr

Name: Africa Confidential
Description:
Africa Confidential was founded in 1960 as a subscription newsletter to provide accurate, impartial reporting on Africa at a time when truly independent reporting and analysis was rare. Over 60 years since its founding, Africa Confidential remains one of the few truly independent sources of insider information on Africa, and has as strong a reputation as ever for the quality of the information it provides. 

africa-conf.com/m/Africa-Conf

Name: El Economista
Description:
Somos un periódico especializado en economía, finanzas, negocios y política, líder en análisis de la información. 

Ofrecemos a nuestros lectores noticias de última hora, foros, blogs y más, con la consigna de mantenerlos bien informados en todo momento, proporcionando contenido de valor que les permita tomar decisiones inteligentes.

Name: Expansión
Description:
Expansión es el diario español líder en España en información de mercados, económica y política. 

Puedes seguirnos también en nuestras cuentas de Twitter (https://twitter.com/expansioncom) o en nuestra página de Facebook (https://www.facebook.com/Expansion.com).

Name: Süddeutsche Zeitung
Description:
Die Süddeutsche Zeitung ist die größte überregionale Qualitätstageszeitung Deutschlands.

Für die SZ schreiben hunderte fest angestellter Redakteure und ein Vielfaches an freien Mitarbeitern. Gut 40 Korrespondenten und mehrere Dutzend vor Ort angesiedelte Autoren beobachten das deutsche und internationale Geschehen. Sie berichten aus den deutschen Großstädten, aus den wichtigsten Zentren Europas und von allen Kontinenten. Die Autoren und Autorinnen der SZ wurden vielfach mit nationalen und internationalen Journalistenpreisen ausgezeichnet, etwa mit dem Egon-Erwin-Kisch-Preis oder mit dem Theodor-Wolff-Preis. Für die Recherche zu den Panama Papers, die die SZ gemeinsam mit dem International Council of Investigative Journalist (ICIJ) anstellte, erhielten unsere Reporter im Jahr 2017 den Pulitzer-Preis, den renommiertesten Journalistenpreis der Welt.  

Die SZ zeichnet sich durch meinungsfreudigen und unabhängigen Journalismus aus. Sie legt Wert auf kritische Redakteure und kritische Leser.  Als meinungsbildendes Medium mit lokaler und regionaler Verankerung sind ihr die Prinzipien Liberalität, Toleranz und redaktionelle Unabhängigkeit besonders wichtig.

Dies hat eine lange Tradition: Schließlich war es die Süddeutsche Zeitung, der die US-Militärregierung im Oktober 1945 die Lizenz Nummer 1 für die erste Zeitung in Bayern nach Kriegsende gab. Noch am gleichen Abend erschien die erste Ausgabe. Damit war die SZ das Fundament für eine freie Presse in Bayern. 

Impressum: http://www.sz.de/impressum

Datenschutz: https://www.sz.de/datenschutz

Name: Stratégies
Description:
Stratégies, l’hebdomadaire de référence des professionnels de la communication, présente chaque semaine une information complète sur la communication, le marketing, la publicité et les médias. Il permet à ses abonnés de recevoir, tous les matins sur leur adresse e-mail, la lettre quotidienne électronique de la communication : Stratégies Newsletter.

Stratégies édite également six guides réactualisés, chaque année, qui recensent les professionnels de la communication: le Guide Marketing Services, le Guide Agences (en 2 tomes), le Guide Corporate, le Guide Design, le Guide Santé, le Guide Etudes.

L’hebdomadaire propose aussi six rendez-vous annuels professionnels à travers ses Grands Prix. Ces événements mettent en avant les meilleures campagnes ou créations dans les disciplines de la Publicité et des stratégies médias, du Design, du luxe, du Marketing opérationnel et relationnel, de la communication Corporate, ainsi que les meilleures actions de communication sur la cible des jeunes de moins de 25 ans.

En complément de son magazine, de sa newsletter quotidienne, de ses guides et de ses Grands Prix, Stratégies a créé un programme très riche de formations professionnelles.

Name: elEconomista
Description:
elEconomista.es es el portal líder de la prensa económica en español. Descubre la mejor información económica, política, bursátil y de emprendedores. 
Gracias por seguirnos y por compartir con nosotros.

Name: Bennett Coleman & Co. Ltd. (The Times of India)
Description:
BCCL (Times of India) is one of India's largest media company with iconic brands like The Times of India and Economic Times. The story of BCCL goes back to Nov. 3rd, 1838, when the flagship brand The Times of India, was published as a bi-weekly, The Bombay Times and Journal of Commerce. Since then, we have consistently moved up the growth curve by entering new markets & launching new titles. 

Today, we are a Powerhouse of successful Brands : We believe in shaping market trends with a portfolio of innovative brands. Our flagship brand, The Times of India, is the world’s largest circulating English daily & The Economic Times is the world’s second largest circulating English Business daily. We are driven by the indomitable spirit to question the conventional wisdom. 

Learning & Innovative : We are regarded as one of the most innovative publishing companies. Our unique 'Brand Capital model' is considered amongst the most innovative ideas. Previous innovations include Invitation Pricing, Combos, Space Drawing Rights & Advertorial Supplements. We provide our employees opportunities through world-class training programs. 

Great People : ‘Finest minds who inspire & drive innovative initiatives, build trust & encourage employees to achieve optimal performance’ is the Hallmark of our leadership team. We are one internally cohesive & disciplined team of people from diverse backgrounds. We invest in our people & our policies are designed for their long-term happiness. 

If you are curious & look for avenues of continuous improvement, this is the place to be!

Name: The Australian
Description:
Visit www.theaustralian.com.au for Australia's premier coverage of national and international news with specialised in-depth sections for business, politics, media, higher education, arts, lifestyle and IT. 

Follow @australian on Twitter, like us on Facebook or visit our Google+ page at google.com/+theaustralian. 

Download our apps or subscribe for access to exclusive content and analysis here: http://www.theaustralian.com.au/gettingstarted

Name: Het Financieele Dagblad
Description:
Het Financieele Dagblad is dé nieuws- en inspiratiebron voor zakelijk Nederland. Het FD geeft financieel-economische betekenis aan ontwikkelingen die relevant zijn voor de leiders van vandaag en van morgen, zowel op professioneel vlak als privé. 

Het FD is uitgegroeid tot een multimediaal merk en bereikt de nieuwsconsument door de inzet van print, online en events op elk gewenst moment van de dag, zeven dagen per week.

Name: Challenges
Description:
Que dit l'actualité économique cette semaine ?

Chaque jeudi, retrouvez Challenges, votre hebdomadaire économique français, en kiosques. Challenges, c'est aussi un site web et des réseaux sociaux sur l'actualité économique en temps réel. 

Suivez et partagez l'actualité de l'économie avec la rédaction de Challenges*

Name: Harvard Business Review France
Description: La revue Harvard Business Review (HBR) est éditée en français par Prisma Media. Tous les 2 mois, retrouvez, en kiosque, un nouveau numéro de ce magazine de référence destiné aux cadres et dirigeants d'entreprise. Il s'accompagne du site hbrfrance.fr, sur lequel sont publiés, chaque jour, les chroniques exclusives des meilleurs experts francophones dans leur domaine et tous les articles parus dans le magazine.

Name: USA TODAY
Description:
USA TODAY reflects the pulse of the nation with original, on-the-ground reporting centered on diverse perspectives. Its newsroom of journalists is dedicated to bringing clarity to the news of the day by inspiring conversation and reflection.

Keep up with the news wherever you are by using the USA TODAY app or visiting www.usatoday.com.

Name: Diario Financiero
Description: Diario chileno de noticias, fundado en 1988 y que está ligado a los negocios, las finanzas, la economía y la política nacional e internacional. Información minuto a minuto de noticias e indicadores en el sitio web www.df.cl. Diario Financiero, la comunidad que decide.

Name: The National News
Description:
Since its founding in 2008, The National has set a new standard for quality journalism in the Middle East with a commitment to delivering compelling stories from the heart of the region to an international audience.

Based in Abu Dhabi, with bureaux in London, Washington DC, Beirut and Cairo and correspondents across the Mena region and beyond, The National has developed a reputation for in-depth reportage, agenda-setting investigations and expert analysis and commentary. 

Publishing across all digital platforms, The National harnesses the latest multimedia tools while continuing to produce a print edition five days a week in the UAE. 

The National has been extensively recognised with awards for its design, reporting, photography and video work. Its reputation is especially strong among business leaders and decision makers. 

The National is owned by IMI, a leading global privately owned media group headquartered in the UAE. 

Connect with us online at www.thenationalnews.com and online app stores at TheNationalNews. You can also find us on Twitter and Facebook as @TheNationalNews and on Instagram as @TheNationalNews.com

Name: The Hindu
Description: The Hindu, started in 1878 as a weekly, became a daily in 1889 and from then on has been steadily growing. The Hindu's independent editorial stand and its reliable and balanced presentation of the news have over the years, won for it the serious attention and regard of the people who matter in India and abroad.

Name: Expresso
Description:
Estatuto Editorial:
Entendemos que as publicações de natureza informativa devem ser independentes do poder político e do poder económico, porque só assim cumprem a sua função perante a sociedade onde existem. Não concebemos, portanto, as publicações informativas como um instrumento ou um meio no serviço de determinados objectivos, por mais louváveis que estes sejam, mas como instituições autónomas, através das quais os cidadãos possam, em liberdade e no pluralismo, procurar o esclarecimento de que necessitam para o exercício das suas opções.

O EXPRESSO considera-se apto para exercer essa função porque não pertence ao estado nem a um partido político nem a qualquer grupo económico, não foi afectado directa ou indirectamente pelas nacionalizações e, apesar das muitas vicissitudes por que tem passado, nunca perdeu nem renunciou à sua capacidade de crítica.

No exercício dessa capacidade de crítica temos e teremos presentes os limites que nos são impostos pela deontologia de Imprensa e pela ética profissional, mas só esses.

Sabemos, por exemplo, que é indispensável, em cada momento, distinguir entre as notícias - que deverão ser, tanto quanto possível, objectivas, circunscrevendo-se à narração, à relacionação e à análise dos factos - e as opiniões que deverão ser assinadas por quem as defende, claramente identificáveis e publicadas em termos de pluralismo.

Sabemos, por exemplo, que a selecção do material a publicar, a sua colocação nas diversas páginas, a colunagem dos respectivos títulos, devem obedecer a critérios de inserção baseados na importância efectiva de cada peça e não nas convicções ideológicas de quem as escreve, escolhe ou pagina.
Sabemos, por exemplo, que em casos muito excepcionais, há notícias que mereciam ser publicadas e em lugar de destaque, mas que não o devem ser, não por auto-censura ou censura interna, mas porque a sua divulgação seria eventualmente nociva ao interesse nacional. Reservamo-nos, como é óbvio, o direito de definir, caso a caso, a aplicação desse critério.

Sabemos, por exemplo, que a publicação insistente de determinados assuntos -- do crime e do sexo às baixezas da vida política e económica -- poderia aumentar a venda de exemplares, mas recusamo-nos a alimentar qualquer tipo de sensacionalismo que ponha em perigo o jornalismo de qualidade que pretendemos fazer. Respeitamos, acima de tudo os leitores e estamos conscientes de que eles aceitam e desculpam que erremos, mas que não nos perdoariam se, deliberadamente, por acção ou por omissão, os enganássemos ou abusássemos da sua boa fé.

Atribuímos prioridade absoluta à coerência que historicamente nos tem permitido sermos nós próprios, para além de quem sobe e de quem desce do poder.

Se e quando, um dia, se tornar impossível manter essa coerência, o EXPRESSO acabará, porque - temo-lo dito e é importante repeti-lo - preferimos, nessas circunstâncias, morrer de pé.

Name: El Pais
Description:
EL PAÍS es el líder mundial de la prensa diaria en español y una referencia del periodismo en el ámbito iberoamericano. La inauguración de la edición Brasil en 2013 lo convierte en el primer proveedor de información de calidad en portugués y en español, con cerca de 14 millones de usuarios únicos al mes. EL PAÍS ha sabido adaptarse a la evolución de los medios respetando sus señas de identidad: es un diario de valores, progresista y defensor de las libertades democráticas.

Fundado en 1976, se define como un periódico independiente, de calidad, con vocación iberoamericana y defensor de la democracia pluralista. Su sede social está en Madrid y, además de varias delegaciones en España, tiene redacciones en Washington, México DF, São Paulo y una delegación en Bruselas. El diario cuenta con corresponsales en Pekín, Jerusalén, Moscú, Berlín, París, Londres, Roma, Lisboa, Dubai y Buenos Aires, y con una amplia red de colaboradores en todo el mundo. Su página web se puede leer en español, portugués y catalán. 

EL PAÍS mantiene acuerdos con periódicos de Chile (La Tercera), México (The News y Capital, de Grupo MAC), Argentina (La Nación), Estados Unidos (El Nuevo Herald), República Dominicana (El Caribe) y Perú (La República), en donde se distribuye junto con los medios asociados. Además, con The New York Times, elabora un suplemento en español con contenidos exclusivos del rotativo norteamericano.

Name: La Tribune

Name: Myanmar Business Today
Description:
Myanmar Business Today (MBT) is Myanmar’s largest circulating business publication. It is Myanmar's first and the only bilingual (English-Myanmar) business newspaper, and is distributed in Myanmar and Thailand.

MBT became one of the first foreign-invested media houses Myanmar’s reform-era when Thailand’s established publishing company TPN Media ventured into the Southeast Asian nation in 2012 to start the frontier economy’s pioneering business publication. TPN Media's is registered in Myanmar under the name UT Business Media Co.,Ltd. for publishing, marketing, advertising, and distribution services. 

MBT began operations from their office in South Okkalapa, Yangon until early 2019, when they moved into a larger building in the heart of Yangon, not far from Myanmar Plaza to better collobrate with Yangon's businessmen. 

The main focus is on Myanmar’s economy, investment and finance, business opportunities, foreign trade, property and real estate, automobile, among other sectors.

Myanmar Business Today is a journal printed once a week, and released to news stands on Thursdays. MBT covers a range of news encompassing local business stories, special reports, in-depth features, and analyses. MBT also provides detailed coverage of regional (ASEAN) and international business stories that are beneficial for Myanmar.

Myanmar Business Today’s target readers are foreign and local investors, business people, policymakers, diplomats and government officials. Our advertisers are those who are trying to reach these niche target groups in Myanmar.

With a weekly circulation of 65,000 copies in two countries, and over 170,000 unique monthly visitors to our website, with 620,000 monthly web page views, we provide the best solutions for our advertisers with our rich content, outstanding print quality and superior distribution chain, to convey their messages to readers not only in Myanmar but also in Thailand, Southeast Asia’s second largest economy.

Name: DEMIROREN GAZETECILIK AS
Description:
DÜNDEN BUGÜNE DEMİRÖREN GAZETECİLİK
Demirören Gazetecilik A.Ş.’nin kuruluş hikâyesi, Ali Naci Karacan’ın 3 Mayıs 1950 tarihinde nuri Akça Matbaası’nda Milliyet gazetesini çıkarmaya başlamasına dayanmaktadır. Kadrosunda, Refik Halit Karay, Bedii Faik, Tarık Buğra, Peyami Safa, Refi cevat Ulunay gibi usta gazetecileri barındıran Milliyet, kısa sürede Türk basının en etkin ve en güçlü markalarından biri olmuştur.

Şirket tarihindeki önemli dönüm noktalarından biri, Genel Yayın Yönetmeni Abdi İpekçi’nin doğru ve güvenilir gazetecilik ilkeleriyle basında güvenin simgesi haline gelen Milliyet’in 20 Temmuz 1979’da Aydın Doğan’a satılması olmuştur.

23 Ocak 1995 tarihinde yenilikçi anlayışıyla kendine özgü, yeni bir okur kitlesi oluşturarak Türkiye’nin en çok satan gazetesi haline gelen Posta gazetesi, 20 Kasım 1995 tarihinde Türkiye’nin ilk günlük spor gazetesi olan Fanatik ve 13 Ekim 1996 tarihinde Türkiye’nin en saygın gazetelerinden biri olan Radikal, Doğan Holding iştiraklerinden Simge Yayıncılık ve Dağıtım A.Ş. bünyesine katılmıştır.

2003 yılı sonunda Milliyet Gazetecilik A.Ş. ile bünyesinde Posta, Radikal, Fanatik, Finansal Forum ve Fanatik Basket’i barındıran Simge Yayıncılık birleşerek Demirören Gazetecilik A.Ş. adını almıştır. Bu birleşmeyle Demirören Gazetecilik A.Ş., 1.100 kişi ile Türk yayıncılık sektöründe en çok çalışanı bünyesinde barındıran, toplam 1 milyon net satış ile Türkiye’de gazete pazarının %32’sini elinde bulunduran ve yılda 7.000-7.500 ton ile en çok gazete kâğıdı kullanan yayın grubu olmuştur.

Yayın hayatına Eylül 2002 tarihinde başlayan Vatan Gazetesi, 13 Mart 2008 tarihinde Demirören Gazetecilik A.Ş. bünyesine katılmıştır. Vatan ve Milliyet gazetelerinin 3 Mayıs 2011 itibarıyla satılmasıyla Demirören Gazetecilik A.Ş.,  Posta ve Fanatik gazeteleriyle yayın hayatına devam etmiş , 16 Mayıs 2018 tarihinde Demirören Medya Yatırımları A.Ş’ye satılarak bugünkü yapısına kavuşmuştur

Demirören Gazetecilik A.Ş., Türk basın sektöründe 359 bin adet satışla toplam pazarın %10,9’unu elinde tutmaktadır.

Toplamda günlük ortalama gazete okur sayısını 6,321 bin olarak baz alan Türkiye Basın Okurluk Araştırması(*) sonuçlarına göre, gazeteleri Türkiye genelinin %33,84’üne ulaşan Demirören Gazetecilik A.Ş., tüm basın sektöründeki en yüksek erişim avantajına sahip şirket konumundadır.

Demirören Gazetecilik, dijital medyada faaliyet gösteren önemli markaları bünyesinde bulundurmaktadır. Demirören Gazetecilik web siteleri, internet alanındaki atılımlarına devam ederek markalarını güçlendirmeye devam edecektir.

Name: Atest - Ochrona Pracy
Description:
ATEST - Ochrona Pracy jest ogólnopolskim czasopismem ukazującym się nieprzerwanie od 1947 r., adresowanym do specjalistów bhp, pracodawców i osób zainteresowanych doskonaleniem warunków pracy. Pomagamy pracodawcom i pracownikom służby bhp w rozwiązywaniu problemów z zakresu bezpieczeństwa, higieny i prawa pracy.

Tematyka: zagadnienia bezpieczeństwa i higieny pracy oraz prawa pracy. Komentarze do przepisów i norm z zakresu ochrony pracy. Omówienia nowości technicznych krajowych i zagranicznych, porady ekspertów dla pracodawców i pracowników, orzecznictwo Sądu Najwyższego dotyczące prawa pracy, analizy wypadków przy pracy, ocena ryzyka zawodowego. Zarządzanie bezpieczeństwem, dobre praktyki bhp, ergonomia. Informacje na temat środków ochrony i zabezpieczeń pracowników (w tym środków ochrony indywidualnej i zbiorowej), technicznych rozwiązań w zakresie bezpieczeństwa prowadzonych procesów i technologii, ochrony przeciwpożarowej, edukacji bhp, medycyny i fizjologii pracy, promocji dobrych praktyk z zakresu ochrony zdrowia i bezpieczeństwa pracowników, psychospołecznych aspektów środowiska pracy.

Czytelnicy: służba bezpieczeństwa i higieny pracy, naukowcy i praktycy zajmujący się wypadkami przy pracy i chorobami zawodowymi oraz technicznym bezpieczeństwem pracy, pracodawcy i osoby kierujące pracownikami, przedstawiciele firm szkoleniowych, pracownicy laboratoriów środowiska pracy, studenci kierunków bhp i słuchacze studiów podyplomowych bhp, służba medycyny pracy, pracownicy instytucji nadzoru i kontroli warunków pracy, nauczyciele przedmiotów zawodowych, uczniowie szkół zawodowych, osoby prywatne zainteresowane tematyką bhp, prawem pracy i ergonomią.

Name: The Sacramento Bee
Description:
History
Published: Monday, Dec. 04, 2006 
Founded in 1857, The Sacramento Bee is the flagship of the 30 daily and almost 50 non-daily newspapers owned by The McClatchy Company. The third-largest newspaper corporation in the country in terms of circulation, McClatchy prints more than 3.2 million papers each day, read by millions more all over the world via a covey of Web sites on the Internet.

On February 3, 2007, The McClatchy Company and The Sacramento Bee celebrated their 150th Anniversary. Over the years, McClatchy-owned papers have won hundreds of journalism awards, including 73 Pulitzer Prizes. Of that number, 15 have been coveted Gold Medals for Public Service.


The Sacramento Bee Company overview

The Bee's circulation area covers approximately 12,000 square miles: south to Stockton, north to the Oregon border, east to Reno and west to the San Francisco Bay Area. Over the years, circulation of both the daily and Sunday papers has grown steadily, and the paper remains at the forefront of newspaper technology and publishing. The bundle of ink and newsprint that arrives on time every morning reflects the efforts of more than 1,000 employees and 1,100 independent newspaper carriers.

Arquitectura: Información sobre uno de los segmentos con mayor potencial de crecimiento de la madera en España.

Membre du S.P.H.R. (Syndicat de presse hebdomadaire régionale), il fait partie depuis fin 2016 du groupe Affiches parisiennes, qui comprend 10 titres de presse à vocation économique (en Île-de-France, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes et Paca).

L’Essor Isère paraît le vendredi et publie quotidiennement des articles sur son site internet et ses réseaux sociaux.

Name: PETROTURK
Description:
Enerji sektörünün ilk ve en önemli yayınlarını bünyesinde barındıran Balkan Gazetecilik, 1968 yılında yayın hayatına başlayan Enerji Petrol Gaz, 2004 yılında yayın hayatına başlayan Gas&Power, 2010 yılında yayın hayatına başlayan Green Power gazeteleri ve 2001 yılında başlayan petroturk.com dijital yayın platformu ile yayıncılık faaliyetlerine devam etmektedir. Gruba ait basılı yayınlarda yer alan özel haber ve analizlerin yanı sıra, enerji sektörüne ilişkin önemli haber, analiz, röportajlar, veriler ile son dakika gelişmeleri anında ve sıcağı sıcağına Petroturk.com’da yayınlanmaktadır. Enerji sektörünün tüm segmentlerine hitap eden Petroturk.com, enerji sektör profesyonellerinden politika yapıcılara, üst düzey sektör temsilcilerinden karar vericilere, ekipman firmalarından akaryakıt bayilerine, enerji şirketlerinden kamu kurum ve kuruluşlarına kadar oldukça geniş bir ziyaretçi kitlesine sahiptir. 

Sosyal medya hesaplarımız:
Twitter: Petroturkcom
Instagram: petroturkcom
Linkedin: Petroturk.com
Youtube: petroturktv

Description: A brand new publication targeted at Denmark’s expat community. The International is an independent newspaper that presents compelling and constructive content in an easily accessible way to assist internationals in their adjustment to life in Denmark.

Name: Lamescolanza

Ogni giorno le indiscrezioni, i retroscena, le ultimissime…
Un appuntamento da non perdere!

Name: Urban Transport Magazine
Description:
DAILY NEWS  &  BACKGROUND INFO FOR THE PUBLIC TRANSPORT PROFESSIONAL

The Urban Transport Magazine (UTM) is an innovative Online Magazine for the entire urban & public transport sector world-wide.
The new Online magazine is read by transport managers, decision-makers and all others involved in the urban & public transport business including the industry, unions and interest groups.
UTM is entirely for free and offers daily up-to-date articles and detailed analyses on vehicles, infrastructure, network planning, transport development, transport policies and the latest innovative trends such as autonomous driving, digitalisation and Mobility as a Service applications (MaaS). Every article is featured by high-quality pictures, drawings and maps. The magazine also offers an event calendar as well as literature reviews.

Name: Lebrief.ma
Description:
LeBrief.ma est un média d’information indépendant qui informe les citoyens sur les actualités et les événements du Maroc et du monde. S'appuyant sur une équipe de jeunes journalistes, il met en exergue les sujets importants et leurs conséquences sur la société. L’indépendance et la neutralité politiques sont des valeurs portées par l'ensemble des collaborateurs du média.
-Nous sommes convaincus que l’Information est un produit pas comme un autre
-L’information remplit une fonction majeure : Être bien informé pour bien décider
-Notre mission est d’offrir l'information la plus pertinente et la plus exigeante
-LeBrief ne propose pas un flux d’informations brutes mais une mise en perspective de l’actualité qui influe sur notre quotidien
-Nous ne sommes pas inscrits dans la course aux scoops. L’important pour nous est de donner du sens aux infos.

Nous visons des lecteurs qui s’affirment dans leur statut et leur rôle d’influenceur et décideur. Des Les cadres, managers, entrepreneurs, chefs d’entreprises, décideurs, leaders d’opinion, passionnés d'actualités ou encore des personnes souhaitant améliorer leur culture générale à travers la presse sont nos cibles de références.
Notre rôle est de vulgariser, synthétiser et sourcer les sujets chauds du moment afin de donner une information claire et objective à nos lecteurs en leur fournissant des sources crédibles pour approfondir leur lecture et leur compréhension des sujets traités.

Name: Expressen
Description: Expressen is a nationwide liberal evening newspaper in Sweden, founded 1944 and part of the Bonnier Group. Expressen is a growing mediacompany with editions for print, web, TV, mobile and tablets. Currently Expressen is the most read Swedish newspaper in print, and second largest online newspaper with 4,8 million unike visitors every week.

Name: Times Media Group
Description:
Times Media Group is a digital and print media company that operates in the Phoenix, Tucson, South Orange County, Ventura County, Los Angeles and Denver metro markets. It serves a wide variety of demographic audiences and communities with more than 1.1 million printed copies and millions of online readers each month.

Central to our mission is a commitment to universal and timeless principles fostered within our culture: integrity, excellence, value creation, principled entrepreneurship, a focus on the customer, ever-increasing knowledge, humility, respect and predictable results.

Name: bdnews24.com - Bangladesh News 24 Hours Ltd
Description:
bdnews24.com is the largest news publisher in Bangladesh by audience as well as volume of content - in two languages, Bangla and English.

Bangladesh’s first Internet newspaper, launched on 23 October 2006; first 24/7 news provider in the country in any medium. Arguably, the first solely-for-Internet national newsgathering operation in the world.
 
The news publisher, hailed as the one that has changed the face of journalism in Bangladesh, draws on the resources of more than 500 journalists and photographers around the country and in major world cities.

Background

The company had set out in early 2005, with the news agency's architects holding out the promise to break newer grounds, but living up to that turned out to be mighty tough. Soon, things were in free fall; BDNEWS, as it was called then, appeared all but a bubble burst.

A friendly take-over made way for boardroom changes at Bangladesh News 24 Hours Ltd, the owning company of bdnews24.com.

Toufique Imrose Khalidi, a journalist and former BBC broadcaster, took over as Managing Director of the company in mid-2006. He also organised as Chief Editor a new-look team of experienced, talented and tech-savvy professionals painstakingly gathered from across the journalistic spectrum.

After the mid-2006 changeover, Asif Mahmood, a leading IT entrepreneur, served as the chair of the company board with Toufique Imrose Khalidi being the only other board member. Mr Mahmood left the company selling off his stake in May 2019.

Name: Documented
Description:
Documented is reimagining how to do news and information with, for and about all our diverse communities. We are an independent, non-profit newsroom providing original, responsive reporting and actionable resource guides in English, Spanish, Chinese and Haitian Creole. Sign up for Early Arrival at docu.nyc/earlyarrival

Documented represents a radically different community-driven approach to journalism and information that impacts the everyday experiences of immigrants.

Name: Huntsville Business Journal
Description:
As a sister publication of Huntsville EVENT Magazine, Huntsville Business Journal is a news publication that brings awareness to information and events that impact business in and around Madison County. With a focus on all segments in business including Government, Banking, Real Estate, Legal, Retail, Technology & Healthcare, we are challenged to meet the needs of the local business community, keeping you informed on key elements that affect the bottom line.
Office Hours Mon-Fri. 8am-5pm

huntsvillebusinessjournal.com

Description: Empezamos hace 10 años hablando a los millennials, hoy conectamos con la GenZ, mañana con la generación Alpha y seguiremos con quienes vengan. Porque todxs merecemos estar informadxs, y si podemos hacerlo con dosis de entretenimiento, tendencias y cultura pop, ¿por qué no hacerlo así?

Name: Sun Media
Description: Sun Media Corporation, a division of Postmedia Network Inc. is Canada's largest newspaper publisher whose stated business purpose is to help connect and build better communities. With 43 paid-circulation and free dailies in Canada's key urban markets and more than 200 community publications, Sun Media's English- and French-language papers are leaders in providing local news and information to more than 10.5 million readers every week.

Name: Diário do Transporte
Description: Esta página tem o intuito de divulgar informações sobre os diversos modos de Transporte Público do Brasil e do mundo. Nos preocupamos em divulgar informações do cotidiano para usuários dos transportes coletivos, como divulgamos também notícias do mercado de ônibus e de tecnologias que revolucionam o setor.

Name: The Hill Times
Description:
The Hill Times is an independently-owned newspaper based in Ottawa. Breaking exclusive stories and blazing trails every week, we're an influential must-read for the savvy political and government insider.

Ottawa City Magazine calls us "influential." The Globe and Mail says we’re "feisty" and "hot." CTV's Ottawa bureau says we're a "must-read for anybody or anyone who cares about the democratic process." Some have called us "the inside-the-beltway bible" or the "political insiders' bible." And The Toronto Star's Susan Delacourt says The Hill Times "delves into political and policy matters that we in the daily, national press can only scratch on the surface."

Our readers include Cabinet ministers, MPs, Senators, political staffers, lobbyists, 'backroomers,' political junkies, and some of the top decision-makers in the country, including influential players in Parliament, Cabinet, the Prime Minister's Office, the Privy Council, the Finance Department, Treasury Board, the Department of National Defence, the Justice Department, and more.

We have been giving political players and decision-makers a key platform to communicate with each other within government since 1989.

Name: Jawapos Group
Description: Jawapos Group adalah perusahaan media yang berpusat di Surabaya dan telah berdiri selama 68 tahun. Selain media, Jawapos Group juga bergerak dibidang manajemen properti, manufakturing, logistik dan perkebunan.

Name: Il Giornale
Description: Il Giornale (dalla fondazione sino al 1983 Il Giornale Nuovo) è un quotidiano nazionale italiano fondato a Milano nel 1974 da Indro Montanelli, il quale lo diresse ininterrottamente fino al 1994. Dal 1979 è proprietà della famiglia Berlusconi (dal 1992, di Paolo Berlusconi).

Name: The Hamilton Spectator
Description:
The Hamilton Spectator newspaper and its website, www.thespec.com,  services Hamilton, Burlington and surrounding communities.

The Hamilton Spectator was first published July 15, 1846, and since that date has been the voice of Hamilton and the surrounding area.  The newspaper is part of Torstar Corporation, which also publishes the Toronto Star, regional daily newspapers and news sites, Metroland community news sites and other media properties. 

The Spectator is published six days a week in the morning and has an average daily readership of nearly 230,400 adults.

The Spectator is involved in numerous community partnerships with organizations that include Joseph Brant Hospital, United Way of Hamilton & Burlington, The Art Gallery of Hamilton, St. Joseph's Hospital, Mohawk College and McMaster University, YMCA, Hamilton & Burlington, The Burlington Arts Centre, The Hamilton and Burlington Community Foundation, and The YWCA. The newspaper also contributes to the community by donating $1.8 million dollars in cash and in-paper advertising space to help strengthen charitable groups in the Burlington and Hamilton communities. 

A key charitable priority for the newspaper is the Hamilton Spectator Summer Camp Fund. Thanks to generous donations hundreds of children of disadvantaged families are able to attend summer camp.

Name: Journal du bâtiment et des travaux publics
Description:
Le Journal du bâtiment et des travaux publics est un média d'information dans toute la région Rhône-Alpes qui traite de l'actu du bâtiment et des travaux publics.
L'hebdo chaque jeudi matin pour les abonnés, le site web journal-du-btp.com et les réseaux sociaux pour suivre l'actu au quotidien.

Description:

Name: INCYBERNews
Description:
INCYBERNews is the European media hub of the digital trust community, published by the team behind the FORUM INCYBER (International Cybersecurity Forum). INCYBER is a reference publication covering numerous cybersecurity and digital trust subjects. Every day, across its website, social media channels, and newsletters, INCYBER deciphers the latest cyber news, unpacking it from strategic, operational, legal, technological, and cultural angles.

INCYEBR provides cybersecurity & digital trust professionals with exclusive insights: our editorial team, closely connected to all the major market players and in tune with the challenges they face, delivers the most up-to-date information on the latest economic, regulatory and competitive developments in the sector.

Welcome to INCYBER!

Name: Pitch Magazine
Description:
Established in 2003, Pitch is a leading monthly marketing magazine. The magazine takes a close look at the evolving marketing,broadcasting and media paradigm. It provides incisive, in-depth reports,surveys, analyses and expert views on a variety of subjects.

The readers include leading professionals in the marketing, advertising,and media fraternity. With an eye on the changing environment and an ear to the ground, PITCH is constantly evolving and reshaping itself to keep in touch with the changing realities and to provide relevant content to its readers and value for money to the advertiser. The magazine has a compact team of dedicated journalists with a keen understanding of the marketing communications domain.

Name: CursDeGuvernare.ro
Description:
Publicația CursDeGuvernare.ro a fost lansată în 2010, pornind de la ideea că informația nu e suficientă: ea are nevoie de context, sinteză și analiză, pentru ca noi să înțelegem cu adevărat lumea pe care vrem să o schimbăm. Iar a înțelege e începutul libertății. 

Publicația CursDeGuvernare.ro este editată de societatea Varianta Media SRL.

Name: News Product Alliance
Description: The News Product Alliance is a nonprofit dedicated to supporting news product professionals through community building, training, and capacity building. Our mission is to elevate the discipline of news product management and expand the diversity of news product thinkers in decision-making roles.

Name: Orange County Register
Description: The Orange County Register is a three-time Pulitzer Prize-winning newspaper focused on serving Orange County and helping it thrive. The newspaper portfolio includes community newspapers that cover Orange County’s 34 cities with depth and personality. The diverse media portfolio includes Spanish-language Excélsior, monthly magazines (Coast, OC Family and Southland Golf), and numerous websites and mobile applications. The Orange County Register is part of Southern California News Group (SCNG), which represents a total of 11 media businesses across Orange, Los Angeles, Riverside and San Bernardino counties. SCNG also offers a full spectrum of custom content, printing, insert and direct mail advertising services to help Orange County's 80,000 small businesses grow. For more information, visit www.ocregister.com/aboutus.

Name: The Mainichi - Japan Daily News
Description:
The Mainichi Newspapers emphasize human interactions and treat everyone with respect. It helps to safeguard the environment that supports life. Through its vibrant activities, it helps to create the times.

We will conduct our actions in accordance with the following principles based on this fundamental tenet:
1.To serve as a journalistic, news, and cultural organisation by offering readers distinctive and high-quality products.
2. To work with sales representatives, affiliates, and partner businesses to reinforce the Mainichi Group's unity and forge strong, mutually beneficial relationships with advertising clients and other business associates.
3.To enhance its business foundation in response to the demands of its shareholders while assisting employees in blossoming and enriching their lives.

Name: Emballages Magazine
Description:
Créée en 1932, Emballages Magazine est une revue qui traite de l'univers de l'emballage et du conditionnement. Elle s'adresse aux utilisateurs d'emballages (les conditionneurs), aux designers, aux fabricants d'emballages et aux constructeurs de machines d'emballage et de matériels périphériques (étiqueteuses, codeurs, convoyeurs, robots...), à raison de 9 numéros par an et 5 hors-série.

Son objectif est de fournir à ses lecteurs des informations sur l'actualité du secteur de l'emballage et du conditionnement en termes de produits, innovations, tendances, vie des entreprises, réglementation, environnement.

La revue s'intéresse à tous les types d'emballages, qu'ils soient primaires, secondaires ou tertiaires, du pot de yaourt à la palette en bois en passant par la caisse en carton, la bouteille en plastique, le boîtier aérosol. Tous les secteurs utilisateurs sont couverts, de l'alimentaire à la pharmacie, y compris la cosmétique, l'hygiène, les boissons, l'industrie, le non alimentaire et la chimie. Elle s'intéresse également à tous les matériaux d'emballage : plastique, bois, métal, verre, papier, carton, liège, textile, et, plus récemment, aux bioplastiques, les plastiques d'origine végétale.

Depuis 2002 , le site internet emballagesmagazine.com relate l'actualité du secteur quotidiennement. Une lettre d'information est envoyée, chaque jour, aux abonnés.

Emballages Magazine publie chaque année, dans son dossier du numéro de décembre, le Top 500, classement des 500 premières entreprises du secteur en France, unique en son genre.

Name: La Lettre de l'Assurance
Description:
Chaque semaine, La Lettre de l'Assurance vous informe sur le secteur de l'assurance avec un ton unique en son genre. 
La Lettre de l'Assurance organise une fois par mois des Petits déjeuners Off avec des dirigeants et dirigeantes et une soirée caritative en novembre à Paris.
Abonnez-vous sur notre site.

Name: Revista O Mecânico
Description:
A Revista O Mecânico é uma publicação técnica mensal, formativa e informativa, sobre reparação de veículos leves e pesados. Circula nacionalmente em oficinas mecânicas, de funilaria/pintura e eletricidade, centros automotivos, postos de serviços, retíficas, frotistas, concessionárias, distribuidores, fabricantes de autopeças e montadoras.  Também é distribuída em cooperação com lojas de autopeças “ROD” (Rede Oficial  de Distribuidores da Revista O Mecânico).

A Revista O Mecânico, primeira mídia do segmento de reparação veicular, construiu ao longo de 37 anos de história uma aliança com o mecânico independente. Tem circulação nacional de 70 mil exemplares, auditados pela PWC – PriceWaterhouseCooper, e distribuição feita por meio de assinatura e cortesia para o público especializado. O Portal da Revista (www.omecanico.com.br) traz, além das matérias da Revista publicadas na íntegra, assuntos e novidades exclusivas do site, notícias diárias e vídeos técnicos semanais acessados gratuitamente no link "O Mecâniconline".

Name: The World Art News
Description: Latest News about Top Art, Antiques, and Collectibles from Around the World

Name: BigData Magazine
Description: Revista Líder en España y Latinoamérica sobre BigData. Novedades, Noticias, Entrevistas, Debates... Todo sobre el #BigData online!

Name: VnEconomy / Vietnam Economic Times
Description:
VnEconomy / Tạp chí Kinh tế Việt Nam / Vietnam Economic Times trong suốt gần 30 năm qua không ngừng phát triển và trở thành một tổ hợp truyền thông báo chí đáng tin cậy với phương châm “Chân thực - Tích cực - Hữu ích”. 

Với các ấn phẩm in bao gồm Tạp chí Kinh tế Việt Nam, Vietnam Economic Times, tạp chí điện tử VnEconomy.vn, cùng các giải thưởng - chương trình thường niên uy tín như “Thương hiệu mạnh Việt Nam”, “Tin & Dùng”, “Rồng Vàng”, VnEconomy / Tạp chí kinh tế Việt nam / Vietnam Economic Times luôn đồng hành cùng doanh nghiệp, chung sức nỗ lực đóng góp cho sự phát triển kinh tế của đất nước. 

Đừng quên nhấn theo dõi kênh LinkedIn của VnEconomy để cập nhật những thông tin kinh tế trong nước và quốc tế hữu ích cho doanh nghiệp

Name: infoLibre.es
Description:
infoLibre es un periódico digital que nació con el objetivo de ofrecer a sus lectores temas propios de investigación y denuncia, especialmente sobre aquellos poderes que tienen mayor capacidad de controlar la agenda mediática, además de las informaciones relevantes de cada día.  Encontrarás en nuestra web cinco secciones informativas: política, economía, mundo, cultura y medios.

infoLibre aspira a practicar un periodismo independiente, honesto y riguroso. De calidad. Progresista y comprometido con la democracia, con los derechos humanos y con los valores cívicos de la solidaridad, la igualdad y la libertad.  

infoLibre tiene una zona exclusiva para socios, cuyo apoyo es imprescindible para que este proyecto se consolide y crezca. Podrán acceder a nuestra revista mensual tintaLibre, con grandes historias de lectura más reposada escritas por firmas prestigiosas, y tendrán acceso a los mejores artículos publicados por el medio francés Mediapart, socio editorial y empresarial de infoLibre. Además, disfrutarán de un espacio propio en la web: el club infoLibre donde enviar artículos, debatir, participar en chats...

Name: Montreal Gazette
Description:
Keep the news with you at all times with the Montreal Gazette.  
You can access the news where and when you want it on our three distinct platforms: newspaper, responsive design website and local news smartphone app for iOS and Android.

Name: L'Hémicycle
Description: L’Hémicycle est une revue trimestrielle indépendante. 100 pages d’analyses, d’entretiens, d’Histoire et d’histoires. Ses ambitions : décrypter un monde devenu de plus en plus complexe, explorer les nouveaux sens de la politique, raconter les combats des femmes et des hommes qui s’engagent, apporter une perspective historique sur notre époque.

Name: Viti magazine - Media et Agriculture
Description:
VITI, c'est un magazine de la vigne au vin, animé par une équipe de journalistes spécialisés!

Un mensuel de la presse professionnelle agricole
Un site Internet www.mon-viti.com
Une newsletter hebdomadaire

Name: Folha Vitória
Description: Somos o maior jornal online do Espírito Santo. Há 18 anos, levamos informações com credibilidade e inovação aos capixabas. Siga o Folha Vitória nas redes sociais e fique por dentro das principais notícias do dia  leiafv.com/FVnasredes

Name: Magazine Bretons
Description: Vendu en kiosques ou sur abonnement, le magazine Bretons est le mensuel indispensable pour comprendre la Bretagne sous toutes ses facettes. Des rencontres étonnantes, des entretiens qui vont au fond des choses, des propos qu'on ne lit nulle part ailleurs. Et cela pour, encore et toujours, réfléchir à cette question fondamentale : quel sens y a-t’il à être Breton aujourd'hui ?

Name: NewsGram
Description:
NewsGram (www.newsgram.com) is an internationally acclaimed non-profit media organization   headquartered in Chicago, USA. 
NewsGram aspires to rake in news, reviews, comments and information from all the corners of the world at its readers’ fingertips. Our core objective is to provide nothing but straight facts and information(s) by:

1.	Presenting unadulterated facts in an unbiased and understandable way
2.	Publishing articles with right attitude and impact
3.	Pursuing journalism, also, as a moral and social responsibility

We believe that nothing is too small or insignificant to escape our notice. We dare to unearth the issues which remain untouched and fade unnoticed. For us at NewsGram, everything that matters is providing our readers with one stop credible news destination.
Our website: www.NewsGram.com
Write to us: mail@newsgram.com
Editor-in-Chief: Dr. Munish Kumar Raizada

Name: Les Affiches de Grenoble et du Dauphiné
Description:
Les Affiches de Grenoble et du Dauphiné est un journal d'annonces légales diffusé dans le département de l'Isère. Hebdomadaire, il paraît tous les vendredis depuis le 24 novembre 1923. 

Son contenu s'adresse à une majorité d'actifs, professionnels, chefs d’entreprise, commerçants et artisans, cadres moyens et supérieurs pour une information locale et d'annonces judiciaires et légales.

Name: Binnenvaartkrant
Description: Where inland shipping is, there is the Binnenvaartkrant. Over 70,000 people read the Binnenvaartkrant, in print or online. Additionally, through our websites, newsletters, and social media, we reach another 50,000 people per month. This way, we assist advertisers in reaching all decision-makers in the inland shipping sector.

Name: Las Provincias
Description: Grupo multimedia de la Comunitat Valenciana, perteneciente a Vocento. Cuenta con un periódico, un portal de internet lider absoluto en la región, una televisión, radio y varios otros proyectos. Tanto el periódico como su web acaban de lanzar nuevos diseños de sus soportes.

Name: GEWINN Wirtschaftsmagazin
Description: GEWINN ist Österreichs größtes Wirtschaftsmagazin, das sich ganz der Linie „Das Wirtschaftsmagazin für Ihren persönlichen Vorteil“ verschrieben hat und für seine Leserinnen und Leser ein unverzichtbarer Ratgeber in wirtschaftlichen und finanziellen Lebensfragen sein möchte. Das 1982 gegründete Magazin erscheint monatlich, darüber hinaus versorgt GEWINN seine Leserinnen und Leser mit aktuellen Informationen auf gewinn.com und über einen wöchentlichen Newsletter, der exklusiv an registrierte Empfänger versendet wird. GEWINN ist auch Veranstalter mehrerer Seminarreihen und der seit 1991 stattfindenden GEWINN-Messe, Österreichs wichtigster Messe für Geldanlage.

Name: Le Quotidien de la Réunion
Description: Le Quotidien de la Réunion, votre journal réunionnais d'actualités et d'informations de l'île de La Réunion 974 et de l'Océan Indien. Actualités, dossiers, faits divers, courriers des lecteurs, petites annonces, services et loisirs, informations pratiques, ...

Name: Asia Times
Description:
Asia Times Holdings Limited is a media conglomerate with operations on several continents, including the Asia Times, the English-language publication launched in 1995.

Since its early days in Bangkok, Asia Times has been among the most credible names in news in the world’s most populous region. What began as a printed broadsheet distributed continent-wide, in 1998 became the world’s first fully digital news publication. With its October 2016 re-launch, Asia Times is again leading the way, incorporating digital tools – including a dynamic blogging platform that gives readers a voice – rarely seen in the Asian media market. 

With a clean aesthetic and unique functionality, Asia Times stands apart as the only all-digital, pan-Asian site aimed specifically at English-speaking users. It is widely read not only in Asia, but also in Europe and in North America, where nearly half of its readership is based, regarding it as the must-read on Asian politics and finance.

In 2016, the Board of Directors named veteran editor and economist Uwe Parpart as Editor.

Name: Le Réveil du Midi
Description:
Le Réveil du Midi vous informe quotidiennement des dernières actualités du Gard ! Cette page LinkedIn est dédiée aux actualités économiques à destination des entreprises et entrepreneurs gardois

Retrouvez nos derniers articles sur https://www.lereveildumidi.fr/

#actualité #économie #gard #entreprises #entrepreneurs

Name: الاقتصادية
Description:
صحيفة الاقتصادية السعودية اسم عريق في تاريخ الصحافة الاقتصادية المتخصصة، صدر العدد الأول منها كصحيفة ورقية في الأول من ديسمبر عام 1992، وقد مرت بتحولات كثيرة، منها إصدار الطبعة الملونة، وإطلاق الأقسام المتخصصة، إضافة إلى أنها من أوائل الصحف السعودية التي أهتمت بالإعلام الرقمي، وعملت على تدشين موقعها الإلكتروني بمحتوى متخصص وبتحديثات لحظية للأخبار والتغطيات والتحليلات، ومن ثم دشنت منصاتها الرقمية الأخرى في فضاء الإعلام الرقمي وعملت على تطويرها حتى أصبح لها مكانة بارزة في أوساط مجتمع المال والأعمال، والقطاعات الحكومية.

 

 تركز "الاقتصادية" على الأخبار والتطورات الاقتصادية، والتحليلات المالية العميقة، والملتيميديا، والمقالات المتخصصة من الخبراء والاقتصاديين وقطاع الأعمال في مسارات الاقتصاد المختلفة ومنها: أسواق الأسهم، والطاقة، والعقارات، والاقتصاد الأخضر، والعملات، والمعادن، وأخبار الشركات، والسياحة والسفر، كما تنفذ تغطيات صحافية متنوعة عبر مراسليها في السعودية ودول العالم، لتقدم لقرائها مواد نوعية محدثة أولاً بأول تسهم في سبر أغوار الاقتصاد بجميع فروعه وتبسيط المعلومات ونقلها بحرفية ودقة وموثوقية.

 

 "الاقتصادية" شهدت في العام 2024 نقلة نوعية، وذلك بعد أن أقرت المجموعة السعودية للأبحاث والإعلام SRMGعقد شراكة استراتيجية بينها و"اقتصاد الشرق مع بلومبرغ"، لتكونا من أكبر المنصات الإعلامية المتخصصة في الاقتصاد.

 

القرار الاستراتيجي الذي اتّخذته SRMG أتاح للمنصة التركيز أكثر على أهم الأخبار الاقتصادية والمالية العالمية وانعكاساتها على المنطقة عبر تحليلات معمّقة ودقيقة وتغطيات محلية نوعية وحصرية.

Name: Groupe Zepros
Description:
Le groupe Zepros 
Créé en 2005, Zepros est un groupe média BtoB, dédié aux professionnels de l’Automobile, du Bâtiment, de la Restauration et des Collectivités. Fidèle à sa mission, Zepros rend accessible gratuitement une information de qualité à tous les acteurs de terrain, quels que soient leurs métiers.

Le groupe s’appuie également sur Zepros Business Solutions (ZBS), son agence de communication intégrée. Composée de 30 experts, ZBS conçoit des dispositifs à 360° sur mesure pour répondre aux enjeux business de ses clients.

Le groupe Zepros en quelques chiffres : 
- 20 ans d'existence
- 20 journalistes 
- 59 collaborateurs 
- 21 événements organisés par an
- 78 journaux édités chaque année, pour une diffusion de plus de 4,5 millions d’exemplaires (40 % en digital)
- 7 sites internet : www.zepros.fr /  www.auto.zepros.fr / www.bati.zepros.fr /  www.habitat.zepros.fr / www.negoce.zepros.fr / www.resto.zepros.fr / www.territorial.zepros.fr / 
- 600 newsletters spécialisées par an. 
- Une data unique de 650 000 contacts professionnels. 
- Une communauté de plus de 120 000 abonnés sur les réseaux sociaux

Name: AdriaPorts
Description:
AdriaPorts è una testata online con aggiornamenti quotidiani, nata per raccontare ciò che accade nel mondo della portualità, della logistica e dei cantieri navali nel Mare Nord Adriatico. I porti di Trieste e Monfalcone con il sistema logistico regionale del Friuli Venezia Giulia, il porto di Venezia e i porti di Capodistria (Koper) in Slovenia e Fiume (Rijeka) in Croazia sono il territorio di riferimento per AdriaPorts.

AdriaPorts ha l’obiettivo di informare operatori portuali e stakeholder della blue economy, allargando i propri confini verso l’Est e il Centro Europa, mercato naturale per il traffico commerciale tra Nord Adriatico, Far East e bacino del Mar Mediterraneo.

Traffici delle merci via mare, carichi speciali, intermodalità, costruzioni navali, crociere e yachting, logistica e politica dedicata all’economia del mare sono gli argomenti che troverete su AdriaPorts.

Name: AlRiyadh Newspaper - جريدة الرياض اليومية
Description:
أسست جريدة الرياض التي تصدرها مؤسسة اليمامة الصحفية بتاريخ 1/1/1385 الموافق 1/5/1965م كأول جريدة رسمية تصدر باللغة العربية في عاصمة المملكة العربية السعودية، وبدأت في حي المرقب وظلت هناك 9 سنوات قبل أن تنتقل إلى حي الملز والتي بقيت هناك لمدة 18 سنة تقريباً، ثم تم افتتاح مبنى المؤسسة الجديد في حي الصحافة بتاريخ 5/7/1414 وفيه انتقلت إلى أحدث تقنيات الطباعة وذروتها. 

وتنتشر مكاتب "الرياض" داخل المملكة وخارجها حيث يصل عددها إلى 58 مكتبا إضافة إلى شبكة من مئات المراسلين حول العالم، حيث تعد من أكثر الصحف في الوطن العربي نجاحا ونموا، وتصدر الصحيفة في 48-64 صفحة يومياً وقد تصل إلى أكثر من 100 صفحة في مناسبات خاصة، ويقوم على تحريرها نخبة من الكتاب والمحررين. 

ويعمل بـ"الرياض" أكبر عدد من الموظفين المتفرغين على مستوى الجهات الإعلامية في المملكة بشكل يفوق الثلاثة أضعاف عن اقرب جهة إعلامية سعودية منافسة لها، وقد تمكنت "الرياض" ومنذ سنوات من تحقيق نسبة 100% في سعودة وظائف التحرير، ويشكل 50% من أعضاء الجمعية العمومية للمؤسسة والمشاركين في ملكيتها صحفيين وإداريين يعملون في التحرير ولهم الحق في الأرباح والتصويت في الجمعية العمومية. 

كما يعد موقع "الرياض" الإلكتروني alriyadh.com (تأسس عام 1998م) أحد أبرز وأكبر المواقع الإعلامية على شبكة الانترنت، ويحظى بمعدل زيارات عالية تقدر بنحو مليون ونصف مليون زيارة يومياً مما يضعه في طليعة المواقع الالكترونية السعودية والعربية. 

حصلت "الرياض" على تكريم العديد من الجمعيات والمؤسسات الخيرية نتيجة لمبادراتها الإنسانية في الدعم، وكانت أول من اهتم بالعنصر النسائي حيث تم تعيين أول مديرة تحرير في مؤسسة صحفية بالإضافة إلى انضمامهن لعضوية المؤسسة وملكيتها.

The first daily newspaper that was published in Arabic in the capital of the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, the first issue was published on 01/01/1385 AH corresponding to 11/5/1965 AD with a limited number of pages. But it continued to develop until it reached a daily publication of 52 pages, 32 pages of which are colored pages. It is edited by a group of elite writers and editors, and it is the first Saudi publication that registers a growth rate of (100%) in Saudizing editorial jobs.

Description:

Sociologues, économistes, politologues, écrivains, artistes, scientifiques se rejoignent pour vous offrir un condensé de savoirs sur un seul sujet.

Name: Les Nouvelles Esthétiques
Description:
Avec ses 20 éditions internationales, Les Nouvelles Esthétiques est LE magazine de référence des professionnels de l'esthétique, de la beauté, du spa et du bien-être.  

Tous les mois, Les Nouvelles Esthétiques offrent du contenu, du fond, des solutions pratiques, une vision claire et globale du métier, du marché ainsi que ses prospectives avec : les techniques de massage, le maquillage, la peau, le bio, la vente, les ongles, la vie des spas, les brèves, la vie professionnelle, les meilleurs soins instituts, les nouveautés produits, les actualités parfumerie, les conseils juridiques, le marketing, l'appareillage, l'équipement, la gestion... 

Les Nouvelles Esthétiques organisent depuis 54 ans le Congrès International Esthétique & Spa, à Paris, Porte de Versailles, Hall 5. 

Rassemblant chaque année plus de 18 000 participants et +250 exposants, le Congrès est de loin le plus grand et le plus important événement dédié aux secteurs du bien-être et de l'esthétique. Le Congrès est un vivier exceptionnel pour tous les chasseurs de nouvelles tendances pour préparer l'avenir ! Il apporte également, au travers de son riche programme de conférences et démonstrations, des réponses concrètes aux questions d'aujourd'hui et de demain. 

L'ensemble des professionnels du spa, de la beauté, des cosmétiques, du maquillage, de l’équipement, des ongles et de l’appareillage s'y retrouve pour s'informer, échanger, saisir les évolutions du marché, créer ou renouveler ses relations commerciales. 

Le magazine Les Nouvelles Esthétiques existe depuis 73 ans, et le Congrès depuis 54 ans. Créés par le visionnaire H. Pierantoni, ils soutiennent le marché de la beauté depuis des décennies, sans faiblesse, sans mystère et sans interruption. Exposer ou visiter le Congrès, annoncer ou lire Les Nouvelles Esthétiques c'est faire le choix de la sécurité, de la constance et de la réussite.

Name: Amwal Al Ghad - اموال الغد
Description:

Name: La Tribune Toulouse
Description: Associant l’expertise d’un titre historique à l’agilité du numérique, La Tribune a opéré depuis plusieurs années sa transformation, en se déployant au cœur des usages de son audience : site internet, quotidien numérique, applications mobile, réseaux sociaux, mais également une présence terrain permettant d’animer son audience via l’organisation de 80 événements par an. Son ancrage territorial fait de La Tribune le média économique des métropoles avec des éditions en régions et en Afrique avec La Tribune Afrique, alimentant une ligne éditoriale axée sur l’économie réelle (l’innovation, le numérique, les territoires…) et valoriser les entreprises qui dynamisent leur écosystème.

Name: Séquences Bois
Description: Créée par le CNDB (Comité National pour le Développement du Bois) il y a 30 ans, et indépendante depuis 2018 (Société d'Editions Architecturales, qui comprend notamment la revue d'a), Séquences Bois est la revue française de référence en architecture bois. Dotée d'un comité de rédaction composé d'architectes, d'ingénieurs, d'universitaires et de conseillers techniques bois, Séquences Bois s’est donné pour mission de défendre et valoriser la qualité architecturale dans la construction bois, décortiquant les réalisations architecturales les plus exemplaires pour démontrer l’intérêt écologique, structurel et esthétique du matériau. Forte d'un réseau de journalistes spécialisés, dont les articles sont réputés pour leur caractère technique, elle est un média particulièrement reconnu par les professionnels français du secteur de la construction. Avec cinq numéros par an, cette revue documente et analyse des constructions tant françaises qu’européennes, voire internationales, selon des thématiques spécifiques à chaque numéro. Dans chacun d’eux, six réalisations sont présentées, dont une pour la singularité de ses détails techniques, et une autre pour celle de sa mise en œuvre. La revue comprend également un guide thématique composé d’une sélection de produits bois présentés sous forme de fiches techniques, et diffuse l’actualité de la filière, des sorties d’ouvrages et des événements autour du bois.

Name: ElNacional.cat
Description:
El Nacional.cat és un diari català, de vocació europea i global, que neix a la xarxa sota la direcció i l’impuls del periodista José Antich i un equip de professionals compromesos amb els valors del periodisme des d’una mirada lliure, plural i oberta.

El Nacional.cat té els àmbits d’atenció preferent en l’actualitat política, econòmica, social, cultural i esportiva, amb especial atenció a la dinàmica informativa de Catalunya.

El Nacional.cat s’edita en català i en castellà i té en l’entorn digital el canal d’expressió i interrelació permanent amb els lectors i lectores i el conjunt de la ciutadania.

Name: Déchets Infos
Description:
Déchets Infos est une lettre d'information spécialisée sur la gestion des déchets, destinée à tous les acteurs du secteur :
— collectivités locales
— opérateurs de collecte et de traitement
— équipementiers
— bureaux d'études
— éco-organismes
— administrations concernées (DREAL, DDPP…)
— ONG…

La lettre est diffusée par e-mail en PDF. Elle paraît tous les 15 jours (22 numéros par an).

Si vous souhaitez recevoir gratuitement un numéro : http://dechets-infos.com/exemplaire-gratuit.
Pour recevoir gratuitement, tous les 15 jours, le sommaire détaillé : http://dechets-infos.com/sommaire.

Le site Internet (http://dechets-infos.com) présente, en accès libre, le sommaire détaillé de chaque numéro ainsi que le début ou le résumé de chaque article.

Déchets Infos a été fondée et est dirigée par Olivier Guichardaz, journaliste spécialisé sur la gestion des déchets depuis 2001 (fr.linkedin.com/pub/olivier-guichardaz/7/676/689/).

La SAS Déchets Infos édite également "L'Echo circulaire" (https://lecho-circulaire.com), une lettre d'information spécialisée sur la prévention, la réutilisation, le réemploi, le reconditionnement, le recyclage émergent…, réalisée par Catherine Moncel (https://www.linkedin.com/in/catherine-moncel-96b4a69b/).

Name: Behörden Spiegel
Description: Der Behörden Spiegel begleitet die öffentliche Verwaltung sowie den Modernisierungsprozess bei Bund, Ländern und Kommunen seit Anbeginn. Deutschlands größte und unabhängige Zeitung für Staat und Kommunen, seine Beschäftigten, seinen Einkauf und seine Modernisierungsfähigkeit zeigt Monat für Monat in journalistisch kritischer und unabhängiger Berichterstattung Wege zu mehr Effizienz in der staatlichen Verwaltung auf. Dabei stehen die Prozessoptimierung und Effizienzsteigerung behördlichen Handelns im Mittelpunkt der Berichterstattung.

Capital, información económica al alcance de tu mano.

Name: Rolling Stone Italia
Description:
Rolling Stone è la media company dedicata alla musica, al cinema e alla pop culture più influente del mondo.
Con head quarter a New York e oltre 50 anni di storia, Rolling Stone vanta un pubblico globale di oltre 60 milioni di persone ogni mese e oltre 100 contenuti pubblicati al giorno.

Recensioni musicali, cinematografiche e di podcast, interviste, commenti di politica e attualità, Rolling Stone ha condotto inchieste e iniziative pluripremiate in molti paesi del mondo, compresa l’Italia.
Nel nostro paese Rolling Stone è un sito web rollingstone.it, una rivista trimestrale, canali social ed eventi.

Name: Water Magazine
Description:
Water Magazine is a freely distributed monthly print and digital publication reporting on the UK & Ireland’s municipal and industrial water, wastewater & stormwater sector.

Water Magazine is an open access source, meaning all content is freely accessible to everyone. 

A quick visit to the website will allow you to openly and freely access:

•	Current or past editions of Water Magazine to read in your browser
•	The latest news, posts, blogs, interviews, opinion and video content
•	Use the fully searchable news archive 
•	Explore the world's major water and wastewater industry exhibitions, trade fairs and conferences, and freely sync them to your digital calendar
•	Source products and suppliers listed in the comprehensive A-Z Supplier Directory
•	Subscribe, for free, to the monthly print magazine if you have a UK postal address
•	Subscribe, for free, to the digital edition of the monthly magazine no matter where in the world you are based

Water Magazine - Full coverage of industry issues, from rainfall to outfall.

https://linktr.ee/watermag

Description:
Entretien Textile est le magazine spécialisé pour tous les professionnels du monde de l’entretien des textiles .
1ière et unique source d’information pour les professionnels, qu’ils soient Responsables de Blanchisseries Industrielles, Hospitalières, Maisons de retraites, gérants de pressing ou de laveries, loueurs de linge, Distributeurs de matériels ou de produits, Entretien Textile leur apporte tous les deux mois une information complète sur l’actualité du secteur, les nouveaux équipements ou produits, des cas pratiques, des conseils pour bien gérer son entreprise, l’évolution des réglementations, des portraits d’entreprise ….
