Name: Inventiva
Description:
Inventiva magazine is a young but aggressive startup based out of New Delhi, India. Inventiva is a business platform working towards startups and entrepreneurs.

Inventiva features startups and entrepreneurs from all backgrounds and is operational from Delhi since January 21st 2017 and covers pan India.

The success of Inventiva can be judged by a single fact that in last 14 months ie- 425 days, Inventiva has published more than 1200 articles on its website and covered more than 300+ entrepreneurs that means almost 3 articles per day and 1 entrepreneur per day on an average.

Its traffic right now is somewhere around 3,00,000 per month with total 44000 unique visitors and alexa rank of 51,846 in just one year.

You can visit the website at https://www.inventiva.co.in and get in touch with them at info@inventiva.co.in and +91-9717329850 via whatsapp and calls. Inventiva has also been covered by newspatroling as one of the most influential blogging platforms in India.

Name: 海事プレス KAIJI PRESS
Description:
Daily Kaiji Press has earned overwhelming support as Japan’s leading newspaper in the shipping and shipbuilding industries.
Through unparalleled news coverage,  in-depth commentary, exclusive interviews with key figures, investigative reporting, data analysis, and highly original serialized features, we deliver deep and accurate insights into the dynamics of Japan’s and the world’s maritime sectors. 
This has garnered trust across the industry—from top executives to frontline marketing professionals and engineers.

Name: Luxemburger Wort
Description:
The “Luxemburger Wort” is a daily newspaper published in Luxembourg since 1848. 
The newspaper is mainly written in German, but includes small sections in both Luxembourgish and French. The website wort.lu has 4 different language sections, each one focusing on the specific interests of the respective international community in Luxembourg: English, French, German and Portuguese.

The editor of the newspaper and its news website is Mediahuis Luxembourg S.A.

The paper has a circulation of almost 70,000 copies a day and a daily readership of more than 
177,000 (print and e-paper) making it Luxembourg's most popular newspaper on both counts.

Furthermore, the group has other activities and products including: 

Newspapers & Magazines (Luxemburger Wort, Télécran, AutoMoto, Contacto)

Internet & Radio (wort.lu, mywort.lu, radio latina)

Printing office & Publishing (Myprint, Editions Saint-Paul, Reliure Saint-Paul)

Advertising and classifieds (régie.lu)

Bookshops “Libo”

Name: Recycling Industry
Description:
Recycling Industry is the news and information website about waste and recycling industry that publish national and international news, focus on plants and developments, commodity information, market analysis, surveys of trends, regulatory news, events and multimedia.

Recycling Industry is an useful tool for recycling companies, equipment and plants manufacturers, advisers, public bodies.

Recycling Industry is an evolution of a long standing experience in recycling press. Providing daily updates in italian and english, it guarantees world-wide visibility, widespread availability and social coverage.

Name: Mundo Deportivo
Description:
Mundo Deportivo (El Mundo Deportivo hasta julio de 1999) es un diario deportivo español editado en Barcelona por el Grupo Godó (grupo al que también pertenece el periódico La Vanguardia). Su director delegado es el periodista Santi Nolla y el director gerente, Óscar Rodríguez.1 Se centra principalmente en informar acerca de la actualidad futbolística, y en especial la del FC Barcelona.

Historia

Nació el 1 de febrero de 1906,2 primero como semanario y desde 1929 como diario. Es la publicación deportiva más antigua que todavía se edita en España y la segunda más antigua de Europa, tras la italiana La Gazzetta dello Sport fundada en 1896.3
Tiene más de 366.000 lectores exclusivos en España, de los cuales más de 220.000 en Cataluña. Ofrece, además de la información polideportiva, un especial seguimiento al Atlético de Madrid (Mundo Atlético) y al deporte vasco, especialmente al Athletic Club (Mundo Deportivo Bizkaia) y a la Real Sociedad (Mundo Deportivo Gipuzkoa).
A principios de julio de 1999 presentó un nuevo diseño en su formato: con una edición más colorida, más páginas, mejores fotos, una nueva cabecera y cambio de nombre, pasando a omitir el artículo 'El' en su denominación.4 En el año 2006 celebró su centenario, organizando varios actos en los que participaron grandes deportistas (como Ronaldinho y Pelé) y grandes autoridades de España como los Príncipes de Asturias, Felipe de Borbón y Letizia Ortiz.

Name: Região de Leiria
Description:
Created in 1935 by the hand of José Baptista dos Santos, REGIÃO DE LEIRIA is one of the most important local newspapers in Portugal.
With an average audience of 100 thousand readers, including print and digital, REGIÃO DE LEIRIA delivers the top news of this region to the four corners of the world.
Work for local development is a main objective and a principle that guides the daily routine of the team. For that reason, the newspaper also promotes several events and is committed to a strong project of social responsibility.
REGIÃO DE LEIRIA has been taking profit of its legacy and is gradually adapting to digital world. Eight decades after its foundation, is still devoted to report the story of this region and to follow the feelings and needs of those who live and work here.

Name: Somos Pymes
Description:
SOMOS PYMES se presenta como un vehículo que convoca a empresarios de la Ciudad de Buenos Aires y del primer y segundo cordón de la Provincia de Buenos Aires para potenciar sus negocios y fortalecer sus relaciones institucionales.

CONCEPTO AM 1050: Toda la información que se necesita para alcanzar el liderazgo empresarial la tiene Alejandro Calderaro y su prestigioso equipo…Actualidad, asesoramiento y vínculos empresariales en Somos Pymes.
Location: Palermo, Ciudad autónoma de Buenos Aires

Name: The Parliament
Description: The Parliament Magazine is packed with timely features, news analyses and opinion articles on EU policy.

Name: Big Rigs Newspaper
Description:
Published fortnightly, Big Rigs National Road Transport Newspaper has played a significant part in the transport industry since its inception in the early 1990s — as a conveyor of industry specific news, views and advertising campaigns.

Big Rigs targets the road transport sector with a circulation of more than 26,000 copies nationally (to every state and territory) with a comprehensive network of individual drop-off points as well as a growing subscriber list.

Big Rigs has the most frequent publication schedule. It gives it the ability to deliver more frequent and breaking news along with the latest product releases within the industry ahead of other publications.

Big Rigs is among the most read and recognised transport publication in Australia. It proves when people think of transport publications they think of Big Rigs first.

Combined with our website, Big Rigs can connect advertisers with customers from all segments of the road transport industry.

Big Rigs is a much sought after media source with a diverse readership that includes government departments, white and blue collar personnel within transport companies, transport hubs, truck stops and roadhouses, new and used dealerships, spare parts and accessories outlets, manufacturers, tyre centres, workshops, as well as private subscribers making it a favourite within the transport community.

Name: Bâtiment Entretien

1ière source d’information pour les Entreprises de Propreté, les Responsables Hygiène et Propreté dans les Collectivités, les Hôpitaux, l’Industrie Agro-Alimentaire, les Distributeurs de matériels et de produits d’hygiène, Bâtiment Entretien leur apporte tous les deux mois une information complète sur l’actualité du secteur, les nouveautés, les marchés et contrats, les techniques, les équipements, des cas pratiques…

Name: Dagblad van het Noorden
Description:
Algemene omschrijving
Diep geworteld in de provincies Groningen en Drenthe bereikt u meer dan 400.000 personen per dag met de papieren krant Dagblad van het Noorden. Dit is maar liefst 42% van de totale bevolking in Noord-Nederland.

Redactieprofiel
Dagblad van het Noorden benadrukt dat het nieuws betrouwbaar en correct is en niet betuttelend of eenzijdig belicht. DVHN communiceert op een respectvolle, overtuigende en nieuwsgierige manier met klanten. Met haar producten wil DVHN gebruikers een tevreden gevoel geven. Hen de mogelijkheid bieden aan anderen te laten zien dat zij nieuws en informatie belangrijk vinden en geassocieerd worden met goed geïnformeerde en kennisrijke inwoners. De krant is kritisch en staat voor het noordelijk belang. Het palet aan nieuws is breed: plaatselijk, regionaal, binnenlands en internationaal.

Lezersprofiel
Lezers van Dagblad van het Noorden zijn vaak 35 jaar of ouder, bezitten veelal een eigen woning, zijn middelbaar tot hoog opgeleid en zijn getrouwd of samenwonend. Gemiddeld genomen zijn ze even vaak man als vrouw. De huishoudens bestaan vooral uit twee of meer personen, deels oudere gezinnen zonder (thuiswonende) kinderen, deels jongere gezinnen met kinderen.

Name: Liaisons Sociales Magazine
Description:
Le seul et unique news mag du social. 
Infos, analyses, décryptages, reportages sur le monde du travail.

Name: Daily NewsPK
Description:
Daily NewsPK is an independent digital platform for business communities, where thought leaders and industry experts share their insights of different markets and drive constructive opinions.
We understand the importance of information, and we have created a forum where you can get all the information from business planning and marketing to growth strategies and key trends. Our main focus is to support and help businesses understand and reach next level.

Name: Leeuwarder Courant
Description:
Algemene omschrijving
Sinds 1752 is de Leeuwarder Courant de krant van Friesland. Diep geworteld in de provincie en met een bereik van bijna 300.000 personen per dag bereikt u met de papieren Leeuwarder Courant bijna 50% van de totale bevolking in Friesland.

Redactieprofiel
De Leeuwarder Courant is sinds 1752 het hoofdblad van Friesland en brengt dagelijks  het nieuws via de krant, internet, smartphones en tablets. Er is een zeer prominente plaats ingeruimd voor het regionale Friese nieuws, naast het binnenland- en buitenlandnieuws.

Lezersprofiel
Het grootste gedeelte van de lezers van de Leeuwarder Courant bevindt zich in de leeftijdsgroep van 35 jaar en ouder, is middelbaar en hoger opgeleid en behoort tot de middel- en hogere inkomensklasse.

Name: Annahar Newspaper
Description: "In the begining there was the word. The word became people's lives. We are the children of this word, the free word, which Annahar has embodied for 80 years. And here we are, carrying on the message. We are a Daily, Political and Independent Lebanese Newspaper that was established on August 4th, 1933 and is still growing strong. It is a creative and continuous message.

Name: Medical Dialogues
Description:
Medical Dialogues is the new face of medical journalism in India. Our aim is to facilitate free flow of information in the healthcare sector, encourage transparency and connect the industry leaders to their followers. 

Our web portal medicaldialogues.in provides a unique platform to medical professionals to read about the latest developments in their profession as well as be updated about what is happening in the healthcare sector.

Moreover, we provide a platform to medical professionals to publish their own articles, voice their opinion. We appeal to the inner journalists of medical professionals by inviting them to post news about the latest happenings around them. Medical Dialogues has been selected in the Google News Intiative Startups Lab Project.

Name: La Revue du Digital
Description: La Revue du Digital  est un site de presse indépendant qui donne les clés de la transformation digitale et de ses usages aux professionnels de l'informatique, du marketing, du commerce et de l'innovation

Name: Gestions hospitalières
Description: Carrefour d’expression des hospitaliers, cette revue traite tous les mois des bonne pratiques hospitalières à travers des dossiers thématiques, des analyses, des tribunes. les thèmes souvent abordés sont les suivants : l'architecture, la place de l'usager, les ressources humaines, le financement, l'administration, le système informatique, la qualité, le risque et la sécurité, la coopération.

Name: B.R.A. Tendances Restauration
Description: The French specialized newspaper dealing with the restaurant business

Name: iGamingFuture
Description:
iGamingFuture is a future-focused gaming publication. We focus on solving the challenges in technology, legislation and culture to enable operators to succeed in a constantly changing global igaming landscape. 

We have an obligation to positively affect every stakeholder in the gambling arena, helping push positive messages about safe gaming, innovative technologies and world-class companies.

Name: L'Orient-Le Jour
Description:
L'Orient-Le Jour est le seul quotidien libanais d'expression française, né le 15 juin 1971 de la fusion de deux journaux, L'Orient (fondé à Beyrouth en 1924) et Le Jour (fondé à Beyrouth en 1934). Il est présidé par Michel Eddé.


Il a ouvert ses colonnes aux plus prestigieux penseurs, chroniqueurs, écrivains et journalistes du Liban moderne. Étendard de la francophonie, il a comme mission principale d'être le relais d'une information indépendante et de qualité pour tous les francophones ayant un lien avec le Liban et le Moyen-Orient. Michel Touma, Ziyad Makhoul et Émilie Sueur en sont les rédacteurs en chef.


L'Orient-Le Jour défend depuis sa création les mêmes valeurs démocratiques, le pluralisme, l'ouverture vers l'autre et le dialogue des cultures et des religions. Il décrypte l'actualité, les enjeux et les problématiques libanais et ses prolongations dans la région d'une façon unique et professionnelle.
Avec un contenu riche et une diffusion ciblée, ses articles et dossiers s'affirment d'emblée comme le meilleur rendez-vous de l'actualité libanaise et du Moyen Orient. L'Orient-Le jour offre également à ses lecteurs un panorama de l'actualité en continu et en direct sur son site Internet lorientlejour.com ou sur ses versions iPad et mobiles.


L'Orient-Le jour est le principal actionnaire du mensuel économique Le Commerce du Levant, une référence économique au Liban et dans la région.

www.lorientlejour.com

Name: Le Bien public
Description:
Grâce à une renommée incontestée sur plusieurs départements, Le Bien Public regroupe aujourd’hui 4 éditions web en Côte-d’Or et se positionne en tant que 1er site d'information en Bourgogne : 1 contact sur 2 avec la marque "Le Bien Public" provient du digital !

Un titre du Groupe EBRA.

Nos solutions de communication :
https://www.bjp-publicite.com/ 
https://www.facebook.com/bjppublicite/

Name: De Persgroep Publishing
Description: Bij de Persgroep Publishing maak je het zelf waar. Wij geven je alle kansen om resultaten te behalen. Met passie voor onze sterke merken en producten, zowel nieuwsmedia (Het Laatste Nieuws, De Morgen), magazines (Dag Allemaal, Goed Gevoel, Story, TV Familie, Vitaya, Joepie, Humo, TeVe-Blad) als gespecialiseerde sites (Vacature.com, Tweakers.be). Maar je doet het wel op jouw manier. In alle vrijheid en met een flinke portie verantwoordelijkheid. Reken maar dat we je daarvoor weten te waarderen. Van jou verwachten we alvast actie en de drive om telkens die ‘extra mile’ te gaan. Samen met je team, elke dag opnieuw.

Name: The Scotsman
Description:
The Scotsman has played a vital part in forming and reporting national opinion for nearly 200 years. Having first published in 1817, The Scotsman is firmly established as a quality daily Scottish newspaper, with a reputation for original thinking and thought-provoking writing. The title continues to provide the Scottish market with quality reporting that attains loyalty and respect.

Follow us on Twitter - http://twitter.com/scotsmandotcom
Join us on Facebook - http://facebook.com/scotsmanonline

Name: Youm7 - اليوم السابع
Description:
"ElYoum ElSabe" is the leading digital portal in the region. ElYoum ElSabe' is published by "The Egyptian Publishing, Journalism and Advertising". The weekly newspaper started off as a daily publication as of 2011. 
ElYoum ElSabe' group strictly abides by Media ethics in delivering Objective coverage and transparency in the handled information. We are an independent News Network with no political or religious backgrounds.

Targeting the different Socioeconomic categories, ElYoum ElSabe' content caters to the different needs of the Egyptian reader, creating the largest data base od website visitors, Social Media followers and the most interactive two way communication platform in the region.

ElYoum ElSabe' Digital news network expanded to include all of:

The Cairo Post.com: The first Egyptian English edited newspaper mainly concerned with the Egyptian affairs from an insider point of view.

Name: Corriere del Ticino
Description:
Fondato nel 1891 da Agostino Soldati, il Corriere del Ticino è il primo quotidiano della Svizzera Italiana.

Propone ogni giorno un’informazione di qualità su temi di attualità ticinese e svizzera ai grandi temi internazionali con approfondimenti quotidiani, ampi servizi su sport, economia, cultura e spettacoli. La Società Editrice del Corriere del Ticino SA.

Il quotidiano viene stampato presso il Centro Stampa Ticino SA di Muzzano e distribuito ai propri abbonati dal lunedì al sabato. Il Corriere del Ticino si profila nel panorama ticinese come una testata d’informazione indipendente.

Cdt.ch propone ai suoi lettori news in tempo reale, cronaca e approfondimenti aggiornati costantemente per essere una finestra aperta su di un mondo in costante evoluzione.

Name: The Detroit News
Description: The Detroit News is a newspaper and website in Detroit, Michigan, covering Detroit and all of Michigan.

Name: Torstar Corporation
Description:
Torstar Corporation is a leading Canadian media and data company that aims to help people better understand the world and each other. 

Built on a long and distinguished history in daily and community newspapers and nationally recognized digital businesses, The Torstar Group of Companies includes The Toronto Star, The Hamilton Spectator, the Waterloo Region Record and other regional daily news brands, as well as 75 community news brands across Ontario with a number of digital properties including eyeReturn, VerticalScope, Homefinder.ca and Save.ca.

Our flagship newspaper, the Toronto Star, was founded in 1892, and its website, thestar.com, is now one of the most-visited newspaper sites in the country.

Today over 2500 dedicated employees work together to continuously improve how we serve our customers and clients and report on the most important stories affecting people's lives.

Name: El Mundo, Economía & Negocios
Description: El Mundo, Economía y Negocios ofrece información en la web, edición papel, radio y televisión. Visítanos también en http://www.facebook.com/elmundoeyn. Desde 2009 en versión papel ofrecemos la más completa información económica nacional e internacional.

Name: Proto Thema
Description:
Proto Thema, or Thema, as the majority of Greek readers call it, is undoubtedly one of the biggest success stories in the history of Greek media. 

Thema is one of the best-known, most influential and the biggest selling Greek Sunday Newspaper. Additionally, it is important to mention that Thema is the only Greek newspaper with low borrowing and high profitability.

It was first published in February 27th 2005 and soon after it appeared in the news stands, it commanded very high circulation rates and –until today- it is by far the best selling weekly newspaper according the figures are compiled by the certified press distribution agency in Greece.

In January 2008,  Thema created the Greek internet portal www.protothema.gr, as a daily e-newspaper and has also expanded its reach and deepened engagement with readers and users by delivering content online and across other digital platforms, including mobile, e-reader applications and social networking sites. Offering users free access and providing daily essential news, comment, articles, data, analysis and entertainment content, is recognized nationally for its authority, integrity and accuracy.

Name: EV MECHANICA - ELECTRIC VEHICLE MAGAZINE
Description: News, Views, Articles, Launches and Interviews from Electric Vehicle Industry.

Name: L'actualité
Description:
Voué aux grands reportages, à l’analyse et à la réflexion, L’actualité est le seul magazine d’affaires publiques au Québec et l’une des grandes publications de langue française dans le monde.

L’actualité jouit d’une notoriété et d’une crédibilité exceptionnelles jamais démenties au fil des années. Depuis la fondation du magazine en 1976, l’équipe de rédaction a remporté plus de 600 prix et mentions à l’échelle du Québec et du Canada.

L’actualité présente des reportages et des entrevues qui portent sur la politique, l’économie, le monde des affaires, la culture, la société, l’éducation et la science. Des chroniques santé, techno, livres, spectacles et vins s’ajoutent aux dossiers de l’heure.

L’actualité est offert sur différentes plateformes. Le site web Lactualite.com présente des analyses, de l’information, des débats d’idées, des photoreportages et des blogues – ses blogueurs font d’ailleurs eux-mêmes la nouvelle, leurs écrits étant régulièrement cités dans d’autres médias.

Name: Sloft
Description:
A magazine dedicated to compact interiors - Le magazine des intérieurs compacts.

Rationaliser l’espace de vie, penser chaque détail dans un souci d’efficience, de maîtrise et d’esthétisme, en un mot, faire mieux dans moins, c’est aussi une réponse durable aux défis que pose l’habitat aujourd’hui, notamment en ville : renchérissement des prix, bruit, congestion, pollution, stress…

Avec en ligne de mire la définition de nouvelles façons de vivre, plus sobres, agiles, inclusives et vertueuses, nous avons choisi de nous consacrer aux surfaces compactes.

Depuis 2017, Sloft Magazine met en valeur le travail d’une nouvelle génération de professionnels et de particuliers passionnés qui s’engagent pour le « mieux habiter ».

Name: CANTABRIA ECONÓMICA
Description:
Revista de información económica creada en 1991.  Más de 25.000 páginas redactadas se han hecho eco de los acontecimientos económicos de la región. Sus lectores, empresarios, ejecutivos, profesionales independientes, del sistema financiero y de la administración pública que encuentran en nuestras páginas informaciones fiables sobre la economía y la industria regional, han conseguido situarnos líderes en los sectores de mayor poder adquisitivo y de decisión del mercado regional, gracias al trabajo realizado en sus más de 25  años  de existencia.

	La publicación a todo color, la calidad del papel y fotografías, la dispersión de la publicidad en el número (no más de un 30% de espacio ocupado), su perfecta ubicación (en su generalidad en páginas impares) y su muy razonable precio, son las premisas que ha utilizado CANTABRIA ECONÓMICA para captar la atención sobre la revista, ofreciendo a sus clientes un aumento del impacto que la publicidad produce en nuestros lectores. Todos estos datos demuestran la rentabilidad que CANTABRIA ECONÓMICA aporta al anunciante, ya que una pequeña inversión mensual cubre el amplio espectro que suponen los sectores de mayor poder adquisitivo de nuestra región.

Datos de contacto:

Name: Pour la Science
Description:
Groupe de presse de référence de l'actualité scientifique, Pour la Science édite deux magazines :

Le mensuel Pour la Science est depuis plus de 30 ans un titre de référence de l'information scientifique internationale. Des actualités et articles de fond signés par les chercheurs eux-mêmes couvrent les avancées dans tous les domaines scientifiques : astrophysique, physique, mathématiques, biologie, paléontologie... Et tous les trois mois, les Dossiers Pour la Science font le point sur un thème particulier.

Cerveau & Psycho est le magazine de référence de la psychologie et des neurosciences. Chaque mois, retrouvez des articles de fond signés par des chercheurs sur les avancées de la neurobiologie et la psychologie, et les clés pour mieux comprendre le fonctionnement du cerveau et les comportements humains.

Pour la Science fait partie des éditions internationales de Scientific American.

Name: Jersey Evening Post
Description:
The Island of Jersey is a unique and special place which generates worldwide interest. It is served by jerseyeveningpost.com, and the Island’s only newspaper, the Jersey Evening Post. 

The JEP has been serving Jersey, a self-governing British Crown Dependency and the largest of the Channel Islands, since 1890. We are proud of our heritage but also committed to our future as we continue to develop the scope of our readership reach and influence. 

According to a recent ABC audit for July 2015, jerseyeveningpost.com has over 270,000 unique visitors per month. With over 1.5 million page views jerseyeveningpost.com presents attractive opportunities for advertising and promotion - both in the core site and in special sections on Shopping, Motoring, Jobs, Property, Sport and Food. The site has developed a loyal following at home and abroad to become Jersey’s premier online resource for news, comment and advertising. 

In February 2016 the Jersey Evening Post relaunched their Jobs platform to include even more positions in the Island, including independent roles and states jobs as well as vacancies from local recruitment agencies and allow users to register for email alerts.  

Visitors can register their requirements and receive notifications by email, by using key words or specific-sector searches which select relevant roles, or browse categories populated entirely by local opportunities.

The ambition was to create a site that would quickly become the first port of call for local-job hunters and recruiters, in addition to the Jersey Evening Post, which has a long and well-established reputation for featuring the very latest vacancies every day in its classified recruitment section.  The site can be found here: www.jerseyeveningpost.com/jobs 

The Jersey Evening Post is owned by Guiton Publishing.

Name: Harmonie Santé
Description:
Harmonie Santé, anciennement Essentiel Santé Magazine, est le média des adhérents des mutuelles de l’Union Harmonie Mutuelles. Disposant d’un statut presse reconnu par la Commission Paritaire des Publications et Agences de Presse (CPPAP), il a pour mission d’aider ses lecteurs à être acteurs de leur santé et de la société, au quotidien, au travail ou chez eux. Il agit en cela en faveur de la prévention dans une démarche positive, utile et solidaire et s’adresse aux particuliers, mais aussi aux dirigeants d’entreprises.

A travers ses différents canaux (magazine, site internet, newsletters, réseaux sociaux et Agoras mutualistes), Harmonie Santé a à cœur de délivrer des informations fiables, et qui poussent à l’action, sur la santé, et notamment la prévention et la santé au travail, sur la protection sociale et sur des sujets de société, comme l’environnement.

Le média respecte les codes de la presse et propose ainsi des contenus vérifiés par une équipe de journalistes et une grande variété de formats éditoriaux : articles, infographies, sondages, dossiers, fiches pratiques, vidéos, podcasts…

Description:
Entreprise de la presse quotidienne régionale, L'union est diffusé dans l'Aisne, la Marne et les Ardennes, à travers 7 éditions (Reims - Soissons - Epernay - Châlons-en-Champagne - Laon - Vitry-le-François - Ardennes).
Notre ambition est d'être le média multicanal (papier, web, applications, TV) de référence de nos territoires, grâce à une information utile, pertinente et micro-locale.
L'union appartient au groupe Rossel, premier groupe de presse franco-belge qui propose de la presse écrite, des magazines, des télévisions, des radios, du digital.

TEXtalks enjoys a wide circulation in the textile sector. It is the magazine of choice among key influencers, professionals, researchers, top management executives and technical experts from textile academia and industry.

Name: El Vocero de Puerto Rico
Description:
El Vocero de Puerto Rico es el periódico diario de mayor lectoría y de mayor circulación en Puerto Rico desde el año 2016.
En el año 2013 un grupo de empresarios de Puerto Rico asumió la responsabilidad de mantener con vida la publicación de EL VOCERO cuando adquirió los derechos del nombre de esta publicación.
El 1 de diciembre del mismo año el periódico fue relanzado con una nueva filosofía editorial y nuevo diseño.
El periódico diario EL VOCERO, originalmente fue fundado en 1974 y operó bajo una estructura diferente, al ser parte de un fondo de inversiones extranjero.
Es publicado en San Juan, de lunes a viernes y se distribuye completamente gratis a través de unos 5,500 establecimientos y alrededor de 100 intersecciones con semáforos en los 78 municipios, incluídas las islas municipio de Vieques y Culebra.   Además de estar disponible en su versión impresa los cinco días de la semana, también publica el periódico digital diario, incluyendo los sábados.
De lunes a viernes es el periódico de mayor lectoría en Puerto Rico, de acuerdo al análisis de lectoría 18+ de la empresa de investigaciones de mercado MBP de Gaither.
El diario EL VOCERO de Puerto Rico ha mantenido el dominio en la industria, al ser el periódico de mayor circulación, con sobre 170 mil copias impresas auditadas por el Certified Audit of Circulation (CAC). A las copias impresas se suman los sobre 110,000 suscriptores digitales, a quienes les llega el periódico todas las mañanas a través del correo electrónico.
Desde el año 2013, EL VOCERO y sus activos pasaron a manos de Publi-Inversiones Puerto Rico, Inc y bajo la dirección de un grupo de experimentados gerentes, EL VOCERO ha solidificado su política editorial íntegra y responsable; y reafirmado su compromiso con el bienestar de las familias puertorriqueñas.
La publicación se caracteriza por ser un ente fiscalizador del gobierno y las finanzas públicas, donde se destapan esquemas de fraude y acciones indebidas por medio de las investigaciones periodísticas. Ejemplo de ello fue la investigación sobre el ‘Cartel del Petróleo’, que reveló la estructura que, mediante comisiones y hasta sobornos, se enriquecía del negocio de la compra y venta del combustible de la Autoridad de Energía Eléctrica desde hacía más de una década en Puerto Rico.  
Para ello la empresa periodística cuenta con un robusto equipo de periodistas expertos en materias de política, ley y orden, gobierno, economía, deportes, espectáculos, gastronomía, viajes, entre otros, haciendo de EL VOCERO la publicación con la cobertura más completa y objetiva del acontecer noticioso.
Está accesible a los lectores de forma gratuita, ya sea a través de su periódico impreso, la réplica digital, la página web elvocero.com, la aplicación móvil y las redes sociales.
Además de su oferta diaria de noticias, la publicadora cuenta también con tres revistas. Zona, dirigida a cubrir temas más interesantes para hombres, Mírame Siempre, con una amplia cobertura social, moda y filantropía, y Bienestar Total, cubriendo temas de nutrición, salud y cuidado personal que pueden ser adquiridas a través de puntos de ventas yen toda la isla.

Name: Delaware Business Times

Name: Miesięcznik Dealer
Description:
Jesteśmy jedynym na rynku pismem poświęconym w 100 proc. tematyce zarządzania autoryzowaną stacją dealerską. „Dealer” to ściśle sprofilowane wydawnictwo, dedykowane właścicielom, menedżerom i szefom poszczególnych działów firm dealerskich. W magazynie opisywane są sprawy rentowności całej stacji oraz jej segmentów, a także prognozy na temat nowych źródeł dochodu dealera i przyszłości rynku samochodowego w Polsce i Europie. Całość wzbogacają liczne badania, raporty i rankingi salonów, serwisów czy dealerskich działów F&I. Dzięki temu „Dealer” pełni w branży rolę ekspercką i analityczną.

Pismo jest również dla dealerów źródłem inspiracji, pomysłów i dobrych praktyk, które zbieramy dla Czytelników z całego dealerskiego świata. Zaś dzięki współorganizacji największych branżowych imprez w Polsce (Kongres Dealerów, Forum TOP100) integrujemy rodzime środowisko dealerskie w kraju.

Miesięcznik „Dealer” to nieodłączne narzędzie dealerskiej pracy, edukacji i inspiracji:
- zbiór aktualnych branżowych informacji z Polski, Europy i świata
- „kopalnia” pomysłów i dobrych praktyk do wdrożenia od zaraz w swojej stacji
- wyznacznik dealerskiej debaty w Polsce, miejsce wymiany opinii uczestników branży
- źródło analizy rynku i scenariuszy jego rozwoju w przyszłości
- spojrzenie na branżę motoryzacyjną z perspektywy europejskiej i światowej
- pierwszy kontakt dla dealerów i medium prezentujące dealerski punkt widzenia

Name: POLITICO Europe
Description:
POLITICO delivers journalism about politics and policymaking that is more authoritative in its sophistication and nonpartisan perspective than any other news source; that is more useful to people with a professional interest in public affairs; and that is more fun to read for a community of people who love the drama and sheer sport of politics.
 
We’ve become an indispensable read for America’s most powerful people and now we’re taking on the issues, ideas and personalities driving European politics.We are assembling a roster of some of the most talented reporters and editors on the continent who are ready to help shake up a European media scene, which, in our judgment, is in need of something different.

Find out more about us here: http://www.politico.eu/about-us/

Name: Børsen
Description:
På Børsen mener vi, at det er meget vigtigt, hvad vi diskuterer ud fra. Hvem vi lytter til. Hvilke perspektiver vi har. At vi overhovedet kan regne med det, vi læser. Og det kan du hos os. Vores formål er alene at gøre demokratiet mere kompetent. Derfor holder vi ikke med nogen. Vi hverken farver eller tager parti, men udkommer med nuanceret, perspektiverende og upartisk journalistik – baseret på fakta og argumentation. Hvor troværdigheden er øverst på skamlen. Hvor den indsigt, du tager med, kan bruges som fundament for reelle beslutninger, så du altid står stærkere som professionel og som menneske.

Børsen er Danmarks største erhvervsmedie. Vi dækker de vigtigste begivenheder med betydning for erhvervsliv og økonomi. Vores stofområder omfatter bl.a. finans, økonomi, virksomheder, investering, politik, udland, bæredygtighed og ledelse. Men også nyere dagsordener som AI. Vi har også en hel livsstilssektion med inspiration til livet ved siden af arbejdet.

Name: Diario La República
Description:
En LA REPÚBLICA usted encontrará información útil, tratada con profundidad y análisis, que lo ayudará a conocer otra perspectiva de la actualidad económica y cómo ésta afecta los diferentes sectores productivos del país.

Recibirá ediciones especializadas, tales como:

Lunes: Ecomomía
Damos a nuestros lectores toda la información del agro, minas, energía, seguridad social, gobierno, etc.s.

Martes: AltaGerencia
A nuestros lectores les gusta capacitarse!
Trabajamos el tema de educación para el ejecutivo de hoy. Nueva alianza para contenidos con Harvard Bussiness Review.

Miércoles: Finanzas
Cada miércoles con información sobre bolsas del mundo, mercados, finanzas personales, indicadores del mundo de los negocios.

Jueves: Responsabilidad Social
Énfasis en la nueva tendencia de responsabilidad social empresarial, comunidades, programas, casos empresariales.

Viernes: Infraestructura
Contenido especializado de este tema como componente inherente del desarrollo. Tecnología, diseño, arquitectura, licitaciones.

Fin de Semana: Consumo
Contenido integral de análisis de todo lo que afecta precios, productos, etc. En la vida de todos nuestros lectores.

Name: The Indian Express
Description: For over 75 years, The Indian Express has been read by those who have their own unique point of view of looking at things. With coverage based on comprehensive analysis, and with fearless reporting, we empower our readers with the truth behind every matter. We go the whole length to get to the crux of every issue. And we don't just stop there, but ferret out every detail that brings out the how, why, where and what next of the subject. So, our readers can formulate their own stands on issues in a bias-free manner.

Name: Público
Description:
A Público, Comunicação Social S. A., que publica o jornal PÚBLICO, pertence ao grupo empresarial português Sonae e foi fundado em 1989. O seu primeiro director foi Vicente Jorge Silva.

O primeiro número do Público saiu para as bancas em 5 de Março de 1990, com um Estatuto Editorial. Este ainda se encontra em vigor.

A empresa Público, Comunicação Social S. A. foi constituída no dia 31 de Outubro de 1989, quatro meses antes de o jornal sair para as bancas.

O jornal PÚBLICO integrou-se em 1991 na World Media Network que consiste em uma associação de diversos jornais de referência no mundo que incluía, por exemplo, o jornal alemão Süddeutsche Zeitung, o espanhol El País, o francês Libération e o italiano La Stampa), com a qual publicou vários suplementos especiais.

Teve, durante algum tempo, participações no seu capital social de empresas de comunicação estrangeiras, nomeadamente as detentoras dos diários El País e La Repubblica (Itália). Hoje, o Público integra a sub-holding da Sonae para as áreas da comunicação, a Sonaecom.

Em 11 de Maio de 1995, o Público registou o seu sítio na internet e no dia 22 de Setembro desse ano, foi criado o PÚBLICO Online (actualmente designado Público.pt), e também uma outra empresa, a Público.pt Serviços Digitais Multimédia, SA. Em 6 de Setembro de 1999 começou a integrar também um serviço autónomo de notícias, actualizadas várias vezes por dia.

Name: Diario Oficial El Peruano
Description:
La trayectoria del diario se inicia el 22 de octubre de 1825, cuando el Libertador Simón Bolívar funda el diario El Peruano Independiente, en momentos en que el país se estaba organizando para enrumbar su destino de manera autónoma, tras siglos de colonialismo.

Como publicación estatal, posee importancia histórica porque fue fundada por Bolívar en plena efervescencia republicana; importancia institucional, porque en su cuerpo impreso se difundió, desde los albores del Perú libre, el marco normativo que rige hasta el momento los destinos de país. 

El Peruano también demuestra que ha ido evolucionando acorde con las necesidades de la globalización, desarrollando niveles de interesante competitividad con nuevos productos que se dirigen a segmentos específicos de la población. Así tiene, por ejemplo, el suplemento Jurídica, con artículos de interés para la orden profesional de los abogados. De igual forma figura Económika, con el análisis de temas financieros, producción, así como de micro y macroeconomía, al igual que entrevistas a técnicos en la materia.

El Peruano en su versión electrónica contiene una fuente de información interesante para todo profesional que necesita estar actualizado con la información de carácter legal y económico del país.

El Peruano forma parte de la empresa Editora Perú.

Name: Arab News
Description:
Arab News, Saudi Arabia’s first English language daily newspaper was founded in 1975 and has become the Middle East’s leading English daily. It is one of 30+ brands by Saudi Research and Media Group (SRMG).
 
From 2016 with the joining of Faisal J. Abbas as the Editor-in-Chief, Arab News has gone through major digital transformation and a complete rebranding to become popular not only among Saudi Arabia's society and the Arab World, but also reaching policy makers and business leaders in the United States and the United Kingdom making it one of the primary sources in the Arab World to be quoted by US and UK media outlets and policy makers.

Because of its wide readership profile with over 10 million website monthly readers, it is a much sought-after medium for advertising and brand building. It is a pioneer and has developed unique content, shows and programs becoming the first, what was once a traditional newspaper, to produce video talk shows and radio shows, including:

Frankly Speaking video show hosted by Katie Jensen, digs deep into the insights of some of the most important policy makers and business leaders in the Middle East and Worldwide. 
 
The Mayman Show is a personable podcast by Arab News hosted by reporter Hussam Al-Mayman. The show revolves around personal and relatable conversations between the host and his celebrity guests that include actors, comedians, models, athletes and more.
 
Arab News has also successfully launched 3 full-fledged country editions:
Pakistan edition: www.arabnews.pk – (L : 2018)
Japan edition (JP/English) : www.arabnews.jp – (L : 2019)
France edition (French) : www.arabnews.fr – (L : 2020)

Name: El Financiero
Description: El Financiero es el principal diario especializado en finanzas economía y negocios de México, nacido en octubre de 1981. Su propuesta sobre periodismo interpretativo está basada en el análisis y la contextualización de los acontecimientos que por su valor periodístico influyen en la opinión pública y en la toma de decisiones en los centros de poder.

Name: The Irish Times
Description:
The Irish Times is Ireland's leading quality newspaper and delivers news, opinion and analysis to 1,451,000 readers each week (source TGI).

The Irish Times is committed to bringing journalism of the highest standard to our readers in the most convenient, engaging and accessible way possible through multi platform media. 

As media technologies evolve so do our methods of reporting  and we are committed to developing our digital offering accordingly. From our daily email digests bringing news straight to your inbox to our series of weekly podcasts, we  bring authoritative  news reports;  independent commentary and  informed insight  directly to the reader.

We aspire to being a trusted source of information whether it’s in print, on web, mobile or tablet device.

Name: Industrie du Maroc Magazine  مجلة صناعة المغرب
Description:
Industrie du Maroc Magazine est un média de référence dédié à l’industrie, à l’investissement et à l’innovation au Maroc.
Fondé en 2014, il accompagne et valorise les dynamiques industrielles nationales en mettant en lumière les stratégies publiques, les projets structurants, les écosystèmes sectoriels et les acteurs clés du développement économique.

À travers son magazine print, ses plateformes digitales et ses contenus multimédias, Industrie du Maroc Magazine propose des analyses de fond, des dossiers stratégiques, des interviews de décideurs et une veille continue sur les grandes transformations industrielles, technologiques et énergétiques.

Le magazine s’inscrit pleinement dans la promotion du Made in Morocco, de la souveraineté industrielle, de l’innovation, de l’investissement productif et du rayonnement des territoires.

 Média print & digital
 Industrie – Investissement – Innovation
 Analyses, expertises et décryptage économique
 Plateforme d’influence au service de l’écosystème industriel marocain

Un regard expert, indépendant et engagé sur l’industrie marocaine et ses perspectives.

Name: Gulf News
Description:
About

Gulf News, the bestselling English newspaper in the UAE, is published by Al Nisr Publishing LLC. The company is also home to the most visited news website in the UAE, gulfnews.com.

Al Nisr Publishing LLC, also publishes a wide range of consumer lifestyle magazines in print and online.  These publications include Wheels, InsideOut, Baby & Child, WatchTime, Citizen K Arabia and Friday, the most widely circulated magazine in the UAE. 

Our Commercial Printing division offers a complete range of printing services for all types of projects from a wide ranging client base.  We specialise in printing newspapers, magazines, directories, books, brochures, tabloids, leaflets and flyers but offer cutting-edge, innovative printing techniques for a variety of special operations. 

GN distribution is one of the largest publication distribution companies in the Gulf region and the largest pan-Emirates print media distribution network.  The GN Distribution team has been instrumental in the sales and distribution success of Gulf News and is the partner of choice for international as well as UAE based third party publications.

Al Nisr Publishing LLC is also the owner of getthat.com, a major portal in the UAE for buying or renting property, buying and selling cars, finding a job or selling anything through classifieds.

History

Gulf News was first launched in tabloid format on September 30, 1978. In 1986, Gulf News began to be distributed to other GCC countries. The first Web Edition of Gulf News was launched on September 1, 1996.

Gulf News moved to its present headquarters on Sheikh Zayed Road in April 2000. 

Gulf News is committed to excellence and in building a talented workforce that delivers the best that there is in the industry. It believes that its true wealth is its people who are empowered, driven to innovate, lead and succeed. 

We offer the opportunity to work with over 80 nationalities and celebrate the joy of diversity.

Name: Le Point
Description: A general information French news magazine, based in Paris, France. It relied on its ability to redefine the genre. It modelled itself closely on magazines owned by other news magazine : Time Magazine and Newsweek. It is currently owned by François Pinault.

Name: Revista Consultor Jurídico (ConJur)
Description:
Created in 1997, the electronic magazine Consultor Jurídico is an independent media outlet focused on law and justice. It aims to serve as a source of information and research for professionals, students, and anyone interested in understanding the judicial system.

The magazine offers a database with over 70,000 files, accessed monthly by more than three million readers.

The audience of Consultor Jurídico includes lawyers, judges, students, journalists, professors, members of the Public Prosecutor's Office, entrepreneurs, and other interested individuals.

ConJur is edited by journalists with extensive experience at Brazil's most renowned publications, ensuring the accuracy of the information provided. It also relies on a vast network of contributors, including lawyers, judges, members of the Public Prosecutor's Office, press officers, and others. The team's goal is to report on daily events in the legal and judicial world, as well as major events that impact citizens' lives.

In addition to the electronic magazine, the Consultor Jurídico team publishes the Anuário da Justiça (Justice Yearbook), which describes, in clear and didactic language, the main judicial decisions of Brazil's superior courts (STJ, TST, TSE, STM) and the Supreme Federal Court (STF). ConJur Editorial also produces the Anuário da Justiça Paulista (São Paulo Justice Yearbook).

Name: Management Magazine
Description:
Management c'est le coach qu'on voudrait avoir au travail. Parce que le management, ça s’apprend et ça se travaille au quotidien, Management vous aide à progresser dans votre job au quotidien, développer ses compétences et compléter ses connaissances carrière et managériales.

Si vous souhaitez vous abonner au magazine Management : http://bit.ly/29fHP2b 

Pour toute question relative à votre abonnement ou modifiez les informations de votre compte (adresse, coordonnées bancaires) sur la page internet de notre Service clients : http://www.prismashop.fr/service-clients.html

Name: The Epoch Times
Description:
Freedom of the press and humanity are the foundation of The Epoch Times.

The Epoch Times was born out of a great need to provide uncensored news to a people immersed in propaganda and censorship in China. Having witnessed events like the Tiananmen Square massacre and the persecution of the spiritual group Falun Gong, and at great risk to themselves and their loved ones, a group of Chinese Americans started publishing The Epoch Times in the Chinese language in the United States.

When we launched in 2000, we had reporters and editors in China; they were soon arrested, and some suffered severe torture. To this day, the Chinese Communist Party (CCP) has been relentless in its efforts to assault our operations and stop us from pursuing our mission—including by ransacking our offices, attacking our websites, and setting our printing press on fire in Hong Kong.
In English, our first edition was published online in 2003, followed by the first print edition in 2004. Our beginnings have instilled in Epoch Times staff an unwavering commitment to integrity, truthfulness in reporting, and respect for human rights and freedom.

As an independent media organization, The Epoch Times is free from the influence of any government, corporation, or political party. Our aim is to give you the information you need to make up your own mind.

We remain committed to our founding mission to expose the CCP’s human rights abuses in China and its ongoing campaign to subvert Western societies and fundamental freedoms and values.

Name: The Straits Times
Description:
The Straits Times is the English flagship daily of SPH Media, one of the leading media companies in Asia. Launched on July 15, 1845, its comprehensive coverage of news from home and around the world makes The Straits Times the most-read newspaper in Singapore. Quality news, in-depth analyses, impactful commentaries and breaking stories are packaged to give readers riveting accounts of events in Singapore, the region, and beyond.

The most read newspaper in Singapore, both in terms of print and digital, it reaches 1.33 million people every day. The Straits Times' key strength is in its world class coverage of news outside Singapore. With 20 bureaus in major cities around the world, The Straits Times correspondents bring world news to readers on a Singapore platter, helping readers to appreciate world events from a Singaporean perspective.

Name: EL TIEMPO Casa Editorial
Description:
Somos la empresa de medios de comunicación más antigua de Colombia. Con más de 103 años de trayectoria, ocupamos una posición de liderazgo tanto en nuestros productos impresos como digitales y nos destacamos por una tendencia permanentemente en crecimiento en nuestras audiencias de Televisión.

Nuestro modelo de convergencia de medios reflejado en nuestra Sala de Redacción Multimedia nos hace un referente para nuestros competidores y para quienes pautan con nosotros. 

Diariamente generamos contenido multimedia para 9 periódicos impresos, dos canales de TV que están al aire las 24 horas del día, más de 15 portales digitales entre informativos y transaccionales y para 10 títulos de revistas de prensa y de nicho. 

Contamos con más de 30 marcas ampliamente reconocidas en el mercado a través de las cuales construimos diversas audiencias interesantes para quienes desean pautar con nosotros. 

Más de 2.000 personas trabajamos diariamente para informar y entretener a los más de 7.500.000 millones de personas que nos leen o nos ven, trabajando dentro del marco de nuestros cinco (5) Valores Corporativos: INTEGRIDAD,  CREDIBILIDAD, COMPROMISO,  PASIÓN, INNOVACIÓN

Name: The Daily Star
Description: The Daily Star established its place in the media scene of Bangladesh on January 14, 1991. It started its journey with a sense of challenge and a feeling of humility to serve this nation as a truly independent newspaper. The newspaper made its debut at a historic time when, with the fall of an autocratic regime, the country was well set to begin a new era towards establishing a democratic system of government which eluded Bangladesh for too long.

Name: L'Argus de l'assurance
Description:
L'Argus de l’assurance est la première source d’information des professionnels de l’assurance. 

Grâce à ses 12 journalistes spécialisés (dont une juriste), la plus grande équipe de rédaction dédiée à ce secteur, l’Argus de l’assurance traite et analyse toute l’actualité : évolutions des marchés et des réseaux de distribution, stratégies des entreprises, tendances de consommation, innovations produits, réglementation, mouvements…

Depuis sa création, en 1877, l’Argus de l’assurance évolue pour aider et accompagner les professionnels. L’Argus de l’assurance, c’est :
- Un média en ligne www.argusdelassurance.com
- Un magazine hebdomadaire par abonnement
- Une newsletter quotidienne, des flashs actus, des newsletters thématiques (Distributeurs, Green, Tech) 
- Des événements (Conférence, Congrès, Trophées…), des éditions et des formations. 

L’Argus de l’assurance est une marque média du groupe Infopro digital.

Name: Business Insider Deutschland
Description: Welcome to Business Insider Deutschland!

Name: Observador
Description:
O Observador é um meio de comunicação digital que nasce sem os condicionamentos do papel e assume o seu caráter inovador.

O Observador aproveita a oportunidade de nascer num momento de crise e de mudanças, um tempo que nos obriga a pensar e agir mais e melhor.

O Observador é independente, fruto de um novo grupo de comunicação que é 100% português e tem visão global.

O Observador tem um ponto de vista editorial: defende sem ambiguidades a democracia representativa, a economia de mercado e uma sociedade aberta e global – por isso estimulará debates públicos e não hesitará em tomar posição.

O Observador é livre, é de todos e é para todos, porque os factos não têm cor nem interesses.

No Observador reportamos sempre  a verdade, tendo a transparência e a ética como princípios normativos. 

Se e quando errarmos seremos rápidos a reconhecer e a corrigir. Sabemos que a credibilidade é a chave de um bom trabalho, e que o jornalismo hoje é principalmente uma conversa com os leitores.

Vamos dando notícias.

Name: La Gazette des Communes
Description:
La Gazette des communes est le média professionnel de référence des décideurs des collectivités territoriales, agents et élus. Sur ses supports numériques et papier, elle décrypte l’actualité des politiques publiques, et du statut de la fonction publique. 

Elle est aussi le média du débat sur le secteur public local : décentralisation, statut de la FPT, management, finances locales, sécurité et prévention, transformation numérique, commande publique…

La Gazette fournit également une veille des textes officiels, jurisprudences et réponses ministérielles. Elle est également la référence concernant les questions liées à la carrière et au statut du fonctionnaire territorial. 
La Gazette est le premier support de diffusion d’annonces d'emplois publics des collectivités locales. 
La Gazette a également  enrichi son offre éditoriale en créant sur son site des clubs professionnels, dédiés à des communautés métiers ciblées :
- le Club Finances est destiné aux spécialistes des finances locales, de la fiscalité...
- le Club Prévention Sécurité s'adresse aux professionnels des politiques de prévention et de sécurité publique (policiers municipaux...)
- le Club Technicités propose une offre éditoriale pour les ingénieurs et techniciens territoriaux, et tous ceux qui "font la ville", dans les secteurs des transports, de l'aménagement, de l'urbanisme, de la voirie, de l'environnement, des déchets, de l'énergie, de la biodiversité...
- le Club RH, destiné aux directeurs des ressources humaines des collectivités territoriales.
- Le Club Santé Social, pour les professionnels des secteurs de l'enfance, de l'action sociale, du grand âge, du handicap, des politiques d'insertion... 
- Le Club éducation et vie scolaire
- Le Club Acteurs du sport.

Name: Dagens Næringsliv
Description:
Dagens Næringsliv is Norway’s largest business paper, and one of the world’s most-read business papers in terms of total population. Each day 271,000 Norwegians read Dagens Næringsliv, making DN the country’s fourth-largest daily newspaper in terms of readership. Dagens Næringsliv has a circulation of 79,628 and covers the whole of Norway.

Dagens Næringsliv is read by a very attractive target group for advertisers. The newspaper’s readers are mainly aged between 25 and 65, most have university-level qualifications, 4 out of 10 hold management positions, and they generally enjoy high incomes and strong purchasing power.

The first edition of the newspaper rolled off the press on 1 January 1890 under the name Norges Handels- og Sjøfartstidende.

Name: Courrier international
Description:
Courrier international propose à ses lecteurs une sélection du meilleur de la presse étrangère, traduit en français. L'hebdomadaire a été créé en novembre 1990 et le site web en 1996.
Le contenu du journal et du proviennent de plus de 1 500 sources du monde entier : Courrier international sélectionne des sujets politiques, économiques, sociétaux mais aussi culturels, en restant à l’affût des nouvelles tendances. 

Grâce à l’apport de « la plus grande rédaction du monde », Courrier international cherche à anticiper l'actualité et offre à ses lecteurs une ouverture pertinente sur la complexité et la diversité du monde par la confrontation de multiples points de vue.

Chaque jour sur le site, les apps et sur le Réveil Courrier  --> reveil.courrierinternational.com

    - Enquêtes, reportages, couvertures d’événements

Name: La Stampa
Description:
La Stampa is a leading European news organization based in Turin, Italy. Founded in 1867, it is now an innovative journalism hub based on an original “concentric circles” newsroom. 

From its Turin headquarters, La Stampa reaches millions of readers around the world on all platforms (paper, digital, social media). The tradition of credibility of the paper and the authoritative voice of its journalists make La Stampa a protagonist in the daily life of Italy and Europe. 

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
La Stampa è una delle maggiori realtà giornalistiche italiane. Fondata nel 1867, è oggi una news organization che raccoglie e distribuisce informazione su tutte le piattaforme cartacee e digitali. La tradizione di credibilità e autorevolezza de La Stampa e la sua vocazione internazionale, ne fanno da tempo una protagonista nel panorama del giornalismo europeo. 

Dalla propria innovativa redazione a cerchi concentrici a Torino, le news de La Stampa raggiungono milioni di lettori e utenti web in tutto il mondo. Il giornale, il sito e i profili social de La Stampa e dei suoi giornalisti, sono punti di riferimento e voci autorevoli nel racconto quotidiano della trasformazione dell'Italia e del mondo.

Name: ECO
Description:
O ECO é um jornal económico digital, ‘mobile first’, que junta uma plataforma tecnológica inovadora a um jornalismo independente e próximo dos leitores. 
O ECO é um projeto de promotores, jornalistas e gestores, que desafiaram um conjunto alargado de investidores a apostar numa nova marca de informação económica e financeira para o mundo digital.
O ECO é um jornal independente de interesses, quaisquer que eles sejam, pela natureza da sua fundação e pela diversidade e número de acionistas.

Prezentuje najważniejsze fakty z wielu branż przydatne w codziennym funkcjonowaniu przedsiębiorcy, menedżera czy inwestora. Jest jedynym dziennikiem w Polsce, który w 100 proc. koncentruje się na tematyce biznesowej.
