Name: NRC
Description:
NRC probeert het nieuws zo te brengen, te duiden en te analyseren dat de lezer in een jungle van feiten en meningen zijn of haar mening kan vormen over de onderwerpen die er echt toe doen.

Het klimaat, de rechtsstaat, het onderwijs, zorg, Europa en internationale betrekkingen, migratie, belangrijke culturele fenomenen, privacy en duurzaamheid zijn thema’s die in het bijzonder onze aandacht krijgen.

Wilt u met ons in contact komen en informatie veilig met ons delen?https://www.nrc.nl/anonieme-tips/

Name: Yatırımlar Dergisi
Description:
1991 yılından beri her pazartesi günü Türkçe - İngilizce yayımlanan Yatırımlar Dergisi'nde; önemli yatırımlar ile ilgili ihale öncesi hazırlıklar, ilanlar, davetler, ön seçim çalışmaları, teklifler, gelişmeler ve sonuçlar tüm ayrıntılarıyla haftalık olarak yer alıyor.  
“yatirimlar.com” web sitesinde ise bu haberler her gün “online” olarak sunuluyor.
Yatırımlar Dergisi, ulusal ve uluslararası, müteahhitlik, mühendislik, müşavirlik, mimarlık, endüstriyel tesis, makine, ekipman, malzeme, inşaat, montaj, hafriyat, işletme, lojistik, taşeron, mümessil, leasing, sigorta firmaları, bankalar, kamu kuruluşları, belediyeler ve yabancı ülkelerin ticaret odaları ile ataşeliklerinde önemli bir hedef kitleye ulaşıyor.

Published since 1991 every Monday in Turkish and English, Yatırımlar Magazine features a detailed weekly overview of pre-tender preparations, announcements, invitations, prequalification studies, bids, developments and results, which can also be found online on “yatirimlar.com” on daily basis.
Yatırımlar Magazine reaches a large audience, including national and international engineering, consultancy, architectural, industrial, machinery, equipment, materials, construction, excavation, operating and logistics companies, subcontractors, representatives, leasing and insurance companies, banks, public enterprises and municipalities.

Name: Morocco World News
Description:
Morocco World News mission is to bring the news of Morocco and the region to a wide range of readership without bias or a political agenda.

Vision: 
Speaking the truth, disseminating the truth, and raising questions about the truth are the main principles guiding the work of Morocco World News. We consider transparency to be of colossal value. Openness, constructive communication and accountability is a chief impetus for us. Information ought to be clear and understandable to all in order for it to be of the best possible value. Freedom of information serves as the pivotal fuel that energizes and encourages transparency. 
An everyday discussion of political themes will be brought to the table and shared with our readers. Our neutrality prompts us to avoid judging the validity or importance of an opinion. It is the virtue of delivering information in an open platform with total objectivity. Therefore, neutral attitude means to provide all available stances to the public concerning any given topic regardless of political, religious, or ethnic backgrounds. It is a duty of Morocco World News to work as a mediator that will simplify dialogue between people from different backgrounds.

Name: Irish Independent
Description: To tell Ireland’s story each and every day, our journalists pursue the stories that matter. To continue reporting independent news and real stories, the Irish Independent has turned a new page and started a subscription service. From less than €2.50 per week, you can access unique and exclusive stories. These will continue to appear in the print edition of the Irish Independent and Sunday Independent. Subscribe to read our stories at www.independent.ie/subscribe

Name: Energy Voice
Description: Visit Energy Voice for all the latest news from the oil, gas and renewables sectors. Access unique content, industry leader opinions, international news, comment, and exclusive videos.

Name: NZZ
Description: Die NZZ-Mediengruppe gehört zu den grössten Medienunternehmen der Schweiz. Sie betreibt schwergewichtig die Erzeugung, Veredelung und Verbreitung von publizistisch hochstehenden Inhalten. Die NZZ-Medienruppe bewahrt sich eine möglichst grosse wirtschaftliche Unabhängigkeit und setzt zur Sicherung der statutarischen Zweckbestimmungen (Qualität, Unabhängigkeit, Liberalismus) auf eine hohe Eigenkapitalquote und einen hohen Selbstfinanzierungsgrad der Investitionen.

Name: El Financiero Costa Rica
Description: El Financiero brinda información actual y analítica de alta calidad, en temas de negocios, finanzas, economía, alta gerencia y tecnología. Somos la herramienta que los ejecutivos de grandes, pequeñas y medianas empresas de Costa Rica y la región utilizan para la toma de decisiones.

Name: Jornal Económico
Description: O Jornal Económico é uma publicação dirigida a todos os leitores que procurem informação económica de qualidade, com uma forte aposta em temas que interessem aos contribuintes, às empresas, aos investidores e aos aforradores.

Name: La Provence
Description: C'est en août 1944, avec des moyens de fortune que le premier numéro du "Provençal" composé d'une seule feuille est imprimé. Septembre 1944, trois semaines après la première édition du Provençal, le Méridional sort également son premier numéro. C'est en février 1971 que les deux journaux signent un accord. il y a un rapprochement entre les deux titres: les rédactions qui gardent leur indépendance, partagent l'impression. Mais pour faire face aux problèmes auxquels sont confrontés les journaux de la PQR, le Provençal et le Méridional aillient leur force.Cette fusion donne naissance à La Provence, le 4 juin 1997. 2007 sera l'année du changement. En janvier, La Provence se dote de deux nouvelles rotatives de la toute dernière génération. Un outil industriel high-tech qui lui permet de passer au format Berlinois. Cette même année, elle lance son site Internet et le 20 décembre le Groupe Hersant Média devient propriétaire du groupe La Provence.

Name: The New Indian Express
Description: Express Network Private Limited is the online arm of Express Publications (Madurai) Limited, (formerly Indian Express (Madurai) Limited) founded by Late Shri Ramnath Goenka. The Company has its Registered Office at Express Garden, 29 Second Main Road, Ambattur Industrial Estate, Chennai 600 058.

Name: Nikkei
Description:
Nikkei is a world-renowned media brand for Asian news, respected for quality journalism and for being a trusted provider of business news and information. 

Founded as a market news provider in Japan in 1876, Nikkei has grown into one of the world’s largest media corporations, with 37 foreign editorial bureaus and approximately 1,500 journalists worldwide. Nikkei acquired the Financial Times in 2015. Combined digital and print readership of the Nikkei and the FT totals about 4 million.

Name: Jornal de Negócios
Description: Financial daily newspaper. Jornal diário de economia, com sede em Lisboa, Portugal. O Jornal de Negócios inclui ainda toda a informação financeira sobre as empresas cotadas na Bolsa de Lisboa, assim como a sua cotação diária.

Name: L'AGEFI
Description:
L’AGEFI est le service d’information leader des professionnels de la finance en France.

L’AGEFI s’appuie sur la 1ʳᵉ rédaction financière composée de 50 journalistes experts en finance, permettant de couvrir l’ensemble des secteurs de la finance : Asset Management, Private Equity, Investisseurs Institutionnels, Cash & Risk, Patrimoine.

Au quotidien, nos journalistes analysent, décryptent et approfondissent l’actualité et offrent à nos lecteurs une information unique à très forte valeur ajoutée (alertes, articles, analyses, dossiers de fond...) indispensables à leur activité. 

L’AGEFI, en tant qu’animateur des communautés qui composent la finance, organise plus de 30 évènements référents. Avec une connaissance unique sur les 300 000 professionnels de la finance en France et au travers ses événements : conférences, rencontres professionnelles, salon, diners, prix et classements, L’AGEFI est le relais privilégié entre les professionnels de la finance.

Name: EL Universal C.P.N.
Description: Medio líder de noticias en internet en México. Noticias al minuto de política, ciudad, cultura, espectáculos y deportes. Video, clasificados y estilo de vida.

Name: USA TODAY Co., Inc.
Description:
USA TODAY Co., Inc. (NYSE: TDAY) is a diversified media company with expansive reach at the national and local level dedicated to empowering and enriching communities. We seek to inspire, inform, and connect audiences as a scalable, growth focused media and digital marketing solutions company. We endeavor to deliver essential content, marketing solutions, and experiences for curated audiences, advertisers, consumers, and stakeholders by leveraging our diverse teams and suite of products to enrich the local communities and businesses we serve.  

Our current portfolio of trusted media brands includes the USA TODAY NETWORK, comprised of the national publication, USA TODAY, and local media organizations in the United States, and Newsquest, a wholly-owned subsidiary operating in the United Kingdom. Our digital marketing solutions brand, LocaliQ, uses innovation and software to enable small and medium-sized businesses to grow, and USA TODAY NETWORK Ventures, our events division, creates impactful consumer engagements, promotions, and races. For more information, visit: www.usatodayco.com

Name: reNEWS - Renewable Energy News
Description:
reNEWS - the 'digital newspaper' and real-time news website tracking the renewable energy market.

Established in 2002, the reNEWS newsletter is regarded as a leading source of information on the sector, providing the exclusive and unmissable stories that matter to the industry.

Breaking news is available through our dynamic website and across a range of digital platforms including a customised daily alerts service. Bookmark reNEWS.biz now for daily coverage of renewable energy around the world.

Our experienced journalists, led by editor Stephen Dunne, have established a reputation for having their fingers on the pulse of the development and construction business and the issues that affect it.

Twice a month, 24 times a year, our newsletter provides exclusive business information; a series of ground-breaking special reports add in-depth analysis and insight at no extra charge to subscribers.

reNEWS is a ‘must read’ for offshore wind in Northern Europe and worldwide, and for onshore wind in Britain and Ireland, following projects from planning to construction and operation.

reNEWS is also the number-one news source for the evolving marine renewables market. We report on the leading UK and global technologies in this emerging industry.

Over the past four years we have also built a reputation for excellence in our coverage of the Americas, providing timely and topical news from the US, Canada and Latin America.

Our headquarters are located in Winchester, UK where Stephanie Chan heads up sales. We attend a number of industry events through the year and our friendly sales team would be pleased to meet up to discuss the varied advertising opportunities available and subscription packages.

Name: Gannett | USA TODAY NETWORK
Description:
Gannett Co., Inc. (NYSE: GCI) is a diversified media company with expansive reach at the national and local level dedicated to empowering and enriching communities. We seek to inspire, inform, and connect audiences as a scalable, growth focused media and digital marketing solutions company. We endeavor to deliver essential content, marketing solutions, and experiences for curated audiences, advertisers, consumers, and stakeholders by leveraging our diverse teams and suite of products to enrich the local communities and businesses we serve.

Our current portfolio of trusted media brands includes the USA TODAY NETWORK, comprised of the national publication, USA TODAY, and local media organizations in the United States, and Newsquest, a wholly-owned subsidiary operating in the United Kingdom. Our digital marketing solutions brand, LocaliQ, uses innovation and software to enable small and medium-sized businesses to grow, and USA TODAY NETWORK Ventures, our events division, creates impactful consumer engagements, promotions, and races.

Name: Infobae
Description:
Todas las noticias en tiempo real. 

Información, videos y fotos sobre los hechos y los protagonistas más relevantes del momento de la Argentina y el mundo. 

Seguinos en nuestras redes sociales:

twitter.com/infobae
facebook.com/Infobae
youtube.com/infobae
instagram.com/Infobae

#LeeloAntes

Name: Transport Topics
Description: The news leader in freight transportation. When it comes to major issues, industry events, and new developments, Transport Topics journalists are there first and most often.  For the last 80 years, our hallmark coverage of the regulatory environment and the business and technology landscapes makes TT unique -- a major multimedia channel, personalized for transportation.

Name: The Business Standard
Description:
The Business Standard is a news platform that operates in both online and print versions. It is owned by The Horizon Media and Publication Ltd based in Dhaka, Bangladesh.

With the goal to promote good governance and best practices in business and economy, the Business Standard puts an extra emphasis on business news. However, it also covers general news, sports, features and entertainment.

Powered by a group of experienced journalists, The Business Standard emphasizes on visual storytelling to help readers decipher the most complicated issues.

The platform is also provides selective international news and analysis from Bloomberg, Project Syndicate, Foreign Policy, Hindustan Times, Mint, Digit and Reuters.

Name: Maddyness
Description:
Maddyness est le média leader qui dynamise l'écosystème tech et entrepreneurial français depuis 10 ans. Chaque mois, 1 million de professionnels - entrepreneurs, investisseurs, experts et corporates - se connectent à Maddyness pour s'informer, se former et se rencontrer.

Maddyness offre un contenu riche et diversifié (articles, analyses, guides, événements) pour rester à la pointe de l'actualité de l'innovation. Très active dans l'organisation d'événements (conférences, meetups, hackathons), Maddyness favorise les rencontres et les échanges au sein de l'écosystème tech. Certifié B Corp, Maddyness s'engage à promouvoir un impact positif et durable.

Name: Le Quotidien du Médecin
Description:
Le Quotidien du Médecin est le journal de référence de la presse médicale. Journal d'information professionnelle médicale, politique, scientifique, il s'adresse chaque jour à l'ensemble des médecins et des institutionnels du secteur.
Tout au long de l'année, son offre éditoriale est enrichie de numéros spécialistes, FMC, thématiques, congrès.

En permanence, lequotidiendumedecin.fr présente l'actualité chaude, développe des services et des outils, et permet l'interactivité avec les professionnels sur les grands sujets qui agitent la profession.

Name: BusinessDay
Description:
BusinessDay is West Africa’s leading provider of business intelligence and market-moving news, empowering decision makers with insightful and accurate information about the continent’s business finance environment and beyond.

Since 2001, we’ve consistently helped millions across the continent stay ahead of the curve with the latest trends, opportunities, and challenges, enabling them to make informed decisions that drive growth and innovation.

What initially began as a Daily, BusinessDay now carries out its mission across multiple platforms and brands – including web and digital media print, BusinessDay Conferences and Events, as well as BusinessDay Research and Intelligence Unit.

Join us as we continue to shape the future of finance in West Africa and beyond with comprehensive business news and analysis.

Name: El Cronista
Description: Te hacemos la economía más fácil.

Name: 20 Minutes France
Description:
Créé en 2002, 20 Minutes est un éditeur d’information indépendant détenu à parts égales par le groupe SIPA-Ouest-France, éditeur du premier quotidien français payant et par le Groupe Rossel, premier groupe de presse francophone belge. 
Il est le seul grand média français indépendant de tout groupe financier, industriel ou commercial. Son audience réunit 20 millions de lecteurs par mois dont plus de 80% sur les supports numériques.
Mobilisée dans la lutte contre les fausses informations, la rédaction de 20 Minutes a obtenu  la labellisation du très restreint IFCN Network. L'entreprise a édité, en 2011, une charte éthique et déonthologique, définissant les valeurs ainsi que les règles de vie professionnelle portées par chacun des collaborateurs de 20 Minutes.

www.20minutes.fr
www.20minutes-media.com
https://linktr.ee/20minutesfrance

Name: Ziarul Financiar
Description:
ZIARUL FINANCIAR este liderul presei de business din România.

De 26 ani pe piaţa românească, ZF oferă cititorilor semnificaţia evenimentelor recente şi anticipează evoluţiile din afaceri şi economie, prin ştiri, analize şi articole de opinie.

Cea mai prestigioasă publicaţie economică din România, ZIARUL FINANCIAR şi-a clădit această reputaţie prin ştiri exclusive, contextualizare şi ierarhizare a informaţiilor şi complexitatea datelor interpretate zi de zi.

Jurnaliştii ZF colectează şi analizează informaţii complexe şi în anuarele Top Tranzacţii, Anuarul de business al României - Cei mai mari jucători din economie, Who`s Who in Business - Cei mai importanţi 1.000 de oameni din business, Top 100 cele mai valoroase companii - o serie completă de instrumente de lucru pentru orice manager şi antreprenor.

Lor li se adresează şi evenimentele de business organizate de ZIARUL FINANCIAR, în cadrul cărora sunt anunţate investiţii, sunt dezvăluite strategii şi sunt previzionate evoluţii ale fenomenelor economice.

ZF face agenda celor mai puternici oameni de afaceri.

Name: dev.by
Description:
dev.by — медиа об ИТ-индустрии в Беларуси и мире. Публикуем экспертную информацию об ИТ с 2008 года. Делаем новости, интервью, репортажи, аналитику. Собираем каталог белорусских ИТ-компаний и отзывы о них. Ведём самый полный календарь ИТ-событий и статистику зарплат, размещаем вакансии.

Разработчики, аналитики, тестировщики, менеджеры и руководители ИТ-компаний, а также все, кто интересуется технологиями и причастен к ИТ-сфере, ежемесячно читают dev.by.
---

Dev.by — the biggest IT community in Belarus.

Name: ASH | Le MAG du travail social
Description:
Référence depuis 1955, les ASH décryptent l’actualité, les initiatives et les préoccupations du secteur social et médico-social, anticipent les évolutions et les politiques économiques et sociales de demain, apportent les éclairages pratiques et la veille juridique indispensable à votre activité quotidienne.

Inclusion, autonomie et protection de l'enfance sont les trois domaines majeurs des champs couverts par les ASH.

Chaque mois, la revue ASH couvre tout le social et le médico-social, domaine par domaine, métier par métier, en 5 temps forts : Inspirations / Management & réseaux / Veille et dossier juridique / Enquêtes / Recherche /Formation /

Chaque jour, le site assure une veille indispensable sur l'actualité des filières et des métiers du social. 

Chaque semaine, une newsletter spécifique relaye les petites annonces du secteur. 
Et chaque lundi, l'infolettre l'Essentiel du social propose un récap éditorialisé de l'actualité de la semaine. 

Enfin d'autres newsletters périodiques tri hebdo, hebdo, bi mensuelle ou mensuelle vont progressivement couvrir l'essentiel des infos indispensables aux acteurs du social et du médico-social.

Name: The Business Times
Description:
The Business Times Global (BT Global) is the definitive destination for business leaders, policymakers, and investors seeking clarity on one of the world’s most dynamic regions and economies - Asean and beyond.

Anchored on the credibility and expertise of The Business Times, Singapore’s leading business media, BT Global delivers first-hand reporting, nuanced insights, and sharp analyses for its audience to grasp the impact of a changing world order and what it means for them.

Visit bt.global to unpack Asia, think Global today.

Name: The Japan Times
Description:
Founded in 1897, The Japan Times is country's oldest and most widely read English-language newspaper. The daily newspaper and website carries carrying news and features about Japan and the world.

In October 2013, the paper commenced an alliance with The International New York Times and launched The Japan Times on Sunday.

The company also publishes The Japan Times Alpha, as well as both English and Japanese language-learning books.

Name: Libération
Description:
Libération est synonyme d’engagement. Pas d’un engagement opportuniste et dans l’air du temps, non, d’un engagement originel. Parce que c’est de l’engagement qu’est né Libé en 1973. Près de 50 ans plus tard, Jean-Paul Sartre n’est plus là, mais la rédaction continue de faire des choix. Elle alerte, elle dénonce, elle offre à ses lecteurs une hauteur de vue qui leur permet de voir au-delà des apparences.
Libération sait rire, Libération sait transmettre des émotions, Libération sait surtout surprendre grâce à son audace. Chaque jour, la manchette du journal est une nouvelle proposition, souvent drôle, parfois mélancolique, mais toujours audacieuse. 
Le projet de Libération, c’est surtout d’aider la société à s’améliorer, de transmettre des valeurs de tolérance, d’humanisme et de progressisme. Libération se bat contre les idées reçues et la pensée unique, pour que ses lecteurs aient une vision juste de la société.

Name: L'Usine Nouvelle
Description: L'Usine Nouvelle décrypte quotidiennement l'actualité de l'industrie. A travers le site internet et le magazine hebdomadaire, retrouvez l'actualité clé des secteurs aéro, auto, énergie, agro et bien d'autres en France et à l'étranger.

Name: Minnesota Kind Magazine
Description: Top leaders Circle

Name: Dhakatimes.com
Description:
Country's Leading Online Newspaper. All kinds of update news you can found here.
You can found Bangladesh News, Breaking News, Political, Share Market, Local, International, Entertainment, Sports, Health, Economics, IT, Telecom, E-dhaka, Food, Education, Media News and many more....
Get update for every moment. Connect with us. www.dhakatimes24.com

Name: CORRECTIV
Description:
CORRECTIV is the first non-profit investigative newsroom in Germany. We investigate social and economic grievances and abuse of power. Our award-winning journalists investigate issues that directly impact people in Germany and elsewhere, from rising rents on the housing market to the theft of billions of European taxpayers' money to a medical scandal involving fake cancer drugs. In addition, we offer training programs to promote media literacy as part of our educational mission. We also develop new tools for journalism such as our CrowdNewsroom, which allows newsrooms to engage their audience by investigating issues together.

CORRECTIV is supported by private donors and grants from foundations and institutions. Thus, our journalism is not driven by quotas, advertising or politics, but oriented towards citizens instead.

Name: The Edge Malaysia
Description:
The Edge Malaysia is a leading financial news organisation in the country.

Our core editorial policy is that we have a public duty to seek out and report the truth. We believe that a high standard of editorial quality and excellence should undergird success in an industry that is built around serving the public interest. The interest of the investing public will be served by fair, accurate and timely information. We are proud of the fact that our independence and integrity in the pursuit of truth is recognised.

Name: TradeWinds
Description:
Shipping news as it happens

TradeWinds, shipping's biggest news source,  provides unrivalled news, opinion and intelligence by the best reporters, analysts and opinion shapers in the business.  It's quality and insight can’t be found anywhere else.

Our channels include; online news and breaking stories, the weekly newspaper (print and e-reader) business focuses and spotlight reports, TW+ quarterly magazine, Events, Alerts and App. 

tradewindsnews.com

Privacy:
https://www.tradewindsnews.com/privacy/privacy-policy

Name: El Mundo
Description:
EL MUNDO DEL SIGLO XXI
Spanish newspaper
Madrid, Spain

EL MUNDO DEL SIGLO XXI is a young newspaper (1989) but has a lot of popularity in Spain. Investigative Journalism made that paper famous in the 90's. Now it is well positioned in the market with a strong view on design, graphics, type and illustration. All Department areas are integrated with Internet from 2008.

Name: Sciences Humaines
Description:
Sciences Humaines Communication est une société de presse et d'édition située à Auxerre dans l'Yonne.

Le magazine Sciences Humaines est né en 1989 à Auxerre, dans l'Yonne.
Indépendant, il s'est imposé comme le magazine de référence des sciences humaines et sociales.

Sciences Humaines Communication  publie un mensuel (Sciences Humaines), un trimestriel (les Grands Dossiers des Sciences Humaines) et des hors série. 

Elle a développé une revue trimestrielle et un site spécialisés en psychologie, "Le Cercle Psy",  ainsi qu'un site dédié à l'histoire globale. 

Depuis 1998, Sciences Humaines publient des ouvrages en sciences humaines et sociales à travers plusieurs collections auxquelles contribuent les meilleurs spécialistes.

Name: Le Journal de l'Automobile
Description:
Créé en 1979, Le Journal de l'Automobile est le média de référence de tous les professionnels du secteur qui ont besoin d'une information fiable, récente et commentée. 

Nos déclinaisons (les journaux print et digitaux, le site journalauto.com, les newsletters et cette page LinkedIn) sont les outils nécessaires pour suivre l'actualité automobile professionnelle et économique (distribution, nominations, salons, industrie, réglementations, constructeurs, équipementiers, véhicules d'occasion...) à travers nos articles et dossiers thématiques.

Ne manquez pas nos évènements, en ligne ou en présentiel, en suivant cette page !

Name: L'Express
Description:
L’Express est une marque média de référence depuis 1953 : un hebdomadaire, un site internet, des applications, des podcasts, des newsletters... et bientôt des masterclass, des évènements et d’autres projets ! 

Le Groupe L’Express c’est aujourd'hui une rédaction de plus de 70 journalistes, garants d’une information fiable et de qualité ainsi qu’une équipe d'experts du numérique en forte croissance, au service des nouveaux modes de consommation de l’information.  
L’Express Studio c'est l’entité commerciale du Groupe qui crée avec ses partenaires des solutions de communications innovantes pour toucher les cadres dirigeants et leader d’opinion

Alain Weill, fondateur du Groupe NextRadioTV (RMC, BFM TV), a racheté L’Express en 2019 avec l’ambition de transformer cette marque historique dans le cadre d’un vrai projet entrepreneurial. Après une période de restructuration, le Groupe entame désormais sa phase de développement.

Name: Le Revenu
Description:
Le Revenu a été le premier mensuel de finances personnelles créé en France, en mai 1968. Sa marque s'est construite une forte réputation et un lectorat fidèle en procurant des conseils financiers pertinents et personnalisés, allant de la fiscalité à la sélection de fonds et d'actions, en passant par l'immobilier et la gestion des crédits.

Le Revenu was the first monthly personal finance magazine launched in France in May 1968. Le Revenu's brand is focused on servicing its readers' community with appropriate advice covering a wide range of topics, from tax and legal information, to funds and securities selection, through real estate and mortgage planning.

Name: Female Kindness
Description: Top leaders Circle

Name: Grupo de Comunicação O POVO
Description:
Tradição e modernidade são características marcantes do Grupo O POVO, uma empresa/instituição entranhada na vida dos cearenses. Acompanhe vagas e novidades do O POVO pelo LinkedIn.

Veja a Cartas de Princípios do Grupo O POVO: http://bit.ly/1IZSppP

Veja nosso Código de Ética: http://bit.ly/1kMmIKM

Name: Paperjam
Description: Founded in 2000, Paperjam is Maison Moderne's flagship media brand. Acknowledged leader of the economic and financial press with 150,000 unique readers of its magazine, supplements and special editions, website, newsletters and business club.

Name: Prothom Alo
Description:
Since its inception in 1998, Prothom Alo has emerged as the largest Media Industry in Bangladesh during these 23 years of exertion. Our daily readership is the highest in both print and online. Along with more than 15 million followers, the largest social platform Facebook has ranked Prothom Alo in the world's top ten media in the daily news category. At the same time, prothomalo.com is the top Bangla website in the world.
 
In addition to Bengali media, we have online English web portals for different language speakers, digital business platforms, the Prothoma publication in the book world, Kishor Alo for teenagers, Biggan Chinta with amazing scientific information, quarterly research journals Protichinta, Cholti Ghotona on current affairs, ABC Radio, Prothom Alo Bondhushova to spread friends across the country and Prothom Alo Trust to be by the side of the helpless and needy. We have also launched new OTT platform Chorki. Fundamentally, the readers are our main strength behind our engagement in various facets of society.
 
And as an organization, Prothom Alo sparks a modern and dynamic work culture. We are moving forward together to achieve our goals through the practice of these 5 values of Good Journalism, People-orientation, Change Catalyst, Creativity and Solidarity.

Name: L'Hôtellerie Restauration
Description: Depuis 1923, le journal L’Hôtellerie Restauration accompagne les professionnels du secteur CHR à travers le journal, le site internet (actualités, Ophélia, annonces emploi, vente de fonds...) et les réseaux sociaux (X, Facebook, Instagram, Tiktok, Youtube, LinkedIn) et ses podcasts (à écouter sur Apple Podcast ou Spotify).

Name: Minera Brasil

Name: Santé mentale, la revue
Description:
Le mensuel des équipes soignantes en psychiatrie

La ligne éditoriale de la revue Santé mentale est résolument centrée sur une clinique pluridisciplinaire exigeante qui prend aussi en compte les compétences des usagers. Elle allie une certaine forme de vulgarisation à une rigueur théorique et pratique qui permet aux profanes de découvrir le champ de la santé mentale et aux professionnels les plus accomplis d’enrichir leurs pratiques.

Hors des querelles des écoles de pensée, il s’agit de valoriser et de croiser les savoir-faire, d’interroger le savoir-être du soignant, de questionner les pratiques et l’actualité.

Chaque mois, Santé mentale se construit autour d’un dossier d’une cinquantaine de pages qui explore une problématique de soin. Cliniciens, usagers, familles et spécialistes des sciences humaines y confrontent leurs analyses et témoignent des pratiques. Autour de cette pièce maîtresse, les rubriques laissent place à l’actualité, aux livres, à l’art et au bonheur de soigner, aux reportages et à l’image.

L’iconographie est riche et présente les œuvres de nombreux artistes qui soutiennent ainsi à leur façon l’écriture et l’engagement clinique.

Santé mentale c'est chaque mois plus de 20 000 lecteurs et une moyenne de 95 000 visiteurs sur le site https://www.santementale.fr/ alimenté chaque jours en actualités. 

Santé mentale organise chaque année les Rencontres Soignantes en Psychiatrie, découvrir le programme 2023.

elDiario.es, es un nuevo medio digital de información y análisis con el foco puesto en la política y en la economía en su sentido más amplio, en el que afecta a las personas más que a los partidos o a los mercados. 

Queremos dar voz a tantos ciudadanos en España que se ahogan ante una oferta informativa cada vez menos plural, cada día más monocorde y asfixiante. Creemos en un periodismo objetivo, pero también honesto. Estamos con la libertad, con la justicia, con la solidaridad, con el progreso sostenible de la sociedad y con el interés general de los ciudadanos.

 Defendemos los derechos humanos, la igualdad y una democracia mejor, más transparente y abierta.

Name: Die Presse
Description:
Qualitätsjournalismus in Österreich hat einen Namen: »Die Presse«

Nachrichten • Verpassen Sie nichts, was wirklich wichtig ist - und bleiben Sie stets auf der Höhe des Nachrichtengeschehens.

Meinung • Die "Presse"-Redaktion liefert die wichtigsten Argumente zu aktuellen Themen. So können Sie sich selbst Ihre Meinung bilden. Gastkommentatoren sorgen dafür, dass das gesamte Meinungsspektrum abgebildet ist.

Magazin • Entdecken Sie Neues und erweitern Sie Ihren Wissenshorizont. Lesevergnügen über die Tagesaktualität hinaus - mit tiefgehenden Recherchen und fundierten Analysen aus der "Presse"-Redaktion.

Name: La Revue Banque
Description:
Société d'information professionnelle plurimédia, du secteur bancaire et financier, La Revue Banque propose des contenus et services diversifiés.
Dans toutes ses activités, le groupe s’appuie sur l’expertise d’auteurs, de contributeurs et d’intervenants prestigieux, et sur le savoir-faire reconnu de ses équipes. 
Notre engagement, vous apporter une information réglementaire et technique approfondie, pour décrypter et débattre des dernières évolutions dans les domaines de la banque, de l’assurance et de la finance.
Nos activités :
• RB Presse (Revue Banque, Banque & Droit)
• RB Événement (Club Banque, Les Débats de Revue Banque, RB Live…)
• RB Formation (formations inter et intra-entreprise)
• RB Édition, e-librairie et Bibliothèque numérique de la Banque et de la Finance.

Vous retrouverez sur revue-banque.fr :
• l’intégralité des contenus de nos titres de presse, également consultables sur smartphone depuis l’application RB (téléchargeable à partir de votre store).
• la présentation de toutes nos activités
• des contenus exclusifs pour interagir avec les professionnels du secteur bancaire et financier.

Name: Conflits - Revue de Géopolitique
Description:
Conflits est une revue bimestrielle et un site internet consacrés à la géopolitique, à l'histoire et aux relations internationales.

Conflits n’est pas une revue destinée aux seuls spécialistes.
Réunissant des journalistes et experts reconnus (universitaires, militaires, chefs d’entreprise, …), français ou étrangers, sa mission est de permettre au lecteur de comprendre l’actualité pour mieux décrypter le monde et son évolution.
Elle propose des dossiers riches et complets qui croisent des analyses historiques, géographiques, économiques, diplomatiques et culturelles. Les articles sont accompagnés de cartes, de graphiques et d’illustrations pour une lecture accessible et différente de la géopolitique.

Name: Whitepaper.mx
Description:
Escribimos acerca de las empresas y los empresarios en México - estamos desarrollando información relevante, diferenciada y confiable para la comunidad de negocios en el país. Suscríbete al newsletter semanal. 

Whitepaper.mx se posiciona como una fuente esencial de información para la comunidad empresarial, enfocándose en la entrega de contenidos únicos y exclusivos que no se encuentran en otros medios. Este dinámico portal digital combina la objetividad periodística con una documentación exhaustiva para crear historias que capturan la imaginación y estimulan la mente.

Redefiniendo la narrativa del emprendimiento en México, Whitepaper.mx despliega una serie de relatos fascinantes que iluminan la trayectoria y anécdotas de las nuevas generaciones de empresarios. Con cada historia que se cuenta, se ofrece un vistazo al cambiante significado de lo que implica crear empresas en la nación.

El contenido relevante es un pilar en Whitepaper.mx. El tiempo invertido en la lectura de los artículos es considerado una inversión en el crecimiento profesional de los lectores. Cada pieza de contenido está diseñada para ampliar el conocimiento, preparar a los lectores para enfrentar los desafíos del mundo de los negocios y darles una ventaja competitiva.

Whitepaper.mx aborda una selección integral de temas, incorporando nuevas voces y perspectivas a través de su variedad de autores de opinión. Y mirando hacia el futuro, planea expandir su oferta para incluir contenido multimedia exclusivo para suscriptores.

La experiencia de lectura en Whitepaper.mx se ha diseñado para ser libre de distracciones, con una interfaz limpia y libre de publicidad intrusiva. Esta atención al detalle refuerza la dedicación de la plataforma a su audiencia, proporcionando un ambiente propicio para la absorción de ideas e información.

Como suscriptor de Whitepaper.mx, se tiene acceso a todo el contenido tan pronto como está disponible. Además, se abre la posibilidad de interactuar mediante come

Name: The Standard
Description:
Founded in 1827, the Evening Standard is London’s most iconic news brand and the UK’s largest quality daily. Recognised as setting the agenda in politics and business, as well as being first with major news and sports stories, the brand reaches a total of 18 million cross-platform readers a month. Every day we have 2.6 million cross-platform readers and 87% of those consume our news on mobile.

London is our community, we represent the city and its diverse residents at every level, campaigning for Londoners, the city and the businesses and creativity that operate here. We are a voice for London - a voice that holds power politically and globally and we intend never to  lose that influence

Launched in 1987, London’s life and style bible Evening Standard Magazine celebrates the thriving culture, art, fashion, beauty, food, film and theatre scenes in London. Published every Thursday and Friday, ES Magazine is the barometer for what to buy, see and experience in the capital each week, reaching a wide and affluent readership across the city. 

Our Commercial Mission
We are the voice of modern London, the destination for brands to connect with valuable audiences through engaging and inspiring content, in the capital, the UK and the globe. 

We co-create content in a value exchange with our readers and provide best in class solutions for brands who wish to do the same. Our solutions team, Studio 27, offer the content and platform expertise to allow your brand to reach our readers in a way that we know works.

Name: Le Devoir
Description:
Le Devoir est un média d’information indépendant, sur mobile, papier, tablette et Web. Il a été fondé le 10 janvier 1910 par le journaliste et homme politique Henri Bourassa. Le fondateur avait souhaité que son journal demeure totalement indépendant et qu’il ne puisse être vendu à aucun groupe, ce qui est toujours le cas cent ans plus tard.

De journal de combat à sa création, Le Devoir a évolué vers la formule du journal d’information dans la tradition nord-américaine. Il s’engage à défendre les idées et les causes qui assureront l’avancement politique, économique, culturel et social de la société québécoise.

Name: Pharmazeutische Zeitung
Description:
Die Pharmazeutische Zeitung (PZ) ist die führende Zeitschrift der Apothekerschaft. Wir verfolgen das Ziel, kompetent, seriös, umfassend und zeitnah über berufspolitische und gesundheitspolitische Entwicklungen, relevante Entwicklungen in der pharmazeutischen Forschung sowie den aktuellen Stand der pharmazeutischen Praxis zu informieren. Dies gilt für alle PZ-Produkte wie die wöchentlich erscheinende Printausgabe und PZ online gleichermaßen. 
 
Hochqualitativer Journalismus mit Bezug zur Apothekenpraxis ist dabei unser Motto. Dabei möchten wir ausdrücklich alle Apotheker und den Berufsnachwuchs erreichen. Zudem bieten wir einem immer breiteren Kreis von Lesern, etwa aus der Wissenschaft, der Gesundheitspolitik, dem medizinischen Bereich und der Gesundheitsbranche, spannende und hochrelevante Inhalte auf unserer frei zugänglichen Website.
 
Die PZ erscheint in der Avoxa – Mediengruppe Deutscher Apotheker GmbH, einem Tochterunternehmen der ABDA – Bundesvereinigung Deutscher Apothekerverbände.

Newsletter: https://www.pharmazeutische-zeitung.de/meine-pz/nl-subscribe/

Impressum: https://www.pharmazeutische-zeitung.de/weitere-infos/impressum/

Name: Dagens Medicin Danmark
Description:
Dagens Medicin er en uafhængig nyhedsavis, der arbejder for at skabe højest mulig kvalitet i sundhedsvæsenet.

Dagens Medicin udgiver:
- Avisen Dagens Medicin der bliver sendt ud landets ca. 20.000 læger, alle landets apotekere, hele medicinalindustrien og politikerne med sundhedsfaglig interesse.

- Konferencer for beslutningstagere i sundhedsvæsenet.

- Hjemmesiden DagensMedicin.dk, der dagligt bliver opdateret med nyheder om sundhedssektoren.

- Nyhedsbrevet Dagens Pharma, der udkommer fire gange om ugen. Målgruppen er alle, som arbejder med medicin.

- Nyhedsbrevet Kommunal Sundhed, der udkommer to gange om ugen. Målgruppen er kommunale ledere, der arbejder med sundhed og sygdom.

Retningslinier for debatten på Dagens Medicins sociale medier:

Debatten på Dagens Medicins sociale medier er primært forbeholdt læger og andre sundhedsprofessionelle aktører. Debatten skal foregå i en god og respektfuld tone over for de øvrige deltager. 
Redaktionen forbeholder os retten til at fjerne indlæg, der er racistiske, chikanerende, skrevet i en unødig grov tone, udleverer personlige oplysninger eller indeholder personangreb.

God debat!
Redaktionen på Dagens Medicin

Description: The STAT Trade Times, the first publication from STAT Publishing Group LLC, was one of the earliest and most reliable sources for news and news features for the aviation and shipping industries. It is a monthly publication, and it continues to be available in print and distributed within the industry. However, the publication has quickly transitioned to adapt itself to digital media. Today, stories are not just available in the monthly publication, but the official website of The STAT Trade Times, www.stattimes.com, is the place where you find the most up-to-date news related to air cargo, aviation, and logistics. Name: sheconomy
Description:
sheconomy steht für ein zeitgemäßes Gesellschaftsbild, das erfolgreiche Frauen präsentiert, fördert und miteinander verknüpft. Gleichzeitig ist sheconomy eine zentrale Plattform für inhaltlich relevante Themen rund um Wirtschaft, Finanzen, Unternehmertum, Forschung, Karriere & Lifestyle – aus dem Blickwinkel der selbstbewussten und unabhängigen Frau.

Alles, nur keine Klischees.

*Wir sind das weibliche Wirtschaftsmagazin der neuen Art 
*Auf die richtige Balance kommt es an. Das Magazin ist in erster Linie ein Wirtschaftsmagazin. Auf den zweiten Blick erkennt man die weibliche Perspektive. Ohne es explizit sagen zu müssen.
* Wir berichten über Erfolge und Challenges. Wege und No-Go’s. Persönlichkeiten und Erfahrungen. Reale Themen und echte Menschen. 
* Neue Blickwinkel ohne rosa Brille. National & international.
* Keine besänftigenden Quotenthemen oder Achtungserfolge
* Schwerpunkte wie Netzwerke, Identität, Technik, Naturwissenschaften, Arbeit…

Das neue Magazin ist: Selbstbewusst. Gemeinschaftlich-leistungsorientiert. Authentisch. Talk about. 

Die Rubriken: 
Strategie: Challenges und ihre neuen Gestaltungsräume. Neue Denkmuster und best Cases
Erfolg:  Erfolgsstories aus verschiedenen Gesichtspunkten
Perspektive: Frauen im Portrait, ihre Erfahrungen, Prioritäten und Entscheidungen 
Technologie: Ein Muss in komplexen Zeiten, Digitalisierung und Disruption
ICH: Die persönliche Perspektive zur Reflexion und Weiterbildung

Netzwerk der Netzwerke
Wir möchten die Frauennetzwerke in Österreich in ihrer Arbeit unterstützen, sie miteinander vernetzen und dabei ihre Visionen und Angebote für unsere Community präsentieren. Unser Netzwerk-Betreuungsteam freut sich auf alle Netzwerkinformationen unter communication@sheconomy.media

Name: Lokmat Media Pvt. Ltd
Description:
Lokmat Media Pvt. Ltd. is a leading multi-platform media company with interests in a diversified portfolio of publishing, broadcast, digital, entertainment, community and sports verticals. It has an employee strength of more than 3,000 and has a pan-India network of offices.
Lokmat is the 2nd largest read regional language newspaper in India with more than 25 million readers ( Total Readership, Lokmat Group, IRS 2019 Q3) and No1 newspaper in Maharashtra with a total readership of 2.18 crore readers (Total Readership, IRS 2019,Q3). Lokmat Samachar, with 3 editions is one of the largest read Hindi daily in the state of Maharashtra. Lokmat Times has 3 editions.
Keeping abreast with the changing digital landscape, we make our content available for its readers through our news portal www.lokmat.com and mobile news app.
We entered the TV space in 2008 and it co-owns a 24-hour news and current affairs channel ‘News18 Lokmat’ (earlier IBN Lokmat), through a JV with the Network18 Group.
Lokmat Group made its foray in the entertainment sector through its subsidiary Lokmat Entertainment for production and distribution of films and television content. It released its first Marathi film “Jetaa” in August 2010, a co-production with Ramesh Deo Productions Pvt. Ltd. 
Lokmat’s experiential marketing division – Taplight organizes various annual properties like  ‘Lokmat Maharashtrian of the Year’, ‘Lokmat Women Summit’ etc. which are the benchmark in the their respective categories. It also provides comprehensive 360 degree marketing solutions to clients including ‘Below The Line’ promotions and client led activations. It is the largest event management company in Maharashtra in terms of number of events held. This division also runs various community forums focussed on Women, Youth and Children.
Lokmat runs sports leagues across various cities in Maharashtra, mainly focusing on cricket and football.
As a responsible corporate citizen, the Group is engaged in various social initiative

Name: Amar Ujala Limited
Description:
Founded in 1948, Amar Ujala is one of India’s leading Hindi newspapers with 22 editions in 179 districts in 6 states and 2 union territories. With a total daily readership of 4.70 crore (Source: IRS2019Q2, TR), making it one of the most widely read broadsheet newspapers in India with a circulation base of 26.75 lakh copies (1.79 lakh copies of variant included) (Source: ABC January-June 2019) (RNI figures for Lucknow and Kanpur included). The geography of Amar Ujala covers North India, including Uttar Pradesh, Uttarakhand, Himachal Pradesh, Jammu and Kashmir, Haryana, Chandigarh, Punjab, and Delhi NCR.
 
Post-independence, India saw a clear dominance of British-established English dailies. Amar Ujala was founded with an objective of promoting social awakening and introducing a feeling of responsibility among the citizens of a recently independent India, heading towards building a new India. Amar Ujala has now entered its 75th year since inception and has constantly contributed towards nation-building through a bold, unbiased, and trust-based news reporting. 

The strength of Amar Ujala lies in its consistent and superior editorial coverage, with a clear focus on a variety of local issues in our 179 districts of operation, as well as issues of state, national, and international prerogatives.
Amar Ujala Web Services has its focus on quality content, videos, ground-stories, and the assurance of credible news. 

Amarujala.com and the app have a reach of over 50+ million unique worldwide visitors and more than 150 million video views per month. It has an active social media presence, with over 8 million Facebook followers, 3 million YouTube subscribers, 957K Instagram followers and, 1.5 million Twitter followers. AUW offers Amar Ujala mobile app in the Hindi language for both Android and Apple users to make it easier for the audience to consume the content.

La vente des livres permet de financer, d’une part, l’équipe de rédaction du site (la rédactrice en chef, nos journalistes, nos développeurs). En effet, nous proposons une information quotidienne gratuite, via notre site internet qui comptabilise en moyenne 700 000 visites par mois.

Name: KuwaitNews
Description:
انطلقت "كويت نيوز" أولا كخدمة اخبارية تقدم لمستخدمي الهواتف النقالة عبر الرسائل النصية القصيرة (SMS) في فبراير 2006، لتتمكن خلال سنوات قصيرة من تبوء مراكز متقدمة ضمن المنافسة من نظيراتها من الخدمات الإخبارية.

وتعتبر "كويت نيوز" أول خدمة إخبارية مرخصة رسميا وفقا لكتاب وزارة الإعلام الكويتية رقم 5322 لعام 2007.

وتغطي خدمة "كويت نيوز" في أخبارها عدة أقسام مستقلة، الأخبار المحلية وتشمل الأخبار السياسية والمحلية العامة، والأخبار الإقتصادية وتغطي أخبار الشركات المدرجة في بورصة الكويت بالإضافة الى إقفالات الأسواق الخليجية والأمريكية.

وأخيرا، القسم الرياضي، وهو ينقسم الى الأخبار المحلية التي تعني بالرياضة الكويتية وتحديدا بطولات كرة القدم وأخبار اللاعبين، وصولا الى الأخبار العربية والعالمية حول البطولات الكبرى ككأس العالم والبطولات الأوروبية وأخبار اللاعبين وانتقالاتهم.

وحتى تكتمل الرؤية الإعلامية، جاء موقع "كويت نيوز" الإخباري ليقدم لمشتركي الخدمة إمكانية الإطلاع على الخبر كاملا مع تفاصيله، بالإضافة الى أخبار أخرى من عدة قنوات إعلامية ووكالات إخبارية نرى أنها ذات أهمية وفائدة للقارئ.

وفي ظل تنامي أهمية الإنترنت واستخداماته المتعددة، وانتشاره بين فئة الشباب تحديدا، رأت "كويت نيوز" من الأهمية أن تصل الى تلك الشريحة من القراء والمتابعين، فجاءت صفحتها على موقع "Facebook" الاجتماعي، بالإضافة الى "Twitter" حيث يمثلان هذان الموقعان أهمية كبرى للوصول الى الشرائح المتعددة من القراء، وتنويع مصادر الوصول الى أخبار "كويت نيوز" في جميع الأوقات، وفي أكثر من موقع.

Name: صحيفة الشرق الأوسط
Description:
«الشرق الأوسط» - صحيفة العرب الأولى وإحدى المنصات الإعلامية الرئيسة التابعة للمجموعة السعودية للأبحاث والإعلام SRMG.
انطلقت «الشرق الأوسط» عام 1978 كصحيفة عربية دولية رائدة، تُلبي متطلبات القراء العرب في مختلف أنحاء العالم. واشتهرت الصحيفة، منذ بداياتها في شارع «فليت» في لندن، بلون صفحتها الأولى الأخضر الذي شكّل هوية بصرية مميزة لها وجزءاً من تاريخ علاقتها بجمهورها، وبتغطياتها المتعمقة التي واكبت الأحداث والقضايا المهمة كافة في العالم على مدى العقود الماضية. وعبر السنين، ذاع صيت «الشرق الأوسط» كصحيفة موثوقة قادرة على الوصول إلى أبرز القادة في لحظات حاسمة من تاريخ العالم.
في البدايات، ركزت «الشرق الأوسط» على المواضيع السياسية والاقتصادية والثقافية، ولكن منذ توسعها، أصبحت تغطي مواضيع طبية وعلمية وتقنية.
تقدم «الشرق الأوسط» منتجات ومنصات إعلامية متنوعة سواء كانت رقمية أو تقليدية. ويشمل هذا موقعاً إلكترونياً متطوراً، وتطبيقاً للأجهزة المحمولة وقناة «بودكاست» ومنصة ألعاب تفاعلية وغيرها.  ووسعّت «الشرق الأوسط» التغطية التي تشتهر بها في مجالات السياسة والثقافة والاقتصاد وكذلك الصحة والعلوم والتكنولوجيا.
تطبع «الشرق الأوسط» بالتزامن في 14 مدينة رئيسية حول العالم يومياً، وتتوزع عبر 4 قارات،  وتميزت عبر تاريخها بعلاقات وشراكات مع كبرى وسائل الاعلام العالمية،  مثل  «نيويورك تايمز»، و«الغارديان »، و«بلومبرغ»، و«تريبيون ميديا».

Name: Grain Feed & Milling Magazine
Description: The monthly 'Grain Feed & Milling Magazine' is publishing including latest news of Agriculture, Grain, Feed, Milling ,Dairy, Poultry, Farming & Food Processing Sector all over the world. The magazine (Print and online) will contain several pages including ‘News’, ‘Lead News’, ‘Exclusive’, ‘Feature’, ‘Interview’, ‘Research’, ‘Si-Tech’, ‘World’, ‘Market’, ‘Video’ etc.  This magazine published from South Asia's Agriculture based Bangladesh & we supply this magazine globally more than 32 Country,  will play the role of South Asia's Grain Feed and Milling Market’s like one of the spokesman.Apart from this there are fairs based on various topics of agricultural sector & like Seminar, Symposium, Workshop News in different parts of the world are being added here.

Name: Newcastle Herald
Description: Newcastle Herald (newcastleherald.com.au) is your first and most reliable source of local news, business, sport, weather, lifestyle and entertainment from Newcastle and the Hunter Region. Our publishing platforms include print, digital, e-edition, mobile app, newsletters, Facebook, Instagram, Google News and LinkedIn. The Herald, which traces its roots back to 1876, is proud to be part of Australian Community Media.

Name: Mathrubhumi
Description:
Conceived as the mouthpiece of India's freedom movement, Mathrubhumi is one of the front-runners among the Malayalam newspapers. The first copy of Mathrubhumi was published on 18th March 1923 - the day before the first anniversary of Mahatma Gandhi's arrest for the first time by the British police. Led by K.P. Kesava Menon, the prominent freedom fighter, as Editor and K. Madhavan Nair as Managing Director, Mathrubhumi was envisaged for spreading the message of the great National Movement.  

Now with 16 editions- 10 in Kerala , one each in New Delhi, Mumbai, Bengaluru, Chennai, Qatar & Dubai- it has an impressive circulation of over 1.5 million copies.

In 1979 the Company launched Grihalakshmi, a magazine exclusively for the women of Kerala. Chitrabhumi in 1982, a magazine catering the interests of the Malayalam movie buffs, followed it. Mathrubhumi's other publications are Thozhilvartha, Mathrubhumi Sports Masika, Balabhumi, Mathrubhumi ArogyaMasika, Mathrubhumi Yathra, Mathrubhumi Minnaminni & Cartoon Plus, which was later replaced with a monthly "Mathrubhumi Chithrakatha". Our Annual "Mathrubhumi Year Book " is published both in Malayalam and English.  Celebrity lifestyle Magazine "Mathrubhumi Star & Style" replaced Chithrabhumi in 2013. Mathrubhumi Books, the publishing house, has already made a mark of its own in Malayalam Publishing industry.

On 5th September, 1997 the Company launched the online edition www.mathrubhumi.com. Mathrubhumi operates 5  FM Radio stations under the name "CLUB FM".  Mathrubhumi Music is the music label owned by the company. On January 2013 Mathrubhumi launched its first Television Channel, "Mathrubhumi News" , a 24x7 Malayalam News Channel. "Kappa TV" a speciality entertainment channel was launched in February 2013. Redmic, launched in 2015, is the events division of Mathrubhumi. Silverbullet, a joint venture of Mathrubhumi launched in 2017, is an E-learning platform for engineering and medical entrance aspirants.

Name: 20 minutes online
Description:
20 minutes est le journal le plus lu en Suisse romande.

Lancé en 2006, en prolongement du succès de 20 Minuten, le titre romand pour pendulaire, 20 minutes, alimente quotidiennement les discussions, que ce soit sur la politique, l'économie, le sport, le divertissement ou les services. Les 2 éditions locales, Genève et Vaud, sont distribuées chaque matin, du lundi au vendredi, dans des caissettes placées aux endroits stratégiques de fortes affluences, comme les arrêts des transports publics.

Le quotidien appartient au groupe de médias 20 minutes, au même titre que les journaux pour pendulaires 20 Minuten en Suisse alémanique, 20 minuti au Tessin ou encore que les portails d'information 20minutes.ch et 20minuten.ch. Chaque jour ce sont ainsi près de 2 millions de personnes qui s'informent et se divertissent au travers des plateformes 20 minutes.

20 minutes fait partie de TX Group.

Name: The Daily Aus
Description: The Daily Aus offers young Australians a digestible and engaging way to access the news. We’re a newsroom of young journalists, delivering news for young people. We know the news is for everyone, so we’re here to empower you to be part of the important conversations.

Name: Weekendavisen
Description:
Weekendavisen er for læsere og lyttere, der vil udfordres og blive klogere.
Tilbring weekenden i selskab med de stærkeste skribenter og mest originale stemmer og få hver dag den bedste, perspektiverende journalistik om aktuelle begivenheder.  

Læs og lyt til landets bedst fortalte artikler om samfund, kultur, bøger og videnskab – og forstå verden bedre.

Name: Mieux Vivre Votre Argent
Description:
Mieux Vivre Votre Argent, est un magazine mensuel d'information et de conseil aux particuliers pour les aider à constituer, diversifier et développer leur patrimoine.
Chaque année, le magazine organise les grands prix de l'assurance vie, des SCPI...
En septembre a lieu la traditionnelle cérémonie des Corbeilles qui récompensent les établissements bancaires pour la qualité de l'ensemble de leur offre de fonds. Deux prix sont décernés pour les banques à réseaux : la Corbeille d'Or et la Corbeille Long Terme pour les performances respectivement à un an et cinq ans de leurs gammes.

Name: The Korea Economic Daily
Description:
The Korea Economic Daily is a digital media platform where news and analysis on Korean companies, industries, and financial markets are delivered to the readers around the world in English. It also provides exclusive intelligence on Korean institutional investors' asset allocations as well as future investment plan and newest M&A deals. It is the ultimate guide for investors, business partners, buyers and global asset managers seeking opportunities for investment and business in Korea. 

The Korea Economic Daily is produced, operated, and serviced by KED Global News Network, one of the subsidiaries of The Korea Economic Daily.

Name: Folha de Londrina
Description:
O jornal Folha de Londrina existe há mais de 60 anos para trazer à população de Londrina e região informação com qualidade, ética e independência editorial. 

Atualmente, a Folha de Londrina conta com uma grande equipe de jornalistas,fotógrafos  trabalhando diariamente para levar ao público leitor informação em tempo real através das versões impressa e online. 

O Folhaweb é a versão online da Folha de Londrina, que traz informação com muito mais mobilidade e praticidade. Além disso, a Folha de Londrina conta com o Vrum, o Lugar Certo e o Admite-se, que são os portais de classificados de automóveis, imóveis e empregos, respectivamente.
 
Siga-nos também aqui no Linkedin e saiba porque a Folha de Londrina é o jornal do Paraná!

Name: Klik Legal News
Description:
KlikLegal adalah portal berita hukum yang dikemas secara mendalam dengan topik-topik pilihan setiap harinya. Berita-berita hukum beserta topik pilihan yang disajikan di KlikLegal ditujukan sebagai referensi untuk membuat keputusan bisnis dan industri bagi pembacanya.

KlikLegal juga bersinergi dengan PRABU (lembaga kajian hukum dan kebijakan yang berkaitan dengan dunia bisnis) agar selalu dapat menghasilkan berita yang relevan dan terpercaya.

Name: The Post and Courier
Description: The Post and Courier, winner of the 2015 Pulitzer Prize Gold Medal for Public Service, is a newspaper covering South Carolina based out of Charleston.

Name: ICT Security Magazine
Description:
1° rivista italiana di sicurezza informatica attiva da oltre 20 anni.
ICT Security Magazine, prima pubblicazione italiana dedicata in forma esclusiva alla cyber security e alla business continuity, si pone l’obiettivo di coinvolgere i più importanti attori del settore, aziende e istituzioni pubbliche, per la diffusione degli elementi conoscitivi legati a tutti gli aspetti della Cyber Security.
Con oltre 20 anni di esperienza, il magazine affronta le ultime novità di settore con approfondimenti mirati e fornisce al lettore nuovi spunti e linee guida per migliorare ed ampliare le proprie conoscenze rimanendo al passo con la continua innovazione.

The Magazine dedicated to IT Security
ICT Security, the first Italian publication dedicated exclusively to information security and business continuity, aims to involve the most important players in the sector, companies and public institutions, for the spreading of the cognitive elements related to all aspects of Cyber Security.
With 20 years of experience, the magazine tackles the latest news in the sector with targeted in-depth analysis and provides the reader with new ideas and guidelines to improve and expand their knowledge keeping pace with continuous innovation.

https://www.ictsecuritymagazine.com

Name: SZ Plan W
Description: Die offizielle LinkedIn-Seite von PLAN W - Frauen verändern Wirtschaft, dem Frauen-Wirtschaftsmagazin der Süddeutschen Zeitung. http://www.sz.de/plan-w

Name: Anesthesiology News
Description:
Anesthesiology News, now in its 46th year, has been the best-read publication for the specialty for the last 23 years. All 50,105 anesthesiologists and anesthesiology residents in the United States receive a copy every month!

It offers extensive coverage of major scientific meetings affecting the specialty, feature articles on topics relevant to practicing anesthesiologists, in-depth clinical reviews written by thought leaders, practice management articles, medical education, as well as Special Editions, Buyer’s Guides, and a full line of digital media, including the AnesthesiologyNews.com website, mobile site, e-Newsletters, and multimedia content.

Name: journalist
Description:
Der journalist ist das größte und wichtigste Magazin für Journalist*innen in Deutschland. Die Zeitschrift liegt jeden Monat auf dem Schreibtisch von 27.000 Medienmachern – quer durch alle Fachrichtungen und Mediengattungen. Ob Social-Media-Redakteur, TV-Journalistin, Redaktionsvolontär oder Chefredakteurin. Vom Wirtschaftsmagazin bis zur Rundfunk-Anstalt, vom Medien-Start-up bis zum Journalistenbüro. 

Der journalist erscheint zehnmal im Jahr gedruckt. Wie seine Zielgruppe bewegt sich der journalist nicht nur in der Printwelt, sondern hat eine starke Präsenz im Netz und besonders in den sozialen Medien. 

Die inhaltliche Leitfrage ist: Wie machen wir den Journalismus besser?

Impressum: 
https://www.journalist.de/impressum/

Verantwortlich nach § 18 Abs. 2 Medienstaatsvertrag (MStV):
Matthias Daniel

journalist

53115 Bonn

Name: The San Diego Union-Tribune
Description:
The San Diego Union-Tribune, LLC, is San Diego’s most dynamic media company and the region’s most trusted and comprehensive source of local news and information.

The San Diego Union-Tribune serves more people in more places on more platforms than any other media company in San Diego. Every week, the Union-Tribune reaches more than 96% of all San Diego County households by leveraging the combined strength of its integrated media portfolio: the Pulitzer Prize-winning newspaper, the Union-Tribune; the region’s leading website, SanDiegoUnionTribune.com; the weekly entertainment guide, Night + Day; the entertainment and nightlife website, PacificSanDiego.com; Spanish-language product Hoy San Diego and additional home-delivered products.

Through its broad coverage of the community and its multiple media platforms serving all audiences across the region, the Union-Tribune delivers news, information and ideas that improve the quality of life of San Diegans and help make San Diego a better place.

Name: Dagens Perspektiv
Description:
Dagens Perspektiv er en digital dagsavis og et papirmagasin som kommer ut hver måned. Vi skriver om ledelse, arbeidsliv og samfunnsstyring. Vi skriver for samfunnsbevisste ledere og ressurspersoner som ønsker å holde seg oppdatert, vil reflektere og søke nyttig informasjon knyttet til det lederansvaret de har. 

Administrerende direktør og ansvarlig redaktør er Magne Lerø.

Name: La Tribuna de Automoción
Description:
La Tribuna de Automoción, perteneciente al Grupo Automoción Press (Editemo SL), nació el 1 de mayo de 1995 como una publicación económica quincenal impresa especializada en la industria del automóvil. La misión del periódico no es otra que la de informar, con rigor y un enfoque analítico, de los principales hitos que sucedan en el sector del automóvil, tanto español como internacional, atendiendo a toda la cadena de valor, desde los fabricantes de vehículos y componentes hasta los concesionarios, operadores de rent a car y renting, así como todo tipo de empresas de servicio.

En mayo del año 2010, se lanzó la edición web (www.latribunadeautomocion.es) para poder responder a la inmediatez y ampliar la difusión de la publicación, reconocida como referente en España. En este nuevo proyecto, destacan los boletines informativos, de suscripción gratuita, con los que se informa a los lectores de primicias y noticias de relevancia del sector.

Actualmente, se ofrecen tres tipos de suscripciones a La Tribuna de Automoción a través de la página web: una para la edición impresa, otra para la digital (con acceso a números pasados desde cualquier soporte informático o móvil) y una premium, que engloba las dos anteriores.

Name: Correio Braziliense
Description:
Principal jornal de Brasília, o Correio Braziliense foi fundado no mesmo dia em que a capital do país foi inaugurada por Juscelino Kubitschek, em 1960.

O jornal faz parte do grupo Diários Associados. 
Veja nossas notícias também no Twitter: http://twitter.com/correio, 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/correiobraziliense/
Instagram: https://instagram.com/correio.braziliense

Name: Aujourd'hui Le Maroc
Description:
Depuis plus de 20 ans, Aujourd’hui Le Maroc, votre quotidien généraliste indépendant, accompagne toutes les étapes qui ont marqué l’actualité nationale et internationale.
Afin de mieux répondre aux exigences de ses lecteurs, Aujourd’hui Le Maroc a su être en constante évolution et enrichir ses contenus. Ce souci d’évolution se manifeste par l’enrichissement de ses différentes rubriques et la création de spéciaux plus proches des lecteurs.
Au-delà de l’actualité, Aujourd’hui Le Maroc n’hésite pas à analyser dans ses colonnes grâce à ses chroniqueurs les grands débats de société.

Name: LeMagIT
Description: Créé en avril, 2008 LeMagIT.fr est l'un des médias d'informations leaders sur le marché de l'informatique professionnelle. Son audience s'élève à plus de 120 000 visiteurs uniques pour 400 000 pages vues mensuelles en moyenne. Plus de 45 000 abonnés reçoivent chaque jour la newsletter L'Essentiel IT.

Name: Portugal Têxtil
Description:
O portal da indústria têxtil e vestuário portuguesa.

Fundado em 2001, o www.portugaltextil.com é um portal dedicado à moda e pretende transmitir informação como forma de gerar conhecimento, tendo como destinatários todos os agentes que gravitam à volta da Indústria Têxtil e do Vestuário (ITV), contribuindo assim para o seu progresso.

Um projeto de (e aberto a) todos, que se desenvolve em rede e assenta em parcerias e na capacidade de gerar novas ideias.

Name: Béton[s] le Magazine
Description:
Béton[s] est la première marque presse multicanale dédiée aux professionnels de la construction en béton. Dispositif d’information connu et reconnu sur son secteur, le titre propose des contenus à forte valeur ajoutée : indicateurs économiques, techniques constructives, reportages chantiers, innovations matériaux et matériels, cahiers pratiques, développement durable... 
Avec son site internet www.acpresse.fr et 21 newsletters Béton[s] le Magazine constitue un outil de veille incontournable dans la compréhension des grands enjeux tels que le bas carbone, la Rep, la RE 2020…

Name: Chicago Sun-Times
Description:
What does it mean to be the hardest working paper in America? The Chicago Sun Times is a distinctly Chicago company, with a reputation for having the backs of working women and men.  With our team of outstanding journalists, we are determined to listen to, and engage with, our community to bring it news coverage that matters.  Using new, multi-platform production and delivery capabilities, we will meet our news consumers where they are, and provide our advertising partners with real value.  
 
Subscribe today: https://chicago.suntimes.com/subscribe/ 
 
Job information: http://chicago.suntimes.com/jobs-at-the-chicago-sun-times/

Like us on Facebook:
https://www.facebook.com/thechicagosuntimes/

Name: The Patent Lawyer Magazine
Description:
The Patent Lawyer Magazine is one of the core platforms of CTC Legal Media, connecting the most renowned and established IP Law Firms and professionals with the current developments in world economics, trends and inventions.

The publication is subscribed to and read by the Top 100 Patent and Trademark owners consisting of the world’s largest corporations. The one and only publication/marketing platform in the IP Law sector to provide free access to the global audiences. Proud to be the only platform to vertically focus 100 percent on Patent Law within the global IP Market in every industry and the only publication/media platform in the IP Law sector to provide free access to the global audiences.

The magazine published 5 times per year and a total of 10 issues over the course of the year combined. This is available in both hard copies as well as in digital format.  Measuring ROI is the most influential and important element of our business structure and we understand it will not only contribute to the growth of our clients but to the growth our organization too.

Name: Magazine HORS SITE
Description: Société de presse, plateforme de mise en relation sur les marchés B2B, l’emploi et les salons s'adressant aux professionnels de la construction Hors-Site.

Name: Daily Nautica
Description:
Daily Nautica è l’e-magazine internazionale specializzato sul turismo nautico. Il quotidiano online di diportismo punto di riferimento del settore, con la più vasta varietà di contenuti al mondo, grazie a una redazione di giornalisti e professionisti che segue come media partner tutti gli eventi nautici più importanti. 

Solo contenuti originali, per fare la differenza.
Notizie, interviste, reportage, decine di rubriche, guide e curiosità, approfondimenti su barche e superyacht, regate, pesca e subacquea, con articoli, foto, video, gossip, webcam in live streaming e un podcast proprietario. Daily Nautica è una testata vera con un aggiornamento continuo e capillare. La rivista più completa per i lettori appassionati di mare. 

Il canale pubblicitario ideale per le aziende del settore. Daily Nautica rappresenta un potente strumento pubblicitario per tutte le realtà della nautica che credono nel web. Massima visibilità e servizi evoluti di marketing e comunicazione dedicati a tutti gli inserzionisti. 

La nostra storia: da realtà locale a brand globale. 
Daily Nautica nasce nel 2022 come rebranding di Liguria Nautica: e-magazine con alle spalle un’esperienza di oltre 15 anni nel settore. Una evoluzione coerente con una realtà che nel tempo ha saputo conquistare diportisti da tutta Italia e dal mondo grazie alla qualità dei servizi e alla copertura di ogni evento nautico: da Genova a Shanghai.

Name: Aftonbladet
Description:
The biggest newspaper in Sweden, counting reach in all devices and print.
About 250 employees within editorial and IT-developers. 

Aftonbladet is a part of the Norwegian group Schibsted ASA, with operations worldwide, and is located in central Stockholm together with other companies in Schibsted Sweden.

Name: Daily Trust Newspaper
Description:
MEDIA TRUST LIMITED is a media company engaged in Consultancy, Printing and Publishing. The company believes in efficient, honest and qualitative service to the customer. 

Using the latest technology and employing self-motivated workers, the company’s objective is to grow steadily into a world class, integrated communication company.

The company believes that its workers are the most valuable and dependable asset, to meet the challenges of its objectives. 

While the company will strive to create a congenial and harmonious working environment, offer equal opportunity for advancement and reward workers as appropriate, it will also demand dedication to service and loyalty from employees.

Name: Svenska Dagbladet
Description:
Svenska Dagbladet (SvD), founded in 1884, is a national subscription newspaper with head offices in Stockholm.

In 2000 SvD made the transition from broadsheet to tabloid format. SvD combines the classic credibility of a quality newspaper with a contemporary look and presentation. The newspaper was voted the Newspaper of the Year in Sweden in 2005 and 2010. Its circulation figures have risen dramatically in recent years.

SvD is a daily publication which focuses on in-depth coverage in its weekend editions in the form of supplements and magazines.

Name: Travolution France
Description:
Travelonmove.com keeps travel professionals up to date on the newest technologies for their industry. Tom operates a strategic monitoring on innovation, trends and added value services for the whole profession: Producers, distributors, airline companies…

Novices and experts will find on our website exclusive information, original ideas, inspiration and food for thoughts. TOM favorite topics? Mobility, Web marketing, Cloud Computing, Big Data, Web services, start-up and more.

Name: TOM.travel
Description:
Travelonmove.com keeps travel professionals up to date on the newest technologies for their industry. Tom operates a strategic monitoring on innovation, trends and added value services for the whole profession: Producers, distributors, airline companies…

Novices and experts will find on our website exclusive information, original ideas, inspiration and food for thoughts. TOM favorite topics? Mobility, Web marketing, Cloud Computing, Big Data, Web services, start-up and more.

Name: Franchise Magazine
Description:
Créé en 1982, Franchise Magazine est devenu la référence incontournable du monde de la franchise et des réseaux et le seul média reconnu à la fois dans le monde de la presse écrite et sur Internet.

Franchise Magazine, c’est à la fois un annuaire de la franchise, mis à jour en permanence, les actualités des enseignes et des réseaux, des chiffres et des analyses, mis à jour en permanence par la rédaction.

Franchise Magazine, c’est aussi un outil performant pour trouver des candidats et les futurs entrepreneurs dans tous les domaines d’activité : de la franchise de beauté, santé, forme à l’automobile ou à la moto, du commerce de proximité à l’immobilier, des enseignes de meuble et décoration ou de l’habillement, des marques de services aux particuliers et aux entreprises en passant par la restauration, rapide ou non, tous les métiers sont passés régulièrement en revue.

Name: Eco121
Description: Eco121, le mensuel des décideurs des Hauts-de-France.

Name: La Svolta
Description:
Ambiente, Diritti, Futuro

La Svolta è uno strumento d’informazione per condividere ed interpretare i cambiamenti in corso. Racconta l’attualità e dedica particolare attenzione alla sostenibilità e alle trasformazioni sociali ed economiche. 

Dà voce a tutti, soprattutto ai giovani, che, da una parte, pongono domande strategiche sul futuro, e, dall’altra, sono impegnati in progetti innovativi. 

La direttrice responsabile è Cristina Sivieri Tagliabue, giornalista attenta ai linguaggi multimediali, da anni si occupa di innovazione sociale e culturale.

L’editore è la Società Benefit La Svolta Srl, creata da Sostenya Group Srl.
