Dispõe também de uma área reservada com conteúdos exclusivos para profissionais de saúde. Assim, poderão ter acesso a eventos, formações, webinars e notícias reservadas.

Name: Social CSE
Description:
Social CSE est le magazine d’information économique, sociale, juridique et culturelle destiné aux élus de CSE et aux salariés. 

 Lancé en mai 2003, bimestriel, Social CSE défend dans ses pages le droit des salariés et répond aux problématiques rencontrées par les représentants du personnel pour favoriser le dialogue social. 
Social CSE traite de l’actualité juridique et décrypte tous les nouveaux décrets analysés par nos journalistes et nos partenaires, cabinets d’avocats, d’expertises comptables, de formation rédigés par des juristes spécialistes en droit social.

Retrouvez tous les deux mois, 100 pages d’actualités, de témoignages et d’interviews qui aideront les représentants du personnel à trouver les réponses à leurs problématiques rencontrées avec les directions d’entreprise.

 Partages d’expériences, prises de paroles,  initiatives du mois, gros plans, rubrique juridique, paroles d’experts pour mieux vous informer.

 Suivez nos thématiques : 
Conditions de travail, négociations, formations des élus, élections, réforme des retraites, dialogue social, nouveaux décrets, activités sociales et culturelles. 

Social CSE édite en parallèle des numéros Hors-série : « Bien être au travail », « Vacances », « Congés payés », « Création des Comités d’entreprise», « Passage du CE en CSE » et le guide pratique « L’INTEGRALE DU CSE » devenu l’outil de référence pour aider les élus à gérer leurs missions au quotidien.

 Distribution gratuite aux visiteurs des salons CGR Cinéma et Elucéo dédiés aux Élus de CSE.

Name: Turizm Günlüğü

Bu online platform, acenteler, havayolları, oteller ve sektörle ilgili en güncel röportajlar, haberler, makaleler, yorumlar ve araştırmalarla zenginleştiriyor. E-Gazete olarak, turizm sektörüne yenilikçi bir bakış açısı sunmayı hedefleyen Turizm Günlüğü, sadece sektör profesyonellerine değil, aynı zamanda turizm ve onun çeşitli alt bileşenlerine ilgi duyan geniş bir okuyucu kitlesine hitap ediyor.

Sosyal medya üzerinden de aktif olan Turizm Günlüğü, Instagram, Twitter ve Facebook'ta sektörle ilgili en son gelişmeleri, ilginç bilgileri ve özel içerikleri takipçileriyle paylaşıyor. Name: Η ΝΑΥΤΕΜΠΟΡΙΚΗ | NAFTEMPORIKI
Description:
Naftemporiki media group is the publisher of Greece’s leading daily financial newspaper. It also operates a digital network that is comprised of naftemporiki.gr one of Greece’s leading news portals and clickatlife.gr city guide. Naftemporiki is a member of European Business Press Association and is a listed company in the Athens Stock Exchange. Naftemporiki launched their online activities in 1996, with one of the most popular Greek news portals Naftemporiki.gr, winning the Grand Ermis and Ermis Gold in the category Best Media Site. 
Emerged at the forefront of economic content sites and also on top of Greek websites - according to traffic statistics. 
•	Evolved into a comprehensive news site with a very strong financial section. 
•	It is the only Greek news website that offers content exclusively available to subscribers of the print issue. 
•	It exclusively provides the newspaper subscribers the "Premium Services", a variety of electronic services designed to give them access to important specialized information as well as the daily 8-page newsletter "Newsday". 
Naftemporiki.gr is a news portal with comprehensive coverage across all news categories, rich media and specialized subjects such as Science & Technology, Environment and Health. Naftemporiki.gr has a powerful Finance section, “Economy & Markets”, with the richest content in Market Data, featuring the fullest real time financial data base among Greek sites in collaboration with international organizations specializing in financial information bases. Naftemporiki also operates http://www.clickatlife.gr, a portal that serves as a city guide. Clickatlife.gr has content related to the Cinema, the Theater, Restaurants, Music, Festivals, Arts. Another corporate activity of Naftemporiki is that of specialized business seminars as well as the planning and organizing of events.

Description: Chicago Tribune Media Group is a diversified media and marketing solutions company that reaches 4.9 million people each month across all platforms. CTMG’s robust portfolio of media solutions includes the Pulitzer Prize-winning Chicago Tribune, and a collection of niche and digital offerings. As the region’s leading voice, CTMG also extends into the suburbs of Chicago through popular titles including The Beacon-News, The Courier-News, Lake County News-Sun, Naperville Sun, Post-Tribune in Northwest Indiana, Daily Southtown, and 32 Pioneer Press weekly newspapers.

The Sacramento Business Journal is the leading source of local business news, data and networking for the Sacramento, California, region in El Dorado, Placer, Sacramento and Yolo counties. 

Follow us on social media and sign up for the Weekly Edition, Afternoon and Morning Editions, and breaking news alerts for all the latest news, business intelligence, awards and events you need to succeed in business.

Description:
Grupo REFORMA is the most prestigious and trustworthy multi-platform information institution in Mexico. It publishes the leading dailies in Mexico City (Reforma), Monterrey (El Norte) and Guadalajara (Mural).

In addition to these leading dailies, Grupo Reforma also prints 6 Metro newspapers, a morning tabloid publication geared towards a more popular audience, as well as El Sol, an popular afternoon paper in Monterrey (the oldest of the Group, from 1922). All these publications total 1.4 million daily copies.

Grupo REFORMA owns the most-visited digital content websites: reforma.com, elnorte.com, and mural.com. Its information delivery platforms include 80 social network accounts with over 6 million followers.

A team of 700 reporters, photographers, and videographers in Mexico’s three major cities, together with correspondents all over the country, keep a finger on Mexico’s daily pulse. In tandem, contributors from the world’s capitals offer insights into the global scenario.

Grupo Reforma’s investigative reporting has been key in the modern transformation of Mexico. It was instrumental in the fights to get clean democratic elections, for citizen’s rights to freely access public information, in the application of student and teacher’s evaluations and the implementation of an open oral judicial system in the country.

The Group has alliances with major global media companies, like the Wall Street Journal and the New York Times. Grupo Reforma’s content is syndicated to over 100 media companies in Mexico and the US through Agencia Reforma.

The latest addition to Grupo Reforma’s line up is Lince Media, its in-house video production company that produces high quality videojournalism while also serving the advertising and corporate markets.

Name: Baton Rouge Business Report
Description:
Baton Rouge Business Report is the flagship Louisiana Business Inc., a national-award-winning multimedia publishing company that also produces [225] Magazine, InRegister, 10/12 Industry Report, as well as custom marketing for clients through Studio E. LBI was established in 1982.

We’re always looking for the fearless and the creative to join our team in a variety of positions, including editing, writing, photography, sales, marketing, digital technology and business management.

We offer a unique opportunity to be part of a national award-winning institution, a strong regional brand, and an organization with a rich history of excellence and community service. Career opportunities with us mean working hard to achieve our mission in a collaborative and inclusive culture—but also having fun together. We have a talented team with diverse people, ideas, interests, and skills; we favor an entrepreneurial spirit; and we reward excellence and achievement.

Applications are accepted for all positions at any time, but specific openings will be listed on LinkedIn and journalismjobs.com. We offer opportunities for freelance writers and photographers as well, and provide a summer internship program. Inquiries regarding any positions at any of our publications can be sent to LBI’s editorial director, Penny Font, at penny@businessreport.com.

LBI is proud to offer employees a rich selection of benefits, including health, vision and dental insurance; short- and long-term disability insurance; a 401(k) plan matched with company contributions; flexible spending accounts; and profit sharing, to name a few.

LBI is an equal opportunity/affirmative action employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to gender, sexual orientation, race, color, religion, national origin, disability, protected veteran status, age, or any other characteristic protected by law.

Description:
Dainik Bhaskar (Hindi: दैनिक भास्कर) is an Indian Hindi-language daily newspaper that is now the largest circulated daily newspaper of India.  It is owned by Dainik Bhaskar Group (D B Corp Ltd.), the largest Print Media Company of India. Started in Bhopal in 1958, it expanded in 1983 with the launch of Dainik Bhaskar's Indore edition. Today, Dainik Bhaskar is present in 12 states with 61 editions in 3 major languages prevalent in India: Hindi,  Gujarati and Marathi.

Dainik Bhaskar was declared the world's 3rd largest circulated daily newspaper by WAN IFRA in 2019

Description:
Deccan Herald is Karnataka’s guide to the times we live in, and is more often than not the authentic voice of the community. While Karnataka and Bengaluru hold a special place in the heart of the newspaper, the Herald’s coverage of national and world happenings is equally comprehensive. The opinion pages present a variety of views on national, state and international issues and the editorials are known for their well-informed commentary. Deccan Herald has set the benchmark for high quality journalism in Bengaluru and Karnataka.

Name: HELLENIC SHIPPING NEWS Worldwide
Description:
HELLENICSHIPPINGNEWS Worldwide, Online Daily Newspaper on Hellenic and International Shipping
Leaders in global shipping news for over 10 years
Hellenic Shipping News Worldwide (www.hellenicshippingnews.com) was founded in 2006, having as its goal to provide direct access to news and information, regarding all aspects affecting the world’s maritime community. Hellenic Shipping News Worldwide offers news on shipping and maritime trade, as well as shipbuilding, ports, marine insurance, shipping law, freights and commodities, energy-oil and of course stock markets and the global economy. As a result of this, we have managed to establish ourselves as one of the leading news providers around the world, essentially a “one-stop-shop” for everybody interested in shipping and all aspects affecting its course.

Fort de son expérience presse et de sa connaissance du secteur de l’action sociale, Reed Business Information a lancé le mensuel Direction[s] en octobre 2003, magazine dédié aux directeurs et cadres du secteur sanitaire, social et médico-social.

Name: Confidencial Digital
Description:
Confidencial Digital (ECD) es un diario online creado en 2001 por José Apezarena, editor, y dirigido por Javier Fumero. Con el lema "La web de las personas informadas que desean estar más informadas", está especializado en noticias exclusivas, de fuentes propias, sobre política, ejército, economía, medios de comunicación...

Además, edita cuatro portales especializados, integrados en ECD: Monarquía Confidencial, Confidencial Autonómico, Confidencial Judicial y Religión Confidencial.

En 2014 ha puesto en marcha una nueva sección, "La Buena Vida", que apuesta por el periodismo de tendencias: Estilos, Negocio, Destinos, Cuídate... Asimismo, ha incrementado su presencia en redes sociales, a las que da un mayor protagonismo, y ha lanzado una aplicación móvil para que los usuarios tengan acceso desde sus smartphones.

En 2015 ECD inició nuevos servicios y secciones, también en la búsqueda de una mayor implicación de los lectores en sus contenidos.

A lo largo del año 2020, debido a la difícil situación mundial, en ECD hemos optado por reinventarnos y mantener a nuestros lectores más informados que nunca, introduciendo secciones nuevas como "Opinan los socios de ECD" o incluyendo Podcast en noticias relevantes.

Name: Phnom Penh Post
Description:
A good newspaper, I suppose, is a Nation talking to itself. Arthur Miller, 1961.
A history that stretches back more than 15 years has made the Phnom Penh Post the ‘Newspaper of Record’.

In fact the Phnom Penh Post is the oldest existing independent newspaper in any language in Cambodia.

First published in July 1992, the Post is read by thousands of foreigners and Cambodians throughout the country and by subscribers in 35 countries around the globe.

For more than 15 years the Phnom Penh Post has been the paper of record on Cambodian current events – read by decision makers and consumers who have helped rebuild the nation during the past decades.

No other newspaper can lay claim to such an extensive record. The Phnom Penh Post presents its readers with information and analysis that is convincing, useful and unique.

The Phnom Penh Post readers are also the most highly educated in the country and demand access to the highest quality information possible.

Our team of editors and journalists know that simply reporting the facts is not enough: they must analyze them and explain to readers how these facts will shape and affect their lives.
Location: #41, St 228, Phum 4, Sangkat Boeng Rang, Khan Doun Penh, Phnom Penh

Description:
O Link To Leaders  é um projeto editorial online que liga investidores a start-ups e empresas com projetos potencialmente interessantes.

A sua missão é estabelecer o link que faltava entre o conhecimento, a experiência e o networking dos investidores e as ideias e necessidades das start-ups, empresas e líderes.

Pretende-se fazer chegar a ideia certa ao investidor certo e destacar os casos de sucesso, e de insucesso, criando mecanismos de motivação ao empreendedorismo. 

E porque um dos objetivos do Link To Leaders é potenciar a aprendizagem, a entreajuda, a troca de experiências, as parcerias e o crescimento do negócio, este projeto reúne ainda grandes vozes nacionais e internacionais do empreendedorismo e investimento nas mais variadas áreas, que partilham diariamente os seus pontos de vistas, inquietações, sucessos e falhanços.

O Link To Leaders é media-partner oficial da EBAN - European Business Angel Network, em Portugal.

Established just one year after the day of the Pearl Harbor attack, JMD has become the de facto standard for maritime news in Japan.
As a trusted and traditional newspaper, JMD leverages its collaborations with partners such as TradeWinds, the leading global maritime newspaper, and the Singapore Exchange(SGX), the world's premier shipping exchange, to provide readers with high-quality information. 

These strategic alliances empower JMD to offer unique and in-depth insights into Japan's shipping trends and markets, keeping our readers well-informed and ahead of the curve.

Continuously evolving, JMD is not just a follower of trends but a leader in shaping the future of maritime media, always striving to provide the most relevant and up-to-date information.

Name: L'Est Républicain
Description:
L'Est Républicain est un quotidien régional, fondé le 5 mai 1889 à Nancy. Il est diffusé en Lorraine et en Franche-Comté à travers dix éditions locales. Depuis sa création, le journal des Lorrains et des Franc-Comtois garde les mêmes valeurs : la liberté d’expression, la fiabilité de l’information, la proximité avec ses lecteurs et la défense d’un territoire et de ses habitants.
Depuis 2006, L’Est Républicain appartient au groupe de presse EBRA créé par la banque Crédit Mutuel. EBRA est le groupe de presse le plus important de France avec 23 départements et plus de 3,5 millions de lecteurs.

Name: Tampa Bay Times
Description:
The Tampa Bay Times is the leading source for news and information in the southeastern United States.  The Times is Florida's largest and best newspaper, one of the Top 10 newspapers in the country and the winner of 14 Pulitzer Prizes and numerous national awards.

Our focus is local journalism. We tell the stories that matter in the Tampa Bay area. Readers may view our work in print or online at tampabay.com. 

The Times is owned by Times Publishing Company. With its broad portfolio of newspapers, magazines, websites and consumer events, Times Publishing reaches more than 1 million people a week in the Tampa Bay region.

To learn more about the Times, visit company.tampabay.com

Name: San Francisco Chronicle
Description:
This account represents the San Francisco Chronicle newsroom and its supporting departments/group recruitment efforts.

We are committed to maintaining a safe and healthy work environment by taking every reasonable precaution. From remote work to increased comprehensive benefits, we are committed to stopping the spread of Covid-19 and to protect our workforce and partners.

Our mission is to tell the story of San Francisco. We will be honest, fearless and startlingly original. We will inform, provoke and energize the people who change the world. 

The San Francisco Chronicle is the largest newspaper in Northern California and the second largest on the West Coast. The Chronicle and SFChronicle.com are world-class journalism, San Francisco style. With name-brand voices and a keen editorial eye, The Chronicle is an authority that still surprises. Opinionated yet open-minded. It’s not afraid of being controversial, or of doing things that haven’t been done before. It’s bolder, brighter, fearless. It’s news that is delivered to the discerning reader through all platforms, including print, e-Edition, digital and social.

Our Group Portfolio Also Includes:

SFGATE, which publishes a moment-by-moment, 360-degree view of San Francisco that is wildly reflective of right now for the most mobile audience in the country. Visit https://www.linkedin.com/company/sfgate.

Hearst Bay Area, Northern California’s largest news media and services group, connects businesses large and small with their target audience, through a comprehensive suite of multi-touch solutions unmatched by local competitors. Visit www.linkedin.com/company/hearst-bay-area.

46Mile a regional full-service integrated marketing and advertising agency dedicated to bringing a fresh new perspective to the way you engage with your customers. Visit www.linkedin.com/company/46mile.

StoryStudio is our content marketing studio that empowers brands to tell their stories. Visit www.linkedin.com/company/hearst-storystudio.

Name: National Post
Description:
Built on the strength and tradition of The Financial Post, National Post continues to provide readers with comprehensive reporting from across the country and around the world, all with a distinctly Canadian voice.

Each section goes in-depth to engage readers. From the latest on the cultural and social scene in Arts & Life, more than just the scores with entertaining Sports coverage, to the most well-respected business reporting in Canada within the pages of Financial Post and Financial Post Business magazine.

The Financial Post delivers all the news and analysis you need to operate in today's competitive business environment. The Post's team of reporters cut through the noise and deliver the facts you need to make the right decisions - fast. If you're looking for incisive business commentary, you'll find it on our pages. The Financial Post boasts Canada's most respected business voices including Terence Corcoran, Diane Francis, Barry Critchley and Theresa Tedesco.

Extending its rich tradition of design leadership to the web, nationalpost.com and financialpost.com deliver a an immediate, in-depth, and customizable news experience, with all the content and functionality today's online readers demand.

National Post is a subsidiary of Postmedia Network Inc.

Name: LA LETTRE
Description:
La Lettre est le quotidien de référence sur les enjeux de pouvoir dans la politique, les entreprises et les médias en France. Reconnue pour sa capacité d'investigation, l’équipe de journalistes de La Lettre informe tous les matins ses lecteurs sur les décisions stratégiques à venir.

------------------------------
Indigo Publications
Chez Indigo Publications, nous croyons au journalisme d’investigation indépendant et à son fort impact stratégique depuis 1981.
Nos publications couvrent des domaines dans lesquels l’information est généralement difficile d’accès. Notre ambition est de pénétrer au cœur des pouvoirs, qu’ils soient économiques ou politiques. Ces informations d’intérêt stratégique, à destination de lecteurs exigeants, sont exclusives, rigoureuses et sans parti pris.
Nous éditons également en français et en anglais trois publications qui font autorité dans leur secteur, Intelligence Online, Africa Intelligence et Glitz.

Name: Atlanta Journal-Constitution
Description:
The Atlanta Journal-Constitution's mission is to be the most essential and engaging source of news and information for the people of Atlanta, of Georgia and the South. To achieve that mission, we are transforming ourselves from a storied daily newspaper into a modern media company. The AJC believes that when you cover the South, you uncover the nation. It’s a belief that’s produced award-winning journalism, elevated our community and captured the substance and soul of our hometown. 
 
If you're ready to make headlines with your talent and drive, we want you on our team. Apply today and be a part of the next chapter in the AJC’s digital transformation. To learn more, visit cox.career/ajc

If you need assistance with a subscription visit our Help Center (ajc.com/help), email Customer Care at customercare@ajc.com or call 404-522-4141.

To submit a news tip, and additional newsroom FAQs, visit our Contact Us (ajc.com/contacts) page.

Name: San Antonio Express-News
Description:
The San Antonio Express-News has been the voice of South Texas since 1865 and provides news and information to a community of more than one million. San Antonio is the largest major U.S. city with a Hispanic percentage majority and is home to three major military bases.

San Antonio Express-News award-winning journalists deliver the news that matters most to San Antonio, from mom and pop businesses to the global economy, from military homecomings to foreign affairs and from neighborhood struggles to international disasters. The paper has dedicated news bureaus in Austin (together with the Houston Chronicle), McAllen and Washington, D.C.

San Antonio’s most enduring source of news and information has expanded to include specialized publications and magazines and the city’s No. 1 website, mySanAntonio.com. The Express-News print products and mySanAntonio.com reach 1,130,900 adults in the San Antonio DMA each week. Each month, mySanAntonio.com averages nearly 29 million page views and 2.7 million unique visitors. (Source: Scarborough, 2013 R1)

San Antonio Express-News’ premium website, ExpressNews.com, is available only to subscribers and provides investigative and enterprise reports, in-depth local news and insider analyses.

Name: The Business Journal | Youngstown Publishing Co.
Description:
About The Business Journal
Since its founding in 1984, The Business Journal has been a trusted source of business news, promoting economic growth and development in the Youngstown region. What started as a publication focused on local industries has evolved into a key voice for the entire Mahoning Valley, covering a five-county area that includes Mahoning, Trumbull, and Columbiana counties in Ohio, as well as Mercer and Lawrence counties in Pennsylvania.
With a robust digital presence through The Daily Business Journal Online, we now reach even more business leaders, providing timely news, insights, and analysis that help inform decision-makers across all sectors. Our readers include executives, business owners, professionals, and civic leaders, all of whom rely on us for high-quality reporting on industry trends, economic development, company profiles, and success stories.
The Business Journal is widely respected for its journalistic integrity, comprehensive coverage, and forward-thinking perspective on the region's business opportunities. Our readership, which includes top executives and high-earning professionals, plays a crucial role in shaping the local economy and making important spending decisions within their companies.

For inquiries or to learn how we can help your business communicate effectively with our audience, please contact:
Megan Wine, Business Development Executive: 330-503-3147 | mwine@business-journal.com
Jeff Rhodes, Account Executive: 330-333-7769 | jrhodes@business-journal.com

Name: Bonnier News
Description:
Som Nordens största medieföretag, med verksamhet i 13 länder, hjälper vi medborgare och organisationer att fungera i ett demokratiskt samhälle. Våra journalister rapporterar, granskar och berättar om vår tids frågor. Vi inspirerar och skapar affärer genom möten, produkter och tjänster. Alla vi som jobbar här, från journalisten i norr till techutvecklaren i söder, bidrar med olika perspektiv för att vi ska kunna utföra vårt uppdrag och föra det fria ordet framåt. Tillsammans.

Med varumärken som Dagens Nyheter, Expressen och Dagens industri når vi miljoner läsare och användare varje dag. Genom Bonnier News Locals många titlar har vi även ett stort lokalt engagemang över hela landet - från Sydsvenskan i Skåne till Östersunds-Posten i Jämtland. Förutom detta ger vi också ut branschspecifika tidningar såsom Dagens Media, Resumé, Dagens medicin och Fastighetsnytt, och även en rad livsstilsmagasin som Damernas Värld, Sköna Hem, Teknikens Värld och Allt om Mat.

Vi har också en betydande logistik och distributionsverksamhet som vi samlar inom ramen för Bonway. Under 2024 kommer vi att nå närmare en tredjedel av alla hushåll i Sverige.

Genom att ständigt driva den digitala utvecklingen framåt når vi hela tiden längre – som medarbetare hos oss kan du påverka riktningen. Vi strävar efter att hitta talangfulla medarbetare som vidgar våra perspektiv och hjälper oss att bidra till ett mer inkluderande samhälle.

Name: Lettre M²
Description:
La Lettre M² vise à offrir le maximum d’informations, de data, d’analyses et de formations aux acteurs de l’immobilier professionnel (investisseurs institutionnels et privés, promoteurs, conseils, collectivités territoriales,…).
Média, éditeur de data et organisme de formation, la Lettre M² a pour ambition d’aider à la prise de décision dans le but de relever les défis actuels et futurs. Zoom sur ses cinq missions principales : 
1. Recenser toutes les transactions réalisées sur le marché quelle que soit : 
- la classe d’actifs immobiliers (bureaux, commerces, locaux d’activités, plateformes logistiques, hôtels, résidences gérées, data centers, life sciences, résidentiel en bloc, etc),
- le volume des valeurs locatives et vénales, 
- la surface des immeubles, 
- le type de transactions (investissements, locations et opérations),
- la localisation.  
2. Transmettre les informations facilement et rapidement à travers l’utilisation de bases de données.  
3. Analyser le marché à travers des études et les regards de professionnels hautement qualifiés. 
4. Enrichir le savoir et le savoir-faire à travers un catalogue complet de formations ainsi que par des éclairages techniques et pratiques. 
5. Alerter sur les enjeux futurs afin de les appréhender à temps et, ainsi, ne pas les subir.

Name: Gazete Oksijen
Description:
Türkiye’nin tek haftalık gazetesi Oksijen, hem basılı hem de dijital mecrada okurlarını kaliteli içerikle buluşturuyor. Ekonomi, politika, sağlık, bilim, teknoloji, tarım, sürdürülebilirlik gibi birçok alanda dünyaca tanınmış isimlerin görüş ve analizlerine yer veriyoruz. 

Gazete Oksijen’in seçkin yazar kadrosu, Türkiye'deki trendleri belirleyerek her hafta okurlarıyla buluşuyor. Zengin içerikli O2 gazetesiyle ise daha fazla kültür-sanat, müzik, sinema, dijital platformlar, kitap, seyahat ve şehir hayatı konularında kapsamlı içerikler sunuyoruz. 

Gazete Oksijen aynı zamanda dünyanın en prestijli yayınlarından Financial Times, The New York Times, The Athletic ve The Economist'in haber ve analizlerini Türk okurlarla buluşturan tek mecra. Güçlü ve güvenilir içeriklerimizle ilk günden itibaren büyümeye devam ediyor, her hafta okurlarımıza bilgiyle dolu bir gazete sunmaktan gurur duyuyoruz.

Oksijen gazetesi sunduğu dijital aboneliğinin yanı sıra gündemi takip eden gazeteoksijen.com websitesi ve tüm sosyal medya kanalları ile okurlarına anlık ve güncelin nabzını tutan analizler sunuyor.
-
Turkey’s only weekly newspaper, Oksijen, brings readers quality content across both print and digital platforms. Covering topics such as economics, politics, health, science, technology, agriculture, and sustainability, we feature insights and analyses from globally recognized experts.

With a distinguished team of writers setting trends in Turkey, Oksijen connects with readers each week. O2, offers even more in-depth content on culture, music, cinema, digital platforms, books, travel, and urban life.

Oksijen is also the only platform in Turkey that shares news and analyses from some of the world’s most prestigious publications, including The Financial Times, The New York Times, The Athletic, and The Economist.

Harian Kompas juga menerbitkan buku-buku berkualitas lewat Penerbit Buku Kompas. Kompas juga ingin menjadi ruang belajar bagi masyarakat dengan hadir melalui Kompas Institute.

Selain dalam bentuk cetak dan epaper, kini harian Kompas hadir dalam produk digital premium Kompas.id yang dapat diakses melalui situs web serta aplikasi.

Temukan perjalanan karier Anda di harian Kompas. Kunjungi situs web karier.kompas.id.

Name: DER STANDARD
Description:
DER STANDARD

ist das führende österreichische Medienhaus für Qualitätsjournalismus und gesellschaftlichen Diskurs. Seit 1988 erscheint DER STANDARD – gegründet von Oscar Bronner - als Tageszeitung mit Anspruch auf Qualitätsjournalismus und dem Ziel Leserinnen und Lesern auf Augenhöhe zu begegnen.

1995 ging derStandard.at als erste deutschsprachige Tageszeitung online, 1999 erschien das erste Posting und bald darauf wurden Community-Richtlinien definiert, die zu einem offenen, rücksichtsvollen Diskurs im Forum beitragen. Mit der Haltung „Jeder User hat das Recht auf freie Meinungsäußerung“ ist derStandard.at nun führende Postingplattform im Nachrichtenumfeld.

Die Tageszeitung DER STANDARD sowie das Onlinemedium derStandard.at werden von der STANDARD Verlagsgesellschaft m.b.H, 100%-Tochter der STANDARD Medien AG, herausgegeben.

Name: Mail & Guardian
Description:
The Mail & Guardian is not an alternative to your media mix, it is an essential! Hailed as the most informed and daring chronicler of the dying years of apartheid, the M&G (formerly The Weekly Mail) became South Africa’s premier source of news and perspective.

This ethos of providing an objective, in-depth investigation into the stories behind the stories has never wavered and, in turn, has transformed the Mail & Guardian into an essential read for those who want to be in the know. The Mail & Guardian is a unique publishing adventure, leading the market in investigations, politics, business, health, education, science and the arts.

Home to South Africa’s ﬁnest journalists, with the commitment to providing quality content by pursuing the stories that shape a country, the Mail & Guardian has reaped a rich harvest of awards and international accolades. Our journalism remains refreshing and challenging with an aim to create debate and celebrate diversity.

Name: O Globo
Description:
O Jornal O Globo faz parte da vida dos moradores do Rio de Janeiro desde 1925. O Globo apóia projetos culturais e educacionais, além de ter um time de colunistas que reforçam a pluralidade e contribuem para que o leitor forme sua própria opinião, pois tem acesso ao que há de melhor em conteúdo. É um dos jornais de maior prestígio do país, se posicionando entre os três jornais de maior circulação.

Em 2009, O Globo se reafirmou como um veículo multiplataforma dando seqüência ao movimento lançado em setembro de 2008 com a assinatura "O Globo. Muito além do papel de um jornal", que posiciona a marca como sinônimo de informação confiável, independentemente do meio onde é veiculada.

O Globo foi o primeiro no país e em toda a América Latina a disponibilizar seu conteúdo impresso no Kindle, o leitor para livros digitais produzido pela Amazon. O acesso ao Globo via Kindle confirma o posicionamento da marca, de se manter em múltiplas plataformas, e a oferta de mobilidade, interatividade e informação aos leitores. Desta forma, a novidade reforçou a postura inovadora do jornal, que vem se mantendo pioneiro no lançamento de publicações em dispositivos digitais. Com a mesma credibilidade e público alvo qualificado do jornal O Globo, merece destaque também o desempenho do site do Globo . Além de apresentar a versão digital do jornal O Globo, o site oferece aos seus leitores informação em tempo real dos fatos mais importantes do dia, no Brasil e no mundo.
Location: Rio de Janeiro, Rio de Janeiro

Name: Clarín
Description: Clarín es una compañía de medios con más de 70 años de experiencia, líder en prensa gráfica y digital de Argentina. A través de la calidad periodística de sus colaboradores y sus más de 25 productos editoriales, brinda servicios informativos que reflejan y analizan los principales intereses y preocupaciones de la sociedad. Asimismo, gracias a la incorporación de las últimas tecnologías y al profundo conocimiento de su audiencia, Clarín logra conectar una amplia variedad de contenidos de valor con las personas correctas, en el momento indicado y en el formato adecuado.

Qui sommes-nous ?

  Le site d’information 100% digital leader dans toute la région avec une communauté de 600 000 lecteurs et 450 000 abonnés sur les réseaux sociaux

  Un média d’information quotidien, indépendant et gratuit 

 Une ligne éditoriale ambitieuse et résolument innovante, spécialisée dans l’information de solutions et le journalisme d’impact

Name: Le Temps
Description:
First published on 18 March 1998, it is the result of the merger of the newspapers Journal de Genève, Gazette de Lausanne and Le Nouveau Quotidien. As of 2010, it had 130 correspondents, including in Bern, Fribourg, Geneva, Lausanne, Neuchâtel, Sion and Zurich.

Published Monday through Saturday, the newspaper has several supplements (Friday: "Carrières" job and management; Saturday: "Samedi culturel" and special features for the week-end; monthly "Sortir" cultural diary), thematic special editions, a website and digital applications. (Wikipedia)

Name: El País Uruguay
Description:
Somos el diario uruguayo con mayor circulación en el país, cuya primera edición fue el 14 se setiembre de 1918.

Fundado y dirigido por Leonel Aguirre, Eduardo Rodríguez Larreta, Washington Beltrán Barbat y administrado hoy en día por el Dr. Guillermo Scheck.

El primer diario en América del Sur en lanzar su primera plana a color en 1945. Miembro del GDA, el consorcio exclusivo integrado por los once periódicos independientes con más influencia en Latinoamérica.

Introdujimos la modalidad de distribuir productos editoriales especiales y coleccionables a nivel nacional e internacional.

Preocupados principalmente por el mejoramiento de la sociedad uruguaya, realizamos decenas de publicaciones extraordinarias e investigaciones históricas.

Siempre acompasando los avances del mundo y aportando a los lectores y a la sociedad elementos que contribuyen a elevar el nivel cultural.

Desde 1996, presente con su versión en la web de El País Digital con el objetivo de adicionar contenidos, soluciones y experiencias para conocer, entender y escuchar a nuestras audiencias.

Actualmente es el medio de comunicación más visitado del Uruguay.

Name: The Dallas Morning News
Description:
Established in 1885, The Dallas Morning News is Texas' leading newspaper and the flagship newspaper subsidiary of DallasNews Corporation. 

It has received nine Pulitzer Prizes since 1986, as well as numerous other industry awards recognizing the quality of its investigative and feature journalism, design, and photojournalism.

Description:
The Los Angeles Times is the largest metropolitan daily newspaper in the country, with a daily readership of 1.2 million and 2.1 million on Sunday, more than 32 million unique latimes.com visitors monthly and a combined print and online local weekly audience of 4.4 million. The Pulitzer Prize-winning Times has been covering Southern California for more than 136 years.

Los Angeles Times’ businesses and affiliates also include The Envelope, Hot Property, DesignLA, Times Community News, and Los Angeles Times en Español, The Times also owns L.A. Times Studios LLC and California Community News, LLC.

Name: PC LIVE
Description:
Papua New Guinea’s Number 1 Daily Newspaper Since 1969
The Post-Courier is proud of its record as the voice of PNG. We were there when the nation took its first bold steps towards independence. Since that time, we have fearlessly recorded the nation’s progress.
The Post-Courier unashamedly supports the constitutional rights of Papua New Guineans and will fight to the last drop of ink to protect them.
We are accountable to the people of Papua New Guinea first and foremost.
The Post-Courier is the largest selling national newspaper in Papua New Guinea, with an audited daily circulation of 26,262 and is published Monday to Friday in English. The newspaper is distributed mostly by air throughout Papua New Guinea.
The Post-Courier is also the oldest newspaper in the country, being formed in June 1969. It has grown with the country and continues to cover the national affairs of Papua New Guinea.

Description:
Dainik Bhaskar (Hindi: दैनिक भास्कर) is an Indian Hindi-language daily newspaper that is now the largest circulated daily newspaper of India.  It is owned by Dainik Bhaskar Group (D B Corp Ltd.), the largest Print Media Company of India. Started in Bhopal in 1958, it expanded in 1983 with the launch of Dainik Bhaskar's Indore edition. Today, Dainik Bhaskar is present in 12 states with 61 editions in 3 major languages prevalent in India: Hindi,  Gujarati and Marathi.

Dainik Bhaskar was declared the world's 3rd largest circulated daily newspaper by WAN IFRA in 2019

Name: The Fintech Times
Description:
The Fintech Times is a bold new media company daring to ask the tough questions about the rise of fintech.  We report on the latest and brightest ideas from the fintech ecosystem as an authoritative and trusted voice.  We focus on high-quality content and distribute it to our network helping our partners to achieve their goals. 

Fintech as a definition started trending in recent years as the future of financial services, and of money itself. For those already in the know, this is not news.

Fintech isn’t a business sector; it’s dozens of sectors. Everything from high street banks, investment companies, money transfer, FX, fintech is re-engineering these sectors into their next generation. 

And there are new kinds of businesses emerging: crowdfunding, peer2peer platforms, crypto currencies, AI and robo-advice... sectors that are digitally native, they didn’t exist before the internet.

Fintech is about new companies, and new technologies for old companies. It’s about inventors and visionaries, and everyday people creating something new. It’s about your bank, your phone, and your job. And it’s about the future.

Future, before it happens.

Name: Diário Imobiliário

Pretende informar e divulgar o que de mais importante vai acontecendo em matéria de habitação, reabilitação, arrendamento, escritórios, retalho, arquitectura, sustentabilidade e muitos outros temas que interessam não só a especialistas desta área como a todos os portugueses.

O Diário Imobiliário está acessível online e tem uma forte componente multimédia através do Imobiliário TV, um programa ao qual pode aceder exclusivamente na web e que estará disponível também em smartphones, tablets e nas redes sociais.

O Diário Imobiliário é um projecto da jornalista Fernanda Pedro, especialista há mais de 15 anos no sector. Foi editora do caderno Espaços & Casas do semanário Expresso. Foi colaboradora no semanário Sol e é actualmente editora no Jornal Económico. Juntamente com António Baptista da Silva. partner deste projecto, foi autora do primeiro programa de imobiliário na televisão portuguesa, o Magazine Imobiliário na SIC Notícias, depois Espaços & Casas.

Combining the investigative know-how of a team of international reporters with the deep on-ground access of Israel's leading business newspaper Calcalist, we bring to the table a novel viewpoint that highlights the cross-border nature of tech news coming from this hotbed of innovation.


With a mix of breaking news and in-depth stories, we cater to industry executives, investors, and technology enthusiasts alike. Whether our readers come to sniff out business opportunities or to find engaging stories, CTech provides them with local insight and a global perspective.


CTech dives into the hottest topics including cybersecurity, autonomous driving, artificial intelligence, cryptocurrency, 3D-printing and homeland security.

Le journal se veut être un outil d'informations sélectionnées et anonymes au maximum et dans le respect de l’ethique, ses journalistes étant attentifs au principe de protection des sources d'information des journalistes et aussi du respect de l’éthique dans la démarche des collectes d’informations

Le bihebdomadaire publie des analyses macroéconomiques et politiques, pour le Cameroun et l’étranger (politique économique, finances publiques, etc.), des analyses sectorielles, des études d’entreprises, ainsi qu’une analyse boursière.

Name: Guardian Nigeria
Description:
WHAT THE GUARDIAN STANDS FOR

The Guardian is an independent newspaper, established in 1983 for the purpose of presenting balanced coverage of events, and of promoting the best interests of Nigeria. It owes allegiance to no political party, ethnic community, religious or other interest group. Its primary commitment is to the integrity and sovereignty of the Federation of Nigeria, and beyond that to the unity and sovereignty of Africa.

The Guardian is a liberal newspaper, committed to the best traditions and ideals of republican democracy. It believes that it is the responsibility of the state not only to protect and defend the citizen, but also to create the conditions, political, social, economic and cultural, in which all citizens may achieve their highest potential as human beings. It is committed to the principle of individual freedom, but believes that all citizens have duties as well as rights.

The Guardian does not, in principle, object to the ideology of free enterprise, since this would be inconsistent with its commitment to individual liberty and freedom. But it believes that the state must intervene judiciously in the economic life of the nation, in order to minimise the adverse effects of free enterprise and ensure that less privileged citizens have reasonable and fair access to the basic necessities of life.

The Guardian will at all times uphold the need for justice, probity in public life, equal access to the nation’s resources, and equal protection under the laws of Nigeria for all citizens.

The Guardian believes that Nigeria is a legitimate member of the international community, but holds that she can best fulfil her international obligations only if her own security and integrity are assured.

The Guardian’s logo is the ancient Egyptian symbol for Conscience. The motto, “Conscience, Nurtured by Truth” is inspired by Uthman Dan Fodio’s saying: ‘‘Conscience is an open wound; only truth can heal it.’’

Name: Finansavisen
Description:
Har du interesse for børs og finans? Ønsker du å følge utviklingen i norsk næringsliv? 
Ingen norsk avis dekker børsnyheter og finansbransjen tettere og bredere enn Finansavisen. Men det stopper ikke der. Vi bringer også nyheter fra alt som rører seg innen økonomi og næringsliv, temastoff og reportasjer om bolig og næringseiendom, samt dybdeintervjuer og fritidsstoff.

Hver dag siden avisens fødsel i 1992 har Trygve Hegnar skrevet sin daglige kommentar til nyheter og aktuelle hendelser. Den bør du ikke gå glipp av.

I avisen finner du et bredt spekter av temaer for å fylle på med kunnskapen du trenger i jobb, samtidig som vi har et økt fokus på å gi deg inspirasjon og stoff for din fritid.

Name: Editora Listín Diario
Description:
Un ejemplo de dignidad que ha dado lecciones de grandeza en la historia democrática dominicana

Con la salida del primer ejemplar de LISTIN DIARIO el 1ero. de agosto, de 1889, la República Dominicana inauguraba una página ejemplar en la historia  de la libertad de expresión del continente americano.

Con sus 132 años de fundado, LISTIN DIARIO es una institución que ha dado lecciones ejemplares a la historia de la democracia contemporánea.  Ha soportado estoicamente los desplantes del poder; la intolerancia y los atropellos.  Y a pesar de todo ha llegado hasta nuestro presente fortalecido, exhibiendo su dignidad ciudadana como mayor prueba de su contribución al desarrollo de la República Dominicana.

A su fundador Don Arturo J. Pellerano Alfau le cabe toda la gloria del proyecto.  Su visión de futuro y su gran sentido de la responsabilidad lo convirtieron en un trabajador infatigable y un verdadero apóstol del periodismo nacional

El proyecto fue concebido primeramente como una institución para dar a conocer a la sociedad dominicana de su tiempo, en forma de tabloide, la información de las naves que todos los días arribaban y partían del puerto de Santo Domingo.  Poco después fue acogiendo nuevas iniciativas hasta que se convirtió en un instrumento de servicio social vital, por donde entraban, en forma de noticias y reflexiones, los acontecimientos más sobresalientes de la historia del país.

Name: DRH.ma
Description: DRH.ma, Le Magazine en ligne du Décideur RH. Rejoignez les 57.000 lecteurs mensuels du premier Magazine destiné aux Managers RH en Afrique.

Name: ZFK
Description:
Die ZfK ist das Leitmedium der Stadtwerke und kommunalen Versorgungsunternehmen. Neben unserer digitalen und Print-Ausgabe berichten wir täglich über aktuelle Geschehenisse rund um die Themen Politik, Unternehmen, Digitalisierung, Energie, Mobilität, Wasser & Abwasser, Entsorgung und Karriere. Wir veranstalten Events zum Thema Nachhaltigkeit, Kommunikation in der Branche und zur Vernetzung von Frauen in der Kommunalwirtschaft. Neben unserem Stellenmarkt, unserem Podcast und dem Online-Debattenformat ZfK im Gespräch entwickeln wir stetig neue Produkte, um unserer Zielgruppe einen Mehrwert zu schaffen.

Unser ZfK-Stellenmarkt ist das größte Stellenportal der kommunalen Branche. Hier treffen attraktive Arbeitgeber und hochqualifizierte Arbeitnehmer zusammen, auf einem spannenden Markt, der sich stets im Wandel befindet.

Das ZfK-Morning Briefing informiert Sie täglich über aktuelle Entwicklungen bei den großen sowie kleinen Versorgern und in ihrem politischen Umfeld.
Hier abonnieren und immer bestens informiert bleiben: https://www.zfk.de/services/morning-briefing?utm_source=linkedin&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=share&utm_content=profilstartseite

Unser ZfK-Frauennetzwerk führt Frauen aus der kommunalen Branche zusammen. Von weiblichen Führungskräften bis hin zu  Berufseinsteigerinnen finden Frauen aus dem gesamten Feld der Kommunalwirtschaft regelmäßig digital und live zusammen, um sich in einem sicheren Raum auszutauschen und zu stärken.

Events, wie die ZfK Nachhaltigkeitskonferenz inkl. AWARD-Verleihung oder auch die ZfK Media Days ergänzen das umfassende Angebot der ZfK. Während sich im Rahmen der ZfK Nachhaltigkeitskonferenz k
ommunale Unternehmen aktiv mit dem Thema Nachhaltigkeit auseinandersetzen und jährlich Best-Practice-Beispiele von Dekarbonisierungs- und Nachhaltigkeitsstrategien präsentieren, setzen die ZfK Media Days auf die Kommunkation kommunaler Unternehmen in Zeiten des Umbruchs.

Name: Belfast Telegraph
Description:
Belfast Telegraph journalism is a lot more than reporting the news. It’s getting to the heart of the story, and it takes time, effort, and passion. This is what we have been doing in Northern Ireland for 150 years.

With editor Eoin Brannigan at the helm, the Belfast Telegraph continues to set the news agenda with an outlook that reflects a modern Northern Ireland.

Name: Les Echos Capital Finance
Description:
"Savoir prendre des risques, c'est capital"

Numéro 1 sur l’actu du Private Equity et du M&A : Capital Finance, c’est toute l’actualité en temps réel du marché du capital-investissement et des fusions-acquisitions. 

Informations exclusives, mouvements du secteur et analyse des transactions, Capital Finance offre une gamme complète d’outils et de contenus pour offrir toutes les clés de compréhension du marché aux acteurs du secteur (fonds d’investissement, banques d’affaires et de financement, conseils en fusions-acquisitions, cabinets d’avocats, cellules M&A d’entreprises, LPs…).

Name: LA NOUVELLE REPUBLIQUE DU CENTRE OUEST
Description:
Le Groupe Nouvelle République dont le siège social est basé à Tours (Indre-et-Loire), est le 9e Groupe de presse
quotidienne régionale français avec un C.A de 95 M€ et un effectif de 946 collaborateurs.
Présent sur 5 départements, le Groupe NR représente une puissance médiatique incontournable, avec
notamment les 13 éditions quotidiennes de la Nouvelle République et de Centre Presse, une télévision locale,
des sites internet, une régie publicitaire, un centre d'impression, des filiales de portage, d'événementiel...
Dynamique, le Groupe NR est très largement impliqué dans l'organisation d'événements de grande envergure
visant à promouvoir les entreprises, les collectivités locales et territoriales, ainsi que des initiatives privées ou
associatives de sa zone de diffusion.
Acteur et animateur de la vie économique de son territoire, le Groupe NR donne également la parole aux
promoteurs de la vie locale - citoyens, entrepreneurs, élus…- parties prenantes de la vitalité des Régions Centre
Val de Loire et Nouvelle Aquitaine.

Name: Sistema Jornal do Commercio
Description:
Sistema Jornal do Commercio. Vários veículos, uma só missão: colocar Pernambuco em primeiro lugar
 
O Sistema Jornal do Commercio de Comunicação (SJCC) é o maior grupo de comunicação de Pernambuco e um dos maiores do Brasil, composto pelos veículos: Jornal do Commercio, Portal NE10, TV Jornal Recife e Caruaru, Rádio JC News, Rádio Jornal AM Recife, Caruaru, Garanhuns, Limoeiro, Pesqueira e Petrolina. Faz parte do Grupo JCPM, presidido pelo empresário João Carlos Paes Mendonça.

Name: Dagligvarehandlen
Description:
DH Media A/S er en moderne medievirksomhed med domicil i Agro Food Park ved Aarhus.

Vi driver hjemmesiden www.dagligvarehandlen.dk, der præsenterer nyheder fra dagligvarebranchen døgnet rundt. 

Derudover udsender vi breaking news og et dagligt nyhedsbrev, som leverer de mest relevante og aktuelle nyheder direkte til din indbakke. Tilmeld dig nyhedsbrevet på: https://dagligvarehandlen.dk/tilmeld-nyhedsbrev 

Vores medier er de førende og mest læste i branchen, og læses af aktører i hele markedet – butikker, kæder, grossister, leverandører og rådgivere.

Name: Caderno País Positivo
Description:
O Caderno País Positivo comunica conteúdos que valorizam o nosso país. 
Distribuimos os conteúdos por vários meios, potenciando as audiências necessárias a quem connosco divulga:
Em papel (conjunto com o Semanário Sol, a quem pagamos) e nas redes sociais Linkedin (com vários perfis) e Facebook.
Os nossos conteúdos são dirigidos aos dois principais grupo sócio-económicos de Portugal.

Name: Sud Ouest
Description: Sud Ouest est un quotidien régional français, entité principale du Groupe Sud Ouest. Il est diffusé dans 7 départements de la région Nouvelle Aquitaine (Charente, Charente-Maritime, Dordogne, Gironde, Landes, Lot-et-Garonne et Pyrénées-Atlantiques).

Name: Dagens Medisin
Description: Dagens Medisin er Norges største uavhengige nyhetskanal for helsevesenet.

Name: Supply Chain Magazine
Description: Projeto de comunicação e informação B2B, com acento tónico nas cadeias de abastecimento e focado em dar resposta aos desafios no mundo digital da supply chain: somos SCM. Somos SCM porque Somos Cidadãos do Mundo, apaixonados pelas cadeias de abastecimento, adeptos da Internet e das redes sociais, amantes da liberdade de Imprensa, defensores do uso correto da língua e do direito à informação plural. Move-nos a determinação e o prazer de informar. Porque gostamos de fazer pontes, criar laços e gerar conhecimento, defendemos que as notícias podem ter mais do que um prisma. Queremos deixar uma marca positiva em quem nos lê e criar eco com as notícias e artigos (pode acompanhar a nossa Revista também no nosso site), fomentar ideias, ajudá-lo a antecipar as tendências e estimular o pensamento, análise e discussão. Por si, Somos Capazes do Melhor. Por isso, somos SCM!

Name: Le Soir
Description:
Quotidien national belge francophone, quality paper progressiste et indépendant, Le Soir est le quotidien francophone le plus lu en Belgique.
Le Soir présente une structure de 4 cahiers, une maquette dynamique, six suppléments, des rubriques variées pour offrir aux lecteurs, à une époque caractérisée par un flot continu de nouvelles, un journal qui livre l’essentiel de l’actualité et donne de l’ordre et de l’intelligibilité à une info qui en manque beaucoup.
Quotidien de référence par excellence, Le Soir se révèle indispensable pour trier, hiérarchiser et vous aider à comprendre le monde encore mieux afin d’en devenir un acteur de qualité.
Pertinent et impertinent, objectif mais engagé, sérieux sans être ennuyeux,
Le Soir est plus que jamais le journal qui vous ressemble.

Name: HealthNews.pt
Description:
O HealthNews.pt  é um portal de jornalismo de saúde, com atualização permanente e poderá ser acedido através do URL: http://healthnews.pt
Acessível ao público em geral via internet, é publicada informação sobre os principais acontecimentos do sector com interesse para o público em geral – eventos, política de saúde, outros factos relevantes - privilegiando-se, também, a publicação de conteúdos pedagógicos, que dotem os leitores de informação importante para a promoção da saúde e prevenção da doença.
Conta também com uma área reservada dirigida apenas a profissionais de saúde” onde serão publicados, para além de notícias de âmbito geral, com relevo para este público-alvo, informação de caráter técnico relevante para a prestação de cuidados de saúde à população numa lógica de formação contínua pós-graduada.

Name: The Brussels Times
Description: The Brussels Times is Belgium’s largest daily online/print news media in English.

Name: Newsweek Polska
Description: Czołowy tygodnik opinii. Ujawniamy to, co politycy woleliby ukryć — dajemy głos tym, których nikt nie słucha.

Name: WeekendPost
Description:
WeekendPost is Botswana’s first Saturday publication, distributed Saturday morning. It is a weekly weekend read.

The WeekendPost has a bias for analysis, in-depth reports, investigations and behind-the-news. It also covers breaking news, politics, business, sport, tourism and hospitality, lifestyle and entertainment for wide circulation in Botswana and beyond.

Name: BREAKBULK.NEWS
Description:
Breakbulk.News is an independent global media channel that keeps you informed of the latest news, industry updates and analysis in the Breakbulk, Heavylift, Project Freight and Logistics industry.

We are committed to opening up the industry by Bringing Breakbulk Together. Uncovering your news, industry updates, and market analysis, piece by piece.

Breakbulk.News is powered by Breakbulk News & Media B.V. and is based in The Netherlands.

Name: Silicon Valley Business Journal
Description:
The Silicon Valley Business Journal is the leading source of local business news, data and networking for Silicon Valley and the San Jose, California, region. 

Follow us on social media and sign up for the Weekly Edition, Afternoon and Morning Editions, and breaking news alerts for all the latest news, business intelligence, awards and events you need to succeed in business. 

Start now by following the Silicon Valley Business Journal on LinkedIn.

Name: El Heraldo de México
Description: Somos Heraldo Media Group, la evolución de esta casa editorial en una multiplataforma que integra a un diario impreso, digital, televisión y radio.

Name: Science|Business
Description: Science|Business exists to bring together three worlds which should work together but too often stumble apart: industry, research and policy. The Science|Business Network of universities, companies, and research and policy organisations is a uniquely powerful forum for driving innovation forward. Our newsletters reach Europe’s most influential innovators and policymakers. Our meetings bring together speakers and audiences looking to make a real difference. Our reports utilise our unrivalled expertise and knowledge of European policy making to analyse and point the way forward.

Name: Industries Cosmétiques
Description:
La revue Industries Cosmétiques est devenue en quelques années la  nouvelle publication de référence dans les domaines de la conception, de  l’élaboration, de la production et de l’emballage des cosmétiques et  des parfums. 
Elle s’adresse à tous les professionnels du domaine, qu’ils  travaillent dans les laboratoires de R&D ou dans les centres de  production.

Industries Cosmétiques c’est :
 • une publication ancrée dans une industrie en mouvement aux opportunités nombreuses,
 • une exploration du monde des fournisseurs des industries cosmétiques,
 • la veille technologique du secteur, des partenariats exclusifs avec  les incontournables du secteur (syndicats professionnels, sociétés  savantes…),
 • des rubriques claires et concises,
 • l’image de marque, le sérieux et le professionnalisme de l’équipe de *Contrôles Essais Mesures.

Industries Cosmétiques c’est à chaque numéro :
 • les actualités produits et marchés,
 • une plongée au cœur de l’innovation,
 • la rencontre avec une personnalité,
 • un dossier pour faire le point sur un sujet transversal (le  sensoriel, la réglementation, la mesure, la mécatronique, la sécurité  sanitaire, la logistique, etc.),
 • nos avis d’experts pour assurer un transfert de connaissances,
 • des outils pratiques.

Name: ABP Group
Description:
In 1922, Anandabazar Patrika first came out as a four-page evening daily that sold at two paise and had a circulation of about 1,000 copies a day. Ninety-five years later, Anandabazar Patrika reaches out to close to six million readers, every day!

Today, the ABP Group has evolved into a media conglomerate that has 12 premier publications, six 24-hour national TV news channels, one leading book publishing business, one radio channel and one online matrimony business as well as mobile and internet properties. Touching the lives of millions of readers and viewers, daily.

We believe the legacy you leave, is the life you lead. We see ourselves as repositories of best practices and processes. And, at times, when we don't have the very best within, we open windows to look out for expertise. Not surprisingly, ABP is associated with companies and personalities revered across the world.

In the world of journalism, we are not just a media house. We are really an alma mater.

Name: Wichita Business Journal
Description:
The Wichita Business Journal is the leading source of local business news, data and networking for the Wichita, Kansas, region. 

Follow us on social media and sign up for the Weekly Edition, Afternoon and Morning Editions, and breaking news alerts for all the latest news, business intelligence, awards and events you need to succeed in business. 

Start now by following the Wichita Business Journal on LinkedIn.

Name: Agência Pública
Description:
Pioneira do Brasil, a Agência Pública aposta num modelo de jornalismo sem fins lucrativos para manter a independência. Todas as nossas reportagens são livremente reproduzidas por diversos veículos sob a licença creative commons. Nossa missão é produzir reportagens de fôlego pautadas pelo interesse público,  visando ao fortalecimento do direito à informação, à qualificação do debate democrático e à promoção dos direitos humanos.
Além de produzir, a Pública atua para promover o jornalismo investigativo independente, através de programas de mentorias para jovens jornalistas, bolsas de reportagem e incubação de projetos inovadores de jornalismo independente. Para nós, o jornalismo não está em crise – está em renovação. A Pública acredita na reportagem. E no repórter.

Seja um Aliado do nosso jornalismo: https://agen.pub/apoiein 
Inscreva-se nas nossas newsletters: apublica.org/assine-nossas-newsletters/

Name: CHEManager International
Description: Wiley’s leading media brand providing first-hand information on the global chemical, life science and process industries

Name: Carbon Herald
Description: Daily news about the carbon industry - covering carbon capture companies, carbon removal startups and how industry and countries are decarbonizing.

CRAP-Cahiers pédagogiques

Name: Malayala Manorama Co. Ltd
Description: Malayala Manorama is one of India's largest and oldest media houses, with operations in Print, Television, Radio and Digital properties. The group brings out a wide range of publications, the Malayala Manorama newspaper being the largest circulated and read regional language newspaper in the country.

Name: Pharmacien Business
Description: Pharmacien Business est conçu pour aider les pharmaciens à développer leur point de vente tout en valorisant leur cœur de métier. Ce mensuel, supplément du Moniteur des pharmacies, accompagne les pharmaciens dans leur gestion quotidienne et le management de leur équipe.

Name: Periódico Prensa Libre
Description: Es el periódico más importante e influyente de Guatemala, con cobertura en asuntos de  política y poderes y temas de seguridad y justicia. Tiene uno de los mejores diseños editoriales de la región, moderno y atractivo. El área gráfica ha ganado importantes reconocimientos internacionales.

Name: TheMarker
Description: TheMarker, Israel's top financial website, believes everything boils down to the economy. Covering everything from high-tech to healthcare and marketing to capital markets, TheMarker offers in-depth insights into the dynamic world of business and finance.

Name: The Express Tribune
Description: The Express Tribune is Pakistan’s leading English-language daily newspaper, known for its credible and independent journalism. Pioneering publishing partner of the International New York Times, bringing global perspectives and comprehensive local reporting to our readers.

Name: Fiscal Focus
Description:
Fiscal Focus nasce sul finire degli anni ’90 grazie all'esperienza e alla professionalità maturata sul campo dal Dott. Antonio Gigliotti in qualità di consulente, convegnista e pubblicista nell'area fiscale e contabile. 

Obiettivo principale è stato, fin dall’esordio, quello di fornire strumenti, appositamente predisposti, per la formazione e l’aggiornamento professionale e di costituire un partner affidabile per aziende e professionisti. 

Ci siamo riusciti? Quello che sappiamo è che oggi Fiscal Focus, presente sul computer e sulla scrivania di diverse centinaia di migliaia di clienti, costituisce un marchio presente su tutto il territorio nazionale grazie ad una vasta gamma di prodotti e servizi che si collocano in diverse aree. 

Una redazione formata da giovani professionisti, esperti in diverse materie, capaci di innovarsi per rinnovare…

Name: Finanz und Wirtschaft
Description:
Die 1928 gegründete «Finanz und Wirtschaft» spricht versierte private und professionelle Investoren an, die in oder mit den globalen Finanzmärkten arbeiten. Die grösste Wirtschaftsfachredaktion der Schweiz erklärt tagesaktuell digital und zweimal wöchentlich – jeweils am Mittwoch und am Samstag – mit der Zeitungsausgabe die komplexen Zusammenhänge der globalen Wirtschaft und des nationalen und internationalen Börsengeschehens.
Die FuW deckt mit der Analyse alle in der Schweiz kotierten Gesellschaften und alle für den deutschsprachigen Investor wichtigen globalen Unternehmen ab. Weiter gibt sie direkte Anlageempfehlungen ab und hat einen sehr umfangreichen Markdatenteil online wie auch in der Zeitung.

Name: Senza Filtro
Description:
Senza Filtro è il primo giornale nativo digitale sui temi del lavoro, dell’impresa e delle libere professioni. 

L'editore è FiordiRisorse, Associazione manageriale attiva dal 2008. Senza Filtro si avvale di una redazione diffusa che coinvolge oltre 8000 professionisti e più di 1000 aziende per raccontare la cultura italiana del lavoro andando direttamente alla fonte, “senza filtro” appunto. 

Anche dall’estero, giornalisti e manager contribuiscono sulle pagine del giornale con contenuti e dibattiti che mettono a confronto il sistema italiano con quello internazionale. 

Su Senza Filtro imprenditori e professionisti si alternano a giornalisti e opinionisti, intrecciando esperienza e autorevolezza delle analisi.

Dal 2018 SenzaFiltro è l'organizzatore di Nobìlita Festival, il Festival della cultura del lavoro in cui ogni anno si alternano sul palco interventi di analisi e approfondimento sui temi di maggiore attualità del mondo del lavoro 
(www.nobilitafestival.com)

Name: La Razón
Description:
La Razón es un diario de gran difusión en España, un referente informativo de la vida política, social y económica española. 

Desde su fundación en 1998 ha permanecido fiel a sus valores y principios. 25 años de periodismo, de historia y de trabajo por los periodistas y prestigiosos columnistas que forman y han formado parte de la redacción.

LaRazón.es es una de las webs más influyentes y cuenta con gran presencia en redes sociales:

Name: Richmond BizSense
Description: BizSense is Richmond’s leading source for business news and information. Founded in 2006, we combine the daily business reporting of a local newspaper with the analysis and commentary of a magazine. BizSense’s objective reporting and insightful commentary, along with our website’s business events calendar and local newswire, has garnered us widespread recognition as Richmond’s business news leader. The site, which is owned by Richmond-based Dyno Media, LLC, does not charge for access and is supported by advertising revenue.

Name: Business24 Ghana
Description:
Business24 Newspaper is a digital and printed newspaper published in Accra, Ghana by Business24 Limited. 
Business24 Newspaper is established as a newspaper of choice for Ghana’s business community and institutions, we are dedicated to reporting business and industry news, featuring exclusive analysis and insights.

Name: Le Journal des Maires
Description: Créé en 1857, le Journal des Maires est reconnu comme le mensuel de référence des élus et décideurs locaux. Indépendant des pouvoirs politiques et des entreprises, il vit grâce à la confiance et la fidélité de ses abonnés et 80 000 lecteurs...

Name: Diario del Puerto
Description:
DIARIO DEL PUERTO es una publicación especializada de ámbito nacional con 30 años de historia. En la actualidad es la publicación líder en España en el sector del transporte y la logística.
Sus más de 5.000 ejemplares de tirada, de lunes a viernes, llegan cada día a los despachos de miles de profesionales del sector, representantes de empresas de la Comunidad Logístico-Portuaria, así como empresas importadoras y exportadoras, asociaciones e instituciones.
Está considerada como una herramienta estratégica por los profesionales del sector ya que no solo contiene informaciones de relevancia, sino que además incluye numerosos informes, reportajes especiales, dossiers temáticos, entrevistas, artículos de opinión, etc. elaborados por un equipo periodístico de prestigio, ampliamente reconocido en el ámbito de la logística.
La publicación Diario del Puerto contribuye decisivamente en la cohesión vertebración de la comunidad logístico-portuaria, pero también ejerce un importante papel de divulgación y promoción de la actividad del recinto portuario y del tejido empresarial que forma parte del mismo.
Diario del Puerto forma parte de Grupo Diario, empresa que también edita una treintena de publicaciones, de periodicidad anual, especializadas en diferentes ámbitos del transporte y la logística.

Name: CEO Polska
Description: Serwis informacyjny, najnowsze wiadomości, informacje z Polski i świata biznesu.  Portal podejmuje szeroko rozumianą tematykę biznesową tj. finanse, prawo, styl życia. Zamieszczane artykuły nierzadko pomagają w podejmowaniu właściwych decyzji biznesowych. Zapraszamy do odwiedzenia portalu.

Name: NewsFlash.one
Description: News media blog

A B2B channel about this fascinating market, focused exclusively on Brazilian and Latin-American entrepreneurs.

Description: Enrology Job Portal Publish All New Government Job Notifications, Private Job Announcements, Vacancy Recruitment Alerts.

Name: Paris Match
Description:
Premier magazine d'informations générales en France.
Inscrivez-vous gratuitement à notre Newsletter quotidienne

Name: Globalithics
Description:
At Globalithics, we deliver sharp, timely, and in-depth geopolitical analysis to help you navigate a rapidly changing world. Our focus is on uncovering the dynamics of global events, political shifts, and economic strategies with clarity and intelligence.

We transform complexity into actionable insights—empowering decision-makers, analysts, and global citizens to stay informed and ahead of the curve. From emerging geopolitical trends to critical global developments, Globalithics is your trusted source for understanding the forces shaping our world.

Turning data into global insight.

Name: Textile Insights
Description:
Textile Insights with its motto “Delivering Inspiring Information”, backed by professionals with over 25 years of relevant experience, aims at providing in depth content of the textile and apparel industry that will help in better decision.
making.

Name: Prensa Economía & Negocios
Description:
Entérate del acontecer financiero local y mundial. Búscala todos los martes en La Prensa.

Name: The Buffalo News
Description:
The Buffalo News is Western New York’s leading resource for local journalism. Founded in 1880, we operate the largest newsroom in the region, publishing 7-days a week in print and around the clock on BuffaloNews.com.

In addition to our commitment to journalism, we partner with businesses across the region to connect them with advertising solutions and new audiences. 

Owned by Lee Enterprises, The Buffalo News is part of a network of more than 75 daily newspapers and nearly 350 specialty publications. 

Questions about The Buffalo News? Contact our customer service department at (716) 842-1111 

To learn more about how we partner with local businesses contact our advertising department at (716) 849-3411.

Name: Exame Portugal
Description:
É uma referência no mercado português e tem como missão partilhar com os leitores business Intelligence, através da organização, análise, monitorização e partilha de informações que oferecem suporte à gestão de negócios. Além disso, foca-se em antecipar as tendências que irão marcar a agenda económica em Portugal e no mundo. A marca comemorou 30 anos no mercado nacional em 2019 e assume-se, cada vez mais, como um  instrumento de trabalho imprescindível para empresários e gestores. Faz parte, desde o início de 2018, do grupo Trust In News (TIN), que agrupa mais de uma dezena de publicações em Portugal, como a Visão, a Exame Informática ou a Caras.

A Exame é dirigida aos decisores, empresários e gestores portugueses e estrangeiros, que querem conhecer e aplicar as tendências de gestão, ver reconhecidos projectos empresariais de qualidade e reflectir de forma prospectiva sobre o que está e mudar na economia mundial. É dirigida aos quadros portugueses e expatriados que procuram conteúdos globais, aprender com os melhores exemplos internacionais e conhecer conteúdos editoriais focados no sucesso empresarial, submetidos a uma análise SWOT dos jornalistas especializados que compõem esta equipa e dos analistas e comentadores reconhecidos no mercado. A marca é ainda dedicada a todos homens e mulheres interessados no desenvolvimento económico, em geral, e das suas carreiras, em particular.

A Exame é uma marca multiplataforma, presente no mercado em formato de revista, tablet, site (https://visao.sapo.pt/exame/) e redes sociais. Na edição em papel, a revista está dividida em três grandes secções: Micro, Macro e Exit. A primeira é dedicada a negócios; a segunda à gestão, estratégia e carreiras e a terceira ao lifestyle premium. Boas leituras!

Para assinar a revista Exame clique aqui:
https://loja.trustinnews.pt/

Name: The Printers Mysore | Deccan Herald | Prajavani
Description:
The Printers Mysore limited is a leading Media Company in India with iconic media brands like Deccan Herald and Prajavani. The Printers Mysore is going from being an integral part of the print media ecosystem to a diversified media group.

Capitalizing on the strength of its media brands, it has embarked on a journey to develop a digital media business for the 21st century media consumer.

Name: IJ
Description:
Since 1919, the IJ magazine has been a weekly economic, legal and tax information magazine. Authorized by the Loire-Atlantique prefecture, it includes, in each of its publications, legal announcements: transfers of funds, transactions, commercial information, public markets.

A veritable mine of information for the business.

Name: Business Weekly newspaper
Description: Reporting on business news in Cambridge and the East of England – Business Weekly’s print edition, website and epaper combine the latest business news with in-depth reports and analysis on issues of importance to companies involved in technology, biotech, manufacturing and services to industry. The newspaper’s additional reach into research and academia and the impact of science & technology innovation on future business trends is unrivalled in European B2B.

Name: Voiles et Voiliers
Description:
Informer, faire rêver, transmettre, raconter la voile, la mer, les bateaux – et, surtout, les marins, vous, nous, tous ceux qui aiment naviguer, voyager, régater.

Créé en 1971, Voiles et Voiliers est un magazine mensuel français consacré à la voile sportive et de plaisance. 
Le magazine édite également des numéros hors-série et une collection d'ouvrages dédiés à la voile.

Name: National Association of Black Journalists (NABJ)
Description:
The National Association of Black Journalists (NABJ) is an organization of journalists, students and media-related professionals that provides quality programs and services to and advocates on behalf of black journalists worldwide.

Founded by 44 men and women on December 12, 1975, in Washington, D.C., NABJ is the largest organization of journalists of color in the nation.

Each year, NABJ awards nearly $100,000 in scholarships and internships to college and high school students nationwide, as well as fellowships for seasoned professionals.

The NABJ Media Institute provides professional development and technical training for black journalists at venues across the country.

NABJ is headquartered on the campus of the University of Maryland-College Park.

Name: Le Républicain Lorrain
Description:
Le Républicain Lorrain est un quotidien régional, fondé en 1919, appartenant au groupe de presse de la banque Crédit Mutuel (Groupe EBRA). Il est diffusé en Lorraine à travers 7 éditions locales.

Le journal peut être être consulté depuis votre ordinateur, tablette ou smartphone 7j/7 et 24h/24.

Name: Pittsburgh Post-Gazette
Description: The Pittsburgh Post-Gazette is Western Pennsylvania’s largest newspaper, and post-gazette.com is the region’s most-visited website, reaching more than one million people weekly. We cover business, sports, arts & entertainment news in Pittsburgh and beyond.  Follow our staff writers on Twitter at @PittsburghPG.

Name: Faro de Vigo
Description:
FARO DE VIGO es el diario decano de la prensa española. Se imprimió por primera vez el 3 de noviembre de 1853 en el taller tipográfico que tenía su fundador, don Angel de Lema y Marina, en la viguesa calle de la Oliva, con la idea de "coadyuvar a los intereses de Galicia". Desde 1986 pertenece a Editorial Prensa Ibérica, grupo de comunicación que integran en la actualidad catorce cabeceras periodísticas, cuyos criterios comunes son la independencia, el rigor y el pluralismo, junto al máximo compromiso con los diversos territorios en que se editan.

Faro de Vigo tiene cada día seis ediciones. Además de la de mayor difusión, que abarca el área de Vigo, se imprimen las correspondientes a Pontevedra, Arousa, Ourense, Morrazo y Deza-Tabeirós-Montes.

La edición digital se puso en marcha en enero de 1999.
