Name: Bref Eco
Description:
Bref Eco est le premier groupe de presse économique de la région Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes. Editeur indépendant spécialisé depuis 1966 dans les projets et l’actualité des entreprises et des collectivités dispose de publications print et digitales. 

La ligne éditoriale des 3 supports de presse repose sur l’information factuelle, fiable et synthétique dont les cadres dirigeants d’entreprises et de collectivités ont besoin pour réaliser leur veille économique et concurrentielle mais également pour identifier des opportunités régionales.

La vocation de Bref Eco est de mettre en lumière les entreprises qui se développent, innovent, recrutent…mais aussi de connecter les entrepreneurs. A ce titre, Bref Eco organise, depuis 2006, des événements pour développer des synergies  entre dirigeants et faire rayonner notre territoire et sa créativité : Les Trophées de l’Innovation, les Rencontres de l’Entreprise Responsable. Editeur des magazines prestige : Les Champions de l'Industrie, Les Champions de la RSE ... mais aussi réalisation de Brand Content de magazines pour le compte d'entreprises

Name: WindTAIWAN
Description:
WindTAIWAN is a Taiwanese media dedicated entirely to the offshore wind industry. 
We provide the latest news, market trends, innovation in the industry, and government policies.

Name: Philippine Daily Inquirer
Description:
The Philippine Daily Inquirer is undeniably the country’s most credible and influential newspaper, with more than one million nationwide readers daily.

Distinguished by award-giving bodies like the Catholic Mass Media Awards, Jaime Ongpin Awards for Investigative Journalism, Anvil Awards and WAN-IFRA Asia Media Awards, it is the Philippines’ most awarded broadsheet with over 500 awards and citations.

With four regional bureaus, over 130 provincial correspondents nationwide and four printing presses in Cebu, Davao, Laguna and Manila, Inquirer delivers news to the provinces faster and more effectively than its competitors.

One of its news website, www.inquirer.net, is ranked among the world’s most visited news sites, averaging one million page views a day.

For more than 30 years, the Inquirer has been at the forefront of setting the agenda by chronicling everyday events with much ardour and enthusiasm. These same virtues propelled the Inquirer to greater heights and elevated discussions on pressing issues in the society to a whole new level. With an end in mind to spark change in the society, it ask questions nobody else would ask, which leads to call for action. Through this, Inquirer aims to inspire every Filipino people to become its own leader.

Its business savvy and social conscience have been recognized with the Agora Award for Outstanding Marketing Company of the Year in 1998, Anvil Award of Merit for its participation in Tabang Mindanaw and Gold Quill Award of Excellence for Economic, Social and Environmental Development in 2003.

Its meaningful goal of making a difference in the everyday life of Filipinos continues to be the driving force behind its journalistic and corporate initiatives.

As the country’s number 1 newspaper, the Philippine Daily Inquirer will remain steadfast in its commitment to bring “Balanced news, fearless views” to readers when and where it matters.

Name: Post Khmer
Description:
A good newspaper, I suppose, is a Nation talking to itself. Arthur Miller, 1961.

A history that stretches back more than 15 years has made the Phnom Penh Post the ‘Newspaper of Record’.

In fact the Phnom Penh Post is the oldest existing independent newspaper in any language in Cambodia.

First published in July 1992, the Post is read by thousands of foreigners and Cambodians throughout the country and by subscribers in 35 countries around the globe.

For more than 15 years the Phnom Penh Post has been the paper of record on Cambodian current events – read by decision makers and consumers who have helped rebuild the nation during the past decades.

No other newspaper can lay claim to such an extensive record. The Phnom Penh Post presents its readers with information and analysis that is convincing, useful and unique.

The Phnom Penh Post readers are also the most highly educated in the country and demand access to the highest quality information possible.

Our team of editors and journalists know that simply reporting the facts is not enough: they must analyze them and explain to readers how these facts will shape and affect their lives.
Location: #41, St 228, Phum 4, Sangkat Boeng Rang, Khan Doun Penh,, Phnom Penh

Name: Kyiv Post
Description:
The Kyiv Post is Ukraine’s English-language newspaper and proud winner of the 2014 Missouri Honor Medal for Distinguished Service in Journalism.

Online media registration number: R40-05383

The newspaper’s first print edition came out on Oct. 18, 1995 and went online in 2002. Its global audience has been growing steadily since then, peaking at more than 65 million pageviews in 2014.

The newspaper’s motto is “Ukraine’s Global Voice,” which in 2018 replaced the previous motto of “Independence. Community. Trust.” Both slogans reflect the newspaper’s commitment to the highest journalistic and ethical standards. 

The Kyiv Post has had three owners in its existence: American Jed Sunden, who owned the newspaper from its inception in 1995 until 2009; United Kingdom’s Mohammad Zahoor, who owned the paper from 2009 until March 21, 2018, when he sold to Syrian native Adnan Kivan, an Odesa-based businessman who owns the KADORR Group. Read Kyiv Post chief editor Brian Bonner’s March 30, 2018, profile of Kivan here.

The newspaper’s journalists also started an affiliated nonprofit organization, the Media Development Foundation, in 2013 to raise money for investigative journalism, student exchanges and training programs.

Name: Corporate Maldives
Description: Maldives' Premier Corporate Business Resource

In the years since, it has presented stories of Taiwanese companies, industries and Taiwan’s political, economic and social environment to the world through comprehensive, in-depth reports. We provide news with a perspective.

Name: Points de Vente
Description: Fort de ses 55 années d’expertise, Points de Vente se positionne aujourd'hui comme un média d'information de fond (économie, analyse, prospective), un outil d'aide à la décision, au service des décideurs de la Distribution et du Commerce.

Name: Ripples Nigeria
Description:
Often, many young Nigerians, and even the not-too-young, display poor grasp of the forces that shape unfolding political and business issues in the country. Ripples Nigeria fills the knowledge-gap by investigating, reporting and interpreting these emerging scenarios for better appreciation.

We are passionate, not just about the nice details, but also the ugly sides that speak truth to governments, businesses, and leaders, both locally and globally.

Mission:
To relentlessly pursue truth in our passion to inform and empower Nigerians.
 
Vision:
To be the most influential news source in Nigeria.

Name: Finance et Investissement
Description:
Finance et Investissement est le média de référence des conseillers en services financiers et de l’industrie financière québécoise. 

Lancé en novembre 1999 et publié 8 fois par an, le journal Finance et Investissement est offert uniquement par abonnement. Quelque 30 000 professionnels lisent nos articles sur les nouvelles de l’industrie, les produits de placement et d’assurance, l’économie et la recherche ainsi que le développement des affaires.

Finance-investissement.com est le site Internet le plus consulté par les conseillers québécois. Chaque jour, nous envoyons un bulletin électronique dont le contenu est exclusif : nouvelles de l'industrie, dossiers spéciaux, chroniques d’experts et articles en développement des affaires. Notre portail vidéo FI TV ainsi que des webinaires thématiques bonifient notre offre de contenu. 

Finance et Investissement organise le Top 25 de l’industrie financière et le concours «Les conseillers à l’honneur!». De plus, nous produisons le Top 8 des courtiers québécois, le Pointage des régulateurs et le Top 11 des cabinets multidisciplinaires ainsi que plusieurs autres dossiers déclinés tant sur papier que sur le Web.

Lisez-nous et suivez-nous ici :

www.finance-investissement.com
www.facebook.com/financeinvestissement/
www.twitter.com/FI_Quebec

Finance et Investissement est une publication de Newcom Media Québec.

Consultez l'éthique journalistique ici : https://www.finance-investissement.com/ethique-journalistique/

Name: Africa Intelligence
Description:
Published daily, Africa Intelligence offers strategic information on the political, diplomatic, and economic affairs shaping the African continent.

------------------------------
Indigo Publications
At Indigo Publications, we are committed to independant investigative journalism with strong strategic impact, since 1981.
Our publications explore areas where access to information is limited. Our aim is to shed light on the centres of power, whether political or economic. Our publications are crafted for subscribers who value exclusivity, precision and independance.
We also publish in both French and English three trusted titles, Intelligence Online, Glitz and La Lettre.

Name: The Kyiv Independent
Description:
The Kyiv Independent is a new publication in the making, brought to you by the former editorial team of the Kyiv Post — 30 journalists and editors who were fired by the newspaper’s owner for defending editorial independence. Based in Ukraine, we provide on-the-ground English-language journalism of the highest quality.

Become a member: https://kyivindependent.com/membership/
One-time donation: https://kyivindependent.com/membership/?interval=onetime

Name: The Business Journals
Description:
The Business Journals are the leading source of local business news, data and networking in the United States.  

Follow us on social media and sign up for the Weekly Edition, Afternoon and Morning Editions, and breaking news alerts for all the latest news, business intelligence, awards and events you need to succeed in business.  

Start now by following The Business Journals on LinkedIn. 

Through print, online and face-to-face events, The Business Journals offers leaders the best avenue for making connections and the opportunity to gain a competitive edge locally, regionally and nationally. TBJ is the premier media-solutions platform for companies that target business decision-makers.

The Business Journals reach more than 10 million readers and provides them with in-depth coverage of local business communities. The loyalty of these readers is a testament to TBJ's commitment to top-quality journalism and involvement in the business community.

Bizjournals.com is the online media division of American City Business Journals, the nation’s largest publisher of metropolitan business news, operating in 45 major cities nationwide. In addition, American City operates BizEquity. This online business valuation platform helps financial professionals create more valuable relationships with business owners.

Name: Springfield Business Journal
Description: For decades, Springfield Business Journal has been the only regional publication providing comprehensive business news for southwest Missouri. SBJ.net provides a full spectrum of interactive electronic services and information, targeted newsletters, as well as daily breaking business news.

Name: tribuca.net
Description:
Hebdomadaire d'information économique et juridique des Alpes-Maritimes

Au plus près de l’actualité de notre département, avec une équipe de journalistes, menée par la rédactrice en chef Isabelle Auzias, retrouvez chaque semaine un panorama de l’activité économique et culturelle des Alpes-Maritimes. Brèves, indiscrétions, dossiers, présentation de nos entreprises, spectacles, chroniques gastronomique ou littéraire, vidéos et interviews (version numérique)

> Les annonces légales
Habilités par la Préfecture à publier des annonces légales dans les Alpes Maritimes, nous appliquons strictement le tarif légal. Les annonces peuvent être transmises par fax, mail, ou en ligne par l’intermédiaire de notre site. Nous recevons les annonces le jeudi jusqu'à 17h pour parution le vendredi. 

> Les suppléments 
- Le Palmarès des 500 premières entreprises de la Côte d’Azur. Un classement par chiffre d’affaires, ainsi que les commentaires et analyses de nos journalistes. 
- L’Annuaire des Professions Juridiques et Comptables des Alpes Maritimes. Tous nos spécialistes du droit et du chiffre, les circonscriptions des Tribunaux de Commerce, les adresses utiles… Réservé aux professionnels qui y figurent, il existe également en version numérique. 
- Les numéros spéciaux; édités à l’occasion de manifestations diverses : colloques, salon, rencontres-débat…
- La Côte d'Azur en chiffres : panorama annuel des chiffres et statistiques, analyses et perspectives par thème du tissu socio-économique de notre département.
 
> Sur notre site 
- le texte intégral des annonces et des ventes aux enchères parues dans le département, tous journaux confondus (pour nos abonnés)
- les petites annonces (emploi, immobilier…)
- les ventes de fonds de commerce
- l’annuaire des professions juridiques et comptables en ligne, mis à jour régulièrement.

> Nous satisfaisons régulièrement aux contrôles OJD et bénéficions d'un numéro de Commission Paritaire.

Name: Financial Post
Description: The Financial Post delivers all the news and analysis you need to operate in today's competitive business environment. The Post's team of reporters cut through the noise and deliver the facts you need to make the right decisions

Name: CommonWealth Magazine Group(天下雜誌集團)
Description:
「天下」取名自「天下為公」，代表對一個美好社會的嚮往與追求。1981年，《天下雜誌》創刊。從此，台灣有了一束溫暖而冷靜的聲音。當時美國與中華民國已斷交兩年，台灣被國際孤立與邊緣化，內部躁動不安。

《天下雜誌》以積極、前瞻、放眼天下的態度，試圖為台灣在世界前進的潮流中找到定位，為企業因應政經巨變找到出路，為領導人與中產階級搭起溝通橋樑，提供台灣和華文世界讀者獨立的新聞、觀點與資訊。

40多年來，《天下》始終努力在追求一個美好而公平的社會。我們關心的議題，從國家、社會延展到個人身心健康；如今，集團已開枝散葉，除了《天下雜誌》外，發展出《天下學習》、《天下雜誌出版》、《康健雜誌》、《親子天下》及《天下雜誌教育基金會》，分別在財經管理、專業學習、財經出版、健康生活、親子教育、偏鄉閱讀教育等領域，成為具有積極影響力的媒體集團。

媒體也需要與時俱進－數位轉型，一條永無止境的路

面對科技帶來的數位轉型浪潮，2015年，《天下》啟動「數位轉型元年」，編輯部大幅投入網路原生內容，推動「平網整合」的內容政策；兩年後「全閱讀」上線，推廣內容訂閱制，開啟線上新聞付費服務。

此外，隨著疫情期間資訊消費行為的轉變，更催生全新的傳播模式與工具，2019年《天下》正式進軍Podcast市場，推動一段「用耳朵讀新聞」的驚異旅程。隔年，《天下》先創下「數位營收大於紙本營收」的里程碑，2021年同時達成「數位訂戶大於紙本訂戶」、「數位營收成長大於紙本營收衰退」兩項指標。

下一階段，是思維的轉變；在使用者中心時代，傳統產品思維已不再適用。2021年《天下》成立「會員中心」，希望透過會員溝通，強化內容服務與營收。清理分散零亂的資料庫，建置統一的會員政策。因為更了解會員，我們創造了更多服務，《天下》攜手Taiwan AI Lab合作開發新聞語音朗讀服務Sky，並在2022年正式上線－主打「零碎時間，聽遍天下事」，讓網友通勤、運動、睡前都能用耳朵「讀」新聞。

不論從什麼主題出發、以什麼形式呈現，《天下雜誌》集團中的每一個品牌、每一位同仁，始終堅持初衷：推動台灣正向改變，為追求一個更好的明天而努力。

Name: Stars and Stripes
Description:
Stars and Stripes exists to provide independent news and information to the U.S. military community, comprised of active-duty servicemembers, DoD civilians, contractors, and their families. Unique among the many Department of Defense authorized news outlets, only Stars and Stripes is guaranteed First Amendment privileges that are subject to Congressional oversight.*

Stars and Stripes has published a newspaper continuously since World War II. Our unique military coverage first became available online in 1999. Today, Stars and Stripes operates as a multimedia news organization. We publish the Stars and Stripes print newspaper edition Monday through Thursday, a special Weekend Edition on Friday for Europe and Pacific, and a separate Mideast edition Friday through Sunday. In addition, we publish several weekly and monthly publications and numerous special supplements. Average daily readers number about 300,000.

Stars and Stripes maintains news bureaus in Europe, Pacific and the Middle East to provide first-hand reporting on events in those theaters. In addition to news and sports, Stars and Stripes newspapers contain all the elements of an American “hometown paper,” from "Dear Abby" to comics, horoscopes, and crossword puzzles.

Name: The Exchange Africa
Description:
The Exchange Africa is a regional newsroom headquartered in Nairobi, Kenya, with a network of journalists and contributors from across the African continent. Founded in 2015, its objective is to 

Its objective to promote a greater business, trade and investment between Africa and the worldwide community via analytical articles from writers across the globe and in particular the continent. 

By publishing a wide range of opinions, and in-depth articles, it attempts to monitor the pulse of Africa by bridging the gap between the diaspora and those wishing to gain better insight into a region that is rapidly changing. 

Our contributors write for readers who want to go beyond the headlines – readers who want to delve away from the complexities of regional politics to focus on business, investment, trade, technology and expanding relations between Africa and the world. 

The Exchange Africa seeks to educate readers of the rich continent Africa is and not of one that permeates a sense of disparity.

Name: MedTech Spectrum
Description:
Welcome to MedTech Spectrum, your exclusive media portal for the latest advancements, insights, and trends in the ever-evolving field of medical technology. As an authoritative platform dedicated to all things medtech, we strive to provide you with a comprehensive understanding of the innovative solutions shaping the future of healthcare.

In today's world, medical technology plays a pivotal role in enhancing patient care, revolutionizing diagnoses, and transforming the way healthcare professionals approach treatment. From groundbreaking surgical procedures to artificial intelligence-powered diagnostics, the medtech industry continues to push boundaries and drive remarkable advancements in patient outcomes.

At MedTech Spectrum, we recognize the crucial role that knowledge and information play in the progress of this rapidly evolving field. Our platform serves as a beacon of knowledge, offering an exclusive space for healthcare professionals, researchers, industry experts, and enthusiasts to access in-depth analyses, expert opinions, and thought-provoking articles on the latest developments in medtech.

One of the core objectives of MedTech Spectrum is to bridge the gap between innovation and implementation. While breakthrough technologies hold immense potential, their successful integration into clinical practice requires a deep understanding of the associated challenges, regulatory frameworks, and real-world implications. Our team of expert contributors includes renowned researchers, healthcare practitioners, industry leaders, and policy influencers who offer their valuable insights on these critical aspects.
Join us on this exciting journey of exploration, where the possibilities of medical technology are endless. Together, let's unlock the full potential of innovation and drive meaningful change in the healthcare landscape.

- un rythme de parution : 9 fois par an
- des newsletters via le site web : bimensuelles
- une équipe interne de 3 journalistes : Jean-Paul Roussennac, Nicolas Louis, Nicolas Aberton
- équipe externe : Yaël Haddad, Patrick Glémas
Spécificités et rubriques phares : 
- essai (machinisme espaces verts), 
- reportages et chantiers dans les entreprises et les collectivités, 
- savoirs et métiers (aide à la formation sur des sujets précis, expertise, sécurité et prévention), 
- tableau de bord (rubrique éco, analyse de chiffres), 
- vu ailleurs (des idées glanées à l'étranger),  
- nouvelles technologies 
- créations paysagères : la bouffée de créativité du magazine en matière de jardins, d'espaces verts, d'agriculture urbaine...
Nos valeurs : être à la pointe de l'info technique vérifiée, apporter à nos lecteurs une information transformable en valeur ajoutée, être accessibles et réactifs, aider à faire rencontrer les différents acteurs du marché dans nos colonnes et sur des événements.
Matériel et Paysage est le seul magazine du marché capable d'informer en duo à la fois les utilisateurs et les distributeurs, ceci grâce au magazine de la distribution Moteurs & Réseaux.
Nous sommes aussi membre fondateur organisateur et contributeur de contenu des journées professionnelles Territorium et des 24 Heures des distributeurs espaces verts .
Nous sommes également partenaire presse de nombreux salons et événements professionnels : Salonvert, Paysalia, GaLaBau, les JdC Garden Trends...

Name: El Intransigente
Description:
El Intransigente.com es verdad, objetividad y urgencia en la información. Por su alta calidad informativa, es hoy de consulta obligada y líder entre los medios digitales, contando con casi un millón y medio de fans en las redes sociales, ocupando a Marzo de 2018 el 4to puesto en medios de comunicación con más visitas en Argentina . 

Esta calidad informativa se refleja en su contenido preciso de redacción en real time, que invita al público y entiende sus opiniones como protagonistas del medio. 

De alcance nacional, el contenido de El Intransigente es tanto nacional como federal, según lo requiera la noticia: equipos de redacción online aportan velocidad en la cobertura desde distintas provincias, dando el valor agregado y diferenciador de nuestro medio.

El Intransigente tiene un compromiso indeclinable con la libertad de opinión. ¨La verdad debe contarse entera...Siempre!¨ afirma nuestro slogan y promete nuestro lema, lo que sin lugar a dudas refleja el compromiso con la información, transparentando una ética línea editorial que escolta el precepto constitucional de ¨publicar las ideas sin censura previa¨
Location: Buenos Aires, City of Buenos Aires

Name: Diary Times
Description: www.diarytimes.com founded in 2019 is India’s leading English News Portal with the aim of reaching millions of Indians in India and significantly worldwide Indian Diaspora who are eager to stay in touch with India based news and stories in varied contents presented in an eye pleasing design format. It has taken a prominent position in the web market and quickly progressing to capture the top slot. We also remain clung to the tree of journalistic ethics by serving the fresh news on the platter of absolute authenticity and our comments stand only as a guard so that all the users of our portal do not carried away from the truth.

Name: Jornal O Presente Rural
Description:
Empresa com 20 anos de experiência na área de comunicação e marketing.
Possui 2 produtos distintos, um é O Presente Rural, um jornal de circulação nacional em 9 estados, sendo eles, Rio Grande do Sul, Santa Catarina, Paraná, Matos Grosso do Sul, Mato Grosso, Minas Gerais, Bahia, Espírito Santo e Goiás.
Este jornal tem circulação junto a cooperativas e seus associados, fazendas, granjas, produtores de aves, suínos, grãos e bovinos, integradoras e seus integrados, técnicos, profissionais do setor, assinantes em geral.
As edições do O Presente Rural tem circulação mensal, obedecendo uma alternância, sendo um mês de aves, outro de suínos e peixes e em outro mês de bovinos, grãos e máquinas.
O outro produto é o jornal O Presente, com circulação regional em 26 municípios no oeste do Paraná. 
Este possuí circulação diária junto as classes A, B e C.

Name: Sudinfo
Description:
Sudinfo est une société de communication leader en Wallonie et à Bruxelles faisant partie du Groupe Rossel, le plus grand groupe de presse en Belgique francophone.

Sudpresse s'appuie sur des marques régionales fortes et uniques: La Meuse, La Nouvelle Gazette, La Province, Nord Eclair et La Capitale. Nous sommes fiers de notre positionnement qui se veut populaire et régional.

Nous récoltons, préparons et servons de l'information utile à la vie quotidienne sur tous les canaux et supports (papier, web, mobile, iPhone, ...). Nous développons la qualité de nos équipes (300 membres du personnel dont 150 journalistes, ainsi qu'un réseau de 500 collaborateurs externes) et de nos produits. Nous formons continuellement le personnel afin d'augmenter le professionnalisme et la performance de nos services et produits.

Nous créons notre avenir en innovant sans cesse.

Nous garantissons par cette dynamique la rentabilité et la pérennité de notre entreprise.

Pierre Leerschool
Directeur Général

Name: Acteurs du franco-allemand
Description:
Created by Sylvain ETAIX in 2017, Acteurs du franco-allemand is an independent media 100% business, 100% Franco-German !

Its DNA:
▸ A strategic market intelligence for economic decision-makers in both countries.
▸ A mix of languages in the articles: a bridge between the two cultures
▸ A slow media: all the business news delivered once a month on a platter!

Acteurs du franco-allemand is a ‘slow media’ offering its readers a relevant selection of the most important news relating to Franco-German political and economic issues. Fighting infobesity means providing quality information and giving readers the time they need to think, to avoid giving in to the influence of fake news and news overload. To achieve this, the selection of sources is essential, as the information disseminated must be relevant, impartial and accurate. Acteurs du franco-allemand is an independent media with unbiased editorial freedom. Our aim is to provide comprehensive and balanced coverage of Franco-German issues, whether regional or international.

Acteurs du franco-allemand aims to be a genuine bridge between German and French culture, and its unique editorial line makes it a strategic intelligence tool for Franco-German decision-makers. Articles and other publications are fully bilingual, written in both French and German. Both languages are present on all editions.


Want to find out more? Contact us

 www.afa-info.com
 contact@acteursdufrancoallemand.com
 +33(0)9 83 78 59 70
 +33(0)6 67 33 86 41

Name: Le Périscope
Description: Le Périscope est un média qui couvre tous le Sud Alsace et a pour but de mettre en valeur les entreprises du secteur et l'économie locale. Véritable outil B to B, il existe depuis 10 ans maintenant et comporte un journal web, un bimestriel de 16 pages diffusé à 15 000 exemplaires, une chaîne Vimeo et des événements business organisés par Le Périscope et les entreprises qui le souhaitent du nom d'Apériscope. Ainsi, le journal rend compte des réalisations et projets des entreprises d'Alsace, milite pour le business de proximité, la préférence locale et crée du lien. Pour en savoir plus, rendez-vous sur notre site : www.le-periscope.info.

Name: Yogonet International
Description: Founded in 2002, YOGONET is the most respected B2B online newspaper in the global Gambling Industry. On its International, LatAm and Brasil editions, it brings all the information related to this industry.

Name: Expression Cosmétique Magazine
Description: EXPRESSION COSMÉTIQUE is the bilingual French-English trade magazine for all professionals in the cosmetics and perfumery industry offering information organized in three main topics: Development, innovation and production.

Name: LE RURAL OFFICIEL
Description:
LE RURAL est une agence de communication, de publicité et de marketing. Elle est située à Abomey-Calavi, non loin du supermarché du Pont à Zopah. Elle apporte son savoir-faire en communication aux entreprises publiques, privées et aux Organismes nationaux et internationaux conduisant des projets agricoles au Bénin.

Le Rural est aussi  une presse thématique fortement ancrée dans la communication pour le secteur agricole. À ce titre, elle collabore depuis sa création avec les structures (OPA, ONG, PTFs, Institutions, Entreprises, etc.) intervenants dans le secteur agricole tant au Bénin que dans la sous-région. LE RURAL édite depuis quatre (04) ans un journal du même nom, tiré à 500 copies par semaine et accessible en version papier et en ligne (Facebook : Le Rural Officiel, Twitter (X), WhatsApp) et sur son site internet (lerural.bj)

LE RURAL dispose également d'une web TV (LE RURAL BÉNIN TV) et nous produisons aussi une palette d'émissions très enrichissantes.

Name: Pakistan Observer
Description:
Daily Pakistan Observer 
"Eyes and Ears of Pakistan - Widely Read & Trusted Daily"

Products
Daily Newspaper, Weekly Magazine

The Pakistan Observer is one of the oldest and widely read English-language daily newspaper of Pakistan. Published in six cities, Islamabad, Karachi, Lahore, Quetta, Peshawar and Muzzafarabad. The newspaper was founded in 1988 by the veteran journalist late Zahid Malik.

Name: International Federation of Journalists
Description:
There can be no press freedom if journalists exist in conditions of corruption, poverty or fear.

The International Federation of Journalists is the global voice of journalists. Founded in 1926, it is the world’s largest organisation of journalists, representing 600,000 media professionals in 187 unions and associations in more than 140 countries.

Name: Winnipeg Free Press
Description:
The Winnipeg Free Press is an award-winning daily local newspaper serving Winnipeg and surrounding areas in Manitoba, Canada. Founded in 1872, the Free Press is the province's leading source of news, information and debate about local matters and ideas, as well as Manitoba’s voice on national and international issues.

Learn about our subscription offers: 
https://www.winnipegfreepress.com/subscribe/

Sign up for a free newsletter: https://account.winnipegfreepress.com/email-alerts

Explore our apps:
• NEWS BREAK app (Best Use winner, Mobile category, INMA’s 88th annual World Congress, 2018) https://www.winnipegfreepress.com/news-break
• WFP-E app (Electronic replica of the Winnipeg Free Press print edition). https://www.winnipegfreepress.com/e-edition

Name: The journal of management sciences
Description: Since 1965, La Revue des Sciences de Gestion (from its first title Management & Business Management) aims to provide a forum for original and innovative research in management. Without limiting itself to a theme, without disciplinary exclusivity, without methodological bias, The RSG is an independent, international, generalist and innovative journal.

Name: Petites Affiches Matot Braine
Description:
Matot Braine est un hebdomadaire d’information économique et juridique dont le siège se trouve à Reims. 

Créé en 1892, le journal est habilité à la publication des annonces judiciaires et légales dans la Marne, les Ardennes, l’Aube et l'Aisne. Il fait partie du groupe ForumEco.

Name: Fort Worth Star-Telegram
Description:
The Fort Worth Star was founded in 1906 and merged with the Fort Worth Telegram in 1909 to become the Fort Worth Star-Telegram. 

McClatchy acquired the newspaper in 2006 with its acquisition of Knight Ridder.
The newspaper bears a rich and colorful legacy tied to the Old West. 

Its founding publisher, Amon G. Carter Sr., was a renowned booster of Fort Worth and West Texas

Name: akutahu
Description:
Kami adalah tim yang terdiri dari orang-orang dengan berbagai latar belakang namun memiliki visi yang sama yaitu menyajikan bacaan yang positif, mencerdaskan dan mencerahkan.


akutahu.com sebagai social enterprise mempunyai tujuan memberi inspirasi dan mencerdaskan bangsa. Mengangkat bahasan berita trending dengan ulasan sudut pandang yang edukatif dan inspiratif

akutahu.com hadir sebagai solusi modern mengatasi banjir informasi di berbagai media konvensional maupun online. Dengan menyajikan tayangan dengan pilihan-pilihan berita utama yang positif dikemas dengan bahasa lugas, ringkas dan analisa serta ilustrasi yang menarik di genggaman.

Name: LGPD News
Description:
Somos um website focado em notícias relacionadas a privacidade, proteção de dados pessoais e compliance. Apresentamos informações relacionadas a Lei Geral de Proteção de Dados (LGPD) e com GDPR.

#lgpd #gdpr #dataprivacy #dataprotection #privacy #cybersecurity

Name: Eventeffect
Description: Eventeffect är den nya branschtidningen som vänder sig till alla som arbetar med att arrangera event, konferenser och seminarier i Sverige. På sajten varvas de senaste nyheterna med inspirerande karriärartiklar inom eventbranschen.

Name: Cuidados de Saúde Integrados
Description:
Distribuído a profissionais de saúde, gestores e administradores de unidades dos cuidados primários e hospitais de todo o país, o Jornal Médico dos Cuidados de Saúde Integrados promove e incentiva a uma partilha transversal de boas práticas, iniciativas, projetos inovadores e processos de melhoria contínua implementados por profissionais das mais diversas áreas.

De periodicidade mensal, apresenta um conteúdo altamente diferenciador e tem um impacto único entre os intervenientes do ecossistema da saúde em Portugal.

Resulta da articulação do Hospital Público e do Jornal Médico dos Cuidados de Saúde Primários.

Name: HZ Banking
Description:
Mit HZ Banking sind Sie immer einen Schritt voraus. Wir liefern Ihnen die Hintergründe zu Themen und Trends, die die Schweizer Bankenszene bewegen. Die Chefredaktion der Handelszeitung und hochkarätige Persönlichkeiten aus der Bankenwelt kommentieren das Finanzgeschehen.

Alle Banking-Infos in Ihrem persönlichen Mail-Postfach? Jetzt den Newsletter abonnieren:

Name: Fintech.ca
Description:
Fintech.ca is Canada’s go-to platform for tracking the intersection of finance and technology. With a growing community of over 4,000 followers, we deliver timely, expert coverage of Canada’s dynamic fintech landscape—from emerging startups and digital payments to AI-powered financial services and crypto innovation.

Our focus:
 In‑depth insights into the trends reshaping Canada’s financial technology sector—from open banking and regulatory change to blockchain and embedded.
 Exclusive interviews and thought‑leader commentary from the innovators building the next wave of fintech solutions.
 Curated updates on events, partnerships, and ecosystem activity that define the Canadian fintech journey.
 A trusted source for professionals—from founders and investors to developers and regulators—who want to stay ahead in Canada’s fintech transformation.

Why follow us:
- Stay connected to Canada’s financial-technology pulse—fast, comprehensive, and expert-curated.
- Gain access to thought-provoking analysis that helps you make informed decisions in payments, lending, crypto, AI finance, and more.
- Join a community shaping the future of Canadian financial services and innovation.

Name: Americas Quarterly
Description:
Americas Quarterly  is the leading publication dedicated to politics, business and culture in the Americas.

An award-winning magazine and website, AQ has a proud tradition of portraying the real Latin America, while working to promote its core values: democracy, inclusive economic growth and equal rights for all of the hemisphere’s nearly 1 billion citizens.

Borrowing elements from The Economist, Foreign Affairs and National Geographic – but with a focus on Latin America – AQ is dedicated to covering the region in all its diversity and promise. Launched in 2007 and based in New York City, AQ is an independent publication of Americas Society/Council of the Americas, which for more than 50 years have been dedicated to dialogue in our hemisphere.

AQ's agenda-setting readership includes CEOs, senior government officials and thought leaders, as well as a general-interest audience passionate about the Americas.

Name: Finyear
Description:
À propos de Finyear :
Finyear est le média pionnier du WEB3 faisant la synthèse entre TradFi& DeFi, entre Finance Traditionnelle & Finance Décentralisée. 
Créée en 2005 sous la forme d'une lettre professionnelle, la plateforme on-line a été rachetée par le groupe Calmon Partners en 2021 pour se décliner autour de trois verticales à forte valeur ajoutée : les Fintechs, Le WEB3 et les informations structurantes du Corporate Finance.  
Hébergeant le fil d'offres d'emploi du cabinet de chasse spécialisé dans la finance, Calmon Partners Executive Search, le site dépasse aujourd'hui +2 millions de pages vues par mois et compte plus de 10 000 abonnés à sa newsletter.  
www.finyear.com 

À propos de Calmon Partners :
Lancé en 2020 au travers de la marque Calmon Partners Executive Search, l’activité de Recrutement spécialisée dans les métiers de l’investissement s’est structurée grâce à la réalisation de mandats en France et à l’international pour des Fonds d’Investissement, des Banques, des Family Offices ainsi que des Fintech.
Le groupe s’étoffe en 2021 grâce au lancement de Calmon Partners Financial Services, activité de Conseil et d’Accompagnement à la Levée de Fonds pour les Start Ups.
Calmon Partners Media & Events vient compléter l’offre du groupe en offrant une plateforme en ligne afin de relayer les opérations réalisées par le groupe.
www.calmonpartners.com

Name: Focus Poder
Description: O Focus.jor é editado pelo jornalista FÁBIO CAMPOS, graduado pela Universidade Federal do Ceará (UFC), foi repórter de política e articulista do OPOVO, o mais tradicional veículo de jornalismo impresso do Ceará, onde editou a Coluna Política por 14 anos (1996-2010) e a Coluna Fabio Campos por sete anos (2010-2017). Também foi editorialista do mesmo veículo entre 2013 e 2017. Concomitantemente às funções no jornal, editou o Anuário do Ceará por 15 anos, modernizando o conteúdo e o projeto gráfico da prestigiada publicação. Apresentou o programa Jogo Político na TV OPOVO por 12 anos, ancorou o programa Contraponto na TV Cidade (Record), comentou política na TV Jangadeiro (SBT) e na rádio OPOVO/CBN. Em agosto de 2017 iniciou a startup Focus.jor.

Name: The Sunday Times Ireland
Description:
The Ireland edition of The Sunday Times is in print and online on Sundays. Enjoy our award-winning journalism and keep up to date with unrivalled Irish analysis on News, business, sport and culture.

Subscribe to get full access on thesundaytimes.ie/join

Name: Editions Larivière
Description:
Editions Larivière est un groupe média français créé en 1968. S’il fallait trouver un dénominateur commun à toutes les activités regroupées au sein des Editions Larivière, la passion s’imposerait comme maître mot. Qu’il s’agisse de moto, de bateau, de vélo, de musique, de chasse, d’équitation et bien d’autres domaines, le succès du groupe repose sur le portefeuille complet de produits thématiques qu’il propose : magazines, hors-séries, livres, guides, sites internet, applications, événements, voyages.
Par des passionnés pour des passionnés, c’est la recette du succès de ses magazines et événements qui requièrent de la part de toutes les équipes une connaissance parfaite de ces domaines spécialisés, une motivation et un savoir-faire qu’il faut saluer.
Dans un secteur en pleine mutation, les Editions Larivière ne cessent de se développer en explorant de nouveaux territoires de passionnés et ont adopté depuis plusieurs années une politique de développement des marques sur l’ensemble des supports digitaux, avec l’exigence de répondre au mieux aux besoins de ses lecteurs.

Nos marques: 
Moto Revue, Moto Journal, Moto Verte, Bol d'Or, Super Cross, Rock&Folk, Gazoline, Cheval Magazine, Le Fana de l'Aviation, Le Cycle, Voile Magazine, Moteur Boat, Le Monde du Camping-car, Connaissance de la Chasse, Game Fair...

Name: Market Research News24
Description:
We provide comprehensive coverage of emerging technologies, startups, and entrepreneurial success stories, offering a window into the dynamic world of business innovation and disruption.

Dedicated to corporate strategy, leadership, and management, we offer stories on leadership trends, success stories, and business best practices, assisting professionals in enhancing their corporate acumen.

Description: Principal revista automóvel mensal de Portugal, a Turbo conta com mais de 35 anos de experiência. Além dos mais completos testes e comparativos que apresentamos mensalmente nas páginas da edição impressa, também trazemos as maiores novidades do mundo automóvel aos nossos leitores através do nosso site. Turbo - Para quem gosta de automóveis

Name: Les Jours
Description:
Les Jours (www.lesjours.fr), c’est un nouveau site d’information en ligne qui fait le choix du payant et de la qualité au cœur de l’actualité Les Jours se déclinent en obsessions journalistiques, mises en scène de façon haletante et addictive à la manière d’une série télé.

http://abonnes.lemonde.fr/actualite-medias/article/2016/02/01/l-aube-va-se-lever-tres-vite-sur-les-jours_4856981_3236.html

Name: NOZ/mh:n MEDIEN
Description:
Innovative Ideen in einem Start-up-Umfeld umsetzen und gleichzeitig Teil einer großen traditionellen Mediengruppe sein? Bei uns sind Zeitgeist und Tradition keine Gegensätze. In unserer Mediengruppe NOZ/mh:n MEDIEN ergänzen sie sich perfekt. Mit mehr als 50 Unternehmen sind wir an rund 60 Standorten größtenteils in den Bundesländern Niedersachsen, Schleswig-Holstein, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Hamburg und Brandenburg vertreten. Einzelne Standorte finden sich aber auch von Bremen über Köln bis nach München. 

Eines liegt auf der Hand: Unsere journalistischen Publikationen sind das Rückgrat unserer Mediengruppe – ob gedruckt auf dem Papier, als App oder zum Hören. Qualitätsjournalismus ist für uns ein hohes Gut und Glaubwürdigkeit ist dabei essenziell. Der Zeitungsverlag als etabliertes Geschäftsmodell gibt uns Sicherheit und damit die Möglichkeit, neue Wege zu gehen sowie unsere Produkte und Angebote stetig weiterzuentwickeln. Ob Online-Marketing-Agentur, Reiseveranstalter oder Europas führender Online-Pferdemarkt, bei uns gibt es Expert:innen auch jenseits des klassischen Zeitungsgeschäftes. 

Du willst mehr über deine Karrierechancen bei uns erfahren? Schau rein unter: https://karriere.noz-mhn.de/

Impressum: www.noz-mhn.de/impressum/

Name: The Royal Gazette Limited
Description:
Founded in 1828, The Royal Gazette is Bermuda's only daily newspaper, publishing every day except Sunday and public holidays. With daily circulation of more than 16,000 copies, the newspaper reaches more than 90 percent of the adult market.
The Royal Gazette aims to cover the whole community fairly and accurately ands to act as an independent voice. It is not affiliated with any political party.
Each day, The Royal Gazette produces the following sections: Local news, Overseas news, Sport, Business, Lifestyle and Opinion. In addition, the newspaper produces weekly sections on Body and Soul (Tuesday), Personal Technology and Shipping (Wednesday) Youth (Thursday), Personal Finance, Religion and Weekender (Saturday). The Royal Gazette also publishes two magazines: RG Magazine, a general interest colour supplement, and Bottom Line, a business magazine. These award-winning magazines come out in alternative months through the year.
The Royal Gazette is owned by The Bermuda Press (Holdings) Ltd., which in addition to owning the Island's leading media group, also owns Bermuda Press Ltd., the leading commercial printer in Bermuda, office supplies companies and real estate. 
The Royal Gazette is located at 2 Par-la-Ville Road, Hamilton HM-08, Bermuda. 
Mailing address: PO Box HM1025, Hamilton HMDX, Bermuda.

Name: The Austin Chronicle
Description:
The Austin Chronicle celebrates over 40 years as Austin’s independent news source, covering music, film, arts, food, and politics with 600,000 readers per week in the greater Austin metropolitan area. The Chronicle is the eloquent and incisive voice of the city, expressing the community’s political and environmental concerns and supporting its active cultural scene. The Austin Chronicle is available at over 1,800 locations every Thursday. 

Advertising options include print and digital packages, event sponsorships, and premium marketing opportunities. 

For more information and coverage, visit austinchronicle.com.

Name: Poslovne novine
Description: Poslovne novine u 2024. godini obilježavaju: 37. izbor 100 najvećih kompanija u BiH i 51 godina tradicije poslovanja.

Name: ICTjournal
Description:
ICTjournal est un média suisse francophone dédié à l'utilisation des technologies de l'information dans et par les entreprises.

Nos lecteurs sont pour l'essentiel des décideurs IT d'entreprises suisses romandes de toutes tailles et de tous secteurs. Notre plateforme est composée d’un magazine mensuel et d’un site web qui proposent des contenus actuels et variés, des interviews, ainsi que des articles et dossiers de fond sur l’IT d’entreprise sous un angle business.

Plus d’informations sur www.ictjournal.ch

Name: Ziarul BURSA
Description:
De peste 20 de ani pe piaţă, cotidianul BURSA este, în prezent, cel mai
influent cotidian economico-financiar şi formatorul de opinie al pieţei
de capital.

Valorile care ne animă: Adevărul, Justeţea, Corectitudinea, Profesionalismul, Nesupunerea.

Name: Albuquerque Journal
Description: The Albuquerque Journal is New Mexico’s leading news source. For over 120 years, we have proudly served our readers as a locally owned and operated company. As the largest daily newspaper, we deliver copies statewide, reaching people across the Land of Enchantment. The Journal offers a variety of products in print, digital and online at ABQJournal.com. Readers can also access our award-winning, in-depth journalism and get breaking news alerts through our apps.

Name: The Des Moines Register
Description:
With a rich history that stretches back through the decades, The Des Moines Register stands as a venerable source of information and current news for the heart of Iowa. Since its founding, our commitment has transcended the mere delivery of news; we've been a pillar of support for our communities while steadfastly supplying news in both the traditional print medium and the dynamic digital realm.

Our legacy is interwoven with the story of Iowa itself, and we take pride in our role as a conduit for knowledge and community connection. As the state's premier source of information, we've been honored to serve and empower the residents and businesses of Iowa.

Recognizing the ever-evolving landscape of information dissemination, The Des Moines Register has embraced digital transformation while maintaining our commitment to quality journalism. Our online presence extends our reach and ensures seamless accessibility for our diverse audience.

Our dedication to community extends to the business sphere, as we offer a diverse array of products to local and national retailers, helping them thrive and grow in the vibrant state of Iowa.

We acknowledge that every individual and business has a unique story and distinct aspirations. This understanding fuels our ability to craft tailored solutions that align precisely with your objectives. Our seasoned team is poised to guide you from concept to realization, ensuring your initiatives not only resonate but also make a meaningful impact.

As Iowa thrives, so does The Des Moines Register, standing as a sentinel of understanding and connection. With a dedicated team of reporters and a wealth of resources, we're committed to sharing stories, insights, and knowledge, fostering community engagement, and fueling business growth. Join us on this journey of exploration and enrichment at The Des Moines Register.

Name: ITforBusiness
Description:
IT for Business : Stratégies et management du numérique 

Chaque mois, IT for Business s’adresse aux directeurs des systèmes d’information, ainsi qu’aux directions générales et aux directions métier en prise avec les défis du numérique.

Comment ont-ils fait ? Quelles sont les évolutions technologiques à surveiller ? Quelles sont les meilleures pratiques en matière de conduite du changement ? Quelle est la stratégie à adopter face au cloud computing ?

Chaque mois, retrouvez l’essentiel de l’actualité de l’écosystème IT, nos interviews, nos dossiers, enquêtes, portraits, ainsi que les retours d’expériences de vos pairs.

Et pour une information au quotidien, ayez le réflexe www.itforbusiness.fr

Name: Badische Zeitung
Description:
Die Badische Zeitung ist größte Tageszeitung Badens. Mit ihren digitalen Produkten erreicht die BZ monatlich bis zu zwei Millionen Menschen.

Name: LE MAINE LIBRE

 Fenêtre sur la ville, c’est le nom de l’association qui a permis au “Papotin” de voir le jour. Ce nom n’est pas anodin. C’est par la fenêtre qu’on regarde le monde, qu’on laisse passer l’air, qu’on respire.

ABOUT US
Nine O’Clock: Trustful partner for 32 years!
Nine O’Clock was the first exclusively daily publication to appear in English language in Romania. The first issue of the Nine O’Clock newspaper came out 30 years ago. On October 9, 1991 a group of foreign-policy Romanian journalists came up with the initiative to release, for the first time in Romania’s history, a publication solely in English.

Ever since the first issue, Nine O’Clock has adopted the position to always respect its readers by offering real and unbiased information about all aspects of life in Romania, and the world.

The choice of the Nine O’Clock brand name reflects the basic idea that the newspaper is read daily at 9 a.m. by readers ranging from diplomats and business people, to a distinctive array of other Romanian and foreign readers.

For 32 years since its inception, Nine O’Clock has strictly followed the principle of loyalty to its readers.
Fair and balanced reporting, appreciation and respect for our readers

We would have never grown to this stage and age without the loyal interest of our readership, thereby proving that we have an essential media niche in both today’s Romania and the European Union.

This compels us to remain faithful to the principles assumed at the beginning of our journey in 1991: Fair and balanced reporting, appreciation and respect for our readers.

Currently, Nine O’Clock is a dependable interface between Romania, Europe, and the rest of the world. This is not only our belief, but also what our readers are saying, through their many complimentary messages and suggestions, from not only within Romania, but various other countries of the world.

Name: Epsiloon
Description:
« Le monde, c’est la science qui en parle le mieux »

Epsiloon, c’est quoi ?
Un magazine qui raconte l’actualité sous l’angle de la science. 
Notre conviction : la science offre un point de vue plus concernant, clairement plus précis, absolument plus questionnant, assurément plus radical, et même étonnamment plus drôle sur le monde et la société.
C’est aussi chaque mois des dizaines de chercheurs interrogés, des centaines de publications épluchées. Et toutes nos sources mises à votre disposition sur notre site.

Epsiloon, c’est qui ?
Une équipe de journaliste professionnels. Curieux, tenaces, passionnés, obsessionnels. Avec chacun nos spécialités, nos lubies: des réseaux de neurones aux choux, des vides cosmiques au poulpe (sans oublier le tardigrade). Et bien sûr Elon Musk, les forêts, les voitures volantes, les trous noirs…

Nos valeurs
Epsiloon est un magazine qui vit essentiellement grâce à ses lecteurs. Nos bénéfices proviennent à 95% de la vente de nos numéros. Notre modèle économique repose sur quelques pages de publicité, mais nous affichons fièrement une totale indépendance: aucun contenu éditorial ne peut être inspiré, contrôlé ou même influencé par un annonceur… Jamais nous ne ferons commerce de votre opinion.
Vous pouvez consulter notre charte sur notre site.

L’histoire d’Epsiloon
Tout commence par une rencontre : celle de 11 journalistes partis d’un grand titre pour défendre leurs valeurs, et d’un éditeur amoureux de la science, Emmanuel Mounier. Germe alors l’idée d’inventer un nouveau genre de magazine d’actualité, qui raconte le monde sous l’angle de la science. En mettant au cœur du projet l’exigence journalistique. 

Une campagne Ulule record, avec plus de 24000 abonnés fondateurs qui soutiennent le projet, un lancement réussi en kiosque en juin 2021, une reconnaissance du métier (Epsiloon gagne dès sa sortie le Grand Prix du journalisme Michèle Léridon), une série de podcasts réussie avec Audible…
Et aujourd’hui, l’aventure continue !

Name: tio/20minuti
Description:
TicinOnline SA è stata fondata nell'Ottobre del 1997. L’obiettivo primario della società è quello di offrire una gamma di proposte e servizi per una presenza importante nella Svizzera italiana nell’ambito Internet. Dalla propria nascita, la presenza sul territorio s'è sempre più consolidata con un'offerta web completa e in linea con le esigenze dell'utenza. Dalle news regionali agli approfondimenti con temi di cronaca e sociali, da servizi di intrattenimento a offerte e-commerce, dopo nove anni di attività, ticinOnline ha raggiunto un consolidamento di utenza molto importante con circa 125'000 utenti diversi al mese, 1 milione di visite e oltre 4 milioni di pagine web consultate. Non da meno, è uno dei portali svizzeri che si posiziona nei primissimi posti in termini di tempo di permanenza degli utenti on line con quasi 13 minuti di media, dato che conferma l’importante rapporto di fedeltà dei lettori.
Verso la fine del 2002, consolidando sempre più la divisione informatica con prodotti ad alto livello tecnologico e una clientela nazionale, nasce una divisione interna specializzata in progetti di e-business: Tio Web Services.
Impostasi fin dagli inizi sul mercato nazionale con un servizio di e-paper per la lettura dei giornali tradizionali su Internet, in questi anni TioWebServices ha acquisito i più importanti gruppi editoriali svizzeri con un portafoglio attuale di oltre 40 titoli, tra quotidiani e periodici, in service.

Description:
We are at the intersection of what matters
- To the local communities we serve.
- To the national conversation we inform.
- To the employees we invest in.
- To the advertisers whose results we deliver.

Today, Hearst Newspapers (HNP) employs over 2,500+ employees and encompasses more than 75 brands across a national network, with an unparalleled commitment to the communities we serve.

Our comprehensive portfolio of modern local and regional brands, services, and solutions redefines what ‘local news’ means and how it connects communities across the country. It is our mission to be the most trusted, most respected and most accurate source of news and information in the communities that we serve. With a legacy rooted in quality and a mission to inform, The Arizona Republic continues to uphold its reputation. Since 2000, our journey has been entwined with the Gannett newspaper chain, bolstering our ability to deliver trusted content and meaningful connections.

We understand that each person and business holds a distinct narrative and aspirations. This knowledge fuels our proficiency in customizing solutions that align precisely with your objectives. Our accomplished team is poised to accompany you from idea to execution, ensuring your endeavors make a lasting impact.

As the sun shines over Phoenix, so does The Arizona Republic, casting light on issues of significance and fostering a sense of unity. With a dedicated group of reporters and a treasure trove of resources, we're committed to sharing Arizona's stories and nurturing community engagement. Join us on this journey of knowledge and connection at The Arizona Republic.

Name: Kaizen, média de solutions écologiques et sociales
Description: L’humanité vit des heures décisives : dérèglements climatiques, épuisement des terres arables, disparition en masse des espèces et pollutions généralisées, crises économiques, sociales, financières. Et plus grave encore : abandon de l’être humain. Face à ce constat nous aurions toutes les raisons du monde de désespérer et pourtant, silencieusement, un nouveau monde est en marche : intelligent, sobre, mettant au premier rang de ses priorités l’épanouissement de la Vie sur notre planète. C’est à ce monde que nous choisissons de donner la parole, à ces personnes qui portent les (r)évolutions que nous attendons, courageusement… A ces initiatives pionnières qui, par leur simplicité et leur bon sens, nous offrent de nouveaux horizons, de véritables raisons de croire en l’avenir. Plus que tout, nous croyons qu’il ne peut y avoir de réelle métamorphose de nos sociétés sans un profond changement de ceux qui la constituent : NOUS.

Name: LaPresse SpA
Description:
Nasce nel 1994 su iniziativa di Marco Durante, ancora oggi Presidente, e del fratello Massimo. Inizialmente agenzia fotografica, fondata in seguito all’acquisizione degli archivi Publifoto Torino, LaPresse S.p.A. cresce nel tempo diversificando la propria attività. Al fotoreporting affianca negli anni servizi di videogiornalismo, agenzia di stampa, Celebrity Management e produzioni televisive. Nel 2015 LaPresse S.p.A. acquisisce AGR (Agenzia Giornalistica Radiotelevisiva) e l'agenzia AGA (Agenzia Giornali Associati). L’agenzia cresce anche all’estero: nel 2017 sigla un accordo pluriennale con l'agenzia di stampa francese Agence France-Presse per la distribuzione in Italia di testi, foto e video nel triennio 2018-2020. L’anno seguente acquisisce il ramo d’azienda fotogiornalistico, giornalistico, cineteleaudiovisivo e fotografico di Olycom. Il 18 febbraio 2019 sottoscrive un accordo di partnership quinquennale con Associated Press per distribuirne testi, foto e video in Italia.

LaPresse S.p.A. was founded on the initiative of Marco Durante, still President today, and his brother Massimo. Initially born as a photographic agency through the acquisition of the archives of Publifoto Torino, LaPresse S.p.A. has developed over time by diversifying its activities. In addition to photo reporting activities, over time video news, press agency, celebrity management and television productions were introduced. In 2015 LaPresse S.p.A. acquired AGR and A.G.A. (Agenzia Giornali Associati). The agency continued to grow also abroad: in 2017 it concluded a multi-year partnership agreement with Agence France-Presse to distribute text stories, photos and videos in Italy in the period 2018-2020. In 2018 it acquired the photojournalistic, journalistic, film, audiovisual and photographic branches of Olycom. On February 18, 2019 it concluded a five-year partnership agreement with Associated Press to distribute text stories, photos and videos in Italy.

Seit über 120 Jahren sind wir fest in der Medienlandschaft etabliert und bieten maßgeschneiderte Kommunikationslösungen aus einer Hand. Entdecken Sie die vielfältigen Möglichkeiten, die wir für Ihren Werbeerfolg bereithalten!

Als Marktführer in der südlichen Region Österreichs tragen wir eine besondere gesellschaftliche Verantwortung für die Menschen in unserer Region. Bereits bei unserer Gründung war es unser erklärtes Ziel, die Region durch unabhängige Berichterstattung, sorgfältig recherchierte Inhalte und verlässliche Nachrichten voranzubringen.

Auch heute ist es unser Anspruch, Menschen zu erreichen, die ein echtes Interesse an der Steiermark und an Kärnten haben und die gemeinsam mit uns die Region gestalten wollen. Konstruktiv, optimistisch, inspirierend.

Name: L'Activité Piscine Magazine
Description:
Aider les pisciniers d’aujourd’hui à relever les défis de demain !
Lancé en novembre 1998, L’Activité Piscine est depuis sa création le magazine de référence des métiers de la piscine et du spa.
Adressé gratuitement tous les 2 mois à plus de 5 500 professionnels, L’Activité Piscine les accompagne en leur proposant toutes les clés pour encore mieux comprendre un métier en pleine mutation et relever ainsi les défis de demain.

Name: The Continent News
Description: The Continent is an award-winning pan-African weekly, designed to be read and shared on messaging apps. Get it on WhatsApp or Signal using +27 73 805 6068. Alternatively, email read@thecontinent.org to subscribe.

Name: Girişimci Gazetesi
Description: Girişimci Ekosisteminden girişimciler ve girişimci olmak isteyenler için faydalı yazılar, makale ve haberler yayınlıyoruz.

Name: Correio do Povo
Description:
Correio do Povo: Informação que conecta pessoas, negócios e o futuro.
Somos um dos veículos de comunicação mais tradicionais do Brasil, com jornalismo independente, inovação constante e compromisso com a sociedade. Aqui no LinkedIn, compartilhamos conteúdos sobre economia, negócios, política, cultura, tecnologia, esporte e tendências que impactam o país.

Também abrimos espaço para projetos, iniciativas internas, oportunidades de carreira e bastidores que refletem nosso propósito: informar com credibilidade e evoluir com a comunidade que nos acompanha.

Quer trabalhar conosco?
Envie seu currículo para: rh@correiodopovo.com.br / talentos@correiodopovo.com.br

Acompanhe nossas plataformas:
facebook.com/correiodopovo
youtube.com/correiodopovo2009
instagram.com/correiodopovo
Location: Porto Alegre, Rio Grande do Sul

Name: HealthTalk
Description:
HealthTalk er en uavhengig nettavis med nyheter, analyser og debatt om helsebransjen. Vi lager innhold om; Legemidler, bioteknologi, Digital helse, medtek, helsetjenester og politikk.

Healthtalk er medlem av Fagpressen.  Ansvarlig redaktør er Hans Anderssen.

Redaksjonell plattform: HealthTalk skal tilstrebe en kritisk, seriøs og informativ journalistikk, i tråd med den frie pressens idealer. 

HealthTalk skal være informativ, nyttig og engasjerende for målgruppen. Saklighets- og vesentlighetsprinsippet skal ligge til grunn. Det er et mål å sette dagsorden i samfunnsdebatten.

HealthTalk ble etablert 20. februar 2019.

Name: Herald Sun
Description:
The Herald Sun is Victoria’s home for breaking news, footy and hard-hitting opinion and holds the title of most read Newspaper in Australia.

Melbourne’s biggest selling newspaper has a proud history of leading the agenda and advocating for Victorians. As a leading partner with the Good Friday Appeal, we believe strongly in our community.

As the home of Australia’s No.1 fantasy footy game SuperCoach and the best AFL writers in the business, we share a deep passion for footy.

The Herald Sun publishes seven days a week, with a bumper Sunday Herald Sun edition on Sundays, and breaks stories 24/7 across its digital channels – from mobile to tablet, desktop to social media.

We reach 4m people in print and digital every month* with an additional audience across social media of more than 1 million.
Every week the Herald Sun reaches a dedicated audience bigger than the television coverage of the Melbourne Cup, AFL Grand Final or Australian Open men’s or women’s finals.

Our expanding digital suite of products includes www.heraldsun.com.au, the Herald Sun mobile and tablet apps, SuperCoach AFL fantasy game, SuperFan AFL app, daily email newsletters and app alerts.

Name: Cicero – Magazin für politische Kultur
Description:
Cicero, Magazin für politische Kultur, ist Deutschlands großes meinungsbildendes Monatsmagazin und bietet analytische Hintergrundberichte, Reportagen und Porträts zu aktuellen Themen und Persönlichkeiten aus Politik, Wirtschaft und Kultur.

Seit der Gründung 2004 steht das Magazin für Glaubwürdigkeit, Werteorientierung und Unabhängigkeit. Als ausgewiesenes Autoren- und Debattenmagazin bestimmt Cicero den öffentlichen Diskurs maßgeblich mit und hinterfragt Meinungen und Meinungsmacher.

Name: Monaco Life
Description:
Monaco Life is the most popular and respected source of English language news for the Principality and beyond. The latest stories, interviews with high profile members of the community, events and information are published daily on our website and social media, and conveniently delivered each morning to the inboxes of our subscribers via our daily newsletter. 

Subscribe to our newsletter here:
https://monacolife.net/?sg_popup_id=64220

Name: PSM - Protection Sécurité Magazine
Description:
PSM (Protection Sécurité Magazine) est le magazine spécialisé pour tous les professionnels du monde de la sûreté et de la sécurité (Vidéosurveillance – Contrôle d’accès – Intrusion – Alarme – Incendie).
1ière source d’information pour les Utilisateurs et les Prescripteurs (Responsables de la Sécurité, Sociétés d’Etude et de Conseil, BEI, Acheteurs, …) ou Professionnels de la Sûreté et de la Sécurité (Installateurs, Electriciens, Intégrateurs, Prestataires de service, Distributeurs, Importateurs, …), PSM apporte tous les deux mois une information complète sur l’actualité du secteur, les nouvelles technologies, les marchés et contrats, les techniques, les équipements, des cas pratiques, …
PSM édite aussi une e-newsletter, un site d’information, un Annuaire de la profession, un Guide d’Achat, un salon online, des études de marché, des Hors-Série, …

Name: Le Journal du Palais de Bourgogne-Franche-Comté
Description:
Le Journal du Palais est un hebdomadaire d’information économique et juridique dont le siège se trouve à Dijon. 

Créé en 1929,  le journal est habilité à la publication des annonces judiciaires et légales dans la Bourgogne Franche-Comté. Il fait partie du groupe ForumEco.

Name: NavaBharat
Description:
Navabharat Media: Print Media, Digital Media, Events and Brand Solutions

With a legacy of 90 years, Navabharat, Maharashtra's No.1 Hindi Newspaper is known for its reliable and impactful journalism in 4 States, 33 Editions and 60 Hyper Local Editions.

Navarashtra, Maharashtra's mouthpiece and the group's Marathi language daily with 12 editions and 25 Hyper Local Editions, along with Central Chronicle in English provide ethical content across languages and geographies. 

Our Leading Digital Platforms: https://navbharatlive.com for Hindi News and https://www.navarashtra.com for Marathi News, extend our reach by providing real-time news and in-depth analysis to a global audience.

Name: Montel News SEE
Description:
Since 2002, Montel Energetika has been a trusted source of energy news for Slovenia and South-East Europe. As part of our growth and commitment to delivering high-quality content, we’ve rebranded to Montel News SEE.
 
Montel News SEE reports daily on key developments in energy and trading, alongside political and business-related topics. Our content includes news, expert commentary, interviews, and video features created in partnership with industry leaders.
 
Save time and stay informed with all the essential business insights from the energy industry. Visit our new page at www.montelnews.com.

Name: Montel News
Description:
Montel News delivers unrivalled insights from Europe’s largest team of 50 dedicated energy journalists, providing timely, accurate, and independent coverage of the energy sector.

From real-time prices, up to the minute newswire and in-depth market analysis to a curated daily selection of essential energy reports in seven languages, Montel News offers professionals across Europe the trusted information they need to make informed decisions.

Name: La Déferlante
Description:
La Déferlante, revue papier de 144 pages, raconte le monde post #MeToo, déconstruit les normes de genre et documente la révolution féministe en cours. Ce projet est porté par quatre femmes : Marion Pillas (productrice et autrice), Emmanuelle Josse (consultante en édition et en communication), Lucie Geffroy et Marie Barbier (journalistes).

Douzième numéro : Rêver, en librairie et sur abonnement.

Name: De Telegraaf
Description: De Telegraaf is the largest and most widely read newspaper in the Netherlands. It publishes the latest news and extensive background pieces 7 days a week (including a digital sunday newspaper). De Telegraaf has its own editorial formula consisting of various sections that differ each day of the week. Telegraaf.nl is listed in the top 3 news websites in the Netherlands.

Name: Reporter ohne Grenzen
Description: Reporter ohne Grenzen dokumentiert Verstöße gegen die Presse- und Informationsfreiheit weltweit und alarmiert die Öffentlichkeit, wenn Journalisten und deren Mitarbeiter in Gefahr sind. Wir setzen uns für mehr Sicherheit und besseren Schutz von Journalisten ein. Wir kämpfen online wie offline gegen Zensur, gegen den Einsatz sowie den Export von Überwachungstechnik und gegen restriktive Mediengesetze.

Name: Ecommerce News Portugal
Description: Revista online especializada em comércio eletrónico ( ecommerce), Marketing Digital e economia digital.

Name: The Portugal News
Description: The Portugal News is Portugal's largest circulation English language newspaper. Online we offer news from Portugal in 18 languages  Our qualified and accredited team of journalists has helped us become a trusted source of news from Portugal since 1977.

Name: De Financiële Telegraaf
Description: DFT is hét financiële nieuwsplatform van Nederland waar ondernemers, beleggers en consumenten 24 uur per dag via verschillende kanalen op de hoogte blijven van relevant financieel-economisch nieuws en andere waardevolle informatie op dat gebied. De actualiteit vormt de aanleiding om kansen en risico’s voor de financieel bewuste Nederlander in kaart te brengen via De Telegraaf, DFT.nl en de mobiele en tablet apps.

Name: infoPUERTOS
Description:
El Periódico marítimo-portuario de España.

Creemos en la información veraz y objetiva, en el periodismo que construye. Creemos en el mar y los puertos como motores del desarrollo económico de las regiones donde están ubicados. Creemos en las organizaciones, empresas y personas que desarrollan su actividad profesional en este sector marítimo-portuario, día a día, contribuyendo a darle valor.

Name: Groupe EBRA
Description: Premier groupe de presse quotidienne régionale en France, le Groupe EBRA possède neuf quotidiens régionaux diffusés dans 23 départements de l'Est de la France. Les principaux titres du groupe sont Le Dauphiné libéré, Le Progrès, les Dernières Nouvelles d'Alsace, l'Est républicain, le Républicain Lorrain, le Bien Public, le Journal de Saône et Loire, l'Alsace et Vosges Matin.

Name: La Liberté
Description: La Liberté reste l’un des derniers titres indépendants des grands groupes de presse. Libre dans sa tête et dans son ton, La Liberté compte plus de 100'000 lecteurs quotidiens au travers de son édition papier et de ses supports numériques.
