Name: The Copenhagen Post
Description: The Copenhagen Post is Denmark’s leading source for news in English. In addition to publishing the only regularly printed English-language newspaper in Denmark, we also provide constantly updated online news and newsletters.

Name: EjePrime
Description:
Diario económico especializado en el negocio inmobiliario.
Toda la información del sector en real time.

Name: Murcia Plaza
Description: Linkedin oficial de Murcia Plaza. Actualidad económica, política y empresarial de la Región de Murcia.

Name: ASSURANCE CONGO
Description: Assurance Congo - fournit l’actualité, dans le secteur d'assurance en RDC. Notre plateforme est respectée par les assureurs  et les courtiers.

Name: Media Distribution Africa
Description:
MDA is an innovative, flexible and service oriented company. We are driven by results and believe that success in distribution lies in paying attention to detail and keeping focus.
Despite difficult market conditions we have achieved consistent circulation growth for our clients. 
We provide circulation and distribution services to publishers.
Through intelligent use of outsourced distribution models we ensure that economies of scale are achieved without compromising service levels or sales results.
We focus on sales growth and optimising efficiencies.
Using an outsourced distribution model we manage our clients circulation and distribution needs, ensuring excellent service is provided at the same time as optimising economies of scale.

Our vision is to deliver the value to our customers, suppliers and employees. We will provide to our customers great productivity, enhanced innovation, new services and organizational flexibility. We will continue to grow and lead the market.
We aim to be a world class, unique and exclusive distribution company driven by empowered people within an enabled environment achieving our common goals and attaining sustainable growth.

Name: Audiologie Demain
Description:
Audiologie Demain est le magazine de référence sur l'actualité du secteur de la santé auditive et de l'audition.
Notre média adopte une vision transversale de l'audiologie et prépare ses lecteurs à l'évolution de leur filière et les aide à prendre du recul pour mieux anticiper les enjeux de demain.
Audiologie Demain se place au carrefour des professions – audioprothésistes, ORL, orthophonistes, chercheurs, fabricants, institutions –, et contribue à leur information et à leur formation.
#audiologie #audioprothèse #audioprothésiste #ORL #aidesauditives #audition #santé

Name: Guest Post Blogging
Description: GuestPostBlogging.com is a general niche blogging platform where you can read, write, and post content in various categories. We have 100+ registered authors and 30+ categories. Our platform provides guest posts, press releases, product reviews, and niche edit services. Mostly, traffic comes from premium countries such as the USA, Canada, UK, Australia, etc. You can contact us if you have unique content and are looking for a guest post.

Name: The Cryptonomist
Description:
The Cryptonomist - Reporting the Future. The latest news about fintech, NFT, blockchain, crypto, and trading.
www.cryptonomist.ch (Italian Version)
www.cryptonomist.ch/en (English Version)

Name: touristik aktuell
Description: touristik aktuell liefert mit News, Hintergrundberichten und Themen-Specials Entscheidern und Verkäufern in den Reisebüros das nötige Fach- und Verkaufswissen.

Name: La Tribune Montpellier
Description: Une information quotidienne sur les entreprises, l'économie, la politique, l'innovation, les mouvements, la culture et la communication en Occitanie à destination des décideurs.

Name: L'Officiel des Cuisinistes
Description: Depuis 1977, L’Officiel des Cuisinistes traite et diffuse l’information du secteur de la cuisine équipée. En contact direct et permanent avec l’ensemble des acteurs du secteur, aussi bien les fabricants que les distributeurs, nous traitons chaque jour l’actualité et l’évolution du marché afin de mieux vous informer.

Name: Austin American-Statesman
Description:
The Austin American-Statesman has been the leading source of news and information for Central Texas since 1871, serving a dynamic and fast-growing region anchored by the capital city of Texas. Austin is known for its vibrant tech industry, rich cultural heritage, influential government institutions and creative spirit.

The Statesman's award-winning journalists provide in-depth coverage of the issues that matter most to Austinites—from local government and business to education, the environment and Austin’s ever-evolving music and cultural scenes. With a strong focus on accountability journalism and investigative reporting, the Statesman plays a critical role in informing and engaging its community.

As Austin’s most trusted news brand, the Statesman also produces a range of specialty publications and digital offerings. Its print editions and digital platforms, including Statesman.com, reach hundreds of thousands of readers throughout the Austin metropolitan area and beyond each week.

Statesman.com, the premium digital destination for the newspaper, delivers breaking news, investigative stories and thoughtful commentary, alongside lifestyle, entertainment and sports coverage. 

Since its acquisition by Hearst in 2025, the Statesman continues to operate with editorial independence while benefiting from Hearst’s expansive journalistic and technological resources.

Name: Groupe Archimedia
Description:
Archimedia group is an independent company which develops numerous media tools.
For the first time in Morocco, specialists turn their attention to architecture and make the actors of the building industry interact so as to convey o positive image of the sector.
With the aim of mediatizing architecture and, more generally, the public building and works sector, Archimedia group puts its 7 skills domains at your disposal.

Name: Jornal SOL
Description:
As notícias de última hora e do dia que estão a marcar a actualidade. Opinião, política, sociedade, economia, lusofonia, internacional, cultura, desporto, vida, tecnologia, fotografias, vídeos, infografias. 
O seu ponto de encontro na web

Name: Telescope Magazine
Description:
Lancé en 2022, Telescope Magazine explore le futur via des thématiques de société : politique, pop culture, nouvelles technologies, espace et écologie.
Abonnez-vous à notre newsletter pour recevoir tous les samedis matis un condensé de l'actualité de la semaine : 
https://telescopemag.fr/newsletter-telescope-magazine/

Name: Les Annonces Landaises
Description:
Toute l’actualité économique des Landes !
Publie vos annonces légales.

Name: Liguria Business Journal
Description:
Liguria Business Journal è un quotidiano online di economia, finanza e marketing territoriale. 
Un efficace strumento di informazione per imprenditori, professionisti, manager, artigiani, istituzioni, associazioni e per tutti i protagonisti del sistema economico ligure e non solo.

Consultabile gratuitamente:
 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/bj.liguria?fref=ts
Twitter: https://twitter.com/bjliguria
Youtube: https://www.youtube.com/user/bjliguria
Telegram: https://telegram.me/BjLigurianews
RSS: http://liguria.bizjournal.it/feed-rss-2/

Name: La Tribune Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes
Description:
L'économie CHANGE, votre média aussi ! 
Chaque jour, retrouvez et décryptez avec #LaTribuneAuRA les enjeux qui marquent votre territoire : #Industrie & #Relance #Santé #Mobilités #Energie #TransitionEcologique #Innovation #Tech #SmartCity & #Territoire à #Lyon et en #AURA.
Et retrouvez également tous les deux mois la revue T, en format papier, qui revient plus longuement sur la nature de ces transformations au sein de votre région.

Name: 20 Minuten
Description:
20 Minuten – das beliebteste Nachrichtenmedium der Schweiz

Ende 1999 für eine junge und urbane Zielgruppe lanciert, hat sich die Pendlerzeitung 20 Minuten zur reichweitenstärksten Schweizer Medienmarke mit Präsenz in der Deutschschweiz, der Westschweiz und im Tessin entwickelt. News aus der Schweiz und der Welt, Unterhaltung und Inspiration: 20 Minuten erzählt Geschichten, die für Gesprächsstoff sorgen. Das Herzstück von 20 Minuten ist der moderne Newsroom im fünften Stock des vom japanischen Stararchitekten Shigeru Ban entworfenen Holzgebäudes. Hier arbeitet eine junge, engagierte, neugierige und kreative Redaktion rund um die Uhr für den richtigen Mix aus Nachrichten und Unterhaltung.

Der Journalismus von 20 Minuten ist verlässlich, kompakt, verantwortungsvoll, neutral und kostenlos überall verfügbar. Auf den digitalen Kanälen sowie auf Social Media bietet 20 Minuten eine breite Palette multimedialer Inhalte.

Die 20 Minuten Gruppe ist Teil der TX Group und umfasst die News-Medien 20 Minuten, 20 minutes, 20 minuti und lematin.ch, das Formatradio GOAT Radio, das Lifestyle-Magazin Encore sowie die Beteiligungen im Ausland: L’essentiel in Luxemburg und Heute in Österreich.

Spannender Arbeitsort:
20 Minuten bietet eine offene Unternehmenskultur mit kurzen Entscheidungswegen und ein interessantes Wirkungsfeld mit einem aufgestellten, gut eingespielten Team. Möchten Sie Teil davon sein? Unsere aktuellen Jobangebote finden Sie jeweils auf jobs.tx.group. 

Attraktiver Werbeträger:
Mit 20 Minuten wird Ihre Botschaft gesehen. Haben Sie Fragen zu den Werbemöglichkeiten? Zögern Sie nicht, uns unter 20minutensales@20minuten.ch zu kontaktieren. 

Folgen Sie uns auch auf TikTok, Instagram, Facebook oder Twitter.
www.20minuten.ch

Name: Quotidiano Energia
Description:
Dal 2005 Quotidiano Energia rappresenta un riferimento per l'informazione specializzata con notizie di attualità, analisi, indici e prezzi di prodotti energetici. Uno strumento di lavoro da sempre attento all'innovazione e un luogo di approfondimento sui mercati petroliferi, del gas, elettrici, delle rinnovabili, dell'efficienza e sui settori della mobilità, dell'intelligent building, idrico e ambientale. All'interno focus inoltre su normativa, regolazione e fiscalità, l'agenda degli appuntamenti in Parlamento e il calendario degli eventi. Tutti i giorni un monitoraggio sui prezzi dei carburanti praticati in Italia. L'informazione di QE si completa con una newsletter sul mondo dell'acqua, il settimanale e7 e un'area video per report e interviste. 

Ogni sera, dal lunedì al venerdì, sulla homepage del sito viene pubblicata una versione del quotidiano in formato PDF, stampabile e interattiva, con le news della giornata. Seguici anche su Twitter

Name: Causeur.fr
Description: Causeur est un site et magazine de réflexion et de débat sur l'actualité animé par la journaliste et essayiste Elisabeth Lévy. Chaque jour, Causeur.fr éclaire l’actualité par des points de vue originaux et argumentés, en rupture avec le prêt-à-penser qui envahit le paysage médiatique. Chaque mois, le magazine publie 100% d’articles exclusifs, dont un dossier de fond sur une grande problématique de notre époque. « Causeur, surtout si vous n’êtes pas d’accord »

Name: PressLink Media
Description: PressLink.Media is a platform focused on simplifying the media relations process for businesses and individuals. It connects organizations with journalists, helping them distribute their press releases efficiently to gain exposure in relevant media outlets.

Name: KZN Industrial Business News
Description:
KZN Industrial & Business News is the only industrial media of its kind dedicated to the region. It provides suppliers to industry with a niched forum to showcase their products and services. 

A monthly consolidation of news and sector-focussed features is published in PDF format each alternate month for KZN and the Eastern Cape. The publications are emailed to a curated, targeted list of decision-makers involved in industry and business throughout these two provinces. 
Weekly newsletters – KZN News Express and Eastern Cape News Express – provide fresh news to these regions every second week. Our website is updated with news as we receive it.

We focus on all sectors of industry - manufacturing and the disciplines of engineering including agricultural, automotive, chemical, civil, electrical, electronic, energy, environmental, food, marine, mechanical, metallurgical, petroleum, projects, structural, transport & logistics, water and waste management and suppliers of associated products and services.

Name: Dainik Jagran INEXT
Description:
Launched in 2006, Dainik Jagran INEXT is an urban broadsheet that today reaches readers through 12 editions across four states. Designed for the youthful, dynamic audience, INEXT has consistently challenged traditional media formats with fresh storytelling, vibrant visuals, and hyper-local connect.

Part of Jagran Prakashan Ltd., India’s leading media house, INEXT has built a reputation for being a disruptor, redefining how news is packaged and consumed. With a focus on local relevance, reader engagement, and impactful initiatives, it has emerged as an award-winning product recognized both in India and globally, including accolades from WAN-IFRA.

Our initiatives have been acknowledged by top global and national bodies, from appreciation by the Honorable Prime Minister of India, Shri Narendra Modi, to recognition by international organizations for our social campaigns. With leadership accolades such as “Media Person of the Year – Print,” INEXT continues to innovate and inspire, staying true to its mission of meaningful journalism that creates societal impact.

Name: The Oregonian / OregonLive.com
Description: The Oregonian/OregonLive.com, published by Oregonian Media Group, is your online hub for breaking news, information and community engagement. Name: FRANCE-SOIR
Description:
FranceSoir est à présent disponible à travers un magazine hebdomadaire 100% tablette : FranceSoir l'e-mag

Interview, dossier, diaporama, vidéo composent le magazine. Chaque semaine, les sujets suivants sont abordés :
- Les indiscrétions sur l’univers politique, économique et social
- Le bilan de la semaine en images
- Une sélection des meilleurs tweets de la semaine
- Une grande interview
- Un dossier de la semaine (parmi des thèmes sociétaux)
- Votre horoscope
- Un quiz d'actualité

France Soir, c’est aussi un site web : www.francesoir.fr qui permet d’échanger sur les différents sujets abordés dans le magazine.

Name: Hospitalia Magazine
Description:
Newsmagazine de référence, Hospitalia décrypte l’actualité hospitalière depuis plus d’une décennie. Reconnu pour ses enquêtes fouillées, ses reportages hauts en couleur, et ses entretiens avec des faiseurs d’opinion, des représentants professionnels et des experts confirmés, il aborde sans fards les problématiques auxquelles sont confrontés, au quotidien, tous ceux qui font vivre l’hôpital.

Notamment renommé pour sa rubrique consacrée à l’informatique de santé, Hospitalia n’hésite pas à braquer ses projecteurs partout où l’actualité l’exige – blanchisserie, pharmacie, biologie, hygiène, imagerie, traçabilité, restauration, confort, logistique…, afin de mettre en lumière les enjeux métiers au plus près des acteurs de terrain.

Vivant au rythme des événements dont il est le témoin privilégié, Hospitalia s’affirme comme un média ambitieux qui, sans jamais se départir d’une démarche rigoureusement journalistique, propose de décloisonner les différents univers qui cohabitent au sein de ce monde si particulier qu’est l’hôpital. Il dispose à ce titre de différents vecteurs
pour fédérer une communauté toujours plus fidèle : outre le magazine historique dont la réputation auprès des lecteurs n’est plus à faire, Hospitalia dispose également d’un site Web quotidiennement mis à jour et d’une WebTV diffusant régulièrement de nouveaux reportages.

Hospitalia, un magazine d’information et un outil de veille technologique de premier plan !

Name: جريدة حابي الاقتصادية - Hapi Journal
Description:
حابي جريدة اقتصادية مطبوعة تصدر الأحد من كل أسبوع، تتبعها بوابة حابي جورنال اللحظية.

جريدة حابي متخصصة في تغطية وتحليل الأخبار الاقتصادية والمالية في مصر والمنطقة العربية والعالم.

تهدف جريدة حابي إلى تقديم قصص وتقارير حصرية عن الأسواق المالية، والتجارة، والاستثمار، والشركات، والتطورات الاقتصادية والقرارات والسياسات الحكومية المؤثرة في الاقتصاد.

كما توفر حابي معلومات دقيقة وأخبار حصرية عن قطاعات التمويل والطاقة والعقارات والتكنولوجيا والصناعة وغيرها، بهدف تزويد الجمهور برؤى شاملة حول القضايا الاقتصادية الملحة.

تنظم جريدة حابي صالونًا شهريُا لمناقشة أحد قضايا الاقتصاد العاجلة مع نخبة من المتخصصين. كما تقدم برنامج حابي بودكاست الذي يستعرض مع ضيف واحد رحلته في مجال الاقتصاد ورؤيته لحل التحديات الراهنة.

يجرى بث صالون حابي وبرنامج حابي بودكاست على جميع منصات حابي على السوشيال ميديا، ومنها لينكدإند ويوتيوب وفيسبوك وإنستجرام وتويتر وثريد، بجانب المنصات الصوتية سبوتيفاي، وأنغامي، وآبل بودكاست.

Hapi is a weekly printed economic newspaper published every Sunday, accompanied by the Hapi Journal website digit.

Hapi is specialized in covering and analyzing economic and financial news in Egypt, the Arab region, and the world.

The newspaper aims to provide exclusive stories and reports on financial markets, trade, investment, companies, and economic developments, as well as governmental decisions and policies that affect the economy.

Hapi also offers accurate information and exclusive news on sectors such as finance, energy, real estate, technology, industry, and more, to provide the audience with comprehensive insights into pressing economic issues.

Hapi organizes a monthly salon to discuss one of the urgent economic issues with a select group of specialists. Additionally, it produces the Hapi Podcast, which features a single guest sharing their journey in the field of economics and their vision for addressing current challenges.

The Hapi Salon and Hapi Podcast are broadcast on all Hapi platforms on social media, including LinkedIn, YouTube, Facebook, Instagram, Twitter

Name: Satellifacts, 1er quotidien de l'audiovisuel et du cinéma
Description:
Satellifacts : le satellite d’observation stratégique des pros de l’audiovisuel et du cinéma. Toute l’info, vérifiée, analysée, contextualisée et clarifiée. Factuellement.

Créé en octobre 1995 sous le nom Satellifax utilisé jusqu’en octobre 2021, filiale de CFNEWS depuis juin 2024, Satellifacts, premier quotidien de l’audiovisuel et du cinéma, est depuis près de 30 ans un titre de presse sur abonnement leader de son secteur dont il couvre l’actualité nationale et internationale. 

Média global, Satellifacts propose aux équipes dirigeantes du secteur une offre numérique complète :

- Un fil d’actualités en temps réel tout au long de la journée, sur web, mobile et via une application.
- Un Flash info à 18h.
- Satellifacts quotidien, une lettre maquettée (pdf) en ligne qui reprend le fil info de la veille.
- Le supplément Médiamétrie (quotidien vers 9h30, en ligne et push mail), avec les tableaux commentés d’audience de la veille. 
-Satellifacts Magazine (un vendredi sur deux, en alternance avec Satellifacts Talents) : interviews audiovisuel et cinéma, plans de financement TV et cinéma, zooms programmes, actualité des usages séries, focus producteurs et start-up etc.
- Satellifacts Talents (un vendredi sur deux, en alternance avec Satellifacts Magazine) : nominations, mouvements et parcours professionnels.
Satellifacts BDD  : accès illimité à notre base de données dont 7 000 biographies de professionnels de l’audiovisuel et du cinéma. 

Satellifacts est aujourd’hui reçu par l’ensemble des professionnels de l’audiovisuel, du cinéma et de la communication : diffuseurs, producteurs, distributeurs, exploitants, régies publicitaires, cabinets d’études, professions juridiques, médias en ligne, institutionnels, prestataires techniques, annonceurs, etc.

Il compte ainsi quelque 12 000 lecteurs quotidiens et 18 000 destinataires d’une alerte quotidienne gratuite.

Essai gratuit : https://www.satellifacts.com/fr/tour/tester/

Name: Wirtschaft aktuell
Description:
Mit dem Magazin „Wirtschaft aktuell“ und über unsere Online-Kanäle informieren wir unsere Leser über relevante Wirtschaftsnachrichten aus dem Münsterland und dem südwestlichen Niedersachsen. Im Vordergrund stehen Meldungen aus Unternehmen, Kommunen und Hochschulen. Mithilfe von Servicebeiträge, die in der Regel in enger Zusammenarbeit mit Fachleuten aus der Region entstehen, geben wir unseren Lesern - das sind in der Regel Unternehmer und Mandatsträger - darüber hinaus hilfreiche Tipps und konkrete Hilfestellungen für die tägliche Arbeit. In Reportagen, Porträts, Interviews etc. rücken wir ganz bewusst immer wieder auch die handelnden Personen aus der Region in den Fokus. So bekommen Wirtschaft-aktuell-Leser nicht nur Einblicke in die Unternehmen der Region, sondern sie lernen auch die Menschen hinter den Firmenmauern besser kennen. Bei Facebook geben wir darüber hinaus immer wieder auch Einblicke in unsere eigene Arbeit.

Seriös, informativ und meinungsstark – so bringen wir unseren Lesern in den (Land-)Kreisen Coesfeld, Borken, Steinfurt und Warendorf sowie Münster, Grafschaft Bentheim, Emsland und das Osnabrücker Land  spannende Themen “aus der Wirtschaft für die Wirtschaft” näher.

Name: La Prensa Grafica
Description:
Periódico de El Salvador y publicaciones revistas especializadas, de investigación, promocionales comerciales e institucionales.  Información multimedia, audio, video, radio, televisión, web, audio y video streaming a través de Internet, mensajes de texto a móviles, noticias y web móvil en smartphones.

Historia

Tiene su sede en la ciudad de Antiguo Cuscatlán (Departamento de La Libertad), circula en toda la república y cuenta con su periódico digital abierto para todos. Pertenece al Grupo Dutriz. El presidente es el empresario José Roberto Dutriz. Cuenta entre sus columnistas habituales al escritor David Escobar Galindo. Su estructura contempla un equipo de directores. El Director Editorial es el periodista Chritian Villalta.
La Prensa Gráfica fue fundada el 10 de mayo de 1915, por José Dutriz. Al principio se llamó La Prensa. En 1938 adoptó su nombre actual. Se caracteriza por su perfil objetivo y su impulso en el periodismo investigativo. Es afín a líneas políticas que promueven la libertad económica y por supuesto el libre ejercicio de la prensa. Cuenta en su haber numerosos reconocimientos internacionales, como el premio María Moors Cabot y el premio mundial de Periódico Joven otorgado por la Asociación Mundial de Periódicos. Es miembro activo de importantes asociaciones de medios como la Sociedad Interamericana de Prensa (SIP) y la misma Asociación Mundial de Periódicos.

Name: The Harvard Crimson
Description:
The Harvard Crimson is the only breakfast-table daily newspaper in Cambridge, MA. The Crimson publishes every morning, Monday through Friday, except on federal and University holidays. In addition to the daily newspaper, The Crimson publishes an extended sports section on Mondays; Fifteen Minutes, the weekend magazine of The Crimson on Thursdays; and an arts section on Tuesdays. 

The Crimson is the nation's oldest continuously published daily college newspaper, and was founded in 1873 and incorporated in 1967. The newspaper traces its history to the first issue of "The Magenta," published January 24, 1873, and changed its name to "The Crimson" to reflect the new color of the college on May 21, 1875. The Crimson has a rich tradition of journalistic integrity and counts among its ranks of editorship some of America's greatest journalists. The faces of Pulitzer Prize-winning Crimson editors line the walls of The Crimson. Past editors include John F. Kennedy '40, Don Graham '65, Jeff Zucker '86, Jim Cramer '76, and Steve Ballmer '77. The name of Franklin D. Roosevelt, Class of 1904, is proudly engraved upon The Crimson's president's chair. One hundred and forty-eight years after its founding, having grown from a fortnightly newspaper to a daily, The Harvard Crimson continues to flourish with a strong body of undergraduate staff volunteers.

Description:

Depuis 2018, DéplacementsPros.com est une marque d’Eventiz Media Group (EMG), 1er groupe média BtoB du Travel en France.

Name: Calgary.tech
Description:
Calgary.tech is the leading source for news, insights, and analysis on Calgary’s growing innovation economy. We cover the people, companies, and trends driving the city’s transformation into a global tech hub—spotlighting everything from ambitious startups to major ecosystem moves.

Our mission is to champion Calgary’s tech community by providing timely reporting, thoughtful commentary, and a platform for local voices. Whether you're a founder scaling your company, an investor scouting opportunities, or a jobseeker looking for your next role, Calgary.tech helps you stay informed and connected.

What we offer:
 Breaking news and startup updates
 Interviews with innovators and changemakers

Follow us to stay on top of Calgary’s tech evolution—and be part of the story as it unfolds.

Name: Prop News Time
Description: Prop News Time is a daily online Real Estate newspaper. We cover current events, stories and updates about the real estate industry in India and across the globe. We are an unbiased entity not associated or affiliated with any builder, broking firm, or banking institution.

Name: S&D Magazine
Description:
Née il y a 12 ans, la revue Sécurité & Défense magazine répond au besoin
éditorial reflétant le continuum sécurité & défense.
Revue bimestrielle haut de gamme, elle joue la carte de l’influence au travers d’une ligne éditoriale marquée. Elle s’impose désormais auprès des donneurs d’ordres, prescripteurs, industriels, entreprises, cabinets de lobbying et acteurs majeurs de la sécurité, de la cybersécurité et de la défense, comme un média de qualité et de référence où communiquer, discuter, critiquer, convaincre, argumenter, bousculer est possible, en toute finesse et intelligence.
Magazine bilingue et bi-media avec sa version numérique, il associe l’expertise rédactionnelle et opérationnelle d’hommes et de femmes spécialistes des questions de sécurité, de cybersécurité et de défense.
En 2022, une web TV est lancée.
S&D est partenaire de nombreux salons internationaux en France comme à l'international.

Name: Krautreporter
Description:
Krautreporter is an independent, ad-free magazine that tells the stories behind the headlines. Founded by readers in 2014, we are committed to slow, smarter, and more meaningful reporting.
Why do readers need Krautreporter? Because too many media outlets care more about clicks than depth. Because life is more complex than breaking news. Because advertising distracts from what really matters. And because even reputable media are starting to sound like tabloids.
Krautreporter publishes in-depth, personal stories written by experienced journalists who are close to their subjects. Our reporting is emotional, relevant, and thoroughly researched. We take the time and care necessary to explain the bigger picture, and we work closely with our members to do it.
Our team of reporters are no longer willing to wait for big media companies to provide journalism that truly serves its readers. We believe: it’s time for something new.

Name: Daily Mirror
Description:
The Daily Mirror is one of Britain’s most trusted news brands. We are committed to reporting the news accurately and with energy and vigour. 

Known for its strong social conscience and editorial campaigns, the Daily Mirror's mission is to make sense of a rapidly changing world for our readers.  To challenge wrongs where we see them. To stand up for the underdog against authority.  And to entertain.

Name: The Philippine Star
Description:
A trusted name.

Trust and relevance are the most valuable currencies in today’s media landscape. 

A vaunted pillar of Philippine journalism whose integrity is anchored on the Biblical motto, “Truth Shall Prevail”, The Philippine STAR is the flagship title of the Philstar Media Group, one of the premier and most admired media organizations in the country.

Reaching audiences where it matters most, The STAR is the newspaper of choice of the country’s top establishments, notably Jollibee, Starbucks, leading hotel chains, restaurants and hospitals.

We are the preferred publisher of brands and clients throughout the country, cornering the industry’s biggest print advertising gross for the past 12 years and counting.

A global presence.

Our website, Philstar.com, is one of the leading online news and entertainment portals in the Philippines. 

A tribute to our rich content is the amount of time readers spend onsite. Compared to other websites, philstar.com has an audience that lingers, spending an average of 15 minutes on the website compared to the industry average of only two minutes.

Through the years, The STAR has lived up to its mission of informing and inspiring readers the world over. 

Armed with a solid foundation in journalism, an enviable record of corporate success, and an undiminished sense of public service, The Philippine STAR continues to thrive in an ever-changing media landscape.

Name: OCM - Observatoire de la Compétence Métier
Description:
À l’initiative de David Démann, Géraldine Maronne et Cédric Lefebvre nous avons créé, en 2018, l’Observatoire de la Compétence Métier. Entièrement tournée vers l’humain, notre média est dédié à la lutte contre la déprofessionnalisation.

L’Observatoire OCM est né des constats suivants : la perte progressive de la compétence et de l’expertise dans tous les secteurs d’activité, le mépris croissant de la compétence au profit de la norme, l’obsession des process, les visions court-termistes ainsi que le sentiment grandissant de perte de sens dans le monde de l’entreprise.

D’une réflexion ensuite : comment préserver et développer la compétence métier en entreprise, compétence qui se révèle à long terme un patrimoine inestimable ainsi qu’une source incomparable de stimulation, de productivité intelligente et de créativité ?

L’Observatoire de la Compétence Métier est le fruit de ces analyses et s’entend comme un espace de réflexion et de prise de recul collectif sur le monde de l’entreprise.

Notre site d’information propose du contenu varié véhiculant nos idées et porteur nos valeurs. Notre plateforme s’entend également comme un outil à l’usage de tous, ainsi qu’un lieu d’échanges thématiques et de discussions entre nos membres, car nous croyons en la pertinence de la réflexion de chacun pour changer le paradigme.


Nous vous invitons à visiter notre site : https://observatoire-ocm.com/

Name: Ottawa Citizen
Description:
The Ottawa Citizen is the national capital region’s leading multi-media news platform.  Our mission: Challenge Ottawa to be an inspiring, world-class, capital city — and a great place to live, for everyone.

Description: To do business, you have to know business — and that’s what the Colorado Springs Business Journal is all about. Don’t settle for shallow news about what is happening, go deeper and learn how it affects you and your business. The Colorado Springs Business Journal — it’s where the business community meets.

Name: jagonews24.com
Description:
Jagonews24 is one of the most popular Bangla news portals in Bangladesh. The online news portal has started its operations with the commitment of fearless, investigative, informative and neutral journalism.

The portal provides real time news update, using utmost modern technology since 2014. It also provides archive of previous news, and printing facility of the specific news items.

One can easily find latest news and top breaking headlines from Bangladesh and around the world within a short span of time from the online news portal.

As a Bangladesh’s leading online news portal, is updating 24/7 days with the news of entertainment, lifestyle, special reports, politics, economics, culture, education, information technology, health, sports, columns and features.

The news based site enriched with all the elements of country’s traditional newspapers. A group of youngster journalists are working for the online news portal.

Name: Luxury Tribune
Description:
Luxury Tribune is the new digital media platform of record for the luxury industry. Our mission: to unpack the news and challenges in the sector with a team of international journalists and academic researchers. Follow our WhatsApp channel Luxury Tribune to get all our news in real-time!

An information platform and innovative think tank, Luxury Tribune is also the official partner of the new Swiss Center for Luxury Research, a joint initiative that will be launched at the University of Lausanne (CH) that brings together HEC Lausanne, IMD, Ecole Cantonale d’Art de Lausanne (ECAL), Ecole Hôtelière de Lausanne (EHL), the Universita della Svizzera Italiana (USI), University of St. Gallen (HSG), University of Neuchâtel (UNI Ne) and University of Bern (Ub).

Luxury Tribune will publish the best analyses, studies and publications written by professors and researchers from these Swiss universities and colleges.

Available in French and English, Luxury Tribune is the first platform aiming to deliver high-value content and forge constructive bonds between the academic and the business worlds by organizing events.

Name: Kundeserviceavisen
Description:
kundeserviceavisen.no er den første avisen i Norge som tar for seg hva som skjer innenfor kunde- og kundeservice. Arbeid med kunde og kundeservice er sannsynligvis det området som sysselsetter flest mennesker i Norge, på tvers av alle bransjer.
Område kunde og kundeservice har flere fellesnevnere enn ulikheter på tvers av alle bransjer. Alle blir bedre om innsikt og viten blir delt på en god måte.

Name: Veto
Description:
Veto is het grootste en oudste studentenblad van Vlaanderen. Veto brengt 50.000 studenten wekelijks op de hoogte via veto.be en sociale media. In het academiejaar komt elke drie weken een papieren editie van 40 pagina's uit.

Aan het hoofd van Veto staat een hoofdredacteur, bijgestaan door een redactiesecretaris en een eindredacteur. De redactiesecretaris wordt deeltijds betaald, voor de rest draait Veto uitsluitend op vrijwilligers. De rest van de redactie bestaat uit vaste redacteurs die een afdeling coördineren, zoals onderwijs of cultuur. Alle andere medewerkers kiezen zelf welke artikels zij willen schrijven en hoeveel tijd zij in Veto willen investeren. Op een jaar werken er zo'n 150 mensen aan Veto.

Elke week houden we een redactievergadering op onze redactie in de 's-Meiersstraat. Daar stellen de redacteurs verschillende onderwerpen voor, waaruit medewerkers een keuze kunnen maken.

Iedereen is welkom bij Veto: we zijn te allen tijde op zoek naar fotografen, journalisten, cartoonisten, illustratoren, ICT'ers, mopjesmakers, nalezers en manusjes-van-alles. Bij een tweewekelijkse publicatie komt veel kijken.

Name: Great West Media L.P.
Description:
Great West Media L.P. is a chain of news outlets throughout Alberta. Headquartered in St. Albert, Alberta, the company is co-owned by Jamison Newspapers and Glacier Ventures International Corporation. Each organization has a 50% stake in the company.

Great West Media L.P. is committed to producing quality journalism in Alberta, providing credible, reliable news in both online and print formats. The company holds its readers in the highest regard because we believe that producing quality journalism results in a strong product for both the public and our advertisers. We are dedicated to providing the best community news in Canada!

Our commercial printing division offers 24/7 services to the publications in our chain and a wide variety of commercial customers. We specialize in printing newspapers, directories, flyers, calendars, and periodicals.

Our digital agency specializes in creating Local Community Display Advertising, Content Advertising, Contests, Responsive Websites, Search Engine Optimization (SEO), Local Search Optimization (LSO), and Programmatic Display Advertising. Le Courrier Laval, une propriété de 2M.MEDIA, est une entreprise lavalloise qui se spécialise dans la production et la diffusion de contenu local.

Le Courrier Laval est la référence en matière d’information et de communications à Laval.

La mission du Courrier Laval est de rejoindre l’ensemble des citoyens de Laval, et ce, par notre réseau de diffusion unique constitué de publications imprimées, de sites web, de blogues, et par une présence importante dans la communauté et dans les réseaux sociaux.

Le Courrier Laval renseigne les lecteurs sur l'actualité et les problématiques locales et représente un excellent vecteur publicitaire pour les annonceurs désireux de faire connaître leurs produits et services à la population lavalloise.
L'information mise au jour et les dossiers fouillés avec brio par l'équipe journalistique, jumelés à l'instantanéité et à la diversité du WEB (éditions électronique intelligente, sites internet www.courrierlaval.com, pulsionlaval.com, etc.) décuplent les champs d'intérêt des consommateurs pour la nouvelle et les services commerciaux lavallois. Le Courrier Laval et son équipe sont engagés dans la communauté et collaborent fièrement aux différentes activités organisées par les institutions publiques, privées et communautaires.  Les Lavallois et le Courrier Laval vivent l’ histoire de Laval depuis 73 ans.

Name: Revue Natives
Description:
VISION
Il existe environ 5 000 communautés, 370 millions de peuples autochtones aujourd'hui dans le monde. Ces peuples dit aussi « racines », sont de véritables gardiens de la biodiversité. Leur vision du monde, leur connaissance de la nature, leur vivre -ensemble et le respect des écosystèmes s’appuient sur des siècles d’expériences et de transmission.

Plus ou moins éloignées de la civilisation occidentale, ces communautés ont pourtant beaucoup à partager et à nous inspirer à un moment où l’Homme doit préserver la Vie pour retrouver un équilibre respectueux de la Nature.

C’est avec l’envie et la volonté de construire un espace de dialogues et d’échanges, que NATIVES lance le premier média en langue française autour des peuples racines.

MISSION
NATIVES est le premier média en langue française autour des peuples racines, avec deux supports d’expression lancés progressivement.

1- Un magazine trimestriel Natives sur abonnement. Lancement 1er semestre 2020.

2 - Un site Internet qui pourrait évoluer vers le portail en langue française pour les peuples racines. Lancement simultané à la revue.

Au cœur de l'écosystème des peuples racines, Natives deviendra à moyen terme :
• Un référent en termes de participation à l’organisation d'événements au bénéfice des peuples racines.
• Un vecteur pour la transmission de la connaissance et des savoir-faire traditionnels de ceux-ci.
• Un organisateur d’actions de relations presse et de soutien pour eux.

PRODUIT
Magazine trimestriel vendu sur abonnement dans un premier temps, doublé d’un site web reprenant une partie du contenu du magazine et proposant des contenus spécifiques.

Name: Korea JoongAng Daily
Description:
The Korea JoongAng Daily is an English-language news organization that delivers in-depth, on-the-scene journalism informing readers around the world of the issues of the day in Korea.

Under the slogan “Your window to Korea,” the Korea JoongAng Daily strives to publish factual, timely, unbiased articles that make it the newspaper of report for English-speakers in Korea and globally.

The Korea JoongAng Daily is the English-language arm of JoongAng Group, a Korean media conglomerate spanning print, digital and broadcast, and benefits from the expertise of our colleagues at the JoongAng Ilbo and JoongAng Sunday, alongside the dedicated work of our own in-house reporters.

The Korea JoongAng Daily operates a bilingual newsroom with four desks — national, business, culture and sports — led by expert desk chiefs and a separate team of native speaking English-language editors recruited from some of the top media organizations in the world.

Alongside the Korea JoongAng Daily website and print newspaper, the company also operates K-campus, a news-adjacent platform for international students in Korea and interested in Korea, and Korean entertainment news and community website Celeb Confirmed. The company also releases a weekly educational supplement, Think English, and publishes dual-language content online on a daily basis.

Name: Lunettes Originales
Description:
Lunettes Originales : Un écrin digital pour les créateurs et opticiens passionnés !

Lunettes Originales est le webzine incontournable pour les marques de lunetterie indépendantes et les opticiens qui les proposent. Nous offrons une plateforme unique pour raconter votre histoire, partager vos valeurs et mettre en avant votre savoir-faire auprès d’un large public de passionnés et de consommateurs en quête de singularité.

 Marques lunetières, opticiens passionnés, faites rayonner votre savoir-faire sur Lunettes Originales !

 Contactez-nous pour en savoir plus sur nos partenariats.

Name: Aargauer Zeitung
Description: Die «Aargauer Zeitung» ist die regionale Tageszeitung für den Kanton Aargau und seine Regionen. Rund um die Uhr informiert die Redaktion in der Zeitung, online und mobile über Aktualitäten und Hintergründe aus Politik, Wirtschaft, Sport und Kultur – aus der Region, der Schweiz und der ganzen Welt. Die regionale Verankerung bildet das Rückgrat der Berichterstattung.

Name: SanitàinSicilia.it
Description:
Il Gruppo Editoriale Mercurio Comunicazione dopo l’importante gradimento riscosso con ilSicilia.it; Siciliarurale.eu; Siciliammare.it e ilGiornaledellaBellezza.it dopo oltre sei mesi di progettazione e lavorazione edita SanitàinSicilia.it.
Il nuovo Magazine del nostro Gruppo Editoriale si occuperà di Sanità e Salute in Sicilia e si rivolgerà agli operatori del settore, ai cittadini che nella loro quotidianità hanno inevitabilmente a che fare con questo mondo, ed alle imprese interessate a dialogare con la Sanità siciliana.
 In redazione con Veronica Gioè, coordinatore  editoriale e con il Responsabile Scientifico il professore Salvatore Corrao, ci saranno esperti del settore, redattori e video operatori che ogni giorno vi daranno la più completa informazione su ciò che accade nella sanità siciliana.
C’è tanto di positivo da dire e noi ve lo racconteremo. E molto, ancora da fare, per migliorare ulteriormente servizi e strutture, ed anche lì non faremo mancare la nostra e, soprattutto, la vostra voce.
Ci troverete online con tantissimi servizi ed interviste in video, informazioni utili ed importanti, e report puntuali sulla Pubblica Amministrazione e le nuove scoperte scientifiche.
Quindi, seguiteci e dateci indicazioni e consigli, il nostro desiderio è quello di realizzare un giornale insieme ai nostri lettori, agli operatori della sanità ed alle istituzioni preposte, noi siamo e saremo pronti ad ascoltare e leggere tutto ciò che ci invierete a redazione@sanitainsicilia.it.
Informare su tutto, sempre da indipendenti come tutti i nostri giornali, per sapere e capire. Mi piace sottolinearlo con una citazione da Il Vangelo del sorriso, il bellissimo libro di Papa Francesco “Stranamente, non abbiamo mai avuto più informazioni di adesso, ma continuiamo a non sapere che cosa succede”.

Name: Monthly Energy Update
Description:
Energy Update, a magazine launched in May 2006 to cater to the burgeoning energy and environment sector of Pakistan. This is the only trade magazine on Energy and Environment in our country, and our aim is to become a Voice of the energy industry.

The magazine focusing on the developments in the global energy & environment sector, with particular interest to Pakistan, and will also be covering developments in the alternate energy and environment.

With unbiased in our analysis, truthful in reporting, scathing in our criticism, liberal in praise of the positive, and open and receptive to suggestions, advice and critiques that assisted us in making Energy Update a publication that the industry is proud to call its own. Today, the monthly Energy Update is being circulated among 8,000 Industry Experts (HVACR, Energy Sector Engineering Industry, Corporate Sector, Trade Associations and Key Decision Makers at Government level) in Pakistan and Overseas Markets including UK, Canada, UAE, Middle East & Far East, South East Asian Countries and other growing energy, Environment & engineering markets of the world.

This magazine’s distribution list includes all industry sector experts, leading Companies, decision-makers, trade body personnel and key individuals at the government level.

Name: The Friday Times
Description: Pakistan's first independent weekly paper

Name: The Hans India
Description:
thehansindia.com is a news portal which strives to keep you hooked on to news-as it happens. Our team aims to keep you abreast with whatever is making headlines across the world including politics, business, sports, lifestyle and entertainment. thehansindia.com is a part of The Hans India, an English Daily published across Telangana and Andhra Pradesh. 

The newspaper was launched in 2011 and publishes editions from Hyderabad, Visakhapatnam, Amaravati, Rajahmundry, Khammam, Kurnool, Nizamabad, Tirupati and Warangal simultaneously, the newspaper is on its way to becoming the leading English Newspaper in Telangana and Andhra Pradesh. We are soon going national too. 

The Newspaper is owned and operated by Hyderabad Media House Ltd, which also runs the Telugu-language news channel, HMTV. In a nutshell, we closely highlight socio-economic development of India in general and the two Telugu states in particular.

Name: The Hoya
Description:
The Hoya is the oldest and largest student newspaper of Georgetown University, serving as the university’s newspaper of record since 1920. We publish every day online and every Friday in print during the school year. Each print issue also includes a weekly lifestyle magazine, The Guide. The Hoya also publishes a blog, The Fourth Edition, which provides a lighthearted take on all things Georgetown. We distribute 4,000 free copies to 30 locations across campus and the Georgetown neighborhood during the academic year and continue to publish online during the summer.

The Hoya has been a central part of the university community since our first publication in 1920. The Hoya is produced, managed and edited entirely by students. Nearly 400 students are involved in the publication of the paper as reporters, photographers, designers, editors and business staff.

Editorial operations are overseen by the editor in chief, while business operations are run by the general manager. The current editor in chief is Riley Rogerson, and the current general manager is Emily Wang. The paper is governed by a ten-member board of directors. The current chair of the board of directors is Katherine DeMatteo.

Several times a year, The Hoya produces special issues, including a preview of the basketball season and a comprehensive New Student Guide, as well as issues focused on fashion and other special topics.

For more, contact info@thehoya.com.

Name: Newspage
Description: We're a decentralised news agency powered by citizen journalists that feeds content to the mainstream media at scale. Our experts in every sector work with traditional newsrooms to deliver better, faster and more democratic news. We are news, reinvented.

Name: Marijuana Moment
Description:
If you need up-to-the-minute news on the politics, business, science and culture of cannabis, you’re in the right place.

Edited by Tom Angell, a 20+ year veteran of the legalization movement, Marijuana Moment helps activists, industry professionals, consumers, policymakers and the public understand developments and trends affecting cannabis.

In addition to Marijuana Moment’s original reporting, we deliver a morning e-mail newsletter packed with all the latest headlines, primary source documents and analysis from across the world.

Name: ELITE MAGAZINE
Description: L'ELITE MAGAZINE est la vitrine de promotion par excellence de l'entreprenariat et du leadership au Burkina Faso.

Name: Eco Times Algeria
Description: Algerian daily economy

Name: Schaffhauser Nachrichten
Description: Die Schaffhauser Nachrichten ist die meistgelesene Tageszeitung des Kantons Schaffhausen und seiner Agglomerationen im nördlichen Zürcher Weinland und im Bezirk Diessenhofen des Kantons Thurgau.

Name: Cyprus Business News
Description: The CBN Daily Newsletter is the only daily English-language financial/business newsletter in Cyprus and is the main source of news for thousands of businesspeople.

Name: Cellesche Zeitung
Description: Cellesche Zeitung is a company based out of 1-3 Bahnhofstraße, Celle, Lower Saxony, Germany.

Name: JORNAL O FLUMINENSE
Description:
Fundado em 8 de maio 1878, O Fluminense é, aos 133 anos, o segundo periódico mais antigo em circulação do Estado do Rio, mantendo-se entre as raras publicações da América Latina a serem veiculadas em três diferentes séculos.

Em mais de 37 mil edições, O Fluminense mantém a postura que o fez crescer: defesa da integridade, da soberania e das aspirações populares. Assim, O Fluminense é um dos jornais mais importantes do cenário político nacional.

As páginas de O Fluminense revelaram alguns dos mais talentosos nomes da nossa literatura, como Euclides da Cunha, Oliveira Vianna, Olavo Bilac, Rubem Braga e Irineu Marinho.

Em 1954, O Fluminense passou a ser administrado pelo advogado, político e jornalista Alberto Torres. Quarenta e quatro anos mais tarde, O Fluminense foi transformado em um moderno veículo de comunicação. Alberto Torres promoveu o reaparelhamento das oficinas, a construção da atual sede e a expansão da empresa.

Atualmente, o Grupo Fluminense de Comunicação é administrado por Nina Rita Torres e Alexandre Torres, filha e neto de Alberto Torres.

Name: The Spokesman-Review
Description:
The Spokesman-Review is the largest news and information provider in the Inland Northwest. The newspaper traces its origin to the founding of the Spokane Falls Review in 1883. In 1893, the Review merged with its rival, The Spokesman, under the leadership of Publisher William H. Cowles.

Later the company would buy the Spokane Daily Chronicle, which continued as a separate newspaper until Review and Chronicle newsrooms merged in 1983. The Chronicle existed until 1992. The Spokesman-Review is still owned by the Cowles family, whose members continue to reside in Spokane and are actively involved in civic betterment efforts in addition to Cowles Company operations.

Today, publisher William Stacey Cowles represents the fourth generation of his family to oversee the newspaper.

Name: Primera Hora
Description: Primera Hora se fundó en 1997 por la familia Ferré-Rangel a partir de la necesidad existente en el mercado de contar con un producto nuevo y diferente. La familia Ferré Rangel decidió lanzar un nuevo diario, no sin antes llevar a cabo investigaciones en el mercado local e internacional sobre cómo crear un periódico fácil de leer, con historias breves, concisas, dinámico, con fotografías y buen uso del color. Con esta misión surge Primera Hora y su primera edición sale a la calle el 17 de noviembre de 1997.

Name: EducationScape
Description:
EducationScape is the leading organisation supporting the entire education landscape, powering respected brands including Schools Week, FE Week, the Festival of Education, and the Apprenticeships and Training Conference. Through fearless journalism, sector-wide events, professional learning, and recruitment services, we investigate what matters, inform what works, and inspire what’s next. Our work connects educators, leaders, and organisations to the ideas, insights, and opportunities that drive meaningful change across education.

What education needs to investigate what matters, inform what works, and inspire what’s next.

Name: Disney Magazines
Description:
Disney Magazines, filiale du groupe Unique Heritage Media depuis 2019, propose des magazines issus de l’univers Disney. 
Avec 14 titres et plus de 13 millions de magazines vendus chaque année en France, Nous occupons une position de leader de la presse jeunesse. Notre notoriété passe par des marques et des titres forts : Le Journal de Mickey, Picsou Magazine, Princesses…
Des magazines réfléchis et élaborés pour correspondre à tous les âges et à toutes les étapes de la vie d’un enfant.

3 gammes ont ainsi été réfléchies par les rédactions : 

Une gamme éveil pour les 3/6 ans : 
•	Winnie et ses Amis
•	Disney Junior
•	Cars Magazine
•	Planes Magazine

Une gamme fille, de 3 à 12 ans : 
•	Princesse Magazine
•	Clochette Magazine
•	Disney Girl

Une gamme junior pour les 7/12 ans (et même plus !): 
•	Le Journal de Mickey
•	Picsou magazine
•	Mickey Parade Géant
•	Super Picsou Géant

Notre régie commerciale propose, outre de l’achat classique d’espace, des dispositifs sur mesure permettant de communiquer de façon personnalisée et ludique auprès des familles. 

Notre ambition : offrir aux enfants des moments de lecture et de plaisir en compagnie de personnages bien aimés et appréciés de tous, y compris des parents !

Name: OC Weekly
Description:
Published since September 1995, OC Weekly is the first "alternative" newsweekly in Orange County and Long Beach to provide readers award winning editorial coverage, excellent arts & entertainment information and a provocative look at our community.

With a circulation of 45,000, OC Weekly reaches more than 224,000 of young, active, educated and affluent readers each week who look to the Weekly to guide their lifestyle and entertainment choices. Our readers rely on the Weekly's innovative and interesting look at the region in which they live. It has quickly become a necessary and integral part of their lives.

The OC Weekly publishes thoughtful, and insightful journalism, providing readers with a vibrant new perspective on their community, with subject matter ranging from local social issues; politics, culture and lifestyle; to arts, entertainment and recreation. The staff news blog, Navel Gazing (blogs.ocweekly.com/navelgazing) is award-winning. 

OC Weekly also publishes Orange County's most comprehensive calendar section. It offers complete listings of all the interesting happenings in Orange County, in one place. (altweeklies.com)

Name: Metal Tech News
Description:
Metal Tech News is a first of its kind publication that digs deeper into the mined materials that make modern life possible and provides a continuous glimpse into the future of how materials scientists and engineers are discovering new uses for the special properties of minerals and metals.
The exciting new end uses of minerals and metals, however, is only half of the story.
First, these materials must be mined – whether from Earth, asteroids or other bodies circling our Sun.
To tell the whole story – from discovering new sources of the metals that make modern life possible to using them to build the smartphone that will let you know the next edition of Metal Tech News has arrived in your inbox – this intriguing new publication also covers new technologies used to find, extract and process the minerals and metals of innovation.
Combined, Metal Tech News will allow readers to discover the metals of innovation, inform them on the latest mineral exploration and mining technologies, and challenge them to think about the role minerals and metals will play in a smarter, greener and more sustainable future for Planet Earth.

Name: Aceprensa
Description:
Aceprensa es una revista especializada en el análisis de tendencias básicas de la sociedad, corrientes de pensamiento y estilos de vida.

Con un enfoque internacional, presta particular atención a los cambios que se producen en ámbitos como la cultura, la familia, el trabajo, la religión, las ideologías, la bioética, la educación, las tendencias sociales y demográficas.

Name: The Auburn Plainsman
Description:
The Auburn Plainsman is the award-winning student newspaper affiliated with Auburn University. The editorial and business staffs consist of University students who produce this weekly print and daily online publication. Any student may apply to be a part of The Auburn Plainsman staff.

The print publication is available free for all Auburn University students and faculty every Thursday at various locations on campus.

The Auburn Plainsman is an editorially independent publication. Student editors and managers determine the editorial content, coverage and policies without interference from faculty, staff or University administration.

Mission Statement:

As Auburn University’s official student newspaper, the principle mission of The Auburn Plainsman is to serve as the primary print and digital news and information source for Auburn University’s student, staff and administrative population.

The Plainsman promotes the highest standards of journalism while endeavoring to be an award-winning student publication and serving as a learning laboratory for journalism, marketing, graphic design and photography students. 

To this end, The Auburn Plainsman continually strives to adapt to the changing technology required for the production of a state-of-the-art equipment and facilities of the highest quality.

The Auburn Plainsman strives to retain a professional staff in conjunction with student workers dedicated to instilling the values of sound business practice, excellence in monetary stewardship and ethics in journalism while providing academic advising and oversight to its student workers.

Name: Independent Arabia
Description:
Independent Arabia is a joint project between Media Arabia, and “The Independent”.
The website is the Arabic version of the British newspaper “The Independent”, it delivers Arabic- language news, some translated from the British main source and others created and delivered by more than 75 journalists and reporters spread in several Arab cities.
It is also licensed to launch sites in Arabic, Turkish, Urdu and Persian.
The “Independent Arabia”, directed by Adwan al-Ahmari – editor in chief, aims to present a special coverage of the world’s news and specifically the Arab world, in addition to the exclusive reports that shed lights on the social and humanitarian side of the region. 
The “Independent Arabia” main office is located in London, with regional bureaux in Cairo and Beirut to manage the website’s work smoothly and to achieve the action plan in a highly professional way.
The staff, constantly demonstrating dedication, talent and professionalism, has been chosen from various Arab nationalities.
the "Independent Arabia" is located in Chiswick Business Park, London, United Kingdom and it is published by Media Arabia L.t.d.

Name: PhotonicsViews
Description: PhotonicsViews, the successor of Laser Technik Journal and Optik & Photonik, is a business-to-business magazine that highlights innovations and developments in the fields of optics, photonics, and industrial laser technology. These include optical components and systems, radiation sources from terahertz to EUV as well as electro-optics, silicon photonics, optical measurement technology, and a special focus on new applications in micro and macro laser material processing.

Name: Riverfront Times
Description:
Since its founding, Riverfront Times has grown from St. Louis’ largest
newsweekly into a vibrant community of online readers and consumers

A relationship that we've been cultivating since 1977. With over a million local readers.
Readers who are loyal. Readers who are outspoken and tell us what they think
everyday. Readers who turn to us to plan their weekend and evenings. Readers
who trust us. And laugh at us. And tell us when we’re full of it. Readers who
appreciate what we bring to the table.

Today's Riverfront Times cultivates and maintains a loyal and active readership by adapting
and relating to the reader.
• The Riverfront Times reader has been reading the Riverfront Times an average of 6 years.
• The average reader reads 2.5 issues in a 4 week period.
• The Riverfront Times reader refers to the same issue an average of 3 times.

Name: Le Quotidien Jurassien
Description:
Le Quotidien Jurassien est un journal d’information indépendant, en mains familiales et entièrement réalisé dans le Jura. Sa rédaction, composée d’une trentaine de journalistes et d’environ 100 correspondants, apporte à ses lecteurs une information de qualité sur les enjeux du canton du Jura et du Jura bernois, mais également de la Suisse et du vaste monde. 

Elle le fait six jours sur sept au travers de l’édition quotidienne mais également dans les cahiers spéciaux Le Quotidien Week-end et Le Quotidien Magazine. Diffusé dans le canton du Jura et le Jura bernois, 

Le Quotidien Jurassien peut également être consulté sur son site internet et son application. Il est lu par quelque 40'000 lecteurs chaque jour.

Name: La Manche Libre
Description: La Manche Libre est le premier hebdomadaire de France avec une parution de près de 75 000 exemplaires chaque semaine sur le département de la Manche, mais aussi dans l'Ouest du Calvados, le Bessin et le Bocage Virois.

Name: Vietnam Investment Review
Description:
First published in 1991, the Vietnam Investment Review and its Vietnamese language version, Dau Tu, were the first international business newspapers published in Vietnam. These papers quickly became the nation's leading business journals, and have maintained this title due to their insightful and objective position on publishing real business issues. 

As key business publications, our reader comprise the largest grouping of business people, business leaders and government officials. This is shown by the fact that : 97% of all foreign representative in Vietnam, and all senior government officials receive weekly copies of both the VIR and Dau Tu

Vietnam Investment Review is published weekly and its supplement Timeout is published monthly every Monday.  Dau tu and Dau tu Chung khoan are published on Monday, Wednesday and Friday. Dau Tu Bat Dong San is published weekly on Monday. 

For advertise on VIR's publications,

Name: Revue des Collectivités Locales_RCL
Description:
La "Revue des Collectivités Locales_RCL" est une publication spécialisée qui s'adresse aux élus, aux cadres territoriaux et aux partenaires des collectivités locales
www.collectivitesterritoriales.fr

Outil essentiel pour les acteurs locaux, leur permettant de rester informés et de bénéficier de retours d'expérience pour améliorer la gestion de leurs territoires.
 Informer : Fournir des informations à jour et pertinentes sur les évolutions du cadre juridique et réglementaire.
 Accompagner : Aider les élus et les cadres territoriaux dans la mise en œuvre de leurs politiques publiques.
 Inspirer : Partager des initiatives innovantes et des bonnes pratiques observées dans d'autres collectivités.

 Actualités : Articles sur les dernières évolutions législatives, réglementaires et politiques qui impactent les collectivités locales.
 Dossiers Thématiques : Analyses approfondies sur des sujets spécifiques comme la gestion RH, la transition énergétique, la gestion des finances locales, l'aménagement du territoire, ...
 Interviews d'élus, d'experts et des entreprises.
 Bonnes Pratiques : Études de cas et exemples de réussites dans la gestion locale, partagés par d'autres collectivités.
 Outils et Ressources : Guides pratiques, modèles de documents, et conseils pour améliorer la gestion et l'efficacité des services publics locaux.
 Juridique : Analyses et commentaires sur les décisions de justice et les textes de loi pertinents pour les collectivités locales.
Agendas de nos partenaires institutionnels , salons, associations d'élus
livres, ouvrages  
Plus d'informations à retrouver sur le site de la revue

 Abonnements  adv@groupemediadesterritoires.com
 Hors série Statut de l'élu local ,Transition écologique, équipements, finance, assurances, santé, juridique, Mobilité 
 revuedescollectiviteslocales@groupemediadesterritoires.com

Name: Times Ascent Job Stop
Description: An ideal platform to land your dream job. An event where the employers will be waiting for you. Multiple companies and multiple designations to choose from all at one place. Be there at Gujarat University Convention and Exhibition Center on 27th & 28th May 2017 from 10 am to 6 pm.

Name: Worcester Telegram & Gazette
Description: Your go-to source for news and sports coverage in Central Massachusetts.

Name: LAVORINCASA.it
Description: Testata Giornalistica online sulla Casa. Arredamento, Bagno, Cucina, Faidate, Giardino, Impianti, Infissi, Normative, Ristrutturazione, Progettazione, Forum, Cadcasa, Mercatino usato, Prezzi lavori di ristrutturazione, motore di ricerca aziende settore casa.

Name: Détaillant Alimentaire
Description: « Détaillant Alimentaire » est un média électronique et un magazine traditionnel. Il est dédié aux gestionnaires des départements spécialisés d'épicerie et aux exploitants des commerces de proximité en alimentation du Québec.

Name: etudiant-metz.info
Description: etudiant-metz.info est un site destiné à la vie étudiante à Metz avec de l'actualité étudiante par les étudiants pour les étudiants de Metz. Vous y retrouverez de la musique, du cinéma, des jeux, des infos utiles ainsi que des bons plans pour les étudiants messins.

Name: Banda B
Description: Mantenha-se informado com a Banda B

Name: Concept Bain magazine
Description: Le magazine trimestriel de référence de la salle de bains et du bien-être !

Name: Planète J
Description:
Planète J
Elisabeth Auplat - Journaliste indépendante
Rédaction, photos et reportages à la carte - Gestion rédactionnelle d’outils 
de communication - Rédaction de site web - Animation de conférences, colloques, séminaires, formation en communication, management, ...

Name: Hamburger Abendblatt
Description:
Das HAMBURGER ABENDBLATT ist mit seinen fünf Regionalausgaben
die meistgelesene Abonnementzeitung in der Stadtregion Hamburg und
eine der erfolgreichsten regionalen Abonnementzeitungen Deutschlands.
Regionale Kompetenz und fundierte Berichterstattung über nationale und
internationale Ereignisse machen die Zeitung und abendblatt.de zu einem
führenden Informationsmedium sowie dem führenden
Anzeigenmarktplatz im Norden.

Name: Iowa State Daily
Description: Iowa State Daily is an independent student newspaper serving Iowa State University, that is published in print and online. The Daily printed circulation is 13,500. It was founded in 1890 and is largely funded by advertising revenues. The Government of the Student Body pays for a discounted subscription that provides for a free distribution across campus to students, faculty and staff of the university.

Name: Health Tech Digital
Description: Health Tech Digital Magazine is a UK-based publication that serves as a comprehensive resource for healthcare professionals, technology leaders, and companies involved in the digital transformation of healthcare. It offers in-depth articles, case studies, and the latest news on topics such as cyber security, machine learning, and connected health. The magazine aims to facilitate the adoption of innovative solutions within the NHS and other healthcare organizations by providing insights into integration, interoperability, security, infrastructure, and procurement. By connecting readers with pioneering companies and thought leaders, Health Tech Digital supports the advancement of healthcare technology in the UK.

Name: China Daily USA
Description:
China Daily USA is a wholly-owned subsidiary of China Daily, China's national English-language newspaper. China Daily USA is dedicated to North American readers who want to follow China's economic development, understand China's modern ethos and participate in the wider US-China dialogue.
	
Website: http://www.chinadailyusa.com

Like us on Facebook: http://www.facebook.com/chinadailyusa
Follow us on Twitter: http://www.twitter.com/chinadailyusa
Follow us on Foursquare: http://www.foursquare.com/chinadailyusa
View our videos on YouTube: http://www.youtube.com/chinadailyus
Read China Watch: http://chinawatch.washingtonpost.com

Name: UrbaNews.fr
Description:
UrbaNews.fr est un site d’actualité consacré à l’urbanisme, et qui se veut un espace d'information et d'échange pour le plus grand nombre, professionnels, amateurs éclairés ou curieux de passage.

Emmené par un petit groupe d'étudiants passionné par l'aménagement, l'urbanisme et l'architecture, UrbaNews.fr est le moyen de faire partager cet engouement et de faire découvrir ce monde parfois complexe. Au travers de brèves, de dossiers, ou d'articles détaillés, nous avons l'ambition de fournir une information claire, concise et complète, sur laquelle il vous sera possible de réagir et de vous forger votre propre opinion.

Bonne visite sur UrbaNews.fr !

Name: La Revue Dessinée
Description:
100% enquêtes, 100% bande dessinée : La Revue Dessinée vous propose de retrouver le goût de l'info.

Tous les trois mois, sur abonnement ou dans toutes les bonnes librairies, vous trouverez 200 pages d'informations fouillées, qui éclairent notre société, réalisées par des binômes de dessinateurs et de journalistes. Et sans pub !

Notre revue a pour ambition de redonner du temps au traitement de l'information. Une information critique, engagée mais pas militante : nous sommes attachés à la diversité des points de vue et des formes. C'est pourquoi vous découvrirez dans nos pages toutes sortes de sujets, sur l'économie, l'écologie, la politique, la société, la musique, le cinéma, les guerres ou les utopies.

Retrouver du plaisir et du sens en s'informant grâce à la bande dessinée, c'est le pari de La Revue Dessinée. Lancée en septembre 2013, elle est aujourd'hui tirée à plus de 20 000 exemplaires.

Name: NWT Näringsliv
Description: Här hittar du alla nyheter näringslivet i Värmland.

Name: Magazine DOMODECO
Description:
Le magazine deco-archi-design de référence sur la région Rhône-Alpes, qui depuis 10 ans explore les tendances dans ce domaine et présente les plus belles réalisations des architectes, architectes d’intérieur, décorateurs et designers.

Un contenu « national et international » pointu, décryptant les tendances et les dernières nouveautés produits sourcées par la rédaction sur les plus grands salons dédiés à la décoration, à l’architecture et au design.

Le magazine (7 numéros par an + une édition BtoB Carnet de Projets, dédiée aux architectes et architectes d'intérieur) est diffusé dans les établissements et commerces haut de gamme ayant une clientèle premium : showrooms dédiés à la décoration et à l’aménagement de la maison, hôtels de luxe, restaurants, golfs, agences immobilières, études notariales, boutiques de prêt-à-porter de marques, concessionnaires automobiles premium, etc.

Il est également envoyé par courrier nominatif aux architectes, architectes d’intérieur, décorateurs, agenceurs, bureaux d’études des départements 74, 73, 69, 42, 38  et 01.

Le magazine est offert aux visiteurs des salons et événements dédiés à la décoration, à l’architecture et au design dont DOMODECO est partenaire presse : les salons grand public de la région et les salons professionnels (MAISON&OBJET PARIS, ARCHITECT@WORK LYON, ÉQUIPHOTEL PARIS).

DOMODECO c'est également une forte présence digitale avec un site internet www.domodeco.fr et le e-magazine envoyé à plus de 6 000 contacts (les inscrits à la newsletter ainsi que les professionnels).

Name: The Times of Northwest Indiana
Description:
The Times Media Company publishes The Times of Northwest Indiana, a newspaper covering Northwest Indiana and Chicago's southeast suburbs, as well as INBusiness and other publications. Look for videos and additional information at nwi.com. 

The Times Media Company provides award-winning coverage of news that's important to you. We deliver our stories on multiple platforms so you can read it how and when it's convenient for you.

Name: Mumbai Mirror
Description: Mumbai News with photos and videos. Get all latest and breaking Mumbai news here includes current affairs, entertainment, sports & Mumbai city news online.

Name: The Stranger
Description:
The Stranger defines, defends, and sometimes defies the culture and politics of Seattle.

Our coverage arises from a resolutely urban point of view, offering a unique perspective on the topics that matter most to people who live, work, and play in Seattle. Our original news reporting is relentless and outspoken. Our smart, funny entertainment coverage sets the tone of the city’s cultural conversation. And our innovative, interactive calendar, EverOut, is Seattle’s most popular and exhaustive source of event information.  

The Stranger is unpredictable, and we’re not always nice. But we are unmistakably on the side of our city and our readers. We love Seattle so much that we want more of it: more housing, more transit options, more bars and restaurants, more people. We take our reporting seriously—we won a Pulitzer Prize for feature writing—but we are just as committed to gleefully f*cking around.

We look at mundane life from an armchairological lens. We hope to learn and enrich ourselves as we write, and also support our readers in making sense of ourselves- in terms of our choices, behaviors, social structures, ideologies, utopias, and feelings.

Apart from serving as a popular platform for writers, we focus on learning from academics and making them popular. We are neither a state-centric journalistic platform, nor a power-centric propaganda machine. We are here to feel the reader, the one with and the one within ourselves. We focus on art, philosophy and theeling, rather than news stories.

Name: La Revue nouvelle
Description:
La Revue nouvelle is a monthly magazine that tackles a wide range of topics. Based in Brussels, it covers social, political, economic, cultural, literary, artistic and religious issues. Founded in 1945, its initial purpose is more pertinent than ever : to bring about an exchange of ideas and a multifaceted approach to today’s world. It has become increasingly apparent that democracy extends beyond the institutions and implementation of political decisions to which we tend to reduce it. The primary aim of La Revue nouvelle is to foster our democratic ethos and culture as a shared way of thinking, free from the dogma and ideology that all too often dominate.

The resolutely French-speaking Belgian roots of La Revue nouvelle’s editorial policy invite debate in a context where platforms for truly free speech are few. Overshadowed by the rise of Flemish identity, leftist in a right-wing world, La Revue nouvelle can be defined on several counts as a minority publication. It is therefore dedicated to clarifying conflicts as well as to creativity, openness to innovation and their translation into original propositions.
La Revue nouvelle was founded in 1945, just after World War Two, in the moral and intellectual turbulence of the liberation. It has long been situated to the left of the mainstream "Belgian Christian world". Since its inception, La Revue nouvelle has published more than 600 editions at a rate of 10 per year. Among its analyses, some marked a milestone in history and contributed to the magazine’s notoriety : decolonization, the fight for freedom of education, feminism, social security and health policy, the evolution of the Christian world, analysis of the political parties, State reform, immigration, ethical questions, the Israel-Palestine conflict, ecology... Today, the "progressive" nature of the magazine and its independence from institutions and ideologies link it strongly to a vision of justice, freedom, cultural respect and willingness to listen.

Name: Madhyamam
Description:
The Madhyamam saga began in 1987. At Silver Hills near Calicut, it was inaugurated by Kuldip Nayar, veteran Indian journalist. Vaikom Muhammed Basheer, the doyen of modern Malayalam literature, saw in it the birth of a silver star. A prophecy that lent substance to the evolution of the paper. The paper was led in its infancy by luminaries like K C Abdullah, P K Balakrishnan and K A Kodungallur.

Madhyamam is run by the Ideal Publications Trust, which aims at providing nonpartisan and value-based journalistic service beyond considerations of profit and the demeaning compulsions of the market. Its policy emphasises the need for the media to rise above sectarianism and market-driven profiteering pressures that have beset the post-independence Indian journalism. It calls for lending voice to the voiceless majority in society. Madhyamam set new trends in news content, advertisements, visuals and social commitment.

Name: Tech AI Magazine
Description:
Tech AI Magazine stands at the forefront of artificial intelligence journalism, delivering authoritative insights that bridge the gap between innovation and implementation. 

Our editorial mandate serves a sophisticated audience spanning from emerging practitioners to C-suite executives and technological architects. We deliver incisive analysis of industry developments, breakthrough innovations, and strategic applications that drive the AI ecosystem forward.

Our differentiated approach combines:

Strategic Depth: Comprehensive coverage of AI, machine learning, and emerging technologies, with particular emphasis on practical applications and business impact.

Knowledge Architecture: Carefully structured content that builds fundamental understanding while exploring advanced concepts, ensuring value for readers at every expertise level.

Industry Intelligence: In-depth analysis of market trends, technological breakthroughs, and strategic implementations that shape the future of AI adoption.

Community Leadership: A dynamic platform fostering high-level discourse among industry leaders, practitioners, and innovators, facilitating knowledge exchange and professional growth.

Through our monthly features, including our cornerstone 'AI Fundamentals' series, we illuminate the path forward in artificial intelligence. Our expert editorial team, supported by leading industry voices, ensures consistently superior coverage of this rapidly evolving field.

Join the vanguard of AI innovation with Tech AI Magazine, where we transform technological complexity into strategic advantage. Your journey into the future of AI begins here.

Name: Misr Online
Description:
رسالة موقع مصر أون لاين

 تقديم خدمة عربية، متميزة، متخصصة، سريعة، سهلة، ومجانية، عن طريق الإنترنت، لتصل إلى كل عربي في جميع أنحاء العالم، دون قيد أو حد.

مصر أون لاين يقدم لك خدمة اعلانية مجانية اعرض ما تملك واطلب ماتريد كل ذلك مباشرة وبدون وسيط .. ويمكنك موقعنا من أضافة اعلاناتك المبوبة مجاناً .. مصر أون لاين, أكبر بوابة مصرية اعلانية, تجارة الكترونية, أعلانات تجارية, سوق الأنترنت, بوابة مصر الالكترونية.

أنطلاق موقع مصر أون لاين

في 18/03/2008م الموافق 10 ربيع الاول 1429 هجري أنطلق موقع وبوابة مصر أون لاين سوق الإنترنت المصري العربي الموقع الذي يقدم لك خدمة الاعلانات المبوبة المجانية المباشرة في الإنترنت لأي سلعة بضاعة أو خدمة، تود عرضها أو طلبها علي بوابة مصر أون لاين الالكترونية.

يحتوي موقع مصر أون لاين على آلاف البضائع والخدمات المعروضة من أصحابها مباشرة، لتستطيع أنت الآن استعراض هذه البضائع والخدمات، والاتصال بأصحابها مباشرة والتفاوض معهم بدون وسيط.

وإذا أردت أن تعلن عن أي بضاعة أو خدمة، فكل ما عليك هو زيارة صفحة إضافة إعلان، وإضافة إعلانك هناك، لينشر مباشرةً ومجاناً في سوق الإنترنت العربي مصر أون لاين، ويشاهده ملايين المتصفحين. علماً أنه يجب عليك قبل ذلك الحصول على عضوية موقع مصر أون لاين المجانية عن طريق التسجيل في الموقع.
