Name: Viðskiptablaðið
Description:
Viðskiptablaðið var stofnað 20. apríl árið 1994 sem vikublað um viðskipti og efnahagsmál. Blaðið kom þá út á miðvikudögum.

Í janúar 2004 breyttist útgáfan en frá þeim tíma kom blaðið einnig út á föstudögum. Viðskiptablaðinu var síðan breytt í dagblað í febrúar 2007 og kom út fjórum sinnum í viku, frá þriðjudegi til föstudags, fram í nóvember 2008 þegar því var breytt í vikublað á nýjan leik. Frá og með desember 2008 kemur blaðið út á fimmtudögum. Fiskifréttir, sérblað um sjávarútvegsmál, fylgir með í hverri viku.

Megináhersla Viðskiptablaðsins er sem fyrr á viðskipti og efnahagsmál, auk þjóðmála. Auk þess er lögð áhersla á fjölbreytt viðtöl og úttektir, auk margskonar annars efnis.

Viðskiptablaðið fæst í áskrift og lausasölu.

Name: Nonada Jornalismo
Description:
"Jornalismo Travessia? A gente sabe o que é ler uma matéria e achar  raso e então perceber que se tivesse ido por outro caminho, por outro foco… carecia de ser muito mais embaixo, muito mais profundo – bem diverso do o que primeiro se pensou. 
Perceba, fazer bom jornalismo não é perigoso?"

Releitura de um trecho do livro Grande Sertão: Veredas.


Cultura ou travessia. Guimarães Rosa não viveu tempo suficiente para criar uma palavra que matasse a charada. O site Nonada – Jornalismo Travessia tenta ser uma resposta para essa dúvida. Travessia é, antes de tudo, amadurecimento. Acreditamos que o jornalismo cultural precisa amadurecer para vencer os obstáculos que os cercam. E talvez o principal deles seja lidar com as suas diferenças de concepções.

O Nonada entende a dicotomia intrínseca ao jornalismo que cobre a cultura e pretende aprender e refletir sobre isso – essa é a nossa travessia. Bom jornalismo cultural é aquele que, antes de tudo, pretende acrescentar mais ao leitor a partir de pautas e matérias elaboradas. Contamos com as editorias clássicas dentro de uma editoria de cultura, mas também três novas: Games, Comics e Economia da Cultura.

Para não ficar na superfície, é preciso mergulhar bem fundo, alcançar novos níveis. E o Nonada está aqui para isso, para encarar a cobertura da cultura no jornalismo como uma grande travessia, para nos arriscarmos a entendê-la e, por que não?, torná-la melhor.

Name: GETI - Grupo de Estudos de Tributação Internacional
Description:
GETI was created in 2012 by Edgar Santos Gomes, Ana Paula Saunders, Daniel Vieira de Biasi Cordeiro and Francisco Lisboa Moreira with the sole purpose of developing the International Tax environment in Brazil. GETI brings together professionals with solid professional experience in Brazil and abroad and academic background in renowned universities in the field of International taxation such as Leiden, New York University and King’s College University.

The theoretical study of the International Tax Law has advanced in an evident way in the last decade driven by a need to further develop tax systems around the world towards more balanced revenue distribution amongst countries. However, despite the progress made so far, we still have a long way to go. GETI focus is to enhance the debate on International Tax bringing awareness on the complexities of the subject through workshops, seminars, publications of articles and books, group meetings and constant study and debate.

GETI is devoted to issues as to the OECD / G-20 BEPS Project, Transfer Pricing, OECD Model Tax Convention and other controversial topics of international tax mostly impacting Brazilian cross border businesses, such as taxation of services and royalties and cost sharing. 

GETI considers issues that are on the International Tax agenda, without losing sight of the connection with the reality of the political and economic discussions undergoing in Brazil, including Brazil’s agenda to become a member of OECD.

If you are a Tax professional, someone who wants to do business with Brazil or just an enthusiastic in the amazing world of International Taxation, please follow us, or send us an email, we will be more than happy to connect with you.

Contato: getinternacional@gmail.com

Through in-depth interviews with entrepreneurs and investors, we uncover the stories behind their success—how they built their ventures and the key insights fueling their investment strategies.

Name: De Twentsche Courant Tubantia
Description:
De Twentsche Courant Tubantia is een Nederlands regionaal dagblad dat verschijnt in Twente en de Achterhoek. De Twentsche Courant Tubantia publiceert het nieuws en de achtergronden van en over Twente, de Achterhoek, Nederland en de wereld. In de krant, op de website, via E-paper en nieuwsapps voor iPad en smartphones. 

De Twentsche Courant Tubantia is onderdeel van Wegener Media, de grootste uitgever van regionale dagbladen in Nederland. Dagelijks bezorgt Wegener 0,9 miljoen dagbladen bij haar lezers in een groot deel van het land.

Name: Groupe L'Itinéraire
Description: Le Groupe L'Itinéraire est un organisme de charité qui gère des entreprises d'économie sociale (Le Magazine L'Itinéraire, le Café L'Itinéraire, Les Productions L'Itinéraire, le magazine Géotourisme) qui permettent de faire travailler des personnes connaissant des difficultés d'adaptation au marché de l'emploi actuel.

Name: L'Hebdo du Vendredi
Description: Journal hebdomadaire d'information et de culture locales avec 3 éditions, à Reims, Épernay et Châlons-en-champagne.

Name: Kontan
Description:
KONTAN adalah merek perusahaan media yang beralamat kantor di Gedung Kontan, Jalan Raya Kebayoran Lama Nomor 1119, Jakarta Selatan 12210, DKI Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Grahanusa Mediatama (PTGM) adalah nama perusahaan yang mengusung merek KONTAN.

PTGM merupakan bagian dari kelompok usaha Kompas Gramedia yang didirikan oleh P.K. Ojong dan Jakob Oetama sejak 28 Juni 1965. Pada 27 September 1996, Tabloid Kontan terbit pertama kali dan memulai kiprahnya sebagai media yang fokus pada ekonomi, bisnis, dan investasi.

Kini, KONTAN mempunyai tiga produk cetak, yaitu Tabloid Kontan, Harian Kontan, dan Edisi Khusus Kontan. Di samping produk cetak, KONTAN juga mengembangkan Laman Kontan.co.id yang merupakan laman berita dalam jaringan (daring). Kontan.co.id juga memayungi replika tiga produk cetak Kontan dalam bentuk digital: Epaper.Kontan.co.id

Melalui produk cetak dan produk digital, KONTAN berkembang mejadi perusahaan media ekonomi, bisnis, dan investasi yang mengusung visi Berdayakan Ekonomi Indonesia. Edukasi merupakan salah satu roh KONTAN dalam mengembangkan bisnis jasa, yaitu melalui Kontan Academy, Kontan Share & Learn, dan Kontan Publishing.

KONTAN juga membuka diri terhadap kerja-sama Business to Business (B2B) dalam bentuk riset, data, strategic branding, image building lewat event-event yang diselenggarakan KONTAN. Kebutuhan pengembangan platform yang beragam dan semain kaya, membuat KONTAN memenuhi kebutuhan informasi pembaca melalui Kontan TV, platform konten video daring melalui YouTube.

Situs berita: http://www.kontan.co.id
Produk replika cetak: https://epaper.kontan.co.id
Produk cetak: Harian Kontan, Tabloid Kontan, dan Edisi Khusus (bulanan)
Seminar, workshop, & inhouse training: http://kontanacademy.com
Special news: https://insight.kontan.co.id
Press release community: https://pressrelease.kontan.co.id

Name: Fleurus Presse
Description:
FLEURUS PRESSE, éditeur de presse jeunesse depuis 1929, édite une quinzaine de titres jeunesse éducatifs et distractifs, et publie chaque année près de 11 millions de magazines, majoritairement à destination des abonnements.

FLEURUS PRESSE édite des marques fortes dans l’univers de l’édition presse, livre ou numérique dont Papoum, Abricot, Pirouette, Je Lis Déjà, Mille et une histoires, Quelle Histoire Magazine, Histoires Vraies, Les P’tites Filles à la Vanille, Les P’tites Princesses, Les P’tites Sorcières, Le Monde des Ados, Tout Comprendre, Comment Ca Marche et Réponse à Tout.

Name: The Capital Times
Description:
The Cap Times is a news and progressive opinion organization in Madison, Wisconsin, daily online and in print every Wednesday. We have a membership program where our readers make contributions to support our newsroom, and an array of newsletter options.

About us
Until 2008, the Cap Times published a newspaper Mondays through Saturdays. The paper ceased daily paper publication with its April 26, 2008 edition and became a primarily Internet-based daily news operation while continuing to publish twice-weekly free paper supplements.

We began publishing as an afternoon daily on Dec. 13, 1917, competing directly with the Wisconsin State Journal, Madison's other daily newspaper. The Cap Times' founder, William T. Evjue, previously served as managing editor and business manager of the State Journal, a paper that had been a supporter of the progressive Robert La Follette, whom Evjue considered a hero. When La Follette began publicly opposing World War I, the pro-war State Journal abandoned La Follette. 

In response, Evjue abandoned the State Journal and formed his own newspaper, The Capital Times, one that would reflect the progressive views he espoused. The newspaper's motto was and continues to be "Wisconsin's Progressive Newspaper."

Name: Dissent Times
Description:
Technology has revolutionized and reshaped how our species has socially and economically developed over the past century. An ever-widening field of Mass Media for the 21st century, Dissent Times feel it is undoubtedly the most influential and concrete foundation of the society we live in today. In the current turmoil state and ongoing chaos in politics with propaganda and manipulative media, Dissent Times wants to give a vision to people through statistics and data where people can build their view and understand not just with authors' words but through actual ground figures. Believing in situations through which we evolve, Dissent Times always try to be even-handed to deliver the state of the story. 
With the motto “Keep it Real” Dissent times tends to represent the voice of Opposition Parties of the Country, Students, Doctors, Victims of Rape or any heinous Crime, the LGBTQ+ Community, and other underlying communities.

Name: La Marea
Description:
La Marea es una revista trimestral (desde 2026) en papel y un medio digital diario que apuesta por el periodismo riguroso y comprometido, especializado en el análisis, la investigación y la cultura. La publicación está editada por la cooperativa MásPúblico, 100% propiedad de sus socios lectores y trabajadores, lo que nos permite ser totalmente independientes de poderes políticos y empresariales.

La Marea surge de un naufragio: el cierre de la edición en papel del diario Público, el 23 de febrero de 2012. Cuando la empresa editora dejó de imprimir el rotativo de izquierdas, despidió al 85% de la plantilla. Un grupo de esos trabajadores, con el apoyo de cientos de lectores del periódico, se unió bajo el nombre de MásPúblico y trató de comprar la cabecera. Tras perder la subasta contra los antiguos dueños de Público, que recompraron su propio periódico por 500.000 euros, aquel grupo inicial decidió seguir adelante con su propio proyecto editorial y constituirse legalmente como una cooperativa. Durante esa primera etapa, se editaron dos ejemplares únicos (mayo y junio de 2012), con la cabecera Más Público. Tras un año de asambleas, debates y reuniones entre los socios lectores y trabajadores se eligió el nombre de La Marea para la nueva publicación, cuyo primer número salió a la venta el 21 de diciembre de 2012.
 
El proyecto pretendía abrir camino dentro de una profesión que no pasaba por sus mejores momentos: despidos colectivos, precariedad, influencias empresariales y políticas, autocensura y otros factores que han llevado al periodismo a vivir una de sus crisis más profundas, tanto laboral como de credibilidad. Por eso, en La Marea queremos reivindicar, con las palabras y con los hechos, el periodismo digno y verdaderamente independiente.

Description: The Varsity, founded in 1880, is the University of Toronto's and Canada's largest student newspaper. Description: Osservatorio Cultura Lavoro (OCL), community di esperti di lavoro, formazione e cultura, nonché testata giornalistica registrata. OCL, fondata da Antonella Salvatore, docente della John Cabot University e direttrice del placement e dell'alta formazione della stessa università, studia il mercato del lavoro non tanto da una angolazione prettamente numerica, quanto piuttosto da una prospettiva culturale educativa. Questo Osservatorio ha l'obiettivo di divulgare orientamento al lavoro, favorire cultura del lavoro e lo sviluppo di una scuola innovativa nel nostro paese. Name: The Providence Journal
Description:
The Providence Journal is southern New England's leading news organization that publishes high-quality, local content and offers innovative multimedia marketing solutions. Our local journalism appears in Rhode Island's largest newspaper The Providence Journal-winner of four Pulitzer Prizes- and on providencejournal.com - the region's most visited local website. Over half-a-million local adults consume Providence Journal news and information in print, online and across mobile devices.  

The Providence Journal newspaper and providencejournal.com are owned and operated by LMG Rhode Island Holdings, Inc., a subsidiary of New Media Investment Group Inc. (NYSE: NEWM).  New Media is focused primarily on investing in a high quality, diversified portfolio of local media assets, and on growing existing advertising and digital marketing businesses.  New Media is one of the largest publishers of locally based print and online media in the United States as measured by number of daily publications. As of September 3, 2014, New Media operates in 363 markets across 27 states and its portfolio of products include 451 community publications, 367 related websites, and six yellow page directories.

Métro rejoint maintenant plus d’un tiers des montréalais avec une portée de 36%. Il demeure également le 2e journal le plus lu dans la grande région métropolitaine.

Description: Sharing stories from the food system. Let's talk about it.

Name: La Marseillaise
Description:
Votre quotidien depuis 1943 !
La Marseillaise est diffusée dans les Bouches-du-Rhône, le Var, le Vaucluse, l’Hérault et le Gard.
Retrouvez toute l’actualité locale régionale, des analyses, des événements nationaux et internationaux, des reportages et de la confrontation d’idées, indispensable à la vie et au débat démocratique.

Name: Revue des Deux Mondes
Description: La Revue des Deux Mondes, l'une des plus anciennes revues vivantes d'Europe, se penche tous les mois sur l'actualité, en ayant toujours ce souci d’incarner l’esprit humaniste de ses débuts, à distance des adhésions idéologiques. Foncièrement généraliste, s’intéressant à tous les domaines de l’activité humaine, la Revue demeure fidèle à ses origines littéraires, philosophiques : la liberté d’esprit, l’indépendance intellectuelle, le goût pour l’exercice critique, le primat de la lucidité sur toute autre forme d’approche du réel.

Name: Právo21
Description:
Jsme skupina studentů, absolventů a přátel Masarykovy univerzity. Nebavilo nás přihlížet tomu, jak je právo pro ostatní španělskou vesnicí, a proto jsme se rozhodli založit si vlastní časopis.
Věříme, že nadešel čas vnímat právo trochu jinak, zorientovat se ve světě polopravd a zamyslet se, co všechno to dění kolem nás znamená. Z práva chceme udělat společensky užitečný nástroj tím, že o něm budeme psát srozumitelně a pro všechny.
Od roku 2016 jsme fakticky makali a neblábolili pod názvem FAKT. Časem jsme si uvědomili, že chceme prorážet novou cestu 21. stoletím, a proto jsme se s úderem roku 2018 přejmenovali na Právo21.

Sledujte nás i na dalších sociálních sítích:

MindLeaders draws immense strength and expertise from the thought leadership of Sanjeev and the seasoned core founding team with established credibility in delivering customized and scalable learning solutions. The team has successfully executed solutions for multiple Indian blue chip companies and multinational conglomerates across industries namely,  Automobiles, Telecom, Consumer Durable Durables & Electronics, Oil, Banking and Finance, Hospitality, FMCG, Consulting, IT&ITes, Pharma and Construction.

Name: Journal of Law & Cyber Warfare
Description:
The Journal of Law & Cyber Warfare is a public peer-reviewed professional forum for the open discussion and education of technology, business, legal, and military professionals concerning the legal issues of businesses and governments arising out of cyber-attacks or acts of cyber war. The Journal of Law and Cyber Warfare is published twice annually by top legal professionals and scholars from the law, technology, security, and business industries.

The views expressed in the Journal of Law and Cyber Warfare are those of the authors and not necessarily of the Journal of Law and Cyber Warfare.

stgallen 24 ist das Online-Portal der Stadt St.Gallen und des «Grünen Rings» und berichtet täglich über St.Gallen, Muolen, Häggenschwil, Wittenbach, Mörschwil, Eggersriet, Gaiserwald, Teufen und Speicher.

Name: Jornal Cruzeiro do Sul
Description:
Fundado em 1903, o jornal Cruzeiro do Sul mantém uma longa história de pioneirismo, sendo o primeiro jornal do interior a adotar o sistema de impressão off-set, o primeiro a trocar as máquinas de escrever por microcomputadores e o segundo a ser impresso em cores todos os dias. O Cruzeiro circula de domingo a domingo, com cadernos, suplementos e seções especiais. No Caderno de Economia estão as seções Trabalho, Pequenas Empresas, Informática, Terceiro Setor, Agronegócio e Ciência & Tecnologia. Produz os cadernos de Esportes, Turismo, Ela, Casa & Acabamento, Mais Sabores e Saúde. E, também, os suplementos Cruzeirinho, Motor e Mais TV. Anualmente, são confeccionadas os suplementos especiais Idiomas Condomínios, revista A Cidade, revista Educação.

O Cruzeiro do Sul é um jornal de leitura familiar. Alcança a maioria dos seus leitores ainda na mesa do café. É lido pelo pai de família, pela mãe, pelos filhos. É um poderoso agente formador de opinião. Líder em todos os segmentos sociais e econômicos da população, o Cruzeiro do Sul é o melhor veículo de vendas para qualquer tipo de serviços ou bens, sejam estes de longa duração e preço elevado ou de curta duração e preço acessível.

Circula em Sorocaba e em importantes cidades regionais: Alumínio, Araçoiaba da Serra, Boituva, Capela do Alto, Iperó, Itapetininga, Mairinque, Piedade, Pilar do Sul, Salto de Pirapora, São Miguel Arcanjo, São Roque, Tatuí, Votorantim e Sarapuí.

Name: Basta!
Description:
Basta! est un média indépendant qui croise depuis 15 ans les questions sociales et écologiques. Il est piloté par une association à but non lucratif. Sans publicité ni abonnement, Basta! est financé à 85% par les dons des lectrices et lecteurs.

 Rejoignez la communauté de nos soutiens : https://basta.media/don

Basta! c'est :

- un article long format original publié chaque jour : enquête de fond, reportage, entretien, points de vue de chercheur·euses sur l'actualité.

- des axes éditoriaux forts sur les questions qui concernent le plus grand nombre : agriculture et alimentation, conditions de travail et droits sociaux, libertés fondamentales, avenir des services publics, climat et biodiversité.

- une vue une vue à 360° sur la richesse de la presse indépendante en France grâce au Portail des médias libres (https://portail.basta.media/) et à nos newsletter "Chez les indés" (Pssst, c'est gratuit et c'est par ici : https://basta.media/inscription-newsletter).

- une équipe de 9 salariés travaillant dans une culture de coopération, de consensus et d'écoute. 

Basta! ce n'est pas : 

- un organe de presse sûr de sa vérité, proposant une grille de lecture unique et figée.

- un pseudo média qui se contente de relayer des informations produites par d'autres.

Name: Universitas

Name: Galway Advertiser
Description:
The Galway Advertiser is by far the highest circulating local paper in the country, free or paid for, with over 50,000 copies published every Thursday. Our average pagination is 120 pages. 29,043 (ABC Jan – Dec 2017) are delivered directly to homes throughout the city, and also to homes in some county towns. The other 20,957 papers are delivered by bulk distribution throughout the city and county, and Thursday is known as ‘Advertiser’ day throughout Galway. We are the only local newspaper in the West of Ireland to still retain our ABC Certification.

We also email out a further 30,000 papers in digital format to subscribers each Thursday. 

Strength of the Galway Advertiser: 
The results of a recent IPSOS MRBI survey of media consumption in Galway City and County (conducted April 2017) revealed that 79% of people in Galway City have read The Galway Advertiser in the past week. 

These results also demonstrate that the readership of The Galway Advertiser is spread across all age groups and demographics, with those in the 18-34 age group almost as likely to read the newspaper as those aged over 55. 

You can view this survey at http://bit.ly/IPSOSMRBI

Name: The Asahi Shimbun Company

With a robust domestic and international reporting network, we aim to illuminate people, ideas, and information—connecting society and inspiring hope for the future.

Description:
Toronto Caribbean News is Toronto's largest Caribbean community newspaper focused on strengthening, building and empowering the community. We consciously choose to focus on the positives, deliberately showcasing success, highlighting the loving nature of humanity, advancing and strengthening the confidence of those people that are doing their part to make a difference, and shape the legacy of tomorrow.

For more information on advertising and story coverage, please feel free to contact us at 647-722-6298 or http://torontocaribbean.com

Name: PHTM - Private Hire & Taxi Monthly Newspaper
Description:
Established in 1992, PHTM (Private Hire and Taxi Monthly) is the largest trade publication in the UK for the private hire and taxi industry.

PHTM NEWSPAPER DISTRIBUTION:  
A free copy is mailed to the proprietor of every taxi, private hire and chauffeur company in the UK as well as a number of driver /owner driver subscription copies; and shrink wrapped bundled copies are sent by courier nationwide to council taxi licensing offices, MOT stations, trade association and garages where drivers pick them up.
 
Furthermore, more than one person reads each copy as the paper tends to get passed around amongst drivers (circa 300,000 taxi drivers in the UK) and is also available to read online on our website http://www.phtm.co.uk   – along with the back issues.
 
Traffic is also driven to the digital copy of the paper via our social media coverage where we currently have over 20,000 members of the trade following us on Facebook:  https://en-gb.facebook.com/PHTM.Newspaper and over 5,000 on Twitter: https://twitter.com/PHTMNewspaper 
 
We have also recently launched our new PHTM APP 
for apple : phtm.co.uk/app/apple and android: phtm.co.uk/app/android

Furthermore we have connections to over 60 trade WhatsApp/ Facebook  groups and our affiliated local and national trade associations across the UK also email the link the paper to all their members. 

PHTM EXPO 
ThIs is the largest annual gathering of our trade. We have organised this two day exhibition for the last 28 years. Visitors come from all over the UK to see the latest trade vehicles, technology and products offered from over 60 exhibitors from across the world; as well as  participate in a number of seminars hosted by specialist speakers who have expert knowledge of our industry.

**PHTM EXPO 2021 - 14 & 15 September : ArenaMK, Milton Keynes**

Advertising or exhibition queries please contact Liza Lipson 0161 688 7777 or
info@phtm.co.uk

Name: Le Drenche
Description:
Le Drenche est un journal qui, pour chaque grande question d'actualité, propose au lecteur :

- deux tribunes d'avis opposés, chacune rédigée par une personne compétente, légitime, et engagée.
 
Le but est qu’en lisant les arguments du Pour et du Contre, le lecteur se forge une opinion : SON opinion.
La finalité est de susciter et faciliter l'engagement citoyen, avec des liens forts avec le monde de la "civic tech".

Le Drenche existe en version web sur ledrenche.fr et en version papier, mensuelle, tirée à 60 000 exemplaires.

Name: Dagbladet
Description:
Dagbladet er en norsk avis, grunnlagt i 1869 - i mange år kjent som den fremste, norske radikale kulturavis.  

Dagbladet ble den første riksdekkende nyhetsavisen som lanserte egen nettutgave, 8. mars 1995. I dag leses vi enten på papir, desktop, mediebrett eller på mobil. Dagbladet er en av de største i Norge med 2,7 millioner unike på desktop/mediebrett og 1,9 millioner på mobil. Ansvarlig redaktør i dag er John Arne Markussen.

Nyheter er viktigst. Vår viktigste jobb er å gi leserne den grundigste dekningen av de største sakene og kombinere det spisse og det brede. Sport, kultur og debatt er avisas sterke side og noe vi satser på.  Gjennom reportasjer og kommentarer, skal Dagbladet være en sentral bidragsyter i offentlige debatt.

I 2013 ble Dagbladet kjøpt opp av Aller media - som i dag er et av Norges største mediehus.

Name: Revue Esprit
Description:
Revue mensuelle indépendante fondée en 1932 par Emmanuel Mounier, Esprit est une revue d'idées engagée dans son temps. Elle s'efforce d'illustrer une approche généraliste de notre présent, entre la culture médiatique et les études savantes. Généraliste et soucieuse de l'intérêt général, elle se consacre à décrypter les évolutions de la politique, de la société et de culture, en France et dans le monde.

Sous-titrée depuis sa fondation "revue internationale", Esprit s'est toujours intéressée à ce qui se passe hors de l'hexagone et a tissé de nombreux liens avec des réseaux intellectuels à l'étranger. Son travail n'est donc pas pris de court dans le contexte de mondialisation, qui exige de penser autrement les liens entre l'esprit européen, les valeurs occidentales et le reste du monde.

Chaque numéro est construit autour d'un dossier, suivi d'un choix varié d'articles et précédé d'un journal "à plusieurs voix" consacré à des textes brefs, plus subjectifs, parfois polémiques. Un panorama de l'actualité éditoriale ("Culture") offre quelques repères dans l'abondance de livres et de revues de parution récente.

Name: MAXMAG
Description:

Η κάθε στήλη μας αντιπροσωπεύει και ένα ξεχωριστό πεδίο, καλύπτοντας με αυτό τον τρόπο ένα ευρύ πλαίσιο ενδιαφερόντων του κάθε αναγνώστη ξεχωριστά. Μέσα από αυτό θα μπορείς να ενημερωθείς για ό,τι απασχολεί την επικαιρότητα, να ταξιδέψεις…., να μάθεις για νέα πράγματα και να διαβάσεις συνεντεύξεις που σίγουρα δεν θα μείνουν απαρατήρητες!

Η ομάδα του ΜAXMAG αποτελείται από άτομα διαφορετικών προσωπικοτήτων και ενδιαφερόντων, που μέσα από το περιοδικό έχουν την δυνατότητα να εκφράσουν τις ξεχωριστές πτυχές τους, όπως και να υπηρετήσουν τον τομέα της αρθρογραφίας, που τόσο αγαπούν. Αυτήν η διαφορετικότητα είναι που κάνει το MAXMAG τόσο ξεχωριστό.

Το MAXMAG είστε εσείς!
Join and enjoy us!

Name: مجلة هي | Hia Magazine
Description:
"هيَ"، مجلة عربية - تصدرها المجموعة السعودية للأبحاث والإعلام "SRMG"- تتميز بمواكبة إهتمامات  المرأة في الشرق الأوسط وتقديم كل ماهو جديد، بإرث عريق يمتد لنحو ثلاثة عقود في عالم الأناقة والموضة وأسلوب الحياة الفاخرة. تغطي "هيَ" عبر محتواها المبتكر والمتجدد موضوعات واسعة في عالم الأزياء والرشاقة والجمال والفن والمجتمع والسياحة وأنماط الحياة، وكل ما يخص المرأة العصرية التي تطمح للذوق الرفيع.
منذ انطلاقتها عام 1992 من لندن، تمكنت مجلة "هيَ" من خلق توجّه فريد في عالم الأناقة والموضة الفاخرة، عبر فريق تحرير شغوف وخبير بالمواضيع التي تهّم المرأة، ومتمرس في صناعة محتوى متعدد الأشكال والصيغ، كالتقارير المعمقة والنصائح والتجارب والتغطيات واللقاءات مع كبار المصممين من دور الأزياء العالمية وخبراء التجميل والعطور والمشاهير من أنحاء العالم.


وطوال تاريخها، إستمرت مجلة "هيَ" وفّية لدعم وتمكين المرأة في المنطقة، حيث وفرّت منصة لرواية القصص الرصينة والموثوقة التي تلهم الجمهور من خلال مقابلات مميزة وحصرية مع شخصيات عربية بارزة مثل الملكة "رانيا العبد الله" ملكة الأردن، و"بينظير بوتو" رئيسة وزراء باكستان السابقة، والسفيرة الحالية للمملكة العربية السعودية في الولايات المتحدة الأميرة "ريما بنت بدر آل سعود"، بالإضافة إلى نخبة من الشخصيات العالمية مثل "إليزابيث هيَرلي"، و"كارلا بروني"، و"دومينيكو دولتشي وستيفانو غابانا".


وفي إطار خلق ارتباط وثيق بين جمهور المجلة وعالم الأناقة والموضة، استحدثت "هيَ" مؤتمر "هيَ هَبْ"، والذي يعد أكبر مؤتمر للموضة والأناقة في المنطقة، إذ أُقيم للمرة الأولى في عام 2021، بهدف تقديم مجموعة من التجارب والأنشطة التفاعلية والإبداعية والجلسات الحوارية والمعارض وورش العمل، بحضور نخبة من السيدات الرائدات في السينما والموسيقى والأزياء والجمال.

كما تواصل "هي" تنويع وسائط نشر أخبارها إلى المتلقين عبر حلّة متجددة ومنتجات وتنسيقات تواكب مفاهيم "استهلاك المعلومات" وتلبي تطلعات جمهورها، سواءً عبر الموقع الإلكتروني المتطور الذي يقدم تجربة غير مسبوقة، أو عبر قناة بودكاست "هيَ" وسلسلة الفيديوهات التي تكشف عن أحدث صيحات الأزياء والموضة، بشكل يتناغم مع المحتوى الإبداعي والمبتكر الذي يتطلع إليه جمهورها.

Name: The Daily Star
Description:
Founded in June 1952, to serve the growing number of expatriates lured by the oil industry, The Daily Star initially circulated in Lebanon but rapidly spread its wings to cover most of the Arab world. Its publisher, Kamel Mrowa, already owner and editor-in-chief of the successful Arabic daily Al-Hayat, not only wanted to relay news of their own countries to expatriates but also to introduce the region to non-Arabic readers. His vision made The Daily Star the leading English language newspaper in the Middle East throughout the 60s.

After the onset of peace in 1991 and establishment of a master plan to rebuild the country three years later, Jamil Mroue was determined to start again. In 1996,as the paper recommenced publishing.

The end of 2010 saw The Daily Star acquired by new investors determined to raise the bar in order for the paper to continue its evolution and development in harmony with global media trends and advanced technology. The Daily Star, in this regard, sped up its reconstruction program to enhance the newsroom and spread the source of coverage regionally and internationally.

The Daily Star on-line edition is the Web's leading source of Lebanese and regional news. redesigned to offer breaking news and on-the-spot follow-up. The site brings together an unmatched combination of high-quality content and powerful interactive capabilities. The site allows you to access continuous regional and Lebanese news coverage on politics, business, religion and much more.

The Daily Star ceased publication in both print (February 2020) and online (October 2021)

Name: Ekstra Bladet
Description:
Ekstra Bladet er Danmarks stærkeste digitale nyhedsmedie. Hver dag er vi i kontakt med tæt på en million brugere, der følger breaking news i Danmark og resten af verden. 

Vi prioriterer både de hurtige nyheder samt større graverprojekter, der bl.a. har bidraget til Cavlingprisen i 2022. Målsætningen er klar; vi vil være det fortrukne medie af nyheder, underholdning og sport - men vi gør det med kant. 

Vi er i alt 300 dedikeret medarbejder, der arbejder målrettet på at levere relevant indhold til danskerne døgnet rundt. 

Besøg os på: https://ekstrabladet.dk/

Name: Nuestro Diario
Description:
El diario de mayor circulación en Guatemala, con una cobertura nacional estrategicamente regionalizada, para que nuestros anunciantes enfoquen sus esfuerzos publicitarios donde mas les interesa y entregarle el mejor contenido de cada región a nuestros lectores.

La primera edición llegó a los guatemaltecos el viernes 16/1/1998 y desde entonces nos esforzamos todos los días para entregar las noticias como son.

Nuestra Visión: 
Ser un diario popular, ligero, con contenido de calidad, centrado en el lector, el de mayor circulación en América.

Nuestra Misión:
Lograr una mejora en la calidad de vida de nuestro lector, en lo social, lo económico, a través del aporte informativo, comercial, educativo y de entretenimiento.

Nuestros valores son:
-Honestidad.
-Fidelidad.
-Ecuanimidad.

Nuestras principales características culturales:
-La prioridad # 1 es satisfacer el interés del lector.
-Continúo aprendizaje e innovación.
-Compartir la riqueza y los conocimientos.
-Operar bajo los más altos estándares éticos.
-Ser ejemplo de valores y virtudes periodísticas y empresariales en la sociedad en donde operamos.
-Ser el medio más influyente en los sectores populares.
-Desempeño de la más alta calidad en todas la áreas profesionales a nivel mundial.
-Mantener un alto estándar en la credibilidad editorial y comercial.
-Enseñar y exigir en base al ejemplo.
-Asumir las responsabilidades en los fracasos y otorgar el reconocimiento de los éxitos a los subalternos.
-Claridad y transparencia en nuestras actuaciones, no solo siendo honestos sino además aparentándolo.
-Abiertos a las nuevas ideas y a la crítica constructiva.
-Siempre anteponer los intereses de la institución a los intereses personales.
-Todo desacuerdo o reclamo entre los colaboradores debe manejarse profesionalmente de frente entre los involucrados, y nunca por la espalda.
-Manejar el despido de la gente con decoro y empatía.
-Todo problema, error o falta debe enfrentarse para buscar una solución de una manera conjunta.

Name: Magazine Présences
Description: Magazine dédié à l'information économique et à l'actualité des entreprises du sud-Isère, édité par la Chambre de commerce et d'industrie de Grenoble.

Name: Groupe actu
Description:
Le Groupe actu est un groupe média centré sur l’information et la communication de proximité. 1er groupe de Presse Hebdomadaire Régionale en France et éditeur du site actu.fr, il rayonne partout sur le territoire grâce à ses 95 journaux et sa plateforme d'information multi-locale puissante.
Groupe actu est une filiale du groupe SIPA Ouest France, qui appartient à une association à but non lucratif, l’Association pour le Soutien des Principes de la Démocratie Humaniste.

Name: Al Majalla
Description:
Al Majalla has been the Middle East’s leading Arabic current affairs magazine for over forty years. First published in 1980, the magazine has gained a global reputation for in-depth insight into the Arab region and the Middle East’s impact on the world.  

 

As the region’s pioneering political and current affairs title, Al Majalla has maintained a persistent focus on delivering accurate, in-depth, and professional journalism that reflects the news and opinions of the Middle East. Al Majalla’s thought provoking insights have allowed the magazine to build a loyal and dedicated readership amongst political, scientific, cultural, and business leaders.  

 

Owned by SRMG, Al Majalla maintains the highest adherence to the editorial, ethical, and legal standards of the profession and its writers reflect a variety of opinion through rich, insightful, fact-based content.

Name: ZEIT für Unternehmer
Description:
ZEIT für Unternehmer ist das Magazin der ZEIT-Wirtschaftsredaktion. Es thematisiert die großen Fragen, die Unternehmer und Führungskräfte im Mittelstand bewegen und rückt jene in den Mittelpunkt, die Deutschlands Wirtschaft gestalten. Als größtes Wirtschaftsmedium für den Mittelstand liefert ZEIT für Unternehmer Entscheidern nützliches Wissen und berichtet über unternehmerische Leistungen, Innovationen und Rückschläge. Das Ziel: Leserinnen und Leser zu vernetzen, um voneinander zu lernen.

Abonnieren Sie jetzt unseren Newsletter und werden Sie Teil der ZEIT für Unternehmer-Community: 
https://zeitfuerx.de/newsletter-unternehmer/

Name: Escolas Exponenciais
Description:
O Escolas Exponenciais é uma instituição independente que nasceu com o intuito de ajudar o mercado do ensino privado no Brasil.

Através de pesquisas, estudos, análises, insights e eventos presenciais e online nosso objetivo é ser o parceiro ideal para as escolas privadas entenderem e alcançarem o exponencial!

Name: Employee Africa Magazine
Description:
Employee Africa Magazine is the premier platform dedicated to highlighting the evolving African workforce. We focus on future skills, innovation, and strategies to drive job creation for Africa’s youth. 

Our mission is to empower business leaders and policymakers to develop inclusive, agile, and future-ready workplaces. Through insightful articles, expert insights, and success stories, we aim to foster sustainable economic growth and unlock the potential of Africa’s young talent. 

Join us as we explore the trends and solutions shaping Africa's workforce of tomorrow.

Name: revue Sesame
Description:
Atypique et peu académique, un brin poil à gratter, la revue Sesame (Sciences et Société, Alimentation, Mondes agricoles et Environnement) offre un espace au débat d'idées. Elle permet l'instruction des tensions et des controverses qui traversent la société française et, au-delà, dans les champs de l'agriculture, l'alimentation, l'environnement et les sciences et techniques du vivant.

Son « ADN » ? Ainsi que l’indique clairement Philippe Mauguin, PDG d’Inrae et directeur de la publication, dans son édito du premier numéro : « Sesame n’est pas un nouveau support de communication et n’ambitionne pas de porter la voix officielle d’Inrae. Ce positionnement est souhaité et assumé ; il permettra le débat d’idées en confrontant les positions de personnalités de cultures et d’horizons variés ».

Name: Seven Days
Description:
Seven Days is an independent weekly newspaper covering Vermont news, politics, food, arts and culture. New issues are published each Wednesday and distributed free at 1,000 locations in Northern and Central Vermont.

The Seven Days website includes breaking news reports, videos, up-to-date event listings, job postings and personals, as well as content from current and past print issues and special publications. The company also organizes initiatives such as the Seven Daysies, the Vermont Tech Jam, the Good Citizen Challenge, Seven Days Burger Week and the Kids VT Spectactular Spectacular youth talent show.

Founded in 1995 by Pamela Polston and Paula Routly, Seven Days is now owned and run by Routly and a group of longtime employees.

Seven Days provides its award-winning journalism free of charge thanks to financial support from its advertisers and from grateful "Super Readers" who make one-time or monthly contributions.

Name: COURIER
Description: We empower individuals and communities through local reporting that helps people understand and affect the issues impacting their lives. Courier Newsroom, is a non-profit owned media company. Facts and first-hand sources are our north star, and we work to expose misinformation in all its forms. We believe the key to a strong democracy is an informed electorate and that the decline of local news around the country has negatively impacted civic engagement. We are investing in local journalism and storytelling that is thoughtful, informative, and relevant.

Name: Artsenkrant
Description:
Artsenkrant en Le journal du Médecin, beschikbaar in print en digitaal, zijn sinds jaar en dag de referentie voor Belgische huisartsen en specialisten. 

Ontdek onze club voor lezers met tal van voordelen: www.akclub.be of www.jmclub.be.

Name: Business Biscuit
Description:
Business news for smart cookies, for Wiltshire & Swindon, Bristol & Bath, and Berkshire.
BusinessBiscuit.com is packed with trusted B2B news about regional businesses, the local economy, networking opportunities and business events and an experts' column for business experts to share their knowledge.
We're the most followed B2B news site on LinkedIn in the region, sharing news written by our expert journalist and editor, Peter Davison, and Google loves the site.
Every week subscribers get a free roundup of the most important B2B news.
Subscribe and send in your news!

Name: People at Work mag
Description:
People at Work est un titre de presse professionnelle invitant les dirigeants et top managers à partager des éclairages et des bonnes pratiques sur l’Expérience Collaborateur, entendue comme la clé de voûte de l'entreprise de demain. 
Ce magazine est le seul titre de presse exclusivement dédié à l'Expérience Collaborateur, dans des dimensions QVT et RSE - Une Expérience Collaborateur répondant aux enjeux "People, Planet et Performance".
Le rôle de People at Work est de proposer des angles de réflexions et des propositions concrètes, entre analyses et bonnes pratiques pour "Être-Bien en entreprise".

Name: A3DM Magazine
Description:
A3DM est une plateforme dédiée à la fabrication additive, à l'impression 3D, au prototypage rapide et au développement produit. Celle-ci est née de la réussite d'A3DM Magazine, le premier magazine papier francophone du secteur.

Média spécialisé, A3DM traite de l’actualité du secteur de la fabrication additive, répond aux problématiques des fournisseurs et des utilisateurs, expose les nouveaux projets de R&D et autres découvertes scientifiques, présente des études de cas, etc. Aujourd'hui, A3DM se décline à travers de nombreux supports : magazine papier, site Internet, newletters, etc. Cette plateforme propose également un annuaire des entreprises du secteurs et des start-up, un catalogue des machines et des matériaux, ainsi qu'un site d'offres d'emploi.

Unique publication papier francophone du secteur, A3DM Magazine est née en janvier 2016. Cette revue est distribuée en France, en Belgique et en Suisse (ainsi que 1 % de la distribution à l'international). Deux principaux canaux de distribution permettront à de nombreux lecteurs de découvrir cette revue : un réseau de donneurs d’ordre (des secteurs de l’industrie aéronautique, aérospatiale et automobile, de la défense, de l’électronique, du médical et dentaire, des moteurs et turbines, du naval et nautique mais aussi du packaging, de la pharma, chimie et pétrochimie et enfin du ferroviaire) et une sélection d’événements tels que APS Meeting, 3D Print Show, le Formnext, les Assises européennes de la fabrication additive, etc.

Name: Mill Media
Description:
Founded to inspire a renaissance in high quality journalism in the UK, Mill Media has received financial backing from Sir Mark Thompson, the former head of the BBC and New York Times, and has been described as "one of the most interesting and impressive media startups of the last decade" by the FT's John Burn-Murdoch. 

Our journey started when Joshi Herrmann founded The Mill as a one-man-band in June 2020, a few months into the pandemic. The idea was very simple: would people start valuing and paying for local news again if it was done in a completely different way? More in-depth; more nuanced; with stories that were more enjoyable to read and weren’t covered in horrible advertising.

From there, we have grown into a fully-fledged media company. We now have have publications in six cities – including The Tribune in Sheffield and The Post in Liverpool, The Dispatch in Birmingham, The Bell in Glasgow and The Londoner in the capital – and more than 150,000 people have joined our mailing lists. Crucially, more than 9,000 members pay for and support our journalism, come to our events and shape what we cover.

In 2023, we raised money from a group of investors including CNN chief executive Sir Mark Thompson, media investor Turi Munthe, the leading economist Dame Diane Coyle and Axios publisher Nicholas Johnston. Thompson told the Guardian: “I’m backing The Mill because of the exceptional quality of its journalism and because it’s such an interesting and encouraging initiative. Britain’s cities need great commercially-sustainable journalism to inform the public and hold powerful institutions to account. That’s what The Mill and its sister publications were founded to do, and what they are consistently achieving.”

Name: Biologiste365
Description: Biologiste infos est le magazine d'information stratégique des services  de biologie hospitalière et des laboratoires privés de ville.

Name: هيئة الصحفيين السعوديين - Saudi Journalists Association
Magazine Lyon Éco & Culture
Description:
Média de terrain sur l’économie, l’innovation et la culture

 • +2 MILLIONS de vues en un an sur l’ensemble de ses supports

•  Sur Youtube, en tête des médias de la métropole avec les vidéos les plus regardées

• Une page livre avec une chronique hebdomadaire 

•  Parmi les médias les mieux référencés sur Google en France

Cette performance résulte de vos recherches, preuve de l’intérêt porté à vos préoccupations

• Fort de ses partenariats avec Global Industrie, FDDay, France Digitale, Zero to One (H7), etc, le Magazine couvre les entreprises innovantes en région, en France et à l’international. 

 Lyon Éco et Culture – Magazine des startups, PME, ETI et de la Culture 

 Rdv chaque mercredi à 7h pour de nouveaux articles longs formats
_____________________________________________________

#economie #dirigeant #portrait #entrepreneur #startup #ETI #PME #culture #Lyon

Name: Kristeligt Dagblad
Description:
Kristeligt Dagblad er avisen om livets store spørgsmål – den avis, der skriver mest om tro, etik og eksistens. Vi skriver om livsindhold og ikke livsstil, og vi tør prioritere vores avis og vælge fra, hvor det er nødvendigt.
Kristeligt Dagblad arbejder løbende på at styrke avisen. Vi går i dybden og fortæller baggrunden for nyhederne og sætter det hele i perspektiv. 

Vi har en stærk dækning af kultur og prioriterer den seriøse og grundige journalistik meget højt – måske er det netop det, der gør, at Kristeligt Dagblad har øget oplaget hvert eneste år siden 1994, og at Kristeligt Dagblad i dag er Danmarks hurtigst voksende avis.

Kristeligt Dagblad ejes af omkring 3000 aktionærer, hvoraf en stor del er læsere. Aktionærer med mere end 5 procent af aktiekapitalen: Kristeligt Dagblads Fond og Chr. Augustinus Fabrikker A/S.

Avisens ledelse består af:
Administrerende direktør: Hans-Christian Kock
Ansvarshavende chefredaktør: Jeppe Duvå
Chefredaktør: Karin Dahl Hansen
 
Følg avisen og læs mere online på www.k.dk

Name: Market_Insight
Description:
marketinsight.it is an online platform of economic and financial information founded by Alberto Nosari,  historical signature of Il Sole 24 Ore, which allows companies and investors to stay constantly updated on market trends, the main international benchmarks, strategies, results and press releases of listed companies.

A website  rich of informations with in-depth analysis of all the stock market indexes (AIM, SMALLCAP, MIDCAP, STAR, FTSEMIB), daily reports on the stock market sectors, analysis of stock performance and content linked to ESG issues, which are becoming significantly relevant and price sensitive.

As a demonstration of the quality of our analysis Market Insight is a supplier of the main Italian trading platforms: Fineco, Intesa SanPaolo, WeBank of the Banco BPM Group, BGSAXO born from the joint venture between SaxoBank and Banca Generali, IWBank and Directa. 

It also has a wide visibility on global financial providers thanks to its presence on Bloomberg and Factset platforms.

Name: Magazine Côte Basque Madame
Description:
Côte Basque Madame est un magazine local incontournable, publié trimestriellement avec 4 numéros par an. Disponible en kiosque et auprès de nos partenaires, il s’est imposé depuis plus de 10 ans comme le reflet de la richesse et de la diversité de notre territoire.   

Notre mission :
Mettre en lumière les femmes et les hommes qui façonnent le Pays basque et le Sud des Landes. Qu’ils soient entrepreneurs, artistes, sportifs, ou acteurs du développement durable, nous valorisons leurs initiatives économiques, culturelles, sportives et sociales avec passion et authenticité.  

Un engagement durable :  
Nous accordons une attention particulière au développement durable, et notre partenariat avec Basque Magazine illustre notre attachement à une vision commune pour notre région.  

Une équipe dédiée :  
- Sébastien, photographe et directeur de publication,  
- Christine, rédactrice en chef garante de notre ligne éditoriale,  
- Une équipe de journalistes, maquettistes, correcteurs et experts passionnés,  
- Nos chargés de clientèle, toujours à votre écoute.  

Avec vous, pour vous : 
Forts de notre légitimité et de notre influence, nous poursuivons cette aventure grâce à la fidélité et au soutien de nos annonceurs et lecteurs. Côte Basque Madame, c’est plus qu’un magazine : c’est une communauté engagée, à vos côtés.

Name: Puissance Hydro
Description:
Puissance Hydro est un magazine professionnel à destination des acteurs de l’hydroélectricité de petite et grande puissance. Il est édité par Owatt Média, un groupe de presse indépendant créé par 5 spécialistes de la presse et des médias depuis plus de 15 ans.

L’objectif de Puissance Hydro est d’informer de manière détaillée et sérieuse aussi bien les spécialistes du secteur que les amateurs intéressés par toutes les nouveautés et évolutions dans le domaine de la production hydroélectrique. D’où, un large éventail dans le choix des thèmes abordés car Puissance Hydro se veut le magazine de toute la filière hydroélectrique : de la petite puissance (quelques kW) à la grande puissance (GW).

Chaque numéro s’articule autour d’un dossier principal mais aussi autour de nombreuses rubriques : centrale à la loupe, portrait d’acteur, regards croisés, en pratique, note juridique, stratégie d’acteurs, sans oublier les nouveautés produits, les actus régionales, nationales et internationales, l’agenda…

En résumé, Puissance Hydro informe ses lecteurs sur l’économie, la politique, la recherche, l’innovation et l’évolution de cette filière qui, rappelons-le, est la 1ère des énergies renouvelables électriques en France !

Name: High North News
Description: International newspaper located in Bodø, Norway. We bring you news, analysis and debate about politics and business in the High North.

Name: De Limburger
Description:
De Limburger is er voor al het nieuws uit je regio. Maar ook voor het nieuws uit de rest van de wereld.

Onze journalisten zoeken uit wat de impact van het wereldnieuws is voor jou en alle andere Limburgers. Met De Limburger ben je altijd aangesloten. De Limburger is een uitgave van Mediahuis Limburg.

Name: SOLUTIONS Magazine
Description:
Understand, Decide, Act 
Technology at the service of business. At the rate of 4 articles per day,  4 bimonthly newsletters and quarterly e-Book, Solutions and Soluxions + LiveTECH decipher the changes taking place and especially arising opportunities.
Together, these two digital media focus their business technology action in two countries, Belgium and Luxembourg, via separate but complementary editions.
Sensitive to the culture and business networks in Belgium and Luxembourg, Solutions and Soluxions offer, via researched features and field interviews, a resolutely strategic interpretive lens that is oriented towards business as well as the profits that technologies generate.
By putting technology at the service of business, it is the whole company that becomes more responsive to the market, anticipating the needs of its customers, modifying its processes and improving the productivity of its employees. That is why, above and beyond ICT management, Solutions and Soluxions unite all of the decision-makers in the company involved in ICT projects.

Alain de Fooz, Editor

Name: Cardinal News
Description: Cardinal News is an independent, nonprofit, nonpartisan news site that serves Southwest and Southside Virginia.  We have no paywall and depend entirely on donations from readers. As a nonprofit that works virtually, we pay no shareholders, no landlords — so every dollar you give goes directly to supporting more journalism for Southwest and Southside Virginia.

Name: FLEISCHWIRTSCHAFT
Description:
FLEISCHWIRTSCHAFT
Fachinformationen von der Erzeugung über die Verarbeitung bis zur Vermarktung von Fleisch – die gesamte Prozesskette in einem Magazin. Durch die Zusammenarbeit mit (inter-)nationalen Experten erreicht die FLEISCHWIRTSCHAFT höchste Kompetenz und weltweite Geltung, vor allem im Bereich Technologie und Forschung. 
Impressum: https://www.fleischwirtschaft.de/service/impressum/
Datenschutz: https://www.fleischwirtschaft.de/service/datenschutz/

Name: Vagas Home Office
Description:
Nosso portal é a escolha certa para quem busca as melhores oportunidades de emprego em home office. Com foco em conectar profissionais a vagas de trabalho remoto, oferecemos conteúdos que vão além de simples listagens, ajudando você a encontrar flexibilidade e liberdade para trabalhar de qualquer lugar, de acordo com suas necessidades e objetivos pessoais.

Reconhecemos a importância de informações confiáveis e atualizadas. Nossa equipe especializada está constantemente pesquisando e verificando as melhores oportunidades disponíveis no mercado. Essas vagas abrangem empresas consolidadas e startups inovadoras que atuam em setores diversos, como tecnologia, finanças, marketing, educação e muito mais. Cada vaga publicada é descrita em detalhes, com informações sobre requisitos, benefícios e os diferenciais que cada empresa oferece, ajudando você a tomar a melhor decisão.

Nosso compromisso com a inclusão e a diversidade é um dos nossos pilares. Sabemos que o mercado de trabalho deve ser acessível a todos, por isso buscamos oportunidades que atendam a diferentes perfis e realidades. Além disso, priorizamos a divulgação de vagas específicas para grupos que historicamente enfrentam barreiras no mercado, como mulheres, pessoas trans e outras minorias. Queremos democratizar o acesso às melhores vagas e ajudar cada profissional a conquistar uma posição que valorize suas habilidades e atenda às suas aspirações.

Mas não paramos por aí. Além de oferecer vagas, disponibilizamos conteúdos úteis para o crescimento profissional. São artigos com dicas práticas de carreira, entrevistas com especialistas que abordam temas relevantes e análises de tendências do mercado de trabalho remoto. Esse conteúdo foi pensado para ser uma fonte rica de aprendizado e inspiração para nossos leitores.

Name: Cheese Market News
Description:
Cheese Market News, positioned as the leading voice of the cheese and dairy/deli business, is a weekly trade newspaper dedicated to serving the cheese business in the domestic and international arenas.

Utilized by the industry’s top decision makers, our coverage includes: market trends, daily pricing/futures activity, legislation, news analysis and trends, new products and equipment, emerging opportunities, plant expansions, mergers and acquisitions, personnel changes, industry events and innovative profiles on the industry’s processors and marketers — all in a concise, easy-to-read format.

Special features include columns by industry experts, our monthly Retail Watch section and our annual Key Players and Market Directory reprints.

Name: Indianext
Description: IndiaNext brings you latest news on Artificial Intelligence, Cryptocurrency, Healthcare & Energy sector from all top sources in India and across the world.

Name: Club Acteurs du Sport (La Gazette des communes)
Description: Le Club Acteurs du sport, le média dédié aux professionnels des politiques publiques sportives dans les collectivités locales (élus locaux, directeurs des sports, techniciens, éducateurs sportifs...), les associations sportives, les fédérations sportives, et les entreprises qui interviennent dans le développement du sport en France.  Décryptage de l'actualité du secteur et du cadre juridique des politiques du sport en France.

Name: Deutscher Journalisten-Verband Landesverband NRW (DJV-NRW)
Description:
Der DJV-NRW ist einer der großen Landesverbände im Deutschen Journalisten-Verband (DJV). Als Gewerkschaft und Berufsverband vertritt der DJV-NRW die Interessen seiner Mitglieder vielen Seiten gegenüber: den Verlegern z.B. oder der Landesregierung und dem Landesgesetzgeber. 

 Hier geht's zum Newsletter: djv-nrw.de/aktuelles/newsletter/

Name: What's up EU
Description: We provide you with a weekly newsletter on the most recent institutional and policy-related news of the European Union. We also interview private and public stakeholders on European affairs. Available in English and in French.

Name: Club Management
Description:
Club Management is the latest title from Food & Beverage Media, part of The Intermedia Group, known for its market-leading publications in the hospitality and liquor sectors including Hospitality, Australian Hotelier, National Liquor News, TheShout.com.au, HM and Beer & Brewer

For suppliers, Club Management offers you unrivalled, independent access to an audience of senior club managers with a collective purchasing responsibility worth billions.

Club Management is present everywhere your target audience consumes content - across print, online, social and live events.

Club Management makes it easy to engage with, influence and sell to this lucrative market.

Name: El Nacional
Description: El Nacional is a Venezuelan publishing company.

Name: The Vancouver Sun
Description: The Vancouver Sun is Western Canada's largest newsroom. In print since 1912, we are B.C.'s number one source for news.

Name: The Cincinnati Enquirer
Description:
The Cincinnati Enquirer has served the greater Cincinnati community for over 180 years. Since our humble beginnings, we've stood as the voice of the people in service to the greater good of our beloved hometown. 

Covering Northern KY and all of Greater Cincinnati, we bring to light local news that directly affects you. From politics to sports, business to entertainment: we're there.

Name: Boston Herald
Description:
In an exceptionally competitive media landscape, the Boston Herald stands out for its influential political, business, sports and entertainment coverage. Our appeal is strong among readers of all stripes who appreciate the conviction of our editorial voice and the tenacity of our news gathering operation. Giving our readers a range of options for consuming news is a priority and every unique platform we produce – print, online, mobile, radio – fosters engagement and community.

Powered by a multimedia newsroom and with a variety of platforms that provide folks with up-to-the-minute news and commentary, consumers trust the Boston Herald brand to give them smart, straightforward content, when and however they want it.

Name: Il Messaggero Marittimo
Description:
Agli inizi degli anni ’50, quando il processo di ricostruzione dell’Italia dopo la fine della seconda guerra mondiale era già in atto e già se ne vedevano i segni sul territorio nazionale, Livorno doveva ancora ritrovare pienezza di funzionalità nelle strutture tradizionali.
L’industria dissestata o addirittura distrutta dai bombardamenti era ferma. Il porto, restituito con notevole ritardso alle nostre autorità alla libertà dei traffici, alla buona volontà ed alle capacità promozionali degli operatori locali, soffriva fortemente per la carenza di attracchi, di mezzi meccanici e di organizzazione.
In queste condizioni, un gruppo di amici, operatori marittimi, industriali e dirigenti di azienda, sensibili ed attenti alle esigenze di ripresa di Livorno, compiva un atto di fede dando vita a “Il Messaggero Marittimo” come notiziario mercantile dell’Italia Centrale.
Promossa dal Comm. Cesare Fremura e da Aldo Fremura con la cura consueta e con la tenacia propria di ogni loro azione, l’iniziativa aveva subito incontrato il favore dei più noti agenti marittimi e dei maggiori spedizionieri della Livorno di allora.

Il Messaggero Marittimo oggi
ll nostro, edito dalla Edizioni Commerciali e Marittime srl, è un giornale specializzato nello shipping e nella logistica, che rappresenta una costante informazione al servizio di tutti gli stakeholder del settore.
L’area di diffusione è rappresentata da tutto il territorio italiano con significative presenze anche in campo internazionale.

Name: inGenere.it
Description:
inGenere è una rivista online di informazione, approfondimento, dibattito e proposte su questioni economiche e sociali, analizzate in una prospettiva di genere. 

inGenere è stata fondata nel dicembre 2009 da un gruppo di economiste, spinte da una constatazione: mentre il campo scientifico e accademico dei gender studies è vasto e ricco, queste analisi e le relative pratiche faticano a trovare ascolto nel terreno della proposta politica e spesso restano sconosciute anche a chi ne potrebbe trarre benefici. inGenere intende essere uno spazio di comunicazione e uno strumento di azione.

La redazione di inGenere è composta da un nucleo operativo di giornaliste e professioniste della Comunicazione e da un comitato editoriale di docenti ed esperte in diversi settori disciplinari (Economia, Statistica, Management, Sociologia) e si avvale della collaborazione esterna di studiose, ricercatrici e giornaliste.

Pubblichiamo articoli di analisi, commento e informazione; segnaliamo notizie rilevanti sui temi di genere, corredate da link e percorsi di lettura; diffondiamo ricerche e studi (italiani e internazionali); inviamo una newsletter quindicinale alle persone che si sono iscritte.

Name: Diario Responsable
Description:
Un anónimo dijo: En el mundo de las ideas no todo es blanco o negro, existe una amplia gama de colores. Esto es lo que nos hace avanzar, lo que nos enriquece y nos hace ser más humanos.  

Por eso me gusta Diario Responsable, porque es plural, por que no se conforma.

Name: SerIndustria.com.ar
Description: En serindustria.com.ar vas a encontrar noticias, entrevistas exclusivas y análisis profundos sobre la industria argentina y regional. Contamos lo que pasa en los sectores clave: energía, logística, comercio exterior, tecnología e innovación. Información clara, confiable y actualizada para quienes hacen y transforman la industria.

Name: The Daily Pennsylvanian, Inc.
Description: The Daily Pennsylvanian is the independent student-run newspaper of the University of Pennsylvania. In addition to publishing daily on our website at theDP.com and a printed newspaper Mondays and Thursdays during the school year, the company also publishes 34th Street Magazine (online at 34st.com and in print weekly on Wednesdays), and campus humor website Under The Button (at UnderTheButton.com). The DP Alumni Association (DPAA) connects the community of DP alumni and current students.

Name: SECURITYSEE - Magazin za bezbednost
Description:
Dobrodošli na LinkedIn stranicu najčitanijeg regionalnog on-line magazina za bezbednost, upravljanje rizicima i krizni menadžment. SECURITYSEE.COM je web platforma namenjena kako profesionalcima i ekspertima, tako i svim pojedincima kojima je zaštita i bezbednost polje interesovanja.

Kao vodeća regionalna platforma posvećena svim aspektima korporativne bezbednosti, SECURITYSEE je osmišljen da bude ključno mesto okupljanja za sve one koji se profesionalno bave bezbednošću, kao i za one koji strastveno prate ovu oblast. Naš portal pruža najnovije vesti, analize, trendove, proizvode i inovacije koje oblikuju tržište industrije bezbednosti.

Obraćamo se širokom spektru čitalaca — od top menadžmenta i rukovodilaca obezbeđenja do security menadžera i javne uprave, policije i drugih javnih službi. Takođe, naši čitaoci uključuju instalatere, službenike za nabavku, kao i krajnje korisnike koji žele da ostanu informisani o najnovijim dostignućima u oblasti bezbednosti. 

Naša misija je da pripremamo i generišemo sveobuhvatne, ažurirane i stručno proverene informacije koje našim čitaocima pomažu da budu korak ispred u dinamičnom svetu korporativne bezbednosti.

Kroz ekskluzivne intervjue, stručne članke i temeljne analize, SECURITYSEE.COM okuplja zajednicu proizvođača, sistem integratora, instalatera tehničke zaštite, pružalaca usluga bezbednosti i zaštite i krajnjih korisnika, omogućavajući im da razmene iskustva i znanja. 

Pored toga, naša platforma služi kao efikasan marketinški kanal za sve dobavljače bezbednosnih proizvoda i usluga, pružajući im priliku da pronađu najbolji pronađu put do kvalifikovane publike (klijenata) i predstave im najnovija bezbednosna rešenja i proizvode. 

Pridružite nam se na SECURITYSEE.COM i budite u toku sa najnovijim trendovima, tehnologijama i strategijama koje definišu regionalno i svetsko tržište i kompletnu budućnost korporativne bezbednosti.

Name: El Paso Inc.
Description:
El Paso Inc. began publishing in September of 1995. It is a unique, Sunday morning, paid-circulation, weekly newspaper widely read by business managers, professionals, business owners, philanthropists and their families. Some 8,200 copies of this quality, positive, upbeat publication is home delivered to subscribers, sold at over 150 locations and mailed around the country.

El Paso Inc. is divided into three sections intended to provide intelligent, upscale readers with each week's most relevant and interesting stories on the people and events that affect their lives. Section A, Main News, focuses tightly on business, economic and financial news of local interest. Section B, Lifestyle, covers civic, charitable, philanthropic, social and lifestyle events. Section C, Your Money, covers economic news the financial markets and helps readers navigate the increasingly complex world of personal finance. The section gives readers real-world advice and valuable information. It includes personal finance issues, columns from industry experts, business announcements and El Paso industry lists. El Paso Inc. is a member of The Associated Press, and also has exclusive access in the El Paso area to New York Times material as well as its affiliate newspapers.

The business premise behind El Paso Inc. is simple: provide a cost-effective means of reaching the city's best demographics.

* Three-quarters of our readers earn over $75,000 per year and have a college degree or higher.
* 97% of our readers own their own home and 55% are owners or partners in their company.
* 82% of our readers spend between 30 minutes to three hours reading El Paso Inc. every week.

Name: PZC
Description: De Provinciale Zeeuwse Courant is hét dagblad van Zeeland. De PZC publiceert nieuws en achtergronden van en over Zeeland, Nederland en de wereld. In de krant, op de website, via E-paper en nieuwsapps. De PZC is onderdeel van De Persgroep Nederland. De Persgroep Nederland is een toonaangevende uitgever van nationale, regionale én lokale nieuwsmerken, magazines, websites en is actief op de radio.

Name: FUNÉRAIRE ACTUALITÉS
Description:
Le site Funéraire Actualités est parti d’un constat simple : une des ressources les plus importantes, quel que soit le domaine où l’on travaille, est l’information. C’est partant de ce constat, et partant du principe que l’information devrait être une ressource facilement accessible à tous, que Funéraire Actualités a vu le jour.

Notre ambition est d’informer, expliquer, commenter, donner à réfléchir. C’est un vaste programme, qui ne peut être conduit que par deux moteurs essentiels, le professionnalisme et la passion.

Funéraire Actualités est avant tout une plate-forme d’information, mais pas seulement. L’internet offre aujourd’hui un panel de possibilités qui doivent permettre aux professionnels d’améliorer leurs conditions de travail.

Name: News/Media Alliance
Description: The News/Media Alliance is a nonprofit organization representing more than 2,000 news and magazine media organizations and their multiplatform businesses in the United States and globally. Alliance members include print and digital publishers of original journalism. Headquartered just outside Washington, D.C., the association focuses on ensuring the future of journalism through communication, research, advocacy and innovation. Information about the News/Media Alliance can be found at www.newsmediaalliance.org.

Name: DAILY SABAH
Description:
Daily Sabah is a full-service, general interest daily newspaper in Turkey. Founded in 2014, Daily Sabah provides millions of people with everything they need to understand the local, national, regional and international events around them.

Our publications, products and services span the spectrum of today’s media landscape and include: Daily Sabah, our daily paper; dailysabah.com, our interactive online home and engaging mobile apps for smartphones and tablets.

And what drives it all—every story, every product, every workday—is our overarching mission to connect, inform and inspire readers and users with news and information they can rely on.

Daily Sabah is owned by Turkuvaz Media Group.

Name: Diari de Tarragona
Description: Diari de Tarragona es el medio informativo líder en la provincia de Tarragona. Fundado en 1808 hoy es una empresa multimedia que publica productos informativos en todas las plataformas.

Name: The Daily Signal

We deliver fact-driven journalism, insightful political analysis, and principled commentary that help readers understand the issues shaping America.

Name: HRImag
Description:
Depuis 1996, le Magazine HRI est la référence des professionnels du secteur de l’hôtellerie, de la restauration et des institutions au Québec.

Le Magazine Hôtels, Restaurants & Institutions est un magazine francophone qui offre de l’information de pointe sur le milieu HRI (hôtels, restaurants et institutions).

Elle aborde des sujets qui intéressent les décideurs de cette industrie, comme la gestion d’entreprise, les événements et expositions, les fournisseurs, les tendances et nouveautés de l’industrie, et ce, pour les marchés québécois, canadien et international.

Name: Schwartz Media
Description: Schwartz Media publishes intelligent news and current affairs that breaks the 24-hour news cycle. We offer a nuanced examination of Australia and the world, focused on fresh insight and literary expression. Our audience reads to know, not just to agree. We invest in long-form journalism where the issues demand it, providing writing of a quality that makes difficult topics clear. Schwartz Media publishes Australia’s most respected writers across The Saturday Paper and The Monthly magazine.

Description:
We started our journey on August 19, 2014, with the mission to provide objective news and useful information to the people of Bangladesh. Our first priority is to present emergency information and news to expatriate Bangladeshis and highlight their demands and facilities of the public and at the national level. 

There are Millions of Bangladeshis living in different countries of the world for their different needs and livelihood and it is very important for them to know the important information and notifications immediately. So with the utmost priority, we started our journey to meet those needs and to get the right information and news to them. Also, one of our fundamental objectives is to help the expatriate Bangladeshis to highlights their problems at the national level and to play a leading role in their demand.

Probashir Diganta is a Newspaper: Currently, Probashir Diganta is the most popular leading Bangladeshi expatriate daily online newspaper and this is the collaborative organization of BD1MEDIA LIMITED. We are continuously working to bring the objective and true news to the people through courage and fearless journalism. We believe in professional journalism. We are continuing to move forward further. We create opportunities to become a journalist from root level. One of our young emerging brave journalists is constantly working together with news from different countries around the world.

Visit Our Portal to know more about us: https://www.probashirdiganta.com

Description: The student-run newspaper of Stony Brook University since 1957. We serve the entire university community as well as a few local communities in the surrounding area. Student editors and staff work together to provide up-to-date and comprehensive news, entertainment, opinion and sports coverage.

Name: Sangbad Pratidin
Description:
Sangbad Pratidin is one of the most eminent and trusted Bengali Newspaper. This daily Indian Bengali newspaper is founded by renowned media personality Swapan Sadhan Bose in 1992. Sangbad Pratidin is acknowledged for reporting the truth.
This Bengali newspaper simultaneously published from Kolkata, Barjora and Siliguri. Covering all the sphere of news, local, national and international, the Bengali daily brings the latest and updated informations. 

Not only news, Sangbad Pratidin publish different types of daily publications like Coffee House (Published every Monday, Wednesday, Thursday and Saturday), PopKorn (Published every Friday), Aami (Published every Saturday) it also has a literary magazine called Robbar which is circulated with Sangbad Pratidin on every Sunday. Name: Le journal de l'Axe Seine
Description: Le journal de l’axe Seine offre à ses abonnés via un site web, une newsletter et des hors-séries : une veille sur le développement économique de la vallée de la Seine, un suivi des acteurs économiques et institutionnels de l’axe Seine, un décryptage des enjeux de gouvernance des territoires, des infos exclusives sur les coulisses des évolutions institutionnelles.

Name: The Michigan Daily
Description:
The Michigan Daily, the campus newspaper of the University of Michigan at Ann Arbor, published its first issue on Sept. 29, 1890. The student-run paper is published Monday through Friday during the fall and winter terms. During the spring and summer terms, it is published weekly.

The newspaper, which is financially independent from the University, is based in the recently renovated Stanford Lipsey Student Publications Building at 420 Maynard St. in Ann Arbor. The renovations, made possible by a gift from alum and Buffalo News publisher Stanford Lipsey, updated the building by adding handicap access, air-conditioning and other amenities while retaining its historic features.

The Daily covers the University's campus, administration, sports teams, faculty and culture as well as the town of Ann Arbor and other topics that affect the lives of students. Alumni include playwright Arthur Miller, two-time presidential candidate Thomas Dewey, activist Tom Hayden and investment banker Bruce Wasserstein. Its former editors, reporters, photographers, business staff members and other alumni have gone on to work at publications like the New York Times, Washington Post, Chicago Tribune, Wall Street Journal, Time magazine, The Associated Press and countless other media outlets.

Name: Felgueiras Magazine
Description:
Desde 2019, o Felgueiras Magazine tem sido uma voz única de Felgueiras no digital. Nessa data, identificámos que havia uma lacuna significativa de informação online relevante e atualizada sobre o concelho, uma lacuna que rapidamente preenchemos.

Desde então, temos continuado a evoluir, focados em proporcionar a melhor experiência aos nossos leitores através de um site personalizado e intuitivo, sempre com o objetivo de contribuir para o desenvolvimento económico, social e cultural de Felgueiras e da região.

Compromisso com Felgueiras
Desde a nossa fundação, temos procurado participar na construção de uma sociedade mais crítica e envolvida. Com uma equipa determinada, o Felgueiras Magazine oferece aos seus leitores conteúdos que incentivam uma participação cívica ativa e informada da população.
O Felgueiras Magazine procura promover uma discussão saudável sobre o presente e o futuro do concelho e da região. Acreditamos que a participação cívica é essencial para uma democracia sólida e, por isso, não renunciamos à nossa capacidade de crítica e ao papel ativo no debate de ideias, sempre comprometidos na resolução dos problemas da comunidade.

A Nossa Visão
Mais do que um meio de comunicação, o Felgueiras Magazine é uma plataforma de inovação, proximidade e compromisso com a comunidade. Trabalhamos diariamente para criar laços genuínos com os nossos leitores, oferecendo uma perspetiva única sobre a realidade local e aju


#felgueirasmag #felgueiras #lixa #barrosas #longra #informacao #noticias #atualidade #lifestyle

Description: Le Club Santé Social, média dédié aux professionnels du social et du médicosocial dans les collectivités locales (élus locaux, DG et agents territoriaux...), les réseaux professionnels, et les entreprises et associations qui interviennent dans le secteur, décrypte l'actualité et le cadre juridique du secteur en France, et vous parle "bonnes pratiques" métier.

Description: Die Neue Zürcher Zeitung (NZZ) ist eine Schweizer Tageszeitung und ein Medienunternehmen mit Sitz in Zürich. Als traditionsreiche Zeitung ist sie überregional bekannt, wird zu den Leitmedien im deutschsprachigen Raum gezählt und vertritt gemäss Statuten eine «freisinnig-demokratische Grundhaltung».

Name: LUXE INFINITY Magazine Lifestyle du Luxe
Description:
Nous sommes un magazine web et papier consacré aux différentes tendances dans le luxe.
Mais qu’est ce que le luxe?
Le luxe pour le magazine Luxe Infinity c’est la sublimation du savoir-faire et de la création. Faire de chaque instant un moment d’exception et de plaisir.
Nous vous faisons découvrir à travers nos différentes rubriques telles que la mode, la joaillerie, l’hôtellerie, la gastronomie et la culture les nouvelles tendances dans le luxe, la création et le savoir-faire.

Le monde dans lequel nous vivons est en constante évolution. Tout va vite. Demeurer informé est primordial afin de ne pas se sentir dépassé. Si vous avez déjà eu l’impression d’être seul pour faire face aux défis organisationnels de votre entreprise, Facteur H est là pour vous.

Name: BUTEX Journalists' Association
Description:
The BUTEX Journalists' Association (BJA) is a organization dedicated to promoting and supporting journalism among students and graduates of Bangladesh University of Textiles (BUTEX). BJA serves as a platform for budding journalists to develop their skills, exchange ideas, and foster a sense of camaraderie within the field of journalism.

The association strives to provide its members with opportunities for growth, learning, and networking. It organizes various events, workshops, seminars, and training sessions related to journalism, media ethics, news reporting, and other relevant topics. These activities are designed to enhance the members' knowledge and practical skills in the field of journalism.

BJA also plays a crucial role in facilitating student journalism at BUTEX. It encourages students to contribute to the field by providing platforms for them to showcase their talent and publish their works. The association may publish a regular newsletter or magazine, where members can contribute articles, interviews, opinion pieces, and other journalistic content.

Furthermore, BJA often invites industry professionals, renowned journalists, and media experts to interact with its members. These guest speakers share their experiences, insights, and expertise, providing valuable guidance and inspiration to aspiring journalists. The association may also organize field visits to media organizations, allowing members to gain firsthand exposure to the industry's working environment.

In addition to its educational and professional endeavors, BJA fosters a sense of community among its members. It encourages collaboration, teamwork, and mutual support, enabling budding journalists to develop lasting friendships and professional networks. The association may host social events, informal gatherings, and networking sessions to facilitate interactions and the exchange of ideas among its members.

Name: Yorkshire Post
