Name: Naples Daily News
Description:
Rooted in the heart of Naples, Florida, The Naples Daily News stands tall as the hub of information, connection, and community engagement. Our extensive family of media channels, led by the flagship Naples Daily News and the vibrant digital realm at naplesnews.com, resonates with the pulse of the region and beyond.

With a commitment that transcends the calendar, The Naples Daily News delivers insightful content 7 days a week, catering to both single-copy seekers and avid home delivery subscribers across Collier and Southern Lee Counties. Our digital presence at naplesnews.com extends the reach even further, ensuring a seamless online experience for our diverse audience.

We understand that each person and business holds a unique narrative and distinct objectives. This understanding fuels our prowess in crafting tailored solutions that align with your goals. Our accomplished team is ready to guide you from idea to realization, ensuring your initiatives bear the desired impact.
While Naples, Florida forms our core, our influence knows no boundaries. The Naples Daily News isn't just a publication; it's a bridge that connects communities and fosters growth. With an unwavering team of reporters and resources, we're dedicated to keeping you informed, engaged, and empowered. Join us in this journey of exploration and community-building at The Naples Daily News.

The Naples Daily News is a 7 days a week, single copy and home delivery newspaper in Collier and Southern Lee Counties. Naplesnews.com is the website of the Naples Daily News.

Name: Stichting Gezond Verstand
Description:

Gezond Verstand is een blad voor iedereen die objectief en waarheidsgetrouw geïnformeerd wil worden over wat er gebeurt in de wereld. Een blad met serieuze, kwalitatief hoogstaande journalistiek ter bevordering van een burgerschap met gezond verstand.

Name: The Financial Express Bangladesh
Description:
The Financial Express (FE) is the first financial daily of Bangladesh in English under the ownership of company -- International Publications Limited which was incorporated under the Companies Act in the year, 1993. The FE started its journey in 1993. In terms of circulation this daily now ranks second, both in its print and on online editions, among its contemporaries, in English language, in Bangladesh. It has currently syndication arrangements with the London-based Financial Times (FT) and the Prague-based Project Syndicate.

The FE’s prime objective is dissemination of fair and objective news and information. It makes its best efforts to keep its readers informed about the ongoing social, economic, financial and political developments daily (excepting its announced holidays) in its print edition, and also round-the-clock through its online version. It gives extensive coverage of economic and business developments taking place at home and abroad, in its both print and online editions. The FE puts particular emphasis on publication of in-depth analyses, views and opinions on major domestic, regional and global trade, business and other related issues.

The FE attaches importance to the broad principles of a competitive market-oriented economy; it remains steadfast in its commitment to promoting its goals and objectives in an environment in which the public policies should be geared to playing a facilitatory role under a transparent rule-based system and also to fostering inclusive growth and participatory socio-economic and political development in countries like Bangladesh. Besides, the newspaper is focussed on promoting economic and financial literacy in the country through its reader-friendly presentation of news and views.

The FE is committed to serving the interest of its readers and people in general. While upholding professional and ethical values of journalism, the FE takes into account the prevailing laws of the country that are applicable to publication

Name: Cumhuriyet
Description:
Cumhuriyet: 100 Yıllık Aydınlanma Yolu:

Cumhuriyet gazetesi, 7 Mayıs 1924'te Yunus Nadi tarafından kuruldu ve o günden bu yana demokrasiyi, laikliği ve basın özgürlüğünü savunuyor. Atatürk’ün ilkeleri doğrultusunda, insan hakları ve özgürlüklerin korunmasına kararlılıkla devam etmektedir.

Güvenilirlik ve Uluslararası Tanınırlık
Reuters Enstitüsü’nün Dijital Haber Raporu 2024’e göre, Cumhuriyet bir kez daha Türkiye'nin en güvenilir gazetesi olarak tanınmıştır.

*********
Cumhuriyet Yayın Ekosistemi
Cumhuriyet, okurlarına zengin içerik ve çeşitli eklerle geniş bir bakış açısı sunar:
• Cumhuriyet Daily: İngilizce dijital platformu ile Türkiye ve dünya gündemini uluslararası okuyuculara taşır.
• Cumhuriyet Pazar: Her Pazar, derinlemesine dosya haberleri ve kültür-sanat içerikleri sunar.
• Cumhuriyet Kitap: Perşembe günleri yayımlanır, kitap dünyasına dair kritik analizler ve eleştiriler sunar.
• Cumhuriyet İstanbul & Cumhuriyet Ankara & Cumhuriyet Ege: Şehirlerin gündemini yakından takip eder.
• Cumhuriyet Yerel Yönetimler: Belediyelerin projeleri ve akıllı şehir çözümlerini işler.
• Cumhuriyet Ekleri: Gastronomi, teknoloji, çevre gibi farklı alanlarda özel içerikler sunar.

Name: PC INpact
Description: PC INpact est un site français ouvert le 5 mai 2003 qui traite essentiellement d'informatique  mais aussi des nouvelles technologies en général, sous forme d'articles quotidiens et de dossiers, ainsi que de sujets plus larges ayant toujours rapport avec l'informatique ou les nouvelles technologies. Il est géré par la SARL de presse PC INpact et possède une communauté de plus de 150 000 membres[1]  en constante évolution.

Name: The Canberra Times
Description:
The Canberra Times has delivered quality, independent journalism to the people of the national capital since 1926, in print, online, via their smartphone and, now, iPad.

Our Goal is to set the news agenda in the national capital everyday – informing, entertaining and engaging Canberrans with compelling stories, breathtaking photography and incisive commentary.

Name: Jundiaí Agora
Description: Jundiaí Agora - Empresa jornalística.

Name: ValueWalk
Description: The site is famous among the value investing community as one of the best sites for evergreen and new content. ValueWalk has gained popularity among all circles for its breaking stories on hedge funds, and investigative reports on investments  by major funds.

Name: National Press Club Journalism Institute
Description:
The National Press Club Journalism Institute promotes an engaged global citizenry through an independent and free press, and equips journalists with skills and standards to inform the public in ways that inspire a more representative democracy. As the non-profit affiliate of the National Press Club, the Institute powers journalism in the public interest.

The Institute accomplishes this mission by: offering programs to grow the number of people who produce and support journalism that drives civic engagement; protecting journalists from interference so they can fully and fairly represent the communities they serve; and increasing transparency to keep citizens well-informed and their governments and institutions accountable.

For questions about use or research support, please contact institute@press.org.

Name: Japon Infos
Description:
Japon Information, agence en solution, vous propose une expertise pour amorcer et développer des projets franco-japonais. Pour vous assurer une crédibilité dans vos démarches, notre agence vous offre une équipe d’experts français et japonais dans différents domaines. Des services variés et adaptés à vos besoins sont mis à votre disposition à travers trois pôles : 

- un pôle média : notre site d'information japoninfos.com ayant pour objet de diffuser l'actualité du Japon en français et faciliter le rapprochement entre nos deux cultures, connaît un véritable succès. Notre réputation peut vous permettre d'optimiser votre visibilité et votre communication. 

- un pôle conseil : notre agence vous propose d'organiser des événements en tout genre mais aussi de vous aider dans le domaine du relationnel pour vous permettre une mise en contact avec des personnalités. Notre équipe franco-japonaise met également à votre disposition toute son expérience pour un accompagnement personnalisé. Interprétariat, traduction de documents, coordination de partenariats... 

- un pôle communication : notre équipe émérite en design et spécialiste en graphisme franco-japonais vous permet de réaliser votre communication en japonais et en français en allant du développement web, référencement, à la mise en page web et numérique, l'édition et l'impression de vos documents.

Name: Saptamana Financiara
Description:
One of the most important business newspaper in Romania. Founded in 2005, Saptamana Financiara (Financial Weekly) . Sfin.ro is  now an online financial newspaper. Financial and political news and analysis. Information on business, banking, insurance, real estate and the labor market. Also analyze surveys about the economic environment. 
SFIN.ro has been tailored to ensure clients can reach all areas  of the local market in an environment of the highest quality  editorial at a cost-effective rate.
Up to date facts and figures about Romanian financial  market, regional trends, short, medium and long term politics  and strategies.
SFIN.ro’s main purpose is to teach readers to develop a conceptual  understanding and cohesive mindset about management and financial  education providing them with broader powers of strategic analysis and  financial background.
How to translate a managerial phenomenon to a conceptual level, come to  an understanding by asking pertinent questions and translate that  understanding back to practical level.

Name: Gulf Times
Description:
Gulf-Times Inspired by a sense of patriotism, a group of good citizens of this generous land decided in 1978 to establish the Gulf Publishing & Printing Company. That decision proved to be a turning-point in the literary life of Qatar, leading to the creation of two great newspapers. The Company and its publications are a practical expression of the hopes and aspirations, values and principles of our country and its culture, which are deeply rooted in the Gulf and Arab world.

It is fair to say that our Company is a cornerstone of the Qatari information media. Since its inception it has been dedicated to reflecting events at home and abroad. Always, our watchwords have been truth and accuracy. We have opened our columns to debate; offered distinguished journalism and useful information. We conceive our publications as offering a stream of knowledge: artistic, literary, political and financial. They are, we hope, a focal point for thought and culture. We maintain a continuous creative effort to serve the country and its citizens, striving to reach new horizons but approaching that task with responsibility, fairness, balance and honesty.

Name: de Stentor
Description: De Stentor brengt nieuws uit Oost-Nederland én de rest van de wereld. Volg ons hier voor verhalen over werk, wetenschap en digitale journalistiek.

Name: PHARMA JAPAN
Description: PHARMA JAPAN offers comprehensive coverage on the latest regulatory, business and R&D trends in Japan's pharmaceutical industry. No other English website provides such in-depth reporting from the forefront of drug pricing and pharmaceutical policymaking in the country, including exclusive interviews with top regulatory officials. We also feature interviews with C-suite pharma executives and research pieces based on our original surveys. All our stories are translations of select articles from THE NIKKAN YAKUGYO, * a sister publication and leading pharma trade journal for Japanese readers.

Name: Le journal des Archipels
Description:
Le journal des Archipels a pour objectif de donner une nouvelle vision de l’économie régionale : circulaire au sein des pays concernés et entre pays voisins.
Comme c’est déjà le cas avec la presse économique actuelle, Le journal des Archipels pourra accompagner les courants B to B des entreprises et des institutions de la région sud ouest de l’océan Indien et sa zone d’influence
(Afrique de l’Est).
Sa banque de données, ou DATA constituée du réseau d’informations en front office sur le site, et d’un important réseau en back office, produira toutes les informations de veille stratégique et des outils de travail en ligne.

Name: EL PAÍS Brasil
Description:
O EL PAÍS, jornal espanhol fundado em Madri em 4 de maio de 1976, começou a falar português em 26 de novembro de 2013. Naquele dia, nascia a edição digital do EL PAÍS Brasil, com reportagens, análises e entrevistas sobre os principais assuntos do país e do mundo, em linha com os valores de um dos veículos mais respeitados do mercado. 

Desde então, uma equipe de jornalistas brasileiros se dedica a contar, com seriedade e coragem, o mundo ao Brasil e o Brasil ao mundo. Além da redação em São Paulo e da sucursal em Brasília, o jornal tem dezenas de correspondentes internacionais e colaboradores espalhados pelo planeta. A vocação global do EL PAÍS tem uma especial importância na América Latina, onde mais de 70 profissionais elaboram uma edição para o continente americano (em espanhol) e outra em português, específica para o Brasil.

Desde a estreia, o EL PAÍS Brasil está presente nas principais coberturas do país, mantendo sempre a proposta de aprofundar os temas e buscar um olhar diferente para cada notícia. Através do site, dos aplicativos, das newsletters e das redes sociais, o EL PAÍS chega onde houver uma conexão à Internet.

Name: ECO DE L'AIN | Actualités économiques de l'Ain | Groupe Ecomedia
Description:
ECO Ain, ce sont les actualités économiques des entreprises et des collectivités locales. Parce que c’est vous qui faites l’actu éco de nos territoires, nous nous devons de vous offrir plus qu’un journal économique. Notre slogan ? “Plus qu’un média, un outil de travail”. Voici pourquoi.

Notre équipe de journalistes et notre rédaction ont à coeur de vous offrir une presse économique locale indépendante qui couvre l’ensemble de nos territoires : l’Ain (01), Bourg-en-bresse, le bassin de Bourg-en-bresse, Oyonnax, Bellegarde-sur-Valserine, Ambérieu-en-Bugey, Gex, Belley, Miribel, Saint-Genis-Pouilly, etc. et plus généralement la Bresse, le Pays de Gex, le Haut-Bugey, le Bas-Bugey, Revermont, les Dombes, Côtière, le Val de Saône, etc. Mais pas que : vous trouverez aussi des informations économiques qui traitent de la région Auvergne Rhône-Alpes, de la France et de l’international (Suisse, Italie, etc.) lorsqu’elles sont en lien avec nos territoires.

ECO Ain, c’est aussi un panel d’outils pour faciliter la vie d’entreprise : création et publication d’annonces légales en ligne (devis immédiat, attestation légale envoyée par mail, paiement sécurisé), tableau de ventes immobilières (enchères publiques), une offre de publicité en marketing direct pour nos annonceurs, et l’abonnement en ligne à notre magazine de presse (papier et numérique).

Premium, vous avez dit premium ? Oui, plus qu’un média : un outil de travail. Les voici : feuilletage en ligne de toutes nos publications, téléchargement des magazines en .pdf, sélection d’articles web premium, accès aux archives numériques, etc. Car oui, ECO de l’Ain vous ressemble. Bienvenue chez vous !

Name: Paraguay TI
Description: Dirigidas al mercado informático más importante de Latinoamérica la revista PARAGUAY TI se ocupa tanto de las últimas novedades informáticas disponibles como de las noticias más relevantes relacionadas con este mercado que mueve 50 millones de dólares por mes en tecnología. PARAGUAY TI se orienta también a fomentar el turismo en Paraguay y mostrarle al mundo que somos el polo de compras de mayor trascendencia de América Latina. PY TI, lanzada en octubre de 2003, alcanza actualmente los 10.000 ejemplares. La distribución es gratuita y llega a todos los mayoristas, distribuidores, cadenas de retail, vars y cuentas estatales en Asunción, Ciudad del Este, Saltos del Guairá, Pedro J. Caballero y Encarnación cubriendo todo el territorio paraguayo. Ver menos
Location: Asunción - Ciudad del Este, Central - Alto Paraná

Name: The Tribune
Description: The Tribune, the largest-selling English daily in North India, publishes news and views without any bias or prejudice of any kind. Restraint and moderation, rather than agitational language and partisanship, are the hallmarks of the newspaper.

Name: Kannada Samachar
Description: ಕರ್ನಾಟಕದ ಮತ್ತು ದೇಶ-ವಿದೇಶದ ತಾಜಾ ಸುದ್ದಿಗಳು, ಮುಖ್ಯ ಘಟನೆಗಳು ಮತ್ತು ಅಪ್ಡೇಟ್ಗಳು ನಿಮಗಾಗಿ. ರಾಜಕೀಯ, ಪ್ರಚಲಿತ ಘಟನೆಗಳು, ಮನರಂಜನೆ, ಕ್ರೀಡೆ ಮತ್ತು ಇನ್ನಿತರ ಮಾಹಿತಿಗಳನ್ನು ನಿಖರವಾಗಿ, ವಿಶ್ವಾಸಾರ್ಹವಾಗಿ ಮತ್ತು ಶೀಘ್ರವಾಗಿ ನಿಮ್ಮ ಬಳಿಗೆ ತಲುಪಿಸುತ್ತೇವೆ. ಕರ್ನಾಟಕದ ಜನರಿಗಾಗಿ ವಿಶೇಷವಾಗಿ ರೂಪಿಸಲಾದ ನಿಮ್ಮ ವಿಶ್ವಾಸಾರ್ಹ ಸುದ್ದಿ ಮೂಲ.

Name: North of 60 Mining News
Description:
North of 60 Mining News is an Alaska-based trade publication that provides the most complete coverage of mining and mineral exploration across Alaska, northern British Columbia, Yukon, Northwest Territories and Nunavut.

The weekly online edition of Mining News keeps readers up-to-date on current events important to the mining sector, as well as updates from the exciting mineral exploration properties, mine development projects and operating mines in Alaska and across Canada’s North.

On top of delivering up-to-date mining coverage to subscribers’ email each week, the monthly print edition digs deeper into the issues, projects, companies and people that are vital to ensuring a strong mining sector across North of 60 Mining News’ coverage area.

North of 60 Mining News also publishes Mining Explorers, an annual magazine that covers more than 50 mineral exploration companies unlocking the vast mineral wealth for which Alaska and northern Canada are renowned.

Together, these publications are the most comprehensive and reliable source of mining news coverage north of the 60° parallel.

Name: GPlus
Description:
GPlus, Guwahati's leading English weekly publication and hyper-local media brand, has completed ten years of publication. 

GPlus boasts a vibrant community of over 700,000 organic fans and followers across various social media channels. Additionally, GPlus has a readership of over 72 million people on its website every year, serving as a digital companion to its readers. 

The infotainment tabloid that captures the true interest and feel of the gateway to the North East India has the highest reach among the millennials, decision makers, intelligentsia and the elite. 

The weekly offers a local essence with a global outlook through its exciting collection of well researched and creative stories, opinions along with analytical and incisive insights, interesting features and snippets from segments like news analysis on city, vox populi, business, fashion & lifestyle, society, events, career, reviews, travel, etc.

In its ten years of publication, G Plus has created various landmark ideas that aim to engage with Guwahati at various levels. The GPlus Guwahati Food Awards aims to recognize the best in the F&B sector of the city. The GPlus Guwahati Theatre Festival is a landmark event that aims to revolutionize the culture of theatre, and brings to the city world class plays and workshops for theatre enthusiasts of the city. 

GPlus is the soul of the city, connecting with its people, voicing their aspirations. GPlus is the pulse of Guwahati – living, rising and growing with the city.

Name: Joca
Description:
O Joca chegou para suprir uma deficiência no mercado editorial brasileiro: a inexistência de um jornal para o público infantojuvenil. Trata-se de um projeto ousado, pioneiro e que visa promover a formação de cidadãos e estimular o desenvolvimento das competências necessárias para que crianças e jovens possam viver democraticamente em nossa sociedade, tendo como pano de fundo a garantia do direito de acesso à informação.

Inspirado em publicações para crianças e jovens de vários países, o Joca possui a mesma organização do jornal adulto, com linha editorial neutra e linguagem adequada ao público infantojuvenil. Traz notícias e reportagens sobre o Brasil e o mundo, além de entrevistas, curiosidades e assuntos do universo de seus leitores, com a intenção de que eles entendam e gostem do que leem, e que também possam conversar com familiares e amigos sobre assuntos diversos. A publicação se utiliza de uma fórmula editorial bastante didática e muitos recursos de imagens, gráficos e fotos.

Além do jornal impresso, com edições quinzenais, o Joca possui um portal com atualização diária de notícias e diversos outros conteúdos e recursos de apoio para leitores e professores, os quais podem adequar o trabalho com o jornal ao nível de cada turma em que leciona.

Em 2015, a Planète D’Entrepreneurs, organização francesa que avalia negócios de impacto social pelo mundo, em parceria com a HEC (École des Hautes Éstudes), elaborou um estudo independente para avaliar o impacto que o Joca causa em seu público. A pesquisa foi realizada com um grupo que utilizava o Joca na sala de aula e um que não o utilizava (grupo de controle), concentrando-se em alunos do 4° e 5° anos, com amostras de escolas públicas e privadas, e nos apresentou resultados muito positivos. Leia mais: bit.ly/Joca_estudo_impacto.

Confira também o vídeo que mostra a aplicação do Joca na prática: bit.ly/Joca_na_escola.

Acesse nosso portfólio de produtos: bit.ly/portfolio_produtos2017.

Name: Jornal de Brasília
Description: O Jornal de Brasília é um dos principais veículos de comunicação do Distrito Federal, foco em política, economia, gastronomia, entretenimento, internet e tudo aquilo que realmente interessa, como isenção e credibilidade

Name: BusinessWorld Publishing Corporation
Description: Follow for data-driven stories, economic and business insights, and moments from local culture, arts, and technology! Trunkline number: 8527-7777

Name: JOODS.NL - Dutch Jewish News
Description: Dé eigenzinnige site over Joods Nederland, Jodendom en Israel. Nieuws, achtergronden en columns. Volg ons ook op Facebook, Twitter en Instagram.

Name: cooltivarte.com
Description:
Somos COOLTIVARTE.COM. Un portal digital dedicado a difundir el acontecer artístico y cultural del Uruguay.

Estamos en la vuelta desde el año 2003, y como evolución del boletín Obolo Cultural, nos encontramos abocados a apoyar a los artistas nacionales brindándoles un espacio de difusión.

Creemos en la idea de utilizar la potencialidad  que hoy día nos otorga la web, para que la cultura uruguaya y sus creadores dispongan de una dinámica ventana, que los ponga en contacto entre sí y con el mundo.

Somos COOLTIVARTE.COM y pretendemos  configurarnos como un portal  dinámico, entretenido  y atento a los nuevos emprendimientos, que busque siempre la interacción con los artistas.

Name: EUROP'ENERGIES
Description:
EUROP’ENERGIES est une publication de la société ENERSTRATEGIES destinée aux acheteurs d’électricité et de gaz en Europe. L’achat d’énergie est un poste clé dans l’entreprise et au sein des collectivités locales. La volatilité des prix, les évolutions continuelles de la réglementation et la multiplicité des acteurs et des offres rendent nécessaire un suivi quotidien de l’actualité et des analyses approfondies. EUROP’ENERGIES a pour vocation de vous informer, de vous aider à prendre les bonnes décisions.
EUROP'ENERGIES organise au printemps le Forum EUROP'ENERGIES qui réunit les acheteurs et fournisseurs d'énergie.

Name: Honolulu Civil Beat
Description:
Our focus is on investigative and watchdog journalism, in-depth enterprise reporting, analysis and commentary that gives readers a broad view on issues of importance to the community.

The philanthropic gift that Pierre Omidyar gave to create Civil Beat in 2010 began a unique opportunity for Hawaii to develop a non-commercial media platform whose mission it is to inform and educate Hawaii residents so they can make good decisions about vital issues.

Civil Beat has quickly become one of the most respected news sites in Hawaii. Our journalists have won dozens of state, regional and national awards and Civil Beat has been named the best news website in Hawaii for the past five years by the Society of Professional Journalists.

Civil Beat also hopes to foster community discussion by providing a place where citizens can debate important issues in a civil manner, free from cheap shots and personal swipes. We do that through encouraging a wide variety of reader-submitted Community Voices, public events and through our integrated Civil Comments platform.

Description:
El Watan Newspaper, one of the leading Newspapers in the Egyptian Market

Name: Diverto
Description: Diverto est porté par le GIE (Groupement d’Intérêt Économique) Diverto, fondé par six éditeurs majeurs de la Presse Quotidienne Régionale : Centre France, EBRA, Rossel, Sipa Ouest-France, Sud-Ouest et La Dépêche du Midi, rejoints depuis par les groupes Le Télégramme, La Nouvelle République du Centre-Ouest, La Provence, et Nice-Matin, qui ont décidé de lancer un nouveau média d'information global consacré à la TV, aux écrans, et au-delà. Diverto propose depuis janvier 2023 un magazine distribué chaque fin de semaine en tant que supplément à tous les titres de ces éditeurs, et au journal La Marseillaise (plus de 50 titres), ainsi qu’un écosystème numérique constitué d'un site web national et d’applications embarquées dans les sites et applications mobiles des titres en régions. Diverto c’est 3,1 millions d’exemplaires diffusés chaque semaine depuis son lancement (certification ACPM) et 5,3 millions de lecteurs chaque semaine (source ACPM One Next).

Name: BEAU Magazine
Description:
Beau Magazine, média indépendant engagé et manifestement optimiste. Poser un autre regard sur l'existant. Et dans cette période troublée, en capturer ses promesses. Le faire dans un nouveau média. Un magazine suffisamment indépendant pour raconter et défricher le beau de l’époque, et l’appeler BEAU tout simplement.
Parce que le beau se trouve partout, dans la force d’une œuvre artistique, l’envoûtement d’une lecture, un plissé de soie, le geste créatif, la délicatesse d’une fragrance inconnue, un coucher de soleil...
Parce que le beau met en lien.
Inspire et sème un nouvel imaginaire, remet l’humain à sa place.
BEAU magazine soutient ce contre-courant, cette communauté optimiste et créative.
196 pages et un invincible instant joyeux 
Trimestriel 16 euros En vente en Kiosque, en librairie et sur notre site.

Suivez-nous sur :

Name: The Impact Lawyers

Name: OVALE
Description:
Jornal regional editado em São José dos Campos (SP), com circulação em 39 cidades do Vale do Paraíba, Litoral Norte e Serra da Mantiqueira, considerado o principal veículo de comunicação impressa da região e um dos principais jornais do interior do Estado de São Paulo, com mais de 23 milhões de acessos por mês.

Ele é líder isolado em um dos maiores mercados do interior de São Paulo e do interior do país, o Vale do Paraíba, uma região de 2,4 milhões de habitantes espalhados em 39 cidades localizadas estrategicamente no eixo Rio-São Paulo e que concentra cerca de 25% do PIB brasileiro, respondendo por 10% das exportações do Estado e 51% da atividade industrial. Além da vocação industrial, a região concentra importantes núcleos de turismo –como Campos do Jordão e a Serra da Mantiqueira, as praias do Litoral Norte e a cidade de Aparecida, capital católica do Brasil, que recebe mais de 10 milhões de turistas por ano.

‘OVALE’ tem 310 funcionários, sede em São José dos Campos e sucursais nas duas cidades mais importantes da região, Taubaté e Jacareí.
Location: São José dos Campos, São Paulo

Name: Ei Samay
Description:
Welcome to Ei Samay - your trusted source for credible news, insightful perspectives, and stories that shape conversations across the globe .

From breaking developments to in-depth analyses, exclusive interviews to ground reports - we bring you journalism that informs, engages, and empowers. Our coverage spans politics, business, technology, culture, sports, and entertainment, always driven by accuracy, balance, and context.

At Ei Samay, we believe news is more than information - it’s about perspective, integrity, and impact.

Follow us for:
 Credible, real-time updates
 Expert insights and sharp analysis
 Stories that go beyond the headlines
 Journalism that stands for truth and trust

 Join the conversation. Stay informed. Stay ahead - with Ei Samay.

Name: Centre Presse Aveyron
Description:
Premier quotidien départemental de l'Aveyron. Centre Presse a son siège à Rodez, et s'appuie sur un réseau de 180 correspondants. 
Né à la Libération, le 23 août 1944, Le Rouergue Républicain devient Centre Presse en 1953 après son rachat par le groupe Hersant. Depuis 1982, Centre Presse, le journal de l'Aveyron, est une filiale de Midi Libre. De 2007 à 2015, le groupe Midi Libre fait partie du Groupe Sud-Ouest. 
Depuis 2015, le groupe des Journaux du Midi (Centre Presse Aveyron, Midi Libre et L'Indépendant) appartient au groupe Dépêche du Midi.

Name: Lyon Femmes
Description: Découvrez toute l'actualité des Lyonnaises d'aujourd'hui et de demain ! Reportages, interviews et bons plans !

Name: Entre'Elles webzine
Description:
Créé en 2019, Entre’Elles webzine est LE média web, 100% entrepreneuriat féminin. 

Saviez-vous que les femmes représentent seulement 2% de présence dans les médias du domaine business ? Une difficulté de plus dans le long chemin de la création d’entreprise.

  Entre'Elles webzine Groupe a donc été créé pour tenter d’inverser la tendance avec une édition française, espagnole et régionale dans le Grand-Est !

Dans le webzine, vous trouverez :
- Des portraits de femmes entrepreneures.
- Des conseils et astuces pour la création d’entreprise.
- Des interventions d’experts.
- Des clés de développement personnel.
- Un esprit de sororité avec une communauté engagée.
- Des ateliers divers pour vous aider dans l’aventure entrepreneuriale.

C’est 100% gratuit alors n’attendez plus, venez vite nous lire !

Numerosi i temi di riferimento. Da un lato, vi è la prospettiva strategica dello sviluppo delle energie rinnovabili come risposta coerente contro il Climate Change e a favore della decarbonizzazione. Dall’altra, l’approfondimento sui temi della contingenza, caratterizzata oggi dall’emergenza energetica imposta dal conflitto in corso in Ucraina e collocati nel più ampio ambito degli equilibri geopolitici. EnergiaItalia.news ha un accordo strategico con ENSIEL, il Consorzio interuniversitario nazionale per l’Energia e Sistemi Elettrici ed è espressione del Progetto “Energia 2050”, sostenuto da università, imprese ed esperti del settore.
EnergiaItalia.news promuove ogni anno la Conferenza internazionale sull’energia. “Energia Italia 2023” si terrà il 6-7-8 giugno 2023 a Roma.

To ensure all our content is exclusive, high-quality reporting, the company adheres to a set of strong values. These are:

|| Independence || 

We are independent of any government, political party or investors. Our readers are our sole source of revenue. We accept no advertising.

|| Innovation || 

As a small group, it is vital that every member is committed to the success of the team and strive for excellence. We encourage our staff to be proactive, autonomous and innovative.

|| Diversity || 

When hiring, we cast our net wide across diverse cultural, linguistic and geographical backgrounds.

|| Profit-sharing ||

All staff can opt in to various incentive schemes and share in the group's results. We recorded our 17th consecutive year of positive results in 2019.

Mantendo o foco nos profissionais destes setores económicos e, paralelamente, alargando-o a  outros públicos-alvo.

A todas as nossas iniciativas emprestamos os valores da independência e pluralidade, apostando  no valor da informação pela informação.

IU Student Media has a rich tradition of serving the university as a student learning lab. The first issue of the Indiana Student was published in 1867. It later became the Indiana Daily Student in 1899.  The Arbutus yearbook was first published in 1893.

Today the IDS reaches more than 45,000 people and an online community of more than 230,000 unique users. The Arbutus yearbook publishes approximately 2,000 books each year.  Since 1969 IU Student Media has been a self-supporting, auxiliary unit of Indiana University. The editor-in-chief is the final authority on editorial content. 

The IDS, Inside Magazine and Arbutus are all award-winning publications. The IDS won two National Pacemaker Awards and four National Gold Crown Awards in 2010, as well as over fifty individual awards.

Name: NH Business Review
Description:
The award-winning NH Business Review has been the Granite State's leading source for business news, analysis and commentary -- the most respected source for the essential news and information our readers need to do business in New Hampshire.

Every two weeks, 50,000 decision-makers turn to the newspaper for authoritative and in-depth news coverage of the sectors that comprise New Hampshire's vibrant business community, ranging from real estate and construction to technology and financial services to hospitality. New Hampshire Business Review also publishes special themed sections nearly every issue, in addition to features on hot new trends and profiles of the people who make up the Granite State's business community.

Our website, NHBR.com, is our daily presence on the Web, attracting an audience of thousands of visitors, who regularly turn to the site's daily exclusive local business news in addition to the electronic version of the current newspaper, archives of back issues and links to other essential business resources.

NH Business Review also produces several special publications, including the Book of Lists, Business Services Guide and the Meetings and Events Guide. In order to salute business excellence in the state, the newspaper also produces four major awards events -- the Business Excellence Awards, the Outstanding Women in Business Awards and the Best of Business (BOBs) Awards.

Name: WELTKUNST
Description:
WELTKUNST, das Kunstmagazin der ZEIT.

Seit 1927 berichtet die Weltkunst über neueste Entwicklungen aus dem internationalen Kunstmarkt. Atelierbesuche, Sammlerporträts, Ausstellungsbesprechungen und Essays gehören ebenso dazu wie Trends und Analysen, Auktionsvorschauen und Nachrichten aus dem klassischen Kunsthandel. 

Bezeichnend ist die epochenübergreifende Ausrichtung. Die Weltkunst berichtet Monat für Monat mit der gleichen Begeisterung über die Kunst der Gegenwart wie über die der Vergangenheit: ein Magazin für Menschen, die schöne Dinge lieben. Nach Jahrzehnten in München ist der Sitz der Redaktion mit Herausgeber Christoph Amend und Chefredakteurin Lisa Zeitz seit 2011 wieder in Berlin. 

Neben der Printausgabe, die 14-mal im Jahr erscheint, umfasst der Weltkunst-Kosmos die Website Weltkunst Online, den Newsletter von Lisa Zeitz, den Kunstmarkt-Newsletter W+ und den Podcast „Was macht die Kunst?“. 

Die Weltkunst erscheint in der ZEIT Verlagsgruppe.

Name: Revista Horeca Romania
Description:
Horeca.ro aduce zilnic în actualitate cele mai importante informaţii din toate sectoarele industriei ospitalităţii româneşti şi internaţionale. Astfel, pot fi regăsite articole de tendințe, statistici, opinii ale profesioniștilor, deschideri de locații, informaţii actuale din turismul românesc şi internaţional ş.a.

Totodată, Horeca.ro își propune o abordare calitativă şi nu cantitativă a informaţiilor, prin prezentare exemplelor pozitive ale businessurilor din domeniu, prin susținerea inovaţiei și a creativității afacerilor și, de asemenea, prin promovarea serviciilor de calitate și standardelor înalte pe care jucătorii industriei le propun oaspeților lor.
În suport print, Revista Horeca este pe piaţa de profil încă din anul 2002, fiind înfiinţată cu scopul de a aduce, în premieră în România, business promotion pentru segmentul operatorilor din industria de hoteluri, restaurante şi catering.

Horeca România se deosebeşte de publicaţiile cu acelaşi profil tematic și prin perspectiva din care sunt abordate subiectele. Nu problemele sunt centrul de greutate al articolelor, ci soluţiile la problemele actorilor din industria ospitalităţii. Jucătorul din indutria ospitalităţii este, de altfel, laitmotivul conceptului editorial al revistei. Ce îl preocupă și îl interesează pe acesta? Ce nu ştie şi ce ar vrea să afle? Acestea sunt doar câteva întrebări la care Revista Horeca își dorește să vină cu răspunsuri în paginile sale.
Rubricile Revistei Horeca România sunt bine structurate, pe subiecte de interes, precum: Ştiri și Evenimente, Focus (articole de interes actual), Business (informații și exemple de administrare a afacerilor din domeniu), Drink, Food, Design, Tehnologie, HR, Juridic.

Redacţia noastră este prezentă la toate evenimentele naţionale, expoziţionale şi de afaceri ale pieţei de profil, iar la cele mai importante este coorganizator sau partener media.

Revista Horeca România se distribuie gratuit operatorilor din industria ospitalităţii.

Name: The Grower
Description:
For on-the-go news or in-depth analysis, over 12,000 readers reach for The Grower every month. Why? Because The Grower understands the news-makers and the storytellers.

We’re in the field. We’re in packing sheds. We’re at trade shows. We take a front-row seat at provincial and national meetings where policy intersects with your business. Our coverage takes a back seat to nobody.

Our readers expect the scoop. The Fresh News from the Grower e-newsletter is delivered hot every Tuesday, with or without a morning coffee, because The Grower gets there first. Sign up here eepurl.com/cnZ6GL

Our website www.thegrower.org goes live behind the scenes with our The Grower Calling podcasts, reporting that digs deep into Canadian agriculture. And The Grower's Twitter @growernews has become a trusted source for breaking news coverage, 365 days of the year.

The Grower – news when it's needed, how it's needed. Delivered by an experienced horticultural team.

Name: Jornalismo Júnior
Description:
A Jornalismo Júnior é a caçula das empresas juniores da Escola de Comunicações e Artes da USP (ECA-USP) e foi fundada em maio de 2004. Pioneira no ramo jornalístico dentro do Movimento Empresa Júnior (MEJ), foi criada para possibilitar a prática profissional dos alunos, conciliando e expandindo aspectos vistos em sala de aula. Também chamada de J. Júnior, a empresa trabalha em três vertentes: produção de conteúdo para diversas plataformas, assessoria de imprensa e comunicação integrada, que inclui planos de comunicação para eventos e empresas.

MISSÃO: A missão da J. Júnior é desenvolver pessoas colocando-as em contato com as diversas áreas da comunicação de modo que contribuam para a melhoria da sociedade e da própria empresa.

VISÃO: Ser a melhor fonte de experiência na formação de profissionais diferenciados.

VALORES:

        Cooperação…Garantir a eficiência do trabalho em equipe e a transmissão do conhecimento.
        Vestir a camisa…Sentir-se parte de uma equipe e comprometer-se com ela.
        Ir além…Propor-se desafios e superá-lo.
        Ética…Agir com responsabilidade, profissionalismo, respeito.
        Pensar diferente…Buscar alternativas, fugir do óbvio, inovar.

Name: Viet Nam News - Vietnam News Agency
Description:
When Việt Nam News first hit the news-stands in 1991, it was a modest four-page newspaper whose stories were written, edited and proofed by hand.

Since then, Việt Nam's major English language daily, published seven days a week, has kept pace with the rapid strides taken by the country in its economic renovation and its integration with the regional and world economies.

We have upped our size to 28 pages a day, providing comprehensive coverage of the latest domestic and international developments in all areas including politics, economics, business, social affairs and sport. Special pages carry comment, analysis, and reports on the environment, science and technology, lifestyle and key social issues.

Entrepreneurs swear by our business section, with special features including updates on all the latest laws, interviews with local movers and shakers and a hotline where we answer your toughest questions.

Sunday Việt Nam News acquaints readers with the many captivating aspects of Vietnamese culture and society, and profiles its many beautiful tourist destinations.

Secrétaire-Inc.com publie des nouvelles concernant le métier de secrétaire, tout ce qui touche la carrière, la formation, les outils, la rémunération, les tendances, etc.

Secrétaire-Inc.com est un lieu d’échanges. C’est pourquoi, si vous avez des questions, des suggestions, des commentaires, si vous avez relevé des erreurs ou des omissions, vous êtes invité à communiquer avec l’éditeur. Votre collaboration est appréciée, voulue, utile, nécessaire.

Name: Premium Times Nigeria
Description:
Premium Times Services Limited, publishers of Premium Times, is a Nigerian media organisation based in Abuja with a vision to help strenghten Nigeria’s democracy,   advance the socio-economic wellbeing and the rights of the people, promote and enrich their cultural practices, and advocate for best practices, good governance, transparency and human rights, in line with the values expected of a modern democratic state.

Proprietors of the organisation believe that of all the institutions of a modern democracy, the media matter in large measure. It can help forge new communities, pursue political and social agenda in support of a better society, and help build visions of hope and resistance. Sadly the media can also lead in negative directions: dividing people and truncating hope and vision. In our country, the media have played both roles at different times in our history.

Premium Times, founded in mid 2011, believes that the time has come for Nigeria to embrace the challenge of progress and development in a substantial, concrete sense. We have brought to the table a huge commitment to offer our country the type of media that will advocate for the people and nudge our nation into the path of development and social reengineering.

We are of the view that in terms of its formalistic processes and its philosophy of content, the new media that will help spur the challenge of educational revolution, cultural rebirth, and economic development in Nigeria, must be reflective, thoughtful, analytic and empathetic without a sense of entitlement and insularity. We have come to fill that lacuna and raise the bar of journalism in our country.

We will publish across all formats beginning with this online platform where we hope to appeal to the bulk of our young and middle class elites with a vision of the future and a believe in social change.

Name: Affiches Parisiennes
Description:
Affiches Parisiennes est un journal hebdomadaire d’annonces légales et d'information juridique, dont le siège est à Paris. Il est habilité pour la publication des annonces légales sur les départements de Paris (75), Hauts-de-Seine (92), Seine-Saint-Denis (93) et Val-de-Marne (94).

Le journal Affiches Parisiennes paraît mardi et vendredi, il est diffusé sur abonnement, ou au numéro au siège du journal, 15 rue du Louvre à Paris (1er ardt).

Il publie non seulement les annonces légales des sociétés, mais également les avis de l’ensemble des ventes de biens immobiliers par adjudication dans les départements 75, 92, 93 et 94. Des tableaux récapitulent les ventes à venir dans les Chambres des notaires et dans les Tribunaux de Grande Instance (ventes par ministère d’avocat). Les résultats de ces ventes sont également publiés juste après chaque audience. Ces tableaux constituent une aide précieuse pour tous les acquéreurs potentiels et les professionnels du secteur.

Par ailleurs les Affiches Parisiennes proposent des contenus sur l'actualité des métiers du droit, du chiffre et des entrepreneurs.

With a strong foundation in integrity and editorial excellence, we remain focused on delivering content that is both relevant and meaningful, whether through our online platform or in print. Our aim is to serve our readers by providing the information they need to make informed decisions in an ever-changing global landscape.

As we continue to evolve, we remain committed to maintaining the trust of our readers, upholding the values of accuracy, quality, and respect that have guided us for more than seven decades.

Vi udgiver landbrugets erhvervsavis Effektivt Landbrug hver dag, tirsdag til lørdag. Til alle jordbrugere og følgevirksomheder udgives ugeaviserne LandbrugNord, LandbrugSyd, LandbrugFyn og LandbrugØst.

Name: The Daily Tar Heel
Description:
The Daily Tar Heel is a student-run newspaper that serves the communities of UNC-Chapel Hill and Orange County, N.C. 

Student journalists are solely responsible for all DTH news content under the direction of the editor-in-chief. The 2025-26 editor-in-chief is Alli Pardue. The DTH also comprises our advertising team, as well as the 1893 Brand Studio: a student-powered agency that merges traditional storytelling values with modern marketing strategies. The studio offers a range of services — from graphic design work, to social media guidance, to the creation of paid content.  

Here at The DTH, we are fiscally and editorially independent. DTH Media Corp., a nonprofit organization, stopped taking UNC student fees in 1993 and has since been fully funded by its advertising revenue, the 1893 Brand Studio and private giving.

The paper’s business operations are governed by a 12-member, student-majority board of directors whose open slots are filled by the board each spring for the next year. At any give time, approximately 300 UNC students can rightly claim to be a member of The DTH staff in news, production design, advertising sales, marketing and customer service positions. The student payroll exceeds $250,000 per year. The company also employs three professional staff in support functions.

*  Vi stiller de vanskelige spørsmålene
* Vi forteller historiene som ellers ikke blir fortalt

Fra politikk til næringsliv, fra helsevesen til teknologi, fra kultur til klima. Vi følger utviklingen i regionen tett og er tett på folk. Vi er til stede der det skjer, og vi tar oss tid til å forstå og forklare.

Name: The Cancer Letter
Description:
The Cancer Letter, an independent weekly news publication, has been the leading source for information on the issues that shape oncology since 1973.

The Cancer Letter provides authoritative, award-winning coverage of the development of cancer therapies, drug regulation, legislation, cancer research funding, health care finance, and public health. Our coverage focuses on the National Cancer Institute, National Institutes of Health, Food & Drug Administration, U.S. Congress, cancer centers, and the pharmaceutical industry.

The Cancer Letter’s readers include key opinion leaders at academic institutions, community oncology practices, government agencies, professional associations, health IT and pharmaceutical companies, Wall Street, and advocacy organizations. 

Based in Washington, D.C., The Cancer Letter has earned acclaim for its investigative work. It has been profiled and cited in outlets including The New York Times, The Washington Post, 60 Minutes, CNN, NPR, Science, and Nature.

Coverage by The Cancer Letter has triggered multiple investigations by Congressional committees, the Institute of Medicine, the Federal Trade Commission, the Securities and Exchange Commission, and the Department of Justice, and contributed to federal action by the FDA, the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention, the Federal Bureau of Investigation, and Government Accountability Office.

Name: India CSR Network
Description:

INDIACSR is the leading and only Indian business network for Corporate Social Responsibility (CSR) dedicated to making significant contributions through adding new dimensions and perspectives to the domain of CSR and Sustainability. INDIACSR has created a platform that enhances companies need to share ideas on their CSR best practices and discuss collaborative projects between the firm and its end stakeholders. INDIACSR provides a forum to initiate a dialogue on creating a competitive edge with the help of CSR activities and seeks help from Industry experts.
The website has been founded by stalwarts from the industry and is growing steadily to become an inspiring network of business people working towards the common goal of sustainability.

Mission: Our mission is to support practitioners and organizations in building responsible and sustainable business in India and in this way to contribute to sustainable development of societies at large.
We implement our mission through the provision of information, knowledge, tools and by building a community of people and organizations focused on CSR.

Name: Émergence - Mille façons d'entreprendre
Description:
Émergence – Mille façons d’entreprendre est un magazine régional dédié aux entrepreneurs, aux talents locaux et aux initiatives inspirantes du Centre‑Val de Loire.

Nous mettons en lumière celles et ceux qui contribuent au dynamisme de l’économie locale, à travers des récits authentiques, des expertises, des portraits, et des reportages de terrain.

Notre mission :
Valoriser les acteurs engagés du territoire, créer des connexions humaines et encourager une économie plus respectueuse, collaborative et durable.

Émergence, c’est :
- un magazine régional de référence,
- un blog dédié aux initiatives locales,
- des clubs, ateliers et événements pour développer votre réseau,
- un programme de mentorat pour accompagner les entrepreneurs,
- un agenda régional pour promouvoir les projets du territoire.

Nous croyons en une économie fondée sur :
L’intelligence relationnelle, la culture du respect et la valorisation des talents.

Émergence accompagne les professionnels, les entreprises, les institutions et les porteurs de projets qui souhaitent gagner en visibilité, développer leur réseau et faire rayonner le Centre‑Val de Loire.

Name: Gênero e Número
Description:
A Gênero e Número é uma associação que tem como missão analisar e visibilizar dados que revelam desigualdades para qualificar o debate sobre questões de gênero, raça e direitos.

A Gênero e Número vai além da distribuição de informação orientada por dados. Aprofunda temas relacionados a agendas públicas que reverberam também no setor privado para contribuir com a construção de estratégiasque jogam luz sobre as questões prioritárias para garantir igualdade de acesso e direitos a mulheres, à população negra, à população LGBT+ e ao povo indígena.

Além de produzir estudos sob demanda ou em parceria com organizações da sociedade civil ou empresas, a GN mantém uma plataforma de jornalismo de dados aberta no site e distribui informação qualificada diariamente nas principais plataformas sociais @generonumero, onde destrincha temas intrínsecos às desigualdades de gênero e de raça a partir de dados públicos estruturados e analisados  pelas cientistas políticas, analistas de dados, jornalistas e designers do time. 

Fundada em 2016, a Gênero e Número, com sede no Rio de Janeiro, é liderada por mulheres e tem a transparência, a diversidade e a independência editorial como valores inegociáveis.
Location: Rio de Janeiro, Rio de Janeiro

Name: Groupe Profession Santé
Description:
Le Groupe Profession Santé, leader sur le secteur des médias santé, s’adresse à tous les professionnels et grands acteurs de la santé :
— médecins, généralistes et spécialistes,
— pharmaciens d’officine et hospitaliers,
— personnels soignants,
— communauté médicale étudiante,
— institutions et établissements de santé, 
— et l’ensemble des acteurs de l’écosystème de la santé…

C’est une information indépendante, fiable, vérifiée et objective qui est au cœur de la pratique de notre métier.
Nos rédactions sont composées d’une quarantaine de journalistes spécialisés. Leurs expertises pluridisciplinaires leur permettent d’aborder l’ensemble des enjeux du secteur. Nos titres traitent ainsi une information à caractère médical, scientifique, économique et socio-professionnel, passée au crible de l’analyse. C’est avec rigueur, engagement et professionnalisme que nos rédactions œuvrent loin des « fake news » si délétères dans le domaine de la santé. Ces garanties, indispensables à l’exercice des professionnels de santé et à la déontologie du secteur, font du Groupe Profession Santé un « tiers de confiance ».

Cette éthique et notre intégrité scientifique sont aussi portées par l’ensemble de nos services (emploi, formation, évènementiel) ainsi que par notre régie publicitaire et l’Agence scientifique dans la mise en œuvre des opérations de communication.

Les marques du Groupe Profession Santé : 

- Médias : Le Quotidien du Médecin, Le Quotidien du Pharmacien, Infirmiers.com, Aide-soignant.com, Cadredesante.com, Remede.org

- Communication & événementiel : Agence Profession Santé

- Emploi : Emploi Médecin / Emploi Soignant

- Formation : MEDI Formation

- Événements : les Rencontres de la Cancérologie Française, les Journées de l'Economie de l'Officine, le Prix Galien

- Équipement : Medivia

Name: The News & Observer
Description:
The News & Observer traces its roots to a paper called the Sentinal, founded in Raleigh in 1865 and later absorbed by The Observer and then merged with The News. The News & Observer was purchased at auction in 1894 by Josephus Daniels, who later served as secretary of the Navy under President Woodrow Wilson and ambassador to Mexico under Franklin D. Roosevelt. The Daniels family owned the paper until 1995, when it was purchased by McClatchy. 

A company with deep roots in the Triangle, The News & Observer Publishing Co. is a modern information company that publishes news and information in both digital and print formats to serve a growing market. Our publications include The News & Observer, one of the nation’s best regional newspapers, and 10 bi-weekly community newspapers. The company launched nando.net, one of the nation’s first internet service providers, in 1994, and today is home to both newsobserver.com and triangle.com, two of the region’s leading websites. We offer comprehensive marketing and advertising solutions that range from cutting-edge rich media online ads to traditional newspaper inserts. 

The News & Observer is widely regarded as one of the nation's best regional newspapers and places a strong emphasis on investigative reporting and watchdog journalism. In 1996, the paper was awarded the Pulitzer Prize Gold Medal for Public Service for its work showing how commercial hog farms were affecting the environment and economy in Eastern North Carolina.

Our main office is in downtown Raleigh, NC.

For current positions visit us at http://newsobserver.theresumator.com/apply

Name: Nextdeal.gr
Description:
Nextdeal - Η πρώτη πηγή ενημέρωσης καταναλωτών για το χρηματοασφαλιστικό χώρο!

Στις 17 Ιανουαρίου 2000 η εφημερίδα «NEXT DEAL», ενημερωτική έκδοση δεκαπενθήμερης κυκλοφορίας κάνει την πρώτη της εμφάνιση. Η εφημερίδα αποτελεί έντυπο συνεχούς και αδιάλειπτης κυκλοφορίας εδώ και 14 χρόνια,  στοχεύοντας στην ειδησεογραφική κάλυψη της τραπεζοασφαλιστικής αγοράς και του χρηματοοικονομικού  χώρου. 

Στη θεματολογία της περιλαμβάνονται θέματα που αφορούν καταρχήν στις ειδήσεις των Ασφαλιστικών εταιριών, των τραπεζών, των εταιριών Bancassurance, των ΑΕΔΑΚ, των Ταμείων δημοσίων και ιδιωτικών νοσηλευτηρίων.  

Παράλληλα γίνονται παρουσιάσεις και συνεντεύξεις ανθρώπων του ευρύτερου χώρου των χρηματοοικονομικών προϊόντων και της ασφαλιστικής αγοράς με παράλληλη σύνδεση με τους ασφαλισμένους, ενώ επίσης δημοσιεύονται πρωτοβουλίες και εκδηλώσεις των επιχειρήσεων από την ελληνική και τη διεθνή αγορά. 

Στην ύλη της εφημερίδας επίσης εγκολπώνονται απόψεις κομμάτων, βουλευτών και κυβερνητικών παραγόντων για τα συναφή θέματα, αναφορές και επισημάνσεις για την πορεία του χρηματιστηρίου, νέα από το χώρο της Υγείας, των Νοσοκομείων, των κλινικών και των ιατρών, καθώς και συγκριτικοί πίνακες τιμολογίων και αποτελεσμάτων των εταιριών.

Name: Stavanger Aftenblad
Description:
Vi er Aftenbladet. Aviså for Stavanger og sør-Rogaland der vi jobber vi for å lage journalistikk som betyr noe:
*  Vi setter dagsorden
*  Vi stiller de vanskelige spørsmålene
* Vi forteller historiene som ellers ikke blir fortalt

Fra politikk til næringsliv, fra helsevesen til teknologi, fra kultur til klima. Vi følger utviklingen i regionen tett og er tett på folk. Vi er til stede der det skjer, og vi tar oss tid til å forstå og forklare.

Aftenbladet er en del av Schibsted og dermed et sterkt redaksjonelt fellesskap.
Samtidig er vi uavhengige, rotfestet i Rogaland og i lesernes hverdag.

Følg oss for innblikk i journalistikken, innsikt i regionen og et møte med menneskene bak historiene.

Basert i Stavanger og Sandnes
 Grunnlagt i 1893

Name: The Engineering Review
Description:
Engineering Review is a highly respected professional newspaper for people doing engineering. 
Engineering Review was established in October 1975. Now we are in the 5th decade. Our readers and advertisers gave us strength and confidence for this long journey. 
Engineering Review was founded by (late) Mr. Najam ul Hasan, a renowned news industry man. He served the engineering community for 37 years (1975-2021). His hard work and struggle made Engineering Review Pakistan's #1 paper on this subject.

Name: autoPneu • Diario del neumático
Description: Medio de comunicación diario que ofrece información al profesional de la automoción interesado en soluciones sostenibles para la movilidad y un mantenimiento preventivo del vehículo. Name: The Greek Herald
Description:
The Greek Herald is Australia’s largest national newspaper in the Greek Australian community. It is currently one of the only daily Greek newspapers that serves the Greek diaspora, internationally.

For over 95 years, The Greek Herald has been delivering news into the homes of Greek Australians.

Since 1926, the award-winning Greek Herald has had a rich tradition of engaging and connecting Greek Australians, nationally. Our newspaper offers comprehensive coverage of local, overseas and community news for people of Greek heritage.

Name: This Is Reno
Description:
ThisisReno.com is Reno's online news and events source. We are locally owned and operated. Since 2009, we have provided innovative, online  journalism for the Reno community. 

We cover Reno-area events, local government, business, education, music and arts.

Name: Al Mal Newspaper
Description:
AL MAL is a premier daily business source for board range of business information, providing a up to date extensive news, to its readers, representing a wide range of entrepreneurs, decision-makers & business minded people.
Al Mal principle is to contribute to the peaceful and democratic development of the Egyptian economy by providing fair and impartial news reports.
We have met this commitment through our objective reporting, and by valuing the role of the market and of democracy. As a result, we now enjoy a high reputation as a reliable source of information for people in Egypt & Middle East area.

Name: Gaming Americas
Description: Regulatory updates, interviews, trends, and news covering the online and land-based gambling industry from South to North America.

Name: The Indiana Lawyer
Description:
Since 1990, The Indiana Lawyer has kept a finger on the pulse of Indiana’s legal community and reports on the issues that matter to you. We cover news from the courts, bar associations, law firms, legal aid, law schools, state government and more.

Our daily newsletter keeps you up to date on the most recent court opinions from Indiana's appellate courts, as well as legal news happening in the state and nationally. Sign up for the free email at https://www.theindianalawyer.com/registration. You can also sign up for our Breaking News, News Updates and M&A Monthly at that link.

We also bring you the latest in legal news via our The Indiana Lawyer Podcast. Released every other Wednesday (on the weeks when a new print issue isn't published), podcast host Alexa Shrake interviews a leader in the Indiana legal community. Get it on our website, in our free email or on your favorite podcast app.

We're also committed to community engagement. Each year, we honor the legal community's outstanding lawyers and legal support staffers through our Leadership in Law Awards, which began in 2006. And in 2023, we began recognizing leaders in DEI efforts through our Diversity in Law Awards.

Visit http://www.theindianalawyer.com for more information and to subscribe.

Name: Der Pragmaticus
Description: Mein Name ist Pragmaticus. Der Pragmaticus. Herzlich Willkommen zum neuen Medium für den deutschsprachigen Raum.

Name: TrashTalk
Description:
Avec son ton décalé et sans langue de bois, TrashTalk traite de l'actu NBA & Basket au quotidien. 

Notre équipe de rédacteurs à la  plume légère et au coup de gueule facile saura vous faire visiter les coulisses de la Grande Ligue à travers des articles sur l'actualité et des dossiers NBA brûlants.

Name: Qatar Tribune Newspaper
Description:
The word ‘Tribune’ is derived from the ancient Greek which means "Champion of the People." We at Qatar Tribune propose to do so by reaching our readers with the news first and what's behind.
Qatar Tribune’s target market is Qatari nationals, Arab Expat and other expatriates communities residing in Qatar. In brief, Qatar Tribune caters to the entire nation including
locals and expatriates who understand English.
To accommodate various readers all these kinds of newspaper reading population
within Qatar Tribune, we have segmented the newspaper into FIVE sections : -

Main Section
Nation
Business
Chill Out
Sports

Main Section
The main section talks about the world news. It has news about the Americas, Europe, the Gulf & Middle East, South Asia, Pakistan, South East Asia, Philippines, India. It also includes a special place for the opinions and analysis of journalists and readers.
Nation
The supplement mainly includes local news. This section covers a lead story, political or protocol story etc. There is also a section known as the Dateline Doha in which there will be an interview with an offcical/wellknown figure in Qatar and reports of unusual incidences that take place in Qatar.Further in this section the reader can find a variety of classified ADS for their references.  
Business
The business supplement provides news from sectors of banks, financial institutions as well as stories about the Oil & Gas infrastructure. On Sundays & Mondays the Business Supplement provides news from the Blue Chip corporate Sector. 
Sports
Sports are a motivating passion for most of the readers. By taking these needs of the readers, Qatar Tribune has segmented the Sports section and has given it equal importance as the other sections in the newspaper. With due importance of the sports page, Qatar Tribune covers world sports, followed by local sports, athletics, the Arena, the field and the pitch for American games and a 22 yards section that focuses on the game of cricket.

Name: Northwest Arkansas Democrat-Gazette
Description: The Northwest Arkansas Democrat-Gazette features a comprehensive collection of local, regional, state, national and international news, with breaking and developing stories posted throughout the day on www.nwaonline.com. Follow us on Facebook, Twitter and Instagram @nwademgaz.

Name: L'Opinion
Description:
Nous voulons être un journal à l’écoute, respectueux et proche des gens, qui rend compte de la vie du Maroc et de la grande région avec sincérité et bienveillance. Un quotidien national d’information générale attaché par-dessus tout au bien-être des populations. 

Nous sommes engagés pour un Maroc indépendant et respecté, économiquement et socialement développé, dans une région stable.

Notre journal soutient les initiatives de croissance publiques et privées.

Il est aux côtés d’un entrepreneuriat responsable, créateur d’emploi et de richesse au bénéfice du pays et de ses habitants.

Nous revendiquons d’être un journal  curieux et rassembleur, investi dans toutes les sphères de la société.

Un journal qui parle d’une voix claire, ouvert au débat d’idées dans l’équilibre des points de vue. 

Nous voulons aussi être un journal optimiste, capable de se réjouir et de partager les moments de joie individuels ou collectifs.

Name: Le Défi Media Group
Description: Le Défi Media Group is a mass media company based in Port Louis, Mauritius. The group's operations include newspapers, magazines, radio, and digital media. The newspapers, magazines, and radio are mostly published and broadcast in French.

Name: Scienza in rete
Description:
Scienza in rete è un progetto editoriale dell'Agenzia Zadig Società benefit, che ha l’obiettivo di informare il dibattito pubblico con un giornalismo basato sulle conoscenze e sul metodo scientifico, dando voce a ricercatori e ricercatrici. Per farlo la redazione si propone come mediatrice culturale tra il mondo della ricerca e la società per offrire al pubblico strumenti chiari e utili alla comprensione di ciò che accade.

Direttore responsabile: Luca Carra

Redazione: Sergio Cima, Simonetta Pagliani, Chiara Sabelli, Paolo Recalcati, Anna Romano, Laura Scillitani e Jacopo Mengarelli.

Sviluppo del sito: Paolo Griselli e Sergio Cima.

Name: JARN Ltd.
Description:
■JARN magazine■
JARN (Japan Air Conditioning, Heating & Refrigeration News) is the only English-language magazine published in Japan dedicated to global HVAC&R industry news. Since its first issue in 1969, JARN has earned a reputation as an essential resource for professionals and decision-makers worldwide  

With deep industry insights, JARN covers:
・Market trends and analysis
・New products and technologies
・Interviews with industry leaders
・Coverage of major international trade shows
・Annual special editions focused on key product segments

Our global circulation and trusted network of contributors make JARN a premier source for up-to-date HVAC&R information.

■eJARN.com■
eJARN.com offers real-time access to breaking news, archives, and exclusive features categorized by market, company, and product – perfect for staying ahead in the fast-evolving HVAC&R sector.

■X■
 Follow us here and on X (@JARNmagazine) for daily updates
https://x.com/JARNmagazine

Name: Finascope
Description:
Finascope deciphers economic and financial news from Paris, highlights key industry players, and supports professionals in their strategic and wealth management decisions.
As a leading independent digital media outlet, Finascope serves executives, asset managers, institutional investors, intermediaries, treasurers, law firms, consultants — and individual savers as well.
Our promise: reliable, exclusive content rooted in your day-to-day concerns.
Every day, our editorial team covers major trends, strategies, key operations, regulatory developments, sector innovations, and executive appointments.
Finascope is also a participatory media platform: experts and academics share their insights, curated and validated by our editorial team.
Backed by its readers, Finascope ensures its independence through a subscription-based business model.
Discover a new way to stay informed: closer to you, and more relevant.

Name: ΤΟ ΒΗΜΑ - To Vima
Description:
To Vima, founded in 1922, has been a calm and democratic voice in Greek public life for more than a century. With a steady commitment to credibility and accuracy, it delivers politics, economy, society, culture, and international news through trusted reporting and insightful analysis.

Every Sunday, To Vima is published with a wide range of high-quality supplements and inserts, offering readers a comprehensive view of current affairs and ideas:

The main newspaper, with in-depth reporting on domestic and international politics, exclusive interviews, commentary, and infographics.

OT, covering the economy, business, and markets at both the national and global level.

An English-language insert produced in collaboration with The Wall Street Journal.

B2, focusing on Culture, Books, Science, and Ideas.

VIMAgazino, the iconic magazine supplement that continues to set standards in content and design.

Special editions, including collected volumes under the title To Vima in History.

Beyond print, To Vima maintains a strong digital presence through tovima.gr, a leading source of daily news and analysis, while its English-language site tovima.com, created in partnership with The Wall Street Journal, makes its journalism accessible to an international audience.

#ToVima #ToVimagr

Name: Vendeur
Description:
Que vous soyez vendeurs, responsable de rayon, directeur de magasins dans les secteurs du blanc, brun & multimédia, ayez le réflexe "VENDEUR".

Découvrez également nos dossiers de fond qui vous permettront de toujours mieux pratiquer votre métier

Venez partager avec nous vos expériences, vos conseils, vos coups de coeur... sur notre blog 

http://blog.vendeur-mag.com

Name: Middle East News Agency (MENA)
Description:
Historical Background:

The Middle East News Agency was established on 15 December 1955. 

MENA is now one of strongest regional news agencies and the biggest Arab and African agency as it rated 11th on the list of international news agencies (according to UNESCO's report). 

At the beginning, MENA's service was available in Arabic only with a daily transmission estimated in dozens. Yet, MENA subscribers now receive an average of 1000 items daily, with an around-the-clock transmission of quarter of a million words in Arabic, English and French, covering all parts of the world, a matter which prompted the UNESCO to place MENA 11th on the list of world agencies.


MENA transmits now 250,000 words round the clock in Arabic, English, and French and its news services reach the four corners of the world.

 
MENA Head Office Address:
Cairo - Egypt.
P.O.Box 1165 . 17 Hoda Sharawi Street 11111 Cairo, Egypt.

MENA Head Office Tel & WhatsApp : +201222103417
E-mail : marketing@mena.org.eg

Name: SimplyBiz.it
Description:
SimplyBiz è un quotidiano on line che garantisce un aggiornamento dettagliato sul mondo della mediazione creditizia, immobiliare, assicurativa e finanziaria grazie alla pubblicazione di notizie, servizi di approfondimento, interviste e focus, consultabili sul sito www.simplybiz.it.
SimplyBiz elabora una newsletter settimanale con le principali notizie del settore, con particolare riferimento al mondo della mediazione creditizia e della distribuzione del credito.

Il team di SimplyBiz racchiude esperienze e competenze di altissimo standing professionale, che permettono di soddisfare tutte le esigenze di comunicazione delle aziende clienti: dalla realizzazione di piani di marketing e comunicazione all’organizzazione di eventi aziendali o commerciali.

SimplyBiz si pone come fornitore leader di servizi formativi.
In collaborazione con la Luiss Business School e con altri enti formativi offre al mercato soluzioni professionali di altissimo livello.Da settembre 2012 sono stati oltre 7.000 i professionisti del credito che hanno usufruito dei servizi formativi di SimplyBiz.

L’area consulenza di SimplyBiz offre un supporto completo alle imprese del settore bancario, assicurativo e finanziario. Può contare su un particolare know-how per supportare le esigenze di mediatori creditizi e di agenti in attività finanziaria che operano nel settore finanziario e assicurativo.
Garantisce servizi di supporto alle funzioni di compliance, internal audit e risk management aziendali anche in termini di outsourcing e di monitoraggio e controllo delle reti distributive.

SimplyBiz offre un supporto completo per la ricerca di personale e implementazione delle reti di vendita attraverso circuiti Standard e Master.
Il metodo prevede l’analisi puntuale dei fabbisogni del cliente, la ricerca dei possibili operatori di rete, la gestione del processo di selezione, fino alla presentazione dei candidati selezionati, alla loro formazione e all’inserimento.

Name: La Toque Magazine
Description: Depuis près de 30 ans, La Toque Magazine, accompagne les professionnels de la boulangerie, pâtisserie, confiserie, chocolaterie et glacier dans leur quotidien. A travers ses reportages et ses articles, le magazine et sa rédaction de passionnés aborde les enjeux d’aujourd’hui et de demain pour apporter des réponses à l’ensemble de la filière. Nos supports magazine, cahiers Snacking et numériques apportent un éclairage indépendant sur la fabrication, la vente, l’hygiène, le juridique, la fiscalité et le management afin d’accompagner la profession et l’aider dans ses décisions. La Toque souhaite porter différentes perspectives sur un secteur qui ne cesse d’évoluer en partageant les innovations, les tendances et les nouveautés tout en défendant l’artisanat. Leader de l’information professionnelle, La Toque se positionne comme LE partenaire de l’artisan !

Name: Southern Finance 南方财经全媒体
Description:
Southern Finance Omnimedia Corp(SFC) is the leading business and finance media outlet based in the Greater Bay Area. 

We are SFC’s Hong Kong bureau, focusing on the region’s market dynamic, finance updates, and cutting-edge scientific innovations.

Our signature interview shows, #HKTechTalk25 and #GBAFianceTalk, explore Hong Kong’s path in finance and technology development through a professional angle. 

Follow us on LinkedIn and stay tuned for the latest conversations we have with world-renowned scientist and financial tycoons in Hong Kong.

南方财经全媒体集团成立于2016年11月，是经中央批准的全国首家全媒体集团，以“媒体、智库、数据、交易”为核心业务，旗下有21世纪经济报道、广东经视、股市广播、投资快报、21财经APP等多个优质财经原创新闻平台。 

南财集团（香港站）则立足香港，主要通过高端专访与深度报道，全景式呈现当下香港创科金融行业的精彩人物故事，以思维的碰撞启发对香港创科金融业未来的思考。

Name: France-Amérique Magazine
Description:
Founded during World War II by French exiles in New York, France-Amérique is the first bilingual French-English publication in North America.

Every month, France-Amérique magazine offers a compilation of portraits, reports, essays, and interviews to inspire thought and debate, combined with an elegant design and high-quality images. The publication analyzes French life and art de vivre, and offers a unique connection to the French cultural scene in the United States and Canada. Thanks to its bilingual format, France-Amérique attracts students of French and English who use the magazine to improve their written comprehension in both languages.

Name: The Times Post
Description: The Times Post aims to connect, inform, and enlighten local, national and global readers with unbiased reporting, in-depth analysis and engaging opinions from our experts and contributors.

Name: ATALAYAR entre dos orillas
Description: Medio de comunicación para todos los que quieren y necesitan tener las claves del mundo en sus manos. Atalayar es el puente de entendimiento entre culturas.

Name: Nieuwsblad
Description: Het Nieuwsblad follows current events from near and far. Notjust the hard facts of politics and economics, but also the human stories behind the events. That makes het Nieuwsblad a unique, accessible newspaper, easy to read for the whole family. Het Nieuwsblad is a valuable source of information, a guide for living in today’s world, a committed newspaper that dares to voice an opinion. We show what's happening and bring the world to our readers.

Name: Larder Magazine
Description:
Larder - dynamic media portal dedicated to online news.
Explore the exciting world of gastronomy with our food and drink site, covering the latest stories in the hospitality industry.

We feature the latest stories, bring you the latest press releases and showcase the very best that Scotland has to offer. 

If you would like to share a story or have your food or drink business featured then please contact our editorial team - editorial@unionmedia.news

Name: VRM
Description: Wir sind VRM, eines der führenden regionalen Medienunternehmen im Rhein-Main-Gebiet und Mittelhessen. Unsere mehr als 1.300 Mitarbeiterinnen und Mitarbeiter arbeiten täglich daran, die Menschen in der Region zu informieren, zu unterstützen und zu inspirieren. Möchten auch Sie Teil eines Teams werden, das wirklich etwas bewegt? Das Verbindungen schafft, Regionalität stärkt und die Digitalisierung der Verlagsbranche vorantreibt? Dann bewerben Sie sich – wir freuen uns auf Sie!

Name: Tribuna de Canarias

Name: Daily Bruin
Description:
Founded in 1919, the Daily Bruin is UCLA’s on-campus student newspaper. The paper offers local insight and coverage of campus events, trends, breaking news and important topics on its website and social media accounts daily. The Bruin prints on Mondays, Wednesdays and Fridays during the academic year.

The Bruin is one of ten UCLA Student Media outlets. It serves as one of the largest student organizations on UCLA’s campus, with around 500 students working across 17 sections. Students serve as the paper’s editors, reporters, photographers, videojournalists, designers, programmers and more.

Countless alumni from The Bruin have gone on to work for professional daily newspapers and news organizations around the world. Daily Bruin alumni have gone on to receive Pulitzer Prizes and a Nobel Peace Prize.

The Daily Bruin hires new interns in the Fall and Winter Quarters of each academic year.  For any recruitment related questions, please contact the Daily Bruin’s Outreach team at dboutreach@dailybruin.com. For general inquiries, email editor@dailybruin.com.

Name: jornal empresariALL
Description:
Prezamos pelo intercâmbio de boas práticas empresariais!

Nosso projeto teve início em 2005 com o objetivo de compartilhar noticias das inovações do setor industrial para empresários, executivos e gestores. Assim, promovemos a conexão entre indústria e inovação de forma ágil e eficiente. Estamos presentes de forma online, impressa e social, visando impulsionar o setor para o crescimento com competitividade e excelência.

A 1ª edição circulou em 11 de abril de 2010, com apenas 8 páginas. Logo foi aprovado e cresceu tornando-se importante nas relações entre empresas, empregados e sociedade.

O Que Fazemos

1- Intercâmbio de boas práticas econômicas, ambientais e sociais entre os empregados e contratados das empresas Vale, Samarco, ArcelorMittal Tubarão, Suncoke, Simec Cariacica, Suzano, Chemtrade Logistics, Evonik, Portocel, Estaleiro Jurong, Codesa, Porto de Vitória, Transpetro e Petrobras;

2- Disponibilizamos espaços para empresas fornecedoras fazerem anúncios, informes publicitários e matérias, conectando-se diretamente ao usuário final, agilizando o processo de vendas e estreitando relacionamentos.

Name: Lance !
Description: Fundado em 1997, Grupo LANCE! lançou o seu jornal diário nas bancas em 26 de outubro no Rio de Janeiro e em São Paulo em 1º de novembro. Inovador desde o primeiro dia, o LANCE! foi o primeiro jornal brasileiro totalmente impresso em cores e com cobertura esportiva nacional. É a única publicação especializada em esportes com edições personalizadas nas três principais cidades do país (Rio de Janeiro, São Paulo e Belo Horizonte) com diferentes coberturas e notícias, junto com as edições do LANCE! Rede Nacional, distribuído por parceiros em sete estados adicionais.

Name: Le Petit Bulletin
Description:
Le Petit Bulletin est un bimensuel culturel gratuit à Lyon créé en 1997. 

Il paraît tous les quinze jours les mercredis et a pour objectif de présenter toute l'actualité des sorties culturelles avec un agenda complet (musique, cinéma, théâtre, expositions, conférences...) tout en proposant critiques, portraits, interviews et analyses indépendantes.

 Le Petit Bulletin fait partie du groupe Com Infos.
