Name: Le Vif
Description:
Magazine généraliste, Le Vif couvre l’ensemble des domaines de l’actualité, de la politique à la société, en passant par l’économie, le sport, les sciences, les nouvelles technologies, la culture, et ce, aussi bien sur le plan belge que sur le plan international.
La volonté du "Vif" est de garder son calme, vérifier les faits et de donner une chance aux nouveaux points de vue. Pourquoi devons-nous toujours nous battre pour affirmer nos convictions? Quel est le problème avec le doute? C'est pour cela que Le Vif existe. Soyez malins, osez douter.

Name: Athens Banner-Herald
Description:
• The Athens Banner-Herald's roots go back to the Athens Banner, first published on March 20, 1832, by Albon Chase and John Nisbet. In 1921, the Banner merged with the afternoon Herald, and was operated by Publisher Earl B. Braswell for the next 44 years.

  • In 1965, The Advertiser -- an Athens weekly published by local businessman Claude Williams -- was being converted to a daily newspaper to challenge the Banner-Herald. The owners knew that the Banner-Herald would be up for sale soon (because of a stipulation in the owner's will). On June 17, 1965, the first edition of the Athens Daily News rolled off the press.

  • Just 32 days later, William and Charles Morris, who owned newspapers in Augusta and Savannah, purchased the Banner-Herald, and they immediately made an offer to also purchase the Daily News, but were rebuffed, and a newspaper battle emerged between the morning Daily News and afternoon Banner-Herald.

  • But within a couple of years, the financial burden being carried by the owners of the Daily News forced them to sell the Daily News to the Morrises. The transaction was announced on Christmas Eve 1967. The papers continued to compete editorially, but eventually the staffs merged to provide content for both papers.

  • Athens Magazine, a bi-monthly full-color magazine featuring the people and places in Northeast Georgia, was started in spring 1989.

  • In June 1996, the papers started a Web site, originally called Athenaeum, which was changed to Online Athens in 1997. The site takes more than 5 million page views each month.

  • In May 2001, the afternoon Banner-Herald and morning Daily News were merged into one morning paper published under the Banner-Herald name. The paper is owned by Morris Communications Corp. of Augusta. Morris owns daily and non-daily newspapers along with several radio stations, magazines, an outdoor advertising company and several other media properties, stretching across the nation and into Europe.

Prowadzimy serwis MamBiznes z myślą o osobach planujących założenie własnej firmy. Misją portalu jest przyczynianie się do rozwoju przedsiębiorczości poprzez dostarczanie fachowej i kompleksowej wiedzy na temat zakładania i prowadzenia działalności gospodarczej.

Na MamBiznes skupiamy się również na ważnym dla nas rynku startupów. Młode biznesy w Polsce rosną w siłę, dlatego znajdziesz u nas najważniejsze informacje dotyczące rozwoju i finansowania rodzimych startupów i nie tylko.

Name: The Temple News
Description: The Temple News (TTN) is the editorially independent weekly newspaper of Temple University. It prints 5,000 copies to be distributed primarily on Temple's Main Campus every Tuesday. A staff of 24, supported by more than 150 writers, is responsible for designing, reporting and editing the 20-page paper. Increasingly, TTN is supplementing its weekly print product with breaking news and online-only content on its Web site. In September 2007, TTN launched Broad & Cecil, its own blog community.

Name: The Korea Times
Description:
The Korea Times is the oldest and largest circulation Korean-language daily newspaper in the U.S.  In addition to newspapers, KTLA also owns television, radio and internet operations serving the Korean community.  

Established in 1969 and headquartered in Los Angeles, KT initially began as the U.S. distribution arm of Hankook Ilbo, one of the largest newspapers in Korea.  The Korea Times owns newspaper operations in ten major markets in the U.S.  In addition, The Korea Times has franchise operations in Denver, Dallas, Houston and Atlanta.

Un magazine pour (re)découvrir le territoire autrement, à travers les témoignages ds décideurs issus de différents secteurs d'activité.
Publiez des offres d'emploi, trouvez le bien immobilier idéal pour votre entreprise, consultez l'agenda des pros et retrouvez l'ensemble des cartes de visites en fin de magazine.

Pour le moment bi-mensuel, c'est à partir de septembre 2022 qu'À PROPOS sera édité tous les mois, avec quelques tirages spéciaux !

Description: Sharing our stories of making digital products at The New York Times.

Name: DallasNews Corporation
Description:
DallasNews Corporation (NASDAQ: DALN) is the Dallas-based holding company of The Dallas Morning News and Belo + Company. 

The Dallas Morning News is Texas’ leading daily newspaper with a strong journalistic reputation, intense regional focus and close community ties. More than 12 million people a month read content published in print, online or digitally.  The company has won nine Pulitzer Prizes and is the oldest continuously operated business in Texas, dating back to 1842.

Belo + Company is a marketing consultancy agency that provides clients nationwide with intelligence-driven, technology-enabled strategy, creative and media solutions. Our agency employs a diverse group of category experts that utilize both divergent and convergent thinking strategies that deepen connections, expands influence and scales success. Offices are located in Dallas, Tulsa and Denver.

Furthermore, beSUCCESS offers actual chances to Korean start-ups and ventures to meet start-ups, ventures and investors including VCs abroad.

beSUCCESS will be the best and the most reliable global media & business partner to support your worldwide success. This is why beSUCCESS is here for you. beSUCCESS wishes to spread great Entrepreneurship to this world with our moves.

Name: Marlowes
Description:
Das Magazin Marlowes erscheint seit Januar 2017 wöchentlich mit einer sorgfältig austarierten Mischung aus vertiefenden, gründlich recherchierten und reflektierten Inhalten, die mit einem Newsletter verbreitet werden.

Die Schwerpunkte bilden Themen aus Architektur, Technik, Städtebau und Stadtplanung.
Die Beiträge verknüpfen Theorie und Praxis. Sie werden durch Buchrezensionen und Veranstaltungs- und Ausstellungsbesprechungen ergänzt.

„Marlowes“ wird von der Partnerschaftsgesellschaft frei04 publizistik herausgegeben. Die Herausgeber:innen sind Dr. Ursula Baus, Christian Holl und Claudia Siegele.

Als freie Publizisten vertreten wir den Anspruch, dass eine lebendige Architekturszene der fundierten, öffentlichen Auseinandersetzung bedarf. Wir recherchieren gründlich, nehmen aber auch deutlich Positionen ein, die von keinerlei Abhängigkeit finanzieller oder institutioneller Art beeinflusst werden.

Description: La misión de “El Gobierno” es informar a la esfera pública sobre la coyuntura nacional e internacional, así como generar en nuestros lectores un servicio que garantice el juicio crítico.

Description: Graduates is a one-stop platform for college and university students, as well as for young professionals. It’s an initiative of The Business Standard to provide resources and skill-development support to the young minds.

Name: The Dallas Express
Description:
We founded DX in 2021 to fill a void in our Metroplex communities for fact-based, non-opinion news. We believe that news should be reported dispassionately to place emphasis on facts over all else. News reports can be direct and even hard-edged, but they should never be “spun” or carry editorial opinions to suit the political persuasions of our reporters or editors.

These are some of our guiding principles. We hope to hear from you if you believe at any point that we are not living up to them.

Trust in media is at an all-time low, according to Gallup polls. Only nine percent of adults say they have “a great deal” of trust in their news providers. Our mission is to turn this trend around in the communities we cover. We want Dallas readers to be able to place their trust in us.

The Dallas Express does not receive contributions from the United States or foreign governments or government agencies.

Name: The Region
Description: The Region is a business and leadership platform focused on Southeast Europe, with coverage spanning Slovenia, Croatia, Bosnia and Herzegovina, Serbia, Montenegro, North Macedonia, and Albania. At its core is The Region magazine — a quarterly English-language print publication featuring in-depth interviews, analysis, and stories that highlight innovation, investment, and progress across the Adria region. Alongside the magazine, The Region runs a daily-updated website and a weekly newsletter that deliver timely business news, regional developments, and insights from key decision-makers. Whether in print or online, The Region connects local transformation with global relevance.

Name: Segodnya Multimedia
Description: Main product of the company is a most popular in Ukraine daily social and political full-color newspaper “Segodnya”, that has Kyiv, Odessa, Kharkov, Donetsk, Dnepropetrovsk and national issues.

Name: Journal Of Neuroradiology
Description:
The Journal of Neuroradiology is a peer-reviewed journal, publishing worldwide clinical and basic research in the field of diagnostic and Interventional neuroradiology, translational and molecular neuroimaging, and artificial intelligence in neuroradiology.

The Journal of Neuroradiology considers for publication articles, reviews, technical notes and letters to the editors (correspondence section), provided that the methodology and scientific content are of high quality, and that the results will have substantial clinical impact and/or physiological importance.

All manuscripts submitted to the Journal of Neuroradiology are first evaluated by the Editor-in-Chief and/or the Associate Editors to see if they are suitable for a peer-review . If yes, then the manuscript is send for peer review by international experts, and must:

·         Be clear and easy to understand, precise and concise;

·         Bring new, interesting, valid information - and improve clinical care or guide future research;

·         Be solely the work of the author(s) stated;

·         Not have been previously published elsewhere and not be under consideration by another journal;

·         Be in accordance with the journal's Guide for Authors' instructions.

Under no circumstances does the journal guarantee publication before the editorial board makes its final decision.

The journal is indexed in the main international databases and is accessible worldwide through the ScienceDirect and ClinicalKey platforms.

6 issues/year

Follow us on social media! 
instagram @jneuroradiology
twitter @jneuroradiology
threads @jneuroradiology

Conseils santé, astuces de grand-mère, beauté et soins, psychologie, minceur et forme ou encore recettes et témoignages font partie des thèmes abordés pour répondre aux besoins de tout un chacun. À noter que les informations fournies dans le magazine ou sur le site sont destinées à améliorer et non à remplacer la relation qui existe entre le lecteur et son professionnel de santé. 

Santé+ Magazine est la propriété du groupe GAIA MEDIAS (Édition de journaux-magazines, web services, communication)

Name: Eurasianet
Description:
Eurasianet.org is an independent news organization that covers news from and about the South Caucasus and Central Asia, providing on-the-ground reporting and critical perspectives on the most important developments in the region. Eurasianet is a tax-exempt [501(c)3] organization based at Columbia University’s Harriman Institute, one of the leading centers in North America of scholarship on Eurasia.

Name: Fædrelandsvennen
Description:
Fædrelandsvennen AS er det største mediehuset mellom Stavanger og Oslo, og er en del av Polaris Media.

I januar 2018 flyttet vi inn i nye og moderne lokaler på Torvet i Kristiansand (Rådhusgata 14 A).

Name: Lokaltidningen Mitt i
Description:
Mitt i bevakar ständigt det som händer i Stockholm – från de stora nyheterna till det som sker runt hörnet i vardagen. Våra nyheter berör och våra läsare litar på oss som en naturlig del av sin dag.

Vi är Stockholms mest lästa nyhetstidning i regionen – 7 av 10 stockholmare läser oss regelbundet. Vi finns i hela Stockholm med 30 lokala tidningar varje vecka, sajten mitti.se och digitala kanaler som våra E-tidningar och nyhetsbrev.

Ingen annan känner Stockholm som Mitt i – det gör oss unikt rustade att skapa verklig skillnad. Vi är den självklara mötesplatsen mellan lokala verksamheter och engagerade läsare – det ger din annonsering maximal genomslag i hjärtat av staden.

Name: La Gazette Drouot - International
Description:
Every week, since 1891, La Gazette Drouot has been the authoritative weekly for public auctions of furniture, paintings and objets d'art.

Its 44 issues published every year contain thousands of articles which explain, decipher and analyse objects as well as their market, while others give leading figures a forum for sharing their passion. And not forgetting the cultural news, enlightened by in-depth articles on diverse subjects, often published for the first time.

Name: DSD Insider
Description: Welcome to DSD Insider – your go-to source for the latest trends, news, and stories that matter! From lifestyle and entertainment to business and culture, we bring you insightful articles and exclusive features. Stay inspired, stay informed!

Name: Trinidad Express Newspapers
Description:
The Trinidad Express Newspapers is a member of the OCM and CCN group of companies and was established by brave pioneers on June 6 1967 with the commitment to create a nationally locally-owned Press.

Over the years, it has grown to be the leader in the Trinidad Newspaper landscape and commands more than 45 per cent advertising and 53 per cent readership in the print media market.

Editorially, the Express prides itself in fearless journalism and supports the right to a Free Press. As the leader in the industry, the Trinidad Express Newspapers continues to pave the way for the flourishing of ideas and free expression in our society.

The Trinidad Express Newspapers is the pulse of the people, as it strives to reflect each of the facets by enlightening (in depth looks into historic origins) and sensitizing (coverage of festivals) the nation to each culture that makes the society so wonderfully diversified. This type of reporting combined with strong analysis of news and events has created a definite niche and has made the Daily Express, Saturday Express and the Sunday Express household names.

Name: Il Mondo dei Trasporti
Description:
Empowering the voices of road transport industry leaders is at the heart of "Il Mondo dei Trasporti," a dynamic magazine dedicated to trucks and logistics. Our winning formula has always been to provide in-depth insights and analysis that resonate with our readers, who comprise vehicle industry professionals, small to large business owners in road haulage and logistics companies. 

Since 2010, "Il Mondo dei Trasporti" has been proudly presenting the esteemed "Person of the Year" award, recognizing outstanding contributions in the field. Additionally, we introduced the "MDT Awards" in 2017, acknowledging operators and companies that demonstrate exceptional results in their endeavors. Our constant enrichment ensures that every month, our readers can rely on us to delve into the daily challenges and experiences faced by transporters.

Join us as we bring together the industry's key players, fostering knowledge sharing, recognition, and a deeper understanding of the road transport sector.

Name: The Press Democrat
Description: Based in the heart of Sonoma Wine Country, The Press Democrat is the largest daily newspaper between San Francisco and the Oregon border. A 2018 Pulitzer Prize winner, The Press Democrat provides up-to-the-minute local news, investigative journalism, lifestyle and sports coverage, as well as a variety of niche topics and newsletters.

Name: Diario de Noticias de Navarra
Description:
Diario de Noticias es un periódico editado en Pamplona y es uno de los dos principales de Navarra. Salió al mercado el 8 de abril de 1994 tras el cierre de Navarra Hoy. Su empresa promotora es Zeroa Multimedia.

Su misión es promover y defender una Navarra libre, democrática, integradora y plural, contribuyendo a su desarrollo económico y social, proporcionando a nuestra audiencia una información próxima, de calidad, veraz y libre, a nuestros anunciantes, soportes publicitarios solventes y efectivos, a las editoras productos de calidad adecuados a sus necesidades y a la sociedad en general un servicio de garantía de pluralidad y compromiso con la libertad y la democracia.
 
Su visión es ser una empresa de comunicación multimedia que evolucione y se fortalezca, que se distinga por ser un reflejo de la realidad social, política, económica y cultural de su entorno, con credibilidad y actitud crítica ante los poderes públicos y privados, adaptándose a las demandas y necesidades de los clientes y de la sociedad , siendo un proyecto empresarial sosteniblemente solvente, respetuoso con el medio ambiente y en el que las personas que lo conforman puedan desarrollar sus capacidades profesionales y personales.

Name: Médor magazine
Description:
Médor n’est pas un chien. C’est un magazine trimestriel belge et coopératif d’enquêtes et de récits.

Au programme: 128 pages en quadrichromie (format 17 × 23 cm) et 100 % de journalisme, des enquêtes, des récits, des portraits, des photos, des graphes, des rubriques qui en ont dans le ventre. Le tout centré sur la Belgique.

Organisé en coopérative, Médor crée aussi un nouveau processus pour construire l’information et pour vous offrir un deep journalism de terrain indépendant, exigeant et amusant. Carrément.

Porté par 19 fondateurs (journalistes, graphistes, photographe, illustrateur et professionnels de la communication) tous passionnés par leur métier et par l'information traitée en profondeur. Praticiens et lecteurs exigeants mais avant tout citoyens soucieux d’œuvrer à ce que la presse reste le 4ème pouvoir garant de la démocratie.

Pour en savoir plus : www.medor.coop

Name: Gujarat Samachar

Name: Lincoln Journal Star
Description:
The Lincoln Journal Star is the premier news and information source in Southeast Nebraska covering local news, government, sports and events. Along with the area’s leading daily newspaper and website, we publish several niche publications and provide full service digital advertising services.  

The Lincoln Journal Star is a division of Lee Enterprises with approximately 130 employees in many fields such as finance, advertising, circulation, editorial, engineering/maintenance, information systems, and marketing. At the Lincoln Journal Star we provide many challenging and rewarding experiences as well as opportunities for advancement. We value our employees and recognize their contributions, which enable us to produce a high-quality and well-respected daily newspaper. 

Lee Enterprises is a leading provider of local news, information and advertising in primarily midsize markets, with 46 daily newspapers and a joint interest in two others, along with rapidly growing digital products and nearly 300 specialty publications in 21 states.

Name: EDR Magazine & EDR Show Dailies
Description:
European Defence Review (EDR) is the first English-language journal focusing on defense-related issues from a distinctly European perspective. EDR is produced by the defense industry’s most prominent and distinguished journalists. 

It is an offshoot of the European Security and Defense Press Association. Unsurprisingly given the origin of the magazine, its editors are all extremely qualified and highly experiences journalists – a sine qua non to be a member of the association to begin with – and all with privileged relationships within industry and governmental circles. Aimed at promoting European and Western defense and security equipment worldwide, the magazine is distributed at the major defense exhibitions and has a solid mailing list that allows it to reach decision makers all throughout continental Europe and, very importantly, the rest of the world including South East Asia and the Middle East. 

EDR Show Dailies: ED Publishing, publisher of EDR Magazine, was appointed by COGES as the Official and Exclusive Show Daily Publisher for #Eurosatory2022. Five issues of our Show Dailies with the French and English sections will be printed each in 8000+ copies and distributed by a dedicated team, at the VIP and government delegation reception area, the main entrance, conference room and exhibition hall.

Contact us:
advertising@edrmagazine.eu

Name: Geomatique Expert
Description:
Géomatique Expert est le premier magazine bimestriel consacré aux technologies et aux applications des Systèmes d'Information Géographique, il s’adresse aux acteurs de l’information géographique : collectivités locales, organismes d’état, géomètres, topographes, urbanistes, architectes… et leur offre une analyse technique en matière de systèmes, d’équipements et de solutions de traitement numérique et d'exploitation des SIG
Géomatique Expert offre de mieux comprendre le monde de la géomatique à travers des dossiers technologiques, des enquêtes de société ou des reportages chez les producteurs, les collecteurs et les utilisateurs de données géographiques.
Location: NOISY LE GRAND, Île de France

Name: Norran
Description:
Lokala nyheter, reportage och granskningar för Skellefteå och norra Västerbotten.

Vad, när, hur, vem och varför? Norran gör lokaljournalistik som förmedlar, förklarar och fördjupar. Vi vill vara först med händelsenyheter och bäst på att förklara sammanhangen. Tipsa gärna redaktionen om aktuella händelser, samhällsfrågor som du vill veta mer om och missförhållanden som behöver uppmärksammas. 

Norran är tillsammans med Norrbottens-Kuriren, Norrländska Socialdemokraten och Piteå-Tidningen en del av Norr Media AB. Vi ingår i NTM, Sveriges största koncern för lokal media, med främsta syfte att bedriva publicistisk verksamhet. Koncernen är stiftelseägd, vilket garanterar oberoende journalistik och möjligheten att agera långsiktigt.

Name: The Voice Media Group
Description:
Founded in 1982 by Val McCalla, The Voice Newspaper was borne out of a need to understand and report on issues that affected British-born black people.   

McCalla, while working on a London local paper called the East End News in 1981, spearheaded the start of a newspaper that would provide a rich legacy for all black Britons.

In the 1980s, the black press had always addressed a generation of immigrants through a number of regionally focused publications such as the West Indian Gazette, The Caribbean Times and West Africa. 

The Voice Newspaper was ofﬁcially launched with a loan from Barclays Bank and the first issue of The Voice was printed in August 1982 to coincide with the Notting Hill Carnival.  It was sold at a cover price of 54 pence in London.

Name: CSR REPORTERS
Description:
CSR REPORTERS is an independent authority focused on ethical leadership, sustainability credibility, and social impact accountability in Africa.

We exist to close the gap between good intentions and measurable responsibility.

Across Africa, organisations invest heavily in CSR and ESG initiatives, yet struggle with trust, legitimacy, and real impact. Investors face difficulty separating genuine responsibility from performative sustainability. Communities remain sceptical. Leaders face increasing scrutiny.

CSR REPORTERS addresses this challenge by operating at the intersection of:
+Independent journalism
+Sustainability and ESG intelligence
+Ethical leadership advocacy
+Corporate, investor, and public accountability

We are not a PR agency.
We are not a donor-dependent NGO.
We do not sell visibility without substance.

What we do:
+Sustainability & ESG advisory and intelligence
+Impact and perception assessments
+Executive convenings and high-level dialogues
+Independent awards grounded in transparent criteria
+Capacity building for responsible leadership

Our work is guided by clear ethical standards, transparent evaluation frameworks, and a firm separation between editorial integrity and commercial engagement.

CSR REPORTERS exists to strengthen trust, reward substance, and elevate responsible leadership that stands up to scrutiny.

=Partnerships, advisory, and institutional engagements welcome=
Contact us: enquiries@csrreporters.com ; marketing@csrreporters.com; info@csrreporters.com

Visit: www.csrreporters.com

Name: The GW Hatchet
Description:
The GW Hatchet, founded in 1904, is an editorially and financially independent newspaper serving The George Washington University community in downtown Washington, D.C. It is the second oldest newspaper in the city.

The Society of Professional Journalists named The Hatchet the best non-daily college newspaper in the nation for 2003-2004, and again in 2006-2007. The newspaper is also a winner of the 2005 and 2008 Pacemaker and 2008 Online Pacemaker awards, given out by Associated Collegiate Press. The Hatchet counts five Pulitzer Prize winners among its alumni.

The newspaper is produced by Hatchet Publications, Inc., an independent, 501(c)(3) nonprofit corporation. It is headquartered in a townhouse at 609 21st St. NW in the heart of Foggy Bottom.

Name: Design fax

Created by Jean-Charles Gaté and taken over in 2016 by Christophe Chaptal, the publication is read every week by more than 10,000 people.

Name: Washington Square News
Description:

Content is published five days a week during the academic year and offers news, culture, arts, editorial, sports coverage, photos and videos from around campus and New York City, in conjunction with our magazine, Under the Arch. 

Our organization is run by NYU undergraduates. WSN is fueled by students with a diverse array of interests such as reporting, writing, editing, coding, photography, video production, design, illustration and business.

Name: Sphères Médias
Description:
Un numéro de Sphères est un peu de terrain repris sur la course du monde. Quatre fois par an, le magazine fait un pas de côté. Un pas d’aventurier dans un microcosme tranquille et inexploré. 
Sphères s’invite chez les fumeurs de pipe, les pèlerins, les plongeurs sous-marins… Et couche, sur papier, le rythme méconnu de leur vie. Pour narrer leurs histoires, nous privilégions le reportage de terrain, le portrait, l’interview et mettons la photographie au cœur de nos pages. Sphères est entre la revue et le livre de collection, un écrin qu’on ouvre comme une respiration.

Name: Yale Daily News
Description:
Founded January 28, 1878, the Yale Daily News is the nation's oldest college daily newspaper. The News now publishes Monday through Friday during the academic year and serves the communities of Yale University and New Haven, Connecticut. In addition to the daily newspaper, the News publishes scene, a Friday supplement with reviews and articles about arts and culture, and Sports Monday, a Monday section providing expanded, in-depth sports coverage. The News also publishes several special-occasion issues every year, including the Parent's Weekend issue, the Harvard-Yale Game issue, the Freshman issue and the Commencement issue.

The News is produced by a very dedicated, all-volunteer undergraduate staff. Most of our reporters are freshmen and sophomores, while the editorial board is, with few exceptions, comprised of juniors

Name: l'éléphant
Description:
L’éléphant et l’éléphant junior sont deux revues de culture générale éditées par Scrineo, maison d’édition française indépendante. 

Créé en 2013, l'éléphant s'appuie sur deux grands axes : la transversalité des savoirs et la mémorisation. A travers des dossiers thématiques illustrés, rédigés par des experts, ce trimestriel de 160 pages propose à ses lecteurs de remettre en perspective les événements, les contextualiser et les approfondir. Pour mieux comprendre et surtout, retenir ce qu’on lit, la revue se sert du jeu, qui permet au cerveau de passer en mode actif !

L’éléphant junior, petit frère de l'éléphant, est né en 2019. Destiné aux 9-13 ans, le bimestriel poursuit les mêmes objectifs que l’éléphant : la pluridisciplinarité à travers un contenu pédagogique et ludique, adapté aux enfants et jeunes adolescents. Résolument citoyen, il accompagne ses lecteurs dans leur démarche pour devenir acteurs du monde de demain. Son credo ? Comprendre, s’amuser, s’engager !

Name: Review of Democracy

Name: Tsüri.ch
Description:
Tsüri.ch – Das unabhängige Stadtmagazin für Zürich.

Seit 2015 stehen wir für eine nachhaltige, offene und moderne Gesellschaft ein.

Unser Fokus ist klar: Kritischer, unabhängiger Journalismus, der die wichtigen Debatten in Zürich begleitet.

Unser Ziel ist es, die lokale Demokratie zu stärken und eine Plattform für politische und gesellschaftliche Themen zu bieten.

Wir setzen auf Transparenz und Authentizität. Das Vertrauen zwischen unseren Leser:innen und der Redaktion ist uns besonders wichtig.

Mit dem Züri Briefing erreichen wir täglich rund 15.000 Leser:innen, die sich für das Geschehen in ihrer Stadt interessieren.

Unsere Mission:

- Unabhängiger Lokaljournalismus: Wir berichten transparent und kritisch über die wichtigsten Themen der Stadt.
- Civic Media: Wir bringen die Debatten und Fragen Zürichs direkt zu den Menschen – durch Veranstaltungen, Workshops und Stadtspaziergänge.
- Community Building: Unsere Leser:innen sind Teil unserer Community. Sie gestalten mit und unterstützen uns durch Mitgliedschaften.
- Zukunft des Journalismus: Wir glauben an digitalen, unabhängigen Journalismus und engagieren uns als Gründungsmitglied des Verbands Medien mit Zukunft.

Unser Anspruch:

Wir versorgen unsere Leser:innen mit Impulsen, die einen eigenständigen Meinungsbildungsprozess fördern. 

Kein Top-Down-Journalismus, sondern kollektiv Zürich gestalten.

Brennst du genauso für Zürich wie wir?

Dann werde Teil unserer Community und gestalte die Debatten unserer Stadt mit.

Weitere Infos findest du auf www.tsri.ch – Wir freuen uns auf dich!

Name: The Business Scan Magazine
Description:
The Business Scan Magazine | Where Business Meets Wisdom

The Business Scan Magazine is your gateway to the world of business, leadership, innovation, and conscious entrepreneurship. We believe that true success is measured not just in profits, but in purpose, ethics, and meaningful impact. Our mission is to empower leaders, entrepreneurs, and professionals to integrate mindfulness, ethical decision-making, and spiritual intelligence into their business practices, creating organizations that thrive materially, socially, and ethically.

Through in-depth articles, inspiring stories, and exclusive interviews, we explore the intersection of business and spirituality. Our content spans practical guides on implementing mindful leadership, ethical finance, and sustainable entrepreneurship, as well as expert insights from CEOs, thought leaders, and visionaries shaping the future of business with integrity.

We also provide comprehensive coverage of global industry events, conferences, and workshops, giving our readers unique access to networking opportunities and the latest trends in innovation and commerce. With our “Vocal for Local” initiative, we support local manufacturers, small businesses, and exporters, fostering sustainable communities and encouraging economic growth rooted in responsibility and collaboration.

The Business Scan Magazine is more than a publication—it’s a movement. We aim to inspire conscious leadership, promote personal and professional growth, and redefine success through wisdom, compassion, and purposeful action. Subscribers receive exclusive insights, invitations to workshops and events, and access to a global network of like-minded professionals dedicated to transforming the way business is conducted.

By bridging the gap between traditional business strategies and spiritual intelligence, The Business Scan Magazine equips its readers to navigate the complexities of the modern business world with clarity, balance, and integrity.

Name: Naidunia (A Unit of Jagran Prakashan Ltd)
Description:

Name: Express & Star
Description:
The Express & Star is Britain's most popular local newspaper, reaching hundreds of thousands of people every day through print and online.

Founded in 1874, it has resided at its iconic Queen Street offices in Wolverhampton since the 1930s. The newspaper covers the Black Country, South Staffordshire and North Worcestershire regions, with 137,197 readers every day in print and 1.8 million monthly unique users through expressandstar.com.

More than just a publisher of regional news, the Express & Star has become a pillar of the West Midlands community, supporting many initiatives for local businesses, communities and charities, such Cash for Schools, the annual Business Awards and The Ladder for the Black Country Apprenticeship Awards. 

The paper is also synonymous with the sport in the West Midlands, proving to be the go-to voice for football fans who want to hear the latest news on their team.

Name: Messageries Lyonnaises de Presse
Description:
Acteur majeur de la distribution presse depuis 1945, MLP accompagne les éditeurs dans la diffusion de plus de 16.000 parutions presse auprès de plus de 19.000 points de vente et marchands de journaux sur l’ensemble du territoire - dont la diffusion du « numéro des survivants » de Charlie Hebdo, tiré à plus de 8 millions d’exemplaires. 

Véritable partenaire des 550 sociétés d’édition pour lesquelles elle opère, MLP tire parti de plus de 70 années d’expertise et d’expérience de terrain afin de fournir à ses clients les clés d’une stratégie de distribution réussie, en France et dans 25 pays à l’export. 

Les connaissances techniques de MLP lui permettent également de soutenir les points de vente dans leur développement en mettant à leur disposition les outils nécessaires à un bon relais d’information auprès des clients finaux.  En collaboration avec le réseau Alliance Distribution, MLP propose une offre complète allant jusqu’à la formation des diffuseurs et la promotion des ventes.

Name: Akron Beacon Journal
Description: The oldest continuously operated business in Summit County, the Akron Beacon Journal, founded in 1839, is the major news-gathering force in our community, and BeaconJournal.com is the leading online source for breaking news, sports and entertainment in Northeast Ohio.

Description: If you "look" at us you will only see one word - DIFFERENCE - we aspire to be great to be with the greatest. We are better because we do different and we will take you to Portugal and the World! Always in a bold and distinctive way as is our apanage!

Name: MultiMédia à la Une
Description:
Le Magazine Professionnel de la distribution multimédia.

Publication mensuelle éditée par BSC Publications, fondée en 1995, traitant des produits Multimédia Grand Public : jeu vidéo, vidéo (DVD / Blu-ray) et hardware, (EGP, IT) à destination des grandes enseignes nationales.

Retrouvez nos dossiers marché, enquêtes,  Interviews, news produits et  annuaires professionnels exclusifs

Le journal est partenaires de plusieurs salons professionnels : IDEF, Paris Games Week, Marché du Film (Cannes), etc.

Name: OniriQ Magazine
Description: Luxe, art et volupté

Name: The House Magazine
Description:
The House magazine is part of the fabric of Westminster, carrying Parliament’s emblem – the crowned Portcullis – and is delivered directly into the pigeon-holes of both Westminster Houses. 

Founded in 1976 by a cross-party group of MPs, The House has spent more than 40 years shining a light on events in Parliament, featuring a mix of exclusive interviews, policy debates, intel and expert analysis.

Received by every MP and Peer, with exclusive parliamentarian interviews, unique MP/Peer articles, regular columns, gossip, diaries and reviews, it is packed with stories that will interest all those inside and outside Westminster.

Totally impartial, The House is published weekly whilst parliament sits, presenting a mix of news, profiles, interviews and comprehensive policy analysis as well as extensive commentary which gets under the skin of Parliament. 

With an MP as editor, a cross-party parliamentary Editorial Board and written largely by MPs and Peers for their fellow Members, The House is closer than any other political magazine to the most powerful people in UK politics.

Name: iGamingFuturo
Description:
iGamingFuturo es una publicación centrada en el futuro de los juegos de azar. Nos enfocamos en resolver los desafíos en tecnología, legislación y cultura para permitir que los operadores tengan éxito en los mercados de iGaming de América Latina. 

Tenemos la obligación de impactar de manera positiva a todos los interesados en el ámbito del juego, ayudando a difundir mensajes positivos sobre el juego seguro, tecnologías innovadoras y empresas de clase mundial. 

Somos la nueva publicación hermana recién lanzada de iGamingFuture.com, que es popular y está creciendo rápidamente.

Name: cci Dialog GmbH
Description:
Als Informationsanbieter in der LüKK diskutiert, führt und begleitet die cci Dialog GmbH diese Themen: Konzepte und Innovationen zu effektiveren, effizienteren und damit ressourcensparenden Techniken in der Lüftungs- Klima- und Kältetechnik. Die cci Dialog GmbH behandelt diese relevanten Branchenthemen in unterschiedlichen Medien:

Der (elektronische) cci Branchenticker informiert werktäglich in Kürze über alle relevante Themen in der Lüftungs- Klima- Kältebranche. Dazu zählen unter anderem Normen und Richtlinien, neue Produkte und technische Systeme sowie personelle und wirtschaftliche Veränderungen in den Unternehmen der LüKK. 

cci Zeitung ist seit über 50 Jahren anders als andere Fachpublikationen: Das große Format, die kritische Auseinandersetzung mit Fachthemen, das „Menscheln“ in Berichten und Informationen, das Meinungsmachen machten sie von Anfang an einzigartig. Was auch immer in der Branche geschah, spiegelte sich in ihr wider. cci Zeitung informiert 14 Mal im Jahr über alle wichtigen Themen der Lüftung- Klima- Kältebranche.
cci Zeitung steht dabei nicht nur für aktuelle und unabhängige Informationen, sondern auch für Meinungen und Hintergründe und für das Aufgreifen „heißer Eisen“, die andere nicht anrühren.

cci Wissensportal ist in etwas über 20 Kategorien geordnet und bietet online das Fachwissen der Lüftung- Klima- Kältebranche. Stöbern Sie in den Kategorien oder nutzen Sie die Volltextsuche. 

cci Schulung ist seit 50 Jahren DIE unabhängige, neutrale Plattform in der Lüftung- Klima- Kältebranche für Weiterbildung durch unabhängige Fachreferenten mit höchster Fachkompetenz und den Erfahrungsaustausch über brandneue Themen. 

cci Buch ist die exklusive Fachauswahl für die Lüftungs- Klima- Kältetechnik. Welche Systeme sind in der Gebäudeautomation aktuell relevant? Welche Möglichkeiten zur Schalldämpfung gibt es in der Lüftungs- Klima- Kältetechnik, z.B. in RLT-Anlagen? Antwort auf diese und andere Fragen finden Sie mit unseren Büchern.

Name: ExitStack
Description: ExitStack is an online platform featuring stories, deal news, and analysis about Bangladeshi and diaspora startups.  It aims to share insights on companies and founders to everyone, including potential investors and partners, around the world.

Name: 50,2 Magazin für intelligente Stromnetze
Description:
50,2 Magazin für Stromversorgung ist das Leitmedium der Stromwirtschaft

Unabhängig und mit hohem fachjournalistischen Anspruch informiert das Magazin 50,2 seit 2014 über die Zukunftsthemen der Stromversorgung. Im Fokus stehen Lösungen und Projekte, mit denen Stadtwerke, Versorger, Energieerzeuger und Netzbetreiber die Herausforderungen der Energiewende meistern und sich mit neuen Geschäftsmodellen positionieren können.

Nah am Markt und mit klarem Blick auf die Anwender greift 50,2 Trendthemen in den Bereichen Smart Metering, Netztechnik und -prozesse, IT und Digitalisierung, Wartung und Service, Erzeugung und Speicher sowie Elektromobilität auf, vermittelt Hintergründe und liefert Entscheidungshilfen für die praktischen Herausforderungen in Vertrieb und Netz.

Der direkte Weg zur Branche

Dieser Ansatz und eine breite Vielfalt von Informationskanälen – von Printpublikationen über wöchentliche Branchennewsletter bis hin zum tagesaktuellen Onlineportal haben 50,2 zu einer erfolgreichen Informationsplattformen der Energiewirtschaft gemacht.

Name: Construction News
Description:
Construction News is a group of monthly newspapers covering the construction industry in the major metropolitan areas of Texas. News coverage for each of the publications focuses on local industry people, companies, trade associations and events in that specific market. Each month, our combined circulation of over 35,000 reaches the majority of construction-related companies and professionals in our coverage regions by targeted direct mail and rack locations.

Subscribe for free at www.constructionnews.net. 

Reach your local editors for story ideas and suggestions at: haley@constructionnews.net

Name: Digitalio
Description:
DIGITALIO se plasează în peisajul media ca o veritabilă Agora. 
Expunem, dezbatem și generăm informații și idei relevante pentru spațiul public digital. Ținta noastră este să creăm, alături de contributori și cititori cel mai important think-tank al digitalizării din România.
Misiunea DIGITALIO este să genereze cunoaștere prin informare și dezbatere, să promoveze ideile inovatoare și să creeze oportunități de business.

Name: San Diego Reader
Description:
Published weekly since October 1972, the San Diego Reader has been in San Diego over 40 years, The Reader is the largest alternative publication in the nation by page count. With over 3.12 million issues per year The Reader reaches 1 in 4 adults. Published every Wednesday featuring news, stories, events, music, movies, restaurants, travel, neighborhoods, and classifieds. The Reader guides San Diego with just the turn of a page.

Name: Monitor do Mercado
Description:
Somos uma plataforma de informação financeira que oferece notícias e análises de forma confiável, direta e sem ruídos. Fornecemos dados e insights essenciais para investidores e profissionais do mercado, auxiliando na tomada de decisões seguras e bem fundamentadas.

Nosso compromisso é construir um vínculo sólido com o público, oferecendo conteúdo relevante, direto e confiável. Para investidores, somos um guia seguro em um cenário complexo. Para empresas, somos um canal estratégico para se conectar com um público qualificado e engajado.

Mais do que um portal de notícias, somos um conselheiro confiável, sempre ao lado de quem constrói o futuro financeiro com segurança e inteligência.

Name: Aberdeen Journals
Description:
Aberdeen Journals is a newspaper publisher based in Aberdeen, Scotland. 

Aberdeen Journals publishes The Press and Journal and the Evening Express. It is owned by Dundee based DC Thomson Media. 

The Press & Journal, often called the P&J, is a daily regional newspaper serving the northern counties of Scotland including the cities of Aberdeen and Inverness. Established in 1747 as the Aberdeen Journal, it is Scotland's oldest daily newspaper.   

The Evening Express is a daily local newspaper serving the city of Aberdeen in Scotland. It was first published in November 1879.

Name: Gazzetta di Mantova
Description: La Gazzetta di Mantova è stata fondata nell’anno 1664 ed è il più antico quotidiano d’Italia. La Gazzetta di Mantova è un quotidiano edito da Gruppo Athesis

Name: La Prealpina
Description:
Primo quotidiano di informazione della provincia di Varese, La Prealpina, con una tiratura quotidiana di 38.000 copie, viene letta mediamente da 189.000 lettori/giorno e distribuita in Lombardia (provincia di Varese, Como e Milano), Piemonte (province di Novara e Verbania) e Svizzera (Canton Ticino).
Di seguito, qualche accenno storico.
Il giornale nasce il 2 dicembre 1888 per iniziativa del giovane giornalista varesino Giovanni Bagaini, con il titolo di “Cronaca Prealpina - Gazzetta dei Tre Laghi”. Tra il 1928 e il 1946 il nome della testata subisce una serie di variazioni (“Corriere Prealpino” - dal 26 Aprile 1945 al 31 Agosto 1946, “Il Nuovo Corriere Prealpino” - dal 1° al 30 Settembre 1946), per assumere la denominazione ufficiale, ancora oggi in uso, a partire dal 1° Ottobre 1946.
Originariamente quotidiano di riferimento in ambito locale, a partire dagli anni ’80 del ‘900, si potenzia anche sul fronte dell’informazione nazionale ed estera, ampliando le proprie rubriche ed imponendosi all’attenzione di un bacino di lettori più ampio. L’essere contemporaneamente fonte minuziosa di notizie locali e testimone dei grandi fatti di cronaca e politica nazionale e internazionale, hanno costituito e costituiscono tutt’ora uno dei principali fattori di successo del giornale.
Nel terzo millennio La Prealpina si rinnova nella sua versione “Digital”, lanciandosi nel mondo dei Social Network e presentandosi con un nuovo sito internet, ancora più dinamico e interattivo, con una nuova grafica e nuove sezioni di approfondimento. Obiettivo: fornire notizie in tempo reale ai propri lettori con foto e video, servizi di attualità e approfondimenti su cronaca, politica, economia, sport e cultura, con aggiornamenti in tempo reale.

Name: GEA - Green Economy Agency
Description:
GEA Agency, agenzia di stampa diretta da Vittorio Oreggia, nasce dalla volontà di fornire e condividere un’informazione attendibile, esaustiva e divulgativa su transizione ecologica, ambiente, green, Pnrr ed economia.

Editore
L’azienda editrice, Hub Editoriale, è leader mondiale nella data visualization, con oltre 50mila infografiche l’anno prodotte. Il Gruppo dal 2012 opera nel comparto dei media e dell’informazione e fornisce servizi a privati, aziende e istituzioni, rendendo accessibili nella quotidianità piattaforme, strumenti di comunicazione, di raccolta e racconto dei dati.

Il nostro obiettivo
Puntiamo a essere il punto di riferimento per tutti gli approfondimenti di respiro nazionale e internazionale in tema di sostenibilità, con particolare riguardo all’Unione europea, e divenire un collettore di esperienze e un attivatore di dialogo che coinvolga tutti gli attori che prendono – e prenderanno – parte alla trasformazione green del Paese, individuando possibili strategie economiche e politiche per l’innovazione e la resilienza.

Cosa ci rende unici
Qualità, affidabilità e innovazione sono le parole chiave di GEA. Siamo la prima agenzia di stampa sulla transizione ecologica e l’economia circolare con 500 lanci al giorno. I nostri articoli – arricchiti da infografiche – rendono di facile e immediata comprensione ciò che può risultare complicato. L’analisi di dati, i focus e le interviste esclusive assicurano un’informazione verticale davvero completa.

Dove siamo
Siamo presenti con 39 risorse nelle sedi di Torino, Milano, Roma, Bruxelles, Verona.

Name: Campo Galego
Description:
Campo Galego es el primer periódico digital agrario de ámbito gallego. Ofrecemos información de actualidad y técnica para los sectores ganaderos, agrícolas, forestal y agroalimentario desde el 11 de febrero de 2015.

Name: Regain Magazine
Description:
Regain est un magazine indépendant et trimestriel, qui sort le premier jour de chaque saison, et traite de la campagne, des métiers vivants, et du rapport à la terre et à la nature.
Regain produit l’intégralité de ses sujets, en toute indépendance, en s’appuyant sur une jeune génération de journalistes et de photographes engagés. 

Regain est une Agence Créative qui accompagne les marques  porteuses de projets authentiques et soucieuses de l’impact environnemental. Un accompagnement sur-mesure, en co-création.

Name: Al Masry Al Youm
Description: An independent Egyptian media organization established in 2003. The organization issues Al-Masry Al-Youm daily newspaper, Egypt's foremost Arabic-language independent daily. The first issue of the paper hit the market on June 7th, 2004. The organization also runs www.almasryalyoum.com

Name: El Café Latino
Description:
Aujourd’hui, El Café Latino est un magazine bimestriel bilingue (espagnol, français) ainsi qu’un site web de référence sur l’Amérique latine en Europe. 

L’Amérique latine, ce sont 25 pays et plus de 600 millions d’habitants. Baignés d’océans, entourés de cordillères, de volcans et de forêts, remplis de lieux de vie autochtones, coloniaux et modernes, imprégnés de sons caribéens, de rythmes andins et de jazz urbains : la diversité du continent latino-américain est sa force.

El Café Latino réveille le désir de connaissance à travers la diffusion de l’art, de la culture, de l’histoire, la géographie, des actualités et des débats qui sont en lien de près ou de loin avec l’Amérique latine.

Visitez notre site internet pour en savoir plus : www.elcafelatino.org

Name: Record
Description: Diário de informação generalista especializado em desporto

Name: The Red & Black Publishing Co.
Description:
The Red and Black Publishing Company, Inc. is an independent, private, not-for-profit corporation. Founded in 1893, the paper operated for 87 years under the University of Georgia. In 1980, the State Board of Regents approved independent status for the organization. As a 501c3 nonprofit, we have dual missions: to provide our community with reliable, independent news; and to train students in journalism.

The Red & Black circulates the largest college newspaper in Georgia. Each week we distribute 10,000 copies of the print edition both on and off campus, reaching nearly 45,000 students, faculty and staff. The print edition — and daily online content — cover University of Georgia and Athens news, sports, arts, music, culture and opinion pieces. The print and digital platforms carry classifieds and advertising for local and national products and services. We also publish a magazine, Ampersand, which covers food, fashion, music and entertainment.

The Red and Black is operationally and financially independent from the University of Georgia. The organization receives no student activity fees or other funding from UGA. Operations are sustained through the sale of advertising.
 
Our twofold mission is to provide a training ground for students interested in gaining experience in various aspects of media and to provide a high quality news source for the University of Georgia community.

Name: Kathimerini English Edition
Description:
Kathimerini English Edition is fully dedicated to its mission to provide consistent, detailed and broad coverage to its readers. Everyday on its print and digital editions, the newspaper publishes a meticulously curated mixture of breaking news, articles, analysis, and opinion pieces.
 
Kathimerini seeks to contribute to the global media ecosystem with diverse and multi-faceted reporting – a mission which is reflected in the multitude of sections it includes (Politics, News, World, Culture, Finance, Sports). By systematically separating news in these sections, and dedicating a lot of time and capital in each, Kathimerini seeks to ensure that its readers are informed holistically and can be active citizens in all facets of life.
 
For Kathimerini, it is of the utmost importance not only to carefully curate its sections, but also to distinguish the content it publishes based on what type of article it is. In this context, the newspaper always flags its content – by the use of titles in its print edition, and tags in the digital one – to clarify if it is a news piece, an expert analysis, or an opinion piece. The goal is to be fully transparent with our readers, and enable them to separate objective truths from subjective interpretation.

Written by a dedicated editorial team, Kathimerini English Edition provides readers with a comprehensive summary of the main political, business, social and cultural news in Greece.

Name: TheArtCouch
Description:
The most popular community of modern and contemporary art lovers in Flanders and The Netherlands ! Interesting daily insights and news about artists to follow, events to attend and trends to be aware of. TheArtCouch BE & NL currently reach over 15,000 readers per month.

theArtCouch.be
theArtCouch.nl
theArtcouch.com (coming soon)

Name: Dhakapost.com
Description: Dhakapost.com is a multimedia Bangla News Portal. It has begun with a commitment to fearless, investigative, informative, and independent journalism.

Name: Al-Akhbar Newspaper
Description: صدر العدد الاول من «الأخبار» في 14 آب 2006 بعد 33 يوماً من العدوان الاسرائيلي على لبنان. انطلاقة صعبة لكنها «مغامرة محسوبة» كما قال مؤسسها جوزف سماحة في افتتاحيته الأولى. مغامرة «الأخبار» في القرن الواحد والعشرين هي في تميّزها سياسياً ومهنياً. في السياسة، هي جريدة تميل إلى اليسار وتنتمي الى معسكر رافضي الهيمنة من قلب الولايات المتحدة الاميركية الى أقاصي الشرق وأفريقيا وأميركا الجنوبية وأوروبا. مهنياً، تعتمد «الأخبار» على مجموعة من صحافييها الشباب لانتاج جريدة يومية عصرية تكسر النهج التقليدي في العمل الصحافي. إضافة الى إعطائها الاولوية للتحقيقات الخاصة التي تمسّ الحياة اليومية وقضايا المجتمع دون أن تكون محصورة بالضرورة في الاطار السياسي للحدث، تعتمد «الأخبار» على شبكة مراسلين في معظم العواصم العالمية يساهمون في نقل صورة واقعية وحيوية للاحداث من بلدانهم. تتميّز «الأخبار» بتصميمها وشكلها الذي يواكب المعايير الحديثة في صناعة الصحافة المكتوبة وتولي اهتماماً خاصاً بالصورة والرسوم الكاريكاتورية. توزّع أعداد «الأخبار» على كافة الأراضي اللبنانية وفي سوريا. تصدر «الأخبار» عن شركة «أخبار بيروت» وفق رخصة لجريدة «الأخبار» التي تأسست عام 1953.

Name: Wilfried Magazine
Description:
Wilfried est un magazine qui a pour ambition de raconter la politique belge à la manière d’un roman. Indépendant de tous les pouvoirs, il paraît tous les quatre mois.

Wilfried ne ressemble à aucun autre titre de la presse belge. Il se tient à distance des micro-incidents de l’actualité politique pour mieux explorer les grands courants qui traversent notre siècle.

Name: The Commercial Appeal
Description: Founded in 1841, The Commercial Appeal serves Memphis and 71 counties in Tennessee, Arkansas and Mississippi. The largest circulation newspaper and largest digital media outlet in the Mid-South, The Commercial Appeal covers news, sports, business, entertainment, and specialized coverage of University of Memphis sports and the NBA's Memphis Grizzlies.

Name: Pulso Turístico
Description:
Pulso Turístico es un diario digital que refleja minuto a minuto las noticias de la industria del turismo argentino desde una mirada federal.

Queremos ser un punto de encuentro, servicio y referencia para los protagonistas de la industria del turismo en Argentina.

Name: PLATOW
Description: Seit über 75 Jahren steht DER PLATOW Brief für exklusive Hintergrundberichte aus den Top-Etagen der Banken- und Finanzwelt.Darüberhinaus steht Ihnen die PLATOW Börse bei Anlageentscheidungen zur Seite. Drei Mal pro Woche liefern wir Ihnen Marktanalysen und konkrete Aktienideen aus Deutschland, Europa und der Welt. Leser profitieren dabei von dem engen Austausch mit der deutschen Wirtschaft.

Name: IL VALORE ITALIANO
Description:
IL VALORE ITALIANO è un quotidiano online che riprende il nome da una storica pubblicazione illustrata fondata nel 1895.

L’idea nasce dalla forte volontà di un gruppo imprenditoriale di creare un nuovo organo di informazione, capace di proporre un giornalismo approfondito, attento e interessato a valorizzare il tanto di buono e di positivo che c’è , che succede ogni giorno in Italia e non trova adeguato spazio sui media.

A monte del progetto c’è una domanda essenziale che ci siamo posti e nello stesso tempo rivolgiamo ai lettori: quali sono i valori fondamentali che caratterizzano la società attuale?

Name: Climbing Business Journal
Description:
Climbing Business Journal is the leading source for news, research and analysis of the indoor climbing industry.  

www.climbingbusinessjournal.com

Name: Journalng
Description: JournalNG is known for the tradition of breaking news and has over the years, built a reputation for being one of Nigeria's most informative online news medium. It does publishing of general interest contents, organized in areas such as Daily News, Politics, Sports, Business, Entertainment and others for ease of navigation. It also does publishing of a hard copy glossy magazine every 2 weeks.

Name: New Straits Times
Description:
Established in 1845, The New Straits Times Press (Malaysia) Berhad (affectionately known as NSTP) is Malaysia's oldest and largest newspaper publisher. We are a public listed company and our head office is located in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia.

The New Straits Times Press (Malaysia) Berhad (Co. No. 196101000449 / 4485 H)

Name: TexSPACE Today
Description:
TexSPACE Today is a venture of Textile Today – a leading textile & apparel media, communication & networking platform, which is now functioning as an Innovation Hub. 
Textile Today has been continuously presenting, updating, helping & guiding
the industry through various knowledge support, trade & market analysis, trend & business forecasts, etc for more than one & half decades. 

The industry is now moving to more sustainable, precise, automated, circular, and energy-efficient solutions. It senses an urgency of concentration to this specific direction; henceforth, TexSPACE Today takes in place.

TexSPACE Today, a monthly e-magazine & web/online platform would serve as a catalyst to transform the textile and apparel industry for good. 
The SPACE stands for Stainability, Precision, Automation, Circularity, and Energy. 
TexSPACE would stand by cutting-edge solutions, inspiring stories, shed light on best practices, and cultivate practical approaches to broadly embrace
sustainability & circularity in the textile industry. 

By upholding success stories, research findings, and expert perspectives, we
empower businesses and individuals to make informed decisions and adopt sustainable practices throughout the value chain.

Apparel buyers, brands, and suppliers are increasingly concerned about sustainability, precision, automation, circularity, and energy due to several key reasons such as Cost Efficiency, Environmental Impact, Competitive Advantage, Consumer Demand, Regulatory Compliance, Ethical Responsibility, etc.

As the industry is moving toward SPACE in the field of textiles, most of the investment will come into the areas. The major objectives of TexSPACE Today will produce news, analysis, markets, technologies, and solutions to disseminate relevant knowledge, information & updates to aware & guide the industry.

Name: PABNA
Description: Print & Broadcast News Agency (PABNA) is India's premier news agency, with a reach that covers every corner of India. By promoting Citizen Journalism

Name: MADRIDIARIO
Description:
Con José Brías como CEO; Juan Pajares, director, y Eva Rodríguez al frente de Gerencia y Publicidad, madridiario.es, es el primer y más completo periódico de información local y autonómica, cuya difusión gratuita se realiza exclusivamente online.

Con más de 25 años de vida, madridiario.es comenzó a publicarse el 18 de septiembre de 2000 y cuenta en la actualidad con un equipo de 30 personas entre redactores, fotógrafos, diseñadores gráficos, técnicos informáticos y personal de Administración, así como con una veintena de colaboradores expertos en la realidad madrileña.

Este completo grupo de profesionales -formados por algunos redactores más jóvenes y otros más veteranos, lo que ofrece un equilibrio perfecto de talento-, elabora una edición actualizada constantemente durante todos los días de la semana, con la incorporación permanente de las noticias de mayor actualidad para nuestros lectores. 
	
Asimismo, el periódico recoge a diario varias galerías de fotografías realizadas por los fotógrafos en plantilla y los vídeos propios o ajenos que complementan las noticias más importantes.

El diario cuenta con secciones de Madrid, Sociedad, Sucesos y Deportes elaboradas por la propia Redacción, apoyada por los servicios de EFE y Europa Press, y principalmente al ámbito de la Comunidad de Madrid. Además, tiene contenidos informativos específicos dedicados a Medio Ambiente, Distritos, Municipios, Ciencia y Tecnología, Empresas y Ferias, Canal Social, y Transportes.

Todas las noticias se recogen en la portada del periódico y se completan con unos 350 reportajes al año que permanecen en portada durante una semana y posteriormente quedan archivados en el Canal Reportajes.

madridiario.es dispone un completo boletín de noticias que se distribuye todos los días por correo electrónico, y alertas continuas por WhatsApp y Telegram para que nuestros lectores estén permanente informados sobre la actualidad más reciente.

Name: CQ and Roll Call
Description:
Our Mission

Since 1955, Roll Call’s mission has been to deliver superior coverage of the people, politics, and process on Capitol Hill. With accurate, unbiased reporting, Roll Call has earned a level of credibility unparalleled in Washington and beyond.

Our Story

Roll Call was founded in 1955 by Sid Yudain, a former Capitol Hill press secretary. Initially, Roll Call was published once a week and quickly became an integral part of the Capitol Hill community. Over time the need for Roll Call’s unique and special brand of congressional reporting grew. Today,Roll Call delivers timely coverage of Washington news whenever it happens through RollCall.com and the Roll Call mobile app, in addition to the newspaper, which is published Monday through Thursday while Congress is in session (once a week during a recess).

In 1992, the Economist Group acquired Roll Call — an obvious match given both companies’ commitment to journalistic quality and integrity.

In 2009, Roll Call merged with Congressional Quarterly to form CQ Roll Call and establish the largest newsroom devoted to coverage of Congress. Today, Roll Call Group provides its readers with the tools, data and access to understand and influence Congress.

Name: Les Annales des Mines
Description:
Publiées sans interruption depuis 1794, les Annales des Mines comptent parmi les plus anciennes revues économiques au monde et sont en open access depuis 2018.

Les Annales des mines publient actuellement 4 séries trimestrielles consacrées aux thématiques suivantes :
    l'économie et l'industrie, pour RÉALITÉS INDUSTRIELLES
    les risques, le développement durable, l'énergie et les matières premières, pour RESPONSABILITÉ & ENVIRONNEMENT
    la gestion et le management, pour la revue académique GÉRER & COMPRENDRE (et son numéro anglophone annuel GÉRER & COMPRENDRE – ENGLISH ONLINE SELECTION")
    le numérique et les nouvelles technologies pour ENJEUX NUMÉRIQUES / DIGITAL ISSUES.

L’axe principal de la politique éditoriale est de s'appuyer sur des faits et de recueillir des points de vue venant d'horizons très divers, largement extérieurs au Conseil ou au corps des mines. Initialement consacrées aux questions minières, les thématiques des revues se sont très rapidement élargies à d'autres enjeux économiques importants.

La revue existe sous format papier, et tous ses articles sont librement téléchargeables sur le site https://annales-des-mines.org/ 

En outre, les Annales des Mines publient une lettre bimestrielle, la Gazette de la société et des techniques, qui se donne pour ambition de vulgariser des travaux pouvant utilement éclairer l’opinion.

Les Annales des mines organisent des événements ponctuels, tables rondes et colloques. Pour en être informé(e), abonnez-vous à la Lettre des Annales (mensuelle) sur le site ou suivez les comptes officiels Mastodon https://mastodon.social/@AnnalesdesMines et Instagram https://www.instagram.com/annalesdesmines/

Le groupe Santé, c'est aussi une newsletter mensuelle, des webinaires thématiques sur des problématiques de santé et une émission de télévision hebdomadaire, Votre Santé, diffusée en direct chaque jeudi sur BFM Lyon puis multidiffusée sur la chaîne locale. 

Pour compléter cette approche multimédias, le groupe Ma Santé a lancé à l'été 2021 la chaîne ma-santé.tv, premiere plateforme VOD dédiée à l'information santé.

Name: The Statesman
Description:
The Statesman is one of India's oldest English newspapers. It was founded in Kolkata in 1875 and is directly descended from The Friend of India (founded 1818). The Englishman (founded 1821) was merged with The Statesman in 1934. The Delhi edition of The Statesman began publication in 1931. The Statesman Weekly is a compendium of news and views from the Kolkata and Delhi editions. Printed on airmail paper, it is popular with readers outside India. The Statesman (average weekday circulation approximately 180,000) is a leading English newspaper in West Bengal. The Sunday Statesman has a circulation of 230,000.

The Statesman has distinguished itself through objective coverage of events, its value as an honest purveyor of news emphasised at times of crisis such as the Bengal Famine of 1943 and the infamous internal Emergency of the mid-1970s. It is forthright in the expression of its views. Its pursuit of the truth has been relentless and often at considerable cost to itself, as when the government of Indira Gandhi, in gross abuse of power, attempted to suppress its voice and when the government of Rajiv Gandhi interfered with the grant of statutory clearances to its modernisation plans unless the paper changed its editorial stance.

The Statesman prevailed, as the truth must prevail, and remains a favourite of readers in Kolkata and other parts of India.

The Statesman passed another milestone on 18 June 1998. Readers in North Bengal, Lower Assam, Sikkim and some hills in the North-east are now serviced by an edition printed in Siliguri where The Statesman has its premises, staff and press. It is an affirmation of The Statesman's commitment to Bengal, where it has had its home for over 100 years.

The Statesman is a founding member of Asia News Network, a grouping of 15 Asian newspapers that have joined hands to for coverage of Asian events through Asian eyes.

Name: The Tampa Tribune
Description:
COMPANY UPDATE, MAY 2016: 

The Tampa Bay Times, Florida's largest newspaper, purchased the Tampa Tribune from Revolution Capital Group.

Tribune subscribers will receive the Tampa Bay Times at their homes. The Times also will be available in retail locations where readers purchased the Tribune. The Times said it will carry all the advertising scheduled for both papers and honor all Tribune subscriptions and advertising contracts.

The Times has news and advertising operations in downtown Tampa and Riverview and has produced a distinct Tampa edition of the newspaper since expanding into Tampa in 1987. Because the papers have duplicate operations in most areas, Tash said there would be job losses at the Tribune. He did not specify a number but said it was likely to be at least 100. The current full-time staff is about 265. Tribune staffers who are not retained by the Times will continue to be paid for 60 days.

The purchase marks the end of the 121-year-old Tampa Tribune as a daily newspaper. It was started in 1893 when Wallace Stovall moved his existing news operations to Tampa from Bartow, according to Tribune files. Stovall's first Tampa Morning Tribune debuted on March 27, 1893, and became a daily in 1895. The Tribune was sold by longtime owner Media General to California-based Revolution Capital in 2012 for $9.5 million. The investment capital group last July sold the Tribune's headquarters on Parker Street in downtown Tampa for $17.75 million to South Florida developers who plan an apartment complex on the site.

Bugüne kadar ülkemize yapmış olduğumuz katkıyı bundan sonra da okurlarımızın desteği ile sürdürmeye devam edeceğiz.

Her gün Yeni Şafak’la yeni bir umut olacak.

Diario La Hora es un medio de comunicación ecuatoriano, fundado en 1982, que cuenta con presencia nacional focalizada en 11 provincias. Somos una empresa periodística con diarios regionales de carácter local. 

En 2020 adoptamos una agresiva estrategia de conversión digital, con productos y plataformas que llevan el mismo contenido periodístico de siempre, producido y editado con los más altos estándares que exige la profesión periodística, a donde lo requiera el lector.

Name: Vancouver Business Journal

Name: CHEFINFO – Das Magazin der Führungskräfte
Description:
CHEFINFO widmet sich aktuellen Entwicklungen, bemerkenswerten Unternehmen und innovativen Ideen aus dem starken Wirtschaftsraum Oberösterreich. Herausgeber ist die zum WEEKEND VERLAG zählende Zielgruppen-Zeitungsverlags GmbH, die sich im Premium-Magazinbereich einen Namen gemacht hat. Seit mehr als 32 Jahren bietet das Magazin CHEFINFO Entscheidungsträgern, Führungskräften, Managern und Unternehmern top-recherchierte Beiträge und spannende Interviews und Analysen aus den Bereichen Wirtschaft, Finanzen, Karriere, Management, Technik und Lifestyle. Darüber hinaus bietet das Premium-Wirtschaftsmagazin seinen Lesern Monat für Monat zusätzliche Schwerpunkte und Sonderausgaben:  

Das Premium-Magazin AUSTRIAN FAMILY BUSINESS überzeugt mit hochwertigen und spannenden Porträts und Berichten über innovative Unternehmen, Familiendynastien und Qualitätsmanufakturen aus ganz Österreich. 

EXPORT, Oberösterreichs Magazin für Exportwirtschaft, widmet sich aktuellen Entwicklungen, bemerkenswerten Unternehmen und innovativen Ideen aus dem Exportbundesland Nummer eins.

Das Fachmagazin FINANZEN berichtet zwei Mal pro Jahr über aktuelle Trends und Entwicklungen im Finanz- und Aktienmarkt.

LIVING,  das Sonderheft über die schönen Seiten des Lebens mit Berichten über Lifestyle, Interior Design, Gartengestaltung und Wohnbau, erscheint zwei Mal jährlich. 

SPRINT,  das oberösterreichische Mobilitätsmagazin, stellt die spannendsten Trends und Entwicklungen in der Logistik-, Daten- und Mobilitätsbranche vor. 

STARTUP, Oberösterreichs erstes Innovations- und Standortmagazin, fördert Innovation und Gründerkultur, liefert Inspiration und atmet Pioniergeist. Es stellt erfolgreiche Entrepreneure vor und berichtet über Startup-Hotspots, Geschäftsstrategien und Entwicklungen aus der Kreativszene.

Die erfolgreichen regionalen Sondermagazine WELS SPEZIAL, INNVIERTEL SPEZIAL und GRIESKIRCHEN SPEZIAL werfen einen tiefgehenden Blick auf Oberösterreichs Regionen.

Name: Diário da Região
Description:
O Portal Diário da Região (www.diariodaregiao.com.br), criado em 1999 pelo Grupo Diário da Região (GDR) com o nome de Diarioweb, passou pela sua primeira reformulação em julho de 2001. Com um layout inovador e visual moderno, a nova versão foi lançada no dia 23 de julho do mesmo ano.
 
O trabalho realizado consolidou a posição do site do Diário como um dos melhores portais de conteúdo da região Noroeste Paulista. Entre 2001 - ano em que a página foi totalmente reformulada - e outubro de 2004, o número de visitantes únicos cresceu 1.274%.
 
Em dezembro de 2004 o Diarioweb registrou mais de 4 milhões e 600 mil páginas visualizadas ao mês, segundo relatório auditado pela I/PRO Nielsen. Por dois anos consecutivos, em 2003 e em 2004, o portal entrou no ranking "Top 10" do Terra Lycos como um dos 10 parceiros do provedor mais acessados no Brasil em números de  páginas vistas.
 
O Portal Diário da Região tem hoje um público específico de alto poder aquisitivo. Os usuários do portal, a maioria concentrada na região Noroeste Paulista, são formadores de opinião, economicamente ativos e estão na faixa etária que vai de 20 a 55 anos. O público, 56,6% do sexo masculino e 43,4% do sexo feminino, tem poder de decisão e o pico dos acessos se dá de segunda a sexta-feira em  pleno horário comercial.

Segundo relatório do Google Analytics, no mês de janeiro de 2014, o Portal Diário da Região teve mais de 5,08 milhões de páginas visualizadas. No período, o site recebeu cerca de 1,67 milhões de visitas e deste total, o público cativo (visitantes únicos) é de 730 mil, com tempo de permanência de 5min40s. 

Em março de 2015, o Diarioweb passou por uma nova reformulação, adequando-se com a transformação da Redação do Grupo Diário da Região para uma Redação convergente, adequando-se à nova etapa de produção digital, deixando o nome Diarioweb e assumindo o nome de Portal Diário da Região, consolidando assim o nome da marca do Grupo Diário da Região.
Location: São José do Rio Preto, São Paulo

Name: Sedimentologika
Description: Sedimentologika is a community-driven Diamond Open Access (DOA)  peer-reviewed scientific journal about sedimentology with no APC/free to publish and free to access for all. The journal aims to create a place where people can publish their research and access scientific studies on all types of sedimentary processes, methods, deposits, and environments, across all spatial and temporal scales, on Earth or any other planetary body, for free. The published material will be free to share (i.e., no embargo period) since the authors retain the copyright. Sedimentologika is driven by the community for the community and is part of a broader DOA movement in geosciences. Sedimentologika aspires to emancipate from the financial barriers associated with private publishing houses to provide direct and equal access to science to all citizens, scientists, and institutions all over the globe. This journal will be defined by Open Science principles to promote ethical dissemination of science and knowledge, following high equality, diversity, and inclusion standards.

Name: Watermark Out News
Description:
Watermark is a multi-faceted media company using opportunities and innovations to communicate and advance LGBTQ+ interests, with a corporate emphasis on professionalism while building strong relationships with our readers, customers and community.

Watermark Media was founded by Tom Dyer in Orlando in 1994, and expanded to Tampa Bay in 1995. Dyer is an attorney, former board member of the Metropolitan Business Association and Tampa International Gay & Lesbian Film Festival, and current advisory board member of the Harvey Milk Foundation.

In 1997 Watermark produced Beach Ball at Disney’s Typhoon Lagoon, the first large-scale nighttime party associated with Gay Days Weekend. Watermark publishes a glossy guide to that weekend's events, as well as a Wedding Guide, Arts Guides and Pride Guides.

Watermark was a newsmaker in 1998 when it sought to hang rainbow flags throughout downtown Orlando during Gay Pride Month. The city reluctantly acquiesced, but the controversy made national news when televangelist Pat Robertson predicted Orlando would be beset by hurricanes as punishment.

Watermark prints up to 18,000 copies every other Thursday, and distributes them in more than 700 locations throughout Orlando, Tampa Bay, Sarasota and throughout the state. 
The newspaper donates more than $300,000 annually in free and sponsor advertising to worthy local and national LGBT non-profits.

Watermarkonline.com was launched in 1999. The award-winning newspaper currently maintains offices in Tampa Bay and Orlando and employs a full-time staff of 12, along with several part-time and freelance contributors.

Watermark Publishing Group, founded by publisher Rick Claggett, purchased Watermark in January of 2016.  Rick Claggett is a long-time employee of Watermark Media and former board member of both the Metropolitan Business Association, Come Out With Pride and One Orlando Alliance.

Description:
