Name: Willamette Week
Description:
Willamette Week is Portland, Oregon's award-winning alternative media outlet. We appear in print (every Wednesday) and online (wweek.com) with over 2.5 million unique readers monthly. Annually we produce four magazines and numerous events. We also operate Give!Guide, a charitable effort that has raised more than $48 million for local nonprofits since 2004. Willamette Week is the only weekly newspaper ever to win the Pulitzer Prize for Investigative Reporting (2005). 

We believe nothing can empower the people of Portland more effectively than real news, properly considered and illustrated, concerning local life.  We remain fiercely independent, and we strive to maintain an edge.  We mean not only to be ahead of the competition in terms of news and ideas, but to be daring in our reporting, writing, and presentation.  As a result, year in and year out, Willamette Week wins more journalism awards in Oregon than any other non-daily newspaper.

Name: Engineering Post
Description:
Engineering Post is a prime newspaper of Engineering covering all sectors including contractors, consultants, architects, builders, textile, sugar, cement, pharmaceutical and fertilizer industry with many more. We are the only publication with such a largest circulation all across Pakistan from north to south. We humbly claim that all sectors in engineering are covered through our circulation.

Engineering Post is probably the first journal in the history of Pakistan which carried 32 annual advertising campaigns in its very first issue. This was the level of trust from all sectors of engineering on the management of Engineering Post, especially on its Founder and Managing Editor, Mr. Khawaja Zeeshan Haider, who had been in the publication industry from more than 20 years. He is a business graduate from IBA, Punjab University and a hardworking, dynamic and enthusiastic business icon. Because of his management skills and novel ideas, Engineering Post in a short span has become the market leader in engineering publications with biggest ever advertising support from the engineering industry.

Engineering Post is the only engineering publication from Lahore/Punjab which is covering more than 100 cities across Pakistan in all four provinces. Quality and authenticity of editorial contents is what makes it unique from all others in the field. Engineering Post has introduced new culture in the profession and we always feel proud when the others try to follow our footsteps.

The Team matters the most. The Team Engineering Post comprises of the best human resource of the profession, a key element that took us to the no. 1 position in the industry.

We believe in the kind of customer services where the customer/advertiser is promoted in so many different and unique ways that they should feel proud to be doing business with us. Therefore, we are the proud ambassadors of biggest no of engineering brands in Pakistan.

Name: Grants for Journalists
Description:
Grants for Journalists is your hub for journalism funding. Our site pairs independent journalists, staff reporters and newsrooms with funding opportunities. Journalist Monica Williams is building the website as part of her 2025-'26 Reynolds Journalism Institute fellowship at the Missouri School of Journalism. GFJ builds on her experiences as a longtime journalist who worked on the business and editorial sides of for-profit and nonprofit media across the United States.

The site launches March 2026! Meantime, follow along on LinkedIn for updates on how Monica is building this new venture and for daily grants for journalists. Email: monica@grantsforjournalists.com

Name: Edmonton Journal
Description:
We are Edmonton's most trusted voice, providing a professional perspective on news, business, sports and entertainment that's read by more northern Albertans than any other daily newspaper. 

Since our inception on November 11, 1903, the Journal has striven to deliver content that’s relevant, informative, and engaging to our core readership. Our dedication to provide news and information to the community remained steadfast throughout the last century, and will endure into the new century and beyond. Although our commitment to our core mission is unchanging, what is changing is how we are providing this news and information to our readers. We strive to deliver our mission of relevant and reliable news to our readers whenever and however they want. This includes traditional print medium along with the many new and dynamic media our readers demand. Our community is growing and evolving, and we are growing and evolving along with it while fulfilling the original mission created over 100 years ago.

Our commitment to the community is evidenced not only in our local news and information coverage, but also in our long-standing involvement with many local charitable organizations such as the United Way Alberta Capital Region, the Edmonton Food Bank, and many others.

Visit edmontonjournal.com for further information, or peruse our numerous options for providing content!

Name: CitizenK
Description:
Citizen K is a multicultural magazine that discusses the art of fashionable living and culture with an open and pertinent view of the world of luxury. On every page, Citizen K offers the thrill of discovery, of being invaded by the power of the images and the atmosphere created.

“Citizen K is the embodiment of a state of mind in a magazine.” — Kappauf (Founder and CEO of Citizen K)

- BEYOND FASHION -

One of Citizen K’s principal missions is sharing, with a growing number of curious and passionate readers, a new vision of luxury that goes beyond fashion, savoir faire and the art of better living.
• Informing, deciphering, tempting.
• Addressing fashion from a more cultural and lifestyle perspective.
• Make luxury products an object of desire: a temptation.
• Tell a story about brands and their world.
• Let the reader discover a world of passion, fantasy and dreams.


- IDENTITY CODES -

Citizen K provides a culture couture with a perfect aesthetic style, linking luxury and trends, creativity and culture, with an assertive spirit of luxury that encompass all areas of art de vivre (the art of living). There is a balance between the classic and the contemporary, presented in a bold, imaginative and original way.

*Innovative
Processing information and images in an original way

*Luxurious
Page designs and content of quality

*Jubilatory
A positive state of mind, turned toward pleasure

*Unifying
An invitation to the world of luxury

*Forerunner
Visionary editorials, deciphering trends with precision

*Audacious
A humorous and poetic tone


- THE SUBSTANCE AND THE FORM -

The magazine creates an enticing rhythm between consumption highlights (fashion, jewellery, beauty) and fundamental topics (cultural, architecture, events, design, gastronomy and lifestyle).
Fantasy and originality, glamour and poetry; dreams, emotions and temptations. The selection of topics as well as the style of the articles aim to surprise and seduce.

Description:
Le secteur agroalimentaire est l’une des branches les plus porteuses pour les années à venir pour le Maroc. En effet, il génère une valeur ajoutée de plus de 22 milliards de Dirhams, soit le tiers du PIB industriel.
Mis en place avec une équipe de journalistes professionnels, « FOOD Magazine », édité par Silvestri Media, se propose d’accompagner ce développement en étant une plate-forme de communication, d’échange et de partage d’idées entre les différents acteurs qui s’intéressent de près ou de loin à cette filière : agro-industriels, agro-fournisseurs, institutionnels, organisations professionnelles, opérateurs de la restauration et de la grande distribution.
Bref, FOOD Magazine se veut un lien entre tous les professionnels de l’alimentaire, de l’élaboration jusqu’à la table. Et parfaitement conscient de cette nécessité de lien, favorisée par la diffusion de FOOD Magazine, Silvestri Media organisera régulièrement évènements et conférences, destinés à encourager les échanges interprofessionnels.

Enfin, FOOD Magazine est la seule revue professionnelle du secteur à être certifiée OJD Maroc pour sa diffusion, et ce, pour la deuxième année consécutive.

Name: Ageimagem Comunicação Corporativa
Description:
A Ageimagem é uma agência de comunicação focada na customização de serviços e entrega de resultados para seus clientes. 

Se caracteriza principalmente pelo atendimento personalizado ao cliente, uma missão da agência, dirigida pela jornalista Patricia Limeira.

Sede em São Paulo e escritório no Rio de Janeiro.

Description: Wir sind das multimediale Medienhaus für den Großraum Nürnberg. Glaubwürdiger Journalismus ist unser Auftrag, wertvolle Services sind unser Ansporn. Wir stehen an der Seite der Menschen in unserer Region und verstehen uns als ihr Partner. Mit Freude bereichern wir ihr Leben mit unseren Angeboten und Leistungen.

Name: Brighton Journalist Works
Description:
Now closed, Brighton Journalist Works was an NCTJ accredited School of Journalism based in Brighton, designed to give you the skills, portfolio and work experience to build your career. 

Newswriting, sub-editing, media law, local and central government, online, video and freelance journalism classes provide you with the skills editors are looking for.

Students learn how to find exclusive news stories for media outlets in Brighton and Hove and wider Sussex.

Name: Réussir le Périgord
Description: Plus de 25 000 lecteurs par semaine. Leader des hebdos en Dordogne. Réussir le Périgord séduit ses lecteurs par un traitement différent de l'information et par sa proximité. C'est un journal proche de ses lecteurs et de leurs attentes.

Name: National Herald
Description: Founded by Pandit Jawaharlal Nehru, National Herald is dedicated to building a modern, democratic, just, equitable, liberal and socially harmonious India

Name: CHEFS D'OC Magazine
Description:
Chefs d'Oc est le magazine gratuit de l'Association Chefs d'Oc #Montpellier.
Il parait 4 fois par an, un par saison, et traite de gastronomie mais pas que...

Name: Focus Malaysia
Description:
Focus Malaysia is an online business news portal which is uploaded throughout the working day. It carries news, analyses and commentary on corporate matters, economics and finance, property, personal wealth, small and medium enterprises, current affairs and relevant international subjects amongst others. It also produces a monthly business newspaper and magazine which carries exclusive, longer, more in-depth content on the same topics.

It is independently owned and focuses on producing quality content which includes breaking stories, making sense of them and writing unbiased, brave and unvarnished commentary on important issues in business, government, public policy and politics. Where possible it also offers solutions and remedies.

It is offered free to everyone as part of efforts to disseminate information which will bring about public discussion of important issues and contribute to the continuous process of change and progress to a developing country like Malaysia.

Check our latest updates at http://www.focusmalaysia.my

Name: The Korea Daily
Description:
The Korea Daily is the largest Korean newspaper publication in America.

First established as a bureau in Los Angeles in 1974, The Korea Daily's U.S. regional branches now include New York, San Fransisco, Washington D.C., Chicago, and Atlanta, printing papers in nine North American regions. We have the most influential network of reporters in the U.S. among Korean news providers.

We have been the beacon to the Korean immigrants and have been helping the community advance in the Korean and American market, while giving American corporations a vital gateway into the Korean American market.

Name: Süddeutsche Zeitung Dossier
Description:
Süddeutsche Zeitung Dossier ist der Kompass im Meer der Transformation von Wirtschaft, Gesellschaft und Politik. Wir sind ein Informationsdienst, der nach und nach tagesaktuelle Fachdossiers zu Zukunftsfragen auf den Markt bringt. Mit unseren Newslettern gehen wir den drängenden Fragen unserer Zeit detailliert, kenntnisreich und mit Verständnis für ihre politische Dimension nach.

Entscheiderinnen und Entscheider profitieren mehr denn je von einem täglichen Wissensvorsprung – relevant, prägnant und auf den Punkt.

Die Fachbriefings unserer Berliner Redaktion strukturieren die tägliche Informationsflut, ordnen sie ein und geben einen klaren und umfassenden Überblick über aktuelle Entwicklungen, Trends und Herausforderungen des jeweiligen Politikgebiets. SZ Dossier bietet Entscheidungsträgern fundierte, tiefgreifende und aufschlussreiche Analysen, geliefert von Montag bis Freitag direkt in Ihr E-Mail-Postfach.

Impressum: https://www.sueddeutsche.de/projekte/artikel/verlag/sz-dossier-impressum-e667558/

Datenschutz: https://www.swmh-datenschutz.de/sz_dossier

Name: Nedeljnik
Description: Nedeljnik is a popular news magazine in Serbia. According to Serbia's Commission for Protection of Competition, Nedeljnik accounts for 30 to 40 percent of the circulation of all political and business magazines in the country. Nedeljnik is the publisher of the first monthly publication of The New York Times International Report, as well as Le Monde diplomatique, and numerous other publications and books. Primary audience are urban and educated people, as well as decision makers and business people in Balkan region.

Name: Tehelka
Description:
Tehelka is known for its hard-hitting investigative and public interest journalism, its in-depth analyses and its literary refinements. Tehelka brings hallmark edginess to its stories across politics, environment, literature and lifestyle. In recent times, more than any other publication, Tehelka has come to embody truth, courage and conscience in the Indian public space. 

Tehelka is a magazine that believes journalism has a critical duty in a free society, Tehelka has broken stories that impact our daily lives – buying out of Zaheera Sheikh, the Jessica Lall murder, Nithari killings, the international pedophilia racket in Goa, subversion of justice for the 1984 Sikh riot victims, the 2002 Gujarat carnage and now was the first Indian media to enter the LeT headquarters in Muridke, Pakistan.

The fastest growing English weekly news-magazine in India, it has very quickly established an enviable reputation — national and international — for the quality of its reportage, the eminence of its writers and the refinement of its analyses and ideas. Alongside, it has created a strong space for the voices of the underprivileged; and consistently married lively opinion with good writing and a social conscience.

Name: ICONIC MEDIA GROUP
Description: Iconic Media Group is Ireland's largest independently owned regional newspaper and media group, with an unrivalled audience in print, online and mobile.

Name: Executive Magazine
Description:
The only business publication for the Highlands, Islands and Moray. Published monthly. Established in 1982. 

Contact: Darrel Paterson - darrel.paterson@hnmedia.co.uk 01463 732 216

Name: NDA magazine d'architecture et de Design
Description: Revue d’architecture et de design indépendante trimestrielle qui dévoile les projets, les acteurs qui font la ville de demain. Des reportages thématiques, des lieux a découvrir, des acteurs à connaître !

Name: Deník N
Description: Nezávislý Deník N s placeným obsahem pro předplatitele vychází na webu i v tisku a nabízí zpravodajství, reportáže, rozhovory a komentáře.

Name: La Sicilia
Description:
LA SICILIA (newspaper) is one of Italy’s most respected regional daily newspapers, with a proud history dating back to 1945. Published in Catania, it serves as a vital voice for Sicily, offering comprehensive coverage of local, national, and international news. Known for its rigorous journalism and editorial independence, La Sicilia plays a key role in shaping public discourse across the island.

With deep roots in the Sicilian community, La Sicilia provides in-depth reporting on politics, economics, culture, and social issues, while also supporting regional identity and civic engagement. Its blend of investigative reporting, insightful commentary, and local relevance has earned it a loyal readership and enduring influence in Southern Italy’s media landscape.
In an era of digital transformation, La Sicilia continues to evolve, expanding its reach through online platforms while upholding the journalistic integrity that has defined it for generations.

Name: Mint Magazine
Description:
Mint, c’est un magazine d’exploration et d’évasion dédié à une cible mobile et curieuse. Plutôt qu’un magazine de plus dans un porte-revue, c’est avant tout un bel objet que l’on a envie de collectionner, de laisser sur une table basse comme tout autre objet de décoration. C’est aussi un appel au voyage, on vous invite à vous plonger dedans, à vous offrir un petit moment ou on se coupe de tout, un magazine d’inspiration qui vous propose de partir à l’aventure, de faire le tour du monde pour découvrir les endroits les plus beaux, les plus insolites et les plus secrets.

Dans chaque numéro vous trouverez une partie voyage consacrée à une destination, et une partie food comprenant des portraits de chefs, des interviews, des portfolios.

Name: France Messagerie
Description: France Messagerie assure la distribution de tous les quotidiens et de magazines en France.

Name: Hostelvending
Description:
Hostelvending es una revista con periodicidad bimestral diseñada por y para los intereses del profesional
de la distribución automática, y también destinada a la creciente demanda de estos servicios.

De igual forma, tienen cabida todas aquellas empresas de cualquier índole interesadas en las soluciones
que ofrece este canal de distribución, siempre en evolución y con afán innovador.
Los contenidos abarcan todos los sectores relacionados con el Vending: Café, Snacks, Bebidas, OCS,
HoReCa, Food, etc. Y, por supuesto, Medios de Pago, Software y Sistemas de Gestión, Repuestos y
Componentes, Servicios, Formación, Empresas Especializadas, Diseño de Áreas de Restauración...
La filosofía de Hostelvending está basada en la exigencia por ofrecer siempre la máxima calidad, tanto
en los contenidos como en el diseño, el apoyo al profesional y las acciones encaminadas a poner
en alza el sector. Gracias a esta filosofía, Hostelvending se ha convertido – después de 15 años en el
mercado – en la herramienta de información más fiable, útil y actualizada del sector.

Name: Dayton Daily News
Description: Dayton Daily News is a daily printed newspaper and a digital website, and Dayton's best source for in-depth local news, sports, business and entertainment. Since 1898 our mission is to tell you what's really going on in your community.

Name: Bristol Live
Description:
Bristol Live is part of Reach Plc. 

We are the seventh-biggest regional news site in the UK and the third-fastest growing. 

The Bristol Live website comes to you from the team of journalists that write for the Bristol Post newspaper. Our LinkedIn page covers all the latest Bristol business news, which is published on our sister website, Business-Live.co.uk.

Our digital audience growth is leading the industry and the insight we put at our customers' disposal to access and target this audience is transforming the local media landscape.

Name: Sites Commerciaux
Description: Lancé en septembre 1990 par Alain Boutigny, Sites Commerciaux est le magazine de l'immobilier de commerce. Centres commerciaux, nouveaux retail parks, grandes rues marchandes, parcs d'activité commerciale : tous ces pôles de distribution ont pour point commun d'être constitués de propriétaires, d'héberger des détaillants (sous enseigne ou pas), de recevoir des clients. Analyse de l'existant, projection sur le futur : Sites Commerciaux aborde sans complaisance l'ensemble des sujets vivants qui font la vie de toute une population d''entreprises, des distributeurs aux financiers, en passant par les promoteurs, gestionnaires, investisseurs, conseils immobiliers, managers de centre-ville, collectivités locales, architectes, avocats et publicitaires. Ils sont ses lecteurs depuis bientôt trente ans.

Name: Mosaïque Magazine

Name: The Florida Times-Union I Jacksonville.com
Description:
With deep-rooted origins tracing back to 1865, The Florida Times-Union stands tall as a historical and unwavering source of information for northeast Florida. Our legacy as a beacon of current news and insights has fortified the region, while our continuous evolution has embraced the digital realm.

Proudly serving as a pillar of support for the surrounding communities, The Florida Times-Union has been instrumental in weaving the fabric of northeast Florida. Through a harmonious blend of print and digital, we have stood as a conduit for knowledge and community engagement, fostering a sense of unity.

Our commitment extends beyond reporting; The Florida Times-Union empowers businesses on local and national scales. With an array of products tailored to local and national retailers, we're dedicated to aiding them in achieving their growth aspirations.

We acknowledge that each individual and business possesses a unique narrative and aspirations. This recognition fuels our ability to craft solutions that are custom-fit to your objectives. Our skilled team is poised to guide you from conception to realization, ensuring that your initiatives are not only impactful but also resonate deeply.

As northeast Florida thrives, so does The Florida Times-Union, standing as a beacon of understanding and connection. With a dedicated team of reporters and an array of resources, we're committed to sharing stories and knowledge, nurturing community ties, and fueling business growth. Welcome to The Florida Times-Union journey—a path of insight, empowerment, and community enrichment.

Name: Newspaper Association of America
Description: Now the News Media Alliance: like our new page: https://www.linkedin.com/company/news-media-alliance

Name: Santa Barbara Independent
Description:
Since 1986, The Independent has been required reading for the South Coast's active & sophisticated population. The Independent reaches more than 100,000 readers in Santa Barbara County each Thursday with in-depth news reporting, the most extensive calendar of local events, and the best arts and entertainment coverage in the region.

Although we have had a website since 1998, it wasn't until April, 2007 that we began our community news, arts, and entertainment portal, independent.com. Providing a thorough and up to date site for all things Santa Barbara, independent.com immediately became the area's most visited community website. Santa Barbara has a daily news site, and a place for the community to connect.

In 2008 we were recognized as the Best Weekly Newspaper website in the United States, in a national contest sponsored by Editor & Publisher magazine. In the meantime, our online audience has grown to be the largest in Santa Barbara county, twice as large as our nearest news competitor. But don't take our word for it -- here's a link to current online traffic rating services.

Our newspaper also was singled out in 2008 as one of "10 That Do It Right," of newspapers leading in innovation and adaptation, in another Editor & Publisher recognition.

The Independent was created from the merger of the Santa Barbara News & Review, a weekly paper consisting of politics and commentary founded in 1973, and The Weekly, an arts and entertainment publication with extensive listings. The merger created a unique voice for independent writers, critics, and involved citizens, and Santa Barbara go-to community resource for what-to-do.

The Santa Barbara Independent is a true community newspaper with a market penetration higher than almost every other "alternative" weekly in the country. Our audited circulation of 40,000 copies exceeds the daily paper and any other publication in Santa Barbara County.

Name: The Los Angeles Tribune
Description:
Welcome to the official page for The Los Angeles Tribune - A historic name part of the Southern California ethos since 1886.

In our fourth incarnation, we are reinventing the historic name to bring about a new generation of readers proudly living in a new world order.

Our independent journalism prides itself on purity, integrity and California culture.

Name: Diari de Girona
Description: Diari de Girona és una publicació periòdica de caràcter generalista i de serveis centrada en les notícies de caràcter local i comarcal de la Província de Girona. Forma part del grup editorial Prensa Ibérica.

Name: Balistrad
Description: Balistrad is an all-online newspaper publishing useful and relevant content. It's also one of the few independent sources from Haiti on the web.

Name: The Western Gazette
Description:
The Gazette is the student newspaper at Western University in London, Ontario, Canada. The Gazette publishes online daily and bi-weekly print editions during the fall and winter terms. Established in 1906, it moved from weekly to twice per week in 1948, started publishing four times a week in 1991, returned to the twice-weekly format in 2015 and moved fully online in 2019. 

The paper's large staff, including three full-time front office editors, 20-30 section editors and dozens of volunteers, plus a full-time advertising and composing department, makes this publication’s schedule possible.

The editorial board is made of volunteer students, full-time and part-time staff. The Editor-in-Chief, Deputy Editor and Managing Editor are full-time salaried employees, usually recent graduates. The remaining editors are students who volunteer and receive an honorarium.

The Gazette, aside from publishing student-related content, serves as a training ground for those who want to venture in journalism and reporting.

Name: Northern Nevada Business Weekly
Description: The Northern Nevada Business Weekly is the only business-to-business media organization in Northern Nevada providing business news, special events and digital solutions to business leaders.

Name: BIEN-ÊTRE et santé
Description:
Fort de ses 405 531exemplaires (OJD 2019) et de ses 1 646 000 lecteurs (Etude One 2014-2015), BIEN-ÊTRE & santé est le mensuel N°1 de la Presse Santé Grand Public en France.

BIEN-ÊTRE & santé est diffusé exclusivement en pharmacie, et distribué gracieusement aux clients de nos 5 000 pharmaciens abonnés (soit 25% des officines françaises). 

Magazine précurseur de l’information santé en pharmacie (création en 1977), BIEN-ÊTRE & santé s’assure une forte notoriété et un lectorat fidèle grâce au sérieux de ses informations unanimement reconnues aussi bien par les professionnels de la santé que par le grand public.
BIEN-ÊTRE & santé a intégré le groupe 1HEALTH en 2020.

Directeur de la publication : Julien Kouchner

Name: Le Zéphyr / Média indépendant
Description:
Le Zéphyr c’est un média indépendant ! Des femmes et des hommes se mobilisent pour le vivant, Le Zéphyr raconte leurs histoires, leurs luttes. 

Le Zéphyr édite un site d'information et une revue imprimée (3 numéros par an).  Le Zéphyr produit le podcast "En Forêt".

Lisez bien et bonne découverte !

Name: Healthcare Industry Updates
Description: Stay informed and engaged with Healthcare Industry Updates. Discover the latest trends, insights, and breakthroughs in healthcare. Our dedicated page delivers valuable content on medical advancements, technology, policy changes, and more. Connect with industry experts, share knowledge, and engage in discussions shaping the future of healthcare.

Name: India Infra Hub
Description:
India Infra Hub will publish news stories, commentaries, ground reports, long-form reportage,  company analysis, videos, interviews, policy intelligence briefings, dashboards, daily newsletters, research reports across various infra sectors- road, rail, metro, airport and power etc.

Areas of Coverage:

a) Airports
b) Oil & Gas
c) Power and Renewables
d) Electric Mobility
e) Ports and Shipping
f) Railways and Metro Projects
g) Roads and Bridges
h) Smart Cities, Urbanisation, and Housing
i) Urban Transportation
j) Water and Waste Management
k) Telecom

The portal shall aid research in infrastructure and promote evidence-based decision making amongst policy-makers, funding agencies, and other stakeholders. Also, ideal practices from the industry through various case studies about projects in India would be elaborated and featured on the platform.

Lastly, extensive reportage from ground-zero of critical projects in several sectors will be served.

Name: MIDI OLYMPIQUE
Description:
Midi Olympique est un bihebdomadaire français fondé en 1929. Il traite aujourd'hui de l'actualité du rugby et paraît dans les kiosques chaque lundi et chaque vendredi. Sa rédaction se situe à Toulouse et il appartient au groupe La Dépêche du Midi.

Emmanuel Massicard est son rédacteur en chef.

Il a la particularité d'être imprimé sur du papier jaune. Il compte une trentaine de journalistes basés pour la plupart à Toulouse, mais aussi à Bayonne, Paris, Grenoble ou encore Montpellier.

Longtemps, Midi Olympique ne produisit qu'un seul journal par semaine avant de se diversifier à partir des années 1990 jusqu'à passer au rythme bihebdomadaire en 2006.

Il édite aussi un magazine mensuel (Midi Olympique Magazine) vendu le premier lundi du mois avec le journal du lundi.

A chaque fin de saison, Midi Olympique publie un florilège de ses meilleurs moments, retracés dans un almanach intitulé "Une saison de rugby".

A la rentrée, sort par ailleurs un guide de la saison à venir nommé "Rugbyrama".

Tous les quatre ans, un "Atlas de la Coupe du monde" présente la compétition.

Depuis 1954, chaque automne, Midi Olympique remet ses Oscars aux meilleurs joueurs français et étrangers de l'année.

Midi Olympique fut créé par Jean-Jacques Pouech en 1929. Il couvrait alors tous les sports mais cette première formule ne dura que trois ans. En 1932, le fondateur mit la clé sous la porte avant de relancer le journal quinze ans plus tard, en 1947, en tant que fusion de deux hebdomadaires : Midi Sportif et France Olympique. C'est à ce moment-là que le nouveau Midi Olympique adopta la couleur jaune qui est restée sa marque de fabrique (à l'époque, beaucoup de journaux notamment sportifs ne se sentaient pas obligés d'utiliser du papier blanc, on trouvait aussi du rose, du vert ou du bleu).

Name: CEMAC-ECO.FINANCE
Description: First magazine dedicated to the economic and financial news of the countries of Central Africa, cemac-eco.finance highlights initiatives, projects conducted between individuals from different countries or different states; also discusses innovations in business, large-scale strategic issues, markets, among others. All this, in order to give an account, as faithfully as possible of the projects realized or in development in the countries or for the countries of Central Africa.

Name: Euro Weekly News Media
Description:
The Euro Weekly News is the largest free English language newspaper in Spain covering the coast from Valencia to Gibraltar across 7 weekly editions. 

EWN also runs a 24/7 news website covering breaking news from Spain and around the world.

With a circulation of more than half a million copies each month, the six editions of the EWN can be found in more than 4,000 popular distribution points throughout Southern Spain and the Balearic Islands. 

We carefully researched exactly where the expatriate population is concentrated, and ensure the paper reaches it. 

Our distribution list continues to expand as more people relocate to the sunny climes of Southern Europe.

EWN cover more international and local news than any other foreign media publication in Spain and is read by more than half a million readers a week - the only comprehensive guide to news, views and insights into life amongst the expatriate population on the Costa del Sol, Axarquia, Almeria, Costa Blanca (S), Costa Blanca (N) and the island of Mallorca.

Each edition features localised news, a full TV guide, as well as European news and financial data. Items of local interest and information on what's on and where to go are also included, along with entertainment and updates.

Get your business seen by over HALF A MILLION Euro Weekly News readers WEEKLY. 
For more information call +34 600 58 35 79!

All of the EWN editions are available in print and in virtual format on our dedicated website www.euroweeklynews.com.

Name: Enterprise Tech Wire
Description: Enterprise Tech Wire is a digital B2B media platform offering 360-degree coverage of Enterprise Tech and smart solutions.

Name: City Limits
Description:
City Limits uses investigative journalism through the prism of New York City to identify urban problems, examine their causes, explore solutions, and equip communities to take action.

Founded in 1976 in the midst of New York’s fiscal crisis, City Limits exists to inform democracy and empower citizens to create a more just city. The organization is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit funded by foundation support, ad sponsorship and donations from readers.

City Limits Shelter Count
City Limits publishes regular tallies attempting to more accurately track the number of people staying in New York City’s homeless shelters, a population that spans five municipal systems run by four different agencies.

Spanish Language Initiative
City Limits is growing closer to its goal of becoming a fully bilingual investigative local media outlet, a first of its kind in the city. City Limits' series "Lo que necesita saber sobre" has published guides and explainers in Spanish and English which serve as real-service journalism, news-you-can-use pieces for immigrant and undocumented New Yorkers. 

CLARIFY | The City Limits Accountability Reporting Initiative For Youth
Since the fall of 2014, City Limits has operated a paid training program for high-school and college-aged students who learn and apply the skills of investigative journalism as they report on issues affecting their own neighborhoods.

Name: Punjab Kesari
Description:
अाप के दिल की धड़कन कहा जाने वाला भारत का प्रमुख हिन्दी दैनिक समाचार पत्र पंजाब केसरी भारत के पंजाब, हरियाणा, राजस्थान, दिल्ली, जम्मू कश्मीर आदि राज्यों के विभिन्न नगरों से प्रकाशित होता है।

इस समाचार पत्र में अाप दुनियाभर की खबरें सबसे पहले पढ़ सकते हैं। ताजा खबरों के साथ-साथ ये अापके मंनेरंजन का ध्यान भी रखता है इसलिए इसमें हर दिन पाठकों के लिए कुछ नया प्रकाशित किया जाता है जैसे धर्म संस्कृति,करियर,मंनोरंजन,नारी,प्रॉर्प्टी,रविवारीय,तंत्र-मंत्र अादि। इसके साथ-साथ ये अापकी खुशी को दोगुना भी कर सकता है क्योंकि अाप अपने बच्चे के जन्मदिन या अपनी शादी की वर्षगांठ की तस्वीर इसमें प्रकाशित करवा सकते हैं।

Name: Magazine Village
Description: Magazine national, trimestriel et indépendant, Village déniche, un peu partout en France, des initiatives innovantes, des portraits de personnes qui ont créé leur activité à la campagne, des territoires solidaires et créatifs ainsi que des savoir-faire durables.

Name: Salus Magazine
Description: Revista especializada em saúde para profissionais, investigadores e estudantes em saúde.

Name: The Daily Orange
Description:
The Daily Orange is the nonprofit, student-run newspaper of Syracuse, New York, covering Syracuse University and the greater Syracuse community. The D.O.'s editorial content was first published in 1903 and became financially independent from the university in 1971. The newspaper publishes online at dailyorange.com year-round and produces a weekly print issue, distributed for free at city and university locations, while classes are in session.

The D.O. produces written and digital content across its news, culture, opinion, sports and visuals (photography, videography and design) sections. If you are an SU or SUNY ESF undergraduate or graduate student interested in working in any of these sections, send an email to editor@dailyorange.com. The D.O. can be found on various social media platforms, including Instagram and Twitter at the @dailyorange handle.

The D.O.'s financial independence is by choice. We rely on supporters to provide real-world opportunities for our student journalists and to cover the university fiercely and fairly. If you are interested in supporting our mission of independent student journalism, please consider donating at https://donorbox.org/daily-orange-grad-2025.

Name: NEWS'MAG
Description: Magazine leader sur la Marne (Reims, Chalons-en-Champagne, Epernay).

Name: Design Alive
Description: Design Alive is a publishing house based in Poland. We publish print and digital design, interiors, architecture and lifestyle magazines. Our editorial portfolio includes originally made magazines: Da, Da Home and www.designalive.pl.

Name: Cherwell
Description:
Cherwell is the independent student newspaper for the University of Oxford. Founded in 1920, it is one of the oldest and largest student publications in the UK. 

The paper is published five times per term and is to delivered to the vast majority of Oxford colleges as well as other strategic locations in the city. Our award-winning website and social media channels are updated daily with breaking news, analysis, features, cultural, sport, and lifestyle content. 

A reference point for Oxford history and University life, our articles are read by tens of thousands of undergraduates and postgraduates, alumni, academics, and prospective students from across the country and beyond. 

A particular advantage we have is that we are one of very few student newspapers to have complete editorial independence from a student union or other body. Owned by Oxford Student Publications Ltd, a student publishing house with no ties to the Student Union or University, we are funded through common room subscriptions and advertising.

Name: Elplural.com
Description:
Diario digital progresista, centrado en noticias de carácter político y económico, a través de la opinión.
Director: Enric Sopena - Director adjunto: Francisco Medina - Directora adjunta: Marisu Moreno. Gerente: Pita Sopena

Name: America's Newspapers
Description: On behalf of its approximately 1,700 newspaper and Solutions Partner companies, America’s Newspapers is committed to explaining, defending and advancing the vital role of newspapers in democracy and civil life. We put an emphasis on educating the public on all the ways newspapers contribute to building a community identity and the success of local businesses. Learn more: newspapers.org

Name: L'INFORMATICIEN
Description: Le seul média d'informatique professionnelle disponible en kiosque, par abonnement, en édition tablette et numérique.

Name: Cinematographe.it
Description: Cinematographe.it è un sito dedicato al mondo del cinema nato dall'ottobre del 2014 da un'idea di Emiliano Cecere e Teresa Monaco.  Il portale verte su tutto ciò che ruota intorno alla settima arte e non solo, dalle anteprime cinematografiche alle recensioni, passando per un'informazione fruibile e costantemente aggiornata. Attraverso le nostre sezioni diamo un’informazione completa su film, cartoni animati, serie tv, gli eventi cinematografici e nazionali e internazionali più accattivanti. Avvalendoci di esperti del settore e appassionati disponiamo di numerose rubriche, dedicate rispettivamente alle colonne sonore e al settore enogastronomico e al viaggio.

Name: The TechBlog
Description: The Techblog is an online technology focused platform where people can freely share technology news, articles and technology trends in Zimbabwe, Africa and the World at large. Keep a step ahead technologically by frequently getting current, updated and accurate technology news and updates from The Techblog. The Techblog is your number one Technology blog, so stay tuned !

Name: ALAYAM Publishing
Description:
ALAYAM Publishing was established in 1989 by a group of young Bahraini journalists which was unique in the Arab world.

The first issue of the “ALAYAM” daily newspaper in Arabic was published on March 7th, 1989 and after that the daily “Bahrain Tribune” in English was published on March 7th, 1997. ALAYAM group also published an entertainment weekly magazine “Sada Al Osbou”  and a monthly magazine “Gulf Panorama”.
According to the latest surveys and studies that is made by specialized companies ALAYAM is the leading and the No.1 circulated newspaper in the Kingdom of Bahrain because of the variety of ideologies, credibility and the extensive coverage of local and international news.

ALAYAM was the first newspaper in the MENA region to use the modern Information Technology in editing, executing and publishing and one of the first Arabic newspapers which lunched a website on the internet.
ALAYAM has a dedicated sports, kids and business supplement pullout along with the daily. ALAYAM is a member of the project “Kitab Fi Jarida” – A book in a newspaper – which is one of the programs of the UNESCO. The publication is active in the cultural filed and it owns a distribution company and one of the most important and popular commercial bookshop in Bahrain. ALAYAM uses one of the most modern presses in the Middle East that has the ability to print all types of newspaper, books and different types of publications.

ALAYAM celebrated the 20th anniversary last March 2009 and on this occasion ALAYAM Media Center was lunched, which offices all the departments and the modern printing press in an area of more than 15,000 sq meter and is located on Shaikh Isa bin Salman Highway – Janabiyah, close to entry of King Fahd Causeway to Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, in a very strategic location.
 
ALAYAM is starting a new era in media and publishing sector and trustfuly will continue its success as the leading media organization in the Kingdom of Bahrain.

Name: Soundlightup France
Description: Bilingual webmagazine En/Fr, dedicated to the sound system, lighting, media, devices and people making the events.

Description: Ihre Zeitung für Braunschweig - Lesen Sie das Wichtigste aus Ihrer Region und der ganzen Welt!

Name: HW News Network
Description:
UNBIASED. REAL. HONEST.
In the highly patronized, clichéd and oblique media world, HW News emerges as an upright news channel that breaks stereotype and sets the path for news, views and anecdotes that are compelling, indulgent and evocative.

Name: beinsured.pl
Description:
Beinsured to pierwszy na polskim rynku portal, który powstał z myślą o branży ubezpieczeniowej. Celem twórców portalu jest dzielenie się wiedzą i kompetencjami z zakresu ubezpieczeń poprzez dostarczanie sprawdzonej, aktualnej i rzetelnej informacji. Beinsured to miejsce tworzone przez profesjonalistów z myślą o profesjonalistach.

 
NAJWAŻNIEJSZE DOKUMENTY I INFORMACJE KSZTAŁTUJĄCE RYNEK UBEZPIECZENIOWY W POLSCE JUŻ OD TERAZ DOSTĘPNE W JEDNYM MIEJSCU.

Ale portal to nie wszystko. Beinsured to również codzienna porcja wiedzy na temat zmian w prawie, nowych orzeczeń sądowych, ciekawy wydarzeń rynkowych, nowych działań podejmowanych przez regulatorów i wiele, innych sprawdzonych, rzetelnych informacji dostępnych w formie dziennika, dostarczanego zarówno poprzez pocztę email, portal, ale również poprzez dedykowaną aplikację na urządzenia mobilne z systemami iOS i Android.

Be aware, be informed, be smart, beinsured

Odwiedź nas!
Zespół beinsured.pl

Name: Diario de León
Description: El Diario de León fundado en 1906 en la ciudad de León, siendo el periódico más antiguo de la provincia. Es líder de la prensa leonesa escrita y, junto con la edición digital, que también es la primera referencia en la provincia, supera los 200.000 lectores diarios.

Name: Telangana Today
Description:
Telangana Today is published from Hyderabad in Telangana, we bring breaking news, timely updates and extensive coverage, apart from a daily rich spread of news and views on Hyderabad and Telangana, the politics here, the burgeoning business centres, IT hubs and the cutting edge technology crafted in the youngest State in India, transportation and civic issues, developmental projects across varied sectors, the heritage that defines Hyderabad, exciting sports events, Tollywood’s groundbreaking movies, and much more.

Design & Technology
Our offerings include a 16-page main broadsheet and a 16-page tabloid every day, apart from special editions of the tabloid and features for a relaxed Sunday read – all this from our integrated newsroom, which is among the first in the country to have web developers synchronizing their expertise with seasoned wordsmiths.

Name: El Universal Cartagena
Description:
El Universal es hoy en día un periódico de indiscutible liderazgo en una amplia e importante región de la Costa Atlántica. Con cubrimiento total de Cartagena y el resto del departamento de Bolívar, así como de Sucre, Córdoba y San Andrés (Islas) mantiene índices de circulación y penetración muy por encima de cualquier otro periódico de la costa o nacional en estas zonas.
El Universal además de suministrar información general, actualizada y veraz, entrega información especializada sobre informática, vivienda, deporte, revistas de farándula, del cine y televisión, recetas, consejos de belleza y moda, también entrega fascículos coleccionables de obras útiles para toda la familia.

Name: market
Description:
Le média suisse des HNWI.
market affirme son positionnement comme point de rencontre unique en Suisse romande, entre l’élite des investisseurs dotés de fonds propres nets élevés (HNWI), et celle de leurs prestataires dédiés.

Le cœur de cible de market représente ainsi une population de plus de 40’000 contribuables privés en Suisse romande, disposant d’un patrimoine supérieur à CHF 1’000’000, dont près de la moitié dépasse les CHF 2’000’000. La présentation de portraits significatifs en son sein (vie privée, événements, etc.) est aujourd’hui inscrite dans l’évolution naturelle du magazine.

Pour répondre à toutes les attentes pratiques et stratégiques des HNWI de Suisse romande, en traitant des sujets qui font réellement partie de leurs préoccupations les plus présentes, market continue de faire intervenir leurs meilleurs conseillers et fournisseurs spécifiques (gestion de fortune, banques privées, fonds de placements et de private equity, fiduciaires, conseillers juridiques et fiscaux, family offices, courtiers, prestataires d’exception, etc.). L’ensemble de ce marché professionnel demeurant, par ailleurs, un lectorat conjoint et essentiel de market, qui lui est structurellement fidèle.

Name: Språktidningen
Description: Språktidningen skriver om allt som har med alla språk att göra. Vi gör det högt och lågt, kort och långt, roligt och provocerande. I en och samma tidning ryms både avancerad populärvetenskap och lättsamma reportage. Här finns kontroverser, kuriosa och konkreta skrivråd.

Name: Le Courrier de Russie
Description:
Founded in 2002 by Philippe Pelé-Clamour, Jean-Luc Pipon and Emmanuel Quidet, The Courrier de Russie is a digital newspaper based in Moscow. It is now the first news site in French devoted to Russia.

For 15 years, The Courier of Russia has offered its readers a unique panorama and immersion in Russian political, social and cultural life.

Its ambition is to provide daily, and without prejudice, essential information about Russia.

More than 60% of its readers live in France. Analyzes, reports, chronicles, editorials, photographs and videos are published every day.

Name: Études - Revue de culture contemporaine
Description: Fondée en 1856, Études est une revue de réflexion portée par un esprit de dialogue, de discernement et d’ouverture aux grandes questions contemporaines. Retrouvez chaque mois des articles sur des thèmes variés : international, société, religion et culture, avec des analyses approfondies et des points de vue divers.

Name: New Brunswick Today
Description: New Brunswick Today is a News Organization that delivers free news for and about the City of New Brunswick New Jersey through our website, monthly print edition, social platforms, and email newsletter. We are supported through advertising sponsorship available on all of our mediums of communication.

Name: The Reporter
Description: The Reporter is a daily morning newspaper, founded in 1883, that serves Solano County and the cities of Vacaville, Dixon, Winters, Rio Vista, Fairfield and Suisun City. It is part of MediaNews Group's Northern California Network. The Reporter also offers online news at www.TheReporter.com.

Name: Tattva Viveka
Description:
Each religion, each kind of consciousness, each field of knowledge is an individual discipline, that adds up in the big picture. In a multi-perspective approach, every culture, every human being, every aspect of life and how it grew has its place and importance in this collective entity of Spirituality. Tattva Viveka is concerned with collecting it, fostering it and giving all of it a voice.

Tattva Viveka is thus a service to humanity. We want to give to the world, we want to enrich it. And so Tattva Viveka serves to disseminate knowledge, deepen international understanding, promote dialogue among religions, foster peace and non-violence through communication, and holistically heal the individual and the collective.

The earth and humanity are both groaning under the weight of suffering caused by mankind. It is time to understand and reduce this suffering. This is the path we are on.

Name: The Day Publishing Company
Description:
Serving eastern Connecticut and beyond...

The Day Publishing Company, established in 1881 by John A. Tibbits, publishes The Day, a daily newspaper covering a 20-town region in eastern Connecticut with a daily and Sunday readership of nearly 100,000, and theday.com, a website generating more than 4 million page views a month.

The Day Publishing Company also publishes Mystic Country magazine, the official annual visitors guide for the region with a circulation of 250,000; Go Westerly, an annual tourism magazine with a circulation of 60,000; Sound & Country, an in-market tourism tabloid published three times a year with a circulation of 30,000. The company also runs Day Printing, a division specializing in commercial printing, graphics and bindery services.

The Day Publishing Company owns Shore Publishing, LLC, which publishes seven weekly community newspapers from East Haven to Old Saybrook, with a combined circulation of nearly 75,000. The company also owns The Times Community News Group, a group of eight weekly publications serving towns east of the Connecticut River to Pawcatuck, with a combined circulation of nearly 80,000.

Name: Dallas Free Press
Description: Our nonprofit journalism amplifies voices in disinvested neighborhoods and explores solutions to our city's systemic inequities.

Description: Diario de circulación nacional.

Description: Breaking news from the premier Jamaican newspaper, the Jamaica Observer. Follow Jamaican news online for free and stay informed on what’s happening in the Caribbean.

Name: PLM
Description:
Magazine dédié à la production laitière depuis 40 ans, PLM visite des exploitations performantes dans le monde entier pour partager avec ses lecteurs le meilleur de l'information professionnelle : les organisations les plus efficaces, les étables les mieux agencées, les matériels les mieux adaptés, les astuces les plus pratiques... 
Avec les conseils pratiques de ses consultants spécialisés, PLM propose une richesse inégalée d'information pour faire avancer les projets des éleveurs de vaches laitières.

Name: Coastal Review
Description:
Published Monday-Friday by the nonprofit North Carolina Coastal Federation, we provide in-depth reporting on environmental issues and science news relevant to North Carolina's 20 coastal counties with an emphasis on the people, culture and history of the region. 

While the federation often advocates for better laws and policies, Coastal Review is not an advocacy publication. We’re not interested in one-sided stories. Almost all of our stories are written by professional journalists, who strive to meet the highest standards of fairness and accuracy. Editorial decisions are made independently of the publisher and any other persons or interests.

Coastal Review has been a member of the North Carolina Press Association since 2015.

Name: Business World Magazine
Description: Business World Magazine DAILY NEWS - https://www.linkedin.com/company/19147166/

Name: L'Osservatore Romano
Description:
Pubblicato per la prima volta con la data del 1° luglio 1861, «L'Osservatore Romano» ha raccontato attraverso le sue pagine oltre 150 anni di storia. Giornale quotidiano politico religioso, come recita il sottotitolo della testata, ha affrontato nel corso del tempo profonde trasformazioni per meglio rispondere alle attese dei Pontefici che si sono avvicendati al soglio di Pietro. La dimensione universale, l'incontro tra fede e ragione, l'amicizia con le donne e gli uomini di oggi sono le linee direttrici che il foglio vaticano esprime presentando tutti i testi pontifici e i documenti della Santa Sede, in italiano e nella lingua in cui sono stati pronunciati o scritti, seguendo con un'informazione completa e accurata, la vita internazionale, i dibattiti culturali, le vicende della Chiesa in ogni continente, con particolare attenzione all’ecumenismo e al dialogo con le religioni. 

L’Osservatore Romano began with the daily newspaper. Founded in 1861, it has undergone a series of changes to meet the exigencies and expectations of each pontificate. The universal dimension of the Church, the encounter between faith and reason and the Church's approach to the men and women of today are the editorial lines followed by the Vatican paper. It is both for the purpose of documentation and commentary on all papal texts and documents of the Holy See in Italian as well as in the original languages in which they were spoken or written. Our aim is to provide complete and accurate information on international affairs and the cultural debates and events happening in the Church on every continent. Special attention is also paid to ecumenism and to interreligious dialogue.

Name: Kometa
Description:
Née du choc du retour de la guerre sur le continent européen, la revue Kometa raconte le monde là où il bascule, à travers les regards de celles et ceux qui le vivent.  Tous les deux mois, Kometa décrypte les bouleversements du monde à l’aide de récits littéraires et photographiques, de cartes et des regards croisés d’universitaires. 

Revue indépendante et engagée, Kometa révèle les enjeux, fait entendre les voix de celles et ceux qui vivent ces changements de l’intérieur.  En lisant Kometa, vous soutenez des autrices et des auteurs en résistance et un journalisme indépendant, de qualité.

Name: Lakiernictwo.net
Description: The Lakiernictwo.net portal is an industry platform about industrial paints and coatings

Name: Solutions Manutention
Description:
Depuis plus de 10 ans, Solutions Manutention est le seul magazine de presse écrite bimestriel à diffusion nationale spécialisé dans les équipements et solutions de manutention en entrepôts. 
Notre objectif est d’apporter des réponses aux problématiques que rencontrent sur leurs sites d’exploitation les chefs d’entreprises, les directeurs de sites en passant par les ingénieurs, les techniciens et les utilisateurs. Tout au long de l’année vous trouverez des reportages terrain, des histoires d’entreprises, des retours de conférences de presse, des histoires d’hommes et de femmes du secteur, etc. 
 Un site internet et une newsletter mensuelle apportent des informations complémentaires aux 6 éditions nationales papier.

Description:
El Correo Gallego es el "buque insignia" de un grupo de comunicación con sede en Santiago de Compostela, el Grupo Correo Gallego, una sociedad multimedia de comunicación, con una presencia importante, a nivel de la comunidad autónoma de Galicia, en prensa escrita, internet, artes gráficas y diseño, radiodifusión sonora, televisión comercial y producción audiovisual, servicios de imagen corporativa y organización de eventos deportivos.
Puedes conocernos visitando www.elcorreogallego.es

Description: ahmdevi.me@gmail.com

Name: EJE Journal
Description:
Notre projet, que nous espérons vous faire partager : faire de cette revue un forum, une plaque tournante, un centre de ressources, au niveau de l'estime que nous portons au métier d'éducateur de jeunes enfants. 

etrouvez tous les deux mois les actualités du secteur et les actualités liées à la recherche, un dossier thématique, des rencontres avec des EJE et autres spécialistes de la petite enfance, ainsi que les rubriques "Economie vs qualité", "Dessins d'enfants", "Santé environnementale", "Débat", "Le jeu selon", "Management et petite enfance", "Paroles d'étudiants" ou encore "Coups de cœur littéraires d'une EJE".

Name: The Chronicle
Description:
The Chronicle, the student-run newspaper of the Duke community, is older than Duke University itself.

Students at Duke's predecessor, Trinity College, founded the newspaper in 1905, and the first issue published on Dec. 19 featured articles about a campus debate and a speech by a Charlotte businessman. The paper was created by members of the Hesperian and Columbian literary societies but eventually moved beyond those roots.

The paper is still entirely run by students, who are not paid and are responsible for all content. The business and advertising operations are managed by a professional staff. The company's board, composed largely of former staff members, sets broad policy for the organization.

Name: Lien Social
Description: Réalisé par des travailleurs sociaux et des journalistes spécialisés, Lien Social est riche de cette double culture qui lui permet de proposer des analyses de fond et des reportages de terrain à la fois critiques et professionnels. À destination des travailleurs sociaux comme des étudiants, Lien Social veille chaque semaine à vous restituer de manière claire et hiérarchisée l’actualité du secteur.

Name: United News of India
Description: United News of India is India's premier multilingual news agency, supplying news in English, Hindi, Urdu and Kannada languages. Its news bureaus are present in all state capitals and major cities of India.

Name: Revue internationale de criminologie  et de police technique et scientifique
Description:
The International Review of Criminology and Technical and Scientific Police (RICPTS) is devoted to criminology on the one hand, i.e. with the knowledge and the explanation of the criminal phenomenon, like with the prevention of the crime and the study of the social reaction to the crime, the crime being to as well consider under its aspects psychological, psychiatric sociological, legal as legal. It is in addition a review devoted to the technical and scientific police force or more generally to forensic sciences as a whole. 

The RICPTS thus includes/understands contributions treating of the application of a scientific step and techniques with the study of the traces which result from an criminal activity or litigious out of civil matter, lawful or administrative.

Finally, the problems covered by the RICPTS extend to the questions of security which call upon comprehensive approaches binding forensic criminology and sciences, to which come to be added research on the police force and private safety.

Name: ShortnewsUSA
Description:
News apps have become increasingly important for users who want to avoid consuming news via social media and digest news from a reliable source. In our app, we outline the significant news on regular basis, as we believe in optimal utilization of resources. 

Shortnews USA is a news app that provides the latest insight about the happenings, which includes entertainment, business, sports, tech, politics, etc as per your field of interest. If you want to be well informed about what happens in the USA, By preserving your time, we are the one you are looking for!

Name: Diário de Notícias Madeira
Description: Empresa do sector media, fundada em 1876. Um dos jornais diários mais antigos de Portugal. A nossa missão passa por informar com independência e qualidade, dando voz aos Madeirenses, residentes ou não na RAM, de modo sermos merecedores do respeito confiança dos leitores, clientes, fornecedores, parceiros, acionistas, profissionais e colaboradores.

Name: Ziarul de Iasi
Description:
ZIARUL DE IAȘI, editat de NEW MEDIA GPM, reprezintă sursa principală de știri locale din Iași si regiunea Moldovei. Politică, economie, cultură, opinii și evenimente de ultimă oră. 
Fiind lideri în furnizarea de informații de calitate, vă ținem la curent cu cele mai recente știri ale comunității.

Description:
GUINEAInfoMarket es la web líder de Información Económica de Guinea Ecuatorial.  Te mantenemos informado con las ultimas novedades de la actualidad económica y empresarial de Guinea Ecuatorial. 

Puedes unirte a nosotros para publicar tus artículos o de tu empresa a través del acuerdo Partner de GUINEAInfoMarket.

Name: Dairy Star
Description: Dairy Star covers a 1/3rd of all dairy producers in the United States targeting producers in Wisconsin, Minnesota, South Dakota, North Dakota, Nebraska, Iowa, Illinois and upper Michigan. We are "All dairy, all the time" with a strong slant toward the day-to-day lifestyle of our readers. Our content is presented from the perspective of the producer,  from the 10,000 cow dairies to the small producer with under 50 cows.  Our print, online, and electronic versions are all free of charge. Dairy Star is owned by Star Publications LLC, a private Minnesota-based company located in Sauk Centre MN.

Name: Pennsylvania NewsMedia Association (PNA)
Description:
At PNA it's our job to offer money-saving services and practical solutions, supporting the newspaper industry in hundreds of ways. Whether you work in management, editorial, advertising, production or circulation, we can help you.

-

The Association consists of three related entities:

-

The Pennsylvania NewsMedia Association
The Association itself

The Pennsylvania NewsMedia Association (PNA) mission is to advance the business interests of Pennsylvania news media organizations and to promote a free and independent press.

4000 Crums Mill Rd., Ste. 101
Harrisburg, PA 17112
PHONE: 717-703-3000

-

The Pennsylvania NewsMedia Association Foundation
An independent, non-profit corporation organized as a public foundation. The Pennsylvania NewsMedia Association Foundation provides PNA members with a wide range of low-cost and innovative training opportunities.

Our mission is to provide training and resources to our members, to develop the next generation of readers and journalists, and to educate the public on the importance of the First Amendment and the role of a free press.

4000 Crums Mill Rd., Ste. 101
Harrisburg, PA 17112
PHONE: 717-703-3000

-

MANSI Media
The Association’s wholly-owned, for-profit subsidiary. Mid-Atlantic Newspaper Services, Inc. (MANSI Media) sells classified and display advertising into PNA-member newspapers.

Our mission is to promote, secure and simplify placement of advertising into newspapers and other integrated media.

4000 Crums Mill Rd., Ste. 101
Harrisburg, PA 17112
PHONE: 717-703-3030
www.mansimedia.com

-

Contact us by visiting https://panewsmedia.org/contact/

Name: The Badger Herald
Description:
The Badger Herald is the nation's largest independent student newspaper, serving the University of Wisconsin-Madison and the Madison, Wisconsin, community.

The Herald publishes daily during the school year and has a circulation of 15,000. Badgerherald.com is updated year round and features video and blog content in addition to the print content.

The Badger Herald, Inc., is a registered 501(c)(3) non-profit corporation.

Name: Good Morning Italia
Description: L’informazione veloce e affidabile. Ogni giorno. Ricevi ogni mattina il nostro Briefing: il modo più agile per rimanere aggiornati su ciò che succede nel mondo.

Name: GRENEF - Građevinarstvo & Energetska Efikasnost
Description:
GRENEF – Građevinarstvo & Energetska efikasnost je specijalizovani B2B građevinski časopis koji se, iz stručnog ugla, bavi inovativnim materijalima i proizvodima u građevinarstvu, a sve u cilju postizanja bolje energetske efikasnosti (solarni sistemi, klimatizacija, ventilacija, grejanje i hlađenje, reciklaža, inovativne tehnologije i sistemi, pametne kuće, pasivna gradnja, automatika, softver, mašine, oprema, sistemi i alati, građevinarstvo, arhitektura i enterijer sa fokusom na upotrebu energije dobijene iz obnovljivih izvora i uštedu energije). Časopis je zamišljen kao stručno izdanje koje će arhitektama i investitorima, između ostalog, približiti moderne tehnologije ili prezentovati budućnost u svetu građevinarstva.
GRENEF se predstavlja svojim čitaocima na 180 strana, a kvalitet grafičkog dizajna i pripreme postavlja ovo izdanje na jedno od vodećih mesta u regionu, dok nas tematika čini jedinstvenim u Srbiji. Imamo pozitivne komentare i dosadašnje informacije pokazuju da je naš časopis zaista čitan od strane lica koji ga dobijaju na adresu uz pohvale za stručne tekstove i celokupan utisak.

Name: 200 Magazine
Description:
Quand on ne trouve pas en magasin ce que l’on cherche, il vaut parfois mieux le fabriquer. Nous, ce fut 200, au printemps 2014. Nous voulions un magazine qui roule plus loin, voie plus large, sache lever le nez du guidon : il n’y a pas que les roues en carbone et les plans d’entraînement dans la vie d’un cycliste. Il y a  bien plus : le voyage, la culture, les longues distances, la mécanique, les rencontres, l’aventure, et même le vélo de ville. 

Depuis huit ans, 200 fait du vélo une aventure permanente. En ville comme dans les cols, avec ou sans bagages, avec ou sans chrono, sur toutes les routes de France, d’Europe et d’ailleurs. 200 ne distingue pas les coureurs des cyclosportifs, les cyclotouristes des voyageurs, les aventuriers des cyclistes urbains et se moque des catégories. 

200 aussi est une petite aventure : celle d’un trimestriel indépendant, parti de rien, qui vit et continue de se développer depuis neuf ans grâce à ses seuls lecteurs, presque sans publicité. 200 s’approche désormais des 18.000 ventes, abonnements et kiosques confondus, soit une estimation de 60.000 lecteurs. 

Merci à tous et toutes.

Name: Magazine L'Histoire
Description:
Depuis 1978, L’Histoire vise à transmettre le meilleur de la recherche académique au grand public. Fondé par Michel Winock et Michel Chodkiewicz aux éditions du Seuil, le magazine fait examiner ses articles par un comité scientifique afin d’assurer la production d’un contenu de qualité. L’Histoire fait une large place à l’actualité : celle de la recherche, bien entendu, mais aussi celle de l’édition, des expositions, des médias, du web, et, plus généralement, celle des débats et controverses publics liés au champ historique. Depuis l’origine, plus de 2500 historiennes et historiens ont publié dans L’Histoire.

Chaque mois, L’Histoire propose, dans le cadre d’un dossier, de faire le point sur un sujet illustré par de nombreux documents tels que des chronologies, des lexiques, des cartes, des infographies et des bibliographies.

Depuis 1998, Les Collections de L’Histoire offrent quatre fois par an des synthèses accessibles à tous et à toutes, accompagnées de documents, de cartes, d’annexes et d’illustrations nombreuses.

Name: The News Tribune
Description: Many of The News Tribune's recently hired journalists say they have never before worked in a market where the newspaper was as highly regarded as The News Tribune. Why? It has been a community newspaper throughout its history. The paper grew up with the community, has been and is relied on to reflect community values and to be vigilant on behalf of community interests. The signature distinction of The News Tribune is how thoroughly it dominates the local news market of Pierce County, virtually unchallenged by the larger Seattle newspapers. No Seattle newspapers or television stations come close to The News Tribune's status as the most authoritative source of local news. The News Tribune excels in its coverage of local and breaking news, major league and prep sports, and Washington's statehouse. The paper is particularly noted for its strong sports coverage, which was a deliberate strategy of the first editors that took over under McClatchy. Its photography staff is among the best in the region. And to tell the unique story of the South Puget Sound, The News Tribune also provides strong coverage of the Port of Tacoma, the military and outdoor recreation in the Northwest.

Name: Lübecker Nachrichten GmbH

Weiterhin sind die LN auf Social Media Kanälen wie Facebook, Twitter und Instagram vertreten.
Zusätzlich tritt das Medienhaus mit seiner LN Media Agentur am Markt auf und berät Kunden über die Möglichkeiten und Vorteile einer optimalen Online Marketing Strategie und setzt diese per Website-Gestaltung, Social Media Marketing usw. gekonnt um.
Nordbrief als weitere Marke der LN-Gruppe ist die starke Post-Allianz im Norden, die umfangreiche Postdienstleistungen zu günstigen Preisen anbietet.

Name: El Litoral
Description:
El Litoral fue fundado el 7 de agosto de 1918, por Salvador Caputto. 

En 1920, se suma a este incipiente proyecto editorial, su amigo Pedro Vittori. Juntos, formarán una dupla muy activa, en la que la voluntad de crecimiento convertirá a el diario "El Litoral" en una sólida publicación y prácticamente, en el principal diario de la región.

La convicción de sus fundadores en el proyecto, el trabajo de las sucesivas generaciones y de los profesionales, quienes con responsabilidad, trabajo y compromiso con la verdad han sostenido la publicación ante los impredecibles vaivenes de la política local y nacional; así como el apoyo y reconocimiento del pueblo santafesino, han sido la fórmula durante estos 102 años de historia. 

El Litoral es referencia de los santafesinos a la hora de informarse, entretenerse, y sobre todo a la hora de confiar es sus contenidos. 

Bajo la marca El Litoral conviven no solo las versiones matutino y vespertino, sino también varios suplementos, una versión online Ellitoral.com, la más vista de la provincia con 23 millones de ingresos mensuales, un diario de distribución provincial que cubre de punta a punta el territorio, como Mirador Provincial, una canal de cable CyD Litoral, y muchos subproductos más, todos pensados, producidos, diseñados y comercializados por profesionales santafesinos. 

Sumate a nuestro Telegram: https://t.me/ellitoral

 

 

 

 

 

Nuevos desafíos
 

Estos 102 años nos encuentra afianzándonos como multimedio, pero también generando nuevos proyectos para seguir ofreciendo lo mejor a nuestro público.

Name: Golf Planète
Description:
Golf Planète, avec son site internet, son application mobile et sa newsletter du lundi matin (l’Hebdo by Golf Planète), est un média dédié au golf qui couvre toute l’actualité de la petite balle blanche.

Si vous souhaitez toucher cette cible de golfeurs pratiquants ou professionnels de la filière, notre kit média est disponible sur simple demande à contact@golfplanete.com.

Sur Golf Planète, tous les sujets sont traités de manière impartiale, agrémentés de photos, textes ou vidéos diffusés en permanence dans un fil d’actualités pour informer en continu tous les passionnés de golf, professionnels ou amateurs, compétiteurs ou joueurs férus.

L’approche de Golf Planète est journalistique. Il ne s’agit pas d’un nouveau blog mais bien d’un véritable média qui suit une volonté éditoriale assumée : aller chercher l’information attendue ou surprenante, la vérifier et la restituer sur tous les supports digitaux disponibles, ordinateur, tablette ou smartphone. Une application, développée sous iOS et Androïd, est téléchargeable gratuitement pour rester connecté en permanence avec la planète golf.

Golf Planète est ouvert à tous les golfs qui peuvent donner de la visibilité à leurs compétitions et autres événements en saisissant gratuitement leurs dates dans l’agenda. Ils seront publiées très rapidement dans l’agenda chronologique que les internautes peuvent filtrer par région pour trouver les événements près de chez eux.

Description:

Non solo notizie di giornata selezionate sui fatti dell'economia e della finanza, ma anche gli approfondimenti dei principali temi di attualità, le opinioni dei protagonisti e gli scenari legati ai grandi trend mondiali e alle scelte della politica, con le ricadute sul territorio toscano.
Uno spazio di riguardo, come nella tradizione del Sole 24 Ore, è riservato al settore delle normative e all’informazione di servizio, con due sezioni che si occupano specificatamente della produzione toscana di leggi e regolamenti, e dei principali indicatori statistici dell’economia locale.

Name: INDUQIN
Description:
India and China are the two most populous countries in the world and also the fastest growing. By sheer virtue of the fact that China and India are home to almost 2.8 billion people, Two-fifths of the world's population. An amount of 100 dollar increase in the per capita income of these two countries would translate into about 280 billion dollars in additional demand for commodities. 

There are several apparent similarities in the development process of China and India: both are home to ancient civilizations that have bequeathed distinctive attitudes, institutions, and traditions. Both have very large populations. Both have performed well economically for more than two decades. 

As per the International Monetary Fund. “Asia continues to be both the fastest-growing region in the world and the main engine of the world’s economy, contributing more than 60% of global growth."

India leads in R&D, and China has a proven mass-manufacturing track record. The question asked is “How do we nurture an ecosystem for getting affordable and value-added products to the world market using each other’s expertise?”

India and China’s success is vital for a stable world economy. Well accepted fact is that by 2030, economies of India and China, together will hold dominance over the world and its policies.

Collaboration instead of competition is vital not just for India and China’s stable growth, but for the entire world economy. 

Our objective is to bring our readers the selection of articles from various news agencies not only directly related to India and China but also the ones which affects them indirectly. These will be available on our website as well as will be shared on a timely defined newsletter.

Description:
Nova Scotia's number one source for news in print or online at http://thechronicleherald.ca/  Follow us on twitter @chronicleherald and like us on Facebook https://www.facebook.com/thechronicleherald

Mission Statement
The Chronicle Herald is the most comprehensive information source in Atlantic Canada. We bring audiences together, providing information they can use, delivered across multiple, easy-to-access platforms. And in delivering value for our audiences, we also deliver value for our advertisers.

Vision
The Chronicle Herald is proud of its legacy of independence, integrity and place as a vital part of the fabric of the communities we serve. We will move forward with a bold entrepreneurial spirit, building on our strengths.

Brand Promise
To be the most trusted, most used information source in Atlantic Canada.

History
We are part of the Nova Scotia story. We respect and honour the history of The Chronicle Herald and the role it has played, and will continue to play, in shaping the communities we serve.

People
Our colleagues built The Chronicle Herald and helped to create our success. We deeply value the role each person has played in our history and will play in our future success.

Innovation
We innovate to ensure our audience is able to get the information they want, when they want it and how they want it. We innovate to remain a relevant and competitive channel for advertisers to reach their consumers.

Our commitment extends beyond information delivery; we actively strive to shape communities and contribute to their growth, fostering a vibrant environment.

With our headquarters situated in the bustling heart of downtown Nashville, we're poised to report not only on the local matters that impact our region but also on those with wider statewide and national significance. As a vital member of the esteemed USA TODAY Network, our reach isn't confined to Tennessee – we're committed to illuminating the stories that matter on a national scale.

The Tennessean's core philosophy revolves around recognizing the unique aspirations of every individual and business. It's this understanding that fuels our ability to tailor solutions that resonate with your specific goals. Our seasoned team of professionals is ready to guide you from conception to execution, ensuring your initiatives bear tangible and lasting impact.

While Nashville pulses at our core, The Tennessean's influence knows no bounds. We're more than just a news source; we're a conduit for change and growth. With a dedicated team of reporters and resources, we're poised to empower you with insights that matter, both locally and on a broader stage. Join us in this journey of information, empowerment, and community-building at The Tennessean.

Name: Het Belang van Limburg
Description:
Als community krant wil Het Belang van Limburg in elke levensfase aanwezig zijn. Maar de krant is veel meer dan dat: als geen ander klimt ze op de barricaden als de belangen van de gemeenschap - op welk niveau dan ook - in het gedrang komen, en geeft ze de provincie een stem in het verre Brussel.  Wat dat betreft is er niets veranderd sinds Nicolaas Theelen meer dan 125 jaar geleden zijn eerste krant uitbracht. 

Het Belang van Limburg is veel meer een community krant dan een regionale krant. Limburgers willen zich wereldburger voelen, en verwachten een volledige krant. Als geen andere krant weet Het Belang van Limburg zijn lezers volledig te informeren met lokaal, regionaal, nationaal en internationaal nieuws.
