Naast het Friesch Dagblad heeft de uitgeverij ook nog andere producten, te weten de weekkrant Het goede leven, het Christelijk Weekblad, de gratis Startkrant en meerdere kleinere kerkelijke bladen. Recentelijk is gestart met Skilje, een nieuwe mobiele telefonieservice, eerlijk en transparant, zoals het Friesch Dagblad wil zijn.

Name: The Daily Cardinal
Description:
The Daily Cardinal is published weekdays and distributed at the University of Wisconsin-Madison and in the surrounding community with a circulation of 10,000.

The Cardinal is a nonprofit organization run by its staff members and elected editors. It receives no funds from the university. Operating revenue is generated from advertising and subscription sales.

Name: Public Policy
Description:
Public Policy è un progetto avviato nel maggio 2012, con l’obiettivo di fare informazione giornalistica indipendente e specializzata.

Raccontiamo in anteprima i lavori del Parlamento e del Governo, in particolare ciò che accade nelle commissioni parlamentari, concentrandoci sui provvedimenti di natura politico-economica che seguiamo passo passo: dalle bozze di un ddl, di un decreto o di una proposta, agli emendamenti alla Camera e al Senato fino alla conversione in legge.

Oltre a raccontare la cronaca degli avvenimenti prepariamo schede di approfondimento e ci soffermiamo sui retroscena che caratterizzano il funzionamento delle istituzioni pubbliche e le dinamiche tra i partiti. Il nostro notiziario completo è in abbonamento (news.publicpolicy.it).

A inizio 2020 abbiamo lanciato Policy Europe, il nostro servizio di informazione sulle istituzioni europee.

Per info sugli abbonamenti - segreteria@publicpolicy.it;  06.69413297

-----

Name: Agriculture Internationale
Description:
Crée en 2009, Agriculture Internationale est un magazine à vocation européenne, bilingue Français-Anglais. S’appuyant sur une ligne éditoriale caractérisée par une parfaite neutralité, sa vocation consiste à mettre en avant les savoir-faire, les atouts et les performances des entreprises françaises et étrangères positionnées sur les marchés de l’agriculture, de ses équipements, de ses fournitures, de ses matières premières et de l’ensemble des services connexes.

Véritable support de communication à diffusion internationale proposé aux entrepreneurs, Agriculture Internationale leur offre de diffuser leur actualité, en termes de positionnement,  de produits, de technologies et d’innovations. Présents dans chaque numéro, les présidents de Chambres d’Agriculture - ou de structures équivalentes - font librement état de leurs situations, tandis qu’un agenda présente les rendez-vous professionnels internationaux les plus importants.

Name: Cambodianess
Description: Cambodianess is an English-language news website associated with Thmey Thmey Media. It aims to deliver accurate and comprehensive news and insights about Cambodia, providing a local perspective.

Name: The Maneater
Description:
The Maneater is the official student newspaper of the University of Missouri and is a student organization that operates independently from the student government, the School of Journalism and any other campus entity.

The Maneater editorial board and staff are composed entirely of students, with the exception of our beloved professional adviser. The newspaper publishes regularly online at themaneater.com during the academic year and produces an annual Homecoming print issue in the fall and a MOVE Magazine in the spring. The Maneater can be found on social media platforms, including Instagram, X and YouTube at the @TheManeater, and TikTok at @themaneater_1955.

To work for The Maneater, you must be a Mizzou student enrolled in a minimum of six credit hours. You do not have to be a journalism major. If you are interested in working for us, visit https://themaneater.com/applications/ or contact us at editors@themaneater.com.

Name: Lorena Magazine IG
Description:
O Lorena é um portal digital de conteúdo que reúne notícias, entretenimento e lifestyle, com uma abordagem dinâmica, acessível e conectada às principais tendências do momento.

Com uma proposta plural e atual, o site entrega informações relevantes sobre:

 Moda e Beleza – tendências, cuidados pessoais e estilo
 Celebridades e Cultura Pop – bastidores, entrevistas e novidades
 Cinema, TV e Reality Shows – entretenimento em tempo real
 Notícias e Atualidades – acontecimentos nacionais e internacionais
 Empreendedorismo e Money – negócios, inovação e mercado
 Bem-estar e Saúde – qualidade de vida e autocuidado
 Tecnologia – inovação e transformação digital

O Portal Lorena se posiciona como um espaço completo para quem busca informação confiável, conteúdo relevante e diversidade editorial, dialogando com diferentes perfis de leitores e marcas.

Ideal para quem acompanha tendências digitais, comunicação, mídia online e conteúdo multiplataforma.

Name: The Philadelphia Tribune
Description:
The Philadelphia Tribune, founded in 1884 by Christopher James Perry, Sr., is America’s oldest and the Greater Philadelphia region’s largest newspaper serving the African-American community. 

Perry, born in 1856, was a native of Baltimore, Maryland.  He was a very ambitious and civic-minded individual; well known in his hometown as a thoughtful, public speaker.  He appeared on many programs with national leaders and also worked for a local newspaper for which he reported the social doings of his race. 

Upon graduating from high school, Perry decided to move to Philadelphia.  His father wanted him to study law but he refused.  “For my people to make progress, they must have a newspaper through   which they can speak against injustice,” he reasoned.  Thus, at the age of 17, he moved to Philadelphia, Pennsylvania with the dream of establishing a newspaper.  Over the next 11 years, Perry continued to work as a reporter for a local daily newspaper while attending school at night. 

At the age of 28, he published the first edition of the Tribune at 725 Sansom Street, an area now known as “Jeweler’s Row.”  It was a one-page, one man operation titled ‘Tribune Weekly.’  From the very beginning until his death in 1921, Perry wrote about the problems that affected the daily lives of colored men and women.

Name: Hong Kong Free Press
Description:
Founded in 2015, Hong Kong Free Press is a non-profit, English-language newspaper – run by journalists, backed by readers and completely independent.
Our mission: We aim to be the most independent and credible English-language news source in Greater China. We seek to amplify the voices of the voiceless, not the powerful. And our platform will act as a monitor should Hong Kong’s core values and freedoms be threatened. The HKFP team is fully committed to reporting the facts, without fear, favour or interference.

Name: Groupe CPPRESSE
Description:
Partir du magazine de la plus petite discipline Moto qui soit pour devenir un groupe de Presse national en moins de deux décennies, telle est la trajectoire unique et virale de CPPRESSE / BENAPRESSE.
En moins de 20 ans et au travers 15 titres, le groupe CPRRESSE - BENAPRESSE a réussi à s’imposer au niveau national comme un groupe de Presse écrite avec lequel il faut compter.
La clef des succès du groupe CPPRESSE est à chercher dans ses origines. Cet ADN familial présent depuis presque 20 ans à tous les degrés de ses créations, de ses évolutions et de ses adaptations. Un savoir-faire envié, en accord avec l’air du temps… qui est au changement.

Name: Mediengruppe Allgäuer Zeitung
Description:
Die Mediengruppe Allgäuer Zeitung
Mit über 500 Mitarbeiterinnen und Mitarbeitern zählt die Mediengruppe Allgäuer Zeitung zu den bedeutenden Arbeitgebern des Allgäus und stellt das in dieser Region tief verwurzelte Medien- und Kommunikationsunternehmen dar. Des Weiteren bilden wir Azubis, Volontäre und DHBW-Studierende in verschiedenen Berufen aus - hier unsere Ausbildungsberufe im Überblick.

Der Unternehmenssitz der Mediengruppe Allgäuer Zeitung befindet sich in Kempten. Hier findet auch die Zeitungsproduktion sowie auch die zentrale Steuerung der Redaktionen, Werbemärkte und Serviceangebote in Kempten und in den Gebieten unserer Außenstellen statt.

Unsere Tageszeitung erscheint im Allgäu unter verschiedenen bekannten Namen:
Als Allgäuer Zeitung (AZ) in weiten Teilen der Region, als Allgäuer Anzeigeblatt im südlichen Oberallgäu, als Der Westallgäuer im Westallgäu, als Buchloer Zeitung in Buchloe und als Memminger Zeitung in Memmingen und dem Unterallgäu. Ergänzt werden diese Titel durch die kostenlose Wochenzeitung „extra“, die viele Haushalte im Allgäu erreicht.

Das Erlebnismagazin „Griaß di’ Allgäu“ wirbt im gesamten deutschsprachigen Raum für das, was unsere Heimat so besonders macht.

Unsere Marken gibt es heute selbstverständlich auch digital:
Die Nachrichtenseiten allgaeuer-zeitung.de und die AZ-News-App liefern aktuelle Informationen aus der Region. Mit all-in.de – Das Allgäu online bieten wir seit über 20 Jahren einen schnellen Nachrichtenüberblick für das Allgäu.

Unsere Agentur OYA media entwickelt und realisiert Kampagnen über alle Kanäle hinweg – von Social Media über Websites und Newsletter. Die OYA sorgt also dafür, dass die Botschaften unserer Kundinnen und Kunden die richtigen Menschen erreichen.

It provides a truly improved “version” of what is happening in Italy, both nationally and locally, designed to inform professionals, businesses, institutions and citizens.

Name: APN Australian Regional Media
Description:
APN Australian Regional Media (APN ARM) is a division of APN News & Media, one of Australia's largest multimedia companies listed on the ASX. In addition to being the largest regional daily newspaper publisher in Queensland, APN News & Media is also the largest radio broadcaster, and Outdoor operator in Australasia, and the leading media company in New Zealand.

APN ARM is one of Australia's most diverse and successful media companies, publishing 12 daily newspapers more than 62 community newspapers and non-daily publications over 40 regional news websites.

This extensive portfolio of market-leading print and online assets plays the critical role of informing and entertaining over 1.8 million consumers living in high-growth boomtowns across regional Queensland and Northern New South Wales. The integration of newspapers and websites allows readers to access and engage with their favourite local newspaper brands in print or online.

Name: As-Safir Newspaper
Description:
حملت جريدة السفير بمصداقية تاريخها هموم الناس وطموحاتهم على تنّوع شرائحهم واهتماماتهم، وقدّمت باستمرار مادّة متمّيزة.

صدر عددها الأول في 26/3/1974  ورفعت شعارها "صوت الذين لا صوت لهم" لتكون جريدة القضية.
هي "جريدة لبنان في الوطن العربي وجريدة الوطن العربي في لبنان"، بمعنى أن ترعى وتهتم بالمصالح الوطنية في مجالاتها الحيوية، وهي عربية بالضرورة، سياسيا واقتصاديا واجتماعيا وثقافيا وأمنيا...

توقفت "السفير" عن الصدور مع نهاية العام 2016، بعد مخاض طويل لتأمين استمراريتها لتعود اليوم فتنشر أرشيفها كاملاً على الإنترنت وتتيح لكل مهتم ومتابع في الشؤون اللبنانية والعربية تصفحه والبحث في محتوياته. كما تفتح مكاتبها في بيروت لتقدم مساحة وبيئة مناسبة للعمل والتلاقي تستفيد منها القطاعات الصحافية والاجتماعية والسياسية والثقافية والمهنية المختلفة.

Name: Femline
Description:
Femline is Norway’s first digital news platform dedicated to women’s health.

At Femline, it’s not just about health – it’s about us, our bodies, and the lives we live as women. This is a place where we can share, read, and learn from each other’s experiences – from fertility and cycles to pregnancy, birth, and menopause.

Name: The Georgia Straight
Description: The Georgia Straight is essential reading for anyone who’s interested in Vancouver and its place in the world. We’re on a mission to build community, celebrity, and belonging through smart, thoughtful coverage of all the things that matter to Vancouverites—from food, art, and music to politics, events, and local quirks. Charming, intellectual, and accessible, the Straight offers unparalleled insight into and perspective on life in Vancouver.

Name: Com'Presse
Description:
Agence de presse et de communication. "La seule agence parisienne délocalisée en Province". Forte d'une quarantaine de collaborateurs dont un grand nombre d'anciens parisiens, l'agence assure aujourd'hui la réalisation clés en main (prêtes à imprimer la plupart du temps) d'une vingtaine de parutions, régulières ou non pour la quasi totalité des grands groupes de presse présents sur le marché français : Axel Springer, Prisma Presse, Mondadori, l'Express Roularta, Lagardère active, France Soir... 
De grandes entreprises nous ont également confié des missions régulières ou ponctuelles autour de leur communication, auprès du grand public mais également en interne. Sodexo, Peugeot, Crédit Mutuel...

Enfin, nous avons des activités annexes, tout à fait complémentaires de nos principaux métiers : Web, Applis Smartphones et tablettes, évènementiel... bercent également notre quotidien. 

Basés à Astaffort (47), disposant également d'un bureau à Paris (9ème) et à Sète (34), nous profitons d'une équipe de personnes expérimentées, heureuses de leur choix de vie et désireuse de s'investir intellectuellement et affectivement dans les missions qui leur sont confiées, pour le plus grand bonheur de nos clients.

Name: ProFin.vn
Description:
ProFin.vn là mạng xã hội chuyên môn, cộng đồng chia sẻ tri thức, kinh nghiệm dành cho các nhân sự, chuyên gia hoạt động trong lĩnh vực kế toán và quản trị tài chính.

Chúng tôi tin rằng mỗi gia đình, doanh nghiệp hay quốc gia sẽ thịnh vượng khi mỗi cá nhân được trang bị kiến thức và kinh nghiệm quản trị trị tài chính, đặc biệt trong môi trường kinh doanh thay đổi nhanh chóng như hiện nay.

Sứ mệnh của ProFin là "làm đơn giản hóa" các lý thuyết quản trị tài chính khô khan, trở thành những nội dung dễ hiểu, dễ áp dụng vào thực tiễn.
Về dài hạn, ProFin đặt mục tiêu trở thành hệ sinh thái cung cấp thông tin đa dạng và kết nối nhân sự trong ngành Tài chính tại Việt Nam.

Hãy đồng hành cùng ProFin trên con đường hoàn thiện và thịnh vượng hơn mỗi ngày!

Name: The Dartmouth
Description:
The Dartmouth, founded in 1799, is the student newspaper at Dartmouth College and the campus’s only daily. Completely student-run and independent of Dartmouth College, it is America’s oldest college newspaper.

The Dartmouth is published by The Dartmouth, Inc., an independent, nonprofit corporation chartered in the state of New Hampshire. All editorial and business decisions are made by the students without any interference from the College.

The newspaper is published daily, Monday through Friday, from September to June, except during examination periods and vacations. In addition to the regular newspaper, The Dartmouth publishes two weekly supplements, Big Green Sports Weekly on Mondays and The Dartmouth Mirror, The D’s weekly magazine, on Fridays. The print edition is free to students on campus.

Name: South African Jewish Report
Description:

The paper and its website offers a broad range of insights and platforms for different aspects and leaders of this diverse and small yet dynamic community.
https://linktr.ee/sajewishreport

Name: Revue d’élevage et de médecine vétérinaire des pays tropicaux
Description:
Revue d’élevage et de médecine vétérinaire des pays tropicaux (ISSN 1951-6711) is an online journal, which publishes research articles and reviews concerning animal health, feed, and production, or the environments in which farmers and livestock live, related to tropical, subtropical and Mediterranean regions.
It encompasses all species of animals reared in these regions, i.e. native, exotic, wildlife and aquaculture species. Areas of interest include the various fields of animal science, e.g. physiology, nutrition, genetics, production and reproduction, veterinary science, systemic and holistic approaches such as analyses of farming systems, value chain analyses, epidemiological and ecopathological studies, and environmental analyses. 

In open access and free for authors and readers (Diamond Open Access), the Journal publishes its contents in French or in English under the license Creative Commons Attribution (CC BY) version 4.0 international.
#DOAJSEAL #CiteScore 2023: 1.1

Name: The Seymour Tribune
Description:
The newspaper of record for Seymour, Indiana. Began publishing in 1879 as The Seymour Daily Tribune. Published daily with a circulation of 4,500. 

According to Elizabeth Rebber, on page 144 in “Seymour, A Pictorial History” published in 1991, “The story of the Seymour Daily Tribune is in itself an interesting one. It began in 1879 when the Seymour Republican was founded by Platter and Sons. Several other newspapers were published during the early history of Seymour but failed to flourish.

Description: Bremer Tageszeitungen AG (WESER-KURIER Mediengruppe) is a publishing company based out of Bremen, Germany. Among other things, it publishes the daily newspaper WESER-KURIER - digitally and in print.

Name: The Luxury Playbook
Description:
The Luxury Playbook is a leading Wealth & Luxury Investment Magazine, providing in-depth analysis on fine assets, investments, real estate, alternative wealth strategies, and global market trends.

We focus on delivering intelligence, not hype, offering strategic insights into how luxury assets can build and preserve wealth. Our expertise spans fine watches, art, rare collectibles, yachting investments, real estate markets, and geopolitical trends affecting financial landscapes.

What we do:
We empower high-net-worth individuals, investors, and entrepreneurs by providing unbiased, data-driven insights into:
 Fine Asset Investments → Watches, art, rare coins, collectibles, and yachting strategies.
 Real Estate Investments → High-value property markets and emerging investment opportunities.
 Geopolitical & Economic Trends → How macroeconomic shifts affect wealth-building.
 Equities & Private Markets → Stocks, crypto, private equity, hedge funds, and alternative wealth strategies.

Our Mission:
To deliver unbiased, strategic, and data-backed content that empowers readers to navigate luxury investments, alternative assets, and wealth-building strategies with confidence.

Our Uniqueness:
 Deep Analysis, Not Surface-Level Reporting → We break down investment potential instead of just covering trends.
 Strict Editorial Independence → No external influences dictate our content—our integrity comes first.
 Expert-Led, Not Journalist-Led → Our content is crafted by industry specialists, investment analysts, and wealth strategists, not just reporters.
 Actionable Intelligence → Every article is designed to provide insights that can shape investment decisions.

Unlike traditional luxury magazines that focus on lifestyle and aesthetics, we focus on financial intelligence and wealth-building through luxury markets.

Name: Deadline News
Description:
We are a well-established and respected news and multimedia business covering Edinburgh and East Central Scotland.

For more than 10 years, our journalists, photographers and video experts have been covering the biggest stories, breaking events and other news in Scotland's capital city and beyond.

As a leading multimedia specialist our work graces daily newspapers from The Sun to the Telegraph, broadcasters, including the BBC and Scottish Television and a host of human interest magazine, specialist publications as well as online news sites.

Our photographers and video experts are also available for private commissions and work regularly with the country's leading PR and public relations agencies and a huge range of businesses.

Covering news stories is a specialist skill which is why all our news journalists are trained in Scots Law, have an average of 100wpm shorthand, and a bona fide journalistic qualification from an approved University college or NCTJ accredited training course.

This is important because we strive to ensure accuracy and fairness in our reporting, which is why we always ask sources to provide us their own details, in confidence, so we can be sure that the information we are working on is genuine.

Those who launched careers with Deadline News have gone on to enjoy continued success across the media in journalism, broadcasting and public relations.

allNovaScotia is Atlantic Canada's essential daily report on the region's business and political news.


Publishing five days a week, our newsrooms in Halifax, St. John's, and Moncton provide exclusive local insight on East Coast decision-makers. We break news about the region's most powerful companies, provincial premiers and the pub down the street.


The company is a sister publication to allNewfoundlandLabrador, and allNewBrunswick. It is also affiliated with allSaskatchewan, with offices in Saskatoon and Regina.

allNovaScotia was founded in 2001 by David Bentley, a print media veteran who launched the publication with his daughter, publisher Caroline Wood. Most employees are now company shareholders.

Our company aims to produce outstanding media content focusing on health issues and has a wealth of experience in developing strategic partnerships with some of Spain's most influential media groups.

Name: Times Colonist (Victoria)
Description:
The Times Colonist is the oldest daily newspaper in Western Canada, serving Victoria and Vancouver Island for more than 150 years. The newspaper’s lively blend of local news and commentary, delivered 24/7, has seen audiences both in print and online grow in the vibrant Vancouver Island region.

Times Colonist is your source of news in Victoria, British Columbia, Canada

Name: Fonds québécois en journalisme international
Description:
Par ses entreprises, ses artistes, ses diplomates, ses touristes, ses travailleurs humanitaires et les quelque 50 000 personnes qui à chaque année y atterrissent, le destin du Québec est plus que jamais lié à la mondialisation. Mais dans un marché de huit millions d’habitants, et à l’heure où les médias s’interrogent sur leur modèle d’affaires dans un contexte de migration de leurs revenus publicitaires vers les géants du web, il devient de plus en plus ardu de justifier des investissements substantiels dans le reportage international.

Dans ce contexte difficile, le FQJI offre une solution en permettant aux journalistes de témoigner davantage des réalités internationales auprès du public québécois en toute liberté et indépendance. Il vient en effet épauler les journalistes et leurs rédactions pour offrir un «regard québécois» sur le monde.

Le FQJI ne finance pas directement des médias, mais bien des projets de reportage soumis par des journalistes. Avec un budget annuel de près de 100 000$, les projets sont financés à la suite d’environ quatre appels à candidatures par année et d'une sélection par un jury indépendant.

L’octroi de ces bourses est rendu possible grâce à nos donateurs privés, publics, syndicaux et individuels qui ont à coeur le journalisme international au Québec. C'est là une approche novatrice qui témoigne de l'intérêt bien réel pour une information internationale de qualité. Les donateurs n’ont de droit de regard ni sur le choix des projets ni sur les reportages avant publication.

Fondateurs et administrateurs:
Jean-Frédéric Légaré-Tremblay
Guillaume Lavallée
Laura-Julie Perreault

Name: RIVIERA PRESS by MEDIACORP
Description:
RIVIERA PRESS by MEDIACORP (groupe pluri-médias) est le premier éditeur de magazines sur la Côte d'Azur. 

Depuis 1992, date de leur création, RIVIERA ZEIT et RIVIERA INSIDER sont devenus des magazines d’information incontournables pour les anglophones et germanophones installés ou de passage sur la Côte d’Azur. 

START, le petit dernier, est un bimestriel gratuit dédié à celles et ceux qui créent, innovent et osent l'entrepreneuriat sur la Côte d'Azur.

Riviera Press is the leading media company for print and online publishing in English and German for expatriate residents, as well as tourists, on the French Riviera and Italian Riviera – from Saint Tropez to Imperia, including the Principality of Monaco.
We serve an exclusive marketplace with above-average consumer spending power.
Riviera Press’ publications maintain unrivalled excellence in quality and popularity, keeping English and German-speaking the community informed, entertained and connected.
Riviera Press continues to develop innovative and uniquely effective ways for advertisers and partners to reach their markets, audiences and customers.

Name: Textile Trend
Description: Textile Trend is your go-to source for the latest news, trends, and innovations in the global textile industry. We deliver timely insights on sustainability, technology, market shifts, and industry events—keeping professionals and businesses ahead in a fast-evolving sector. Stay informed with Textile Trend!

Name: The Flash Update
Description:
Theflashupdate brings you the latest Technology and world Entertainment news,-plus the hottest celebrity fashion and beauty trends. 

We're dedicated to providing first-rate solutions for all your technical questions. We write about technology-related products, services, and issues, ranging from gadgets to video games to telecommunications.

In addition to our regular updates on the newest technology news, we at The Flash Update like reviewing the latest gadgets, such as smartwatches, smart TVs, and TWS earbuds, especially for you.

Just as tech geeks and industry experts monitor the Flash Update, industry leaders do too – and for good reason. We have established a standard and have consistently been the most major technology media outlet in the nation.

The Flash Update is a place where early technology teasers, breaking technology news, and in-depth news from authors with strength and passion are all at your fingertips.

Name: Star News Group
Description:
Star News Group is an independent Australian family owned media company and leading provider of media solutions.

In Melbourne’s south east Star publish the Berwick Star News, Pakenham Gazette, Pakenham Officer Star News, Cranbourne Star News, Dandenong Star Journal and Endeavour Hills Doveton Hallam Star Journal.

In the Yarra Valley, Upper Yarra Ranges, Knox and Lilydale areas in Victoria Star News Group publish six titles under the Star Mail brand including; Ferntree Gully Star Mail, Belgrave Star Mail, Lilydale Star Mail, Mount Evelyn Star Mail, Mountain Views Star Mail, Ranges Trader Star Mail Upper Yarra Star Mail and magazine titles Yarra Ranges Wedding Guide and the Tourist News.

In Melbourne’s West Star publishes six titles under the masthead Star Weekly including; Brimbank & Northwest Star Weekly, Maribyrnong & Hobsons Bay Star Weekly, Melton & Moorabool Star Weekly, Northern Star Weekly, Sunbury & Macedon Ranges Star Weekly, Wyndham Star Weekly. Star also publish the Geelong Independent and Ocean Grove Voice on the Bellarine Peninsula.

In Queensland Star News Group publish Noosa Today, Warwick Today and Stanthorpe Today. Star is also partnered to produce South Burnett Today, Central & North Burnett Today, Maranoa Today, Goondiwindi Argus, Western Downs Today, Queensland Farmer Today, Gympie Today, CQ Today, Gladstone Today, Emerald Today, Ipswich News Today, The Lockyer & Somerset Independent, Greater Springfield Today, Jimboomba Today, Beaudesert Times, Leader Today in Longreach and Bundaberg Today.

In South Australia, Star publish under the SA Today brand ; The Border Watch , South Eastern Times, Penola Pennant, The Border Chronicle, Eyre Peninsula Advocate, Fleurieu Sun, The Murray Valley Standard, Limestone Coast Today, Plains Producer, Port Lincoln Times, The Recorder, The Islander, The Transcontinental, Two Wells & Districts Echo, The Victor Harbor Times and The Whyalla News

In the Northern Territory The Centralian Today is produced weekly.

Name: Mercados 21 | Noticias de Economía y Empresa
Description: Plataforma de comunicación referente en el ámbito hispanohablante de información económica y empresarial, con especial atención a las pequeñas y medianas empresas. Comprometidos con la innovación permanente, con el rigor profesional y el respeto a los empresarios que de arriesgan de verdad cada día.

Name: THINK MICE
Description:
THINK MICE is a magazine dedicated to the Polish and international meetings industry (MICE – meetings, incentives, conferences, events) and its scope encompasses all of the segments in question: meetings, incentive trips, congresses and conferences. 
By adopting an in-depth and multi-faceted approach to all covered issues, we present the role and significance of the industry for, i.a. broadly defined marketing communication, employer branding and destination marketing. We interview the most prominent representatives of the meetings industry, take a closer look at their profiles and achievements, and discuss the most noteworthy case studies. The blogger section is an unquestionable highlight of the magazine, offering a glimpse into the perspective of foreign industry practitioners. The publication reports on all the latest events in the MICE sector, but its main focus is on analytical materials with industry experts sharing their expertise and opinions with the readers. 
THINK MICE is targeting corporate and company meeting planners – heads and staff of HR, PR and marketing departments, responsible for marketing communication in the broad sense of the term. Our targetaudience also involves agency teams handling the organization of events, conferences, congresses and incentive trips. Finally, we reach the personnel of city and regional convention bureaux and representatives of venues, e.g. hotels, training-conference centres and trade fair-exhibition venues.
If you are interested in getting our THINK MICE International Edition magazines regularly and for free, please send an e-mail to think@thinkmice.pl

Name: The Times and Sunday Times Appointments
Description:
The Times and The Sunday Times Appointments has led the way in experienced hiring for over 25 years.

The two titles have merged their recruitment offering to benefit our candidates and clients, showcasing a wider range of roles for both audiences.

Name: der Freitag
Description: Der Freitag ist mehr als eine Wochenzeitung – wir sind ein publizistisches Zuhause für alle, die über den Tellerrand hinausblicken wollen. Mitten in Berlin, am Hegelplatz, arbeiten rund 50 Kolleg:innen aus Redaktion und Verlag daran, unseren Leser:innen – gedruckt wie digital – Inhalte zu bieten, die jenseits der schnellen News Orientierung geben und neue Perspektiven eröffnen. Wir glauben an Journalismus, der nachfragt, der Haltung zeigt – und der Raum für Debatte lässt. Dabei denken wir Medien weiter: kritisch, kreativ, digital. Seit der Gründung 1990 und der Übernahme durch Verleger Jakob Augstein im Jahr 2008 wurde der Freitag vielfach ausgezeichnet – zuletzt 2023 als European Newspaper of the Year.

Name: RENOVA Mídia
Description: Renova é portal de notícias independente. Todos os dias, das 7:00 às 24:00, mantemos uma cobertura em tempo real dos principais acontecimentos pelo mundo.

Name: Híbridos y Eléctricos
Description: Híbridos y Eléctricos (www.hibridosyelectricos.com) –editado y comercializado desde 2010 por Tecnofisis Media Group– es la publicación independiente líder en España en información especializada del sector de los vehículos eléctricos y la movilidad sostenible.

Name: PerthNow Local Newspapers
Description:
Community News is a highly trusted voice and source of information for the people of Perth. Established in 1985, Community News has been serving the local community for over 30 years and our aim has always been to campaign, inform and connect.

Our weekly newspapers, bespoke print publications, website, e-newsletters and social media channels allow us to reach a combined print and digital audience of 920,000 people each month*.

Our local area marketing experts can help you create a campaign encompassing all aspects of print and digital advertising.

* emma TM conducted by Ipsos MediaCT CMV October 2018.  Nielsen DRM. Community News Print + online L4W

Name: Challenges.TN
Description: Le juriste est un magazine juridique en ligne, qui propose à ses lecteurs principalement des conseils dans le domaine juridiques, des avocats de renommée, vous procurent des consultations en ligne, et également de l’étude de quelques dossiers. Vous y trouverez entre autre des articles du code pénal classés selon les différentes spécialités du droit. Les visiteurs du site peuvent en outre, téléchargement des documents de tous les genres, à caractère juridiques, notamment des contrant, des cahiers de charges, des statuts, des lettres,….

Name: AR MAGAZINE VOYAGEUR
Description:
Le magazine qui donne envie de voyager près de chez soi comme aux antipodes, quelques jours comme quelques semaines. Des reportages sensibles où les journalistes en plus de montrer, informer, expliquer relatent aussi leur expérience de voyageur. Du vécu en somme à la place du joli papier glacé qui quelquefois porte trop bien son nom.
/ Le magazine qui accorde une place de choix au tourisme durable pour explorer avec un esprit critique cette voie alternative qui intéresse un nombre grandissant de Français.
/ Le magazine qui dépoussière le magazine de voyage traditionnel en s'intéressant aux destinations improbables, aux galères qui pimentent les voyages, aux voyageurs ayant trouvé leur eldorado, à l'architecture sous toutes ses formes, à la cuisine sous tous ses goûts, aux photographes en devenir, aux carnettistes méconnus et aux cartes postales loufoques.
/ Le magazine qui en toute circonstance fait preuve d'élégance, de décontraction et d'humour.

Trimestriel 6,90 €
Premier numéro en mai 2010

AR magazine voyageur a créé L'Agence, spécialisée Tourisme, elle fait du conseil éditorial, de la conception pour le Print et de la création de contenus (création de la collection Food&Travel Michelin, élaboration de brochures pour TO, réalisation de magazines de destination...). 
Elle réalise aussi des podcasts avec son studio Aller-Retour qui regroupe des professionnels du son.

Name: immo-invest.ch
Description:
Das Schweizer Magazin für Standorte und Immobilien. Eine Zusammenarbeit mit den Wirtschaftsförderungen und dem Marketing für Standorte.

Jede Ausgabe vermittelt das aktuelle Stimmungsbild einer Wirtschaftsregion oder eines Standortes und gibt Einblick in bedeutende Projekte im privaten- und öffentlichen Hochbau.

Name: Jornal A VERDADE
Description:
Informação diária on-line da região do Tâmega e Sousa, com cerca de um milhão de visualizações mensais.
Cobertura informativa dos municípios de Amarante, Baião, Castelo de Paiva, Celorico de Basto, Cinfães, Felgueiras, Lousada, Paços de Ferreira, Penafiel, Marco de Canaveses, Resende e Paredes

Name: Magazine Carnets d'Aventures
Description:
Carnets d’Aventures c’est le magazine qui vous donne des fourmis dans les jambes et vous inspire pour de futurs trips.
Trimestriel vendu en kiosque et par abonnement, Carnets d'Aventures s'adresse à un public de voyageurs et amateurs d'activités outdoor.
Récits de voyages, dossiers techniques et tests comparatifs sur l’équipement, chroniques techniques dossiers thématiques et réflexions, etc.
Carnets d'Aventures c'est chaque trimestre 116 pages d'évasion et d'inspiration pour de futurs itinérances dans la nature sans moyen motorisé (à pied, à vélo, en kayak, en canoë, à ski, en parapente, à cheval, en cordée, etc.) et en bivouac.

Name: SCHWIMMBAD+SAUNA
Description:
„SCHWIMMBAD+SAUNA“ ist die Zeitschrift mit der exklusivsten Zielgruppe des Verlages: Hausbesitzer und Bauherren, mit einem Garten, die eine Wellnessanlage bereits besitzen. Oder Hausbesitzer und Bauherren, die sich mit dem Einbau von Schwimmbädern, Naturpools, Whirlpools, Saunen, Dampfbädern und Wellnessanlagen beschäftigen oder deren Erneuerung oder Erweiterung planen. „Schwimmbad+Sauna“ ist seit dem Jahr 1968 das führende Magazin der Branche – für Profis wie Endverbraucher. Das Magazin vereinigt pure Emotion mit geballter Information auf einzigartige Weise. 

Die dazugehörige Website schwimmbad.de steht seit 1996 für die Kernthemen Schwimmbäder, Naturpools, Whirlpools, Wellnessanlagen, Erlebnisbädern und Wellnesshotels. Das Portal ist mit 662.000 Nutzern die größte Plattform der Branche. Mit aktuell 22.000 Keywords erzeugt die Website schwimmbad.de jährlich 1,4 Mio. Seitenaufrufe, Tendenz steigend. 
schwimmbad.de verfügt zudem über die größten Online-Datenbanken im Markt: aktuell 536 Fachhändler, 280 Hersteller sowie 382 Erlebnisbäder sorgen für enorme Sichtibarkeit auf Google. Alles in einem vertraunswürdigen und hochwertigen Umfeld. schwimmbad.de - Google´s best friend.  Eine große Auswahl an SEO-opimierten Ratgeberartikeln bietet den Besuchern umfangreiches Fachwissen rund um das Thema Wellness.

Name: Agronegocios
Description:
agronegocios.co, sitio Web especializado para los empresarios del Agro colombiano con información especializada en los negocios y actividades que se desarrollan en el sector. 

Líder en el comercio electrónico de venta y compra de productos del agro. 

El sitio cuenta con la publicación de contenidos de la edición impresa, indicadores económicos y contenidos exclusivos para la edición digital.

Name: Good News
Description: Want to reach business owners, ministry leaders and those who are highly involved in the community? We have you covered! Over the past 17 years we have made a name for ourselves by packing our paper with content to edify the Christian community. Each month we provide readers an outlet to place their trust and business with other like minded individuals. By advertising in The Good News, you can reach a niche market in Florida that no one else is reaching. We’re talking over 200,000 readers each month! The calling of this newspaper is to share Christ and His work with Florida. Will you join us in this call?

Name: Hufvudstadsbladet Ab
Description:
Hufvudstadsbladet Ab is a Finnish media company that publishes 4 newspapers: the leading national daily in Swedish HBL - Hufvudstadsbladet and 2 local papers Östnyland and Västra Nyland  with a total circulation of about 45 000 copies. The news application HBL 365 was introduced in february 2016. The latest member of the product family is HBL Junior
 
Hufvudstadsbladet Ab employs 120 people with a turnover of 19€ million. Hufvudstadsbladet Ab is owned by Bonnier News and by the private foundation Konstsamfundet, which supports Swedish language culture in Finland.

Name: The Reader
Description:
The Reader is Omaha's original newsweekly, founded in 1994.  Today, under the parent company of Pioneer Publishing, The Reader remains Omaha's number one newsweekly.

The Reader provides services in print advertising, online and social media, as well as public relations.  Talented marketing consultants work with businesses of all sizes in the Omaha metropolitan area.

Name: ET 40 Under Forty
Description:
The Economic Times 40 under Forty is the definitive listing of corporate India’s future leaders. Now, in its 10th year, The Economic Times 40 under Forty listing has become the beacon for business leadership in India, symbolizing a decade of recognizing and fostering exceptional talent in the business landscape.

The past editions have had names like Adar Poonawalla, Rishad Premji, Deepinder Goyal, Aman Gupta, Vineeta Singh, Siddharth Lal, Ashish Hemrajani, Lakshmi Venu, Kunal Shah, Rashmi Daga – to name a few – belong to the elite club of ET’s 40-under-Forty world.

The Economic Times 40 Under Forty award ceremony to felicitate the business leaders will be held on 19 July, 2024.

Name: MaltaToday
Description:
MaltaToday.com.mt, is an independent, English-language Maltese newspaper. Got a tip? Send it to one of journalists on dailynews@mediatoday.com.mt or call us on +356 21382741

MaltaToday is out in print on Sunday, and on Wednesday.

Name: Chronicle Info - Remote Jobs Portal
Description: Global Facts, Weekly World's Interesting News

Name: Diari de Sabadell
Description:
Diari de Sabadell is the local newspaper of Sabadell and one of the deans of the local press in Catalonia, with more than 100 years of history, the paper is the reference medium in Sabadell and most of the Vallès Occidental region (approximately about 450,000 inhabitants).

Diari de Sabadell has a daily paper paid edition, with an average daily distribution of around 4,000 copies, including kiosks and subscribers, and an average audience of 35,000 readers a day, as well as a digital edition at www.diaridesabadell.com.

Novapress Edicions, SL, the publishing company of Diari de Sabadell has recently acquired the paper from Vallesana de Publicaciones, the paper's publisher since 1970's. The new publisher has undertaken an integral renovation of the editorial model and the graphic image of the newspaper, with the ambition of creating a success story in the modern and sustainable local press.

Name: PRESSTALIS
Description: Presstalis a cessé toute activité en juillet 2020.

Name: CMGEO - Oregon (formerly EO Media Group)
Description:
At CMGEO -Oregon (formerly EO Media Group) We create quality publications and develop innovative digital products.

NEWSPAPERS: East Oregonian, The Astorian, Capital Press, Chinook Observer, Hermiston Herald, Blue Mountain Eagle, Wallowa County Chieftain, Seaside Signal, Bend Bulletin, Redmond Spokesman, La Grande Observer, Baker City Herald, Rogue Valley Tribune, Oregon Capital Insider

INTERNET AND SPECIALTY PUBLICATIONS:  EastOregonRealEstate.com, FarmSeller.com, CoastWeekend.com, OnlyAg.com and DiscoverOurCoast.com

MAGAZINES: The Other Oregon, Our Coast

Name: pmmagazine.net
Description:
We are a team of passionate professionals who believe in sharing knowledge, and are interested in contributing to  the project management community.

We noticed that there are plenty of articles being published every single day on different platforms. Sometimes you might get lucky and have your hand on a rich content article and other times it's just a waste of time. 

pmmagazine.net is a smart initiative that started in September 2018. The idea behind it is to create a project management culture and provide professionals a monthly collection of top articles written based on a specific theme chosen each month.
The goal is to build a database of top articles written on specific topics in which professionals can refer to whenever they need this information. Moreover, these articles are verified and filtered among a huge bank of articles. You can also reach to the author and connect as we provide their contact after taking their consent. 

The platform has the articles categorized to make as per the reader's choice, thus making it more entertaining and friendly.

Name: Northern Ireland Travel News
Description:
Over the last 35 years Northern Ireland Travel News has firmly established itself as Northern Ireland's quality travel and tourism print and digital platform. The company has gone from strength to strength to become the medium with which to sell the lucrative Travel and Tourism industry in the Northern Ireland marketplace. 

Each month the paper covers the full spectrum of round-the-world destination features and news as well as local travel and tourism events and industry updates.

Northern Ireland Travel News have weekly E-shots going direct to both the public and Travel trade Inboxes, as well as the online version of The Northern Ireland Travel News publication.

Events by NI Travel News 

NI Travel and Tourism Awards
Throughout the year we organise several major trade events, notably the Northern Ireland Travel and Tourism Awards, for 31 years the Awards ceremony has been attended by over 400 decision-makers from all sectors of the travel industry while the Awards themselves have become a coveted symbol of success among industry peers.

The BIG Travel Trade Event
In 2011 we introduced the Big Travel Trade Event! Now the largest B2B Travel Trade event in NI. the event welcome's Travel Trade Professionals from all over the World...it provides attendees with a platform to meet, educate and be educated of the various developments within the industry all under one roof!

NI Travel News Events
Specialised part of the company which helps organise events from start to finish for companies in all aspects of the Travel Industry.

Name: Diario Alicante
Description:
Diario Alicante Periódico Digital de Noticias y Actualidad de la Provincia de Alicante y Comunidad Valenciana.

Artículos de Opinión, Actualidad, sucesos, ultima hora, Política y Noticias al Día en Diario Alicante

Name: Waterford Press Ltd
Description: Waterford Press are New Zealand’s leading independent publishers of business and rural sector publications for over 25 years.

Name: La Pierre d'Angle - ANABF
Description:
Revue de l'Association des Architectes des Bâtiments de France (ANABF)


La revue La Pierre d'Angle a été fondée en 1984. Elle présente chaque saison une réflexion thématique sur le patrimoine architectural, le paysage, l'aménagement du territoire et les enjeux liés à leur évolution.

Cette revue suit les principaux dossiers patrimoniaux et les grandes transformations en matière d'urbanisme et d'environnement. Elle confronte les différentes approches sur les questions de création architecturale et de protection ou d'insertion du patrimoine dans la vie contemporaine.

Suscitant le débat, La Pierre d'Angle permet aux maîtres d'oeuvre et aux maîtres d'ouvrage de s'exprimer sur les projets et les chantiers en cours.

Name: NIGERIAN TRIBUNE
Description:
Nigerian Tribune, Nigeria's oldest newspaper, is a publication of African Newspapers of Nigeria PLC, and the most informative news medium, publishing articles on Latest News, Politics, Business, Sports & Op-Ed. See less.

Tribune Online is the online edition of other publications of African Newspapers of Nigeria (ANN) PLC, which include Nigerian Tribune, Sunday Tribune and Saturday Tribune.

ANN PLC, an independent media operating in Nigeria, was established in November 1949, by late Chief Obafemi Awolowo, a Pan-Africanist and former Premier of the old Nigeria’s Western Region government.

To place online advertisements and promotional materials on the website and on our Social Media Platforms, contact the Online Marketing Department:
E-mail: onlineadverts@tribuneonlineng.com
Call : +2348039515726
WhatsApp: +2348142902750

Name: Maîtrise Orthopédique
Description:
For over 20 years, Maîtrise Orthopédique has been the most comprehensive source of news and information for orthopedic surgeons and traumatologists. Published ten times per year in both print and digital formats, Maîtrise Orthopédique has established itself as one of the key publications in the French-speaking orthopedic profession.

As well as covering the latest developments in orthopedics, Maîtrise Orthopédique is working to make it easier for experts in the field to share their knowledge and experience. The journal publishes interviews with some of the world's most renowned surgeons, along with an educational section that contains detailed articles on surgical techniques.

Name: Telegraph Works
Description: A resource for marketing and media professionals looking to stay up to date with the latest Telegraph innovations and industry news. You can also follow us on X (formerly Twitter) and Instagram @TelegraphWorks.

Name: Corriere dello Sport
Description: Quotidiano sportivo italiano di diffusione nazionale con sede a Roma . Fondato nel 1924 a Bologna, assicura ogni giorno ai suoi lettori informazioni in tempo reale, approfondimenti e commenti sulle vicende sportive italiane e internazionali.

Name: Tchak - La revue paysanne et citoyenne
Description:
Tchak - La revue paysanne et citoyenne qui tranche - s'adresse aux mangeurs et mangeuses qui veulent se reconnecter avec le monde paysan. Tous les trois mois, 112 pages sur les dessous de notre alimentation. 

Le premier numéro a été publié mi-février 2020. 

Tchak est un projet coopératif porté par 29 organisations-partenaire et plus  de  500 citoyen·ne·s coopérateur·rice·s.

Tchak raconte l’agriculture paysanne, l’agroécologie et les nouveaux modèles de production, de distribution et de consommation (circuits courts, magasins à la ferme, etc), et tous ceux et toutes celles qui s'y investissent. En fil rouge, également, les dégâts causés par la production intensive et la grande distribution.

Tchak explore les facettes d'une transition alimentaire solidaire, durable sur le plan écologique, innovante sur les plans politique, socio-économique, culturel, ou encore soucieuse de la santé publique. 

Tchak questionne le rôle des producteur·ice·s, des citoyen·ne·s, des structures et du monde politique dans l’avènement de nouveaux systèmes alimentaires plus inclusifs, plus solidaires, créateurs d’emplois et de richesse(s) partagée(s), porteurs d’une redéfinition de la notion de territoire et de frontière. Par-là même, elle redéfinit le sens du mot « local ».

Tchak parie sur un contenu qualitatif, raison pour laquelle son comité de rédaction et son comité d'orientation ont souscrit à une charte éditoriale et au code de déontologie journalistique de l'Association des journalistes professionnels (AJP).

Name: Albania News
Description: Albania News - Focus on Albanian Reality. Albania News is the newspaper of the Albanian diaspora in Italy

Name: The Bit Gazette
Description: Home of the latest crypto, web3 and blockchain news, expert analysis and market updates.

Name: The Indian Subcontinent
Description: TheIndianSubcontinent News Portal is a premier digital news platform dedicated to delivering accurate, timely, and impactful news and analysis from across the world. We are at the forefront of digital journalism, leveraging multimedia storytelling to inform, engage, and empower our global audience. Join our dynamic team to shape the narrative of one of the world's most vibrant and crucial regions.

Name: de Kanttekening
Description:
de Kanttekening | de andere k(r)ant

de Kanttekening is een mediaorganisatie die bestaat uit vijf componenten: het weekblad de Kanttekening, het maandblad de Kanttekening Magazine, de website dekanttekening.nl, de community dK.Academie en het communicatie- en marketingbureau dK.Brands. Onze kernwaarden zijn: vrij, moedig en inclusief.

Over ons: https://dekanttekening.nl/over-ons/
dK.Academie: https://www.dekanttekening.nl/dkacademie/
dK.Brands: https://www.dkbrands.nl/
Twitter: https://twitter.com/dekanttekening

Name: Campus Reform
Description:
Campus Reform, a project of the Leadership Institute, is America's leading site for college news.

As a watchdog to the nation's higher education system, Campus Reform exposes bias and abuse on the nation's college campuses. Our team of professional journalists works alongside student activists and student journalists to report on the conduct and misconduct of university administrators, faculty, and students.

Campus Reform holds itself to rigorous journalism standards and strives to present each story with accuracy, objectivity, and public accountability.

Name: Finmag
Description:
Milujeme podnikání a vše kolem něj. Přinášíme inspiraci v podobě byznys příběhů, zajímavé podcasty na podnikatelská témata, ale i cenné rady a vybroušené komentáře. Naší snahou je pomoci podnikatelům v každodenní agendě, orientaci v neustále se měnícím legislativním prostředí a pravidelně nabízet klíčové novinky z byznysu. A jelikož to máme v názvu, věnujeme se samozřejmě i investičním příležitostem a finanční stránce podnikání v Česku. To vše se zaměřením na mikro, malé a střední podniky (SME).

Další projekty pod hlavičkou Partners media: 
Peníze.cz • Heroine a Heroine.cz

Name: Fastener World Inc. 匯達實業有限公司
Description:
Established in 1987, Fastener World Inc. is a specialized Taiwanese publisher of global fastener/ hardware magazine, a sales agent for overseas fastener magazines, an exhibit sales agent for global fastener/hardware exhibitions, and a co-organizer for international fastener shows. The company is headquartered at No. 469, Yu Ping Road, Tainan 70843, Taiwan. 
Our publications spread across 200 countries in the world. We attend around 30 international exhibitions per year and bring our clients there exhibiting their products. We are your best partner for expanding your business in the world market.
惠達(Fastener World Inc.)，為台灣出版發行全球性扣件及五金、零組件專業媒體雜誌， 並代理國際性外銷媒體刊物及代理國際展會攤位銷售、承辦國際專業展覽會。從商貿雜誌/e化平台/展覽會/即時商訊/多語言發行，專業 傳媒提供企業最全面的包套式行銷方案，一站式滿足企業打開能見度及接單的需求。

Name: Jornal Grande Rio
Description: Saiba em primeira mão as informações sobre empresas contratando no Rio de Janeiro

Name: New Hampshire Union Leader
Description:
The New Hampshire Union Leader & Sunday News deliver trusted news, information and resources connecting the Granite State. 

As publisher of New Hampshire's only statewide newspapers, we employ the state's largest staff of professional journalists to follow our communities, keep a watchful eye on our legislators, and make New Hampshire the best-informed state in the nation. 

We connect New Hampshire businesses with our growing audience and help them reach local customers through our suite of publications, digital products and events. 

Owned by the Nackey S. Loeb School of Communications, Union Leader Corporation also publishes UnionLeader.com and the weekly Neighborhood News and Bedford Bulletin publications.

Name: EHPAD MAGAZINE
Description: EHPAD MAGAZINE est bien plus qu’un magazine. Proposé sous la triple forme d’un mensuel papier, d’un site web et d’une application Smartphone, il propose aux directions des établissements d’hébergement pour personnes âgées dépendantes (Ehpad) et à leurs équipes une base d’informations sur leur secteur et leur activité. Élaborée par une équipe de journalistes spécialisés aguerris, la ligne rédactionnelle a été conçue pour qu’Ehpad Magazine devienne l’outil d’information de référence des directeurs d’Ehpad.

Name: India Hints
Description:
A Digital Newspaper. [India] We provide digital news across world [India].
If you have any complaints, wish to submit news, or are interested in collaboration, please email us at socialfree99@gmail.com. Alternatively, you can also send a message directly to our page.

Name: The Jewish Chronicle
Description:
The oldest continuously published Jewish newspaper in the world, founded in 1841, The Jewish Chronicle - often known as the JC - has no proprietor nor commercial shareholders, and its editorial independence is guaranteed by the Jewish Chronicle Trust. It is based in London, with reporters around the world.

The Jewish Chronicle's news and opinion pages reflect the wide diversity of Jewish religious, social and political thought from left to right, Orthodox to secular.

News coverage ranges from hard-hitting investigations to reports of communal activities, with context provided by leading commentators and cultural figures. The newspaper, published every Thursday, includes Features, Arts and Sports sections, as well as pages devoted to Food and Business. We also publish a range of high-quality colour magazines.

Name: WSJ Heard on the Street
Description: Heard on the Street is the Wall Street Journal’s influential and award-winning financial analysis column. Our team, based in six global financial centers on four continents, brings you market-moving insights both on stories at the top of the global business community’s agenda and those that soon might be. Readers often tell us that they “heard it here first.” Follow us so you never miss a story.

Name: The Record
Description:
About North Jersey Media Group

North Jersey Media Group (NJMG), part of the USA Today Network, is the leading provider of news and marketing services in northern New Jersey. Our product portfolio includes NorthJersey.com and The Record, an award-winning daily newspaper reaching more than half a million readers a week with local, investigative and enterprise reporting. Thirty community newspapers, including the Montclair Times, along with a suite of magazine titles, circulate across Bergen, Passaic, Essex and Morris counties.

Name: Daily Trojan
Description:
The Daily Trojan is the student newspaper of the University of Southern California. It is a forum for student expression and is written, edited and managed by university students.

The first edition of this newspaper was published in 1912, and over the course of its 97 years it has been recognized for continuously and consistently providing an atmosphere of free and responsible discussion and intellectual exploration of USC which has helped to both inform and entertain the university community.

While the university is the publisher of the Daily Trojan, all day-to-day operations are handled by the student editors and staff.

Name: The Guindy Times
Description: The Guindy Times is the official college magazine of CEG, ACT and SAP - the three main campuses of Anna University. What started as a tiny club with hardly ten people back in 1995, has now become one of the largest clubs on campus, with a dedicated team of over 150 members across all branches. Spanning across several domains, such as writing, editing, photography, videography, and social media marketing, we help students polish their skills in the same and expose them to the inner workings of a media body. Other than nurturing students' growth in these fields, we also act as a platform for student talent by hosting their creative work on our various platforms.

Name: DAILY SCIENCE
Description: DAILY SCIENCE est un média belge en ligne de vulgarisation scientifique et de diffusion des connaissances fondé en 2014. Chaque jour, accédez gratuitement à un article d’actualité traitant de sciences, de recherches et d’innovations en Belgique !

Name: Tech Observer
Description: Tech Observer is an online publisher of technology news that reports breaking news, product information and reviews, analysis of trends in tech.

Name: The EnvironmentZW
Description:
Cut throat Environment and Climate Change journalism- a blueprint for a Sustainable Tomorrow. 

We contribute significantly to the discourse on critical matters concerning the environment. Your trusted source for insightful, impactful, and inspiring environmental journalism. 

The Environment is a weekly online publication.

Name: FuturEnviro - Interempresas Media
Description: Proyectos, tecnología y actualidad medioambiental (agua y gestión de residuos)

Name: Eindhoven News
Description:
Eindhoven News brings daily news, background articles, and events in English from the Eindhoven metropolitan region for the whole international community living or visiting this region.

Our aim is to make sure internationals are kept informed about what is going on in their neighbourhood. By being informed, you feel more welcome, more at home and you can take an active part in the local community.

Eindhoven News is the voice of international greater Eindhoven. We are the media bridging international people, companies and organisations.

We are a non-profit organisation run by a skilled international team.

Name: EFN Media
Description:
Eagle Feather News is a high-quality publication dealing with topics of interest to our readers in Saskatchewan's First Nation and Métis communities.

With 12 issues per year and 10,000 copies per issue, Eagle Feather News is the most widely circulated Indigenous newspaper in Saskatchewan. 

The Eagle Feather News website delivers the same fair and balanced coverage of First Nation and Métis news and events from across our territories and averages 15,000 to 20,000 hits per month.

Name: Bendigo Advertiser
Description:
Over the past 160 years we've been telling the stories about the people of Bendigo and the events that have shaped their lives. This is our story. 

No other local media has the capacity to connect, engage and ignite discussion like the Bendigo Advertiser. We are the voice of the region; reporting on all sides of the story and giving the public an opportunity to explore the story and contribute to their own thinking. 

Our history is unrivalled, our future exciting. We are more than just a paper. We are digital, mobile and social with the power to share these stories with the world. 

We are part of something big, Fairfax Media is home to Australia's most engaged and valuable audiences. By providing the nation with high quality content, we cater to Australians of all ages and interests. Our networks bring together our trusted brands to capitalise on our ability to deliver diverse audiences to our advertisers.

The exceptional quality of our journalism fosters loyal readership both in print and online and our multi-platform channels encourage our audience to engage with our content through their day. 

The Bendigo Advertiser is also the ideal advertising platform for those wanting to attract an influential and informed audience. We have a range of services from media advice, print and online advertising, strategic features, business listing directory, market research and analytics. 

That's our story; let us help you share yours.

Name: The Sacramento Observer
Description: The Sacramento Observer is an African American-owned weekly newspaper in Sacramento, California.

Name: The State News
Description:
Michigan State University's Independent Voice Since 1909.

The State News and statenews.com are published for the Michigan State University community by MSU students. The mission of The State News is to prepare students for the professional world and beyond.

Name: Rynek Instalacyjny
Description:
Rynek Instalacyjny to nowoczesne czasopismo techniczne dla projektantów instalacji i instalatorów branży wod-kan i HVAC. Publikujemy praktyczne artykuły techniczne i opisy innowacyjnych, pilotażowych instalacji, opisujemy nowe urządzenia i rozwiązania, rozmawiamy z liderami branży na tematy związane z:

    - wentylacją i klimatyzacją,
    - systemami i urządzeniami grzewczymi,
    - sieciami i instalacjami wodociągowymi i 
       kanalizacyjnymi,
    - sterowaniem i optymalizacją pracy instalacji,
      OZE i energooszczędnością. 

Rynek Instalacyjny towarzyszy polskiej branży instalacyjnej od 1993 r., w ciągu roku wydajemy 10 numerów.

Name: The Driven
Description: Welcome to Australia’s premier website for news and analysis about electric vehicles, and the transition to zero carbon transport.

Name: Sindicato dos Jornalistas Profissionais de Minas Gerais
Description:
O Sindicato dos Jornalistas Profissionais de Minas Gerais (SJPMG) atua desde 1945 para garantir melhores condições de trabalho e salários dignos para a classe jornalística. 
  (31) 98798-2198

Avenida Álvares Cabral 400 - Belo Horizonte, Minas Gerais, Brasil.

Name: Intrasipa | groupe Sipa Ouest-France
Description:
Le groupe Sipa Ouest-France est constitué de 6 quotidiens (Ouest-France – 1er quotidien de France -, Le Maine Libre, Le Courrier de l’Ouest, Presse Océan, La Presse de la Manche, 20 Minutes), 92 hebdomadaires locaux rassemblés au sein du groupe Publihebdos, 6 magazines spécialisés (Voiles et voiliers, Bretons, Bretons en Cuisine, Chasse-Marée, Terre de jardins, Voyage à l’Ouest). La diversité des activités du Groupe s’étend également à la publicité multi-supports avec 3 régies publicitaires (Additi Media, Hebdos Communication et Régie Radio Régions), 3 radios locales (Hit West, Océane, Sweet FM), à l’édition de livres. Le Groupe communique également au travers de 5 plateformes numériques : ouest-france.fr, actu.fr, 20minutes.fr, FranceLive.fr, MaVille.com.

Propriété d’une association loi de 1901, l’Association pour le Soutien des Principes de la Démocratie Humaniste (ASPDH), le groupe se distingue par des valeurs fortes et des engagements clairs envers le respect des personnes humaines et des bénéfices exclusivement au service du développement de l’information.

Intrasipa, société d'expertises du Groupe, met à la disposition des filiales des fonctions transverses pointues (Data, Cybersécurité, Protection des données personnelles (RGPD), Recherche et Développement (R&D), Communication groupe, Juridique, Finances, SIRH Paie et administration RH…) qui amènent nos équipes à travailler au service de toutes les entités du Groupe. Intrasipa pilote et accompagne les sociétés du Groupe sur la dimension RSE (Responsabilité Sociétale d’Entreprise) afin d’impulser une dynamique et une vision commune Groupe tout en permettant à chaque société de conduire ses actions localement avec ses collaborateurs.

Name: DAILY SCIENCE
Description: DAILY SCIENCE est un média belge en ligne de vulgarisation scientifique et de diffusion des connaissances fondé en 2014. Chaque jour, accédez gratuitement à un article d’actualité traitant de sciences, de recherches et d’innovations en Belgique !

Name: M@n@gement
Description: M@n@gement is the first open access journal in management, strategy and organization theory. Supported by the AIMS, this well-ranked, double blind peer-reviewed journal has been publishing original research articles improving our understanding of organizational phenomena for more than 20 years. We encourage creative and novel research which relies on new and nontraditional theories, methods, and/or database.

Name: La Notizia
Description:
La Notizia è un quotidiano nazionale fondato e diretto da Gaetano Pedullà, giornalista e opinionista. 
Nasce nel marzo 2013 con una redazione di forte propensione al giornalismo d’inchiesta, 
Particolarmente attento agli avvenimenti economici, politici e della pubblica amministrazione, in particolare al welfare, alle riforme e all'ambiente, 
La Notizia mantiene una sua indipendenza professionale per produrre con efficacia e responsabilità il messaggio giornalistico.

Name: Oklahoma Gazette
Description: Oklahoma's independent news monthly for more than 45 years, Oklahoma Gazette is Oklahoma City's Arts and Entertainment Authority. News coverage includes local politics, business, nonprofit activity, and community groups, individuals and actions that affect Central Oklahoma's quality of life.

Name: Al Qabas Newspaper
Description: Leading Independent Arabic Daily

Name: Tribuna de Andalucía
Description: Periódico regional líder de información política y económica de Andalucía.
