Description:
Broadcasting News Corporation 24 Ltd. A trusted News Agency in Bangladesh.
Web: www.bnc24.com, www.bnc24.net

Name: Technikart
Description:
NEWS - CULTURE - SOCIÉTÉ
Le magazine des influenceurs. 
Impertinent, iconoclaste et indépendant depuis 1991.

Name: Arizona Daily Star
Description: A daily newspaper in Tucson, Ariz. The Arizona Daily Star is the state's second-largest newspaper, covering all of Southeastern Arizona including the outlying suburbs of Oro Valley, Marana, Vail, SaddleBrooke, Catalina, Green Valley, Sahuarita, and Davis-Monthan Air Force Base.

Name: Crash Magazine
Description:
Crash#96 the Resistance  Issue is out !
Crash Magazine is a French independent magazine published every trimester that can be found in all major press stores. It was founded in 1998 by Frank Perrin and Armelle Leturcq. They are both considered part of the new generation of French art critics that left a mark in the 1990s.

Crash arrived on the French market characterized with an element of the unexpected, filled with a deliberate desire to change things: characterized by a minimalist layout and design, it is constituted by challenging avant-garde visuals seeking to emphasize the beauty of things with innovative ideas. Crash worked in close relation with artists such as Air, Daft Punk, Michel Gondry during the emergence of the "French Touch". Since 2000 however, they have shifted their focus towards the "New Generation" such as Sofia Coppola, Phoenix and Super Discount.
Crash Magazine has been considered a platform for rising talent and new artists and its team is internationally recognized. This publication focuses on fashion and cinema amongst other things, fashion representing a cultural phenomenon of society and everything that is driven by it in our time. Crash has been recognized as the only French publication that dares to mix high-end fashion with urban culture, representing the image of a new generation of consumers that has recently emerged.

Crash publishes an English version sold internationally. The average reader (20–45 years old) sees Crash as a reference point that explores the fresh and upcoming trends, styles, culture and lifestyle.

Name: Turun Sanomat
Description:
Turun Sanomat on sitoutumaton uutismedia. Edistämme mielipiteen- ja sananvapautta. Annamme lukijoillemme kokonaiskuvan ympäröivästä yhteiskunnasta ja tuomme maailman lukijoidemme eteen oman alueemme, Varsinais-Suomen, näkökulmasta. Uutistoimintamme perustana ovat luotettavuus, vastuullisuus ja tasapuolisuus. Turun Sanomat on ilmestynyt vuodesta 1905 lähtien.

Pääset uutissisältöjemme pariin painetun lehden lisäksi verkkosivuillamme, uutissovelluksessamme ja näköislehdessämme. Näköislehden voit lukea joko sovelluksella tai selaimessa. Lisäksi voit seurata uutisnostojamme sosiaalisessa mediassa kuten Facebookissa ja Instagramissa.

Tavoitamme eri kanavillamme 379 000 lukijaa viikossa (KMT 2021).

Name: Inside Business
Description:
Inside Business is the source of in-depth local business news coverage in Hampton Roads.  Every week, Inside Business delivers the latest news and analysis, as well as people profiles, expert columns, legal notices, public records, and information on the latest mergers, acquisitions and new products.  There are also frequent special reports with information and analysis on local industries, including banking/finance, commercial real estate, and several others.

In addition, Inside Business produces several annual events, including Top 40 Under 40, Women in Business, Health Care Heroes and Entrepreneurial Excellence.

Name: La Revue de l'Alimentation Animale
Description:
La Revue de l’Alimentation Animale est, depuis 1950, un magazine d’actualités incontournable pour les professionnels de la filière nutrition animale grâce à ses reportages, ses interviews et sa présence sur les salons en France ou à l’international.
Les connaisseurs l'appellent depuis toujours "la revue noire".
Notre équipe de journalistes, experts du secteur, est à l'écoute des fabricants d'aliments, des fabricants d’additifs, des firmes-services, des équipementiers et des fournisseurs.

Name: The Independent Florida Alligator
Description: The Alligator has been the student newspaper for the University of Florida since 1906. The Independent Florida Alligator is the largest student-run newspaper in the United States, with a daily circulation of 14,000 and readership of more than 21,000. The Alligator has been financially and editorially independent from the university since 1973.

Name: Nova Gravity
Description:
NovaGravity was established in 2021.

After the company established to engage in the eCommerce industry and a variety of other services; the activity has recently been shifted to become a NewsWire Agency that focuses on the broadcasting of breaking news stories and U.S. politics.

We reserve the right of Freedom of Speech in any and all of our posted content, and we stand against unlawful Censorship of content.

NovaGravity, LLC is a legally operating company in the U.S. (Washington-Based).

Name: Dagsavisen
Description:
Dagsavisen er en uavhengig avis forankret i arbeiderbevegelsens ideer og verdier.

Vi ønsker å gi deg de viktigste nyhetene, de beste reportasjene og de mest interessante analysene.

Dagsavisen er hovedsakelig eid av Mentor Medier.

Name: Daily FT
Description: The Daily FT is Sri Lanka’s first and only national daily business paper. With its value proposition “Be Empowered”, the Daily FT caters to the new economy of post-war Sri Lanka, with a sectoral focus as well as local and global politics, business, social issues, sports and lifestyle.

Name: Blub World Magazine
Description:
Blub World is an online platform and a print magazine for students in the age group of 13-19 years. We encourage children to share their creativity with us in any form that can be featured online and published in our monthly magazine. We also inspire children to recognize qualities that make them special and pen them in words, to get featured in our special section of ‘Children of Blub World’.

We share every creation like Paintings, Articles, Stories, Poetry, Photographs, Videos of Dance, Drama and Music, to inspiring life stories, achievements, experiences and moments on the Blub World website and our super active social media pages. The most trending posts then get printed and mentioned in our monthly magazine. Each student gets points for posts and engagement on the website and the one with the highest score gets to be ‘The Blubber of the Month’.

A platform ‘Of the Children, For the Children and By the Children’, Blub World aims to connect all teenagers across the world. So share everything that will inspire them.

Name: The African Financial News - TAF News
Description: Provide the most accurate economic and financial information related to africa.

Name: Pensacola News Journal
Description:
The Pensacola News Journal is Northwest Florida's most in-depth source for the latest news and information. 

Based in Pensacola, Fla., our content covers Pensacola, Pensacola Beach, Gulf Breeze, Milton, Pace and other communities in Escambia and Santa Rosa counties.

Our products include the Pensacola News Journal, pnj.com, GoPensacola.com, BellaMagazine.com and others.

Name: Leaders League Benelux
Description:
Leaders League is an international media group founded in 1996 in Paris. Leaders League produces reports and research that executives use to make strategic decisions, as well as organizing top legal and financial events around the world, in global capitals such as Paris, Miami, Milan, Madrid, New York, Brussels and São Paulo.

With 5 global offices and a research covering over 40 countries, Leaders League delivers top level executives the information and the platforms to enhance their business.

Leaders League is dedicated to connecting business leaders throughout the world with market analysis, trending news and expert insights through its International Intelligence Reports, International Conferences and Forums, Media and Digital Products focused in the legal, financial, innovation and technology sectors.

Name: ecommercenews.pl
Description: The first Polish language news site about e-commerce in Germany and Europe. Published by Setup.pl & Händlerbund

Name: EPENSA
Description:
EPENSA, Empresa Periodística Nacional S.A. nace a comienzos de 1962, con el lanzamiento de Correo Tacna, hasta entonces llamado diario Sur. Luego vendría la instalación de plantas en Piura,Arequipa y Huancayo. Dando inicio a una cadena de periódicos, todos llamados Correo. Unos cinco años después nació Ojo, y posteriormente Ajá y El Bocón; cada uno dirigido y pensado para un público distinto, esencialmente emprendedor.

El 2012, con 50 años de labor, EPENSA renueva su identidad corporativa como GRUPO EPENSA,atendiendo las nuevas necesidades de la población y las tendencias del mercado, de la mano de los últimos avances tecnológicos en las comunicaciones.

Name: DefenceReviewAsia
Description:
Defencereviewasia.com is a leading authority in defence reporting in Asia, the fastest growing defence market in the world.

DRA’s editorial team are true experts in their field. Under the editorial direction of Kym Bergmann, regular writers provide unrivalled reporting and analysis and bring great experience, authority and access to senior policy makers in the defence establishment and industries.

The result is current, high quality, original researched editorial with a proven reputation for reliability, credibility and integrity ensuring high value for readers.

Name: St. Galler Tagblatt
Description: Die Gesamtausgabe des «St. Galler Tagblatts» ist die grösste Tageszeitung der Ostschweiz und informiert kompetent, umfassend und lesernah über alles Wissenswerte aus den Bereichen Politik, Wirtschaft, Kultur und Sport. In seinen Regionalausgaben liefert das «St. Galler Tagblatt» fundierte Berichterstattung zu lokalen, regionalen, nationalen und internationalen Themen.

Name: CMOs Magazine
Description: Chief Marketing Officers Magazine (CMOs) is Egypt's first printed and digital publication in both Arabic and English for Marketing, Media and PR Professionals with news, articles and commentary on the industry.

Name: Toiture magazine
Description: Toiture magazine s'intéresse à l'ensemble des produits et matériaux destinés à la toiture : nouveautés, solutions techniques, rénovation, ensemble des solutions et produits d'isolation et d'étanchéité, couverture, chantiers etc...

Name: Centroamerica & Caribe IT
Description:
Centroamérica & Caribe IT nace para cubrir la ausencia de un medio IT que distribuya físicamente 10.000 ejemplares para alcanzar a todos los mayoristas, retailers e integradores de El Salvador, Honduras, Nicaragua, Panamá, Guatemala, República Dominicana, Jamaica, Trinidad y Tobago, Puerto Rico, Costa Rica, Barbados, Belize, Curazao y Saint Marteen. Así mismo se distribuye en Miami ya todos los mayoristas y fabricantes locales con interés en la región.
Es el medio ideal para que tanto fabricantes como mayoristas con interés en la región puedan comunicar sus estrategias, lanzamientos, eventos y ofertas en una publicación de frecuencia mensual con un tamaño tabloide de alta calidad de impresión para lograr el impacto y el ROI necesario.
Secciones especificas como Networking, Seguridad, Movilidad, Accesorios, Gaming, Almacenamiento, Impresión y Servidores hablan de la amplitud editorial de Centroamérica & Carite IT.

Name: Publicaciones del Sur, S. A.
Description:
Publicaciones del Sur es el proyecto de comunicación más amplio de cuantos se han creado en Andalucía en el transcurso de la última década. Fundado a partir de un concepto básico -realzar la información local-, su punto de inicio fue la creación de una red de publicaciones locales que se expandió desde la provincia de Cádiz a las demás provincias andaluzas hasta ponerse en el punto de mira del 70 por ciento de la población andaluza. Tras más de 30 años de labor editorial, Publicaciones del Sur cuenta en la actualidad con sesenta ediciones locales impresas -de diferente periodicidad y bajo la marca Información- y un proyecto de futuro cuyos pilares fundamentales son la prensa gratuita, a través de la marca Viva, y el digital con el Grupo Online Publicaciones del Sur compuesto de sites de tanta envergadura como andaluciainformacion.es, ondaluz.tv, viruji.es e irispress.es, así como otros muchos canales temáticos y bien posicionados en sus ciudades de referencia, que se van actualizando de forma permanente, con el objetivo de convertirnos en el grupo andaluz más importante de la red nacional. 

La clave de su trayectoria profesional y empresarial radica, precisamente, en el posicionamiento informativo alcanzado durante todo este tiempo, basado en una creciente expansión por los municipios más importantes de Andalucía, en los que se ha convertido en pionero y referente a la hora de contribuir a la modernización de sus ciudades con la dotación de un medio de comunicación y expresión propios. Un posicionamiento que convierte al grupo en un documentado analista de la situación socioeconómica y política de las comarcas y ciudades más relevantes de Andalucía a la hora de planificar cualquier estrategia de comunicación al servicio de otras instituciones y particulares.

Name: PLANET TIMES
Description: Média des solutions durables.

Name: Acadie Nouvelle
Description: Rejoignant plus de 50 000 lecteurs quotidiennement et plus de 81 000 par semaine, l’Acadie Nouvelle est le seul quotidien indépendant et francophone en Atlantique. Les contenus de ce média de référence se déclinent sur plusieurs plateformes: édition numérique, web et papier.  Fondé en 1984, le journal est un outil de communication indispensable pour la communauté francophone et acadienne du Nouveau-Brunswick. Aujourd’hui, trente ans plus tard, le site Web acadienouvelle.com reçoit en moyenne 220 000 visites uniques par mois, une fierté pour la communauté entière et un puissant véhicule publicitaire pour percer le marché francophone.

Name: LEADER RÉUNION MAGAZINE
Description:
Depuis 28 ans, Leader Réunion apporte chaque mois, aux professionnels de la distribution et du commerce organisé les informations et les outils qui les aident dans la pratique de leurs métiers.
Il vous aide à cerner les stratégies des enseignes et celles des industriels, à disposer d’éléments concrets sur les tendances de consommation, à partager l’expérience des entrepreneurs et le succès de leurs entreprises, à suivre les lancements des nouveaux produits.
Chaque mois, il sélectionne pour vous le meilleur de l’actualité de l’univers commercial et marketing.

Name: The Stray Ferret
Description: Online journalism site providing a mix of daily news and investigation into issues within the Harrogate District (Harrogate, Knaresborough, Ripon, Boroughbridge, Pateley Bridge and Masham)

Name: News & Record
Description: The News & Record in Greensboro, NC.  www.News-Record.com is a leading news and information website for the Piedmont Triad area.  Guilford County and Greensboro are the primary focus.  News & Record newspaper is a leading daily newspaper in the Piedmont Triad area in North Carolina.

Name: Torstar Digital (Torstar Corp.)
Description:
Torstar Corporation is a leading Canadian media and data company that aims to help people better understand the world and each other.

Built on a long and distinguished history in daily and community newspapers and nationally recognized digital businesses, The Torstar Group of Companies includes The Toronto Star, The Hamilton Spectator, the Waterloo Region Record and other regional daily news brands, as well as 75 community news brands across Ontario with a number of digital properties including eyeReturn, VerticalScope, Homefinder.ca and Save.ca.

Our flagship newspaper, the Toronto Star, was founded in 1892, and its website, thestar.com, is now one of the most-visited newspaper sites in the country.

Today over 2500 dedicated employees work together to continuously improve how we serve our customers and clients and report on the most important stories affecting people's lives.

Name: Tallahassee Democrat
Description:
The Tallahassee Democrat is Tallahassee’s only daily newspaper, covering local news in Leon and surrounding counties in Northwest Florida and South Georgia. In addition to our daily newspaper, we also publish weekly and monthly publications that provide targeted coverage of selected subjects and are continually developing our online presence at Tallahassee.com. We are a member of distinguished company – Gannett Co., Inc., a worldwide network of newspapers, broadcast companies and other communications-related interests.

As an equal opportunity employer, we recognize and appreciate the benefits of diversity in the workplace. This is representative in the recognition that Gannett has received from: Working Mother as one of the 100 Best Companies for Working Mothers, Fortune magazine as one of the 50 Best Companies for Asians, Blacks and Hispanics, and Working Woman as number five in its inaugural ranking of the Top 25 Public Companies for Executive Women.

Name: India News
Description:
A Digital Newspaper. [India] We provide digital news across world [India].
If you have any complaints, wish to submit news, or are interested in collaboration, please email us at socialfree99@gmail.com. Alternatively, you can also send a message directly to our page.

Name: Market Ethics
Description:
Launched under Mirnide by co-founder Namrata Pethakar, Market Ethics is a platform designed to uplift the market ecosystem by spotlighting real, credible brands while challenging fake ones. Our mission is to build market value, brand trust, and business clarity.

tr.ee/7gsnSz

We’re here to keep you informed, inspired, and empowered in the world of business.
 Follow our Instagram handle launching June 9, 2025, for insights that matter.

Name: The Observer
Description: Union and Wallowa counties' news leader

Name: The Daily Princetonian
Description: The Daily Princetonian seeks to inform and engage our readers by delivering reliable, timely and accurate news and commentary relevant to the Princeton community. We aim to drive the campus conversation, uphold high journalistic standards and embrace changing methods of reporting and sharing information.

Name: Waco Tribune-Herald
Description: The Waco Tribune-Herald is your source for breaking local news, in-depth reporting and great photos by the most experienced journalists in Central Texas.

Name: ΜΑΚΕΔΟΝΙΚΕΣ ΑΓΓΕΛΙΕΣ - MAKEDONIKES AGGELIES
Description:

Name: The Tattva News
Description: Tattva stands for truth.

Name: Hermes Comunicacions, SA
Description:
Hermes Comunicacions, SA

Publisher of "El Punt Avui" informative newspapers and "Catalonia Today" monthly magazine, among others, in Catalonia. All of them in Catalan language, except for Catalonia Today, published in English for the ex-pat community.

It also includes the television channel "El Punt Avui TV", which is broadcast in Catalonia on TDT.

Name: The St. Louis American
Description:
The St. Louis American Newspaper is Missouri's largest, most widely-read weekly newspaper targeted to African Americans. The American publishes more than 70,000 copies every Thursday, and distributes them, free, at more than 845 locations throughout St. Louis.

Continuously published, without missing a single issue, for 87 years, The St. Louis American newspaper has emerged as the leading, most-trusted voice of the area’s African-American community, and has extended its reach to become a major multi-platform media entity in Missouri. In 2012, The St. Louis American became the single largest weekly newspaper in the entire state of Missouri.

A State of Missouri and City of St. Louis certified Minority Business Enterprise (MBE), founded in 1928, The St. Louis American newspaper is rapidly gaining more and more local, regional and national recognition and acclaim.

Over the past three years alone, the St. Louis American has garnered nearly 200 local, regional, and national  awards for excellence in journalism and design, as well as commitment to the community.

Name: Markaðurinn
Description: Markaðurinn er fylgirit Fréttablaðsins sem fjallar um viðskipti og fjármál. Daglegar fréttir og umfjallanir á Markadurinn.is. Markaðurinn hefur fylgt Fréttablaðinu alla miðvikudaga síðan árið 2006.

Name: La Voz de Asturias
Description: La Voz de Asturias es el medio de comunicación digital nativo del Principado de Asturias. Su cabecera fue fundada en 1923. En 2016, se integra en el Grupo Corporación Voz de Galicia para continuar siendo un referente para todos los asturianos.

Name: Pivot Québec
Description: Pivot est un média d’information indépendant et progressiste. Nous allions rigueur journalistique et critique sociale pour mettre en lumière les enjeux politiques qui définissent notre époque.

Name: Journal Market
Description: Créé en 1969, Journal Market, dédié aux marchés de l’équipement de l’habitat, a rejoint en août 2021 le groupe L’Officiel (L’Officiel des Cuisinistes, Sushi Communication). En contact direct et permanent avec l’ensemble des acteurs du secteur (meuble, siège, literie, cuisine), aussi bien les fabricants que les distributeurs, nous traitons chaque jour l’actualité et l’évolution du marché afin de mieux vous informer.

Name: POC Media
Description: POC Media est un service d'informations sur les innovations de rupture. Nous permettons aux responsables R&D d'identifier les start-up et les chercheurs les plus innovants, et d'anticiper les grandes tendances technologiques.

Name: LES CONNECTEURS
Description: Un nouveau mag gratuit, animé et interactif, pour tout savoir sur la révolution tech et rester « connecté » aux vrais enjeux de société en lien avec la techno, afin de prendre part aux échanges collectifs.

Name: Wick Communications
Description: Wick Communications, a family-owned media company, operates digital publications, newspapers, and speciality magazines across 10 Western states, from Alaska to Minnesota.

Name: The NT News
Description: We are the Northern Territory's premier news outlet.

Name: Maspormas
Description:
Si eres fan de la Ciudad de México, te entusiasma la cultura, las actividades al aire libre y te encantaría descubrir los secretos que tiene por ofrecer esta gran metrópoli, Máspormás es el medio para ti.
 

A través de nuestras diferentes plataformas nos esforzamos por generar contenido de la más alta calidad, colocándonos en medio de la ciudad y comunicando día a día todo lo que la capital tiene para ofrecer, generando una propuesta a-temporal distinta a la de cualquier medio tradicional.


Ser “El medio de la ciudad” no es una labor sencilla, llevamos más de seis años con un proyecto muy ambicioso que reúne lo mejor de dos mundos: la periodicidad de la prensa tradicional, con el contenido de guía generado en publicaciones de carácter mensual. 


No te pierdas de lunes a viernes la propuesta que Máspormás tiene para ti, recogiendo tu ejemplar en uno de nuestros 183 puntos de distribución alrededor de la Ciudad y conviértete en el mejor guía de turistas de tu capital.


Máspormás, En/ El Medio de la Ciudad



Redes: @maspormas

Name: Côté Maison
Description:
Côté Maison édite les magazines Côté Sud, Côté Paris, Côté Ouest, Côté Est, le site Cotemaison, et organise les Salons Vivre Côté Sud à Aix en Provence et à Montpellier.
La 25ème édition du salon de Vivre Côté Sud d'Aix-en-Provence aura lieu du 30 mai au 2 juin 2025 dans le Parc Jourdan au centre d'Aix-en-Provence.
La 1ère édition du Salon Vivre Côté Sud se tiendra à Montpellier du 13 au 15 juin 2025 sur la mythique Promenade Royale du Peyrou au coeur de Montpellier. 
Retrouvez-nous sur notre site internet, et sur notre compte Instagram: @salonvivrecotesud

Name: VK Media AB
Description:
Regional mediacompany in northern Sweden. Owned by the liberal trust VK Press

VK Media publish two newspapers; VK and Folkbladet with their websites vk.se and folkbladet.nu.

VK is the northern Swedens largest newspaper and vk.se is on of Swedens most successful websites.

VK Media is situated in Umeå, Västerbotten county.

Name: The Knowledge
Description:
The Knowledge is a daily email with over 140,000 subscribers. Every day, we scour hundreds of newspapers, websites and social media outlets, and pick out only the very best bits: surprising views, viral videos, quirky facts and always a pithy quote at the end. Best of all, the whole thing takes just five minutes to read.

Try it for free: https://www.theknowledge.com/

Name: Secours Mag
Description: Secours Mag is a professional publication reserved for professionals in the field of rescue, emergency care and prevention. This magazine is published by Oxygène Editions.

Name: Groupe Geomedia
Description:
Geomedia est un acteur pluri-média de référence avec des médias référents : Plurielle.ma, L’Officiel (Print et Digital), et H24Info.ma (digital), les sites du groupe ont totalisé près de 25 millions de visites en 2019. Le groupe possède également des entités dans la production de contenus (G’Prod), le marketing direct (Geocible) et une toute nouvelle cellule dans la data (G’Target) lancée en juin dernier.
Geomedia propose également des solutions de marketing à la performance avec des campagnes digitales capables de générer des prises de rendez-vous pour ses annonceurs, principalement pour l’automobile et l’immobilier.
Avec le lancement de AssurH24.ma, Geomedia marque son entrée dans une diversification « hors-médias ». Le groupe déploie un plan de croissance accéléré avec le développement de nouveaux sites de services d’ici fin 2020.

Name: جريدة الجمهورية - شركة الاعلانات المصرية
Description: مـؤسسـة دار التحريـر للطبع والنشر " جريــدة الـجمهـوريـة " هي صحيفة مصرية أسستها حكومة ثورة يوليو في عام 1954 لتكون صوت الثورة وأشرف عليها أحد الثوار وهو محمد أنور السادات

Name: Regió7
Description: T'apropem l'actualitat. De la Catalunya Central al món. Opina, debat i comenta amb nosaltres.

Name: DUCROM EDITORA E COMUNICACAO LTDA
Description:
Por ser uma região comercial e de grandes investimentos, há a necessidade de uma maior exploração midiática. É para isso que surge o Jornal da Cidade – Brooklin, jornal quinzenal, que trará as principais notícias do Brooklin e arredores nas mais diversas áreas – política, economia, esporte, cultura, turismo, imóvel, educação e tantas outras – tratando esse nobre bairro como se fosse uma verdadeira cidade.

O jornal nasceu após diversas reuniões entre os jornalistas, José Antônio de Oliveira, fundador e presidente do Jornal da Cidade – Pindamonhangaba e Jornal da Cidade – Taubaté, selo que já tem mais de 30 anos de sucesso no Vale do Paraíba, e Duca Reis, comentarista e repórter esportivo da Rádio Gazeta AM 890. Para completar a parceria, o jovem empreendedor, Roberto Munhoes Jr.

Name: AsiaTechDaily
Description: AsiaTechDaily is a digital media platform that covers news and stories related to the technology startup ecosystem in Asia. It features articles, interviews, and insights about emerging startups, entrepreneurs, investors, and trends shaping the technology landscape in the region. AsiaTechDaily aims to provide valuable content for those interested in the Asian tech startup scene, including investors, entrepreneurs, and startup enthusiasts.

Name: Independent Media (Pty) Ltd
Description:
Independent Media is one of South Africa’s leading multi-platform content companies. Our stable of credible, quality publications include 20 of the country’s most prominent newspapers, with an additional 15 Cape Community newspapers.

The Star in Johannesburg, Cape Times and Cape Argus in Cape Town and The Mercury in Durban are amongst the few that are firmly entrenched in millions of households throughout South Africa. 

This includes, our successful native language newspaper,  I'solezwe lesiXhosa, that speaks to  3, 5 million Xhosas in the Eastern Cape. 

All of Independent Media's newspaper content can be accessed on IOL [Independent Media's digital mothership, www.iol.co.za].

Further to that, we have crossed South African borders to extend to millions of readers within the larger parts of Africa with our fast growing newspaper, African Independent. 

Independent Media is geared for growth.  

With the adoption of best global practice, investment in state-of-the art technology and the employment of highly skilled individuals, the company aims to become the leading content provider across media platforms in Africa, adopting the digital first, print best culture to offer our established diverse loyal base an uncompromising approach to delivering fresh, original content to its audiences, with the aid of cutting edge journalism from South Africa’s most talented news staff - that speaks to every South African.

Corporate: www.independentmedia.co.za
News: www.iol.co.za

Name: Global Press Journal
Description: Award-winning, nonprofit organization that delivers accurate, ethical reporting from some of the world's least-covered places.

Name: Vutivi Business News
Description: Vutivi is a digital business news platform that will serve the Small Medium Micro Enterprises in the form of writing stories that will be informative about their sector. We pledge to deliver a commercially sustainable, world-class digital financial and business news service that is a must-read while being responsive to readership needs and tailor-making packages for SMMEs.

Name: El Pulso
Description:
El periódico EL PULSO es un medio de comunicación sin ánimo de lucro, especializado en el sector de la salud en Colombia, que circula a nivel nacional con 4 000 ejemplares al mes y recibe en su página web más de 25 000 visitas mensuales en promedio.

El periódico fue fundado por el Hospital San Vicente Fundación el 22 de mayo de 1998. Desde hace 23 años se ha convertido en vocero del sector salud en Antioquia teniendo una penetración e impacto nacional en la comunidad involucrada con el área de la salud en Colombia.

Name: The Reporter Ethiopia
Description: The Reporter is a weekly English newspaper published by Media and Communications Center with the motto “Free Press, Free Speech, Free Spirit”

Name: Brisse4africa
Description: #BRISSE est une entreprise d’information multimédia dédiée à la promotion de l’économie africaine. #BRISSE propose également une plateforme de conseils et de B2B pour connecter les acteurs de l’économie en Afrique et les aider à développer leurs affaires. Créée le 7 Mars 2019 par Benjamin AMBELA , #BRISSE s’engage à fournir une couverture complète, indépendante et précise de l’actualité à son public. #BRISSE est entièrement financée par un fond personnel. Apolitique, notre mission est d’accompagner les acteurs de l’économie en Afrique.

Name: The Florentine
Description:
The English news magazine in Florence, Italy: news, classifieds, events, art+culture, food+wine, lifestyle and travel.

In 2005, The Florentine was launched as a grassroots news magazine for the vast English-speaking community in Florence, Italy. Nita and Tony Tucker, U.S.-born expats, were surprised not to find an English newspaper. They partnered with Italian firm B’Gruppo srl to make, print and distribute the paper. When the Tuckers moved away two years later, the rest of the team remained intact and they continue to publish The Florentine to this day.

Today, The Florentine is published 12 times a year: the magazine is distributed for free from 130+ points in Florence and Tuscany and since 2015 also in New York City. We have a circulation of 10,000 copies per month and more than 800 subscribers (paper and digital) worldwide.

The Florentine Press publishes books about Florence's hidden secrets, the city's art, language and culture, while The Florentine + provides translation and language consultancy services.

Our sister channels include The Tuscan Times, Visit Prato and The FLR - The Florentine Literary Review.

Name: South Africa OnLive
Description:
Founded in 2018 and on-line since 2020, the about digital magazine provides the best content for South Africa County residents and visitors alike—including arts, entertainment, food, dining, style... Etc.

We cover a wide range of topics from politics to sport. We believe what sets us apart is that we deliver news differently. While we hold ourselves to the utmost journalistic integrity of being truthful, we encourage a writing style that is acerbic and conversational, when appropriate.

Name: The Vanderbilt Hustler
Description: The Vanderbilt Hustler is the university's official student news source. The website, vanderbilthustler.com, is updated daily with news, stories and events. The Hustler was founded in 1888 and has since served the Vanderbilt community, run completely by a staff of students.

Name: Koï
Description: Koï, le premier média des cultures et communautés asiatiques.

Name: TURBULANCES Magazine
Description: Parce que vous devez maîtriser le secteur de l'ambulance en  pleine mutation, Turbulances vous apporte une analyse de l'actualité du Transport Sanitaire (Réformes, réglementation, formation…). Retrouvez tous les trimestres les tendances de la profession.

Description:

Asian Standard Bradford

Asian Standard North East
Asian Standard Leeds

Asian Standard Sheffield

Asian Standard Midlands
Asian Standard London

Name: Daily Echo
Description:
The Southern Daily Echo newspaper, which serves Southampton and Hampshire, six days a week, has brought the latest news and sport to the community for 135 years.

As well as the Echo, there is also the dailyecho.co.uk which provides breaking news 24 hours a day and The Sports Pink, which includes unrivalled coverage of sport across the county.

As well as the papers and website, it is possible to follow the Echo at twiiter.com/dailyecho and facebook.com/dailyecho to ensure you are always fully informed of what is going on in and around Southampton.

For more information or to get in touch, please visit www.dailyecho.co.uk.

Name: Herald-Tribune Media Group
Description:
The Herald-Tribune Media Group was founded in 1925 with the mission to be the most trusted and valued source of news and information in the Sarasota-Bradenton-Venice, Florida market. The Herald-Tribune offers the most comprehensive local daily reporting in the region through print and digital news products, advancing our role as the information leader in Southwest Florida.

With the daily paper reaching more than 260,000 readers each week and HeraldTribune.com viewers absorbing nearly 10 million pages each month, Herald-Tribune products capture the attention of an educated, dynamic audience.  With daily, weekly, monthly printed products available as well as a dynamic 24/7 niche sites, the Herald-Tribune offers multiple resources for its readers.

In 2011, the Herald-Tribune was awarded the Pulitzer Prize for Investigative Reporting for its coverage of Florida’s insurance industry.  The organization was also nominated in the same category in 2010 and 2008.

The Herald-Tribune serves as a leading community steward, averaging more than $1.5 million annually in sponsorship partnerships with educational institutions, literacy efforts, human services agencies, arts organizations and animal rescue groups as well as business groups, chambers of commerce and more.  The Herald-Tribune’s primary outreach is the Season of Sharing fund, which is dedicated to raising money to assist people on the brink of homelessness.  Started in 2000 by the Herald-Tribune in partnership with the Community Foundation of Sarasota County, Season of Sharing has raised and distributed more than $13 million dollars in Sarasota, Manatee, Charlotte and DeSoto counties.

To View Current Career Opportunities Visit:
http://HeraldTribune.com/jobs and enter in "Herald Tribune"

Name: Landbouwleven
Description:
The weekly newspaper for Belgian farmers. 

Our French-speaking collegues: Le Sillon Belge

Name: Morgenbladet
Description: Morgenbladet er en uavhengig avis om politikk, kultur og forskning.

Name: Equip-Prod
Description: Magazine des équipements industriels diffusé mensuellement à 20000 abonnés au format papier et à 28000 abonnés au format numérique, Equip'prod propose des articles de fond, des cas d'application et des reportages dans les secteurs du ferroviaire, de l’aéronautique, du médicale, de la microtechnique, des énergies...et expose les innovations dans le travail du métal, outils coupants, tôlerie, métrologie, équipements, robotique, plasturgie...

Name: Toronto Star
Description: The Toronto Star is Canada’s largest daily newspaper and is read in print and across desktop, mobile and tablet platforms by more than 6 million readers every week.  Online, thestar.com is one of the most-visited newspaper websites in Canada.   The Star's basic aim as a news organization is to engage in the full and frank dissemination of news and opinion, and to do so working within the highest standards of journalistic integrity.  Our core mission is to focus public attention on injustices of all kinds and on reforms designed to correct them.

Name: Palatinate
Description:
Palatinate is the official student newspaper of Durham University and winner of Best Student Publication 2021. 
Founded in 1948, it is one of Britain's oldest student publications. The paper is published on a fortnightly basis in term-time, with a full-colour print run of 4,000, reaching student readers. In 2008, Palatinate launched Indigo, an arts and features pull-out supplement, which also has online content. Our Editorial Board is made up of full-time Durham students. It offers fair, unbiased, and unrivalled coverage of Durham and national student news.

Name: Grupo O Otimista de Comunicação
Description:
Otimismo que move e transforma

No Grupo Otimista de Comunicação, não apenas informamos — conectamos, interpretamos e impulsionamos. Nascemos digitais, crescemos no impresso e seguimos inovando, sempre pautados pela credibilidade e pelo olhar propositivo.

Acreditamos no impacto positivo da informação e no poder do jornalismo para transformar realidades. Essa é a nossa essência. Esse é o nosso compromisso.

Name: 01NET magazine
Description:
01NET est le magazine bimensuel incontournable pour les passionnés de technologie comme pour le grand public. Avec une diffusion de 54 850 exemplaires et une audience de près de 3,9 millions de lecteurs (source ACPM), notre mission est de rendre la tech accessible et compréhensible. Nos équipes testent, analysent et comparent les dernières innovations, offrant des guides pratiques et indépendants pour accompagner chacun dans ses choix high-tech.

Retrouvez dans chaque numéro des dossiers complets, des comparatifs rigoureux et des conseils d’experts pour vous aider à rester informé et à tirer le meilleur des technologies du quotidien.

 Suivez-nous pour des mises à jour régulières sur l’actualité tech, nos dernières publications et les tendances du numérique !

Vous y découvrirez :
- des tests et de comparatifs des dernières nouveautés matérielles (ordinateurs, smartphones, tablettes, imprimantes, objets connectés...)
- des conseils pratiques pour se dépanner et en faire plus avec Windows, Mac, Android, iOS et Windows Mobile.
- des enquêtes et dossier pour comprendre la transformation digitale de la société, de l’enseignement, du monde du travail... et de votre quotidien ! 
- l’actualité de celles et ceux qui font la technologie.

Tout cela est à découvrir dans vos kiosques, papier et numériques, un mercredi sur deux.

Name: Trinidad and Tobago Newsday
Description: The Trinidad and Tobago Newsday is one of the largest newspapers in Trinidad and Tobago, with focus on sharing the truth, telling real stories and educating our citizens.

Name: InsideMagazine
Description: Quotidiano online dedicato alla New Economy: innovazione, tecnologia, iniziative, eventi, interviste ai veri protagonisti dell'Italia che cambia.

Name: Neo Radar
Description:
Neo Radar is an international content portal about the world of innovation.

It is the result of a partnership between Neo Ventures, a corporate accelerator that performs and executes innovative projects with large companies, with Diários Associados, the company responsible for Portal Uai, the Estado de Minas newspaper, Correio Brasiliense newspaper, among other communication vehicles.

In the Portal are posted international news, concepts, trends and analysis of facts about the segment of innovation and technology. In addition to the Neo team, some columnists collaborate with Portal: founders of startups, scientists, investors and key players in the innovation ecosystem.

The goal of the Portal is to inform, share ideas and inspire people with stories, cases, surveys, data and qualified information that can contribute to the day to day business, conduct studies and more.

Name: Metro US
Description:
Metro is the #1 free daily newspaper in New York, Boston, and Philadelphia. Contact us at advertising@metro.us or call 212-457-7735 and sign up to our newsletter: 

Metro is a free daily newspaper written and designed for young and ambitious professionals.  Designed for a 20-minute read, the paper gives Metropolitans all they need to know, during their morning commutes. Local, national and international news and colorful features are presented without any bias, but showcase a proudly urban attitude and style.

Metro helps brands to connect with an exclusive audience through non-traditional, cost-efficient solutions - in print, online and outdoor.

Metro US is part of Metro International,  the inventor of the modern free daily newspaper model. With over 18 million daily readers in more than 100 major cities across Europe, North & South America and Asia, Metro is the world's largest global newspaper.

Name: The Pacifican
Description:
The Pacifican has been the weekly student newspaper at the University of the Pacific in Stockton, California since 1908.  

Get involved today!
Our weekly meetings are held every Thursday at 12 PM in the Smith Lounge of Grace Covell. All Pacific students are welcome to come and get involved!


General Information
Follow us on Twitter @ThePacifican
Like us on Facebook at Facebook.com/thepacifican

Name: Alpes & Midi
Description:
Alpes & Midi est l'hebdomadaire des Hautes- Alpes et de la vallée de l'Ubaye. 

Alpes & Midi est habilité pour la parution des annonces judiciaires et légales dans le département des Hautes-Alpes.

Alpes & Midi tient à la disposition de ses lecteurs un site internet et une application mobile pour tablette et smartphone.

Name: Mes Plaisirs Magazine
Description: Magazine présentant des articles en lien avec les loisirs, la santé, la psychologie, l'environnement, l'économie, le bien-être et plus encore! Les archives sont consultables gratuitement par tous. Nous vous invitons à vous abonner gratuitement et bien sur nous suivre.

Name: Grupo AM
Description: The leading newsmedia company in the Bajío region, in central Mexico. Reaching print readers under our AM and Al Día brands in the states of Guanajuato, Michoacán and Jalisco, and a growing Spanish-speaking audience at AM.com.mx

Name: La Tribune de Marrakech
Description:
A chaque parution, la Tribune de Marrakech, leader de la presse gratuite, plonge ses milliers de lecteurs au cœur de toute l’actualité marrakchie, avec un parti-pris : montrer et raconter l’actualité sous l’angle “conseil d’amis à partager avec ceux qu’on apprécie”. La Tribune de Marrakech valorise les richesses de la vie marrakchie à travers les thématiques de ses rubriques : l’agenda culturel, les portraits des gens qui “font la ville”, les meilleures tables, où boire un verre et sortir danser, le shopping malin, les bons plans beauté, l’immobilier, l’architecture, la déco, le sport et les loisirs, et bien sur les interviews de célébrités internationales de passage.
La Tribune de Marrakech est le support idéal pour communiquer auprès des Marrakchis. Elle est le magazine que l’on guette, celui que l’on a plaisir à lire, que l’on emporte partout, que l’on passe à ses proches et dans lequel on veut figurer.
 
Son grand format tabloïd, son esthétisme visuel et sa qualité d’impression valorisent les annonces publicitaires. Une visibilité optimale grâce à une distribution professionnelle et maîtrisée à travers un circuit sélectif et diversifié de plus de 400 points (commerçants, hôtels, riads, Spas et salons de coiffure, restaurants, galeries d’art...) sélectionnés pour leur notoriété, leur fréquentation et leur réputation.

Name: PT Temprina Media Grafika
Description: Temprina Media Grafika di dirikan pada tahun 1996 dan merupakan bagian dari Jawapos Group yang bergerak di bidang Jasa Percetakan dan Packaging.Produk-produk percetakan seperti Buku, Majalah, Koran, Al-Qur'an dan Packaging, merupakan hasil utama perusahaan kami yang di produksi dengan dukungan mesin-mesin dan tenaga ahli dalam bidang Grafika. Dalam Memenuhi segala kebutuhan cetakan Anda, kami menjamin pelayanan "ONE STOP PRINTING", di dukung oleh jaringan percetakan yang tersebar di 9 kota di Pulau Jawa dan Bali.

Name: GEOPOLITICS.FR
Description:
Journal en ligne - articles en accès libre, d'autres payants.
Analyse des questions politiques, internationales et de défense.
Ligne gaullo-chiraquienne.
Journal contributif, tous les auteurs sont bienvenus et peuvent soumettre une tribune.
Intéressement des auteurs pour les articles payants.

Name: Diario El Sur, Concepción
Description: Único medio de comunicación impreso de la Región, continuamos escribiendo la historia del Biobío.

Name: Manual do Usuário
Description: O Manual do Usuário é uma publicação digital independente que cobre tecnologia em ritmo “slow web”. Novos conteúdos às sextas-feiras.

Name: Greater Fort Wayne Business Weekly
Description:
The Greater Fort Wayne Business Weekly (GFWBW) is Northeast Indiana’s most trusted source for business news, including health care, real estate, technology, government, utilities, legal, sports businesses, the arts community, non-profit organizations and more in the 16 counties of Northeast Indiana and Northwest Ohio. 
Through www.FWBusiness.com, our daily email newsletter, the three additional KPC Media Group websites and newsletters AND our weekly print newspaper published every Friday, readers get the latest news headlines plus in-depth stories about Northeast Indiana businesses and the people who run them. 
Subscribe to The Greater Fort Wayne Business Weekly’s Premium digital+print and receive unlimited access to FWBusiness.com and all of the above plus our annual “Book of Lists,” digital downloads of our Top lists, breaking news 24/7, digital edition of the print edition, and reduced or free tickets for in-person Events and Webinars!  
We present a series of recognition programs annually which are “must attend” events for networking, including:
-	“Forty Under 40” which recognizes rising stars in our business community; 
-	“The Northeast Indiana Innovation Awards” which highlight creative talent and business ideas;
-	“The Northeast Indiana Manufacturing Awards” and annual special publications titled, “Salute to Industry”
-	“The Northeast Indiana Education Awards”
-	“The Northeast Indiana Influential Women”
(GFWBW) also hosts more than a dozen business webinars annually. 
Learn more and purchase tickets to our events, and other Expos and events offered by KPC Media Group in Northeast Indiana on our events website at www.kpcevents buzz.com.

Name: Iltalehti
Description: Iltalehti is one of the leading tabloids in Finland with strong lifestyle contents. Iltalehti is part of Alma Media.

Name: Reading Eagle Company
Description:
If you are …

A new business owner - You want more foot traffic, more calls, more sales.

Name: Multipublicações
Description:
A primeira aposta do Grupo Multipublicações foi a revista marketeer, fundada em 1996. Actualmente, a marketeer é a referência das revistas de estratégia e marketing em Portugal.

Em 2006 foi adquirida a Executive Digest e relançada no mercado, em Abril desse mesmo ano, após um hiato de 12 meses.

Em 2008 o Grupo Multipublicações alargou novamente o seu portefólio, desta vez com a licensing da revista Premiere, tendo o número 1 da II série ido para as bancas em Outubro.

Com este conjunto de títulos, o Grupo Multipublicações afirma-se no mercado de imprensa como uma referência na publicação de revistas na área de Economia, Negócios, Marketing e Cinema. 

A revista Hoteis & Viagens foi o mais recente lançamento do Grupo e pretende preencher o segmento das revistas de viagens, com uma oferta diferenciadora em hóteis e resorts de luxo.

The Daily Free Press is distributed free at more than 50 sites on Boston University’s Charles River Campus. Those not close to Boston University can purchase subscriptions, which are mailed weekly to addresses within the continental United States. Please email board@dailyfreepress.com for more information.

European Business Magazine (EBM) is a leading pan-European publication delivering trusted insight, data-driven analysis and executive-level reporting on the forces shaping Europe’s business landscape. In a world where technology, digital communication and globalisation are accelerating faster than ever, EBM provides clarity, context and high-quality journalism for decision-makers across the continent.

Our bi-monthly magazine and digital platforms keep entrepreneurs, investors and corporate leaders ahead of the curve — combining in-depth reporting with real-time updates across email, newsletters, mobile and social media. Wherever European business professionals are, EBM meets them with intelligent, relevant, and uncensored coverage.

Our Editorial Coverage Includes:
• Big data, AI & digital transformation
• Fintech, payments & emerging financial technologies
• Alternative investment strategies & wealth management
• Banking, capital markets & corporate finance
• Aviation, logistics & global mobility
• Property, real estate & infrastructure
• Economic reports across all European regions
• FDI, trade flows & cross-border investment
• CEO interviews, leadership insights & executive commentary
• Entrepreneur features, startup ecosystems & innovation trends
• Lifestyle, travel & culture for Europe’s business community

Our journalists report with independence and clarity, bringing readers the stories behind the headlines — with analysis that is sharp, uncensored and relevant to the realities of today’s European economy.

From executive education and leadership development to foreign direct investment and macro-economic trends, European Business Magazine is essential reading for anyone connected to Europe’s business ecosystem.

Website: https://europeanbusinessmagazine.com

Name: Seattle Weekly
Description:
Through deeply reported stories, stirring critiques, and insightful interviews, Seattle Weekly connects its readers to the doers, thinkers, businesses, and entertainers that shape this city and give
it life. And we connect our readers to each other by acting as a platform for robust debates about the most important political, business and cultural stories of the moment.

But we do more than host those debates. We aim to shape them through dogged reporting and artful storytelling that speaks to an independent, thoughtful readership. We report on those
Seattleites in the centers of power with a particular focus on the distance between what they say and what they do. We listen to the concerns of residents in the midst of the often exciting and
sometimes unnerving transformations at play in the city. And we give voice to our neighbors on the margins, lifting up their stories for the powerful to hear.

We also poke fun at the absurdities that confound us, celebrate the art and music that moves us, explore the astounding natural world that surrounds us, and revel in the food and drink that fills us
up.

Seattle is a vibrant and complex city with a deep history and a bright future. Seattle Weekly's readers are able to see both clearly, carrying with them an understanding of this place that is fully informed and entirely their own. For while others might be satisfied to tell their readers what to think, we believe this city is better off if we strive to tell the stories that will simply make you think.

Check us out at seattleweekly.com

Name: The Epoch Times Greece
Description:
H ελληνική έκδοση της Epoch Times

Η Epoch Times είναι αφοσιωμένη στην αναζήτηση της αλήθειας μέσω αντικειμενικής και ανεξάρτητης δημοσιογραφίας.
Προκειμένου να ενημερώνουμε τους αναγνώστες μας για τα πιο κρίσιμα τρέχοντα ζητήματα, στεκόμαστε έξω από πολιτικά συμφέροντα και την επιδίωξη του κέρδους.
Μια καλά πληροφορημένη κοινωνία είναι ο ακρογωνιαίος λίθος μιας ευημερούσας δημοκρατίας.

Όντας ανεξάρτητοι, διερευνούμε θέματα που άλλα μέσα ενημέρωσης παραβλέπουν ή αποφεύγουν και τούτο διότι πιστεύουμε ότι η δημοσιογραφία πρέπει να είναι πραγματικά υπεύθυνη απέναντι στην κοινωνία, καθότι αυτός είναι ο ρόλος της.
Στόχος μας, να προσφέρουμε έγκυρη πληροφόρηση στους αναγνώστες μας έτσι ώστε να διαμορφώνουν τις δικές τους απόψεις πάνω στα σημαντικότερα ζητήματα της εποχής μας.

Προσπαθούμε να προβάλλουμε λύσεις και ό,τι είναι καλό στην κοινωνία, παρά συγκρούσεις που προκαλούν διχόνοιες ανάμεσά μας. Αναγνωρίζουμε την αξία των παραδοσιακών τεχνών και την ικανότητά τους να εμπνέουν την ανθρωπότητα προς τα υψηλότερα ιδανικά της.

Δεσμευόμαστε στην προσπάθειά μας να επιτύχουμε δημοσιογραφική ενημέρωση που να χαρακτηρίζεται από αλήθεια, σεβασμό και καλοσύνη.

Είμαστε αντίθετοι στη συστηματική καταστροφή του παραδοσιακού πολιτισμού από καταστρεπτικές ιδεολογίες, όπως ο κομμουνισμός, ο οποίος εξακολουθεί να βλάπτει τις κοινωνίες σε όλο τον κόσμο.

Name: Österreichischer Journalistinnenkongress
Description:
Der österreichische Journalistinnenkongress ist seit 1998 DER Treffpunkt für Medienfrauen in Österreich. Jedes Jahr nehmen rund 300 - 400 Frauen aus Journalismus und PR daran teil. Sie diskutieren berufliche Herausforderungen und Chancen, erweitern Netzwerke und tauschen sich mit nationalen und internationalen Top-Gastrednerinnen und Gastrednern aus.
Wozu ein Journalistinnenkongress speziell für Frauen? Guter Journalismus ist uns allen wichtig. Wir alle erwarten umfassend, objektiv und richtig informiert zu werden. Die Herausforderungen sind für Medienschaffende groß, besonders auch für Frauen. Um aktuellen Herausforderungen gezielt begegnen, sowie Chancen entdecken und zur Umsetzung im Berufsalltag entwickeln zu können, dient in Österreich der Journalistinnenkongress seit nunmehr über 20 Jahren als wertvolle, von Medienfrauen geschätzte und viel genutzte Plattform.

Name: Allgäuer Zeitungsverlag GmbH
Description:
Die Mediengruppe Allgäuer Zeitung

Über 600 Mitarbeiter beschäftigt die Mediengruppe Allgäuer Zeitung und ist damit einer der großen Arbeitgeber der Region Allgäu. Des Weiteren bilden wir Azubis, Volontäre und DHBW-Studierende in verschiedenen Berufen aus - unsere Ausbildungsberufe im Überblick: Ausbildung / Mediengruppe Allgäuer Zeitung. Hinzu kommen 1.100 Zusteller, die für die Mediengruppe Allgäuer Zeitung die Zeitung ausliefern.

An der Heisinger Straße in Kempten liegt das „Allgäuer Medienzentrum“, die Zentrale des Unternehmens. Hier wird die Zeitung gedruckt, hier ist das Studio fürs Fernsehen und hier sitzt der Briefdienstleister allgäu mail.

Mit der Tageszeitung sowie dem kostenlosen Wochenblatt „extra“ ist der Verlag in den meisten Haushalten des Allgäus präsent. Das Erlebnismagazin Griaß di’ Allgäu hingegen wirbt im gesamten deutschsprachigen Raum für das, was Menschen an unserer Heimat schätzen. Die meisten Printprodukte haben natürlich ein digitales Gegenstück in der Online-Welt. Ein Beispiel ist allgäuer-zeitung.de, die Nachrichtenseite der Allgäuer Zeitung, die es auch als News-App gibt. Mit all-in.de - Das Allgäu online bieten wir seit über 20 Jahren den Nachrichtenüberblick für das Allgäu. Für bewegte und bewegende Bilder sorgen die Mitarbeiter vom Fernsehsender allgäu.tv. OYA media, unsere Agentur für Multichannel-Kommunikation sorgt dafür, dass Werbebotschaften auch bei den Menschen ankommen, für die sie gemacht sind.

Somit sind wir als Multi-Media-Dienstleister mit unseren Aktivitäten in den Bereichen Tageszeitung, Wochenzeitung, Magazine, Internet und Fernsehen sowie Briefzustellung der kompetente Ansprechpartner für unsere Kunden.

Impressum: mediengruppe.allgaeuer-zeitung.de/impressum
Datenschutz: azv.de/datenschutz

Name: DiTe.dinamiche territoriali
Description:
DiTe – Dinamiche Territoriali.
Rivista multidisciplinare fondata dall’AISRe nel 2022 con lo scopo di indagare ciò che di nuovo e importante caratterizza città e territori attraverso un dibattito colto, immediato, veloce, arricchito anche di riflessioni contrapposte, che mettano in luce una visione completa e profonda di quanto avviene sia per gli studiosi, sia per gli amministratori e i policy makers.

DiTe è anche un invito a manifestarsi, a proporsi per dire la propria opinione, per illustrare una ricerca o per discutere una politica o una decisione pubblica sui principali temi di attualità relativi alla città, all’economia, al territorio e alle loro trasformazioni, raccontati in brevi articoli da studiosi e professionisti di grande prestigio nazionale e internazionale. 

L'impostazione contenutistica della rivista è approfondita e precisa con uno stile comunicativo rapido, rigoroso e puntuale. La collaborazione alla rivista avviene attraverso un gruppo di articoli coordinati su un punto qualificante del dibattito attuale che può variare da un minimo di tre ad un massimo di sei, o attraverso contributi di carattere puntuale che possono riguardare interventi su temi di attualità, recensioni di ricerche e studi, repliche e integrazioni a precedenti articoli apparsi sulla rivista.

Direttore scientifico: Ezio Micelli (Università Iuav di Venezia)
Comitato di redazione: Stefano Casini Benvenuti (IRPET), Laura Fregolent (Università IUAV di Venezia), Antonella Guida (Università della Basilicata), Antonio Lopes (Università di Napoli L’Orientale), Sabrina Ruberto (Università di Napoli L’Orientale), Vincenzo Santandrea (IPRES), Giulia Urso (Gran Sasso Science Institute dell’Aquila)
Responsabile di redazione: Eleonora Righetto (Università degli Studi di Padova).
Editorial Team: Greta Tafuri (Università Iuav di Venezia) e Diana Sarmiento

Sito web: https://www.dite-aisre.it/, 
Per inviare un paper: info@dite-aisre.it
Per contattare la rivista: info@dite-aisre.it

Name: THISDAY
Description:
THISDAY is published by Leaders and Company Limited. It hit newsstands on January 22, 1995 and quickly carved out a niche for itself in business and political reporting and for breaking big news stories. It soon became Nigeria's newspaper of record.
Today, THISDAY remains the preferred newspaper among the business, political and diplomatic elite, and is easily the most recognisable and influential national media brand globally. It is also the corporate and political advertiser’s first choice. 
THISDAY breaks the news first: from the story of the first arrests over the 1995 coup which lead to the imprisonment of Olusegun Obasanjo and the late Shehu Musa Yar’Adua; the death of Nigeria’s first president, Dr Nnamdi Azikiwe, which all other media missed; to the newspaper’s exclusive on the recovery of the Abacha billions and several more, day after day. In line with its avowed commitment to democracy, THISDAY was at the forefront of the battle against dictatorial military rule for which its reporters were invariably detained and harassed. The Chairman and Editor-in-Chief was detained in 1997 at the Department of Military Intelligence (DMI) for seven days under Abacha. The Chairman later went into self-exile.

For many Nigerians, if the news is not in THISDAY, then it is not credible.

Most recently, THISDAY launched ARISE, the global style and culture magazine.

Name: NatureNews Africa
Description:
NatureNews is an independent online newspaper based in Abuja, Nigeria’s capital city. It was founded on the principles of fundamental rights in line with the United Nations’ conventions. It also subscribes to journalistic ethics on fairness and objectivity in the dissemination of news and opinions without attachment to parochial sentiments. 

It is here to fill the void that is inherent in the negligible reportage of the environment by news media who mostly focus on other endeavours. NatureNews believes that politics, business, sports and entertainment can only thrive in a sustainable environment.

We will report credible news and ventilate informed commentaries that will elicit frank debates on national commitments to global actions for the protection of the environment.

NatureNews will support national advocacy for implementation of agreed global solutions on environmental challenges. It will harness work of stakeholders in the environment and bring together professional groups in the sector to articulate their concerns and network with government. 

It will offer opportunities for all actors and solution providers to amplify innovations that will make the earth a living environment. Ultimately it is expected to set global agenda on germane issues towards the attainment of a safer world.

Description: تعتمد صحيفة الشرق التي انطلقت من مدينة الدمام بالمنطقة الشرقية في المملكة العربية السعودية على طرح صحافي مهني حديث متجدد ولغة خاصة تركز على مبدأ التفاعل ومناقشة القضايا المباشرة لكافة شرائح المجتمع بمهنية صحافية عالية ودقة معلوماتية متناهية معتمدة على شمولية الطرح في كافة المجالات السياسية والاقتصادية والمحلية والاجتماعية والرياضية والثقافية حيث تسعى لأن تكون الصحيفة الأولى والخيار المفضل للقراء في جميع المجالات ..

Name: Business Insider Bangladesh
Description: Business Insider is an English-language business newspaper and web portal currently under process in Bangladesh. Our goal will be to meet the demand for information for the country's growing private sector.

Name: Kyodo News
Description: Kyodo News' English-language service, providing news and images from Japan, Asia and the rest of the world. This page is managed by Kyodo News' International Department in Tokyo.

Name: Aleqaria Newspaper
Description:
Aleqaria is a real estate banking and economic media organization, which issues “Aleqaria Newspaper, Aleqaria Magazine, Aleqaria Website, Sona’a Al Benouk Magazine, Ahl Masr Magazine”. Starting in 2008, it was established and its products were released successively.
Aleqaria releases its products and broadcasts its media and publicity materials through its printed editions and its website in Arabic. A printed version in English is being prepared for issuance soon, “according to its customers desire”.
Aleqaria devotes its entire pages through its printed editions and website to provide detailed coverage of the news of the construction industry, the real estate market, the banking industry, as well as macroeconomic variables in Egypt, the Arab region and the world.
Such materials, publications and website e-broadcasts are presented from the Arab Republic of Egypt, El Mohandessin. There are also reporters in a number of countries across the world.

Name: PAGE des libraires
Description:
PAGE des libraires c’est un réseau actif de libraires en France, une revue bimestrielle où découvrir leurs chroniques, un espace professionnel pour suivre l’actualité littéraire.

Que vous soyez vous-même libraire, bibliothécaire ou éditeur, PAGE s’adresse à vous pour faciliter votre quotidien de professionnels.
 
•	Libraires, participez à nos lectures sur épreuves, rédigez des chroniques, partagez vos coups de cœur et diffusez la revue dans votre structure,
•	Bibliothécaires, abonnez-vous à la revue et retrouvez, tous les deux mois, la sélection des livres à paraître lus et conseillés par les libraires pour guider vos commandes !
•	Éditeurs, rejoignez notre réseau pour pouvoir proposer vos nouveautés à la lecture sur épreuves et obtenir des chroniques en avant-première !
 
Et pour tous, PAGE des libraires, c’est aussi quatre journées professionnelles annuelles (rentrée littéraire, jeunesse, sciences humaines et rentrée d’hiver), où venir découvrir les nouveautés à venir en compagnie de notre réseau de professionnels passionnés.

Name: Foreign Press Association in London
Description:
The FPA is the first and oldest association of foreign correspondents in the world and has celebrated its 130th anniversary in 2018.

As a member of the UK Press Card Authority, the FPA provides official journalistic accreditation to more than 2,200 international correspondents every year. All media is represented: from print and news agencies to broadcast and digital. Freelancers are welcome in all categories.

Every year, the FPA holds a wide-ranging programme of briefings for its members, facilitating access to Government Ministers, Whitehall, the City's financial district and Royal events.
 
The FPA also organises press conferences and interview opportunities to help connect its members with UK prominent figures from the political, financial, cultural and sporting worlds.

Name: Newbury News and Media Ltd
Description:
The Newbury Weekly News is an independently-owned newspaper that has been at the heart of community and business life in West Berkshire and North Hampshire since 1867.

We are proud to be one of the most successful and innovative independent publishers in the UK. We are passionate about publishing. We strive to produce high-quality newspapers that our readers love.

The Newbury Weekly News is a compelling package of news, entertainment, sport, recruitment, classifieds, property and motors and the average time spent reading each paper is 40 minutes.

We also provide highly-effective advertising and marketing solutions for local and national businesses alongside an outstanding customer care ethos.

Alongside the Newbury Weekly News we publish the monthly Newbury Business Today supplement, the free Newbury and Thatcham Advertiser, the glossy Out & About lifestyle magazine and various other high-quality supplements throughout the year.

Our award-winning website newburytoday.co.uk is the clear market leader in West Berkshire and provides a fast-growing audience alongside a portfolio of creative digital solutions.

Testimonial

Garry Poulson, director, Volunteer Centre West Berkshire, said: “The Newbury Weekly News is the vital part of my communication tool kit in West Berkshire.  I regard the excellent creative and editorial teams lead by Andy and James as friends as well as colleagues. The relationships that have been developed are based on trust, understanding and empathy and they enable me to further the aims of the organisations I run... in short I love em!”

Name: The Rocky Mountain Collegian
Description: The Rocky Mountain Collegian is a fully student-run newspaper servicing the Colorado State University campus in Fort Collins, Colorado. It is one branch of the Rocky Mountain Student Media Corp., which employs more than 300 students in total. The Collegian circulates 5,000 copies four days a week to the campus and its surrounding areas and publishes online at www.collegian.com.

Name: Quad-City Times
Description:
The Quad-City Times covers local news, sports, events and more from the Quad Cities Region of Iowa and
The Quad-City Times is owned by Lee Enterprises, a premier publisher of e others, rapidly growing online sites and more than 300 weekly newspapers and specialty publications in 23 states.

Name: The Sun News
Description:
The Sun News is the Grand Strand's local news leader both in print and online. We are passionate about our responsibility as being Horry County's and Georgetown County's most compelling and trustworthy information source through our newspaper, other print products and our websites.

While primarily a coastal tourism-based community, the region also contains rural, agricultural and some light industrial sections. The area's population is composed of a distinct mix of "native"-born locals and residents who have relocated to the area from all over the world. Myrtle Beach and the Grand Strand area are considered one of the country's most visited family and golf vacation destinations.

The Sun News is located in the seaside city of Myrtle Beach, South Carolina. Located on the far northeastern edge of the state, Myrtle Beach is in close proximity to historic Georgetown, South Carolina (38 miles), Charleston, South Carolina (99 miles), and Charlotte, North Carolina (175 miles).

We are proud to offer our advertisers complete marketing campaigns to drive their business needs.  In addition to our print products we offer an array of digital marketing opportunities (search engine marketing and optimization, social media, mobile, retargeting, email marketing, digital display and much more).


Founded: The weekly Myrtle Beach News was founded in 1936. In 1961, the Myrtle Beach Sun (founded in 1950) bought the Myrtle Beach News and formed The Sun News newspaper. The State-Record Company of Columbia bought The Sun News in 1973 and it became a Monday-Saturday newspaper. In 1977, The Sun News added a Sunday paper and began printing seven days a week. Knight-Ridder purchased The State-Record Company, including The Sun News, in December 1986. The McClatchy Co. bought Knight Ridder and The Sun News in June 2006.


 

General Hiring Contact: Human Resources Director: 843-626-0355 or email Kimberly Gary.

Name: Il Sussidiario.net
Description:
Il Sussidiario.net è uno dei principali giornali online in Italia nel settore dell'informazione economica, politica, finanziaria e culturale.

La testata, nata dall'esperienza della Fondazione per la Sussidiarietà, vanta tra le sue firme economisti, accademici, analisti, opinion leader e contatti stretti con le istituzioni, che permettono di fornire un’informazione di qualità che tenga legati fatti e approfondimenti.

Name: Butler Business Matters
Description:
Butler County Business Matters is the only avenue in the county where industry leaders can stay on top of issues and the moves of other innovators. It is direct mailed monthly to the owners, managers and key executives of over 6,500 county-wide companies.

Business leaders from retail, manufacturing, governmental and financial sectors have come to rely upon Business Matters as the most dependable source of business related news and information in Butler County.

Name: insalutenews.it
Description:
insalutenews.it è una Testata giornalistica online di informazione e approfondimento medico diretta da Nicoletta Cocco (Dubai Edizioni).
insalutenews.it sceglie di proporsi ai lettori con le tematiche più attuali, con articoli divulgativi e di grande interesse scritti esclusivamente dai medici, e notizie, aggiornate in tempo reale, che giungono dalle più prestigiose Università italiane, da Istituti di ricerca, da Ordinari di cattedra, dalle più autorevoli Strutture sanitarie italiane e Società di medicina.

Name: ATALAYAR entre deux rives
Description: Pour les dirigeants méditerranéens et atlantiques, nous voulons être le pont de la communication, de l'information et de la compréhension entre les cultures.

Name: Italia 24
Description:
Raccontiamo l’attualità italiana e internazionale con uno sguardo moderno e indipendente su attualità, politica, scienza, economia, finanza, tecnologia, viaggi e cultura, con l’obiettivo di informare e intrattenere i lettori in modo autorevole, aggiornato e accessibile.

Vogliamo essere una voce autorevole e ispirante, a cui i lettori scelgano di tornare per informarsi, approfondire e comprendere meglio il mondo che ci circonda.

24 ore su 24, tra web e TV.

Name: Viva a Cidade
Description:
Quem somos?
Com mais de 15 anos de experiência e um legado de 30 anos no mercado de mídia, o Viva a Cidade News é a referência em comunicação geo direcionada e promoções locais. Somos o maior jornal gratuito do Brasil, levando um conteúdo exclusivo e relevante sobre arte, cultura, lazer, espetáculos e gastronomia diretamente ao público.

O que fazemos?
Oferecemos uma estratégia de mídia geolocalizada para anunciantes se conectarem diretamente com os consumidores, através de edições especiais com apenas um anunciante por vez, proporcionando exclusividade e personalização.

Nosso diferencial está na distribuição estratégica, com entregas em pontos de alto fluxo e em locais que garantem máxima visibilidade, como semáforos, shoppings, parques e centros urbanos.

Por que escolher o Viva a Cidade News?
Abrangência Nacional: Distribuímos em todas as regiões do Brasil, permitindo que sua marca alcance os locais mais estratégicos.

Edição Exclusiva: Uma edição dedicada a um único anunciante, que pode escolher o formato (4, 8, 12 ou 16 páginas) e a melhor estratégia de distribuição.

Rápida Entrega: Entregamos as edições em até 24 horas*, garantindo agilidade e eficiência nas campanhas.

Benefícios Extras: programa de cashback e clube de benefícios.

E mais!

Nosso conteúdo é desenvolvido por uma equipe de jornalistas e profissionais especializados, garantindo a mais alta qualidade e relevância.

Acompanhamento completo: relatórios e verificação fotográfica da distribuição, para garantir total transparência.

Name: Richner Communications, Inc.
Description: Richner Communications, Inc. (RCI), founded by the Richner family in 1964, is one of the largest local media companies in the State of New York.  Today, RCI proudly produces over 70 community newspapers and related products, predominantly in the affluent Long Island, NY, market.  RCI's flagship newspaper group, Herald Community Newspapers, is consistently recognized at the local and national levels for its high-quality journalism and innovative marketing campaigns.

Name: Humans of Medicine
Description:
Our journalists get under the skin of health and medicine.
We believe that knowledge enables the pursuit of good health and well-being. Using peer reviewed studies, medical experts, and reputable sources, our passionate and curious team of writers and editors unravels the complexities of medical research and science, breaking it down to give you clear, objective, and accurate health information.

Our content is science-led, facts-first, inquisitive, and always approachable.
Through our content, we hope to inspire you to seek new knowledge, ask questions, and take healthy actions. We want you to feel confident in owning your health journey and making informed decisions for yourself and your loved ones.

We aim to empower our readers to live their strongest, healthiest lives.
Stay up to date with the latest medical and healthcare news and information by subscribing to our newsletter or following

Name: Dainik Jagran City Plus
Description: Cityplus is a  venture of Jagran Prakashan Ltd, publisher of world’s largest read newspaper Dainik Jagran. The concept has been formed with the need of bringing in a community-commodity-lifestyle based compact weekly, which has the real zeal of making a strong community of its readers, and associates. City plus aims at informing, entertaining and empowering its readers and business partners alike. City Plus is a compact English weekly circulated in East Delhi, South Delhi, Central Delhi, Dwarka, Gurgaon, Faridabad, Noida, New Ghaziabad, Ghaziabad, Greater Noida, Bangalore(Koramangala, Indiranagar, Jayanagar, Sarjapur, HSR Layout), Pune(Aundh Baner, Wanowrie, Kothrud, Deccan), Hyderabad(Banjara Hills) and Mumbai(Vashi) through 21 Editions.

Name: San José Spotlight
Description: San Jose Spotlight is a community-supported digital news organization. They also provide policy, politics and government, including in-depth reports on housing, homelessness, racial inequity, COVID-19 education, immigration, and business news services.

Name: People Newspapers
Description:
People Newspapers publishes two monthly community newspapers, Park Cities People and Preston Hollow People, and specialty pubs such as Society Magazine. The Dallas' neighborhoods covered are home to a potent mix of active citizens, society leaders, corporate CEOs, and arts patrons who care deeply about their schools, organizations, businesses, and the future of their communities.

People Newspapers' publications have won numerous awards from the Texas Press Association and Suburban Newspapers of America, including the prize for the best weekly in Texas 16 times.

For its 2024 coverage, People Newspapers received a first-place award for Best Feature Photo and honorable mentions in the Best Headline Writing, Best Sports Feature, and Best Feature Story categories from the National Newspaper Association. The Local Media Association awarded Park Cities People first place for Best Local Election Coverage and second place for Best Sports Section.

Name: UNILAG Sun
Description:
We are the official training newspaper firm for the students of Mass Communication department, University of Lagos, that produces the annual convocation newspapers.

As a news firm existing within the school, we are not only committed to training young and aspiring media professionals in the department of Mass Communication, but also, serving the University community is the fundamental objective of our role as a Media firm committed to the ethical codes of journalism, with truth as our cornerstone. 

Simplicity and Accuracy are what we stand for as a brand, because we understand which word better drives the message home. Every of our reports are always accurate to the core of each word we write.

Name: Journal Register Company
Description:
Journal Register Company’s more than 350 multi-platform products reach an audience of 21 million Americans each month. Through multi-platform delivery including websites, video and print, The Company delivers local news and information to 992 communities in 10 states.

For advertisers, the sites provide a great deal of extended reach in each community, connecting them with a quality audience of upscale consumers. We deliver a dynamic audience to our advertisers that will bring the results they are looking for, no matter the size of the business.

Located in two top-ten markets, Philadelphia and Detroit, the Company is prominent in Connecticut, Greater Cleveland and the Capital-Saratoga and Mid-Hudson regions of New York.
