Name: The Gazette | Eastern Iowa
Description: The Gazette is an independent newspaper and media company Eastern Iowans have depended on for more than 142 years. We are Iowa’s second-largest newspaper and digital news source. Our award-winning journalists serve our 16-county community with the highest level of news, sports, business, and arts and entertainment coverage, and engage our readers in a thoughtful exchange of ideas. Founded in 1883, the company continues to be innovative in program, product and service.

Name: Afrique XXI
Description: Afrique XXI est un journal en ligne en accès libre, qui couvre l’ensemble du continent africain. Il est indépendant des pouvoirs économiques et politiques. Il revendique une filiation avec Orient XXI et est animé par des journalistes, des universitaires et des militant.e.s associatifs. Afrique XXI a pour ambition de proposer une grille de lecture critique, indépendante et contextualisée de l’actualité et des évolutions sur le temps long du continent africain, à travers des analyses approfondies, des reportages et des enquêtes inédites, en convoquant régulièrement l’Histoire et en n’excluant aucune des différentes aires culturelles et linguistiques.

Name: Magazine Profession Carrossier
Description:
Créé en 1995, Profession Carrossier poursuit sa mission d’information au service des professionnels de la carrosserie réparation, désormais sous la houlette d’ATOUTMEDIAS, nouveau propriétaire du titre. Ce trimestriel gratuit s’adresse à l’ensemble de la filière – carrossiers, agents, concessionnaires, reconditionneurs, loueurs – en proposant des contenus techniques de fond, des retours d’expérience terrain et des analyses sectorielles.

Disponible en version papier, en ligne sur www.profession-carrossier.com, et enrichi d’une newsletter hebdomadaire, Profession Carrossier s’inscrit dans une dynamique éditoriale renouvelée, fidèle à ses racines tout en regardant vers l’avenir.

Name: Telegraph Herald
Description:
The Telegraph Herald traces its roots to Iowa’s first newspaper, The DuBuque Visitor (May 11, 1836). The newspaper is the original division of Dubuque-based Woodward Communications, Inc., an employee-owned multimedia corporation with operations in Iowa, Illinois and Wisconsin.

The Telegraph Herald products include an award-winning daily newspaper specializing in local and regional news and information, websites and specialty publications, including magazines and a business-to-business publication.

Værdigrundlag:
 
Troværdighed - er, at vi vil bygge vores arbejde på tillid, pålidelighed og fairness, og at der grundet vores ansvarlighed, alsidighed og ærlighed står respekt om vores arbejde.
 
Nytænkning - er vores kreative evne til konstant at finde og bruge de nyheder og løsninger, der bedst opfylder læsernes og samarbejdspartnernes behov.
 
Samspil - er, når alle deler viden og fælles ressourcer og dermed tværfagligt bidrager til at nå de fælles mål.
 
Lokalperspektivering - er, at vi forholder vores arbejde til den enkelte borgers tilværelse i lokalsamfundet. Vi er den lokale samfundshjørnesten!

Ledelsesgrundlag:

Mediehusene Midtjylland har som fundament for fremdrift en værdibaseret ledelsesform, hvor virksomhedens valgte værdier er fundet i et samspil mellem ledelsen og medarbejderne. Ledelsen har herefter stillet værdierne til rådighed, således medarbejdere, kunder og samarbejdspartnere har disse som rygmarv i og ledetråd for vores processer og beslutninger.
 
Vores værdier er på denne måde med til at bestemme vores handlinger.

Name: Maine Trust for Local News
Description:
The Maine Trust for Local News is the state’s largest network of independent news and media outlets, which together form an essential part of daily life in Maine. With 158 journalists on staff, we serve audiences through our 5 daily newspapers and 17 hyper-local weekly newspapers, in print and online. 

We cover what matters to Maine, putting a spotlight on issues of vital importance to our people, community and state. 

The Maine Trust for Local News is a subsidiary of the National Trust for Local News, a non-profit committed to conserving and operating vibrant, sustainable local news enterprises across the country.

Name: Daily Ittefaq
Description:
The Daily Ittefaq is Bangladesh’s iconic & oldest national Bengali newspaper.
The Daily Ittefaq was founded in 1953, and played a vital role in the independence movement of Bangladesh serving as the mouthpiece of the people striving for autonomy from then West Pakistan. Its founder, Tofazzal Hossain Manik Mia was the editor of the paper at the time.

With a weekly distribution of 33,000 copies, the Jewish News is at the heart of this thriving, educated and affluent community, providing a weekly mix of local, national and international Jewish news, features, sport and entertainment. Name: Matbaa Haber
Description:
İçerik ve hedef kitle
Türk basım sektörünün en yaygın dağıtım ağına sahip öncü dergisi Matbaa Haber 2001 yılında yayınlanmaya başlandı. Matbaa Haber tüm Türkiye’de basımevlerine, basımevlerine mal ve hizmet sağlayan işletmelere ve ilgili kuruluşlara ulaştırılmaktadır.
Türkçe yayınlanan Matbaa Haber’in web versiyonu istenirse Google Translate ile birçok dile çevrilebilir. Sitemizdeki e-dergi sekmesinden de (E-Dergi – MatbaaHaber) dergimize ulaşabilir ve indirebilirsiniz. Dergimiz Türkiye’de olduğu gibi dünyada da web üzerinden takip edilmektedir. 
Matbaa Haber Türkiye’deki ve dünyadaki sektörel gelişmeleri, haberleri, yenilik ve etkinlikleri sektör mensuplarının masasına taşırken bir yandan da imzalı yazılarla teknik bilgi ve görüşler için bir ayna işlevi görmektedir. 
Ülkemizin her köşesinde sektör mensupları tarafından bilinen, tanınan ve takip edilen Matbaa Haber ortalama 6 forma civarında bir oyluma sahiptir. Bazı önemli etkinliklerde derginin oylumu artmaktadır.

Okur Profili
Matbaa Haber sektörün en dinamik, gelişmeye açık, yatırım yapma potansiyeli yüksek olan firmalarına ulaştırılmaktadır. Dergimiz firma sahipleri ve matbaa müdürleri, usta başları, satın alma sorumluları gibi basımevi çalışanları tarafından takip edilmektedir.  
Dergimizin ulaştığı işletmeler:
Ticari, ambalaj ve etiket basım işletmeleri (ofset, letter press, flexo, gravür, serigrafi, veb ofset, dijital baskı alanında faaliyet gösteren işletmeler), 
Kamu ve üniversite basımevleri,
Ciltevleri,
Sonlandırma hizmeti veren parlatıcılar (lak, selofan, yaldız vb),
Makine ve malzeme tedarikçi firmalar,
Kağıt ve kağıt ürünleri üretici ve satıcıları,
Reklam ajansları,
Reprodüksiyon ve servis sağlayıcı firmalar,
Reklam ve sanayi fotoğrafçıları
Yayın periyodu ve tiraj
Matbaa Haber 2001 yılında iki ayda bir olmak üzere yayın hayatına başladı. 2006 yılından itibaren de aylık olarak yayınlanmaktadır.
Halen 1500 adet basılan Matbaa Haber’in, bazı önemli fuar ve etkinliklerde baskı sayısı artmaktadır.

Name: Bradenton Herald
Description:
The daily newspaper & local news source 24-7 on Bradenton.com
The hometown newspaper of Manatee County since 1922. The Bradenton Herald has mirrored its community's growth -- from the tiny agricultural-and-fishing town of Bradenton to today's bustling, high-growth metropolitan area and sought-after tourist destination -- without losing its small-town charm.

The Bradenton Herald competes with three other daily newspapers by offering the best local report available, from breaking news to education coverage and neighborly good news. The Herald has two daily zoned editions: the Lakewood Ranch Herald and the Bradenton Herald.

Mission Statement
We will be the region's leading media company, providing the best source of local news and information -- in print, online, electronically and mobile.

Market
Bradenton is the largest city and county seat of Manatee County, on the south side of Tampa Bay on Florida's West Coast. The Herald has prospered in Manatee County, which more than 300,000 people now call home and is among the fastest-growing areas in the United States. The Bradenton Herald has expanded its involvement in community activities to sponsor more than 300 events a year.

Location
Located on Florida's Southwest Coast, just south of Tampa Bay, Florida's Gulf Islands of Anna Maria and Longboat Key and the Greater Bradenton Area are bordered by the Gulf of Mexico and are easily accessible by automobile as well as two major international airports. As one of Florida's beautiful Suncoast communities, Manatee County offers a high quality of life for retirees and families. Bradenton has year-round sunshine, a warm tropical climate and water temperatures averaging in the 80s.

Circulation Area
Home delivery covers all of Manatee County, a portion of Hillsborough County and northern Sarasota County. The area is bordered by the Gulf of Mexico on the west and the Manatee/Hardee county line I-75 on the east.

Name: Slow News
Description:
C’era una volta un mondo in cui le notizie sui giornali urlavano sempre di cose incredibili, sconvolgenti, assurde, pazzesche. Era un mondo in cui ogni giorno una nuova polemica infiammava i luoghi della socialità collettiva, dai bar ai social network, un mondo polarizzato, diviso in tifoserie, dominato dal sarcasmo, dalle reazioni istantanee, dalla polemica, dalla furia, dalla morbosità.

 

In quel mondo, i sentimenti primari e gli istinti più bestiali come la paura, la rabbia, l’indignazione o il terrore venivano creati dai principali giornali per attirare l’attenzione delle persone con titoli ingannevoli, urlati e shoccanti.

 

L’attenzione della gente, in quel mondo, era una merce di scambio. Veniva accumulata dai giornali e venduta agli inserzionisti della pubblicità, che versavano loro in cambio i soldi che servivano per tenerli a galla e farli sopravvivere.

 

Poi, un giorno, alcune donne e alcuni uomini che lavoravano per quei giornali, stanchi di ingannare chi li leggeva e stufi di parlare soltanto delle cose che venivano loro dettate dall’agenda di chi metteva i soldi, ovvero della pubblicità, decisero che le cose si potevano fare in modo diverso e che era il momento di provarci.

 

Fu così che, in tanti luoghi diversi del mondo, senza nemmeno sapere dell’esistenza gli uni degli altri, quelle donne e quegli uomini crearono dei giornali nuovi, liberi, senza pubblicità e senza padroni che decidessero al posto loro di cosa parlare, giornali che avevano al centro i propri lettori e che non urlavano più.

 

Attorno a loro, piano piano, si crearono delle comunità di persone che divennero sempre più grandi. Le prime lettrici e i primi lettori, finalmente coinvolti nel giornalismo che leggevano, ne parlarono ai loro amici, ai loro parenti, ai loro conoscenti e sempre più persone iniziarono a frequentare quei luoghi virtuali e fisici che si creavano intorno a quei nuovi giornali. E alla fine…

Alla fine cosa successe? Ancora non sappiamo come andrà a finire

Name: 人民日报
Description: 人民日报是中国共产党中央委员会机关报，中国第一大报，1992年被联合国教科文组织评为世界十大报纸之一。1948年6月15日在河北省平山县里庄创刊，由《晋察冀日报》和晋冀鲁豫《人民日报》合并而成，为华北中央局机关报，同时担负党中央机关报职能。毛泽东同志亲笔为人民日报题写报名。l949年3月15日，人民日报随中央机关迁入北平。同年8月1日，中共中央决定人民日报为中国共产党中央委员会机关报，并沿用l948年6月l5日的期号。

Name: The Times Leader
Description:
The Times Leader covers Northeastern Pennsylvania.

Our seven-day news product is flagship of The Times Leader Media Group, a collection of print and digital products that cover the Scranton/Wilkes-Barre metropolitan area.

Our website, timesleader.com, is the most-read news website in Luzerne County.

The Times Leader is headquartered at 90 E. Market St. in Wilkes-Barre, at the corner of Pennsylvania Avenue and Market Street. We also have offices in Pittston and Clarks Summit.

In 1797, the Wilkes-Barre Gazette and Luzerne Advertiser became the first newspaper to serve the Wyoming Valley. Since then, a variety of community weeklies, foreign language publications and political notices have come and gone.

Today’s Times Leader traces its beginnings to 1907, when Fred C. Kirkendall and Col. Ernest G. Smith combined their newspapers, the Wilkes-Barre Times and the Times Leader.

The Times Leader continued for 32 years until 1939, when a major strike forced its merger with the Wilkes-Barre Record and the Evening News to form the Wilkes-Barre Publishing Company.

In 1972, after the flood caused by the remains of Hurricane Agnes devastated the Wyoming Valley, the local newspapers combined to form one publication with the unwieldy name Wilkes Barre Times Leader/The Evening News/Wilkes-Barre Record. Then, in 1978, the paper was purchased by Capital Cities Corp. and renamed the Times Leader.

The past decades have seen many changes at the Times Leader. A highly successful Sunday edition began publication in 1987. The newspaper had published under various owners until 2013, when Civitas Media was formed, and owned the publications until 2019. In August 2019 Avant Publications acquired the Times Leader Media Group, the first time in 4 decades that the Times Leader was privately owned.

Combined with its award-winning digital portfolio — timesleader.com, iOS and Android apps, and social media — the Times Leader has the largest audience in Luzerne County.

Description:
The New England Newspaper & Press Association (NENPA) is the professional trade organization for newspapers in the six New England states: Massachusetts, Connecticut, New Hampshire, Vermont, Maine and Rhode Island. NENPA serves more than 450 daily, weekly and specialty newspapers. 

NENPA is the principal advocate for newspapers in New England, helping them to successfully fulfill their mission to engage and inform the public while navigating and ultimately thriving in today’s evolving media landscape. NENPA members benefit from a wide range of important services.

> A variety of recognition and awards programs (including our annual New England Better Newspaper Competition, Newspapers of the Year, Publick Occurrences, New England First Amendment Award, Allan Rogers Editorial Award)
> The New England Newspaper Conference and New England Newspaper Convention 
> NENPA University – low cost, top quality training and professional development programs throughout the year, covering important and topical issues in editorial, ad sales, production, audience growth and engagement, contemporary media platforms, legal issues, etc. 
> NENPA Media Law Hotline - free access at any time to New England’s top media lawyers
> Event Management – logistical planning and facilitation of newspaper-sponsored community events 
>Discounted libel insurance
> NENPA e-Bulletin newsletter with industry news of interest to newspaper professionals in our region
> Regional ad sales representation - NENPA places print and digital advertising in New England papers for retailers, financial and healthcare institutions, political and advocacy campaigns, and many other organizations.
> Employee recruitment - take advantage of FREE help wanted ads in the e-Bulletin and on the NENPA website (no limit to how many you may run)

Follow us on on Twitter at https://twitter.com/NENPA and on Facebook at https://www.facebook.com/nenpa.

Estamos muito presentes nas redes sociais: além do LinkedIn, estamos no Facebook, Instagram e Twitter. Temos também um canal no Youtube.
Ao longo destes anos de existência, o Sul Informação e os seus jornalistas já ganharam vários prémios de jornalismo.

Bei uns tauschen sich Medienmacher und Kommunikatoren über neue Entwicklungen der Branche aus. Neue Recherchemethoden sind ebenso Thema wie die Bedeutung von Social Media für den Journalismus. Neue und etablierte Medien stellen ihre Strategien vor. Gibt es in zwanzig Jahren noch Printmedien? Diese und viele andere brennende Fragen beschäftigen uns auf unseren Veranstaltungen.

Im FPC sind 286 Einzelpersonen aus allen Medien organisiert. Zusätzlich senden 76 korporative Mitglieder (Firmen, Verbände, Institutionen) eine Vielzahl weiterer Mitarbeiter aus dem Bereich Kommunikation aber auch aus der Führungsebene in den Club.

Wir bieten unseren Einzel- und Fördermitgliedern regelmäßig eine Vielzahl von unterschiedlichen Veranstaltungen an. Während einige von ihnen auch für Gäste geöffnet sind (viele unserer Clubabende sowie die FPC Netzwerkveranstaltungen), bleiben der Neujahrsempfang, die FPC Hausbesuche, der FPC-Treff sowie unsere Fortbildungsreisen exklusiv unseren Mitgliedern vorbehalten.

Picture yourself on a safari of stories, each narrative a vivid brushstroke capturing the essence of Africa's diverse beauty. From the majestic Victoria Falls to the bustling markets of Marrakech, we bring you tales that resonate with the heartbeat of this extraordinary continent. Welcome to a realm where dreams take flight and experiences resonate with the rhythmic roar of Africa's untamed spirit.

At Travel & Tour Africa Magazine, we don't just tell stories – we craft immersive experiences that transport you to the heart of Africa. Uncover the hidden gems, savour the flavours, and dance to the rhythm of life across our pages. Join us as we connect the dots of diversity, curating dreams and crafting memories that linger long after you've turned the last page.

Beyond borders, beyond expectations – we invite you to join us on a journey where every story soars and every journey roars. Welcome to Africa, welcome to us!

Name: AMIC · Mitjans d'Informació i Comunicació
Description:
L'Associació Catalana de la Premsa Gratuïta i Mitjans Digitals (ACPG) va constituir-se l'any 1997 i va néixer amb la voluntat de ser l'interlocutor vàlid d'un col·lectiu que gaudeix d'una gran popularitat i difusió entre tots els sectors de la població.

La premsa de distribució gratuïta molt arrelada en nombroses ciutats d'arreu del país ofereix, un contingut redaccional ric i útil de cada zona o bé en cada grup de població. La premsa gratuïta balear i catalana són un cas únic a Europa per la seva forta implantació per arreu del territori i per la seva aposta, des de fa anys, per la qualitat tant en els continguts com en els formats. Un país amb gran tradició de gratuïts on hi conviuen diversos tipus de formats, periodicitats i continguts, que en molts casos es centren en un tipus de públic molt concret o que s'especialitzen i dediquen a un únic sector.

Una associació molt activa que s’adapta constantment als nous formats i a les noves tecnologies, i per aquest motiu, l'any 2008 va incorporar els mitjans digitals informatius amb la voluntat de representar, potenciar, defensar i donar serveis a aquest tipus de canal informatiu gratuït.

Actualment, l'ACPG integra més de 250 mitjans, dels quals més d'un centenar són capçaleres de premsa gratuïta que tenen una tirada conjunta superior als dos milions i mig d'exemplars, i més d'un centenar són mitjans digitals que conjuntament superen els dos milions i mig d'usuaris únics mensuals d'Andorra, Balears i Catalunya.

We actively seek out good news as part of our ongoing effort to strengthen the communities. However, we must preserve balance in our newspapers and must cover issues that are at times controversial. 

We are a resource for cities, community groups and individuals to get messages of common interest out to their neighbors. We believe our most important role is to give community members the information that they need to form an opinion on the topics that concern their community. This is why each Journal is different, completely independent of the other Journals. From time to time, news and information may appear in more than one Journal because of its relevance to more than one community, but our focus is to reflect the individual character and needs of a community through the Journal that it serves.

Name: Personal Finance
Description:
Since its launch in 1996, Personal Finance has established itself as the leader in this market, tackling issues affecting the pockets of the consumer. It is a lifestyle publication rather than a strictly business or financial publication – written to be accessible, interesting and useful to individuals concerned about their financial affairs. Very high journalistic standards and the use of plain language and graphics to explain complex financial issues make Personal Finance a credible source of information with sound money advice for the conscience reader. 
It is carried in Independent Media's national Saturday titles – Saturday Star, Weekend Argus and Independent on a Saturday, as well as in  Business Report on a Friday, which appears in The Mercury, The Star and the Cape Times. It also has a page in the Cape Argus and Daily News on a Tuesday and Thursday and hosts a bi-weekly award-winning podcast.

Name: The Charlatan
Description:
The Charlatan has been publishing at Carleton for more than 60 years. The first issue was published on Nov. 28, 1945 under the name the Carleton. In the 1970s the name was changed to represent a more edgy newspaper the editors sought to shape.

In 1988 the Charlatan became independent from the Carleton University Students’ Association, and is now funded primarily through a student levy granted each year, but also through advertising.

As a not-for-profit corporation the Charlatan’s finances are overseen by an independent Board of Directors. The board is controlled by five students-at-large, two representatives of the newspaper's staff, one professional journalist and one professional businessperson.

Each year the newspaper will elect an editorial staff in March to take office the following publication year. The editorial staff consists of 11 people: an editor-in-chief, two news editors, a culture & community editor, a features editor, an opinions/editorial editor, an arts editor, a sports editor, a photo editor and a graphics editor.

The editorial staff meets each week to discuss what editorial positions the newspaper will take and other important decisions.

The newspaper will only publish works by Carleton students and is a primarily volunteer-run organization. Although the editorial staff is paid, all of the newspaper’s writers, photographers, graphic artists and so forth work on a volunteer basis.

The newspaper publishes on a rolling basis online with three special print editions throughout the school year, breaking only for exam sessions and reading week.

Name: Beaumont Enterprise
Description:
The Beaumont Enterprise, recognized by the Texas State Historical Survey Committee as Southeast Texas' oldest business, has been serving the region since 1880. Since 1998, The Enterprise annually has been recognized as one of the top medium-sized newspapers in Texas and five other states.

The Enterprise is the sixth-largest Hearst of 15 daily newspapers, including the Houston Chronicle, San Antonio Express-News and San Francisco Chronicle. The Hearst Corporation is one of the nation's largest diversified communications companies, with magazine, newspaper and business publishing, cable networks and television and radio stations.

Name: Daily Camera
Description:
The local news source for Boulder and Boulder County.

During the course of our long history, we ve been owned by entrepreneurs, families and corporations. But the truth of the matter is, our heart and soul have always belonged to you. We were, are and will always be your source for local news and advertising information.

Over the years we ve woven Boulder and Broomfield counties issues, events, politics and human stories into the fabric of our pages. Our mission is the same today as it s always been: To deliver essential, informed and relevant news to our readers.

Local Knowledge. Total Coverage.
Call your advertising consultant today at 303.473.1400.

Name: The Press
Description: For more than 160 years, The Press has been the South Island’s voice, fiercely independent and deeply connected to the communities it serves. From hard news to culture, business to the outdoors, The Press delivers journalism that informs, inspires and celebrates life in the South Island.

Name: AM730 Media
Description:
《am730》是公信力第一的免費中文報紙，向讀者提供香港本地新聞、觀點評論、專欄文章及專題訪問，令讀者全面了解社會時事。多元內容頻道，專業報導，求真精神，當中內容類別包括：新聞、專欄、財經、健康、科技、體育、娛樂、旅遊、飲食、Lifestyle。

除了於早上返工時間在繁忙的人流點派發外，更於指定屋苑、專業團體及學術機構派發，讓讀者能夠順利取報。除印刷版外，《am730》亦透過不同的電子管道，如網頁、手機APP及社交平台等，發放更多即時新聞資訊。

Name: Diario Popular
Description:
El Diario Popular es el tercer periódico más vendido de la Argentina. 
La edición impresa se vende en todo el país y su edición Web (www.diariopopular.com.ar) es visita por miles de personas todos los días. 
El diario cuenta con una variada gama de suplementos.

Name: Jazz Magazine
Description:
Créé en 1954 par Nicole Barclay puis repris par deux visionnaires du jazz et de la presse, Frank Ténot et Daniel Filipacchi, Jazz Magazine est le mensuel de référence de tous “ceux qui aiment le jazz” en France.

 Depuis 70 ans son destin a croisé celui des légendes du jazz, qui toutes ont fait sa Une, de Louis Armstrong à Gregory Porter en passant Charlie Parker, Duke Ellington, Billie Holiday, Thelonious Monk, Ella Fitzgerald, John Coltrane, Miles Davis, Nina Simone, Bill Evans, Ahmad Jamal, Herbie Hancock, Keith Jarrett, Jimi Hendrix, Chick Corea, Melody Gardot, Diana Krall ou encore Marcus Miller.

 En 2014, le titre a été repris par Jazz&Cie, présidé par Edouard Rencker.
Tiré à 24 000 exemplaires, le mensuel qui traite de l’histoire et de l’actualité de tous les jazz est disponible en kiosque et sur abonnement.
 En Mai 2024, Jazz Magazine a célébré ses 70 ans lors d'un concert Women in Jazz au Théâtre du Châtelet.

En 2025, Jazz Magazine a lancé son site ecommerce : https://boutique.jazzmagazine.com et a opèré une refonte de son site internet https://www.jazzmagazine.com 

Jazz Magazine fait partie de Jazz&Cie, un écosystème dédié au développement du jazz et aux musiques du monde.

Il comprend un groupe de presse, une activité de production spectacles, un studio d’enregistrement, un label et plusieurs festivals.

 La presse : avec quatre titres Jazz Magazine • Jazz News • Muzik • KR Studio
 La production de concerts: près de 60 concerts en 2024
 Le studio d’enregistrement : le Quai Son (avec résidence d’artistes) est parmi les plus modernes d’europe. https://www.quaison.fr/ 
 Le label de production : Quai Son Records.

Name: Kalam
Description:
Lebanese students in the country or abroad,

In order to rise from the tragedy of the 4th of August, we decided to create Kalam, an opinion journal 100% student-led that will provide you with a platform where you can speak up about any topic you’d like, in any language you’d like, whether it is in English or in French.

Kalam bases itself on an operation to rise from the ashes that draws itself from the freedom of speech and ideas of us, youth. It’s all about amplifying our voices into an indestructible shield against the rising attempts at political instrumentalization.

May this journal be the place where you can wholly release, during these unceasing uproars in a country like ours, your will to live, your freedom of speech and expression, of life and delight, of hope and despair.

Freely yours,

The Editorial Board - Kalam

We expose environmental injustice, counter misinformation, and examine both the causes and solutions to climate change, with a focus on transparency, justice, and public interest.

Description: An open journal devoted to (new) ways of working & organizing and their political and societal dimensions (in particular their relationships with #openness, #commons & #novelty). Name: ARCLANTIC
Description:
Welcome to the official LinkedIn page of ARCLANTIC, where information meets innovation! 

At ARCLANTIC, we are committed to delivering accurate, timely, and insightful news that empowers and informs our global audience. With a rich legacy spanning decades, we have been at the forefront of journalism, adapting to the ever-evolving media landscape.

 Our Mission: Uncover, Unite, and Unleash Stories
At the heart of ARCLANTIC is a dedicated team of journalists, storytellers, and media professionals who are passionate about uncovering the truth and presenting stories that matter. We strive to unite communities through shared knowledge and diverse perspectives, believing that informed citizens are the bedrock of a thriving society.

 Global Reach, Local Impact
With a global reach that spans continents, ARCLANTIC connects with audiences on a local level, addressing issues that resonate in communities around the world. Our commitment to journalistic integrity ensures that our reporting reflects the highest standards, fostering trust and credibility.

 Innovation in Journalism
ARCLANTIC embraces the digital age, leveraging cutting-edge technologies and platforms to bring news to your fingertips. From immersive storytelling experiences to real-time updates, we are at the forefront of innovation in journalism, ensuring that our audience stays ahead in an ever-changing world.

 Join the Conversation
Follow us to stay informed, engaged, and inspired. Whether you're a news enthusiast, a professional in the media industry, or someone passionate about staying informed, ARCLANTIC is your source for reliable, compelling, and thought-provoking content.

 Connect with Us
Let's connect! Join our LinkedIn community to be a part of the conversation, share your thoughts, and stay updated on the latest stories shaping our world. Together, let's explore the power of information and its impact on our lives.

Name: Digital Digest
Description:
Digital Digest is your go-to source for comprehensive insights into the ever-evolving digital landscape. Our team of tech enthusiasts, innovators, and analysts is dedicated to unraveling the latest trends, technologies, and transformations shaping our digital world.

From breaking news in the tech industry to in-depth analyses of emerging technologies like artificial intelligence, blockchain, and virtual reality, Digital Digest keeps you informed and empowered in this fast-paced digital age. We're here to demystify complex concepts, review cutting-edge gadgets and software, and provide practical tips for navigating the digital realm with confidence.

Join us as we embark on a journey through the digital frontier, offering you valuable knowledge, expert perspectives, and a deep understanding of the digital ecosystem. Whether you're a tech aficionado, a business professional, or simply curious about the digital world, Digital Digest is your trusted companion for staying ahead in the digital game.

Name: Den Haag Centraal
Description:
Den Haag Centraal is hét kwaliteitsmedium van Den Haag. Wij willen de Hagenaars zo goed mogelijk informeren.

We doen dat met een grote groep professionele journalisten en columnisten. Elke week, net voor het weekend, ontvangt u een compact overzicht van het laatste nieuws plus uitvoerige beschouwingen over een heel arsenaal aan onderwerpen. Als weekkrant gaan we niet voor de waan van de dag, maar richten we ons als kwaliteitsmedium op de zaken die echt belangrijk zijn voor onze lezers.

DHC is zowel redactioneel als zakelijk onafhankelijk. Onze kernwaarden zijn: betrouwbaarheid, diepgang en originaliteit. Vanuit die basis streven we naar hoogwaardige, onderscheidende en toegankelijke journalistiek. Onze belangrijkste aandachtsgebieden zijn politiek en bestuur en kunst en cultuur, zonder daarbij opinie, ‘human interest’, lifestyle en sport uit het oog te verliezen. DHC ziet zijn journalistieke rol ook als een bijdrage aan een vrije, democratische en inclusieve samenleving.

Meer informatie: www.denhaagcentraal.net

Name: AJC Top Workplaces
Description: AJC Top Workplaces provides the link between Atlantans looking for work and the employers who need them. Search for jobs, read news about companies growing or expanding, and find tips & tricks for hiring and keeping happy employees.

Name: Journal Star
Description:
Central Illinois' largest news source, providing news in print, online and mobile 24 hours per day. The Journal Star is owned by Peoria Journal Star Inc. which is owned by GateHouse Media, a publicly-traded company based in New York outside Rochester.

The newspaper marked its 150th anniversary in 2005.

The major city in Central Illinois is Peoria. Peoria is a medium-size city in the middle of Illinois on the west bank of the Illinois River, an important tributary that links Chicago and St. Louis, Missouri.

Charles Kuralt of CBS-TV once said Peoria is in the “middle of Illinois which is in the middle of the country which is in the middle of the world. More than one-fifth of the United States lives within 250 miles of Peoria.”

Long known as a blue-collar town (Caterpillar Inc.’s World Headquarters is located downtown), Peoria has become a majority white-collar city due in a large part to a growing information technology industry. Bradley University and Illinois Central College also reside in the area.

In the Tri-County area (Peoria, Tazewell and Woodford Counties) live 350,958 people, according to the 2000 Census, with 182,495 people in Peoria County alone. The City of Peoria had 112,936 people in 2000.

The city is surrounded by some of the richest farmland on earth. Agribusiness is a major player in the central Illinois economy. Corn and soybeans are the two main products as well as the raising of farm stock. The U.S. Department of Agriculture’s National Center for Agricultural Utilization Research is located in Peoria.

Name: Magazín TRANSPORT a LOGISTIKA CZ
Description: Pozeráme sa na svet dopravy a logistiky a hľadáme v ňom všetko dôležité a podstatné, čo ďalej posúvame k vám. Našim cieľom je podporiť vás v tom, čo robíte. Poskytnúť vám platformu, na ktorej jednoducho a rýchlo nájdete overené informácie, trendy, analýzy aj prípadové štúdie. Pomocou nášho odborného magazínu, online portálu a sociálnych sietí chceme byť vašim informačným partnerom.

Name: Revista da Cerveja
Description: A revista é produzida em Porto Alegre/RS/Brasil e tem âmbito nacional, em edições bimestrais, com tiragem de 8.000 exemplares e mais de 350 pontos de distribuição em 21 estados brasileiros. O comprometimento da revista com o movimento cervejeiro trouxe pela terceira vez consecutiva o Prêmio Brasil Brau em Gestão de Negócios em Cerveja, em 2019, com o 1º lugar na categoria Comunicação da Cultura Cervejeira – motivo de orgulho e que serve para reafirmar o compromisso da revista com o movimento cervejeiro.
Location: Porto Alegre, Rio Grande do Sul

Name: The Republican
Description:
Founded by Samuel Bowles, an American journalist from Springfield, Massachusetts, the Weekly Republican began on September 8th, 1824. Surprisingly, the name of the paper had nothing to do with politics at the time, for the Republican Party wasn't founded until 30 years later in 1854.
The Republican grew rapidly with New England's economy as the Industrial Revolution dominated the region, converting to a daily publication in 1844. In the 1850s and 1860s, The Republican was a go-to source for many Europeans and Americans looking to find out what was occurring in our country during that time. It wasn't until the year 1878 that The Republican decided to publish a Sunday newspaper.
Since then, generations of families have relied on The Republican for comprehensive local, regional, national and international news coverage, as well as opinion and advertising. We strive to enlighten, educate and entertain readers every day.
Today, we are more than just a newspaper. We are a multi-platform media company with the ability to provide readers with breaking news and information at our online home, MassLive.com. Readers can interact with The Republican and connect with other readers at MassLive.com. El Pueblo Latino, our weekly Spanish-language newspaper, provides relevant news and information to the growing Hispanic population in our region. POP Network is our point of purchase screens through out the Western Mass area for advertisements to reach an even larger local audience with video ads.

AGEFI Luxembourg, the first financial newspaper in Luxembourg, was created in 1988 and reports monthly (newspaper) and daily (newsletter: the Fax) in French and English on financial, economic, political, social, cultural and European news in Luxembourg. Name: La revue européenne des médias et du numérique
Description:
Paraissant chaque trimestre depuis décembre 2006, La revue européenne des médias et du  numérique est conçue et réalisée par l’Institut de recherche et d’études sur la communication (IREC), dirigé par Francis Balle, professeur à l’Université Panthéon-Assas (Paris 2), en partenariat avec l'ISTC.

UN TRIMESTRE EN EUROPE
Les événements les plus marquants ou les plus significatifs advenus au cours du trimestre écoulé dans l’un ou l’autre des pays membres de l’Union européenne ou du Conseil de l’Europe. Ces événements décrits et analysés sont classés en fonction de leur domaine d’élection : le droit, les techniques, l’économie et les usages.

REPÈRES & TENDANCES
Les faits et les événements advenus ailleurs, au-delà des frontières de l’Europe ; la vie des acteurs globaux, dès lors qu’elle marque de son empreinte les médias en Europe ; les mots, les expressions ou les chiffres à retenir, puisqu’ils illustrent les évolutions ou les bouleversements dans le monde des médias ; au même titre que certains travaux d’observation ou d’analyse accessibles en ligne. Ces quatre rubriques ont en commun d’éclairer et d’illustrer l’actualité des médias en Europe. Certains faits, apparemment insignifiants, ne manquent pas parfois d’être annonciateurs de changements particulièrement notables.

ARTICLES & CHRONIQUES
A propos d’un fait ou d’un évènement de l’actualité récente, les articles ou les chroniques engagent une réflexion sur la signification qu’il revêt, assortie des commentaires qu’il est susceptible d’appeler. Articles et chroniques entendent ainsi ouvrir un débat, sinon prolonger ou enrichir une controverse.

Description:

Deutsches Handwerksblatt gehört zu den großen überparteilichen Wirtschaftstiteln für das Handwerk und den Mittelstand. Wir berichten fundiert und praxisnah über aktuelle Entwicklungen aus den Bereichen Wirtschaft, Politik, Finanzen und Technik, um unseren Lesern stets wertvolle Informationen und Anregungen mit einem echten Mehrwert für den Betriebsalltag zu bieten.

Unsere erfahrene Redaktion setzt dabei auf Nutzwertjournalismus und liefert mit einer Auflage von rund 350.000 Exemplaren nahezu jedem dritten Handwerksbetrieb in Deutschland hochwertigen und gut recherchierten Content – immer lesefreundlich aufbereitet und prägnant auf den Punkt gebracht.

Geballtes Know-how zum Nulltarif! Das neueste digitale Leseangebot vom Deutschen Handwerksblatt, SUUM, ist speziell für das Handwerk und den Mittelstand entwickelt worden. Hier bringen wir alles, was Betriebe heute betrifft, auf den Tisch und zoomen heran. Ob Klimawandel, Werkzeugneuheiten, Digitalisierung, Caravaning oder Messe - im SUUM finden Sie umfassende Informationen zu den wichtigen Themen. Werden Sie Teil unserer Community und profitieren Sie von unseren wertvollen Informationen und Anregungen für Ihren Betriebsalltag. https://www.handwerksblatt.de/impressum

Description:
The Young Reporter scheme is a schools programme giving students aged 14-18 an opportunity to write for a real live online newspaper. The programme runs for eight months during the school term, with various opportunities offered along the way.

What is involved?
• Students sign up for eight months writing one article per month
• ALL articles are published on our online newspapers
• The scheme runs from September through to April every year
• All those completing the scheme receive a written recommendation
• Various opportunities are offered along the way such as tickets to theatre productions, interview with companies or highly regarded people, days out and many more
• At the end of the scheme, there is a chance to go forward and compete for prizes
• Winners receive an undergraduate day at a London University
• Top thirty-three students attend a Media Award Ceremony
• One student from each age group becomes the face of the following year
• Students doing Duke of Edinburgh can do the scheme as one of their skills

Name: Hood Magazine
Description:
You might refer to us as Scotland's newest glossy magazine, but we like to think we're doing things a little bit differently. The country's first, free national magazine created exclusively by working women for working women, we don't just know our reader, we walk in her shoes.

We're high achievers - but we still think keeping on top of the laundry basket is a laudable success. We care how we look - but we don't have hours to spend ironing, and we rely on dry shampoo a little more than we'd like to admit. 

Aimed squarely at Scotland's savvy professional women, our reader may well have already built both a career and a family, but she is at a stage in her life where she's more likely to be climbing the career ladder than stepping off it. Now, as she prepares to enter the prime of her life, she wants an emotionally intelligent magazine that is cool and contemporary, that recognises the diverse needs and desires of modern women, and that speaks to her the way her friends do over a contraband glass of school night pinot noir (even if they all know that two-day hangovers are now a definite reality.

Each month, Hood will bring you a unique mix of expertly curated fashion, beauty, interiors, food and drink, travel and wellbeing content, highlighting a lifestyle that is both aspirational and modern, yet affordable, accessible and, most importantly, always rooted in Scotland. Because this is our 'hood, and we think the cool, accomplished, funny women that make it what it is deserve a magazine that celebrates them.

By engaging citizen journalists, bloggers, tweeters and combining that with newswires, professional writers and high-profile commentators we provide a much more interesting soup than what a traditional media company can ever produce.

We would like to invite you to join us on our journey towards bringing the Middle East closer to the rest of the world. It is our great hope that you will find Your Middle East useful, interesting and important.

With the largest distribution network outside of the Royal Mail, we offer solus distribution to 20m homes, newshare distribution & sampling (geographically & demographically targeted).
Our aim is to deliver innovative solutions & bespoke creative concepts via multiple channels; highly targeted websites, mobile, newspapers, magazines, leaflets & our latest offering, The National.  With a combined circulation of 1.5m copies and 4m readers, the National is the 3rd largest title in the Country, behind the Sun and the Daily Mail.  
The National’s major USP is the 2.1m readers who don’t read ANY national paid for newspaper.  We can therefore extend the reach of traditional national newspaper advertising to a new audience.

Our 90 staff are located across four offices - London, Manchester, Coventry & Glasgow.

Eşik Bekçisi’nin muhabirlerinin her birisi bir şehir mektupçusudur. Genç insanların her biri enerjileri, iyimserlikleri, neşeleriyle İstanbul gibi kutsal bir şehri yazmaya koyuldular. İstanbul‘un her şeyi hakkında durmadan yazdılar. Şehir Mektupçusu unvanını Ahmet Rasim’den devraldılar

Description:
Cairns Post is Cairns' oldest continually running business and the largest media organisation in Far North Queensland. The Cairns Post serves Cairns and the region with news in a daily newspaper and as it happens online.

Dating back to 1882, Cairns Post has evolved from a broadsheet afternoon newspaper to a multi-media company producing several newspaper, online content and specialist publications.

Part of News Corp Australia, Cairns Post has evolved as a company to reflect the growing, cosmopolitan city of Cairns with a steady circulation and digital readership growing significantly over the years. Throughout its history, the paper has endeavoured to reflect and celebrate the community it serves.

Our website cairnspost.com.au is a portal to everything ‘Cairns’ wrapped up in a modern package that reflects the zest and energy of our city. The site offers community and locally-based content powered by Cairns Post, combining the best and latest news and information from around the region.

Name: Mail Today (The India Today Group)
Description:
Mail Today, a daily newspaper in compact format, is published by Mail Today Newspapers Private Limited, a joint venture between the India Today Group and Daily Mail of London. Mail Today is a morning daily with a difference. Clean, lucid and straight- talking, Mail Today marries the credibility and authenticity of the India Today Group with Daily Mail's international standards. Mail Today comes with a wide range of sections, all of which make for a compelling read: *Money Mail *Good Health * Femail *Lifestyle* It's Friday! *Entertainment *Property Mail *You *Review* Travel Mail. An engaging read for the new Indian that makes good mornings just great. 

INDIA TODAY, the India Today Group's weekly magazine, is the number one news magazine in the country. Launched in 1975, the magazine in just a few years became the leading newsmagazine in the country. Now, with editions in five languages, it has become the most widely read publication in India-a position it has held for over a decade-with a circulation of 1.1 million every week and a readership of more than 15 million. Name: Santa Fe New Mexican
Description:
As the newspaper of record for the cultural and political capital of New Mexico, The Santa Fe New Mexican has won numerous awards for its editorial excellence, community involvement, and design, and has a paid print circulation of 20K+ and website/digital readership with more than 1.75 Million unique visitors each month. Strong statehouse and arts and culture coverage, solid social media and engaging live blogs have made The New Mexican a leading news and information resource for northern New Mexico.

Founded in 1847, The New Mexican is one of the oldest newspaper west of the Mississippi and is privately owned.  Along with the daily paper, The New Mexican prints a number of "magazines" that inform the public about resources and happenings, ranging from resources for kids' summer fun to cancer treatment options to the latest in globally recognized entertainment.  

Pasatiempo, The Santa Fe New Mexican's ubiquitous arts and entertainment Friday magazine, has been covering northern New Mexico’s active and high impact arts industry for nearly three decades. Pasatiempo's original editorial content includes a mix of stories and reviews for music, dance, theater, books, films, architecture, restaurants, galleries and museum exhibitions ensures that it is the "go to" guide for residents and visitors alike.

The New Mexican’s commercial printing operation prints more than 25 publications, including our sister paper, The Taos News, and the daily New York Times.  Our state-of-the-art printing facility boasts 3 presses and runs 24 hours a day.  Honors include the Inland Press Association’s first place quality printing award and recognition from the New York Times as a  “TOP 3 Print Site” for both quality and on-time delivery nation-wide and more.  And more.

The New Mexican is embedded in the culture of New Mexico and helps to preserve and highlight the many aspects of the diversity of what is New Mexico.

Name: The Stanford Daily
Description:
The Stanford Daily is the independent, student-run newspaper of Stanford University. The Daily was originally founded as a small pamphlet known as The Daily Palo Alto in 1892 and has been a campus fixture ever since. The Daily strives to serve the Stanford community with relevant, unbiased journalism and provides its editorial and business staffs with unparalleled educational opportunities.

The Stanford Daily publishes Monday through Friday during the academic year and maintains a circulation of 8,000 to more than 500 locations on the Stanford campus and throughout the city of Palo Alto. The Daily publishes several special issues every year, including a New Student Orientation issue, a Big Game issue and a Commencement issue.

Name: MENA Stories
Description:
MENA Stories - Where the Heart of the Middle East & North America Beats

MENA Stories is your gateway to the pulse of the Middle East and North America—a dynamic platform celebrating the region's most compelling narratives across people, culture, and business. We go beyond headlines to uncover the human stories, cultural movements, and entrepreneurial spirit that define this diverse and rapidly evolving region.

People: We spotlight the visionaries, changemakers, and everyday heroes shaping MENA's future. From trailblazing entrepreneurs and creative pioneers to community leaders and rising talents, we share authentic stories that inspire, challenge perspectives, and showcase the remarkable individuals driving progress across our region.

Culture: MENA's rich cultural tapestry deserves a platform that honors its depth and diversity. We explore art, music, fashion, food, heritage, and contemporary movements that reflect our identity. Whether it's traditional craftsmanship meeting modern design or emerging artists redefining creative expression, we celebrate the cultural renaissance happening across MENA.

Business: The region is experiencing unprecedented transformation. We cover the innovations, trends, and business insights that matter—from startups disrupting industries to corporate strategies shaping economies, from real estate developments redefining skylines to tech breakthroughs positioning MENA on the global stage.

MENA Stories bridges tradition and innovation, local and global, aspiration and achievement. We provide a nuanced perspective on a region often misunderstood, highlighting opportunities, addressing challenges, and fostering meaningful dialogue among professionals, entrepreneurs, creatives, and thought leaders.

Join our community of forward-thinking readers who believe that understanding MENA's stories—its people, culture, and business landscape—is essential to understanding where the world is headed.

Name: Power Electronic Devices and Components
Description:
Power Electronic Devices and Components (PEDC) is an open-access journal specifically focusing on power-electronic devices and components, including materials, fabrication, design, characterization, and applications. On top of that, PEDC aims at being a timely and powerful tool to create a new synergy between the power-device- and the power-electronics community.

The coverage of the journal includes the following topics:
Active power components: design and fabrication process, physics and characterization, FEM- and compact modeling, packaging and related issues, failure mechanisms, and reliability, extreme conditions, emerging power devices;
Passive power components: capacitors, inductors and transformers, printed circuit boards, fuses, and ancillary components;
Related topics in the field of power components: gate drivers and disruptive applications, e.g. 10 kV and higher, energy harvesting, condition monitoring, and EMI in power electronics.
PEDC publishes Research Papers, describing significant advances and completed work. Review Papers are welcome to report on important and developing topics of general interest. Practical papers reporting case studies and specific application domains are particularly encouraged.

All contributions are subject to rigorous peer review by leading experts in the field. Special issues devoted to emerging topics and premium international conferences should be proposed to the Editors-in-Chief for consideration.

BDN community reporting is focused on Maine’s more rural regions, in eastern and northern Maine. Tento týždenník prináša komplexné informácie určené odborným profesiám v zdravotníctve a farmácii, pravidelne uverejňuje analýzy a štatistiky, kalendár odborných a vzdelávacích podujatí, informácie o trhu práce v zdravotníctve a knižné novinky so zdravotníckou tematikou.

Description:
Relikto.com, site d'information culturelle, vous accompagne dans vos choix de sorties, avec chaque jour des articles, un agenda, des propositions de places à gagner, sur l'ensemble du territoire normand.

Nous nous souhaitons comme une plateforme culturelle régionale de référence, au croisement entre les publics, les artistes, les disciplines et les lieux de notre région.
Comme la culture est un service public, nous avons voulu un site gratuit afin de mettre en commun des informations sur la vie culturelle et de favoriser l’accès à la culture pour tous. Relikto a souhaité être une association, engagée dans les valeurs civilisatrices et éducatives de la culture, et vit grâce aux soutiens et partenariats actés avec les structures et manifestations culturelles, les villes et institutions du territoire normand.
La direction éditoriale du magazine est assurée par Maryse Bunel, fondatrice du magazine. Celle-ci a été responsable du service culturel à Paris Normandie et du cahier culturel hebdomadaire à Liberté Dimanche avant de devenir journaliste et dirigeante associée à Filfax, site d’informations générales normand.
Muriel Beaumale-Dubos est en charge des partenariats, de la communication et du développement du magazine.
Hervé Debruyne - journaliste, Bastien Cantillon - journaliste, formateur médias, conférencier et Nathalie Ochal - rédactrice indépendante @litote renforcent l'équipe éditoriale.

Name: AGRICOOP NEWS AFRICA
Description:
Lumbani Chilenga Investments Limited (LC), a wholly-owned Zambian company founded by Gideon Lumbani Chilenga in 2009. Since our inception, we have continually expanded our portfolio, beginning with our inaugural project, the Agriculture Publication.

CURRENT PROJECTS UNDER LC:
1.    Agricoop Newspaper:
Established in 2009, Agricoop Newspaper aims to bridge the information gap between small to medium-scale farmers and stakeholders in the agriculture sector.

2.   Agricoop Award:
The Agricoop Awards, initiated in 2022, celebrate the outstanding farmers in Zambia, recognizing their achievements and innovations. Open to farmers nationwide, these awards aim to honor excellence and encourage continuous improvement in the agricultural sector.

3.   AgriTalk Africa Podcast
AgriTalk Africa is a vibrant platform that brings timely, relevant conversations on agriculture to the forefront across the continent. From expert interviews to farmer stories and market insights, AgriTalk keeps Africa’s agricultural community informed, inspired, and connected. Whether it’s discussing new technologies, sustainable practices, or policy shifts, AgriTalk Africa is where the continent’s agri-voices meet.

4. Farmers choice Awards & Expo Africa
FCA & Expo Africa is a Pan-African platform dedicated to celebrating excellence and promoting innovation in agriculture. At the heart of the initiative are the Farmers Choice Awards (FCA), which recognize outstanding service providers, agribusinesses, and cooperatives nominated and voted for by farmers themselves. This farmer-led approach ensures authenticity and highlights those truly making a difference on the ground. The platform also includes the FCA Expo Africa and the FCA Africa Summit.

The Expo is a dynamic business-to-business exhibition that connects key stakeholders farmers, suppliers, buyers, policymakers, and development partners for trade, networking, and collaboration.

The Summit serves as a thought leadership forum.

Description:

The Dartmouth is published by The Dartmouth, Inc., an independent, nonprofit corporation chartered in the state of New Hampshire. All editorial and business decisions are made by the students without any interference from the College.

The newspaper is published daily, Monday through Friday, from September to June, except during examination periods and vacations. In addition to the regular newspaper, The Dartmouth publishes two weekly supplements, Big Green Sports Weekly on Mondays and The Dartmouth Mirror, The D’s weekly magazine, on Fridays. The print edition is free to students on campus.

Name: La Opinión-El Correo de Zamora
Description:
La Opinión-El Correo de Zamora es la suma de dos cabeceras, dos diarios, que se unieron en el año 1993 para cubrir desde un punto de vista imparcial y serio el acontecer de Zamora. El diario pertenece a Editorial Prensa Ibérica, que cuenta con otras 17 cabeceras en toda España.

La Opinión-El Correo de Zamora también tiene una edición digital www.laopiniondezamora.es

Name: OFF Magazine
Description:
Pourquoi Off ?

Que se passe-t-il lorsque les projecteurs s’éteignent? Lorsqu’on
appuie sur le bouton Off ? Et là juste avant que le rideau ne s’ouvre?
Quelques heures avant que la poursuite dirige son flot de lumières sur l’artiste en représentation?

Off, c’est aussi un terme qu’on utilise fréquemment dans le
journalisme. Lorsque la conversation prend une tournure plus intime.
Plus secrète. «On se dit tout, mais c’est Off…»

Le lecteur, lui, se plongera avec un certain bonheur dans les
pages de son magazine préféré dès qu’il aura un moment Off. Une ou
deux heures devant lui pour découvrir tous ces univers qui s’offrent à
lui…

Avec le magazine Off, nous proposons de prendre nos lecteurs par
la main et de leur faire découvrir les secrets du show business. Comme
si on fermait le rideau sur la scène et que l’on jetait un oeil curieux en
coulisses.

Name: The Pioneer
Description:
The Pioneer is a 6-day a week newspaper covering Big Rapids, greater Mecosta County, Osceola County and parts of Lake and Newaygo Counties.

With a focus on local news and people, the Pioneer is the leading newspaper in its region. The Pioneer has strong emphasis on community journalism with complete coverage of schools, government, courts and news of general interest.

Complete local sports coverage is featured, as well as coverage of Ferris State University athletics.

A wide variety of editorial opinion is offered on its editorial page from columnists as well as from the public in letters to the editor.

Regular specialty pages include food, youth, religion, travel, business, entertainment, home and outdoor.

The Pioneer has a strong classified section and is supported by area advertisers providing readers with advertising information as well.

Name: The Triangle
Description:
The Independent Newspaper of Drexel University

First appearing on campus in 1926, The Triangle is the newspaper-of-record at Drexel University. The paper is published every Friday during the fall, winter, and spring terms, and every other week over the summer. Being both financially and editorially independent of the University, all decisions about content as well as the paper's growth are made by the Editor-in-Chief and Editorial Board.

The Triangle covers campus and Philadelphia news, sports and entertainment as it affects the Drexel community. Each issue also contains commentaries, classifieds, puzzles & comics and a campus events calendar.

Name: Julietta Magazine
Description: Somos uma revista digital feminina, com uma equipe composta 100% por mulheres que trabalham pelo entretenimento de outras mulheres. Nossa maior alegria é fazer da comunicação social um local seguro, alegre e leve para você, leitora.

Name: Lexington Herald-Leader
Description: The Lexington Herald-Leader is the leading news and information source for Central and Eastern Kentucky in print and digital platforms. The company operates Kentucky.com, KentuckySports.com and LexGo.com, among other digital products. It is owned by The McClatchy Company, based in Sacramento, California.

Name: PYC MEDIA
Description: PYC MEDIA est un groupe de presse professionnelle indépendant centré sur les marchés du bâtiment, du froid, des fonctions supports de l’entreprise, de l’agroalimentaire, etc. PYC MEDIA propose des solutions d’informations professionnelles ciblées (revues, sites internet, ouvrages techniques, événements professionnels).

Name: The Daily Herald
Description: Local Utah news, sports coverage, business announcements, events, photos, videos, and more from Utah Valley's leading newspaper: the Daily Herald. For more than 100 years the Daily Herald has been Utah Valley's source for all news. The company is now one of the most influential and innovative news sources in all of Utah valley.

Name: The Heights, Inc.
Description: The Heights, Boston College’s independent student newspaper, is both editorially and financially independent from Boston College. The Heights serves the students, faculty, and staff of the Boston College community as well as our neighbors in Allston-Brighton.

Name: hospitalityInside
Description:
HospitalityInside is an information provider specialized in international hospitality. Communicating in both German and English, the online magazine is the company's backbone taking its content to events, conferences and workshops, also cementing reader loyalty. 

www.hospitalityInside.com addresses top-level management of hotel operations, investment/finance, real estate, distribution and human resources. The hotel managers are heading leading hotel groups and private hotels. 

www.hospitalityInside.com was launched in March 2005 and still belongs to the small circle of media free of advertisements. Weekly, the magazine publishes news, extensive features and background stories, all by own research. 

The journalistic magazine is built on insider knowledge, it tracks industry trends early and repeatedly comes up with exclusive stories and "Breaking News". Reporting coves Continental Europa and the Middle East, however, the articles also cover the global players and trends. The editorial columns include, among others Real Estate (Development, Finance), Management (Operations, Strategies,  Human Resources, Marketing), Markets (Analysis, M&As), Travel (Destinations, Business Travel, MICE, Tour Operaters), Health/Wellness and Personnel News. 

Maria Puetz-Willems is the founder and editor in chief of hospitalityInside.com, a classically trained editor working freelance for 16 years. Her editorial team today consists of a core team of about ten journalists and authors. 

The HospitalityInside Publishing House has been initiating different networking events, workshops and conferences for ten years, all focusing on hospitality and being directly connected to international trade fairs like the world's biggest tourism show ITB Berlin (2006-2017) and Europe's leading trade show for property and investment, Expo Real (since 2008).

Name: The Emancipator
Description: The Emancipator is a reimagining of the first abolitionist newspaper in the United States with a focus on explaining and identifying solutions to structural racism. The publication is housed at Howard University and is provided without a paywall.

Description: Gambhir Mudda is a bilingual weekly news paper, published from Lucknow. Uttar Pradesh.

Name: Der Freitag

With a commitment to independent reporting, it covers diverse topics ranging from politics, culture, society, and more. Stay informed and inspired with Der Freitag's in-depth analysis and fresh perspectives.

Name: Groupe Eco-Médias
Description:
Eco-Médias, créé en 1991 à Casablanca, est le premier groupe de presse au Maroc. Il est entièrement privé. Le groupe publie deux quotidiens de référence sur le marché, L'Economiste et Assabah.

L'Economiste est le premier quotidien francophone du Maroc, et le premier quotidien économique.

Assabah est le leader incontesté pour ses informations exclusives, dans le sport, la politique, les faits sociaux...

Le groupe a aussi une station de radio bilingue, Atlantic Radio, dont le slogan est «Musique, Info, Eco». Sa couleur musicale est celle des grands succès des années 1950 à 2000 et elle est numéro Un de l’information à caractère économique.

Eco-Médias opère aussi dans la formation et comprend en tant que filiale à 100% l'Ecole Supérieure de Journalisme et de Communication à Casablanca. Une école spécialisée dans la formation aux métiers des médias et de la communication.

Name: Awotele Magazine
Description: La revue ciné panafricaine. FR/EN. Depuis 2015. Publiée à l'occasion des grands festivals de cinéma d'Afrique (Carthage, Ouagadougou, Durban).

Name: Credence Turbine
Description:
Credence Turbine is a global market research and news portal. Our insightful analysis focuses on developed and emerging markets. We identify trends and forecast markets to help businesses identify market opportunities to optimize strategies.

Our team of 17 analysts provides strategic insights to companies. Credence Turbine works to help companies grow through strategic ideas and actionable solutions.

Name: Lancaster Farming
Description:
"The Farmers’ Choice Since 1955"

Lancaster Farming is the leading agricultural newspaper in the Mid-Atlantic. Lancaster Farming delivers news on ag commodities, agribusiness and country life every Saturday in print, and daily at LancasterFarming.com. 

The print newspaper circulates to over 50,000 paid subscribers throughout Pennsylvania and beyond. The paper reaches many agricultural industries including dairy, beef, poultry, swine, horse, produce and more. It also features country life focused stories and recipes. 

Additionally, a robust classified section and the famous Mailbox Markets provide a marketplace for agribusinesses. 

Lancaster Farming also features a variety of special editions, including an annual Ag Directory and Fair Guide, as well as monthly features like Eastern Dairy Reporter and Mid-Atlantic Horse, a premier equine publication. 

Lancaster Farming averages 200 pages per issue and has been in continuous weekly print since 1955.

Name: fairways magazine
Description: Depuis 2004, fairways, le magazine de la culture golf, décrypte la planète golf avec un ton décalé. Tout ce qui fait du golf un plaisir est dans fairways, la revue "à par". Le classement annuel des parcours et resorts "Best Golf" fait référence et le Guide "Hôtels & Golfs" vous accompagne dans vos déplacements. Coté compétition, la "fairways Cup" va à votre rencontre en France.

 Retrouvez nos conseils pratiques taillés sur mesure pour les acteurs économiques locaux. 
 Restez informé des dernières évolutions du droit du travail suisse, analysé par nos experts. 
 Ne ratez rien de l'agenda économique et politique genevois. 
 Explorez nos dossiers thématiques.

Name: Mondo Internazionale Post
Description:
Mondo Internazionale Post è il quotidiano online che fornisce analisi del contesto internazionale tramite un’informazione chiara, imparziale e apartitica con la società.

Parliamo di #Geopolitica, #Diplomazia e #Intelligence

Il team di redattori di Mondo Internazionale, formato da giovani talenti under 35 a livello internazionale, offre uno sguardo completo sulla realtà che ci circonda affrontando tematiche diverse, ma interconnesse a livello globale. 

I contenuti suddivisi per aree indicano i temi affrontati dai team di redazione. Ogni team è composto da studenti e neolaureati appassionati e studiosi dei temi affrontati e condivisi con il pubblico. L'impostazione orientata ad uno sguardo globale sulla realtà è il motivo per cui è possibile ricercare le notizie secondo l'area geografica che interessa al lettore.

Name: MOVER magazine

International MOVER magazine
Fashion | Beauty | Culture | Art 

MOVER Magazine is not just a fashion gloss.  MOVER is a publication about life that everyone aspires to.  Becoming our reader and client, you get a unique opportunity to be not only an observer but also an active participant in the events that unfold on the pages of the magazine. The publication in each issue offers useful information about all spheres of life of a modern person.  
MOVER is a journal about experiments.  For people and about people who take everything from life!

Name: TK-Report

Seit 50 Jahren spiegelt der TK-Report das Marktgeschehen wider: mit detaillierten Analysen und Berichte über Firmen, Produkte, Marken, Märkte, Macher und Trends aus der TK-Branche.

Name: Newsweek Psychologia
Description:
Magazyn poznawczo-praktyczny, przybliżający i opisujący zjawiska związane z psychologią w oparciu o najnowszą wiedzę. Materiały prezentowane w publikacjach mają charakter problemowy, traktują człowieka holistycznie, a psychologię jako dziedzinę interdyscyplinarną.

Gwarantem jakości treści jest redaktor prowadząca Iwona Zabielska-Stadnik. 
Każde wydanie powstaje we współpracy z najlepszymi ekspertami i praktykami, którzy specjalizują się w dziedzinach związanych z psychologią.

Name: Rembobine
Description: Rembobine mesure l’impact du journalisme sur la société en allant fouiller dans les articles publiés l’année passée. À chaque édition, on se demande : qu’est-ce qui faisait la une il y a un an ? Où en est-on sur ces sujets aujourd’hui ? On s’attarde également sur une enquête, parue un an auparavant, et on cherche à comprendre pourquoi elle a émergé à l’époque et ce qui a bougé (ou non) depuis.

Name: The National Newspaper

The National is Scotland's only pro-independence daily newspaper.

Ok... the Yes campaign failed to win in 2014, but the referendum changed Scotland forever and the constitution battle is being fought on different territory ... for now.

Since the vote we have seen a surge in membership of the SNP, the Scottish Greens and other parties which supported independence.

A total of 1.6 million people voted yes to independence on September 18. We are proud to give them a voice every day.

Description: تفنيد هي مبادرة مهنية رقمية، لعدد من الصحفيين المستقلين، تعمل على استخدام مصادر المعلومات المفتوحة للتحقق مما يصدر من الجهات الرسمية ( الجهات التنفيذية - الهيئات القضائية- الهيئات الرقابية والتشريعية ) من معلومات، وتفسير سياقات التصريحات والبيانات الإعلامية الرسمية، بدأت العمل في مصر، ثم بدأت رحلة التوسع بشكل تدريجي في المحيط العربي.

Name: China Daily Europe
Description:
Established in 2010, China Daily UK Co. Ltd is the European wholly owned operating subsidiary of China Daily and publishes the European Edition of China's official English language newspaper of record, the China Daily European Weekly. Operating out of its main London headquarters the company also mans regional bureaus in Paris and Brussels.

---

Founded in 1981, China Daily is the official government owned English-language newspaper of the People's Republic of China. With a mission to "help the world understand China, and China to understand the world" it is widely recognised as China's most authoritative English publication and is frequently cited by major foreign media outlets. 

China Daily is the country's only newspaper to establish a foothold in mainstream society in Western countries, and boasts a wide array of readers ranging from politicians and business executives to celebrities and professionals from around the world. More importantly, it is increasingly regarded as an irreplaceable channel for forward-looking government officials and business executives seeking business opportunities and the expansion of market share for their products. 

Through its 33 years of growth, China Daily has matured into a news group with 12 publications. With China Daily as its flagship title along with China Daily Hong Kong Edition, Asia Pacific Weekly, European Weekly and US Daily Edition and other China domestic titles.

NOW Newspapers (Community Newspapers) is a group of eight local weekly newspapers in suburban Milwaukee and Waukesha counties.

The company is part of Journal Communications and the newspapers are distributed with Thursday's Milwaukee Journal Sentinel. Our Wauwatosa and Brookfield-Elm Grove papers are also available on newsstands at area businesses on Thursdays.

We have a hub of 26 websites focusing on local communities. The main site, MyCommunityNOW.com, has an interactive map showing the communities we cover.

Name: South Asian Herald
Description: South Asian Herald (SAH) is an emerging publication committed to serving the vibrant South Asian community. Our mission is to be your trusted source for news, culture, and insights that matter most to the diaspora. With a focus on bridging the gap between South Asia and the global stage, we provide a platform that elevates the voices, stories, and issues that resonate with our readers. Based in the Washington DC metro area, we're on a journey to become a national favorite for all.

Name: Ledelsesavisen
Description:
Ledelsesavisen deler viden, nyheder og debatindlæg om offentlig ledelse. Alle interesserede kan frit holde sig orienteret ved at abonnere på vores nyhedsmail. 
Indlæg på Ledelsesavisen er skrevet af forskere, offentlige ledere og journalister.
 
Formålet med Ledelsesavisen er at bidrage til at højne kvaliteten af ledelsen på offentlige arbejdspladser fra folkeskoler og plejehjem til sygehuse og ministerier. Det gør vi ved at dele viden, erfaringer og holdninger om offentlig ledelse med forskere, offentlige ledere og topembedsmænd.

Derudover ønsker vi at styrke dialogen om offentlig styring og ledelse mellem forskere, nøglemedarbejdere, ledere, politikere og topembedsmænd gennem udgivelse af videns- og erfaringsbaserede indlæg og artikler af høj faglig og sproglig kvalitet.
På Ledelsesavisen udgiver vi indhold om offentlig ledelse, som lægger sig imellem den daglige nyhedsopdatering og længere og lavfrekvente magasiner som Lederstof, Offentlig Ledelse mm.

Ledelsesavisen udgives i samarbejde mellem parterne:
Kronprins Frederik Center for Offentlig Ledelse, Aarhus Universitet
Forum for Fremtidens Offentlige Ledelse og Styring, Københavns Universitet
Institut for Samfundsvidenskab og Erhverv, Roskilde Universitet
Ledelse og Vækst, VIA University College

Name: Ressources Mines & Industrie
Description: Depuis sa fondation, l’objectif des magazine Ressources & Industrie est de créer et développer des outils de communication qui permettent de lier l’ensemble des intervenants du milieu et de développer nos ressources naturelles de façon efficiente, rentable, compétitive et prospère dans le respect de l’environnement et des communautés. Name: Tiempo Argentino
Description:
Tiempo Argentino es un medio autogestionado por sus propios trabajadores desde el 19 de abril de 2016, tras el vaciamiento de los dueños del Grupo 23. Su producto insignia es el diario dominical y cuenta, además, con un diario digital (www.tiempoar.com.ar) y con la Revista T, que es trimestral y con diferente temática en cada número. 
   
Tiempo Argentino es la cooperativa de medios más grande de Argentina y cuenta con un grupo de 95 trabajadores que diariamente redacta noticias que difícilmente se puedan leer en otros sitios. Actualmente el medio tiene una gran cantidad de socios y suscriptores que posibilitan salir con una edición en papel los domingos de 30.000 ejemplares  y un diario digital con más de 1.000.0000 de páginas vistas por mes.

Hoy el aporte de los socios representa el 70% de los ingresos de la cooperativa. Es por eso que somos dueños de nuestras palabras.

Name: pelop_gr
Description: Η εφημερίδα «ΠΕΛΟΠΟΝΝΗΣΟΣ» είναι η σταθερή αξία της ενημέρωσης από το 1886 μέχρι σήμερα. Κορυφαία στην αναγνώριση και την εκτίμηση του κοινού, δεσπόζει στις αναγνωστικές συνήθειες των Αχαιών με επιδόσεις ρεκόρ για τα πανελλαδικά δεδομένα. Πληθωρική στην ύλη της, καλύπτει πλήρως το φάσμα της ειδησεογραφίας σε όλα τα επίπεδα της τοπικής και της εθνικής ζωής. Μαχητική στη φιλοσοφία, προοδευτική στην αντίληψη, αφιερώνει ενέργεια και χώρο σε διεκδικήσεις και προτάσεις που αποσκοπούν σε αναβάθμιση των οριζόντων της τοπικής κοινωνίας. Σελίδες πολιτικές, σελίδες αθλητισμού και πολιτισμού, σελίδες αφιερωμένες στην οικονομία και την αγορά, ρεπορτάζ με έμφαση στην κοινωνία, την παιδεία, το περιβάλλον και τις νέες τεχνολογίες συγκροτούν την ύλη της. Μαζί, ένα πλούσιο παράρτημα Μικρών Αγγελιών που γίνεται καθημερινά ανάρπαστο από το κοινό όλων των ηλικιών.

Description:
EPENSA, Empresa Periodística Nacional S.A. nace a comienzos de 1962, con el lanzamiento de Correo Tacna, hasta entonces llamado diario Sur. Luego vendría la instalación de plantas en Piura,Arequipa y Huancayo. Dando inicio a una cadena de periódicos, todos llamados Correo. Unos cinco años después nació Ojo, y posteriormente Ajá y El Bocón; cada uno dirigido y pensado para un público distinto, esencialmente emprendedor.

El 2012, con 50 años de labor, EPENSA renueva su identidad corporativa como GRUPO EPENSA,atendiendo las nuevas necesidades de la población y las tendencias del mercado, de la mano de los últimos avances tecnológicos en las comunicaciones.

Es por todo lo anterior que el GRUPO EPENSA se consolida con un grupo líder en medios de comunicación, con presencia en todas las regiones del país, comprometido en la promoción del bienestar de las grandes mayorías.

Es precisamente que, atendiendo a las necesidades de todos los peruanos, desde el 2011 el GRUPO EPENSA incorpora a su abanico de productos las revistas: Correo Semanal, Pandora y Audax. Publicaciones que han logrado captar el interés de los segmentos a los cuales se dirigen, marcando una nueva etapa en del grupo.

Name: Wijeya Newspapers Ltd
Description:
Wijeya Newspapers Limited (WNL) is Sri Lanka’s most prominent and influential print and digital media organization. Established in 1979 by Ranjith Wijewardene, WNL has built a reputation grounded in journalistic integrity, public trust, and editorial excellence. 

Today, the company continues under the leadership of Chairman, Ranjith Wijewardene, and Deputy Chairman, Sujan Wijewardene. Publishing in all three national languages, Sinhala, Tamil, and English, WNL reaches millions of Sri Lankans every day through a wide portfolio of respected publications. These include Daily Mirror, Sunday Times, Lankadeepa, Sunday Lankadeepa, Tamil Mirror, Daily FT, and Ada. The company also offers a range of lifestyle and special interest titles including The Sun, HI!! Magazine, LW, Life Online, Sirikatha, and Hit Ad, along with the lifestyle cable television channel HI!! TV. 

WNL has been at the forefront of Sri Lanka’s digital media evolution, offering some of the country’s most trusted and widely accessed online platforms. These include Daily Mirror Online, Lankadeepa Online, Daily FT Online, Tamil Mirror Online, HI!! Online, and WNow. 

With a team of over 840 media professionals, WNL is proud to be the country’s largest and most respected print and digital media house. Our continued focus on accuracy, innovation, and inclusivity ensures that we remain a trusted source of news and storytelling, empowering audiences with timely information and engaging content. At WNL, we believe in the power of information to shape a better and more informed society. Whether in print, online, or on screen, we are committed to delivering excellence in media and continuing our legacy as Sri Lanka’s most influential media brand.
