Name: The Statesman
Description:
The Statesman is one of India's oldest English newspapers. It was founded in Kolkata in 1875 and is directly descended from The Friend of India (founded 1818). The Englishman (founded 1821) was merged with The Statesman in 1934. The Delhi edition of The Statesman began publication in 1931. The Statesman Weekly is a compendium of news and views from the Kolkata and Delhi editions. Printed on airmail paper, it is popular with readers outside India. The Statesman (average weekday circulation approximately 180,000) is a leading English newspaper in West Bengal. The Sunday Statesman has a circulation of 230,000.

The Statesman has distinguished itself through objective coverage of events, its value as an honest purveyor of news emphasised at times of crisis such as the Bengal Famine of 1943 and the infamous internal Emergency of the mid-1970s. It is forthright in the expression of its views. Its pursuit of the truth has been relentless and often at considerable cost to itself, as when the government of Indira Gandhi, in gross abuse of power, attempted to suppress its voice and when the government of Rajiv Gandhi interfered with the grant of statutory clearances to its modernisation plans unless the paper changed its editorial stance.

On 23 September 2002, The Statesman launched an edition from Bhubaneswar, the capital of Orissa. This edition addresses the long-felt needs of readers in the coastal state, providing them authentic news and objective views. The Statesman is the first English newspaper to invest in plant and machinery in the state.

The Statesman is a founding member of Asia News Network, a grouping of 15 Asian newspapers that have joined hands to for coverage of Asian events through Asian eyes.

Name: Peloponnisos Newspaper
Description: Η εφημερίδα «ΠΕΛΟΠΟΝΝΗΣΟΣ» είναι η σταθερή αξία της ενημέρωσης από το 1886 μέχρι σήμερα. Κορυφαία στην αναγνώριση και την εκτίμηση του κοινού, δεσπόζει στις αναγνωστικές συνήθειες των Αχαιών με επιδόσεις ρεκόρ για τα πανελλαδικά δεδομένα. Πληθωρική στην ύλη της, καλύπτει πλήρως το φάσμα της ειδησεογραφίας σε όλα τα επίπεδα της τοπικής και της εθνικής ζωής. Μαχητική στη φιλοσοφία, προοδευτική στην αντίληψη, αφιερώνει ενέργεια και χώρο σε διεκδικήσεις και προτάσεις που αποσκοπούν σε αναβάθμιση των οριζόντων της τοπικής κοινωνίας. Σελίδες πολιτικές, σελίδες αθλητισμού και πολιτισμού, σελίδες αφιερωμένες στην οικονομία και την αγορά, ρεπορτάζ με έμφαση στην κοινωνία, την παιδεία, το περιβάλλον και τις νέες τεχνολογίες συγκροτούν την ύλη της. Μαζί, ένα πλούσιο παράρτημα Μικρών Αγγελιών που γίνεται καθημερινά ανάρπαστο από το κοινό όλων των ηλικιών.

Name: La Mañana
Description:
La Mañana es una referente histórico de la prensa uruguaya. Fundado en 1917 por Pedro Manini Ríos y Héctor R. Gómez, surgió como expresión de una corriente modernizadora y popular que irrumpió originalmente en América Latina a partir de las reformas democráticas de avanzada que marcaron la época, como la ley de las 8 horas y el voto universal y secreto.
Testigo fiel de nuestro acontecer nacional e internacional, en sus páginas, durante más de medio siglo, se registró diariamente el dinámico fluir de la actualidad y la noticia que alimentan lenta pero inexorablemente el caudaloso río de la historia. Contó con la firma y el sello de grandes periodistas, reporteros, fotógrafos y columnistas que hicieron de La Mañana uno de los diarios más leídos del país.
Ya en el siglo XXI, acompañando los vertiginosos avances tecnológicos en las comunicaciones que han transformado a los medios informativos de todo el mundo, La Mañana adapta su inconfundible estilo a las nuevas plataformas digitales para brindar variadas formas de acceso a sus contenidos y servicios.
Asimismo, en esta fase de la globalización económica y política, se imponen nuevas escalas geográficas que traspasan antiguas fronteras administrativas o ideológicas e involucran un conjunto de intereses comunes desde el punto de vista social y cultural.
De esta manera, La Mañana se define como un medio nacional de información general; plural y democrático; con una mirada orientada hacia la Cuenca del Plata, con vocación por la integración regional y la multipolaridad internacional; y con un enfoque predilecto por la producción agro-industrial y la justicia social, sin perder de vista que para nosotros "el interior es capital".
Los valores que cimientan el trabajo de este medio son fundamentalmente la verdad y la dignidad humana, como base para un periodismo profesional y ético que aporte los bienes inmateriales necesarios en la construcción permanente de la comunidad humana.

Name: EcoActu.ma
Description:
EcoActu.ma est un média marocain libre et indépendant, sans aucune appartenance politique ou idéologique, qui vient enrichir le paysage de la presse électronique marocaine en livrant à l’opinion publique une information qui aide notamment à la prise de décision dans des domaines variés : Économie, Finances, Management, Développement durable, politique…

L’équipe rédactionnelle, forte d’une longue expérience dans les médias et le monde du business, s’engage à mettre à la disposition de notre audience qualifiée une information de qualité. 

A cet effet, la plateforme propose une large palette de contenus riches et diversifiés : Écrit, vidéo ou audio qui s’adaptent aux besoins de notre audience.

Name: OZDRAVME | Hovorme o lepšom zdravotníctve
Description:
Portál ozdravme.sk vznikol začiatkom roku 2023, no idea založiť nové médium, ktoré sa bude zaoberať výlučne zdravotníctvom, zdravím a zdravotnou politikou, je staršia. 

Na začiatku sa spoluzakladateľ portálu Šimon Jeseňák začal stretávať s profesionálmi, ktorí v zdravotníctve profesionálne pôsobia už dlhé roky. Zhodli sa na tom, že na Slovensku chýba médium, ktoré bude širokú profesionálnu i laickú verejnosť informovať o súčasnom dianí v zdravotníctve. 

Ideu o založení nového média následne predstavil Jane Andelovej, ktorá sa s ideou založenia nového portálu stotožnila. Dnes pôsobí v portáli ozdravme.sk ako jeho šéfredaktorka. 

Našou ambíciou je prinášať objektívne spravodajstvo, komplexné analýzy a exkluzívne rozhovory. Portál ozdravme má byť zároveň priestorom pre odbornú diskusiu zdravotníckych expertov ale aj politikov s verejnosťou.

Slovensko v tom lepšom prípade stagnuje a verejná diskusia o zdravotníctve sa hýbe len veľmi pomaly ak vôbec. Chceme prispieť k tomu, aby sa to zmenilo a aby naše zdravotníctvo reflektovalo na potreby pacienta v 21.storočí. 

Poďme spolu hovoriť o dobrom zdravotníctve.

Name: The Stork
Description:
The Stork is the student media outlet of IE University, that is completely student-led and managed. Since 2018, our team has strived to provide a platform for students to express their opinion, report on news within their communities and give advice to the student body through creating media publications that are both informative and entertaining. Through the content posted on both our website and social media, we aim to amplify IE community voices.

The Stork establishes a place where our community can come together and share its thoughts, ideas, and passions. We are a mechanism for the improvement of our experience through information and greater student involvement. 

We here at The Stork believe that all voices should be welcomed into discussions involving current events, political and social issues as well as all other aspects of life!

Name: Upsala Nya Tidning
Description:
Upsala Nya Tidning är en av Sveriges största lokaltidningar och Upplands ledande dagstidning. Vi på UNT har koll på vad som händer där du bor. Vi står för en snabb och objektiv nyhetsförmedling, vi förklarar varför saker händer, granskar makten och har de berörande berättelserna om människorna som bor här. Vi skildrar även det lokala kulturlivet och sporten samt ger plats för lokal debatt och opinionsbildning i en liberal anda.

Varje dag, dygnet runt levererar vi dina lokala nyheter. Som prenumerant kan du ta del av nyheterna via vår app, nyhetssajt, e-tidning eller genom att få papperstidningen levererad i till din brevlåda.

 
Genom vår lokalkännedom kan både läsare och företag ta del av kraften av lokal media. Med smarta medielösningar och kreativt innehåll hjälper vi företagare att nå ut och få affären att växa. Det stora engagemanget hos våra läsare, tillsammans med vår höga lokala räckvidd, gör att vi kan erbjuda företag en stark och effektiv kanal att annonsera i. Vill ditt företag synas i våra kanaler? Läs mer om oss på ntmmedia.se/titlar/upsala-nya-tidning/

 
Vi är en del av i NTM, en av Sveriges största koncerner för lokal media, med främsta syfte att bedriva publicistisk verksamhet. Koncernen är stiftelseägd, vilket garanterar oberoende journalistik och möjligheten att agera långsiktigt.

Tipsa gärna redaktionen om aktuella händelser, samhällsfrågor som du vill veta mer om och missförhållanden som behöver uppmärksammas. Mejla till tipsa@unt.se

Vill du söka jobb hos oss? Läs mer och se alla våra lediga tjänster på ntmmedia.se/jobb

Name: The Gainesville Sun
Description: The Gainesville Sun is a daily newspaper located in North-Central Florida. It covers Gainesville and Alachua County as well as several surrounding counties in the area. The company maintains several websites including Gainesville.com and Gatorsports.com.

Name: Scottish Daily Record and Sunday Mail Ltd
Description: Scotland’s largest news brand with the two best-read national titles in the land, the Daily Record and Sunday Mail, the largest news brand website in dailyrecord.co.uk, the Metro newspaper, a business division fronted by Business Insider Magazine plus 17 local titles.

Name: The Daily Illini
Description:
Since 1871, The Daily Illini has been a mainstay on the University of Illinois campus and has grown into one of the country’s largest student-run newspapers. Distributed free throughout Champaign-Urbana, The Daily Illini provides the campus community with its number one source for news, sports coverage, commentary and public opinion. The Daily Illini publishes twice per week in print and daily online.

Additionally, a number of topical special editions — including our New Student Edition, Ebert Film Festival Guide, and semi-annual career and housing guides — round out our coverage of the University community.

Name: Brixner - Unabhängige Monatszeitschrift
Description:
Herzlich Willkommen auf unserer LinkedIn-Seite! Der "Brixner" ist die meistgelesene Zeitschrift im Bezirk Eisacktal und darüber hinaus.

Sie möchten den "Brixner" kostenfrei jeden Monat in Ihrem Briefkasten erhalten? Schreiben Sie uns Ihre Adresse an: abo@brixner.info.

Neuigkeiten aus dem Bezirk, spannend erzählt, attraktiv präsentiert und kostenlos beziehbar: das sind die Gründe, wieso der "Brixner" Jahr für Jahr stete Zuwächse bei Abonnenten und Lesern verzeichnet, sowohl bei der gedruckten Monatszeitschrift als auch online. Der "Brixner" erscheint seit 1990 monatlich und erreicht kostenfrei die Haushalte im Eisacktal. 

Die Redaktion ist in Brixen ansässig und besteht aus festen Mitarbeitern sowie freiberuflichen Redakteuren.

Kostenlose „Brixner”-App: Brixner Epaper

Pressemitteilungen und Themenvorschläge an: redaktion@brixner.info
Leserbriefe an: echo@brixner.info

Name: 株式会社化学工業日報社
Description: 化学工業およびその関連産業のリーディングぺーパーとしての役割を担い、化学工業（産官学を含め）をベースにライフサイエンス・エレクトロニクスなどのハイテク分野、また国際化時代に対応したアジア・国際関連、さらに地球規模での環境・安全等 多様化・高度化する最新ニーズを国内外に提供。

Name: The Miami Hurricane
Description:
The Miami Hurricane is the student newspaper of the University of Miami in Coral Gables, Fla. Founded in 1929, the publication is produced by undergraduate students at UM and covers campus, local, and national news. We post online daily and publish in print every other Wednesday during the regular academic year.

This publication does not necessarily represent the views and opinions of advertisers or the university’s trustees, faculty or administration. Unsigned editorials represent the opinion of The Hurricane‘s Editorial Board. Columns, letters and cartoons represent the views of their respective authors only.

Name: The Post
Description:
The Post, an editorially independent, student-run newspaper serving Ohio University, Athens and Athens County, provides coverage of campus, city, state, sports, features, national and international issues while serving the purpose of educating its readership and its student employees.

Name: Universidad del Pacífico
Description: "La Escuela de Periodismo de la Universidad del Pacífico, ha asumido el rol decisivo en la formación de jóvenes que entreguen noticias con valor. Potenciar estudiantes con vocación y capacidad de respuesta en terreno, es un proceso necesario en este país, que hoy es líder en Latinoamérica".

Name: Morning Star
Description: Britain's trade-union backed socialist daily paper, published by the People's Press Printing Society. The paper is the successor of the Daily Worker, which was originally established in 1930 as the Communist Party of Great Britain official paper. However it converted to a reader-owned co-operative in 1945 and has operated on this basis ever since. It specialises in activist and labour movement journalism, as well as political and internationalist-oriented world news.

Name: Periódico elDinero
Description:
elDinero es el único periódico de República Dominicana especializado en temas de economía y finanzas, ejerciendo el periodismo económico desde el centro de la imparcialidad como una promesa que se renueva en cada historia, en cada nota, en cada análisis, en cada reportaje y en cada opinión que se vierte. El compromiso está hecho sólo frente a nuestros lectores, quienes se merecen un ejercicio que responda a sus expectativas particulares desde una óptica global, como lo demandan estos tiempos.

elDinero es un espacio abierto a todas las corrientes económicas y sectores que contribuyan con el desarrollo de República Dominicana. Las micro, pequeñas y medianas empresas (Mipymes) han demostrado ser un soporte fundamental de la economía nacional y con ellas tenemos el compromiso de ser un canal plural para que se hagan sentir.

Name: The Echo Newspaper
Description:
Established more than 43 years ago in Tallaght, The Echo is the only sold local newspaper in Dublin, with over 27,000 weekly readers across two print editions.
 
Covering Tallaght, Clondalkin, Lucan, Ballyfermot and surrounding areas, The Echo also delivers the latest in independent, award-winning news online through Echo.ie, offering a subscription for online news and our weekly ePapers. We have over 86k social media followers and in 2022, more than 1.5m visits to Echo.ie.
 
We offer competitive advertising rates both in print and online for businesses who are based locally and nationally. For all advertising enquiries contact our Tallaght office on 01 4685350 and one of our team members will be happy to help you.
 
The Echo has been championing local life, business, sport and arts for over four decades. Support us in continuing to deliver for local communities and businesses - and be part of the story.

Name: TPE MAG
Description:
TPE MAG est le magazine des très petites entreprises
Presse écrite Print et Digitale avec 4 numéros par an et 1 newsletter mensuelle.

Name: Exeter Economics Review
Description:
The Exeter Economics Review is the University of Exeter student-run economic publication platform. The goal of this review is to create a bridge between academic knowledge gained in classrooms and its practical applications in the real world. Remember, as said by Richard Feynman: “In theory, there is no difference between theory and practice. In practice there is.” (1996)

The EER covers important national and international economics, business, and financial issues. By providing a varied and organized range of perspectives on the world via the prism of meticulous economic analysis and reasoning, we give our students’ original thoughts on today most crucial issues.

All students who are dedicated to sharing cutting-edge economics research and ideas to a large audience can do it through the EER. With the intention of advancing fresh perspectives, igniting discussion, and bringing about change, we write articles pertinent to Exeter University, the United Kingdom, and the entire world!

Name: Architectures CREE Magazine
Description:
Quatre fois par an, Architectures CREE traite de toutes les architectures, depuis l’architecture d’intérieur jusqu’à l’urbanisme.

Architectes stars ou peu connus, petites et grandes agences, Français et étrangers… ils ont tous leur place dans Architectures CREE.
Rebonds sur l’actualité, présentation approfondie de réalisations de toutes tailles, réflexion sur la ville et l’architecture, découvertes des innovations en matière de techniques, matériaux ou produits : les quatre grandes parties qui composent Architectures CREE répondent aux attentes et à la curiosité de tous les professionnels mais aussi de celles et ceux qui aiment ou s’intéressent à l’architecture et à l’urbanisme.

Name: Andalucia Buenas Noticias
Description:
El Grupo Buenas Noticias es una cadena española de diarios digitales conformada actualmente por nueve cabeceras. Los periódicos Buenas Noticias ofrecen información local y nacional abordando los contenidos desde un punto de vista diferente, poniendo el foco en el aspecto positivo de la actualidad.
El Grupo Buenas Noticias nació en Andalucía en 2013 y ha continuado su andadura expandiéndose por diferentes provincias de España, además de dar el salto internacional con un diario en Cali (Colombia).
Pioneros en su enfoque periodístico, los diarios digitales Buenas Noticias abarcan la más amplia actualidad de las provincias y regiones que cubren, haciendo compatible la información diaria con su positiva línea editorial.
El compromiso del Grupo Buenas Noticias es crear una cadena de energía positiva y solidaria, capaz de transmitir una visión esperanzadora de nuestro convulso mundo a la sociedad.

Name: e-whopping
Description: Your go-to digital hub for the latest breaking news, trending stories, and in-depth analysis. Stay informed with up-to-the-minute updates from around the world, covering topics that matter most to you. E-Whopping delivers reliable, engaging, and focused news to keep you ahead of the curve.

Name: Ledger Media Group
Description: Ledger Media Group is an Interactive Marketing Company located in Lakeland and Winter Haven, FL that provides Print and Marketing Services including: Daily and Weekly Newspapers in Multiple Markets, ThriveHive Digital Marketing Services including Search Engine Marketing, Search Engine Optimization,  Social Media Consultation/Management, Website Development, Online Promotions, Internet Education, Mobile Marketing, Email Marketing, Video Marketing, Local Audience Reach via Newspaper Websites, Online Display Advertising and Content Targeting.

Name: OURVADODARA
Description:
The cultural city of pump and glory, ever-green and ever-changing, Baroda is Vadodara. India’s fast-growing cosmopolitan city is an educational, industrial, and commercial hub to Gujarat. Effervescent, dynamic, yet remarkably culturally-rooted are true characteristics of our ‘Sansar Nagri’ - Vadodara.

OurVadodara is Vadodara’s first in-house magazine which aspires to explore the city like never before. This magazine primarily focuses on every single thing which defines Vadodara from wonderful people, to delicious food and other unfamiliar facts. OurVadodara magazine believes in creating a positive ambience for its readers which, sadly, other print media fail to do. This magazine will bring all the astonishing personalities in the limelight, but with a different perception. OurVadodara magazine intends to give every young, striving, creative Barodian the opportunity of showcasing their talents with real time experience. Today, Vadodara, to many, has become the city offering something for every other Barodian, simply because, and just when, they are created by every other Barodian.

Name: Economyaat.se
Description: Economyaat is the first Arabic website in  Sweden specialized in Swedish, European, Arabian and international economic affairs. We aim to provide and analyze the most recent economic news worldwide with high accuracy and professionalism. In addition to rich articles and news which keep our readers up to date with the latest    news in the world of economic.

Name: Sun News Media
Description:
Sun Coast Media Group, Inc. is the premier news source for Southwest Florida. We publish the area's No. 1 news site, Yoursun.com, print The Daily Sun, a newspaper covering Port Charlotte, Punta Gorda, Englewood and North Port and the Venice Gondolier, a twice-weekly newspaper in South Sarasota County.  We also publish Water Line, Harbor Style, Venice Style, and Welcome Home magazines, and print and distribute Sun Weekly, a free publication. An unrivaled media brand, SCMG has paid circulation and distribution in all major local outlets and is the only daily home-delivered newspaper covering all of our area.
 
Founded in 1977 by Derek Dunn-Rankin, Sun Coast Media Group began in rented office space using subcontracted printers. He quickly acquired the Venice Gondolier, the Advertiser in Venice, the Englewood Times and North Port Times, and the Charlotte Sun. By 1985, the company owned its buildings and printing presses in Venice and Port Charlotte. In 1987, the Charlotte Sun began publishing seven days a week and rapidly overtook its competition in both advertising sales and paid circulation.  In 1989, the assets of the Charlotte Herald-News were purchased and the Englewood and North Port publications were incorporated into the daily newspaper, creating one of the fastest growing dailies in the country.  

Today, Sun Coast Media Group is part of Adams Publishing Group, a family-owned community newspaper company consisting of 37 daily newspapers, 90 non-daily newspapers, and a number of other media-related businesses in 20 states and the District of Columbia.
Location: Venice, North Port, Englewood, Port Charlotte, and Punta Gorda, Florida

Name: Báo Thanh Niên
Description: Tin tức, tin nhanh, thời sự. Báo Thanh Niên là một tờ báo Việt Nam phát hành hàng ngày có trụ sở tại Thành phố Hồ Chí Minh. Đây là một trong những tờ báo có số lượng phát hành lớn nhất Việt Nam

Name: Alanba Newspaper
Description:
«Alanba» is a Kuwaiti political comprehensive daily newspaper, founded by Mr. Khalid Yousef Al-Marzook (may Allah have mercy upon his soul), on 5 January 1976. 

During its career over the past 40 years, «Alanba» has been known for its historical stances articulated at all stages of the contemporary history of Kuwait and the Arab world.

«Alanba» is considered one of the deep-rooted media institutions in the Arab world, known for its professionalism and constant search for scoops, news coverage, analyses and special reports.

Name: Arkansas Times
Description:
Arkansas Times print advertisers reach over 100,000 readers or about 25% of the adults in Central Arkansas – each week. Arktimes.com advertisers reach over 180,000.
Our readers are primarily college educated and employed professionals. They’re active in their community and therefore plugged into the content of Arkansas Times, which offers an authoritative mix of political and cultural reporting seasoned by wit and a keen sense of place.

Name: Destination Climat
Description: Destination Climat est un magazine édité trimestriellement, disponible en kiosque et par abonnement, qui propose les clefs de compréhension dans les domaines de la transition énergétique, de la mobilité durable, du risque climatique et de l'analyse des solutions à mettre en œuvre pour y parvenir.

Name: Mittelbayerische Zeitung
Description: Die Mittelbayerische Zeitung ist eine Tageszeitung der Mediengruppe Bayern in Regensburg mit Ausgaben für die Regionen Regensburg, Cham, Schwandorf, Kelheim und Neumarkt.

Name: Moorad Shipping News
Description:
Moorad Shipping is a weekly magazine devoted to the worldwide shipping industry.  Our focus is on the latest maritime news. We also explore ships, ports, maritime events and places in depth in our regular features and we have a keen eye to the rich history and traditions of the maritime industry.

Since it was first published in the mid years of the last century, Moorad Shipping has strived to bring you the news and features you want to read.  We will continue to do this, and are committed to embracing the latest technology to get content to you.

Name: Green Bay Press-Gazette
Description:
As the powerhouse behind the Green Bay Press-Gazette and the digital realm at www.greenbaypressgazette.com, we're committed to delivering news and content that resonates deeply with our local community.

Through our daily newspaper and the immersive online experience at www.greenbaypressgazette.com, we keep our finger on the pulse of Green Bay. Additionally, our news apps for iPad and iPhone, along with the mobile-friendly site m.gbpressgazette.com, ensure seamless access to information anytime, anywhere.

We wholeheartedly recognize that your business goals are distinctive, and demand tailored solutions. This is where the strength of the Green Bay Press-Gazette comes into play. Our team of dedicated subject matter experts is poised to guide your business from its inception through creative development and right up to successful realization.

With our headquarters nestled in Green Bay, Wisconsin, the Green Bay Press-Gazette is fueled by a dedicated team of reporters and extensive resources. This enables us not only to bring you the latest breaking news but also to provide a wealth of community-centered insights that empower you to stay well-informed and engaged. Join us on this journey of information and connection at the Green Bay Press-Gazette.

Name: SudaneseOnline
Description: SudaneseOnline(Arabic: سودانيزاونلاين) is an online bilingual newspaper for people from Sudan and South Sudan,[1] it based in Phoenix, Arizona USA. The website was established in November 1999 by Bakri Abubakr, a Sudanese national residing in the US, with news and information about Sudan and South Sudan, and more than 500 archives in its library

Name: MAIS QUE VOAR
Description:
Mídia segmentado em aviação civil e militar.

Levamos ao nosso público alvo o fotojornalismo, novidades de inovação e tecnologia com o mercado da aviação e aos passageiros que exploram o transporte aéreo.
Somos um dos vencedores pelo 5º Prêmio ABEAR de Jornalismo pela Categoria Fotojornalismo.
Com mais de 3 mil imagens em nosso acervo fotográfico dos principais acontecimentos da aviação no Brasil. 
Missão

Levar a informação por meio de fotojornalismo e por matérias sobre o mercado aeronáutico, além disso, aproximar a aviação com o ser humano em regiões do Brasil que sofre uma carência de estar aproximo da aviação no seja por fins profissionais ou hobby.
Visão

Apresentar as novidades da aviação comercial e militar, alcançar o público desconhecido e entusiastas da aviação em todo o Brasil de uma forma simples e imparcial sem exclusividade.
Valores


Imparcialidade
Transparência
Comprometimento
Qualidade
Inovação
 
NOSSA HISTÓRIA
Fundado em 10 de abril de 2008 –  O site É MAIS QUE VOAR  tem como fundador e editor chefe Herbert Monfre, a página é voltada ao segmentados ao mercado aeronáutico, assim como também tem o público entusiasta pela aviação através de acervos fotográficos envolvendo aviação comercial, militar e aviação geral.

Em 2008 foi o início das atividades focado em assuntos de comissários de voo, através de um simples blog pela plataforma Blogger com o seguinte endereço cmsherbert.blogspot.com que está ativo até hoje com inúmeras informações.
A partir de 2010 decidiu-se inovar ao criar um site através da plataforma Wix, onde todas as páginas foram desenvolvidas manualmente pelo criador do site, Herbert Monfre. A criação do site vem com o objetivo para manter a organização e uma melhor acessibilidade a seus visitantes e explorar o nicho de informações do setor aeronáutico através do fotojornalismo e jornalismo em apoio informativo através das companhias aéreas e órgãos militares. Continue lendo em: https://cmsherbert.wixsite.com/emaisquevoar/sobrenos

Name: Insider Release
Description: INSIDER RELEASE is blog that promotes free and impartial information. We dedicate our work to several topics with a particular interest in geopolitics, environment, international security in general, society trends.

Name: New York Focus
Description:
New York Focus is an independent nonprofit newsroom investigating power in the Empire State.

Launched in October 2020, New York Focus publishes in-depth journalism that explains how the state really works.

As the state’s only nonprofit statewide newsroom, our goal is to help rebuild a local news ecosystem that has faced years of relentless cuts: Almost half of New York’s newspapers have died in the last two decades. We focus on decisions made in Albany and how they impact communities around the state; Albany is the state’s center of power but receives a fraction of the scrutiny it warrants.

We’re guided by the belief that politics is not a sport. Decisions made in New York’s executive mansions, legislative chambers, state administrative offices, courts, nonprofits, union halls, and campaign headquarters don’t stay there. They determine how many New Yorkers sleep on the street each night; how large public college classes are; how many hospital beds are available during a pandemic.

We depend on our readers. Become a New York Focus member today. Sign up for our newsletter.

Name: Qwibik
Description: Qwibik is an innovative community platform designed to empower tech enthusiasts, startup founders, and venture capitalists. It provides a comprehensive ecosystem where each group can access tailored resources, tools, and opportunities to grow, connect, and succeed.

Name: Large Network
Description:
Large Network is an agency specialising in information design. It employs about twenty people in Geneva.

Large Network creates digital platforms, produces high value-added information and edits publications.

The agency supports its clients at every stage of their project: editorial concept, process definition, content production, multilingual editing, iconography, graphic design, photography, computer graphics, distribution, community management.

Name: RVA Magazine
Description:
RVA Mag is all about community empowerment. How do we do this? By delivering new and innovative ways to tell stories from our city and Commonwealth. In doing so, we give our readers an immersive experience which lives at the intersection of art, music, culture, and politics. And as a digital and print magazine that represents the best and sometimes worst of Richmond and Virginia, we make space for all of our communities to be equally represented in our pages. Given the complex times we live in, this will always remain a priority for us and we take this mission with the utmost seriousness.

Since our first issue in 2005, our editorial and design team has created a brand that has become one of the leading cultural ambassadors for the city of Richmond. Our readership has grown to include all parts of the Commonwealth and our social networks continue to stimulate and lead the conversation around the most pressing issues of the day. RVA Mag will continue to be on the forward edge of content creation with outputs that meet a design and editorial standard that is consistent with the same growth and evolution that Richmond has become known for regionally and nationally.

Name: Apple Daily Limited
Description: Apple Daily is a popular Chinese media in Hong Kong.

Name: Jornal Universitário do Porto
Description:
Concebido e gerido desde 1987 exclusivamente por estudantes universitários, o Jornal Universitário do Porto [JUP] apresenta-se como um espaço de debate e de confronto de ideias, funcionando ao mesmo tempo como uma oficina de Jornalismo, Design e Fotografia onde os estudantes têm a oportunidade de adquirir experiência e formação durante a sua frequência universitária. Editado pelo NJAP, o JUP contava com 4 edições por ano, uma tiragem anual de 40.000 exemplares e de distribuição gratuita.

De acordo com os princípios da sua génese e enquanto espaço aberto à pluralidade de estilos, o JUP apresentou-se à Academia, a partir de março de 2011, com um novo estilo editorial e gráfico. Assim, com o objetivo de abordar as mais diversas áreas de interesse para os estudantes da Academia, o JUP passou a integrar 32 páginas e 8 novas seções: Educação; Sociedade; Política; Economia; Ambiente; Internacional; Desporto e Cultura.

Para o caso específico da editoria Cultura, criou-se o suplemento “Parêntesis”. O suplemento, contava com um total de 12 páginas, era encartado no JUP, e dava corpo ao que de melhor se faz na Academia e na cidade do Porto no setor das Artes e da Cultura.

A partir de março de 2011, o JUP passou também a privilegiar a ilustração e infografia a par do tradicional modo de ilustração do jornal – a fotografia.

Name: Victoria Advocate
Description: The paper was founded in 1846 by publishers John D. Logan and Thomas Sterne of Van Buren, Arkansas, as a weekly publication named the Texan Advocate. The two men had previously founded the Frontier Whig two years earlier, and like the Whig, the Advocate was associated with the Whig Party during its initial stages. After the publication was renamed the Texian Advocate, ownership changed hands several times during the 1850s. In 1859, it was bought by Sam Addison White, who renamed the paper The Victoria Advocate.  Morris Roberts and a number of leading citizens purchased the paper in October 1942. In April 1961, Roberts purchased all stock and became sole owner of the Advocate. Today the Advocate is part of a larger media company named M. Roberts Media and it is still owned by members of Morris Roberts family.  Chris Cobler currently serves as Publisher.

Vi följer både den tekniska och affärsmässiga utvecklingen i denna föränderliga bransch.

Dagligen läggs ett antal nyheter ut av redaktionen, som har lång erfarenhet av förpackningsrelaterad journalistik.

Bo Wallteg är chefredaktör och ansvarig utgivare för samtliga webbsidor under Packnews.com. 
Det är även Bo som är ansvarig för det redaktionella innehållet i Sverige (Packnews.se) och Finland (Packnews.fi).

I Norge är Roger Stormo ansvarig för det redaktionella innehållet på Packnews.no.

I Danmark är Søren Winsløw ansvarig för det redaktionella innehållet på Packnews.dk (Signprintpack.dk).

Ansvarig för annonsering och andra marknadsföringsaktiviteter är Daniel Wahlgren.
 
Packnews ger också ut nyhetsbrev på respektive språk. Nyhetsbreven kommer mellan en och två gånger i veckan och redovisar de viktigaste nyheterna. Våra nyhetsbrev når totalt drygt 60.000 mottagare varje vecka!

Packnews är oberoende och ägs av AGI Media AB, som även ger även ut tidningen Sign&Print och arrangerar Sign&Print-mässor i Sverige, Danmark och Norge. För mer information om företagets mässor och andra nyhetssajter besök agi.se.

Name: Grupo Liberal
Description:
Em meados de 1951, os irmãos Romeu e Arnaldo Mantovani, juntamente com Jessyr Bianco, começaram a cogitar a ideia de um jornal independente. Naquele tempo, Romeu Mantovani, além de trabalhar na Prefeitura de Americana, trabalhava também como contador para Jayme Antas, em sua fábrica têxtil. Jayme era filho do vereador Sebastião Antas de Abreu, um dos maiores responsáveis pela unificação política da cidade de Americana. Fez parte do primeiro mandato da Câmara Municipal.

Jaime e Sebastião acreditavam na possibilidade de um jornal sem vínculos com a política e, com o faturamento da empresa têxtil, forneceram as verbas necessárias para a compra das primeiras máquinas que seriam utilizadas para a impressão do jornal que se chamaria O LIBERAL.

Com a verba arrecadada para a primeira impressão e a certeza da publicação, os três fundadores passaram a buscar opiniões a fim de por em prática seus ideais de um jornal que pudesse prosperar na cidade de forma independente, que não estivesse limitado à ideia de três pessoas.

O foco maior seria a liberdade de expressão, e qualquer um poderia externar seus contentamentos e descontentamentos sobre qualquer assunto, política, economia. Na época, embora existissem poucas escolas, muitos possuíam certa facilidade para escrever e com a ajuda dos irmãos Mantovani e Jessyr Bianco passaram e pensar em nomes para o jornal.
Chegou-se à conclusão que o que mais se encaixava com a descrição de seus ideais seria O LIBERAL. 

No Coração e no Espírito, Compromisso com a Verdade!

Atualmente o Grupo Liberal tem em seu portifólio: jornal impresso, jornal virtual, revista CASA, revista NOIVA e revista L, rádio FM Gold 94.7, rádio Clube de Americana AM580, portal de notícias, Podcast "Além da CAPA" e muito mais

Description:

De Orkaan geeft een stem aan inwoners van de Zaanstreek en veroverde een plek in het schrale Zaanse medialandschap. Er is plaats voor discussies, voor het verleden, ons erfgoed, de overledenen, voor kennis en kennismaking. 

Er wordt gelinkt naar stichtingen, ondernemers, inwoners of initiatieven die het kunnen gebruiken, hiaten en successen zijn zichtbaar en oplossingen worden aangedragen. Zaankanters kunnen of willen er niet meer omheen. 

De focus ligt altijd op nieuws en ouds uit de Zaanstreek, actueel, relevant en de moeite van het zichtbaar maken waard. We zijn daarbij leidend in plaats van volgend. 

Qua Zaans nieuws zijn we een allesverslinder, maar als we zwaartepunten zouden willen benoemen, dan zijn dat cultuur, politiek, wonen, werken, bereikbaarheid, erfgoed, inclusiviteit, mediawijsheid, onderwijs en natuur. Dit alles met kennis van en gevoel voor de Zaanse samenleving. Liefdevol kritisch, opbouwend en oplossingsgericht.

Name: The Philadelphia Gay News
Description:
The Philadelphia Gay News is the largest weekly newspaper on the East Coast targeting the lesbian, gay, bisexual and transgender community, and the most award-winning and oldest LGBT publication in the country. Started in 1975, we strive to focus on and promote businesses and populations within our community to engender mutual success. This includes publishing special issues to highlight areas such as pets, health, travel, legal and entertainment, as well as addressing community concerns such as LGBT elder issues, homelessness and endangered youth.


As a community newspaper, PGN’s mission is to be a platform for the LGBT community to communicate with each other and share their viewpoints, as well as establish common interests and priorities with the mainstream/ally community. We promote our community internally and externally. To that end, PGN reaches out to and builds reciprocal, mutually supportive relationships with its readers and supporters. We strive to enhance the flow of information about community resources and to educate the non-LGBT community about our past, present and future. As a prominent minority group, the LGBT community needs communication tools to share concerns, assemble platforms, build support and celebrate successes. It is this sense of purpose that guides PGN on a daily basis.

Name: Lo Sbuffo
Description:
Nativo digitale, Lo Sbuffo è un giornale culturale che vede i suoi albori a Milano dove nasce come bisettimanale nel settembre 2013. Il suo scopo è quello di diffondere la cultura e di trattare tematiche sociali in chiave culturale. In poco tempo ha serrato i ritmi di pubblicazione sino a diventare un giornaliero.

Si propone come pagina di approfondimento culturale a tutto tondo. Nato in origine con l’intento di smascherare gli stereotipi e analizzare i tabù della società contemporanea, mantiene oggi questa vocazione nativa proponendo al lettore un’informazione condotta con sguardo critico e originale, all’interno di un contesto formato da redattori giovani e appassionati, tutti volontari, che si distanziano dai canali dell’opinione pubblica anonima e grigia.

L’esigenza di una realtà che fosse a contatto diretto con la scena culturale milanese (e non solo), ha portato alla collaborazione de Lo Sbuffo con La Casa dei Diritti. Qui, tra le numerose attività svolte a favorire la cultura e della diffusione di informazione volta alla difesa dei diritti, Lo Sbuffo ha trovato il suo spazio. Il giornale così prosegue la sua proposta di eventi – iniziata con gli InformaMi nel 2016 e ospitata dal ChiamaMilano – attraverso la proposta di contenuti sempre diversi ed attuali. Grazie a questa collaborazione Lo Sbuffo è tornato alle origini, a parlare di tabù e realtà scomode, tutto, sempre, attraverso la voce dei Millenials.

A partire da Marzo 2016 anche a Roma si è iniziata a formare una redazione de Lo Sbuffo, che porta avanti lo stesso obiettivo di diffondere informazione culturale inserendosi nella vita della città con eventi, collaborazioni, sempre presente in ogni fenomeno che cada sotto il dominio della Cultura.

Lo Sbuffo si pone come obiettivo quello di costruire con il tempo un’informazione culturale valida ed accessibile, poiché è dalla cultura che si genera cultura. In fin dei conti il compito di un giornale è quello di essere ponte tra l’Informazione e il Lettore.

Description:
The Accounting Journal is an independent, non-biased publication created with the aim to bring together the latest developments in the field of accountancy, and finance.

Name: Iconic Chronicles!!
Description:
Iconic Chronicles is the first-ever trauma magazine that unapologetically breaks the silence surrounding pain, healing and resilience. As disruptors, we challenge societal norms, providing an unfiltered platform for stories that are often ignored or silenced. Our mission is simple yet revolutionary: to amplify the voices of those who have experienced trauma, celebrate their strength and challenge the narratives that diminish their journeys.

We aren’t afraid to speak uncomfortable truths that the world often avoids. Through raw personal essays, bold interviews and thought-provoking feature stories, we tackle the complexities of mental health, systemic oppression, social justice and the far-reaching impact of trauma. Yet IC goes beyond trauma. We delve into topics such as identity, diversity, culture, activism, global issues, mental health’s intersection with creativity and the power of resilience in marginalised communities. We highlight the experiences of care leavers and other overlooked voices, ensuring they are heard and respected.

IC offers a space where conversations around empowerment, growth and resilience take centre stage. We explore life with neurodivergence, fighting systemic inequality, the importance of community and how personal healing connects to collective strength. From the journeys of individual healing to the broader battles for social justice, our magazine covers the topics that matter most, inviting readers to reflect and engage with the stories that shape our world.
We are not just a magazine; IC is a movement.We challenge the status quo and provide a platform where individuals can reclaim their narratives,share their truths and find strength in solidarity.We don’t simply report on trauma; we empower people to embrace their resilience, create change and speak out.
At its core,IC  is a celebration of strength, transformation and healing.We are here to break stigma, speak the truth and spark a revolution where trauma no longer defines our us.

Name: Evansville Courier & Press

Name: Central Valley Journalism Collaborative
Description:
Launched by the James B. McClatchy Foundation (JBMF) in 2021, the Central Valley Journalism Collaborative (CVJC) is a sustainable model to restore Central Valley local journalism through philanthropic support and community ownership.

We are restoring a vibrant, local free press, starting with the Central Valley. The Central Valley Journalism Collaborative is a non-profit model that succeeds through philanthropic support and community ownership. CVJC collaborates with local newsrooms to fund journalists through a sustainable revenue share model that safeguards philanthropic investments and protects jobs in Journalism. CVJC hires local journalists, local journalists write for local newsrooms to represent the stories and voices of the Central Valley’s richly diverse communities. This is an innovative approach, a new ecosystem that we believe has the power to preserve, revive, and nurture independent local news everywhere.

Name: Grupo Costa Norte de Comunicação
Description:
O Grupo Costa Norte de Comunicação atua no Litoral Paulista há mais de 30 anos, consolidando-se como uma das principais referências em jornalismo regional. Com seriedade, imparcialidade e profundo compromisso com a verdade, levamos informação de qualidade à população, fortalecendo a cidadania e contribuindo para o desenvolvimento da região.

Nossa missão é comunicar para transformar.
Com ética, criatividade e clareza, conectamos pessoas, marcas e ideias por meio de uma comunicação estratégica, relevante e com impacto real.

Nossa visão é ser referência em geração de conteúdo e liderança em inovação, sempre guiados pelos nossos valores:
- Inovação
- Ética
- Impacto positivo

Com uma cultura orientada por resultados, planejamento e colaboração, buscamos excelência sustentável, adaptabilidade e transformação social.

Atuamos de forma multiplataforma, com presença sólida no Litoral Norte de São Paulo:

- Portal Costa Norte – cobertura jornalística diária com foco regional e nacional.
- TV Cultura Litoral – emissora local afiliada à Fundação Padre Anchieta, com programação voltada à realidade da comunidade.
- Rádio Praia FM (106,1) – grade que une música, informação e serviço.
- Revistas e projetos editoriais – valorizando cultura, história e protagonismo local.
- Produção de conteúdo sob demanda – vídeos institucionais, branded content e campanhas personalizadas.
- Cobertura de eventos e transmissões especiais – jornalismo e publicidade com qualidade técnica e narrativa.
- NewCom Brasil – braço de comunicação estratégica do Grupo Costa Norte. Atua como ponte entre informação e sociedade, oferecendo gestão integral da comunicação para instituições e empresas.

Quer comunicar com estratégia, visibilidade e impacto real?
Conte com o Grupo Costa Norte.
Somos mais do que mídia: somos o farol do litoral paulista.

Name: Le Régional Salon-de-Provence

Avec 20000 lecteurs en moyenne par semaine, 1 habitant sur 4 est lecteur du Régional.

Name: Heute
Description:
Die Tageszeitung „Heute“ ist seit ihrer Gründung im Jahr 2004 eine einzigartige Erfolgsgeschichte in Österreich. Mit einer Auflage von täglich rund 485.000 Stück (*ÖAK Auflagenliste 1.HJ 2022) und einer Tagesreichweite in Wien von 19,1% (*MA 21/22) wird die Vormachtstellung als Nr.1 am Tageszeitungsmarkt für Gratiszeitungen eindrucksvoll untermauert. 

Diese Erfolgsgeschichte hat sich am Digitalsektor wiederholt und so stellt heute.at eines der führenden Nachrichten-Portale am österreichischen Markt dar.  

Über 4.10 Millionen NutzerInnen haben sich im Oktober 2022 (*ÖWA 10/22) auf heute.at am Laufenden gehalten. 

Neben schnellen und top-aktuellen Informationen zu Regionalem und Internationalem ist das Leserreporternetzwerk ein Erfolgsgeheimnis der oft exklusiven und einzigartigen Geschichten, die unsere Leser*innen tagtäglich begeistern.

Name: Capitale Publishing / Vivre Le Bassin
Description:
Fondée en 2009, Capitale Publishing est une maison d’édition indépendante spécialisée dans les médias lifestyle, territoriaux et expérientiels.

Après avoir créé, développé puis cédé plusieurs titres emblématiques (Vivre Paris, Vivre Bordeaux, Vivre Lyon, Vivre Marseille), Capitale Publishing concentre désormais son activité autour de Vivre Le Bassin, média de référence dédié au Bassin d’Arcachon.

Ce projet s’articule autour de plusieurs piliers complémentaires :
• un magazine trimestriel haut de gamme,
• des plateformes digitales à forte audience,
• une radio locale digitale, pensée comme un média d’ambiance, de découverte et de mise en valeur des acteurs du territoire,
• et L’Annexe – VLB, un espace événementiel et créatif accueillant événements privés et professionnels, rencontres, contenus, expériences culturelles et formats hybrides.

À travers cet écosystème, Capitale Publishing met en lumière celles et ceux qui font vivre le territoire : entrepreneurs, artistes, chefs, créateurs et acteurs locaux.

La ligne éditoriale reste inchangée depuis l’origine :
 raconter un territoire par l’humain,
 proposer un regard prescripteur mais accessible,
 valoriser l’authenticité plutôt que le convenu.

Capitale Publishing développe aujourd’hui des projets mêlant contenu, événementiel, audio et expériences de marque, au service des territoires et de leurs communautés.

Name: Estevan Mercury
Description:
The Estevan Mercury has been the leading choice of news in the Estevan area for well over 100 years. 

E.A. Bailey was the first owner/publisher of The Mercury in 1903. In 1905 The Mercury was sold to Donald Dunbar.  By the mid-1930s, Dunbar sold The Mercury to his son, Donald Jr., who continued to operate it until 1944. He then moved to Copper Cliff, Ont., which prompted the sale to Andrew King and sons Stirling and William of Rouleau. They published the newspaper for 14 years, through a huge boom period of growth fueled by the oil industry. Their show poster and commercial printing business was as large and significant as the actual newspaper.  

As their family dispersed to take on new challenges, the Kings were ready to sell the paper in 1958. 

The paper would change hands several times over the next couple of decades until it was purchased by Peter Ng.  In 2004 Ng sold The Mercury to Glacier Media. 

The Mercury is still at the forefront of news gathering in the community, whether it be good news, bad news, sports, arts and entertainment and so much more. We don't shy away from reporting all the happenings of our city as we find them, and see them.

Name: Marin Independent Journal
Description:
THE IJ'S ROOTS in Marin go back to March 23, 1861, just before the Civil War engulfed the United States.

The first edition of the weekly Marin County Journal published that day had four pages, printed one at a time on a hand-operated press.

In October 1957, the newspaper completed a building in downtown San Rafael that more than doubled the size of its plant.

In January 1981, a new chapter began when the IJ moved from downtown San Rafael to southern Novato, just west of Highway 101. 

In 2010, the IJ was honored by the California Newspaper Publishers Association as the best newspaper of its size in the state. In addition to the award for General Excellence, the IJ also won top honors for Freedom of Information, best Opinion pages and best editorial cartoon.

In August 2011, the IJ moved to its current location, near the Marin Civic Center in Terra Linda.

Today, the newspaper continues to publish in print, online and via mobile device. This combined reach gives the IJ its largest audience ever.

BLOCS a été conçu à l’automne 2023 par une équipe de trois jeunes journalistes français forts d'une expérience de plusieurs années de correspondance à Bruxelles pour les plus grands titres de la presse écrite - l’Opinion, Le Parisien, Le Figaro ou encore l’Agefi.

Spécialistes de la politique européenne avec plusieurs dizaines d’articles sur le commerce à leur actif, Clément Solal, Antonia Przybyslawski et Mathieu Solal sont aussi les rédacteurs de ce qui constitue leur premier projet éditorial autonome. Name: New Pittsburgh Courier
Description: The New Pittsburgh Courier is one of the oldest and most prestigious Black newspapers in the United States, with a rich and storied history. Established in 1907 by Edwin Harleston, a guard in the H. J. Heinz food-packing plant, the Pittsburgh Courier gained national prominence after attorney Robert Lee Vann became the newspaper's editor and publisher, treasurer, and legal counsel in 1910. In his lifetime, Vann saw the Courier grow to become the largest, most influential Black newspaper in the nation with a circulation of 250,000 and over 400 employees in 14 cities. In 1966 John H. Sengstacke purchased the newspaper and renamed it the New Pittsburgh Courier. It became part of Sengstacke Newspapers (now Real Times, LLC) - the largest and most influential Black newspaper chain in the country - which also includes the Chicago Daily Defender, Michigan Chronicle, Michigan Front Page and (Memphis) Tri-State Defender. Today the New Pittsburgh Courier continues to serve as a trusted vehicle for Black expression, publishing an award-winning edition every Wednesday.

Name: Unió de Periodistes Valencians

Name: tageswow.de
Description:
At tageswow we aim to change perspectives we the people have looking at our world today.

The media stream we're all exposed to during day and night causes severe alterations within our attention economy and can result in anxiety, panic attacks as well as the general feeling of being overwhelmed.

You are what you eat. Simple as that. 
Applying this saying to a wider perspective, it can be said: You are what you consume.

As we all consume content every day during the day and sometimes during the night, too, we really need to take good care of what we consume. What we feed our brains and hearts with. 
So why not decide to let the good stuff in?

People all over the world work hard to improve peoples' lives, to make them feel better and to find answers to the questions we all have during these challenging times. 
 What are we here for? 
 Why do we do this? 
 What's the purpose?
 Can we change the world for the better and if so, how can we do it?
 Can we even save the world, not from ourselves but from the results of mankind's behaviour during the last centuries?
 Are industrialization and globalization the solutions to demanding issues such as world hunger, poverty, illness and hostility? 
 Or are those issues the results from pushing growth forward and expanding the economy beyond limits?

At tageswow we like to think that researching and delivering the constructive stuff can be the change.

Yes, we may be dreamers. We may be philantropists, utopians and idealists.
But we are visionairies, too. We believe in the power of change.

Come on in and join us. Shine your light. You are the change the world needs. 
Because you truly are a #tageswow.

Name: The University Times
Description:
The University Times is Ireland's largest and pre-eminent student newspaper, published from Trinity College Dublin year-round at www.universitytimes.ie, and every three weeks in print during the academic year. Online, its audience often broaches 150,000 unique visitors each month, and in print, it reaches all of Trinity's 17,000 students. 

With a focus on higher education and national student issues, the reach of The University Times goes far beyond the walls of Trinity College Dublin, and is read by academics, education policy makers and students from all of Ireland's third-level institutions – often setting the national agenda for debates on issues affecting them.

The paper consistently wins national and international awards, including Irish Student Publication of the Year (2014, 2015, 2016, 2017 and 2018), and World's Best Non-Daily College Newspaper (2016). It also received a citation for editorial writing from the US-based Society for Professional Journalists in 2015. In 2016 and 2017, the US-based Society for News Design awarded it the title of Best Overall News Website, and in 2016 said its print paper was the World's Best-Designed College Paper.

Its journalists also routinely win the prestigious Irish Student Journalist of the Year award. 

Alumni of the paper have gone on to work for the Sunday Business Post, the BBC, the National Journal, the New York Times, Quartz, Storyful, the Irish Independent and Business Insider, among other media outlets.

Name: Editpress Luxembourg
Description:
Fondé en 1913, Editpress est un  groupe média leader au Luxembourg dont le siège se situe à Esch sur Alzette.
Le premier métier du groupe est l’information. Depuis plus de 100 ans, Editpress est l’éditeur du quotidien Tageblatt, journal d’opinions de centre-gauche, à orientation humaniste, progressiste et pro-européenne. Au fil des années, l’éditeur du Tageblatt s’est transformé en un groupe multi-médias, éditeur de quotidiens en langue allemande (Tageblatt), en langue française (L’essentiel, Le Quotidien), de magazines (Revue) et de sites internet d’information (lessentiel.lu, tageblatt.lu, lequotidien.lu) leader au Luxembourg.  
Editpress a également diversifié ses activités dans de nombreux métiers périphériques à celui de l’information, comme la régie publicitaire, la communication (Comed), la gestion de la relation client (Ebos).

Editpress emploie aujourd’hui 435 salariés, dont 100 journalistes.

Mot du directeur
Enraciné dans une histoire plus que centenaire, construit autour et sur le fondement solide du Tageblatt, Editpress Luxembourg se distingue par une confiance saine en ses réflexes journalistiques et un esprit entrepreneurial développé. Au cœur de notre mission se trouve un journalisme de qualité, adapté aux publics divers qui composent la société luxembourgeoise. Au-delà, tout en restant fidèle au métier de l’édition et des médias, l’entreprise s’est diversifiée dans des activités connexes, de l’imprimerie rotative, la distribution et la régie publicitaire en passant par le conseil en communication jusqu’aux services de centre d’appels. Elle s’est dans ce cadre régulièrement alliée à des partenaires nationaux et internationaux aux compétences complémentaires. Fier de son passé, Editpress Luxembourg aborde la transformation numérique avec une ambition d’innovation et un esprit d’ouverture aux nouvelles opportunités.

Name: A People's History of Medical Marijuana
Description:
Introducing

A People's History of the Medical Marijuana Movement
compiled by Fred Gardner.

How did a radical grassroots movement based in San Francisco wind-up making cannabis safe for capital? 

Gardner provides the facts The Industry doesn't want you to know, and shines a critical light on the single-issue approach to politics. This is a must-read for pot partisans and anyone serious about changing America. 

About This Material:

We use the words cannabis and marijuana almost interchangeably. Cannabis, the Latin word used by botanists and doctors, is more respectable, but marijuana is the word used more commonly by the activists who launched the movement in the late 20th century. Also, it sounds mellower and it was imported from Mexico.

Articles written for O'Shaughnessy's, the Journal of Cannabis in Clinical Practice, frame this history. There are also articles written for The Anderson Valley Advertiser and Counterpunch.org, and many pieces not previously published.

Some of the articles are PDFs from O'Shaughnessy's print edition; others are from O'S website, BeyondTHC.com. Mistakes have been corrected, when caught, and graphics upgraded, when possible, from black-and-white to color. If you see any proofing errors, please notify editor@beyondthc.com

Correspondence is welcome.

Fred Gardner is managing editor of O'Shaughnessy's, the Journal of Cannabis in Clinical Practice. He has been a political organizer, an editor at Scientific American, and Public Information Officer for the District Attorney of San Francisco. His latest dispatches will run once a week.

CHIAMACI

Name: CORPHUB
Description:
We are committed to building the No.1 business media and community platform in the Greater Bay Area focused on helping SME's going gloabl. By leveraging the abundant resources of the Greater Bay Area and opportunities in overseas markets, we assist SME's in enhancing their brand value while providing effective channels for them to voice their needs.

Our Mission
Our mission is to facilitate the internationalization of SMEs by integrating resources from the Greater Bay Area and abroad, enhancing their competitiveness, and enabling every SME to face the challenges of the global market with ease.

Our Vision
Our vision is to become the most influential business media and community platform in the Greater Bay Area, creating a comprehensive and convenient resource-sharing ecosystem for SMEs. We aim to empower these enterprises to thrive on the international stage and achieve sustainable growth and prosperity.

In addition to brand promotion, we leverage our extensive platform resources to connect SMEs with crucial assets, including funding, networking opportunities, business prospects, and professional expertise. Our goal is to ensure that enterprises not only successfully expand overseas but also quickly adapt and explore new business opportunities in their target markets, leading to continuous growth.

Name: WegenerMedia
Description: Wegener Media is de grootste uitgever van regionale journalistieke media in Nederland. Zeven regionaal opererende nieuwsmerken voorzien ruim 4,2 miljoen consumenten van actuele en betrouwbare journalistieke informatie uit hun leef- en werkomgeving. Via de inzet van print en online mediakanalen die elkaar onderling versterken. Tot het portfolio behoren BN | DeStem, Brabants Dagblad, Eindhovens Dagblad, De Gelderlander, PZC, de Stentor en De Twentsche Courant Tubantia.

Name: Morning Chalk Up
Description:
The Morning Chalk Up is a Monday through Friday newsletter covering the sport of CrossFit and community. 

After launching during the 2016 CrossFit Open, Morning Chalk Up has grown to reach the largest and most influential audience in the Sport of Fitness. Focusing on creative storytelling and a straightforward layout of news items of the day, Morning Chalk Up is the quickest and most well informed read to start your morning regardless of whether you're an everyday crossfitter, elite athlete, affiliate owner, or brand.

Name: The Daily Good News Bangladesh
Description:
The Daily Good News Bangladesh is a digital newspaper publication focused on bringing positive news from around the world and Bangladesh to a readership in Bangladesh and around the globe. We believe that there is a need for a more balanced and uplifting news source in the country, and we aim to fill this gap with our publication.

Our goal is to provide a refreshing alternative to the traditional news cycle, which often focuses on negative and sensational stories. Our focus on positive news will set us apart from other news sources in the market and make us attractive to readers looking for something different.

Name: Inspiring Future Entrepreneurs

Whether you're starting your own venture, considering a new idea, or simply passionate about business, Inspiring Future Entrepreneurs offers a mix of inspiration, insights, and practical advice to help you on your journey. Join us and stay inspired!

Name: Foncier Magazine
Description:
Bienvenue chez Foncier Magazine : L'Éclaireur des Transformations Urbaines 

Découvrez l'univers dynamique du foncier, du BTP, et de l'immobilier avec Foncier Magazine. En tant que guide mensuel, nous sommes le carrefour d'informations essentielles et d'histoires captivantes qui façonnent nos villes et notre avenir urbain.

 Ce que Nous Offrons :
 Exploration du Foncier : Des récits inspirants sur l'évolution des terrains, des projets innovants et des analyses approfondies sur les défis fonciers contemporains.
 BTP en Action : Des reportages exclusifs sur les dernières avancées technologiques, des coulisses des chantiers majeurs, et des profils de professionnels qui construisent notre avenir.
 Immobilier Éclatant : Conseils pour les propriétaires, analyses de marché approfondies, et portraits de ceux qui transforment des espaces en foyers.

 Notre Mission :
Chez Foncier Magazine, nous croyons au pouvoir de l'information pour inspirer le changement positif. Notre mission est de catalyser le dialogue autour des enjeux urbains, soutenir l'innovation, et célébrer les visionnaires qui transforment nos communautés.

 Rejoignez Notre Communauté :
Restez à la pointe de l'actualité en vous connectant avec Foncier Magazine. Suivez-nous pour des mises à jour régulières, des interviews exclusives, et des discussions animées sur les tendances du foncier, du BTP, et de l'immobilier.

 Liens Utiles :
www.fonciermagazine.com
#Foncier #BTP #Immobilier #TransformationUrbaine

Explorez. Apprenez. Bâtissez avec Foncier Magazine.

Name: Norrköpings Tidningar
Description:
Norrköpings Tidningar (NT) gör lokaljournalistik som engagerar och berör, vi granskar samhället och förklarar sammanhangen. Som prenumerant kan du ta del av våra lokala nyheter via vår app, nyhetssajt, e-tidning eller genom att få tidningen levererad direkt till din brevlåda. Senaste nytt hittar du alltid på nt.se.

Det stora engagemanget hos våra läsare, tillsammans med vår höga lokala räckvidd, ger dig som annonsör en unik möjlighet att nå ut med din kampanj och uppnå garanterad effekt. Vill ditt företag synas i våra kanaler? Läs mer om oss på ntmmedia.se/titlar/nt

Vi är en del av i NTM,  en av Sveriges största koncerner för lokal media, med främsta syfte att bedriva publicistisk verksamhet. Koncernen är stiftelseägd, vilket garanterar oberoende journalistik och möjligheten att agera långsiktigt.

Tipsa gärna redaktionen om aktuella händelser, samhällsfrågor som du vill veta mer om och missförhållanden som behöver uppmärksammas. Mejla till tipsa@nt.se 

Vill du söka jobb hos oss? Läs mer och se alla våra lediga tjänster på ntmmedia.se/jobb

Kontakt med chefredaktör och ansvarig utgivare:
fredrik.lagerqvist@ntm.se

Name: StyleRepublik.vn
Description:
Style-Republik.com - Chuyên trang trực tuyến uy tín về thời trang, sáng tạo & kinh doanh

Style-Republik.com ra đời năm 2016, là chuyên trang giám tuyển thời trang & sáng tạo đầu tiên ở Việt Nam. Tạp chí trực tuyến Style-Republik.com có định hướng mang tính học thuật cao, tập trung vào đối tượng độc giả chuyên ngành như các sinh viên thời trang, các nhà thiết kế, người kinh doanh thời trang thiết kế, Fashionista, Blogger, Stylist, Fashion Illustrator, Fashion Marketer,...Mục tiêu của Style-Republik là tạo nên một kênh thông tin cho những bạn trẻ đam mê thời trang, những nhà kinh doanh thương hiệu thời trang Việt, trở thành là tiếng nói chính thống của thời trang ViệtNam, mang đến những thông tin bổ ích, hấp dẫn về kinh doanh và sáng tạo trong lĩnh vực thời trang và nghệ thuật ở Việt Nam và trên thế giới. SR muốn được góp phần chuyên nghiệp hoá ngành thời trang nội địa qua những bài viết mới nhất, những bài phân tích chuyên sâu để người đọc có cái nhìn đúng đắn và sâu sắc tồn tại và phát triển trong ngành công nghiệp thời trang.

Name: Daily Excelsior
Description:
EXCELSIOR HOUSE is a diversified news and information group, which primarily indulges in newspaper publishing. The multifaceted and multi-product Group has an expertise of nearly five decades in the field of information management. Daily Excelsior — the flagship of the Group is the largest circulated English Daily of Jammu and Kashmir with circulation of nearly 2.3 lacs. Besides, it also enjoys wide readership in the neighbouring states of Punjab, Haryana, Himachal Pradesh and New Delhi. The Corporate headquarters of the Group are located at the city of temple: Jammu. EXCELSIOR, as the name suggests has always excelled professionally since its inception 49 years ago on January 1, 1965.

During the past nearly five decades of business history, Excelsior under the leadership of its founder-cum-Editor-in-Chief, S D Rohmetra, has carved a significant niche for itself among its readers by virtue of its in-depth, investigative reporting and its stylish visual format. The well-read editorials are known for their unbiased and informed commentary on events and developments.

Presently:
Edited, Printed, Published by Kamal Rohmetra and owned by Excelsior. Executive Editor Neeraj Rohmetra. Printed at K.N. Modern Printers and Excelsior Printer Pvt Ltd, Janipura, Jammu and published from EXCELSIOR HOUSE, Janipura, Jammu 180007 (J&K).

Name: Espace Social Européen
Description:
Espace Social Européen apporte aux décideurs de la protection sociale l'information professionnelle qu'ils attendent.
Exclusivement vendu par abonnement, le périodique s'est imposé comme une référence dans le secteur professionnel.
Depuis 5 ans, notre bi-mensuel est accompagné d'une newsletter électronique qui vous informe 3 fois par semaine sur l'actualité de la protection sociale en France et à l'étranger.

En parallèle de son activité média, Espace Sociale Européen organise des colloques, des formations et des voyages d'études pour accompagner les dirigeants et leurs organisations dans leur réflexion stratégique pour mieux comprendre et anticiper les enjeux de demain.

Name: JC Jornal
Description:
O JC, Jornal da Criança e Jovens, está revolucionando a forma como os alunos aprendem sobre o mundo ao descomplicar acontecimentos complexos e promover o senso crítico desde cedo. Nossos leitores têm à disposição uma ampla gama de conteúdos, como reportagens, notícias e entrevistas sobre temas atuais que abordam contos populares, histórias, curiosidades e artigos científicos, sinopses de filmes e livros, legendas, entre outros. 

Assim, os alunos aprendem diferentes gêneros textuais a partir de temas atuais e envolventes. A diagramação é leve, tornando a leitura agradável com infográficos, letras maiores, páginas coloridas e organização por listas, quando necessário.

Pensamos em todos estes detalhes pensando em nosso leitor entre 8 e 16 anos, que está acostumado com uma linguagem mais enxuta.

Tendo início em 2019, o jornal alcançou grande aceitação junto ao público formado por estudantes e educadores. Atualmente, são mais de 20 mil assinantes e o jornal chega a 426 escolas, sendo feito inclusive um trabalho personalizado para alguns municípios, a exemplo de Vinhedo e Indaiatuba (SP), cidade referência em alfabetização no Brasil.

Mais de 10 mil alunos lêem a publicação e, desse total, mais de 40% deles demonstraram melhorias significativas em redação, interpretação de texto, gramática e fluência de leitura. Esses resultados reforçam o compromisso do JC com a qualidade da educação midiática.

A publicação é elaborada pela Editora 10 que conta com uma talentosa e dedicada equipe liderada pela editora-chefe, a jornalista Viviane Zanardo.

O JC está disponível nas versões: online, impresso (mensal), áudio (Podcast) e vídeo (Youtube).

Gostaria de agregar a sua escola este instrumento de educação midiática? Assine o JC e ofereça aos seus alunos esta jornada de descoberta e aprendizado.

Se tiver alguma dúvida ou quiser falar sobre parcerias, entre em contato por aqui agora mesmo.

Name: The Daily Gazette
Description: The Daily Gazette, the locally-owned voice of the Capital Region, publishes a print edition seven days a week and offers comprehensive news online. Our private, family-owned company is based in Schenectady, New York. We specialize in local news coverage, focusing on Schenectady, Saratoga, Fulton, Montgomery, Schoharie and Albany counties.

Name: The Pulse India
Description:
“Let us never forget that government is ourselves and not an alien power over us.” - Franklin D. Roosevelt

A country is as much about the governed as it is about the government and as such, it runs best when the two are in congruence. We are the country and politics is the pulse of the nation.

Wait, but isn’t politics boring, tedious, sometimes downright unpleasant and thus, a total put-off? Yawn. Of course, and so is going to the gym! And just about everything else that is beneficial in the long run. But once you get going, it's a good routine. Plus the reward of a toned body makes it worth the while.

Metaphors aside, The Pulse tones your political muscle for the win. We decode political affairs without complex and dramatic headlines. No news is breaking news; it is just news. We make sense of data, events, and decisions from a logical, unbiased perspective and share nuggets that matter.

We are a team of young Indians with analytical minds.
We present ideas with logic, quirk, and the occasional sarcasm.
We are political wonks who love coherent and reasonable arguments.
We are modern, we are rational, we are liberal and guess what – we are also proud Indians, as patriotic about our country as we are about cricket and Bollywood.

Join the voice and build a stronger India that runs with a healthier heartbeat.

Name: MSOI thePost
Description:
MSOI thePost è il settimanale online di politica internazionale ideato e curato dalla sezione torinese di MSOI. Il Movimento Studentesco per l’Organizzazione Internazionale è un’associazione studentesca impegnata a promuovere la diffusione della cultura internazionalistica e rappresenta la sezione giovanile ed universitaria della Società Italiana per l’Organizzazione Internazionale (SIOI).

La nostra rivista si propone come un modulo d’informazione ideato e gestito dagli studenti, i cui principi fondamentali rispecchiano la filosofia del Movimento nella ricerca di una identità super partes e nell’attenzione rivolta agli affari internazionali. 

Grazie alle diverse sedi del Movimento, tra i circa settanta collaboratori del Post vi sono ragazzi distribuiti in tutta l'Italia, nonché alcuni corrispondenti dall’estero.

Name: Capital Newspapers
Description:
Award winning publications. Award winning people.

Capital Newspapers is the premier provider of news and information in southern Wisconsin. We are based in Madison, Wisconsin and are owned equally by Lee Enterprises, parent company of the Wisconsin State Journal, and The Capital Times Company. We are passionate about what we do and are dedicated to our responsibility of providing accurate, and high-quality news and information to our community.  

The Capital Newpspers organization is an affirmative action employer. We are committed to maintaining a workforce that accurately reflects our audience and expands our voice. 

Capital Newspapers publishes more than 30 newspapers, shoppers, specialty publications and Web sites blanketing a 17-county market area that is home to more than one million people in South Central Wisconsin. Additionally, Capital Newspapers offers the Wingra Community Press for commercial printing that responds to the needs of publishers, businesses, and universities' for quality printed materials.

Join our team and help make Wisconsin’s voice stronger!

Name: Les Assises Nationales de l'Accès aux Soins
Description:
La santé demeure une des premières préoccupations des Français. La santé, ou plus précisément l’accès aux soins pour 81 % de nos concitoyens. 

Au 1er janvier 2022, la France comptait 229 000 médecins, généralistes et spécialistes, soit une densité de 340 médecins pour 100 000 habitants. Concernant les généralistes, ce chiffre s’établit à 121 médecins en moyenne pour 100 000 habitants (141 en 2010). 

Le Groupe Delbo Presse est heureux d'organiser la deuxième édition des Assises Nationales de l'Accès aux soins en juin 2025 à Vendôme !

Name: Staten Island Media Group
Description:
STATEN ISLAND’S MEDIA LEADER

The Staten Island Advance, a digitally-focused news, information and advertising company serving Staten Island, NY (Richmond County), is located at 950 West Fingerboard Road, Staten Island, NY.

We publish and operate an extensive portfolio of digital and print products featuring comprehensive, in-depth coverage from the area’s largest news organization.

Our flagship brands are SILive.com, the leading website in the county, The Staten Island Advance, the local daily newspaper which has served the community since 1886 and a weekly shopper, the Market Place.

The Staten Island Advance and SILive.com are part of Advance Local, a leading media group comprised of 12 local news and information websites that rank #1 among local media in their respective markets and more than 30 newspapers known for their award-winning journalism. Advance Local is part of Advance Publications, along with Condé Nast, Parade Media Group, Fairchild Fashion Group and American City Business Journals.

Name: Revue Commentaire
Description:
Commentaire est une revue politique et intellectuelle trimestrielle fondée par Raymond Aron en 1978.

Dirigée par Jean-Claude Casanova, son objectif est double : éclairer ses lecteurs sur toutes les grandes questions qui se posent dans le monde d’aujourd’hui et défendre les principes qui doivent gouverner les sociétés libérales. 

Depuis sa création, la revue Commentaire a publié les textes de penseurs de renom qui ont marqué l’histoire de leur temps, notamment Raymond Aron, Nicolas Baverez, Alain Besançon, Jean-Louis Bourlanges, Francis Fukuyama, Marc Fumaroli, François Furet, Samuel Huntington, George Kennan, Emmanuel Leroy-Ladurie, Simon Leys, Martin Malia, Pierre Manent, Christophe Mercier, François Sureau, Françoise Thom, Michel Zink. 

Pour en savoir plus, rendez-vous sur le site web de la revue Commentaire :
www.commentaire.fr 
Abonnez-vous au profil Twitter de la revue Commentaire :

Name: anform magazine
Description:
Le magazine Anform ! est un bimestriel gratuit dont les préoccupations sont la santé et le bien-être. Il se veut local et proche des antillais, guyanais et réunionnais. 
Deux magazines hors série, édités annuellement, viennent compléter l’offre de Anform ! à savoir le guide Sénior et le guide de la Naissance.
Ces magazines sont distribués dans les pharmacies et les lieux de santé.
Enfin, le site internet www.anform.fr permet d'avoir un accès en ligne aux différentes informations de santé, de bien-être dans la ligne éditoriale du magazine.

Name: Magazine Plongez !
Description:
Plongez !, un magazine pour TOUS les amoureux de la mer et des océans
Parce que la plongée et l’apnée sont avant tout des loisirs qui se pratiquent en groupe, parce que mettre la tête sous l’eau donne envie d’échanger sur ses découvertes, parce que le partage est l’essence même de notre passion, alors oui, Plongez ! avec nous !

Le premier magazine de plongée « média à 360° »
- Le porte-étendard : le magazine papier. 
- Une application digitale, disponible sur toutes les tablettes et tous les Smartphones : cette version numérique sera enrichie avec des vidéos, des diaporamas, des publicités interactives…
- Le site internet www.plongez.fr : complémentaire du magazine, il permettra notamment de suivre l’actualité quotidienne du monde de la plongée et de l’apnée, de lire des interviews exclusives en lien avec cette actualité, de trouver son binôme pour une sortie ponctuelle ou pour un voyage…
- Les réseaux sociaux : Facebook, Twitter, Viméo, Google+…

Des contenus riches et inédits, qui reposent sur les 4 axes forts du magazine :
1- Rêver : des images réalisées par des grands noms de la photo sous-marine, des récits d’aventures et d’expédition, des rencontres avec des personnalités...
2- Préparer : des conseils pratiques pour passer du rêve à la réalité, que ce soit pour s’améliorer dans son sport favori (passage de niveau, aisance sous l’eau), pour s’équiper (nouveautés et tests matériel), pour préparer ses voyages…
3- Voyager : des reportages sur le terrain, des témoignages de plongeurs, des informations touristiques (découvertes entre deux immersions)…
4- Respecter : au travers de la curiosité et de la passion, le magazine fera la promotion d’un tourisme durable et équitable avec le leitmotiv de la préservation du monde marin et de ses ressources.
