Name: Atlántico
Description:
La noche del 13 al 14 de junio de 1987 pudo ser una noche cualquiera como otras tantas similares en aquellas alturas del año. Sin embargo, lo que se produjo entonces, y cuya vigencia se ha prolongado, fue la salida a la calle de un nuevo periódico al que se asignó el nombre de Atlántico. Su lanzamiento fue todo un hito para la prensa gallega y nacional, ya que fue el primer rotativo que incorporaba el color a sus páginas.

Desde entonces, Atlántico no ha dejado de crecer en calidad, medios técnicos y productos informativos, hasta consolidarse como cabecera de referencia, como demuestra su crecimiento constante en número de suscriptores y lectores, tanto de su edición en papel como digital, y de seguidores en las redes sociales y de su canal de televisión online AtlánticoTV.

En todos estos años, se ha mantenido fiel a su cita diaria con su comunidad de usuarios, cubriendo los principales hechos de la agenda informativa, ofreciendo reportajes en profundidad para un mejor análisis de la actualidad y artículos de opinión que son reflejo de la pluralidad de la sociedad viguesa y gallega. Todo, con el esfuerzo de una plantilla entregada, que ha demostrado su gran profesionalidad a lo largo de la historia de este diario, incluso en momentos tan duros como la reciente pandemia.

Name: STYLE&CO Magazine
Description:
STYLE&CO, créé en 2007 est un magazine distribué gratuitement. Ses thèmes principaux : déco, tendances, art de vivre.

Sa réussite et sa pérennité résident dans trois principes essentiels :
- Une structure juridique indépendante et son équipe de collaborateurs légère et flexible.
- Un équilibre entre le respect de la ligne éditoriale et les nécessités économiques.
- Une approche éditoriale régionale : le lectorat découvre ou redécouvre, au travers de thématiques, des richesses patrimoniales et humaines.

Name: Secco Consultoria de Comunicação
Description:
A Secco Consultoria de Comunicação é uma empresa dedicada à prestação de serviços de Assessoria de Imprensa e relações profissionais dos veículos de comunicação. Fundada em 1992, tem atuação focada nos segmentos de Economia, Negócios, Indústria e Esporte e é dirigida pelos profissionais José Carlos Secco e Luiz Carlos Secco.

José Carlos Secco começou suas atividades, em 1986, na SM Promoções e Empreendimentos, empresa de assessoria de imprensa com foco na área automobilística. Foi redator do Guia Oficial do GP do Brasil de Fórmula-1 entre os anos de 1987 e 1991 e também realizou diversos serviços para várias empresas. Desde essa época, escreve artigos para diversas publicações como Jornal do Carro (Jornal da Tarde), Revista Oficina Mecânica, Gazeta Esportiva, Revista Acontece Sul (RS) e Sport Life.

Em 1995, escreveu o Livro "Cruzando a América em Duas Rodas", que relata a experiência da equipe brasileira na edição da RAAM - Race Across America, uma das mais difíceis provas ciclísticas do mundo que atravessa os Estados Unidos, do Oceano Pacífico até o Golfo do México em mais de 5.000 quilômetros.


Luiz Carlos Secco trabalhou a partir de 1961 a 1974, como jornalista da empresa S.A. O Estado de S.Paulo e Jornal da Tarde, além da revista AutoEsporte. Posteriormente, transferiu-se para a Ford, onde foi responsável pela comunicação da empresa. Com a criação da Autolatina, passou a gerir o novo departamento de Comunicação da Ford e da Volkswagen. Em 1993, assumiu a direção da Secco Consultoria.

Name: Big Issue North
Description:
Big Issue North is a business solution to a social problem.
It’s a limited company employing staff to distribute Big Issue magazine that is sold by people who have limited other ways of earning an income in the North West and Yorkshire and the Humber.

As well as selling the magazine, our vendors are given advice by staff on how to get help with anything from developing their skills or accessing English language courses, to getting housing, financial or health advice, which can help them achieve their goals and improve their lives for good.

Around 300 Big Issue North vendors sell the Big Issue magazine each week. Our vendors buy the magazine from one of our regional offices for £2 and then sell it on established pitches in towns and cities for £4. They keep the £2 they make on every magazine. Selling the Big Issue also gives vendors motivation and helps to boost their self-esteem.

Big Issue North vendors are making a commitment to earn an income – working not begging. 75% of vendors have never begged, and 79% of the 20% of vendors who had committed crime prior to selling the magazine say they have offended less since they have been selling.

Big Issue North Trust is a registered charity (charity number 1056041), which raises funds to provide a range of support for sellers including support accessing services, help getting ID, home furnishing packages and projects such as breakfast clubs.

Les produits locaux et de saison sont mis en avant dans des recettes souvent créatives, mais aussi traditionnelles ou authentiques. Les recettes accompagnées d’astuces ou de conseils - environ 60 par parution - sont variées de l’entrée au dessert et accessibles dans leur réalisation. Elles mettent en scène toute la variété des productions locales : produits de la mer, produits du terroir, fruits, légumes et quelques productions exotiques de Bretagne. Name: Jornal A Cidade
Description:
A história do jornal A Cidade começou no dia 1º de janeiro de 1905, quando circulou a 1ª edição do jornal, logo se consolidando como líder da imprensa em Ribeirão Preto. Desde o início, a proposta foi produzir um jornal a serviço da comunidade, um porta-voz de Ribeirão Preto e da região, 100% envolvido com as questões da cidade.

Em 2005, A Cidade completou 100 anos e inaugurou seu moderno parque gráfico, No ano seguinte foi firmada parceria com o grupo Coutinho Nogueira, proprietário da EPTV.

Em novembro de 2007, com o jornal já totalmente reformulado editorialmente e graficamente, a Pesquisa Ibope confirmou a liderança absoluta do A Cidade no segmento jornal impresso, resultado de muito trabalho, competência, inovação e seriedade.

Seis anos depois de fechar a compra de 50% do Jornal A Cidade, o Grupo da EPTV, assume o controle acionário do jornal, adquirindo mais 50% das ações.

Name: Jackson Free Press
Description:
As of May 20, 2022, the Jackson Free Press news operation is part of the nonprofit Mississippi Journalism and Education Group's suite of journalism projects, alongside the Mississippi Free Press and the Mississippi Youth Media Project.

Referred to often as simply "JFP," the newspaper/website started in 2002 as an alternative weekly newspaper in Jackson, Miss. Co-funders were Mississippi native journalism Donna Ladd, author and technology expert Todd Stauffer and a group of young Jacksonians wanting in inclusive, solutions-focused voice in the state. It won many awards in its first 19.5 years of publication before the nonprofit acquisition.

Name: The NYC Daily Post
Description: The NYC Daily Post operates as a publisher, aggregator, and distributor of news content on the internet. We provide consumers independent and objective editorial content across multiple vertical categories including business, education, entertainment, fashion, food, health, lifestyle, politics, real estate, science, travel, and other categories.

Name: The Post
Description: The Post delivers comprehensive national coverage from Wellington, focusing on politics, business, and lifestyle content. With expert journalism, we provide readers with reliable news, insightful analysis, and engaging features that cover key issues shaping New Zealand. As part of the Stuff Group, The Post is dedicated to informing and connecting Kiwis with the stories that matter.

Name: Crux Now
Description:
Crux offers the very best in smart, wired, and independent coverage of the Vatican and the Catholic Church.

In an increasingly polarized world, where spin can be more important than facts, Crux aims to be an objective voice, offering the best news and analysis from journalists with decades of experience on the Vatican and religious beat. Our reputation for unbiased reporting has made us the most trusted English-language Catholic news site in the world.

Crux was founded as a project of The Boston Globe in 2014, but has been fully independent since March 2016.

Name: Kommersant UK
Description:
Kommersant UK is an esteemed, independent media entity based in the UK, renowned for delivering compelling and valuable information tailored specifically for the Russian-speaking community across the region. As the leading UK business media website, we engage over 1.2 million readers annually, supported by a robust Facebook presence with 140,000 followers and a rapidly expanding Telegram channel with 9,000 subscribers.

Our core mission is to provide comprehensive and reliable information encompassing all aspects of life in the UK. This includes updates on business events, new legislations, rules, and inspiring success stories of Russian-speaking residents and businesses thriving in the UK. Our content caters not only to the business community but to all Russian speakers interested in staying informed about the British news and life agenda.

We are a primary source of news, often quoted by various media for our in-depth coverage and authoritative voice in the Russian-speaking media landscape.

Our team comprises UK-based professional journalists and media managers who bring extensive experience which ensures that our reporting is always accurate, insightful, and relevant.

Name: The Mancunion
Description:
This is the official LinkedIn feed of The Mancunion - the weekly digest of Manchester's favourite moments. 

We’ve been around in various guises since 1969, and emerged out of The Manchester Independent which was founded in the 1920s. With a readership of 20,000, The University of Manchester's student newspaper stands as the largest in the country. 

Written and put together by students, The Mancunion creates high-quality, original content focused on Manchester’s student bubble. All our writers work voluntarily and we are always eager to find new contributors to join us. The Mancunion is open to any reflections on any topic and we seek to be as inclusive as we can. All writers are welcome to weekly meetings held on the first floor of the Students' Union, even if you are new. 

We aim to keep a firm focus on student news and what’s happening in the local area. However, we are also always open to contributions of opinion pieces about the state of the nation and the world at large, and magazine articles on mainstream as well as local artists, musicians, poets, plays, and so on.

Our ultimate goal is to be an integral part of student life at the University of Manchester, provide excellent opportunities for students wanting to get into journalism, and get our contributors to go from thinking about what they want to write, to what they want to read.

Name: Criptovaluta.it
Description:
Criptovaluta.it è la principale fonte divulgativa a tema Bitcoin e Crypto in Italia. Fondato a Maggio 2017, il giornale è andato online il 27 gennaio 2018. TM Criptovaluta.it è marchio depositato il 15 dicembre 2021 presso il Ministero dello Sviluppo Economico.

Ogni giorno, su criptovaluta.it, vengono pubblicate news esclusive a tema bitcoin e crypto, analisi ed approfondimenti, coadiuvati dall'esperienza ultra decennale nel campo dell'editoria finanziaria da Gianluca Grossi della TJR SRLS ed organizzati dal direttore responsabile del progetto, Alessio Ippolito della ALESSIO IPPOLITO S.R.L., proprietaria del giornale.
Criptovaluta.it fornisce contenuti sulle tematiche crypto di tipo testuale e video, fruibili gratuitamente sul sito e sui principali social networks come Twitter, Linkedin, Telegram, Youtube, Facebook etc.
Attraverso i suoi canali tematici, criptovaluta.it realizza video-interviste, reportage esclusivi e video approfondimenti di carattere socio-scientifico su tutto quello che riguarda l'evoluzione del #web3, della #blockchain e dei temi di tendenza come #FinanzaDecentralizzata , #Metaverse #Meta , #CryptoGaming #PlaytoEarn e i tanto chiacchierati #NFT , argomenti cui pende un acceso dibattito nel mondo delle crypto (e non solo) negli ultimi anni.
Il taglio editoriale del giornale online criptovaluta.it si pone, come primo obiettivo, quello di far arrivare arrivare concetti di per se anche complessi, anche ai neofiti della materia, con lo scopo di coinvolgere un bacino sempre maggiore di appassionati alle tematiche crypto. Gli ingredienti chiave del nostro successo editoriale sono: Qualità - Esclusività - Semplicità - Fruibilità.
Attraverso i suoi canali, criptovaluta.it offre, infine, spunti di riflessione sulle principali tematiche crypto in voga del momento e confronto di opinioni e pareri con gli altri membri delle community crypto italiane ed internazionali.

Name: POP MAGAZINE, le meilleur du local
Description:
POP MAGAZINE est un magazine féminin, qualitatif et gratuit distribué dans les Hauts de France.
Il met en avant le savoir-faire local et français sous toutes ses formes (déco, gastronomie, patrimoine, mode, artisans, restaurants, artistes, loisirs, sorties…) avec fraîcheur, optimisme et passion. Il dépoussière le genre en ajoutant une touche de légèreté et d’authenticité aux reportages de proximité. Véritable ovni dans la presse gratuite avec sa charte unique et pétillante, il est vu, reconnu et plébiscité par ses lecteurs devenus accros à ses coups de coeur.

POP Magazine fait rêver son audience avec son ton positif résolument différent. Utilisant tous les codes du digital et des réseaux sociaux (grande part laissée aux visuels et aux photos, native advertising, rédactionnel sincère), il crée une proximité vraie qui a séduit de nombreux annonceurs. 

Son aura et sa qualité reconnues le rendent idéal pour des communications locales, régionales mais aussi comme relais de prises de paroles nationales. C’est le support parfait pour créer proximité et confiance.

Name: The Peninsula Qatar
Description:
The Peninsula, one of the leading English dailies in Qatar, was launched in 1996. In the past 25 years, The Peninsula has been successfully providing our readers extensive news coverage from around the world with a primary focus on life in Qatar.
What started as a digital copy of the print version has now a life of its own and is one of the top websites in Qatar regardless of the genre or language.
With over 65 million pageviews in 2020, thepeninsula.qa (thepeninsulaqatar.com), we can proudly say, is the top news website – in both English and Arabic – in Qatar.
Last year we had over 8.5 million users visit our website and good majority of the visitors are from Qatar, making us a very hyper local website.
And to top it all we were picked as the third best news website in the Middle East in 2017 by the World Association of Newspapers and News Publishers.
The Peninsula digital space, which includes our award-winning website and our social media platforms, has made a name for itself among the Qatar residents and citizens by reporting accurate news in a timely manner for decades. The engagement by users on our social media handles are a testimony for this fact.
Unlike many new age digital media, we are always careful to verify the information from official sources and be responsible for what we put out on our various channels.

Name: Washington Afro American Newspaper
Description:
Black History month 2012 kicks off a year of activities for the AFRO-American Newspapers celebrating 120 years of continuous publishing as the oldest African American family-owned news media company that has chronicled local, national and international events and provided a voice for a community often ignored or not considered worthy of reporting their views, interests or participation.  

As one of the nation’s oldest news organizations dedicated to covering the Black community, the AFRO compiled a comprehensive collection of over a million articles that captures the African American experience in business, civil rights, education, health, law, and sports throughout the 20th century.   

At the turn of the 20th century, John H. Murphy Sr., who served as a sergeant in the Civil War, had been working nearly 8 years to establish what was initially called The Afro-American into a central voice for Blacks in Baltimore that could not be marginalized or dismissed.  Its advocacy required that it continue expanding to become one of the beacons for the civil rights struggle as well as the source to know what transpired in the community.  Today, its rich archives are an important source for exploring life as it happened through the pages of its 13 editions that included the Baltimore, Washington, Richmond, New Jersey, Philadelphia, and 6 National papers reporting on news in North Carolina, South Carolina, Florida and Georgia.

Name: Revue 6Mois
Description:
Du journalisme en photos
6Mois renoue le lien entre le journalisme et la photo. Deux fois par an, l’appétit du public et l’énergie stupéfiante des auteurs se rencontrent. Avec 6Mois, la photo retrouve son sens.

Des regards du monde entier
Ce siècle est jeune. Il se façonne au Brésil, en Indonésie, en Chine, en Egypte. Il se raconte. Les auteurs de 6Mois sont chinois, équatoriens, russes, belges, canadiens, somaliens, américains, français…

Ni publicités, ni mécénats
Pour vivre et se développer, 6Mois ne compte ni sur la publicité, ni sur le mécénat, mais tout simplement sur ses lecteurs et lectrices.

Une diffusion en librairie et par abonnement
6Mois est distribué, comme la revue XXI (www.revue21.fr), dans les librairies et les surfaces culturelles (Fnac, Relay, Cultura), en France comme à l’étranger.

Name: Go Out! Le Magazine Culturel Genevois
Description:
Vitrine de l’effervescence artistique genevoise, le magazine Go Out ! dévoile depuis 6 ans une ville dont la créativité et le foisonnement artistique mériterait de voir hissée au rang de capitale culturelle européenne. 

Géré par une association à but non lucratif et non subventionnée, le magazine s’adresse aussi bien aux néophytes qu’aux connaisseurs, offrant par le biais d’un contenu spécialisé, une immersion dans toutes les formes d’expressions:  littérature, musique classique et actuelle, art contemporain et expérimental, photographie, théâtre, cinéma mais aussi gastronomie, hôtellerie, design, automobile et horlogerie. 

Irrévérencieux mais rassembleur, Go Out ! regroupe chaque mois créateurs, conservateurs et publics sous les lunettes critiques de contributeurs passionnés et de journalistes indépendants.  

Go Out ! Magazine demeure avant tout le fruit un pari audacieux, celui d'offrir chaque mois aux genevois une publication où chaque édition est limitée, gratuite et volontairement dénuée d’annonces publicitaires (20 au maximum). 

Imprimé à 70'000 exemplaires par an et partenaire de la Ville de Genève, de l’ensemble de ses institutions culturelles, des Organisations Internationales, des hôtels 5 étoiles et des principales fondations artistiques et musées privés de la ville, il est disponible dans plus de 450 spots à travers le canton, dont notamment : 
- La Banque Mirabaud, Crédit Suisse, UBS, Reyl
- L’Hôtel Interncontinental, le Président Wilson, le Richemont, 
- Le Palais des Nations, OMPI, Le siège du CICR ainsi que dans les principales organisations internationales;
- Le Cercle de la Terrasse, la Fondation de Genève
- La Clinique des Grangettes
- le Grand Théâtre, le Victorial Hall
- l’Aéroport de Genève, Genève Tourisme, Palexpo
- Le Mamco, le Musée d'Art et d'Histoire, la fondation Barbier Mueller, Martin Bodmer ...
- Piaget, Journe, Rolex, le Musée Patek Philippe, Hermès ...

Name: Meshkal
Description:
The word Meshkal is Arabic for “kaleidoscope,” an instrument that—when you look through one end of it and point the other end towards a light source—presents a rich constellation of colored patterns. Rotate a kaleidoscope slightly and the patterns and colors will change.

Like a kaleidoscope, Meshkal brings different perspectives and shows how a single phenomenon can appear layered and complex when seen from slightly different angles. Our journalists report news events comprehensively, including in a single article different—and often opposing—perspectives. We don’t publish opinion editorials (op-eds)—narrow apertures that direct readers on what and how to perceive. Instead we listen to, question, watch, record, and think about the voices of multiple people and then present them or represent them as truly as possible. The paths of some farmers and peasants, officials and stateswomen, teachers, artists, workers, siblings and parents, diplomats, scholars, and dreamers may never cross except in the pages of Meshkal, where we sketch how their lives and actions might be intertwined in relationships seen and unseen.

Since our launch in April 2019, Meshkal has aimed for high standards of professionalism, including in each article clear and understandable datelines and bylines, multiple sources of information, and the relevant historical, social, political, and cultural context for new developments. We do so because few others do, and because we think it is important that the public has access to true, reliable information.

– Fadil Aliriza, Editor-in-Chief and Founder of Meshkal

Description: The Lubbock Avalanche-Journal is an award-winning daily newspaper serving Lubbock and the South Plains. In 2014, the A-J was named the Texas Associated Press Managing Editors newspaper of the year.

Name: The Huntington News
Description:
The Huntington News is the independent student-run newspaper of the Northeastern University community. The News is the most frequently published and well-read publication on campus. It features campus, city, sports, lifestyle and opinion sections. Stories are published online weekly and a print issue is published every other Thursday during the fall and spring semesters. Breaking news is also available online.

Founded in 1926, The Northeastern News was a university recognized student group and the student newspaper of Northeastern University. In the summer of 2008, it was announced The Northeastern News would go independent, forming what is now known as The Huntington News. Since then, the Huntington News has been the fully independent, student-run and operated newspaper of Northeastern University. 

At The Huntington News, more than 60 undergraduate and graduate students work alongside Northeastern alumni on our Board of Directors to maintain the high standard of quality the community has come to expect from its student newspaper. Students interested in writing for The Huntington News should email managing@huntnewsnu.com for more information. Businesses interested in advertising with us online or in print should contact business@huntnewsnu.com

Name: The Maritime Telegraph
Description:
The Maritime Telegraph is the leading maritime newspaper in Eastern Europe which is published on paper and on-line. Our audience is maritime executives, maritime human resources professionals, maritime educational institutions, unions, and, of course, the seafarers.
The newspaper has worked at the market for more than 10 years (since 2005 year). Today more than 50 leading companies cooperate with us on a regular basis.
Compared to the other publications, our editions are sent to the offices of the biggest shipowners around the world. 
Publishing in the newspaper and our website is a proven way to be seen and read by seamen that are the basis of our audience.

Name: 조선일보 (The Chosunilbo)
Description:
2020년 창간 100주년을 맞이하는 조선일보는 대한민국에서 가장 오래되고(最古), 가장 많은 사람이 보는(最高) 1등 신문입니다. 조선일보는 신문 조선일보를 포함해 종합편성채널 TV조선, 온라인 종합매체 조선Biz, 월간 조선, 주간 조선, 어린이조선, 헬스조선 등 다양한 매체를 통해 1000만 오디언스를 가진 종합미디어 그룹입니다. 100년을 넘어서도 가장 다양한 연령대와 계층에서 가장 많은 오디언스를 가진 미디어그룹이 되도록 최선을 다하겠습니다. 감사합니다.

The Chosunilbo first hit newsstands in 1920 and now celebrates almost a century of journalistic excellence thanks to the unwavering support of our readers over the years. We have grown into what we are today by sharing both tears and laughter with generations of our readers. Based on our strong expertise in news reporting, we have evolved into one of Korea’s largest media groups, Chosun Media, encompassing a wide range of subsidiaries ranging from broadcast and new media to publishing. 

We are leading the way in this era of media convergence, in which the walls that once separated different areas of the industry are crumbling. We have introduced a service called "Cross Media" that provides access to particular content in various media formats. Our user-friendly smartphone apps also make it possible to read news stories on smart gadgets in exactly the same format as the print edition. We also opened a new website "chosunbiz.com", to provide the latest economic and business news in real time. TV Chosun, The Chosunilbo's television channel, was launched in December 2011. Living up to our reputation, our sphere of influence has been extended by covering all areas of media such as print media, broadcasting and new digital media.

Name: Observer Reporter
Description:

The company publishes The Observer–Reporter, a daily newspaper covering Washington County, Greene County, and the Mon Valley in Pennsylvania. Other publications include The Almanac, a weekly publication covering the South Hills and northern Washington County, and several niche publications and associated websites.

Our main websites, www.observer-reporter.com and www.thealmanac.net, can deliver your advertising message to more than 120,000 unique visitors each month. We are delivering more than 2 million page views per month to local readers.

With combo advertising of print and online you are reaching at least 80% of the market, and our online newspaper provides ultra-targeted marketing opportunities for your business.

Name: El Generacional

El Generacional está compuesto por futuros periodistas que quieren adentrarse en el mundo de la información y ver cómo funciona. Somos la futura generación que reemplazará la actual generación de periodistas y para ello, qué mejor modo de empezar que fundando un medio de comunicación donde podamos demostrar nuestra valía.

Name: Routed Magazine
Description: Routed is an online publication founded in the autumn of 2018 by a group of Oxford graduates, brought together by a shared interest in migration and (im)mobility. Bridging the divide between specialist academic literature on human mobility and popular portrayals of migration in the media, we hope to bring a fresh, critical perspective to the study of how and why people move. Challenging perceptions of migration as a binary choice between roots and routes, our work aims to lift up the voices of people ‘on the move’ and to explore human (im)mobility in its many varied forms.

Name: Finance and Stochastics
Description:
Finance and Stochastics presents research in all areas of finance based on stochastic methods as well as on specific topics in mathematics motivated by the analysis of problems in finance (in particular probability theory, statistics and stochastic analysis).
The journal also publishes surveys on financial topics of general interest if they clearly picture and illuminate the basic ideas and techniques at work, the interrelationship of different approaches and the central questions which remain open.

In addition, Finance and Stochastics features special issues devoted to specific topics in rapidly growing research areas. The journal serves as an ideal publication platform for both theoretical and applied financial economists using advanced stochastic methods and researchers in stochastics motivated by and interested in applications in finance and insurance.

Name: Detroit Jewish News

The Jewish News, a recognized leader in the print publication industry, has won over 100 press awards in the past 10 years, including several years as the Michigan Press Associated Newspaper of the Year in its circulation class. Name: MindSite News
Description:
MindSite News is a nonprofit, nonpartisan digital journalism organization dedicated to reporting on mental health in America, exposing rampant policy failures and spotlighting efforts to solve them.

We seek to create and sustain a sense of national urgency about the workings and failings of the U.S. mental health system and to impact that system through our reporting, making it more equitable, effective, transparent and humane in its care for individuals and families struggling with mental illness.

Name: World & New World Journal
Description:
World New World Journal is an independent and non-partisan platform, dedicated to providing in-depth and balanced analysis on critical global affairs. Our platform offers expert insights into international relations, diplomacy, energy, economics, and security issues.

At World New World Journal, we prioritize balanced and in-depth analysis, ensuring our readers receive comprehensive coverage of the most pressing issues facing our world today. Our commitment to accessibility and inclusivity is reflected in our multilingual website, which offers content in 7 languages at no cost, making our expert analyses available to a diverse global audience.

Our mission is to inform and educate by delivering reliable, expert-driven perspectives on the complexities of international affairs. We strive to be a trusted resource for policymakers, academics, professionals, and anyone interested in understanding the intricate dynamics of our interconnected world.

We are also open to collaboration with field experts who share our passion for global affairs. If you are interested, please email us at contact@worldnewworld.com.

Join us at World New World Journal and stay informed on the critical issues that shape our global landscape.

Name: ART MAG

Name: The Guardian Post
Description:
The Guardian Post was created in 2001 under very dire, cataclysmic and tumultuous circumstances. The Guardian Post, which is cherished by many, haunted by some, but read by them all, first hit the newsstands on August 30, 2001. 

The newspaper has over the years trudged rough and tumultuous roads but it surmounted these countless challenges and continued to march on.
The media outfit metamorphosed from a weekly to a bi-weekly, tri-weekly, and later five times a week (January 2016). 

On Sunday February 7, 2021, the Sunday edition of The Guardian Post hit the newsstands. This was a major milestone in the print media in Cameroon. This edition has been receiving applause from across the board. In January 2022, the Saturday edition of The Guardian Post, dedicated purely to sports, was launched. This thus made The Guardian Post the only newspaper in Cameroon and in the entire CEMAC Sub region, that publishes all seven days of the week – Monday to Sunday.

The newspaper is endowed with a cream of seasoned editors and reporters planted in the towns of Yaounde, Bamenda, Douala, Limbe, Buea, Kumba, Maroua and other towns of the country, who ensure that the news published is verifiable.

Through its middle-of-the-road editorial policy and objective approach to issues, The Guardian Post trudged valiantly on the path to journalism excellence with unbending reputation, earned through its credible and objective reporting; despite teething challenges.

Also, The Guardian Post Magazine was launched in November 2019 and is published as a quarterly glossy magazine.

Name: The Raikes Journal
Description:
Raikes is a quality digital magazine for Gloucestershire. A community interest company dedicated to building community with engaging, original journalism about the county's businesses, charities, education and training providers and more. We deliver email edition of Raikes direct to the email inbox of subscribers three times a week.
You can read for free, but If you upgrade to paid, you will get on average eight extra members-only editions every month and will be able to see beyond any paywalls, as well as read Raikes’ rolling Top 100-plus Businesses in Gloucestershire series. You will also be allowed to comment on stories, make suggestions for what we should be writing about, vote in our awards, and might even be invited to our roundtable events. And you’ll be supporting the rebirth of high-quality journalism in Gloucestershire on a website championing the county you love — all for just £2.30 per week (£12 a month or £120 a year! Ask us about 20 per cent off for groups of two or more subscribers).
Interested, visit the website and read the About page too! 
Contact: andrew.merrell@raikesjournal.co.uk

Name: thedotgood.
Description: thedotgood’s mission is to multiply opportunities for engagement and interaction in the social good sphere. We highlight good governance and innovation and we connect those who put positive impact and social profit first.

Name: Entreprise & Santé
Description:
Entreprise & Santé est né de la volonté partagée entre plusieurs Services Interentreprises de prévention et de santé au travail des Hauts de France.

Magazine trimestriel, Entreprise & Santé est adressé directement par voie postale auprès de 95 000 entreprises, essentiellement des TPE et des PME. Entreprise & Santé s’adresse aux salariés et aux employeurs de tout secteur d’activité. Dans un langage grand public, Entreprise & Santé présente des actions de santé au travail, réalisées en entreprise. Ces actions sont possibles grâce au concours du Service de Santé au Travail auquel l’entreprise adhère. Le magazine comprend également un dossier central d’information portant sur un thème précis. Depuis sa création en 2008, plus de 1 000 initiatives d’entreprises sont ainsi valorisées.

Les expériences de près de 100 000 entreprises

La santé et le bien-être des salariés sont autant de facteurs de développement des entreprises. Entreprise & Santé permet de prendre connaissance des actions de santé au travail réalisées par de nombreuses TPE-PME: solutions techniques, préservation et amélioration de l’environnement de travail (qualité de l’air, bruit, vibrations...), ergonomie, organisation, information, formation et sensibilisation des salariés. Entreprise & Santé: des idées et des exemples quelle que soit votre activité!

Μέσα από την εφημερίδα θα μαθαίνετε νέα από όλα τα χωριά του Δήμου, ιστορίες που μας έφεραν στο σήμερα, αλλά και ό,τι μας κρατάει πίσω.

Name: SUDAMA NEWS
Description: सुदामा न्यूज़ इलेक्ट्रॉनिक हिन्दी वेब पोर्टल व हिंदी अखबार है । सूचना और जनसंचार जगत में सुदामा न्यूज़ ने निष्पक्ष पत्रकारिता कर अपनी लोकप्रियता काफी बढ़ा ली है । हिन्दी में खबर के संचालन होने के बाबजूद सुदामा न्यूज़ ने संपूर्ण भारत के साथ बिहार राज्य से सटे नेपाल के सीमावर्ती क्षेत्र में भी अपनी पहचान स्थापित कर लिया है । सुदामा न्यूज़ समाज का सजग प्रहरी बन निष्पक्ष पत्रकारिता की ओर लगातार अग्रसर है । राजनीतिक उतार-चढ़ाव से लेकर सामाजिक गतिविधियों पर हमारी तीक्ष्ण नजर रहती है । सुदामा न्यूज की ओर से बिना पूर्वाग्रह के समाचार संकलन करने की लगातार कोशिश रहती है । हम समाज की विचारधारा से लेकर राजनीति तक की खबर को पूर्ण ईमानदारी के साथ प्रकाशित करने को वचनबद्ध है ।

Con representaciones locales de información en Puebla y Querétaro, Sexenio se coloca a la vanguardia en los portales de noticias nacionales y locales.

Name: Zarządzanie Projektami. Magazyn
Description:
Magazyn "Zarządzanie Projektami" jest skierowany do szerokiego grona osób, zajmujących się zarządzaniem projektami. Interesujące artykuły, felietony i wywiady, a także recenzje nowych książek poświęconych problematyce PM znajdą tu osoby piastujące stanowiska kierownicze, członkowie zespołów projektowych, a także przedstawiciele środowisk naukowych, studenci oraz wszyscy pasjonaci tematyki zarządzania projektami.

Teksty prezentowane w czasopiśmie będą dotyczyły różnorodnych zagadnień związanych z zarządzaniem projektami.

W magazynie przedstawiane są:
• interesujące projekty realizowane w Polsce i zagranicą
• najlepsze praktyki zarządzania projektami
• sylwetki kierowników projektów
• determinanty sukcesu i porażki w projekcie
• style kierowania zespołami projektowymi
• efektywne techniki zarządzania projektami
• techniki negocjacji i komunikowania


Ważną rolę w tworzeniu magazynu powierzono przedstawicielom najważniejszych organizacji propagujących nowoczesne zarządzanie projektami, które na łamach magazynu będą informować o organizowanych wydarzeniach.

Inicjatorem powstania oraz wydawcą czasopisma jest Fundacja Instytut Rozwoju Projektów, utworzona w 2011 roku przez Regionalną Izbę Gospodarczą Pomorza jako think-tank wspierający rozwój nowoczesnych koncepcji zarządzania w Polsce.

Name: SHOW DAILY
Description:
We publish newspapers at the world's biggest bicycle industry trade shows. Follow us to stay ahead with the latest news, insights and trends from the bicycle industry.

OUR STORY
Since 2008, the Show Daily has been the exclusive official daily newspaper at Eurobike – the world’s leading trade fair for the bicycle industry. With the addition of the Taipei Cycle Show Daily in 2010 and Taichung Bike Week Dailies in 2023, we provide an advertising package that reaches key buyers at the most important events in the industry.

DAILY UPDATES
Our editorial team keeps visitors up-to-date with innovations, product news, event details. The pages that change daily provide space for onsite editorial news.

THE QUALITY DIFFERENCE
The right journalistic setting for your ads – our independent professional editorial team operates separately from advertising sales. We don’t run press releases or other ‘filler material’ – everything goes through our rigorous editorial process. That’s why the Show Dailies continue to be respected by loyal readers.

Description:
Reporter is an independent student-run magazine established in 1951. The magazine is printed monthly while the website is updated daily.

Reporter's audience consists of the RIT community; students, staff, faculty, and alumni. Enrolling about 15,000 students, with about 3,000 staff and faculty, RIT is among the top institutions for cooperative education, study aboard, and undergraduate research. 

3,000 free print issues will be distributed around campus (both on the residence hall and the academic side) the first Friday of every month. The print issue includes 24 pages that cover news, feature stories, sport news, leisure, student activities that related to Rochester and RIT campus.

Our operations boast strong local reporting, innovative distribution models and unique digital products.  We are tied to our communities through our papers' histories and reputations.  Houston Community Newspapers & Media Group is composed of twenty-four Suburban community newspapers and related websites, based out of seven locations across the Houston area.
 
From our Multi-media Consultants to our Editorial staff, we are dedicated to producing elite products that keep residents informed and businesses moving forward.  Visit YourHoustonNews.com to learn more about our culture and our communities.

Name: The Ogden Newspapers, Inc.
Description:
Founded on September 22, 1890 with H. C. Ogden’s launch of the Wheeling News, Ogden Newspapers has since grown to 55 daily newspapers, and a number of weekly newspapers.

Throughout that time, the company has been committed to excellence in journalism through service and leadership in their communities. Newspapering has changed over time – long gone are the days of hot lead typesetting and linotype machines – but our core values as a company have not. We believe local newspapers should not only report the news of the day, but also tell the stories of their communities, and of the people who live there. We take writing the first draft of history seriously.

How people consume news has changed, but our mission stays the same. Our newspapers have found new ways to serve their communities, creating robust online communities. These keep all of our readers, both print and digital, well informed and engaged with local happenings. Our rich heritage of newspapering combined with a company-wide commitment to high journalistic standards, position us to continue to uphold the values of excellence and service for decades to come.

We are proud of the support our newspapers are able to provide their communities and local businesses. We constantly strive to preserve the best of our newspaper’s century old traditions while adapting to the modern innovations that will help carry them into the future.

Name: The Oxford Student
Description:
The Oxford Student is a weekly newspaper produced by and for members of the University of Oxford; it is sometimes abbreviated to The OxStu. The paper was established in 1991 by the Oxford University Student Union (OUSU).

The Oxford Student is owned by OUSU and run through the Student Union’s commercial subsidiary, Oxford Student Services Ltd (OSSL). The newspaper’s constitution grants the paper editorial independence.

The Oxford Student won the Student Newspaper of the Year at the Guardian Student Media Awards in 2001, was shortlisted in 2004 and 2012 and awarded the runner-up prize in 2007.

Former contributors include Laura Barton of The Guardian, Mark Henderson and Rob Hands of The Times, and Karl Smith of The Independent.

The current editors-in-chief are Amelia Gibbins and Georgie Allan.

Name: DDU Connect
Description: DDU Connect (launched: 17th March, 2012) is DDU’s (Dharmsinh Desai University) 20 paged monthly newspaper. It started as a 16 page tabloid (for volume1) – a ‘By the students, For the students’ venture with an aim to ‘Connect’ various departments of our University and showcasing the hidden creativity of its students and now has a changed motto of ‘Changing Dimensions’. DDU Connect aims to be a medium that will connect the students with DDU. In more than 50 years of DDU’s epic book, something which had been just missing was a platform, a platform lending a hand to the students to rise to a level, a level to rise and reach to the management, a level to rise and peek into the institute’s happenings and undertakings, a level to reach to faculty’s abode and know about them. DDU Connect is this very platform that aims to give the DDU youths all this through a 20 page monthly tabloid.

générations est le magazine leader pour les 50 ans et plus en Suisse romande et paraît 11 fois par an. 

Mensuel d’information et de divertissement, générations est un magazine indépendant édité par la Société coopérative à but non lucratif Générations, société créée en 1970. Elle agit dans un esprit d’éthique et de qualité.

Sous cette marque générations, la société a également développé un site d’information et une plateforme numérique communautaire qui compte aujourd’hui plus de 5'000 membres, répartis dans toutes les régions romandes. Il a également créé en 2014 un événement annuel appelé Forum Senior Marketing, à destination de tous les professionnels de la branche. 

En septembre 2015, générations a inauguré une nouvelle formule graphique, marquant un repositionnement en pleine adéquation avec l’évolution démographique. Modernisé et renforcé, le magazine rencontre depuis une forte croissance sur ce marché porteur et compte plus de 113'000 lecteurs (Remp 2018-2).

Ses bureaux sont à Lausanne et la société compte une douzaine de collaborateurs.

Description:
The Tufts Daily is the entirely student-run newspaper of record at Tufts University in Medford, Mass. An editorially and financially independent organization, the Daily’s staff of more than 200 covers news, features, arts and sports on Tufts’ four campuses and in its host communities. The Daily’s editorial board and columnists provide opinions and commentary alongside op-eds submitted by readers and members of the Tufts community. In recent years, the Daily has also expanded into multimedia, including podcasts and videojournalism.

Founded in 1980, the Daily publishes a print edition each week and a digital edition every weekday during the academic year. All of the Daily’s coverage can be found on its consistently updated website devoted to upholding its motto: “Where you read it first.”

Name: Kunst — Bulletin
Description:
Kunstbulletin 
is a network for information, navigation and communication in the field of contemporary art. The online platform provides an interactive, openly editable system to professional partners in the art world, which can be used to publish information about individuals, institutions, calls for proposals, exhibitions, events and art works. This content is constantly being linked to a map, as well as current events in the art world.

Kunstbulletin 
is the most widely read journal of contemporary art in Switzerland. Kunstbulletin provides information about events in the art world and reflects its multifaceted nature. Kunstbulletin is published 10 times a year, and features artists' portraits, interviews, art theory, reviews, tips, news, announcements, art jobs and a comprehensive exhibitions guide. Since 1998, parts of the text and the exhibitions guide have been collected in an online archive. Kunstbulletin is independent, and is self-financed through subscriptions and advertising. Kunstbulletin is published by the Schweizer Kunstverein (Swiss Art Association), which is a charitable, non-profit organisation. We thank everyone who supports and contributes to Kunstbulletin through subscriptions and advertising.

Name: Salud a Diario
Description:
Salud a Diario es una publicación de circulación mensual que busca entregar información útil y veraz, que mejore la calidad de vida de las personas, logrando que encuentren en este medio de comunicación todo aquello que garantice y cubra sus necesidades en el ámbito de la salud integral. Para ello, se nutre de fuentes médicas, especialistas y académicas, tanto del mundo alópata como provenientes de la salud natural.  Porque hoy la tendencia es ser proactivo en el cuidado de nuestra salud y de nuestra familia. Cada vez más las personas incorporan hábitos saludables para verse y sentirse bien.

Tiene como objetivo dar a conocer, con información avalada por académicos y expertos de diversas áreas médicas e instituciones, las últimas soluciones disponibles para prevenir y mejorar tanto la salud como la calidad de vida de las personas en la época actual. 

A través de una escritura amena y clara, un diseño organizado y positivo, proponemos orientar a mujeres, hombres y familias chilenas en la elección de una vida más próspera y saludable. 

Cuenta con el respaldo editorial de Revista Selecciones Readers Digest.

Name: Le Monde diplomatique en español
Description:
Fundado en 1954 por Hubert Beuve-Méry, Le Monde diplomatique lleva la marca de una época en la que todo parecía posible: los imperios coloniales vacilan, el Tercer Mundo se reúne en Bandung para oponer su unidad a las grandes potencias de la época, los pensamientos emancipadores se desvanecen. Pronto, estos pensamientos darán lugar a la sublevación de las poblaciones, tanto en el Norte como en el Sur.

Heredero de este espíritu fundador y voluntario, Le Monde diplomatique es a la vez el periódico francés más difundido en el mundo –es traducido a veinte idiomas en una treintena de países– y el que aseguró su presencia en Internet en primer lugar. Así, conjuga una gran apertura hacia cuestiones internacionales con una visión crítica de lo que, en la mayoría de los casos, sigue siendo el ángulo muerto de la prensa: la ideología y el funcionamiento global del capitalismo, las consecuencias ecológicas y sociales del libre comercio, los peligros del “choque de civilizaciones”, lo que esconden las alianzas militares, las utopías necesarias, las perspectivas ante nuevas formas de democracia en la era de las grandes basculaciones geopolíticas.

El equipo de este mensual, convencido de que los enfoques comparativos y el análisis histórico disipan las ilusiones de una actualidad agitada, se emplea en hacer que cada número combine análisis, reportajes e investigaciones. Con una perspectiva singular y rigurosa de ver los acontecimientos, compartida por un centenar de colaboradores extranjeros, Le Monde diplomatique es el periódico de referencia de todos los que quieren comprender el mundo, pero también cambiarlo.

Name: Frustration magazine
Description:
Frustration est un magazine web diffusant billet d'humeur, édito politiques, chroniques, reportage et enquête ayant pour point commun de décrire et de dénoncer les grands mécanismes de domination qui pourrissent les vies individuelles et détruisent la planète. Le capitalisme et ses défenseurs sont nos cibles favorites.

Qu’est-ce qui différencie Frustration de ce qui existe ailleurs ?

Nous qui l’écrivons et la réalisons de manière collective afin que le résultat de nos recherches soit le plus accessible et rigoureux qui soit. Nous nous laissons du temps pour réaliser nos articles et nous ne les publions pas si nous ne sommes pas satis-faits à l’unanimité de leur fond et de leur forme. Nous sommes totalement indépendant et a-partisan, par conséquent on se fout bien de qui on peut vexer. On cherche à exprimer la colère, le doute et l'espoir comme ils viennent, sans filtre.

Pourquoi le titre Frustration ?

Pour que ceux qui partagent ce sentiment – frustration de vivre dans une société qui exalte l’égalité alors qu’elle favorise ceux qui ont déjà tout, qui prône le « vivre-ensemble » alors que ses dirigeants et ses journalistes ont fait du fait divers et du mépris des pauvres leur thème favori – puissent voir leurs doutes étayés par nos recherches, leurs malaises exprimés dans nos lignes. Mais surtout pour qu’ils se sentent légitimes à trouver les choses injustes sans avoir besoin de se reposer sur un dogme.

Green Street News publishes three weekly newsletters that are dedicated to providing market players with the information they need to spot fresh profit opportunities and identify oncoming risks. Green Street News produces: 

•  Real Estate Alert, covering the high end of the commercial-property investment business. Subscribers also get full access to the Deal Database and High-Yield Fund Database. The Deal Database is a powerful online tool that contains the terms of all significant U.S. property sales completed since the start of 2001. The High-Yield Fund Database offers detailed views of more than 2,000 real estate investment funds and more than 1,000 fund managers in the U.S. and other countries.

•  Commercial Mortgage Alert, focusing on real estate finance and securitization. It is accompanied by the CMBS Database, a comprehensive listing of all commercial mortgage-backed securities ever issued.

•  Asset-Backed Alert, reporting on worldwide securitization of residential mortgages, credit-card accounts, auto loans and other consumer debt, as well as corporate receivables, such as leveraged loans. It is accompanied by the ABS Database, a comprehensive listing of all asset-backed securities, MBS and collateralized debt obligations ever issued.

The Indigenous Business News (IBN) is a pioneering publication dedicated to showcasing and uplifting Indigenous-owned businesses and the broader First Nations community across Australia. At IBN, we believe in the transformative power of meaningful employment and leadership within Indigenous communities. Through our partnership with the Australian Associated Press (AAP), we amplify Indigenous voices and ensure that our stories reach a broad audience.

wakefield publishing owned. Newspaper, Online & Mobile for the Dry Cleaning, Laundry, & textile industry.

One state became thirteen, which warranted the first change in the publications title to Western Cleaner & Launderer. Over the years readership and boundaries continued to expand. Today, Cleaner & Launderer is mailed nationwide to all 50 states.  Over the next several year we grew our large reader base even more through print, online, mobile and social media! Becoming a leader in information for the dry cleaning and laundry industry.

As the industry has changed and grown over the years, so As we start our 53th year so has Cleaner & Launderer. Cleaner & Launderer today is now 3 editions. A Print, Online and Mobile edition (find the mobile edition in google Play or iOS app store) You can also add Cleaner & Launderer in your rss feeder of your choice.

We are on facebook, Google plus, twitter, and more to come. The great thing about social media, is now we can connect our readers faster than ever before. Join us in our new community on google plus and start your own discussion  with others, ask questions, find out about association gatherings, seminars, trade shows, find local business.

Cleaner & Launderers Online edition you can share articles with your friends, visit advertisers websites whenever you want. The mobile edition you have everything directly on your smart phone or tablet.

Name: Tageblatt Lëtzebuerg
Description:
Le Tageblatt est un quotidien d’information générale payant de tendance progressiste fondé en 1913. Publiant surtout en langue allemande, le journal et son site web offrent un journalisme original et ambitieux. 

Le Tageblatt se distingue depuis plus de 100 ans en tant que quotidien progressiste publié dans le bassin industriel historique du Luxembourg, à Esch-sur-Alzette. Fondé en 1913 sous le nom d’Escher Tageblatt, le journal s’est forgé au fil des évolutions de la société luxembourgeoise une réputation de média militant misant sur un journalisme de qualité tant sur le plan international et national que local.
Le Tageblatt est un média payant décliné en version papier et numérique (tageblatt.lu). Il couvre toute l’actualité politique et sociétale du pays sur un ton marqué d’une certaine irrévérence. Ses articles d’opinion sont remarqués et régulièrement relayés dans les autres médias du pays. Le Tageblatt traite avec beaucoup de soin les informations locales, la culture et le sport au Luxembourg. Le quotidien est surtout rédigé en langue allemande et partiellement en français.

Toujours à la recherche de moyens innovants de présenter son journalisme, le Tageblatt a été désigné comme meilleur quotidien local d’Europe aux European Newspaper Awards de 2018.
L’équipe Tageblatt rassemble près de 50 journalistes, monteurs et correcteurs.

Commercial producers are the focus with a weekly technical section branded Production/Farming. News bureaus in Calgary, Saskatoon, Regina, Brandon, and Winnipeg and an international freelance network ensure comprehensive coverage. Name: The Student
Description:
The Student is the University of Edinburgh’s original student newspaper.

It is Europe's oldest student newspaper, founded in 1887 by Robert Louis Stevenson. 

In 2006 and 2007, The Student held the title of Best Student Newspaper in Scotland, awarded by the Herald Student Press Awards. The Student regained the title in 2009 and held the title in 2010.

Contributors to The Student has won various individual awards at both The Guardian's Student Media Awards and the Herald Awards.

Name: The Prince George Citizen
Description:
The Prince George Citizen is a weekly newspaper that is locally owned and community focused.  It has been the newspaper of record for the City of Prince George since 1916. The Citizen is the founding member of, and has maintained continuous membership of the Chamber of Commerce.  

We ask the hard questions on community issues, ensure that local politicians are held to account, and provide full coverage of sporting events. In addition, we provide information on upcoming events and go into the arts and entertainment world for a glimpse of what sparks and inspires the people in our cultural community. The Citizen has knowledgeable columnists contributing on a regular basis, as well a letters page filled with colourful commentary from enthusiastic readers. 

The Citizen is proud to bring local, national and international news to the residents of Prince George because it's what matters to you.

Name: Expreso
Description:
Expreso, www.expreso.info, es un diario digital de viajes y turismo que publica noticias del sector, entrevistas, secciones de opinión y reportajes de destinos especiales.
Tiene secciones específicas de hoteles, agencias, transporte, agenda, biblioteca, españa, internacional, agenda profesional...
Los lectores se pueden suscribir gratis para recibir por correo electrónico las novedades destacadas de cada día
Es un excelente soporte para publicitarse, porque tiene 50.000 lectores viajeros que aumentan cada mes, 100% crecimiento anual, y es el único diario español de viajes y turismo que no falta a su cita ni un solo día del año

Name: FiskerBladet
Description: Daglige nyheder fra Danmarks ældste fiskerimagasin om dansk fiskeri og den danske fiskesektor. Vi bringer nyheder, virksomhedsprofiler, debatindlæg og portrætter af personer med relevans for dansk fiskeri.

Name: The Modesto Bee
Description: The Modesto Bee is our area's premier source of news and information, and the leading provider of advertising options in the communities we serve. We produce top-quality, intensely local digital and print products 365 days per year — and have for more than a century.

Name: EsgData
Description:
MarketInsight.it e PmiReboot.it introducono ESGDATA.it, un verticale che riunisce notizie provenienti dai due siti proprietari con focus su ambiente, sociale e governance per grandi e piccole aziende. 

In un momento di crisi, trasformazione e cambiamento sociale, la sostenibilità diventa un driver per la creazione di valore e per lo sviluppo futuro: attraverso ESGDATA è possibile monitorare trend e novità per rimanere aggiornati e incentivare la crescita del proprio business.

Name: The Agro News (দা এগ্রো নিউজ)
Description:
দি এগ্রো নিউজ (https://agronewstoday.com) একটি বাংলা কৃষি ভিত্তিক সংবাদপত্র যার সম্পাদক ও প্রকাশক বাংলাদেশের কৃষির কিংবদন্তি জনাব শাইখ সিরাজ। শাইখ সিরাজ, বাংলাদেশের দুটি সর্বোচ্চ বেসামরিক সম্মান স্বাধীনতা পুরস্কার ও একুশে পদক সহ, কৃষি সাংবাদিকতার জন্য সর্বোচ্চ পুরস্কার, ইউএনএর এফএও এএইচ বোর্মা অ্যাওয়ার্ড অর্জন করেছেন।

একটি তরুণ দল সাথে নিয়ে, এই সংবাদ পত্রটি তিনি নিয়ে এসেছেন বাংলাদেশর কৃষকদের সফলতা, প্রযোজনীয়তা, কাজের পদ্ধতি, কর্ম দক্ষতা সহ সব ধরনের বিষয় তুলে ধরার জন্য। সর্বপরি এটি কৃষি ও কৃষকের সংবাদ পত্র।

কর্ম জীবনে তিনি একজন বাংলাদেশি সাংবাদিক, কৃষি উন্নয়ন ও গণমাধ্যম ব্যক্তিত্ব। ইমপ্রেস টেলিফিল্ম লিমিটেড চ্যানেল আই’র প্রতিষ্ঠাতা পরিচালক ও বার্তাপ্রধান।

এই কৃষি অগ্রদূত ১৯৫৪ সালের ৭ই সেপ্টেম্বর চাঁদপুর জেলায় জন্মগ্রহণ করেন। তার শিক্ষাজীবন শুরু হয় খিলগাঁও সরকারি উচ্চবিদ্যালয়, তারপর নটরডেম কলেজ ও ঢাকা বিশ্ববিদ্যালয়ে ভূগোলে সম্মানসহ মাস্টার্স ডিগ্রি অর্জন করেন । শিক্ষাজীবন শেষ করে তিনি সাংবাদিকতা পেশায় যুক্ত হন।

তার কৃষিবিষয়ক কার্যক্রমের ধারাবাহিকতায় দেশের সব পত্রপত্রিকা ও টেলিভিশনে কৃষিভিত্তিক কার্যক্রমের পরিধি বেড়েছে। তিনি বাংলাদেশ টেলিভিশন এর মাটি ও মানুষ নামক টিভি প্রোগ্রামের জনপ্রিয় উপস্থাপক ও কৃষি ব্যক্তিত্ব। উক্ত অনুষ্ঠানে বাংলাদেশে আধুনিক কৃষি ও বিভিন্ন উন্নত চাষ পদ্ধতি, কৃষি ব্যবস্থাপনা, বেকার ও শিক্ষিত যুবকদের কৃষিকাজে উৎসাহিত করা হতো। তিনি 'হৃদয়ে মাটি ও মানুষ' নামে চ্যানেল আইতে সাপ্তাহিক অনুষ্ঠান উপস্থাপনা করেন। 

আমাদের সাথে যোগাযোগ মাধ্যমগুলোঃ

Name: The Calgary Journal
Description:
We  write stories, edit content, take photos and create the layout for this award-winning community news publication that serves the entire city of Calgary. Published monthly in print and refreshed continuously online, the Journal can be found on news stands across the city and 24/7 online at www.calgaryjournal.ca.

Our journalists are from all years of our Bachelor's in Communication Studies at Mount Royal University. Should you have any questions, please don't hesitate contacting either of our faculty supervisors:
Shauna Snow-Capparelli ssnowcapparelli@mtroyal.ca
Janice Paskey jpaskey@mtroyal.ca
Sally Haney shaney@mtroyal.ca

Name: MKSE.com #1 Martech News
Description:
MKSE.com är en av Europas ledande nyhetssajter inom CX, martech, digital transformation och e-handel. Nyheter publicerade dagar före konkurrenterna. Tusentals dagliga besökare.
Utöver nyheterna erbjuder MKSE.com ett levande community där digitala aktörer och e-handelsleverantörer kommunicerar med varandra och kunder. MKSE nyhetsbrev och sociala kanaler förser ytterligare tiotusentals inom branschen med det senaste om affärer och trender.

Name: Bueno y Vegano
Description: Prensa vegana independiente de difusión gratuita impresa y digital.

Name: Borderperiodismo
Description:
Publicación de actualidad, política y tendencias dirigida por Maria Julia Oliván. 

Construido con el aporte remunerado de colaboradores independientes. Las expresiones vertidas en las notas no reflejan necesariamente el punto de vista del sitio.

Borderperiodismo es la muestra viva de nuestra prepotencia de trabajo y de la plena salud del periodismo independiente.

Borderperiodismo es, a pesar de todo, un espacio de libertad. Una oveja negra.

Name: Marietta Daily Journal
Description:
Today Times-Journal Inc., and its 150-plus employees publish two dailies (the MDJ and the Cherokee Tribune), 23 Neighbor community newspapers, and four monthly magazines, including Cobb Life, in 10 counties (Bartow, Cherokee, Clayton, Cobb, DeKalb, Douglas, Fayette, Fulton, Henry and Paulding). 

The company is still owned and operated by the Brumby family.
	
The MDJ aims to report the news aggressively, but with candor, discretion and fairness. And to paraphrase the words of the first Otis Brumby back in 1916, we welcome our readers to feel free at all times to criticize us — and support us.

Name: EMPRESA Y FINANZAS
Description:
Empresa y Finanzas es en la actualidad, la plataforma impresa líder en el sector de la información económica y empresarial en la Comunidad Valenciana, Andalucía, Galicia, Extremadura y la Región de Murcia.
El periódico sigue una línea editorial basada en el rigor, la investigación y la reflexión a la hora de analizar la actualidad, alejada de connotaciones políticas, abordando temas y debates que afectan a la evolución de la economía y del tejido empresarial, haciendo especial valoración y dando protagonismo a los verdaderos motores de la economía: empresas y empresarios.
Contamos además con un CLUB DE DEBATES EMPRESA Y FINANZAS, que a través de más de 100 debates y más de 350 debatientes, ha puesto a disposición de todos nuestros lectores en las diferentes Comunidades Autónomas dónde se celebra, temas de rabiosa actualidad e interés no sólo para nuestros empresarios, sino también para la sociedad en general.
La pluralidad, el enriquecimiento de las ideas, la negación del pensamiento único, la objetividad y en definitiva, la libertad, han sido el norte que ha perseguido en cada debate este CLUB.
Se ha convertido en un lobby de influencia donde los empresarios pueden no sólo asistir a magníficos debates, sino conocer y relacionarse con los dirigentes políticos de cada Comunidad, los presidentes de las asociaciones empresariales o los grandes empresarios.

Name: Infrarouge Magazine
Description:
Depuis plus de 20 ans, Infrarouge, le magazine que personne n'achète mais que tout le monde lit, est offert dans plus de 1500 lieux en vue et à la mode.

Offrir chaque mois à un public urbain mixte un contenu décalé et plein de fraîcheur. Blind date, interviews décousues, interviews corrigées, ... : nos rencontres éphémères avec ceux qui font l’actu s’affranchissent de tous les codes du genre. Un seul objectif, en savoir plus sur ce qu’ils ne diront nulle part ailleurs. Des thématiques récurrentes — culture, évasion, mode, auto, high-tech, beauté, tourisme, ... — pour se laisser tenter. Derniers lieux à la mode, adresses incontournables, Infrarouge devient le guide pour ne plus naviguer à vue.

Name: 澎湃新闻 The Paper
Description: ThePaper.cn, an online media start-up backed by the Shanghai United Media Group .ThePaper.cn, which was created as a new media start-up under Dongfang Daily, has also launched two new units: an online video platform and an English language online publication Sixth Tone.

Name: UK Property Weekly
Description:
UK Property Weekly’s main audience group is people that come from Chinese speaking area and stay in the UK. UK Property Weekly bases in London, and influence all Chinese-speaking audiences in the UK with radialised network.

UK Property Weekly aims to provide real estate information and policies consulting services for readers who show strong interests in UK real estate and relative industries. Aiming to build rapidly and stable connections between UK real estate market and readers, UKPW schedules to publish accurate report in UK property industry news, provide systematically and deeply analysis on property related policies, whilst develop interactional relationship between readers and real estate companies.

Name: NZZ.at
Description:
NZZ.at – Die liberale Online-Zeitung!
www.nzz.at 
Probemonat für €1 - Abo um €14 pro Monat
--- 

NZZlich anders. Diese Online-Zeitung kann man nicht mit Ihrem Steuergeld kaufen.
NZZ.at steht für Nachrichten in völlig neuer Form. Liberal, unabhängig, personalisierbar.
---

Als unabhängiges, liberales Nachrichtenmedium verpflichtet sich die Neue Zürcher Zeitung Österreich der freien Berichterstattung. Die Leserinnen und Leser werden von 15 Journalisten vor Ort und 40 Korrespondenten mit Nachrichten, Reportagen und Hintergrundstories aus Österreich wie auch international versorgt, die per Smartphone, Tablet und PC konsumiert werden können.
 
www.nzz.at

Name: Grup Edicions de Premsa Local
Description:
Gup Edicions de Premsa Local és la societat matriu d’un dels principals grups de comunicació en català. A través de l’adquisició i integració d’empreses periodístiques, el grup fundat l’any 2018, edita actualment més de 25 capçaleres locals, comarcals i verticals, essent líder en cobertura territorial i local, gràcies a una extensa xarxa de mitjans distribuïda per tot el país. 

L’objectiu fundacional de Grup Edicions de Premsa Local és promoure un ecosistema de comunicació sòlid i independent en l’univers lingüístic del català, i per aquest motiu ha promogut un procés de consolidació del mercat de la premsa local i especialitzada. A través de la innovació tecnològica, d’un producte editorial que fa èmfasi en la innovació de formats i en la producció audiovisual, i d’una capacitat de generació de negoci centralitzada, el grup pretén fer arribar el seu periodisme de proximitat, rigurós, responsable i centrat en les persones a qualsevol comunitat local i vertical del país.

En l’actualitat, el grup comprèn: 

- El diari digital NACIÓ, un dels principals mitjans digitals del país, i la seva xarxa d’edicions locals.
- Les campçales històriques DIARI DE SABADELL i DIARI DE TERRASSA.
- Les revistes mensuals ÈXIT VALLÈS, i TERRITORIS, a les terres de ponent. 
- Els digitals locals TARRAGONADIGITALl, AGUAITA.CAT, MANRESAINFO, OSONA.COM, RUBI.TV, entre d’altres.
- Els verticals CRIAR.CAT i ELMONDELATELE.CAT, així com els canals especialitzats IMPACTE (sobre clima) i NEXT (cultura internet). 
- La consultora de dades POLIS, una companyia dedicada a l’anàlisi, gestió, estructura, visualització i comunicació de dades. 

El grup dona feina a gairebé 100 persones, la majoria dels quals són periodistes, distribuïdes en 4 redaccions principals, incloent la seu al Passeig de Gràcia de Barcelona. Entre totes les capçaleres cobreix el 70% del territori, i obté una audiència mensual agregada propera als 2,8 milions d’usuaris únics mensuals, a més d'uns 70 mil lectors diaris de paper.

Name: Diario El Heraldo Honduras
Description:
El Heraldo es un periódico de Honduras con circulacion nacional, pero su mayor presencia es en la zona centro-sur del territorio hondureño. 

Es un Diario independiente con información veraz, completa, actual y de alta calidad que ayuda al lector a entender su entorno y a tomar decisiones, que defiende el derecho a la libertad de expresión y de información y vela por su más preciado patrimonio: la credibilidad.

Name: Guyana Chronicle
Description:
The Guyana Chronicle aims to provide Guyanese people at home and abroad with responsible local and foreign news reportage as well as informative, educational and recreational content relevant to Guyana, primarily through the print media.

Additionally, the Guyana (Daily) Chronicle and Sunday Chronicle are newspaper publications of the Guyana National Newspapers Limited (GNNL).

Name: Midland Times News
Description: Hyper local, pro-business & community! Invested in heavily by some of the largest Oil & Gas producers in WTX. 1200+ sister publications around the US.

Name: iD, le magazine de l'innovation territoriale
Description:
Chaque mois, iD présente les projets innovants et exemplaires initiés par les collectivités territoriales. A travers des articles synthétiques, enrichis d’infographies  et d’illustrations, l’équipe du magazine décrypte les grandes tendances des collectivités en termes d’innovation.      
                                                                                                                                                   
Présent sur de nombreux salons et événements dédiés aux collectivités, ID s’appuie également sur l’expertise de ses Partenaires : 
- le Syndicat national des directeurs généraux des collectivités territoriales (SNDGCT), 
- l’Observatoire national de l’innovation publique TERRITORIA
- l’Association des Techniciens Territoriaux de France (ATTF)
- le groupe WEKA

Name: Tribuna de Minas
Description: Com a melhor e mais completa cobertura do que acontece na principal cidade da Zona da Mata mineira, a Tribuna conquistou, ao longo de mais de 40 anos, credibilidade ao firmar-se como instrumento de cidadania e voz da comunidade. Assim, ajuda a promover mudanças e colabora para o desenvolvimento local e regional. Esse papel tem rendido ao jornal diversas premiações, entre elas, dois Esso, um Ayrton Senna e outros dois prêmios internacionais, o principal deles, de melhor reportagem, em 2010, concedido pelo Instituto Prensa y Sociedad, no Peru, sobre corrupção em órgãos públicos.

Name: Vision Publications
Description: With 12 monthly issues distributed to over 12,000 Glazing Industry Companies we are the UK's largest regional trade magazine. Our magazines are read by industry professionals covering the complete supply chain from System Houses & Manufacturers to Installation & Supply Companies.

Name: Merkurist MaWi GmbH
Description:
Merkurist.de   

Tagesaktuelle News, Events und vieles mehr für Mainz, Wiesbaden, Koblenz, Worms und Rheinhessen.

Lokal, digital, transparent und unabhängig!

Das führende Online-Nachrichtenportal in Mainz. Mit über 1,6 Mio. Lesekontakten monatlich und über 10 Millionen Seitenaufrufen in Mainz, Wiesbaden und Rheinhessen.

Außer unserer klassischen redaktionellen Berichterstattung haben wir mit unseren Snips eine einmalige userorientierte Plattform geschaffen, auf der unsere Leser:innen ihre eigenen Themenvorschläge liefern können. So sind wir nicht nur nah am Geschehen, sondern auch nah am Menschen.

Name: 8Directo
Description: El periódico digital del Campo de Gibraltar.

Name: Celebrities World News
Description: Celebrities World News, the Online Newspaper that discovers the celebrities of tomorrow, Today. Seeking out the most talented, creative, and charismatic young leaders of tomorrow, and giving them the support, recognition, and celebrity they deserve for a bright future.

Name: Tindle Newspapers Ltd.
Description: Tindle Newspapers Ltd. is a newspaper company based out of - The Old Court House, Union Road, Farnham, Surrey, United Kingdom. We publish newspapers in many communities in Southern England, the South West, Wales and the Isle of Man, and also embrace digital and social media.

Name: En-Contact
Description: En-Contact is the professional magazine for decision-makers in customer relations and customer experience: exclusive surveys or interviews, benchmarks, reports: with more than 8,000 subscribers, distribution at the main trade fairs and events in the sector, a take-up rate of 3.4 readers/copy, and more than 25,000 readers in the French-speaking world. A circulation of 8,000 to 10,000 copies, depending on the issue.

Name: The News-Gazette
Description: The News-Gazette, Inc. is an online news and advertising source in the east central Illinois. It offers local news, obituaries, opinions, Web logs, chats, podcasts, photo galleries, special reports, calendar archives, business, sports facts, chats, little league, forums, answer book, community links, contests, places and faces, food, games, gas price watch, classifieds, and customer service. The company was founded in 1919 and is based in Champaign, Illinois.

Name: Gwinnett Daily Post
Description:
The Gwinnett Daily Post is a community newspaper serving the area of Gwinnett County, Georgia. This area includes:
Auburn (located partly in Barrow County)
Berkeley Lake
Braselton (located partly in Jackson County, Hall County, and Barrow County)
Buford (located partly in Hall County)
Centerville (unincorporated)
Dacula
Duluth
Five Forks (unincorporated)
Grayson
Lawrenceville
Lilburn
Loganville (located partly in Walton County)
Mountain Park (unincorporated)
Norcross
Peachtree Corners
Rest Haven (located partly in Hall County)
Snellville
Sugar Hill
Suwanee
Certain Tucker addresses are in Gwinnett County although Tucker is located in neighboring DeKalb County.
Although Hoschton and Stone Mountain are actually located in neighboring counties, some addresses marked as being in those cities are actually in Gwinnett County.

You can find us online at gwinnettdailypost.com, on Facebook at facebook.com/gwinnettdailypost or on Twitter @GwinnettDaily.

Name: The Daily UW
Description: Since 1891, The Daily (and its predecessor, The Pacific Wave) has been home to thousands of jugglers, storytellers, artists and budding business people. Students learn to write, edit, illustrate and design an award-winning newspaper; or sell advertising, all the while juggling academic course work and other commitments.

Name: ADIR - Transrural initiatives
Description:
Transrural initiatives est une revue bimestrielle d’information et d’analyse sur les espaces ruraux.
A l’heure où domine une logique économique caractérisée par la mise en concurrence généralisée, la disparition des solidarités et l’exploitation aveugle des ressources naturelles, la revue propose de défendre et de promouvoir des territoires ruraux aux multiples usages, vivants et accueillants, ni totalement jardinés ni violemment exploités.
Transrural offre une lecture décloisonnée des questions rurales et entend proposer des clés de compréhension et d’action pour accompagner le changement social. De la vie culturelle à l’aménagement du territoire, de l’énergie à la démocratie locale en passant par l’agriculture, les problématiques qui se posent au monde rural sont appréhendées au travers d’initiatives locales comme autant d’alternatives concrètes au modèle de développement dominant.
Media citoyen, associative et participative, la revue est portée par des réseaux d’éducation populaire (Civam, Relier, MRJC, Cap Rural ainsi que le réseau des Crefad), et rédigée par une équipe composée de journalistes professionnels et d'acteurs du développement rural (animateurs, militants associatifs).
Sans publicité, indépendante de toute structure syndicale ou politique, Transrural initiatives entend sortir de la morosité ambiante et invite a l’action.

Name: Shanghai Daily
Description:
Launched on October 1, 1999, Shanghai Daily is the first full-color English daily newspaper in the Chinese mainland and an indispensable source of information for English-language readers who want to explore and understand Shanghai and China. Its comprehensive business and Shanghai news is frequently reprinted and cited by overseas media. 
Since its launch, Shanghai Daily has achieved several “firsts” contributing to China’s international communications: the first English daily newspaper on the Chinese mainland with a Sunday edition; the first Asian newspaper on Kindle; and the first newspaper ever to win the Asian Media Website Award conferred by the World Association of Newspapers and News Publishers. 
Shanghai Daily also operates www.shanghaidaily.com and www.iDEALShanghai.com websites, and has extend its products to Kindle, iPhone, iPad, Blackberry, Playbook and Windows phone apps.

Name: Diario El Sol Mendoza
Description: Sabemos cómo escribir lo que le pasa a los mendocinos. Y lo hacemos a diario.

Name: Afrik Management
Description:
Depuis sa création, Afrik Management informe les cadres, entrepreneurs et tous ceux qui veulent être acteurs de leur parcours professionnel. Dans un contexte de transformation du monde du travail fortement secoué ces deux dernières années, les besoins des collaborateurs se transforment radicalement et leurs usages média changent.
En 2024, Management renforce ainsi sa mission autour du l’accompagnement et propose une expérience média qui traite en profondeur une thématique clé de la vie professionnelle à travers son magazine, ses podcasts et ses événements live. Pour plus d’information sur www.afrikmanagement.com

Name: China Daily Asia Pacific Limited
Description:
Launched on December 10, 2010, China Daily Asia Weekly is a 32-page color tabloid published every Friday, featuring news, view and analyses. Asia Weekly's content is not restricted to China but turns its periscope on other Asian countries as well, with 240,000 copies weekly circulation, the newspaper is printed and distributed in major countries across Asia, including Japan, South Korea, India, Singapore, Malaysia, Indonesia, Thailand, Nepal, Australia and United Arab Emirates. What is more, iPad version of China Daily Asia Weekly is now available in Apple App Store.

Apart from China Daily's vast resources - a worldwide network of correspondents, commentators and photographers, Asia Weekly has a dedicated pool of professional writers with proven credentials across the region.

Name: Jornal O Progresso de Tatuí
Description:
Fundado em 30 de julho de 1922, o jornal O Progresso de Tatuí é um dos veículos de comunicação impressos há mais tempo em atividade ininterrupta no Estado de São Paulo.
De suas páginas, tiveram origem alguns dos maiores patrimônios locais, como o primeiro âncora do telejornalismo brasileiro, Maurício Loureiro Gama, que deu os primeiros passos profissionais na redação de O Progresso.
Também é legado do jornal o título emblemático que Tatuí carrega, com orgulho, desde 1934, quando passou a ser conhecida como “Cidade Ternura”, graças a um artigo publicado no periódico.
Entre outras importantes iniciativas, O Progresso se destacou por tomar frente na mobilização em homenagem ao escritor tatuiano Paulo Setúbal, a qual redundou na tradicionalíssima semana de eventos em homenagem ao “imortal” da Academia Brasileira de Letras, anualmente promovida em agosto.
Ainda na área cultural, O Progresso deu origem ao mais abrangente certame da história do município, o Concurso Artístico e Literário de Natal, disputado por estudantes do ensino fundamental desde o ano de 1995.
Ao longo destas nove décadas, O Progresso chega à quarta geração de administradores, com edições aos finais de semana e um portal de notícias diárias, pela web. Assim, justificando sua denominação, tem trabalhado e contribuído, concretamente, com o constante “Progresso de Tatuí”.

We are a digital news & information site covering global Halal food, Islamic finance, fashion, Muslim consumer marketing, healthcare, cosmetics and tourism, governmental regulations, lifestyle segments of the Halal industry. Name: The Galveston County Daily News
Description:
The Galveston County Daily News serves Texas as
