since 1842, The Daily News is more than a survivor
— it’s a thriver in the face of opportunity and
challenges. We’ve informed and led our community
through hurricanes, statehood, the Civil War and
everything between. At 180, we’re just getting
started.

The Daily News is a seven-day news organization,
publishing online each day. Our high-quality
premium printed newspaper is published Tuesday
through Friday and followed by a powerful weekend
edition. Coast Monthly, award-winning and
considered by many one of the top Texas lifestyle
magazines produced by a local newspaper, artfully
tells the stories of those who live and embrace the
exciting coastal lifestyle.

The Daily News organizes the Press Run, a unique
opportunity for athletes of all ages and skill levels to
run across the Galveston causeway, a 2-mile bridge
connecting the mainland with the island. The race

raises money to provide reading materials to local
students.

An important part of Galveston County, we are
highly-engaged with our community by supporting
local events and contributions to non-profit
organizations.

To us, community journalism and helping local
businesses thrive is a special calling. If you’re
interested in joining us, please feel free to message
us.

Name: Cape Times
Description:
The Cape Times is the dominant and authoritative morning daily newspaper in Cape Town, servicing the needs of the upmarket reader, emphasising business news and providing in-depth coverage of current issues.

In 1876 the first edition of the Cape Times was published under the editorship of Frederick York St Leger. It grew under a succession of remarkable editors into a commercial success, but was best known for its fearless commitment to fighting for the ordinary man and against human rights abuses.

It has become as much a part of Cape Town as the south easterly wind (and sometimes as irritating to the politicians or powerful people whose foibles it exposes).

Name: CP Mustang News
Description:
Mustang News is the award-winning student-run newspaper of the Cal Poly campus. Since 1916, the editorial and reporting staff have been committed to providing the best possible coverage of all news relevant to Cal Poly's students, staff and faculty. Through the newspaper, journalism, graphic communication, design, and business students experience the inner workings of a professional daily newspaper, in preparation for careers in the media industry. In the spirit of free speech and student activism, Mustang News is entirely edited by students, with no supervision or censorship by the university administration. Mustang News is self-supporting and entirely financed by advertising sales. Mustang News has received numerous national awards, and is often commended for being on par with professional daily newspapers. Most recently, the online version of the paper, mustangnews.net, received the Pacemaker award for the best collegiate newspaper Web site.

Mustang News is a division of Mustang Media Group, which was formed in 2013, to envelope all of Cal Poly's journalism programs such as Mustang News print, creative services, television, web presence, public relations and radio.

Make sure to like Mustang News on Facebook for daily updates and follow CP Mustang News on twitter!

We have been publishing The Teacher, a leading magazine for EFL teachers in Poland, for 13 years now. Also, we distribute other high quality magazines for English teachers, e.g., English Teaching Professional, and Modern English Teacher. Name: Jornal Diurna.
Description: O Diurna. é o Jornal Nacional de Estudantes da Universidade Católica Portuguesa. Profundamente conscientes da multiplicidade de vozes e saberes que se ouvem pelos corredores da UCP, inerentes às curiosidades e opiniões várias que se formam, o nosso grupo de alunos lançou-se ao desafio de construir de raiz o modelo de um jornal académico. Queremos servir de plataforma para congregar artigos de natureza científica, de opinião, de divulgação, entrevistas, etc., tendo como autores os próprios alunos, os membros da Academia, as instituições, elementos das Magistraturas e da sociedade civil.

Name: Presseclub Wiesbaden
Description:
Am 14. März 1989 wurde der Presseclub Wiesbaden von Redakteuren, Pressesprechern und Unternehmern gegründet. Mit seinen rund 300 Mitgliedern ist der Presseclub Wiesbaden eine der wichtigsten Adressen für den Dialog zwischen Journalisten, Medienschaffenden, Wirtschaft, Kultur und Politik in der hessischen Landeshauptstadt.

Als gemeinnützig anerkannt, fühlt sich der Presseclub der Förderung der Toleranz, der Kultur und der Völkerverständigung verpflichtet. Geleitet wird er von einem auf jeweils drei Jahre gewählten Vorstand, der unter anderem die jährlich rund 25 Clubabende, Feste und Reisen ins In- und Ausland organisiert. Informieren Sie sich über unser vielfältiges Clubleben auf unserer LinkedIn-Seite oder unserer Homepage. 

Domizil des PCW ist das beeindruckende Jugendstilhaus "Villa Clementine" an der Wilhelmstraße 19, dessen Parterre-Räume der Club von der Stadt gemietet hat. Der in der Regel alle zwei Wochen stattfindende Jour fixe, zu dem zumeist hochkarätige Gäste aus Politik, Wirtschaft, Wissenschaft und Kultur Rede und Antwort stehen, bietet Gelegenheit, sich aus erster Hand zu informieren und sich mit anderen Mitgliedern zu vernetzen. 

Unser Hausgastronom "Die Hofköche" hält Speisen und Getränke für Sie bereit. An veranstaltungsfreien Tagen können die Räume von PCW-Mitgliedern für Pressekonferenzen und andere berufsbezogene Tagungen inkl. des Caterings genutzt werden.

Sie sind Medienschaffender oder stehen einem Unternehmen oder einer Organisation vor und interessieren sich für eine Mitgliedschaft? Dann informieren Sie sich bitte auf unserer Homepage oder besuchen nach vorheriger Absprache mit dem Vorstand unverbindlich einen Clubabend.

Name: ECM Publishers, Inc.
Description:
ECM Publishers, Inc. is a leader in local community news with 49 newspaper titles and more than 20 online news publications; employs over 400 associates at 17 locations in the metro area and out state Minnesota.  The future of news encompasses real time information coming from many sources published to an ever expanding suite of connected devices. One of our goals is to make our local community news publications and online news coverage become the most important information platform for local residents.

Started in 1976 as the vision of founder Elmer L. Andersen, the Company has grown from one paid circulation weekly newspaper and shopper to its current operations including four divisions: publishing, printing, digital media and distribution.  ECM is looking to the future as one of Minnesota’s largest local news organizations serving over 650,000 households.  We are continuing to evolve and expand our capacity to meet the demands of our communities.  

Printing operations include a full service commercial printing office in Coon Rapids from graphic design to the finished printed piece.  ECM's web printing plant in Princeton has the most non-heat single-width commercial capability in the upper Midwest and provides full 4-color capability, state of the art electronic pre-press featuring PDF workflow, digital proofing, and computer-to-plate technology.  ECM has a complete post press department including saddle-stitch bindery, machine inserting, and full mailing capability featuring ink-jet addressing.

ECM Distribution delivers newspapers, shoppers, catalogs, free standing inserts, telephone directories and sample products from strategically located warehouse operations in Minnesota and western Wisconsin.

ECM exists to serve and benefit our customers, associates, shareholders and communities - our four cornerstones - by gathering and communicating the news, providing superior products and services, and actively participating in the communities we serve.

Name: architektur.aktuell
Description:
architektur.aktuell wurde 1967 in Wien von Ossi Schmid (1937-2020) gegründet, der zuvor in der Automobil- und Druckereibranche tätig war.

Das Magazin erschien zunächst viermal im Jahr. Die Blattlinie war offen für „alles, was mit Architektur zu tun hat“. Die Erstauflage von 3.000 Exemplaren wurde großformatig in traditionellem Buchdruck von einer Wiener Druckerei mit Klischees aus einer Grazer Anstalt hergestellt, in der ersten Ausgabe waren auch Plandrucke auf Transparentpapier beigebunden. Dank rascher Akzeptanz am damals wachsenden Printmagazinmarkt konnte die Erscheinungsweise bald auf zweimonatlich und der Druck auf Kleinoffset umgestellt werden.

Nach einer Zwischenphase mit wechselndem Management und RedakteurInnen erwarb der Wiener Springer Verlag unter Geschäftsführer Rudolf Siegle 1994 die Titel- und Markenrechte. Das Magazin erschien nun zehn Mal im Jahr. Unter Chefredakteurin Liesbeth Waechter-Böhm wurde 1995 ein Relaunch mit Grafik-Design von Haller + Haller präsentiert. Darauf folgte die Ergänzung um englische Übersetzungen der redaktionellen Inhalte, die Erweiterung der Blattlinie um überregionale Inhalte und der Vertrieb des nunmehr zweisprachigen Titels in ganz Europa.

Pour nous, il n'est pas question de paraphraser les journaux ou les JT français, mais d'apporter des informations délaissées par les médias traditionnels. Nous ne souhaitons pas concurrencer les autres médias, mais bien en être complémentaire.

Conçu par des étudiants totalement indépendants et en parallèle de leurs études, le Journal International fait tout pour apporter le meilleur de l'actualité internationale.

La Bretagne est belle, riche, puissante, jeune, sportive et musicienne, innovante et courageuse, fière de son Histoire et tournée vers les autres, positive et active, solidaire et authentique ... 
La Bretagne possède le plus important patrimoine religieux d'Europe et  le plus grand champ d'algue d'Europe. La Bretagne possède 2700 kilomètres de côtes maritimes et une des agricultures et secteur agroalimentaire les plus puissants d'Europe. La Bretagne a une Histoire très singulière et une langue celtique vivante. 
Et tout cela va bien au-delà des sempiternels clichés qu'on nous distille en permanence, faisant passer la Bretagne uniquement ou presque pour le pays des crêpes et des coiffes, des menhir et du biniou.
NHU Bretagne vous dira autre chose.
Devenez Rédacteur ou Rédactrice dans les colonnes de NHU. Vous aimez et êtes passionné(e) par la Bretagne, un peu, beaucoup, passionnément ... venez nous le faire partager en écrivant des articles.
NHU fait aussi la part belle aux Photographes et Vidéastes dans ses nombreuses galeries d'exposition.

Unsere Vision: ‘Mit dem ersten Klick zu Antworten auf Deine Fragen aus und über Franken - mit Produkten, die weiterhelfen und Spaß machen.’  

Unser Team besteht aus über 50 Festangestellten plus Werkstudierenden, verteilt auf folgende Bereiche: 

Geschäftsführung, Assistenz & Marketing: Unsere Geschäftsführung wird von Assistenz und Marketing unterstützt. Sie sind verantwortlich für Koordination, Abstimmung und Support der einzelnen Teams, Strategie-Planung, Marketingmaßnahmen sowie Team-Events.  

Online-Redaktion: Unsere Redakteur:innen sorgen im Minutentakt für aktuelle Nachrichten. Zudem recherchieren, redigieren und konzipieren sie multimediale Inhalte wie Videos und Umfragen, schreiben Artikel zu Alltag, Gesundheits- sowie Freizeitthemen. 

Online-Rubrikenmärkte: Das Rubriken-Team kümmert sich um unsere vielseitigen Rubriken-Portale trauer.inFranken.de, immo.inFranken.de, single.inFranken.de und jobs.inFranken.de.  

Produktmanagement & Entwicklung: Die Kolleg:innen beschäftigen sich mit der Performance und Entwicklung unserer Produkte - allen voran mit dem Portal. Zudem sind sie für unsere News-App, Fränkische-Rezepte.de und den Ticketshop verantwortlich.  

Online Vermarktung National: Dieses Team übernimmt die komplexe Vermarktung unseres Portals. Dafür entwickeln sie attraktive Werbeprodukte, kümmern sich um Konzeption, Planung und Umsetzung sowie Steuerung individueller Onlinekampagnen. 

Aus Franken. Für Franken. inFranken.de 

inFranken.de ist eine Gesellschaft der Mediengruppe Oberfranken.

Name: La Terre
Description:
Après quelques années d’interruption, La Terre, fondée en 1937, renaît aujourd’hui sous une forme nouvelle.
Elle devient une revue trimestrielle portant les combats pour le vivant. Elle est jumelée avec une plateforme numérique coopérative et l’organisation de forums et de débats.
Cet ensemble constitue un lieu d’information, de débats, de solidarité et de partage. La Terre proposera ainsi un espace ouvert de paroles, d’analyses, d’échanges d’expériences sur les moyens d’un aménagement nouveau des territoires reposant sur un autre mode de production agricole, un secteur agro-alimentaire transformé au service de la santé, proposant une alimentation de qualité, améliorant la biodiversité et la qualité de l’eau.
Sanitaires, climatiques, sociales, la multiplicité et l’interaction des crises actuelles font à nouveau mesurer la brûlante actualité du combat pour le vivant. La primauté de la santé implique un nouveau rapport, une nouvelle harmonie avec la nature. En ce sens, La Terre portera des choix nouveaux, valorisant « les petits et moyens » paysans, pouvant s’appuyer sur un fort secteur de la recherche publique, produisant en lien avec les cuisiniers valorisant une gastronomie française revivifiée. C’est la sécurité des vies humaines et environnementales qui est en jeu.
Pour cela, nous souhaitons qu’ici puissent s’exprimer agriculteurs, chercheurs, sociologues, cuisiniers, médecins, responsables associatifs et syndicaux, représentants des consommateurs, écrivains, élus, animateurs des réseaux solidaires des campagnes et des services publics…
Ces débats et contributions se prolongeront sur la plateforme numérique www.laterre.fr.

Voraussetzungen zur Wettbewerbsteilnahme sind, dass die eingereichten Lösungen einen direkten Bezug zur Region Berlin Brandenburg haben und bereits als Prototyp existieren, die Vermarktung bereits begonnen hat oder eine erste Etablierung am Markt erfolgt ist. Der Preis wird seit 1984 von der Berliner Senatsverwaltung für Wirtschaft, Energie und Betriebe und seit 1992 gemeinsam mit dem Ministerium für Wirtschaft, Arbeit und Energie des Landes Brandenburg verliehen. 

Der Preis ist mit jeweils 15.000 Euro dotiert und wird jährlich an maximal fünf Bewerber vergeben.

Description:

Okur profilini; iş dünyasının zirvesinde bulunanlar, sanayiciler, STK yöneticileri, üst düzey kamu idarecileri, OSB yönetimleri ve üyeleri, sektör temsilcileri, tüccar ve ihracatçılar oluşturmaktadır. 3 bin tirajlı gazete abonelik üzerinden okurlara ulaştırılmaktadır.

Name: Diken
Description:
Diken’i size tanıtırken büyük dedem merhum Sedat Simavi’den bir alıntı yapmak istiyorum. 1916’da, ‘Gazetecilik öldü’ denilen bir devirde bir arkadaşına şöyle demiş: “İnşallah ben bu verimsiz tarlada namuslu olarak gazetecilik yapacağım. Muvaffak olursam ne âlâ, muvaffak olamazsam talihime küseceğim…”

Neredeyse 100 yıl sonra, gazetecilik için yine aynı şeyin söylendiği şu günlerde benim de niyetim aynı.

Diken’in misyonu net ve kısa: Ülkemizde gül bahçesine dönüştürülmek istenen medyanın dikeni olup, köklerinden sallanmaya başlayan demokrasimizi, temel özgürlüklerimizi ve laikliği savunmak. Bu misyonu yerine getirirken de gazetecilik mesleğine hak ettiği itibar ve onuru yeniden kazandırmak.

Yukarıda saydığım değerleri savunurken hiçbir parti, kurum ya da örgütün körü körüne taraftarlığını ya da düşmanlığını yapacağımızı sanmayın. Diken bağımsız ve özgür bir gazete.

Diken’in gücünün iki kaynağı var: İlki, kendi imkânlarıyla çıkması. İkincisi de gazetecilik ilkeleri ve etiğinin Diken ekibinin DNA’sında yazması.

Çok büyük vaadlerimiz yok. Doğru haber veren, adil gazeteciliği gözeten, nereden gelirse gelsin baskıya boyun eğmeyen, dürüst bir gazete çıkarmak için yola koyulduk. Çünkü eminiz ki, Türkiye’nin böyle bir gazeteye ihtiyacı var.

En doğrusu, yine büyük dedemin her gazetecinin kulağına küpe olması gereken şu nasihatiyle bitirmek: “Genç gazeteci arkadaşlarıma! Bu meslek yorucu bir meslektir. Ama, insan büyük bir zevkle çalışır. Kalemine daima efendi kal, uşak olmamaya gayret et. Mecbur kalırsan kır, sakın satma.”

Harun Simavi

Name: Csak POZITÍVAN Magazin
Description:
Üdvözlet az olvasónak!

A Csak POZITÍVAN Magazin a tudatos emberek tudatos választása.

A magazin témájában, attitűdjében a tudatos megközelítést alkalmazza. Az általános probléma ismételgetés, siránkozó negatív vagy közönyös hozzáállás helyett megoldásközpontú, építő, informatív, tudást hordozó alternatívákat mutat be. Igyekszünk példaértékű életeket, követendő probléma megoldásokat megmutatni interjúinkban, cikkeink előrevivő, bemutató jellegűek: inspirálnak, információval látnak el, gondolkodást formálnak, a felelős és tudatos döntéseket elősegítik. Témáink több olvasatát több nézőpontból közelítjük meg. Interjúalanyaink olyan közösséget segítő, értékteremtő, hiteles életet élnek, mely a tudatos létet hűen reprezentálja.

Témáinkban sokszínűek vagyunk, mélyre megyünk, mégis időnként könnyedebb, magazinos formát mutatunk. A tudatos élet sok mindent jelent: döntésekben tudatosságot; környezet tudatosságot; táplálkozásban, életvezetésben, lelkünk - testünk megóvásában, egészségben tudatosságot; szociálisan tudatos életet; pénzügyekben - technológiában tudatosságot; művészetekben, kreativitásban tudatosságot; családban-emberi és párkapcsolatainkban tudatosságot; szexualitásban tudatosságot. Sorolhatnánk a végtelenségig... Lapunk nem rest tabukhoz sem nyúlni, és akár ledönteni a hamisnak tűnő normákat, valamint bemutatni azokat a társadalmi kényszereket, melyek gátolják a test-lélek-szellem egységének teljes megélését.

Szerkesztőségünk bízik abban, hogy témáinkban, hozzáállásunkban olyat nyújthatunk olvasóinknak, mely gondolkodásra késztet, mélyen megérint és összecseng azzal a bizonyos belső igazsággal... Nem birtokoljuk a bölcsek kövét, éppen ezért igyekszünk mindent több szempontból bemutatni, ám mi magunk próbálunk az arany középúton maradni és megszólítani minden tudatos, gondolkodó embert.

Csak Pozitívan!

Name: Saudi Startup
Description:
In the heart of South Asia, where the tapestry of tradition weaves seamlessly with contemporary flair, Pakistan stands as a country where weddings are not just ceremonies but grand celebrations of love, culture, and heritage. Time Magazine takes you on a captivating journey through the kaleidoscope of Pakistani weddings, where age-old customs and rituals dance in harmony with the evolving dynamics of the modern era.

In Pakistan, weddings are more than just the union of two individuals; they are a reflection of the rich tapestry of diverse cultures and traditions that make up this vibrant nation. From the bustling bazaars of Lahore to the serene valleys of Swat, each region brings its own unique flavor to the elaborate spectacle that is a Pakistani wedding. Time Magazine delves into the intricacies of these celebrations, capturing the essence of a country where weddings are a showcase of hospitality, unity, and the enduring spirit of familial bonds.

As we navigate the pages of this exploration, we will witness the fusion of tradition and modernity, where age-old rituals are embraced with reverence, yet contemporized with a touch of sophistication. From the dazzling bridal attire adorned with intricate embroidery to the pulsating beats of traditional music echoing through the air, Pakistani weddings are a sensory delight that encapsulates the spirit of the nation.

Join us as we unfold the pages of time and witness the beauty, charm, and cultural significance embedded in the weddings of Pakistan. In a land where each ceremony is a living testament to the resilience of tradition and the dynamism of the present, Time Magazine invites you to partake in the enchanting tapestry of weddings that define the soul of this South Asian gem.

Ne dorim să oferim comunității un ziar „experiment”, unde informațiile optimiste prevalează, să realizăm un jurnalism pozitiv, integru și etic cu scopul de a crea un mediu inspirațional, propice pentru dezvoltarea României.

Obiectivul nostru este să livrăm conținut necesar pentru îmbogățirea calității vieții în comunitate, să oferim gramul de optimism necesar pentru a determina oamenii să-și urmeze țelul în propria țară. Dorința noastră este să creștem împreună într-un mediu favorabil dezvoltării sustenabile, înconjurat de povești de succes și de reușite care să inspire comunitatea românească.

Name: OCP News
Description:
Em 10 de maio de 1919, circulava a primeira edição do jornal “O Correio do Povo”, um dos mais antigos do Brasil e o mais antigo em circulação em Santa Catarina. O novo veículo foi apresentado em editorial de capa pelo então gerente, o jornalista Arthur Müller, (1895/1957), também vereador e prefeito de Jaraguá do Sul. 

Em linguagem da época, o texto do jornal dizia: “Certos do benévolo e generoso acolhimento que nos dispensarão os nossos contemporâneos, damos hoje a publicidade ao semanário “O Correio do Povo”. Fundado neste distrito para ser o porta voz do público jaraguaense, prometemos nunca nos desviar da linha recta de moral e justiça que traçamos. Independente e noticioso, sempre pronto a defender os interesses deste nosso torrão, veio “O Correio do Povo”, preencher uma lacuna de que há muito o povo jaraguaense sentia a falta. Mas, para coroar de êxito a luta que encetamos, estamos certos que não nos deixarão de auxiliar os nossos contemporâneos, prometendo nós, trabalhar com afinco em prol do bem colectivo...”.

Foi assim que O Correio do Povo chegou pela primeira vez nas mãos dos leitores. Nestes mais de 100 anos de muitos avanços, o jornal foi responsável por registrar os principais acontecimentos de Jaraguá do Sul e região, sempre tendo consciência do seu compromisso em ajudar a promover o desenvolvimento social, político, econômico e cultural da região. 

Agora, também em expansão em Joinville, Blumenau e Florianópolis.

Name: lavialibera
Description:
Lavialibera è una rivista bimestrale che offre informazione e approfondimento su mafie, corruzione, ambiente e migrazioni. Dentro le notizie, ma fuori dalle facili indignazioni

Lavialibera è un progetto editoriale fondato da Libera e Gruppo Abele. Si compone di un bimestrale cartaceo di 80 pagine, di un sito e una presenza attiva sui principali canali social.

Su carta trovate inchieste lunghe e approfondite, interviste, commenti, editoriali, infografiche e rubriche tematiche; sulla Rete, il monitoraggio quotidiano dei temi che ci stanno maggiormente a cuore.

La nostra redazione è composta da una squadra di giovani giornalisti. La rete di collaboratori si estende a tutta Italia e oltre confine. Il nostro lavoro è supportato da un comitato scientifico di esperti e da una rosa di grandi firme.
 
La nostra storia
Lavialibera eredita l’esperienza trentennale del mensile Narcomafie, fondato nel 1993 dopo le stragi di Capaci e via D’Amelio, ma cresce nella dotazione di strumenti, competenze e chiavi di lettura necessarie a decifrare il mondo di oggi.
 
I nostri obiettivi
Il mondo è cambiato e sentiamo la necessità di parlare di mafie e corruzione in modo diverso: un fenomeno in continua evoluzione non può essere analizzato con strumenti vecchi o secondo un’unica prospettiva. Non possiamo ignorare le diverse e nuove minacce alla democrazia e i grandi rischi del pianeta. Per questo sotto la nostra lente di ingrandimento ci saranno anche la catastrofe ecologica, il fenomeno migratorio globale e le nuove povertà.
 
Vogliamo riscoprire l’utilità e il piacere di informare ed essere informati, creare un luogo di dibattito capace di non fare sconti sulle ingiustizie, ma anche di non cedere a facili indignazioni. Crediamo in un giornalismo che, nello scrivere ciò che vede, è di servizio ai cittadini e non a servizio di qualcuno. Raccontiamo storie e proponiamo analisi per immaginare insieme un futuro realmente diverso.

Description:
A Agência Tatu de Jornalismo de Dados tem como objetivo produzir material jornalístico, relevante, sobre o estado de Alagoas a partir da exploração e visualização de dados, em múltiplos formatos, com a utilização de elementos como texto, vídeos e gráficos estáticos e interativos. Um conteúdo que fosse além da informação factual, utilizando dados dispostos em portais de transparência e acessados por meio de solicitações feitas aos órgãos pela Lei de Acesso à Informação (LAI).

A Agência Tatu busca extrair, estruturar, analisar e tornar visualmente interessante e compreensível dados brutos. Focamos o trabalho em temáticas que acreditamos serem de interesse e relevância para a sociedade alagoana, como economia, política, educação, sustentabilidade, segurança, saúde, direitos humanos e ciência e tecnologia.

O nosso conteúdo é estruturado no trabalho conjunto entre jornalismo e dados abertos, pois acreditamos que este é um dos caminhos mais efetivos para a construção de uma democracia transparente e responsável. Por isso, sempre disponibilizamos os dados e documentos utilizados em nossos materiais jornalísticos ao final do texto, em formato aberto (xls. ou csv.), para que a informação possa ser checada pelo leitor, ou mesmo suscite novos projetos e discussões.

O nome da agência surge devido à relação da prática que caracteriza o tatu (animal silvestre), a da escavação. A atividade natural desse mamífero faz referência direta à primeira – e uma das mais importantes – etapas na elaboração de uma reportagem guiada por dados: a busca e extração das informações, seja nas páginas da internet, documentos físicos ou fazendo uso da Lei de Acesso à Informação.

Name: netMAGmedia
Description:
Empowering the construction industry with valuable insights that foster collaboration, inspire innovation and drive progress. 

netMAGmedia Ltd publishes several magazines and digital content within the construction industry.

Print + digital magazines include:
Architects' Datafile (ADF) – published monthly and distributed to an ABC certified circulation of 12,500 architects and a readership of over 40,000 individuals within established UK architectural practices.

Housebuilder & Developer – published monthly and distributed to an ABC certified circulation of 12,500 UK housebuilders and housing associations.

Selfbuilder & Homemaker – published bi-monthly and distributed directly by post to a circulation of 10,000 prime self-builders and agents, all ACORN profiled to deliver a quality audience.

Housing Management & Maintenance – published bi-monthly and distributed to an ABC certified circulation of 8,000 housing and facilities management professionals.

Building Construction Design – An audible digital magazine published bi-monthly and sent out to a GDPR compliant list, with a reach of over 50,000 of construction professionals. The brand also includes a regularly updated website, with weekly newsletters and social media.

Send PRESS RELEASES to editorial@netmagmedia.co.uk

Name: Inlander
Description:
The Inlander is Spokane, Washington’s locally owned, independent and award-winning urban news weekly. New print issues are distributed for free every Thursday at nearly 1,000 locations throughout the Spokane-Coeur d’Alene region; it’s also available online at Inlander.com. Inlander also publishes Inlander Health & Home, a bi-monthly glossy lifestyle magazine, and Annual Manual, a regional guidebook published every September. Two glossy city guides, Shop Local (October) and The Menu (April) connect our active readers with the region’s best restaurants, coffee shops, bars and retailers. Our vibrant website and targeted emails, Entree, Weekend Countdown and Sneak Peek, help Inlanders know what shows, concerts, events and new restaurants are coming to the region. Inlander Winter Guide, published every October, highlights the extensive ski destinations in the Pacific Northwest and Canadian Rockies with an extensive distribution network throughout the West Coast. 

In addition to our award-winning publications, Inlander produces high-caliber events, like Inlander Restaurant Week. Restaurant Week features more than 100 restaurants offering three-course menus for a set price and has become one of the most anticipated community events of the year. 

Since 1993, Inlander has been an independent, family-owned media outlet. The Inlander was founded on independence — on the unwavering commitment that free and independent journalism helps a community thrive, that local ownership is best, and that, in the end, a paper belongs to everyone. The Inlander is our name, but it’s also an identity, a frame of mind, a people and a place, bound by geography and core community values. The people of the Inland Northwest, we are all Inlanders.

Name: Colorado Community Media
Description:
Engaging more than 300,000 readers weekly, Colorado Community Media is the Denver metro area’s largest community media outlet. With titles covering eight counties (Jefferson, Adams, Arapahoe, Douglas, Elbert, Weld, Clear Creek, Denver) Colorado Community Media is a top source for local news, and you can get that news in print, online or in email newsletters. 

Our passionate reporters provide relevant information to our local communities, stay on top of breaking news, and bring unique stories that highlight the stories that reflect how we thrive in today’s world. From schools and town councils to highlighting neighbors and business professionals, Colorado Community Media covers it all.

For our advertisers, we provide a resource with trust and value, giving options from print and digital to custom solutions to meet your every day marketing needs through direct-mail campaigns, community guides, and contests and giveaways. For more about our advertising options, visit us at ColoradoCommunityMedia.com.

Get back to your community with Colorado Community Media.

Name: The Student Life Newspaper
Description:
The Student Life is the oldest college newspaper in Southern California. It serves as the newspaper of record for the Claremont Colleges, a consortium of seven highly selective liberal arts colleges and graduate schools in Claremont, California, with a combined student body of around 7700.

TSL is published weekly on Fridays during the academic year in print and online. Each issue contains coverage in four sections: News, Life and Style, Opinions, and Sports. TSL is entirely student written and managed, and employs a staff of approximately 120 students per semester, including writers, columnists, photographers, videographers, designers, copy specialists, business associates, and editors. It is funded primarily by the student governments of the colleges.

TSL holds itself to the highest possible journalistic standards, providing an opportunity for 7C students to gain practical experience as journalists within a traditional newspaper structure. TSL is committed to developing the skill set of each staff member through workshops and one-on-one consultations with experienced staff members.

As the largest and oldest news source on campus, TSL has built a reputation for covering breaking and controversial news in a thorough, respectful, and neutral manner. Beyond the news section, TSL engages with student life by spotlighting noteworthy student achievements, while also providing consistent coverage of cultural events and sports on campus. TSL also serves as a platform and forum for discussion that showcases the wide array of opinions and identities throughout the 7C community.

Name: Vitalité économique Bas-Saint-Laurent
Description: Apprécié et consulté par les décideurs socioéconomiques de Kamouraska, Rivière-du-Loup, Témiscouata, Les Basques, Rimouski-Neigette, La Matapédia, La Mitis et La Matanie, Vitalité économique rejoint principalement les gens d’affaires et autres acteurs économiques régionaux. Faire connaître les bons coups de la communauté d’affaires, favoriser le rapprochement entre les intervenants et les entrepreneurs et mettre en valeur le dynamisme économique régional : voilà notre mission.

Name: NotiCel
Description:
NotiCel es el primer y único diario exclusivamente digital en Puerto Rico. La verdad, como es. Te llevaremos los acontecimientos que necesitas saber con mayor rapidez, concisión y contexto para que puedas tomar decisiones al instante, y mantenerte al día en tus temas favoritos. Entérate primero y mejor con el medio de comunicación del siglo 21.

O2 Comunicaciones

Name: TTELA
Description:
Vi är ett mediehus med duktiga medierådgivare som erbjuder ett stort utbud av marknadsföringskanaler, allt från traditionell annonsering till kampanjer på sociala medier som Facebook, Instagram, Snapchat & LinkedIn. Vi är Google-certifierade & erbjuder dig och ditt företag köpt sökordsannonsering, Google Shopping, Googles display-nätverk & marknadsföring på Youtube.

Vi bygger hemsidor, e-handel & e-tjänster, jobbar med att SEO-anpassa din sajt och producerar både annonsmaterial och rörligt innehåll och erbjuder strategi, grafisk profil & workshops. 

TTELA är lokaltidningen som bevakar Trollhättan, Vänersborg och Lilla Edet. Vi finns som papperstidning, e-tidning, nyhetssajt samt podd.

TTELA utkom med sitt första nummer den 4:e december 2004, efter att de två tidningarna Trollhättans Tidning, TT, och Elfsborgs Läns Allehanda, ELA, slagits samman till en tidning. ELA startades 1885 och TT 1905.  TTELA ingår i Stampen Media där också bland annat Göteborgs-Posten, Bohusläningen, Strömstads Tidning, Hallands Nyheter, Hallandsposten och Alingsås Tidning. Prata med oss om du vill annonsera i någon av våra titlar eller bara prata marknadsföring.

Name: The Daily Observer (Bangladesh)
Description:
The Daily Observer hit the stands in Bangladesh on 1st February in 2011 after now defunct Bangladesh Observer stopped publication in 2010.

Following the independence from British rule, the Pakistan Observer came to the light in 1949. It had a great role in shaping public opinion of Pakistan, in particular, East Pakistan. After East Pakistan became independent as Bangladesh, the newspaper was renamed Bangladesh Observer and was published under Bangladesh Observer Group. It continued to ventilate people's grievance with courage. With the passage of time, the youth of the newspaper declined and eventually it was closed in 2010.

Iqbal Sobhan Chowdhury, the last editor of the Bangladesh Observer, initiated publishing of the newspaper again in the name of the Daily Observer under the auspices of Observer Ltd. The directors of the company are Mostafizur Rahman, Yussuf Abdullah Harun, Maksudur Rahman, Dr. Jamshed Sanyiath Ahmed Choudhury FCA, Md. Akram Hossain Humayun, Faridur Reza Sagar, Shykh Seraj, Salahuddin Ahmed, Salina Ali, Md. Shahidul Ahsan, Mahbuba Helen, Md. Yasin Ali, Mir Mosharref Hossain, A K M Shaheed Reza, Md. Kamal Uddin and Mabroor Hossain.

Name: Diagnostics News
Description: DiagnosticsNews.com es el medio digital de primera elección en la región que difunde información diaria sobre salud, diagnóstico y tratamiento, productos y empresas a través de su portal web, su newsletter, redes sociales y aplicaciones, a más de 23.000 profesionales de la salud y afines de todo el continente

Name: Sa Petite Lettre
Description:
Offrez à un enfant de 6-11 ans des lettres personnalisées qu'il découvrira dans sa boite aux lettres.
A partir de votre sélection de rubriques (activités, conseils, découvertes, DIY...), nous composons toutes les 2 semaines son courrier. Vous pouvez également ajouter un petit message ou une photo pour saluer votre petit lecteur.

Name: Boone Newsmedia, Inc.
Description: Boone Newsmedia Inc. is a holding company that owns and/or operates media companies across the eastern United States via management contracts. We're proud to be a small, detail oriented family owned company. We still operate under the same philosophies our founder, Jim Boone, derived from his work for and association with Carmage Walls, the association with his father, Buford Boone, and numerous other accomplished publishers associated with Mr. Walls and his family over the years.

Name: alcorconhoy.com Noticias de Alcorcón
Description:
alcorconhoy.com es el medio digital de Alcorcón y de la Zona Sur de Madrid. Somos un portal independiente. Ponemos el foco en los vecinos de Alcorcón, con una especial atención en los pequeños y medianos negocios de barrio.
Especializados en el marketing local para comercios de proximidad, empresarios y profesionales de Alcorcón.
Nos gusta saber lo que pasa en la calle Mayor, Parque de Lisboa, Los Castillos, Ondarreta, Las Retamas, Alcorcón Central, Oslo, Fuente Cisneros, Ensanche Sur, queremos conocer la opinión de los alcorconeros en cualquier punto de nuestro municipio.
También nos encantan los recuerdos de nuestra ciudad. Las imágenes del pasado, de nuestros padres y madres, abuelos y abuelas, de sus profesiones, de sus entretenimientos. De las maravillosas personas que lo han habitado. De los alfareros que casi cada día recordamos. De todos y todas. 
Fundado en junio de 2014 por la empresa Dreamsoft Connecting S.L.

Name: SO FILM
Description:
Le pari de So Film ? 
Raconter le cinéma dans un magazine qu’on ne feuillette pas mais qu’on lit, qu’on garde et même qu’on prête.

Comment ? Avec des récits, des reportages, des entretiens hors-promo et des rubriques ludiques. En remettant le journalisme au cœur de l’écriture sur le 7ème art.

So Film, c’est un bimestriel de 132 pages qui donne la parole à ses invités, qui crée du sens, qui varie les plumes et les sujets et qui provoque des rencontres inédites et décalées.

Name: Pubblico
Description: Pubblico è un quotidiano nazionale italiano diretto da Luca Telese. In edicola a partire dal 18 Settembre 2012. Non riceve alcun finanziamento pubblico perché si fonda sul contributo dei suoi sostenitori. Non fa riferimento a nessun partito politico. Pubblico è dalla parte degli ultimi e dei primi.

Our editorial team come from across the world and study at different universities across the UK, and we aim to be a space for in-depth political analysis from new perspectives.

We’re open to pitches from all students, so if you’re aged 16-25 or in any form of education head to our Instagram or Twitter (@themeridianmag) to find out how to have your voice heard.

Name: PalaceScope
Description:
PalaceScope est le city-club magazine préféré des Parisiens et des Trend-setters internationaux, avides de mode, de voyages et d'événements culturels.

Depuis 20 ans, PalaceScope est au centre de l'effervescence parisienne. Tous les deux mois, c'est le "magazine cadeau" qui raconte à des Parisiens avides de luxe, de mode, de glamour et de nouveautés, l'énergie créative de la capitale. Un magazine lifestyle, mode, art et création. Unique à Paris.

PalacesScope est diffusé à une clientèle exclusive, dans plus de 250 lieux emblématiques de la hype parisienne (hôtels, bars, restaurants, galeries d'art, concept stores…). Le magazine met en avant les créateurs et les innovations, ceux qui font les modes et créent les tendances. PalaceScope rassemble, autour d'attitudes et de passions communes, ce que la ville produit de plus chic, de plus glamour, de plus luxueux, de plus surprenant.

Depuis 2021, nous éditons une version Premium de PalaceScope, PalaceCostes, réservée exclusivement à l'hôtel Costes et à l'hôtel At Sloane de Londres.

Name: The Epoch Times Los Angeles
Description:
We are an international, independent, award-winning, multi-language media company in print and online, spanning 35 countries and 21 language editions. Epoch Times is the only multi-national newspaper that spans the entire globe. It is also the most widely distributed Chinese newspaper in the world. Freedom of the press and humanity are fundamental to the Epoch Times. Our newspaper was born to fill the void of truthful news coverage of events in China, where previously only propaganda and censorship existed. Having personally witnessed human rights tragedies like the Tiananmen Square Massacre and the persecution of the spiritual movement Falun Gong, and at great risk to themselves and their loved ones, a group of Chinese-Americans began publishing the Epoch Times in Chinese in the United States. Some reporters in China were subsequently jailed, and some suffered severe torture before disappearing altogether. Integrity and truthfulness in reporting, together with covering stories that really matter, are the central tenets of the Epoch Times. Our beginnings have instilled in Epoch Times staff an unwavering commitment to objective reporting and socially responsible business practices, as well as respect for human rights and freedom.

Office phone: 1-626-401-1828 
Fax: 1-626-401-1221 
ADDRESS: 9550 Flair Drive #411, El Monte, CA 91731, USA 
EMAIL: epochsuccess@epochsuccess.com

Name: The Hilltop
Description:
The Hilltop, established at Howard University in 1924 by Zora Neale Hurston and Eugene King, a Harlem Renaissance icon and a renowned anthropologist, is the oldest Black collegiate newspaper in America. Over its century-long history, the publication has been at the forefront of chronicling campus, D.C., and national news. 

The legacy of The Hilltop is marked by its profound reporting work, several national awards, and distinguished alumni, many of whom have ascended to the pinnacle of their professions. Among The Hilltop’s former staff are Pulitzer Prize winners, whose groundbreaking work has set new standards in journalism. Additionally, The Hilltop has been the training ground for leaders who have excelled in business, law, communications, and public service. 

By 1929, The Hilltop was published bi-monthly and then weekly in 1930. In 1995 and 2004 respectively, The Hilltop was notably ranked by The Princeton Review as the “Best Collegiate Newspaper in the Nation” and was featured in The New York Times as a premier college news source. In 2002, The Hilltop introduced its website, which currently receives thousands of hits daily. On February 28, 2005, The Hilltop newspaper claimed the spot as the only daily news publication in the country run by African Americans, not only in the collegiate realm, but also professionally. As it celebrates its centennial milestone, The Hilltop continues to act as a platform for voices, advancing its mission of balanced journalism and community engagement.

Name: La Voix de la Haute-Marne
Description:
La Croix de la Haute-Marne est née en 1888. Cette publication était à ses débuts un supplément du quotidien national La Croix, édité par le groupe de presse Bayard. Depuis, elle est toujours parue, hors 5 années pendant la Seconde Guerre mondiale. Elle a donc repris son ancien nom lors de la libération. En février 2010, La Croix de la Haute-Marne est devenue La Voix de la Haute-Marne. Depuis 1888, le journal a bien évolué : des sujets politique, de société, économique et loisirs sont depuis traités. Mais la ligne éditoriale avec des valeurs chrétiennes demeure toujours1. Au printemps 2015, la rédaction déménage de Langres à Chaumont.

Le 31 août 2016, le groupe HCR (Hebdomadaires catholiques régionaux) éditeur de La Voix de la Haute-Marne, jusque-là propriété des diocèses de Belley-Ars, Langres, Valence et Viviers, est cédé au Groupe SOGEMEDIA.

Name: HSS Media Ab
Description:
HSS Medias ambition är att driva utvecklingen av mediebranschen i Österbotten. Vårt mål är att erbjuda kvalitativt och relevant journalistiskt innehåll i de kanaler som konsumenterna använder.

HSS Medias tidningar Vasabladet, Österbottens Tidning och Syd-Österbotten är regionens språkrör och bevakar dess intressen, främjar utvecklingen och deltar aktivt i samhällsdebatten. Via våra olika kanaler kan du dagligen ta del av nyhetsinformation, samhällsanalys och annonsering.

HSS Media utövar sitt publicistiska uppdrag med journalistisk integritet och respekt för åsiktsmångfald i dialog med läsare och det omgivande samhället.

Name: The London Economic
Description: The London Economic is a digital newspaper focusing on business, economics and international politics as well as new Lifestyle, Sports and Entertainment pages. We have become a leading online news aggregator and blog sharing opinions from around the world in an accessible and entertaining manner.

Description: Créée en 1954, « Offrir international » est la revue de référence des acteurs économiques du secteur des Arts de la table et du cadeau pour la maison

Name: DIÁRIO DE NOTÍCIAS
Description:
DN, uma história de pioneirismo nacional na adoção de tecnologias digitais na mídia impressa

Lançado em 6 de junho de 1985, pela Editora DN, o Diário de Notícias estabeleceu marcos de pioneirismo no mercado editorial de São Paulo ao consolidar-se como veículo de comunicação especializado na divulgação de temas jurídicos e informações de ordem legal, além da edição regular, com cobertura do noticiário geral, política, economia, internacional, esportes, variedades, turismo, coluna social e reportagens especiais.

Name: K7 Bulletin
Description:
K7 Bulletin is a student newspaper in Bergen (Norway). It is produced by Schibsted Trykk and is distributed to students in Bergen. The employees of the paper are all working on a 100 per cent voluntary basis. It is a subcommittee of the student association NHHS, which is the student association at Norwegian School of Economics (NHH) in Bergen. This is one of the largest and most influential student associations in Norway with a wide spectre of activities both in cultural and more practical sense.

It is produced 4 times a year (2 editions each semester). The paper receive money from ads but they only indirectly cover the costs with these since the money coming into the company/newspaper goes to NHHS. The only exception is the money coming in from Velferdstinget (VT), which is distributed every year to cultural, political and student media purposes in Bergen. The money from VT are earmarked for K7 Bulletin use and is mainly used to cover the cost of printing, but also other costs like insurance, investments and salary for the person distributing the newspaper to different locations all over Bergen. This person is the only paid individual in the newspaper, and is not an official/unofficial member of the journalist group - at least not today.

It  includes various sections including the news section, the magazine, the sport section and Intersection (the international section of the paper).

Name: L'Union du Cantal
Description:
C'est le journal bi-hebdomadaire du Cantal d'informations générales et économiques, paraissant les mercredi et samedi. 
Également présent sur le Net et les réseaux sociaux, L'Union du Cantal est partenaire de nombreux évènements départementaux et réalise des travaux de mise en page pour des tiers. 
Son effectif est actuellement d'une douzaine de salariés.

Name: Enab Baladi
Description: Enab Baladi is a nonprofit media organization dedicated to serve a role in educating citizens through in-depth public interest reporting, including investigative journalism and news reports to elevate important social topics at the local level. Enab Baladi helps advance democratic society in by producing independent and credible journalism that informs the public about important issues.

Name: PHILIA MEDICAL EDITIONS
Description:
Philia Medical Editions est le groupe d'information et de formation dédié à toutes les communautés médicales spécialisées.

Créé en 2012, par Claudie DAMOUR-TERRASSON, Philia Médical regroupe trois entités :
•	Edimark, 1er groupe d’information médicale spécialisée.
•	Information Dentaire, 1er groupe d’information et formation de la médecine bucco-dentaire.
•	PRPA, l’agence des relations presse spécialiste de la santé.

Fondé sur une philosophie, née des premières sociétés en 1993, Rigueur & Innovation, avec une seule signature, « nous faisons de votre spécialité notre spécialité ».

Notre groupe est particulièrement apprécié pour sa qualité éditoriale, son indépendance, son goût des nouveaux outils de communication et sa présence sur tous les congrès scientifiques internationaux.

 Aujourd’hui Philia Médical Editions est composé :
•	4 Sites internet
•	30 revues
•	90 collaborateurs
•	600 vidéos en ligne
•	20 millions d’euros de chiffre d’affaires

Philia Médical Editions est une filiale d’Europa group, leader dans l’organisation de congrès médicaux.

Name: Shepherd Express
Description:
Shepherd Express is Milwaukee's official alternative weekly covering the city's arts, entertainment, culture and dining. With over 300,000 readers Shepherd Express is regarded as Milwaukee's most popular and dependable cultural guide.

Shepherd Express started on the campus of the University of Wisconsin-Milwaukee in the 80s and quickly grew beyond the borders of a college campus. Expansion took it to Riverwest, Downtown, and to its newest digs in Milwaukee's vibrant Third Ward.

Name: Washington Blade
Description:
America's top gay news source, covering Washington and the world. 

The Washington Blade was founded in 1969 as a black and white, one-sheet community newsletter distributed in D.C.-area bars. In October 2009, the Blade celebrated its 40th anniversary as an award-winning news source with a large following in print and online.

Readers locally and around the world have come to rely on the Blade’s unmatched coverage of LGBT news, earning the paper the moniker “the newspaper of record for the LGBT community.”

Name: Options
Description: Créé en 1965, Options est le journal de l’Ugict-CGT qui traite des problématiques du travail et de la spécificité des ingénieurs, cadres, techniciens et agents de maîtrise, en termes d’aspirations sociales et sociétales.

Name: Complex Effects
Description:
Complex Effects is a newsletter published by Austin Anaya, a native of New Mexico who writes about climate policy, economics, and sometimes local politics in the Land of Enchantment (NM). Anaya utilizes his experience in financial planning, impact investing, and economic research to provide in-depth analysis at no cost to you.

In a world where local newspapers are owned by special interest groups, Complex Effects gives its readers the opportunity to gain insights from a fresh, holistic point of view.

Founded in 2021.

Name: Kyrkans Tidning
Description:
Kyrkans Tidning är en redaktionellt fristående tidning med Svenska kyrkan och kyrkliga frågor som största bevakningsområden. Tidningen ges ut av Verbum AB (org nr 556010-2526), en del av Berling Media AB.

Papperstidningen kommer ut på torsdagar med 46 nummer per år och en räckvidd på 107 000 läsare/nr (Orvesto 2020).  

Kyrkanstidning.se uppdateras varje vardag med det senaste.  

Vårt nyhetsflöde har ett helt unikt fokus på det som händer i och omkring kyrkan. Vi granskar och fördjupar.

På  kyrkanstidning.se och i papperstidningen finns en guldgruva av församlingsnära inspiration att ta del av. 

Debatten är öppen och konstruktiv. Vi berättar om konst, litteratur, teater och film med existentiellt djup och kyrklig anknytning. Teologisk fördjupning och eftertanke har sin självklara plats.

Bredd  och kvalitet gör Kyrkans Tidning till en mötesplats för alla som har en uppgift i Svenska kyrkan. Ett viktigt arbetsverktyg för anställda, förtroendevalda och andra engagerade.    

Kyrkans Tidning grundades 1982 genom att ett flertal  publikationer inom Svenska kyrkan slogs ihop.

Description:

The online platform provides an interactive, openly editable system to professional partners in the art world, which can be used to publish information about individuals, institutions, calls for proposals, exhibitions, events and art works. This content is constantly being linked to a map, as well as current events in the art world.

Kunstbulletin 
is the most widely read journal of contemporary art in Switzerland. Kunstbulletin provides information about events in the art world and reflects its multifaceted nature. Kunstbulletin is published 10 times a year, and features artists' portraits, interviews, art theory, reviews, tips, news, announcements, art jobs and a comprehensive exhibitions guide. Since 1998, parts of the text and the exhibitions guide have been collected in an online archive. Kunstbulletin is independent, and is self-financed through subscriptions and advertising. Kunstbulletin is published by the Schweizer Kunstverein (Swiss Art Association), which is a charitable, non-profit organisation. We thank everyone who supports and contributes to Kunstbulletin through subscriptions and advertising.

Name: Sun Journal
Description:
Sun Media Group’s origins date back to the May 20, 1847 publication of a weekly newspaper called the Lewiston Falls Journal.Dr. Alonzo Garcelon, later a governor of Maine, was one of the founders, along with William Waldron, a printer by trade. Francis Lane edited what started out as a literary journal, and subscriptions in that first year sold at $1.50.

The offices moved that year from Lisbon Street to 104 Park St. where Sun Media Group newspapers are still located.

Sun Media Group — was announced in 2007 to serve as an umbrella to unify the Sun Journal with all of the individual companies owned by the Costellos, including Sun Press, The Bethel Citizen, The Forecaster publications, Rumford Falls Times, Advertiser Democrat, The Franklin Journal, Livermore Falls Advertiser, The Rangley Highlander, The Penobscot Times, American Journal, Lakes Region Weekly, Maine Women Magazine, 95 North and My Gen.

On Aug. 1, 2017, Sun Media Group was sold to Reade Brower, a mid-coast media executive and entrepreneur who also owns MaineToday Media, which includes the Portland Press Herald, Waterville Sentinel and the Kennebec Journal. He is also the owner of Alliance Press, a commercial printing company in Brunswick, and publishes four weeklies in midcoast Maine: The Free Press in Rockland, The Courier-Gazette in Rockland, The Camden Herald and The Republican Journal in Belfast.

In 2016, Brower and Chris Harris, former president of Upper Valley Press in New Hampshire, purchased The Rutland Herald and Barre-Montpelier Times Argus in Vermont.

When the Sun Media Group sale was announced, Brower said “these are landmark Maine institution newspapers. We’re really all excited about creating a family of newspapers in Maine that the community can rely on for news they can trust.”

Description:
Dim Dam Dom est le premier magazine féminin français slow living qui invite à ralentir, à prendre du temps, son temps, à se libérer du bruit de la ville et de ses diktats.

En novembre 2018 IDEAT Editions a lancé une publication pour rompre avec un quotidien oppressant et ultraconnecté. On sent parfois le besoin de prendre du recul et de s’offrir du temps pour lire. Quoi de mieux qu’un nouveau magazine ? Illustré de belles images présentées dans une maquette épurée, le slow living y devient un nouveau luxe qui se décline, quatre fois par an, sous différents thèmes : société, food, design, architecture, mode & beauté, culture, voyages et lifestyle. Des sujets qui permettront de réfléchir sur nos habitudes en regard de celles, parfois moins connues, de pays étrangers, qui nous feront parcourir des quartiers branchés dans les grandes métropoles, atteindre des destinations lointaines, mais qui nous offriront aussi un espace avec adresses et recommandations pour prendre soin de soi, pour s’habiller, se maquiller ou meubler sa maison d’une façon durable et chic… Le tome #1 est actuellement en kiosque !

Name: NOW News
Description:
NOW is the online source for news, features, analysis and much more, covering Lebanon, the Lebanese diaspora and the Middle East. We deliver content with fresh ideas and bold expressions. Words are not enough. We use all mediums without inhibitions, with the following in mind: 

- Our readers’ trust is essential. We do the utmost to deliver with objectivity, professionalism and the highest standards of accuracy and quality. Insight, balance and creativity are at the center of all our endeavors. 

- We are independent and nonpartisan, but definitely not neutral: We do not tolerate violations of human rights, integrity, or the sovereignty of individuals and states. We speak out, and we do so loudly. 

- Our guidelines are clear-cut: There are no taboos in politics, social or cultural issues. Our goal is to break them all - professionally, responsibly and with style. Our only enemy is censorship, and we strive to avoid lame, dull and mind-numbing ideas. We seek inspiration, and we try our best to provide it. 

- We’re not talking to; we’re talking with our audience. Most of our content is interactive, and readers are encouraged to communicate with us at all and any times. New media is not about the few imposing ideas and opinions on others. It’s a global interaction where the end-goal is understanding and inspiration. 

We look forward to this kind of communication. Welcome to NOW.

Name: InsideTime
Description:
Inside Time is a wholly owned subsidiary and the 'Not for Profit' arm of the national charity the New Bridge Foundation established in 1956.

Inside Time was launched in 1990 and origanly publish by New Bridge as a 12 page quarterly newspaper distributing 20,000 copies of each issue . 

Inside Time Limited was established in 2003 primarly to develop the newspaper and operate independently. Since 2003 the newspaper has been developed into a monthly publication and over 57,000 copies of each issue are distrubuted throughout the UK estate including Holding Centres and many hostels. It is also avialbale on a subscription basis and read by members of the public with an interest in penal affairs, students, lawyers and MP's.

The website attracts over 1.5 million hits per month. Readers are predominently based in the UK but there also also visitors to the site by people from over 80 different countries.
Other publications include Inside Information - the Comprehensive Guidebook for Prisons and Prison Related Services, and Inside Poetry a compilation of poems written by serving prisoners.

The Brownsville Herald has been servicing the Rio Grande Valley for more than 100 years, with weekly features that focus on the areas schools, neighborhoods, history and heritage. Our slogan, “We’re telling your stories,” shows our commitment to reporting news and events that are most important to our readers. 


The Brownsville Herald serves readers in areas where two cultures and two languages have meld into a community that is uniquely Southern Texan, and focuses on reporting the news that impacts your life and were you raise your families. 


There are also specialty publications and ancillary products that meet the needs of communities surrounding Brownsville, Texas. 

The Brownsville Herald web site, www.BrownsvilleHerald.com attracts a highly desirable audience with local area residents making up 70% of the overall web site audience. 


Our online audience is comprised of loyal, web-savvy users who are online every day of the week. On average, 65% of our audience visits the web site every day and nearly 40% have been visiting for over a year. 


The Brownsville Herald offers tremendous value to advertisers looking to target consumers, while adding incremental reach to their marketing mix with an online campaign.

The Beaver is the weekly newspaper of the London School of Economics Students' Union at the LSE.

Despite being published by the Students' Union, The Beaver is independent in its reporting. 3,500 copies are published and distributed free of charge every Tuesday during term time. The Beaver is governed by the Collective, a body of around 150 students who have contributed three or more written pieces or photographs to the paper. The Collective democratically elects all of the paper's editorial staff. The paper is one of the UK's most active student publications and counts itself among those at the forefront of student issues and campaigns. Unlike many other student publications, The Beaver does not have a paid full-time sabbatical editor or indeed any paid members of staff. The paper is made up of sections for News, Comment, Features, Social and Sport, as well as PartB (an arts and culture supplement).

It is published by the LSE Students' Union and printed by the Guardian Media Group; it is the only student newspaper in the United Kingdom to be printed in the Berliner format.

To bring you the unbiased truth about penny stocks.

Headed by former floor trader Gordon Lewis, our team of analsysts sort through the noise to reveal what really matters… how to consistently generate huge profits with penny stocks.

Whether you’re looking for up-to-date market information, individual penny stocks to invest in or warnings about scams…we’ve got you covered.

Name: AMIC · Mitjans d'Informació i Comunicació
Description:
L'Associació Catalana de la Premsa Gratuïta i Mitjans Digitals (ACPG) va constituir-se l'any 1997 i va néixer amb la voluntat de ser l'interlocutor vàlid d'un col·lectiu que gaudeix d'una gran popularitat i difusió entre tots els sectors de la població.

La premsa de distribució gratuïta molt arrelada en nombroses ciutats d'arreu del país ofereix, un contingut redaccional ric i útil de cada zona o bé en cada grup de població. La premsa gratuïta balear i catalana són un cas únic a Europa per la seva forta implantació per arreu del territori i per la seva aposta, des de fa anys, per la qualitat tant en els continguts com en els formats. Un país amb gran tradició de gratuïts on hi conviuen diversos tipus de formats, periodicitats i continguts, que en molts casos es centren en un tipus de públic molt concret o que s'especialitzen i dediquen a un únic sector.

Una associació molt activa que s’adapta constantment als nous formats i a les noves tecnologies, i per aquest motiu, l'any 2008 va incorporar els mitjans digitals informatius amb la voluntat de representar, potenciar, defensar i donar serveis a aquest tipus de canal informatiu gratuït.

Actualment, l'ACPG integra més de 250 mitjans, dels quals més d'un centenar són capçaleres de premsa gratuïta que tenen una tirada conjunta superior als dos milions i mig d'exemplars, i més d'un centenar són mitjans digitals que conjuntament superen els dos milions i mig d'usuaris únics mensuals d'Andorra, Balears i Catalunya.

Name: Tyler Morning Telegraph
Description:
The Tyler Morning Telegraph is a daily newspaper based in Tyler, Texas.  The newspaper began publishing weekly in 1877 as the Weekly Courier. In 1882, the publication frequency was increased to daily and the name was changed to the Daily Courier. In 1906, the Daily Courier and the Weekly Times consolidated into The Tyler Courier-Times.  In 1910, the newspaper sold to the Butler family who owned the company for 108 years.  The Tyler Morning Telegraph, which featured expanded coverage of East Texas cities, debuted Nov. 14, 1929 under the leadership of the Butler family.  The Courier-Times continued to publish in the afternoons and focused on Tyler news for subscribers within the city limits.  On Oct. 31, 1995, the company ended publication of its afternoon newspaper.
Today the Tyler Morning Telegraph is part of a larger family owned media company named M. Roberts Media which is owned by members of the Morris Roberts family.  Justin Wilcox currently serves as Publisher.

Name: Süddeutsche Zeitung – Jobs & Karriere
Description:
Willkommen auf der Karriereseite der Süddeutschen Zeitung – Deutschlands größter überregionaler Qualitätszeitung. 

Die SZ erreicht täglich Millionen Menschen: auf SZ.de, in unserer Nachrichten- und Zeitungs-App, in Newslettern, Podcasts und als gedruckte Zeitung. Wir liefern fundierte Nachrichten und hintergründige Geschichten, die gesellschaftliche Debatten prägen. Und wir wollen noch mehr bewegen – gemeinsam mit dir. 

Bei uns zählt dein Potenzial. Du bekommst den Freiraum, deine Stärken einzubringen, neue Perspektiven zu entdecken und Verantwortung zu übernehmen. Deine Ideen fließen in Produkte, Prozesse und Projekte ein und prägen mit, wie wir journalistische Qualität auf allen Kanälen erlebbar machen. Wir glauben an Weiterentwicklung im Alltag – durch Austausch auf Augenhöhe, regelmäßige Feedbackgespräche, gezielte Weiterbildung und Raum für Themen, die dich wirklich voranbringen. 

Unser Anspruch? Ein Leuchtturm in unruhigen Zeiten zu sein. Unabhängig denken, gründlich hinterfragen, Diskurse verstehen und den gesellschaftlichen Wandel aktiv mitgestalten. Dafür arbeiten bei uns Redakteur:innen, Entwickler:innen, Designer:innen und viele andere eng zusammen – interdisziplinär und wertschätzend. 

Die SZ steht für journalistische Qualität, die mehr will als nur informieren. Wir investieren gezielt in Technologien, die unsere Inhalte besser machen: durch datenbasierte Weiterentwicklungen im Produkt, verantwortungsvollen Einsatz neuer Formate und smarte Lösungen in der Vermarktung. So verbinden wir publizistische Haltung mit digitaler Innovation – für Inhalte, die einordnen, zugänglich sind und echten Mehrwert bieten. 

Wirke dort, wo etwas bewirkt wird – bei der SZ. Finde deinen Platz unter sz.de/jobs.

Datenschutz: https://www.sz.de/datenschutz

Name: Charlottesville Tomorrow
Description:
Before we tell you about ourselves, a quick question: Are you already a subscriber to our email newsletter? Because the best way to learn about our work is to become part of our community of subscribers and experience what we do. The emails from our reporters and editors are amazing and, a lot of times, offer you the context you need to make sense of the news and participate in our community. Sign up on our website!

Just kicking the tires? OK, here goes: Charlottesville Tomorrow is a community-driven, socially conscious news organization and we serve our neighbors (that’s you!) by connecting them to each other (that’s our community!) and to the issues that affect them most. In other words, the Charlottesville area is our place and Tomorrow is our focus.

We center our organization and news processes on our values — truth, community, and equity — and we work to improve the health of our local news community and ecosystem through our inclusive practices in hiring, journalism and partnership.

We believe in journalists and in journalism, but we get that the status quo local news model is broken and we have to earn your trust every day.

Name: La Voz de Michoacán

La Voz de Michoacán, muestra y demuestra una vez más ser el periódico líder en el Estado, con una tradición comprometida con el mañana y las demandas de nuestros lectores.
El trabajo en equipo, pluralidad, democracia, verdad, honradez, respeto, concertación, perseverancia, iniciativa, integridad e innovación son los valores que caracterizan a LA VOZ. La innovación, el diseño, la calidez y la audacia en el diario quehacer periodístico, son parte de una estrategia que aplica para mantener y acrecentar su liderazgo en este nuevo siglo. Con la mirada en el futuro, con los pies en el presente y con la confianza en la tradición informativa de LA VOZ DE MICHOACAN, avanza y se fortalece pensando siempre en servir a sus lectores en este siglo XXI; siendo también la mejor opción para su publicidad en todo el Estado.

Name: The Eagle-Tribune
Description:
The two-time Pulitzer Prize-winning Eagle-Tribune covers the Merrimack Valley of Massachusetts and southern New Hampshire. With offices based in North Andover, Mass., and Derry, N.H., our core coverage communities are Andover, North Andover, Methuen, Lawrence, and Haverhill in Massachusetts, and Salem, Atkinson, Plaistow, Pelham, Windham, Derry and Londonderry in New Hampshire. We do cover surrounding communities, as well.

The Eagle-Tribune has its roots in The Essex Eagle, which launched on April 13, 1867, to serve the same region of readers as we do today. Nearly a century and a half later, our core mission hasn’t changed, though the tools and means for fulfilling it certainly have. We publish seven days a week, including the flagship Sunday Eagle-Tribune.

What’s that mission? It’s to bring you the compelling stories that arise in your communities all day, every day. Be it a fire, a nor’easter, a high school football playoff, town festival, grammar school theater production, chili cook-off, or homecoming of American soldiers, you will find the story meaningfully reported in print and electronically by The Eagle-Tribune.

Our award-winning publication is known for outstanding journalism, aggressive coverage of breaking news, and award-winning editorials, sports, community and feature coverage. Our journalists have their boots on the ground all over the region seven days a week.

All of this prepares us to bring you exclusive, comprehensive coverage about the communities where you live, work and recreate, and to feature news, names and faces from the places you care about most.

Now and always, for The Eagle-Tribune it’s all about telling the stories — local stories, your stories ... stories.

According to the latest surveys and studies that is made by specialized companies ALAYAM is the leading and the No.1 circulated newspaper in the Kingdom of Bahrain because of the variety of ideologies, credibility and the extensive coverage of local and international news.

ALAYAM was the first newspaper in the MENA region to use the modern Information Technology in editing, executing and publishing and one of the first Arabic newspapers which lunched a website on the internet.
ALAYAM has a dedicated sports, kids and business supplement pullout along with the daily. ALAYAM is a member of the project “Kitab Fi Jarida” – A book in a newspaper – which is one of the programs of the UNESCO. The publication is active in the cultural filed and it owns a distribution company and one of the most important and popular commercial bookshop in Bahrain. ALAYAM uses one of the most modern presses in the Middle East that has the ability to print all types of newspaper, books and different types of publications.

ALAYAM celebrated the 20th anniversary last March 2009 and on this occasion ALAYAM Media Center was lunched, which offices all the departments and the modern printing press in an area of more than 15,000 sq meter and is located on Shaikh Isa bin Salman Highway – Janabiyah, close to entry of King Fahd Causeway to Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, in a very strategic location.
 
ALAYAM is starting a new era in media and publishing sector and trustfuly will continue its success as the leading media organization in the Kingdom of Bahrain.

Name: Vox Magazine
Description:
Vox blends Columbia’s urban mentality and hometown familiarity into a smart, small-city tabloid. We profile the human condition, expose local culture and provide reviews, tips and trends that tell our readers what’s happening and where to be. Every week we keep an ear to the underground and an eye out for the unique to bring you an analysis and reflection of contemporary issues. Vox is something new, something useful, something provocative.

Vox began in the spring of 1998 when the Columbia Missourian merged its two weeklies, Weekend, an entertainment magazine, and Ideas, the Sunday magazine. Since its inception, Vox has aimed to be a print version of that really cool friend of yours, the one who always knows what’s going on, can provide an intelligent viewpoint on any number of subjects, has a way with words that’s a combination between being snarky and knowing something, and is fun to hang with. Our lofty goals are outlined in our mission statement below.

The magazine is published by the Columbia Missourian and produced by magazine students at the world’s oldest (and we’d like to think best) journalism school. Don’t worry, it’s much more than some college newspaper. And we have faculty supervise us. Really. The magazine has won numerous awards, including the prestigious General Excellence award given by the Association for Education in Journalism and Mass Communications. In other words, Vox was named the best magazine produced by college students in the whole darn country. We also believe it is the only weekly magazine in the country produced by a staff that totally changes three times a year. Some think this is a challenge. We like to see it as a good thing — we never get stale or boring.

Name: The Chicago Reporter
Description:
The Chicago Reporter is an award-winning nonprofit investigative news organization that identifies, analyzes, and reports on the social, economic, and political issues of metropolitan Chicago with a distinctive focus on race and poverty. 

The Reporter was founded at Community Renewal Society in 1972 to serve as a barometer of Chicago’s progress coming out of the Civil Rights era. As one of America’s most segregated cities, and the home of what was the nation’s largest public housing development, Chicago continues to experience racial and economic inequalities like those seen in the 1960s and 1970s. The Chicago Reporter serves a critical role by focusing the power of investigative reporting on difficult social, economic and political issues that rarely receive thorough examination. The results are compelling examinations, thoughtful analyses and open dialogue on the source of these issues and potential remedies to curb them.

Nos revues incarnent le rendez-vous parfait pour tous les amoureux de nos régions.

Name: Social Streets C.I.C
Description:
Social Streets is a not-for-profit news outlet that works to reach mass audiences while delivering social and economic impact through the provision of high-quality local journalism and media training.

We publish neighbourhood magazines, in print and online, for places, working in partnership with the community to create original, high-quality content that champions the high street and celebrates the diverse cultural identity of each place.

We offer digital training and mentoring programmes to ensure local communities have the skills to make the most from the local digital ecosystem we develop.

Our ethos

Social Streets is a social enterprise. It uses journalism as a means to increase participation in local community and local high streets, build stronger local voices, connect people, promote citizenship, provide opportunities in the media, and increase digital skills. 

Social Streets particularly works within marginalise or disadvantaged communities, and with people from minority groups.
 
Originally conceived in response to the decline of the high street, Social Streets believes a stronger community, with a stronger sense of identity and belonging, will result in a stronger local economy. This becomes a virtuous circle as a stronger economy will then provide more opportunities, economically and socially, for local people.

To be able to deliver this to all communities, even in the poorest areas facing the most challenges, Social Streets is reinventing the local media model, moving away from reliance on advertising revenue towards a community-led model, with local partners and people contributing collectively to the overall success of the publication.

Track everything that matters:
• Pageviews and unique users
• Subscriber behavior and conversions
• Paywall views and sales
• View time, article scroll depth, and engagement
• All revenue and engagement signals in one place

Name: FEAT-Y
Description:
Le magazine bilingue green et éthique Feat-y, qui vient redonner un coup de jeune à la littérature du genre, loin des clichés d’une écologie old school.
Un magazine qui casse les codes.Le moins que l’on puisse dire sur Feat-y, c’est qu’il casse les codes: alors que l’écologie est, aujourd’hui encore, souvent associée à un univers un peu à part et difficile à concilier avec le monde moderne, Feat-y vient dépoussiérer nos vieux clichés en remettant au goût du jour l’expression “green et éthique”. Feat-y prend ainsi le parti de “mettre du green et de l’éthique dans votre vie avec humilité et humour”. Loin des médiums moralisateurs et complexant, le magazine nous fait redécouvrir l’univers du green et de l’éthique de façon décalée et enthousiaste, sans pour autant prendre les sujets qu’il traite à la légère.

Prairie Mountain Media is a publishing company with a multimedia portfolio of print, niche and digital products. We house an extensive, integrated network of trusted local brands that deliver exclusive local news and attract local audiences throughout the state of Colorado, including the Akron, Boulder, Broomfield, Brush, Cañon City/Royal Gorge Region, Colorado Springs, Erie, Estes Park, Fort Morgan, Julesburg, Lafayette, Lamar, Longmont, Louisville, Loveland, Pueblo, Sterling and Superior markets.
 
Our 15 newspaper brands have served their respective communities for more than 100 years. They deliver more than 1.26 million print and 12 million digital impressions every month and proven results for advertisers large and small. We can extend your reach near and far with our sizable network of websites and partnerships with national powerhouses Yahoo!, Digital First Media and Ad Taxi. Our full range of digital advertising solutions also includes social, e-mail, search engine marketing and search engine optimization along with geo and behavioral targeting and retargeting platforms.
 
Prairie Mountain Media delivers the best of Colorado, serving high-value audiences and connecting advertisers to them. Our award-winning coverage and numerous content delivery options endear us to an ever-growing number of readers. Our in-demand multimedia products and personalized marketing services form a powerful communications tool for our clients.

Newspapers:  Daily Camera, Broomfield Enterprise, Colorado Daily, Longmont Times-Call, Estes Park Trail Gazette, Loveland Reporter-Herald, Fort Morgan Times, Colorado Hometown Weekly, Sterling Journal-Advocate, Brush News-Tribune, Akron News Reporter, Julesburg Advocate, Lamar Ledger, Burlington Record, Canon City Daily Record
