Name: The Gaudie Student Newspaper
Description:
The Gaudie has been an iconic part of student life at Aberdeen University since 1934, celebrating its 80th birthday in 2014.  The Gaudie has a long tradition of quality student journalism. Named by the Guardian as the oldest student publication in Scotland! Over the years The Gaudie has had inspired student journalists, a large number of which have applied the same caliber of writing to national publications as they did with The Gaudie.

The average length of paper is 32 pages, with a readership of 1,000 in print, 2,000-4,000 for our online issue, and thousands of visitors to our website, The Gaudie has grown into a successful 21st Century voice on campus at Aberdeen.

Published every second Tuesday during term time, it is distributed across campus and the city. Including Hillhead Halls of Residence, King’s College Campus, ASV Sports Centre, Forresterhill Medical School and many places in between.

Covering News, Features, Opine, Arts, Life and Style, Gaming, Technology, Puzzles, Satire and Sport, not only does The Gaudie cater for all reading tastes, but it also enables students to try their hand at a variety of different reporting and writing styles while helping keep our readers informed of everything that is going on around campus.

Written by you, for you, The Gaudie wouldn’t survive without its volunteers. Around 150 students contribute articles and photographs on an annual basis, as well as another 25 students who together edit it. 

The section editors are responsible for engaging with new writers, editing their material and designing and laying up the pages which you then read. They are all full-time students and often work many hours a week alongside their studies to make sure The Gaudie maintains its quality.

For a budding journalist, photographer, or designer, there really is no better feeling than seeing your work in print – and that opportunity is readily available with The Gaudie, one of the best additions to your CV that your time at Aberdeen has to offer.

Name: Mediehuset Hallandsposten
Description:
Vi är ett mediehus med duktiga medierådgivare som erbjuder ett stort utbud av marknadsföringskanaler, allt från traditionell annonsering till kampanjer på sociala medier som Facebook, Instagram, Snapchat & LinkedIn. 

Oavsett hur dina utmaningar, mål och möjligheter ser ut, så hjälper vi dig att ta fram en skräddarsydd marknadsstrategi anpassad efter just ditt företag och optimerar löpande för bästa tänkbara resultat. Vi hjälper även till med all produktion, från hemsidor till kampanjmaterial. med oss som mediepartner når du ut till 9 av 10 på den lokala marknaden. Mäktigt, eller hur? 

Hallandsposten är en del av Stampen Media som bland annat består av Hallands Nyheter, Göteborgs-Posten, Bohusläningen, Ttela och Strömstads Tidning. Tillsammans når vi 1.307.000 läsare varje vecka.

Hallandsposten är Hallands största och äldsta tidning. Den första tidningen gavs ut den 30 juli 1850. På ledarplats är tidningen oberoende liberal. Läs oss var du vill och när du vill - i mobilen, datorn eller på papper. 

Vårt primära bevakningsområde är Halmstads, Laholm och Hylte kommuner.

Name: A2 Architank
Description:
Przez ostatnich 11 lat spotykaliśmy się na łamach magazynu Zawód:Architekt. Dążenie do rozwoju sprawiło jednak, że rok 2019 rozpoczęliśmy z całkowicie nowymi planami. Powołaliśmy do życia A2 Architank.

Entuzjazm, jaki przez wszystkie lata prowadzenia redakcji Z:A towarzyszył stylowi naszej współpracy z architektami, spowodował, że do nowej inicjatywy przyłączyli się wypróbowani autorzy, świetnie znani ze „starych” łamów. 

Odebraliśmy wiele telefonów i e-maili z wyrazami wsparcia i życzeniami powodzenia. Swój akces do współtworzenia nowego magazynu zaczęło zgłaszać wielu kibicujących nam Fanów i Przyjaciół. Utworzyła się grupa stanowiącą think tank gotowy do merytorycznego wspierania redakcji. Dołączyli do nas także bohaterowie komiksu Grupa Archisława. Poczuliśmy moc.

W takiej sytuacji właściwie nie mieliśmy innego wyjścia, jak nadal robić to, co potrafimy, a co przez wiele lat spotykało się ze stale rosnącym uznaniem Czytelników – redagować poczytne czasopismo dla architektów i projektantów.

Wierzymy, że magazyn A2 Architank podtrzyma reprezentowany do tej pory poziom redakcyjny, ale też rozszerzy swoją działalność o świeże pomysły, które wcześniej niekoniecznie były możliwe do zrealizowania.

Miło nam powitać Was w nowym formacie.

Życzymy przydatnej zawodowo lektury. 

Inicjatywa A2 Architank przyciąga i rozwija się :)

Sebastian Osowski
redaktor naczelny


PS 
Już w premierowym wydaniu A2 Architank swój udział mają Okręgowe Izby Architektów RP: Mazowiecka, Dolnośląska, Pomorska oraz Warmińsko-Mazurska.

 De Haagse Tijden heeft een aantal kenmerken:
• Richt zich volledig op de doelgroep 50-plus. 
• Hoge oplage en groot bereik
• De gehele oplage wordt in slechts enkele dagen bij de afhaaladressen opgehaald

Name: Uttarbanga Sambad
Description:
On May 19, 1980 Uttar Banga Sambad made a humble beginning with its Siliguri edition. Uttar Banga Sambad was the first daily newspaper in West Bengal to be published from outside Kolkata. It was soon accepted as the mouthpiece of North Bengal and today Uttar Banga Sambad has emerged as one of the largest circulated newspapers in the entire North East India .

Uttar Banga Sambad continues to dominate the media market in North Bengal with an overwhelming 55% market share while the combined circulation of the competition adds up to 45%. The circulation of Uttar Banga Sambad at 1,65,452 is more than Combined circulation of all Kolkata based dailies : 1,05,560 as per ABC data Jan~June 2017.

Not one to rest on its laurels, Uttar Banga Sambad is continuously making efforts to evolve and improve and reach further into the heartland of North Bengal, tapping into hitherto unexplored markets. To this effort, we have set up two parallel lines of completely new high speed all colour printing set up with combined capacity of printing 32 pages in colour.

The competition for print newspapers these days is not only from the electronic media but also from the digital media. The key to strengthening the market share is concentrating on localised news, what�s happening in the immediate vicinity of the reader, in addition to what�s happening in the state, national and international arena, in decreasing order of importance. Read by more than 15 lakh readers everyday (Source: Indian Readership Survey) Uttar Banga Sambad today consists of four sub-regional editions : Siliguri, Coochbehar, Alipurduar and Malda. Siliguri, the Gateway to the North East has become an increasingly strategic city. With a network of offices across India , we are just a phone call away to cater to your needs.

Today the UBS group consist of apart from the flagship Uttar Banga Sambad, All India Appointment Gazette - an English weekly newspaper on employment and career opportunities, Tathya Kendra - a Bengali family magazine, Sambad - a Bengali daily newspaper being published from Bardhaman having more than 6 lakh readers (Source: Indian Readership Survey 2009) in the Durgapur Asansol Industrial belt.

Name: Outras Palavras
Description:
Jornalismo de Profundidade e Pós-Capitalismo

Esta guerra vai durar muito mais que minha vida
Por isso, vou fazê-la
Manuel Scorza

Lançado em 2010,Outras Palavras aposta no resgate e na reinvenção do Jornalismo.Trata-se de uma tarefa essencial, em meio à crise civilizatória na qual estamos mergulhados. Exigirá forças muito superiores às de nossa pequena redação. Por esta razão, estamos dispostos a contribuir com ela.

As esperanças de uma Comunicação livre dos oligopólios, despertadas pela internet desde as últimas décadas do século XX, estão vivas – mas em xeque. As velhas mídias já não controlam a informação; no entanto surgiram, como alternativas a elas, duas tendências ainda piores. Por um lado, as redes sociais controladas por algorítmos,cujos controladores decidem (com muito mais poder vertical que os editores do passado) o que oferecer e o que negar a cada público. Por outro, as notícias falsas, um universo de “fatos” fabricados não apenas para acalentar certas audiências mas, muito pior, para desfazer a possibilidade de uma narrativa compartilhada sobre o presente e, portanto, de dialogar e intervir sobre o futuro comum.

Outras Palavrascrê na possibilidade de vencer estes perigos. Quer fazê-lo empregando duas ferramentas. Primeiro, a busca da profundidade. Implica rejeitar os fla-flus e o aplauso fácil, confiando na inteligência e na relação de longo prazo do leitor. Segundo, a construção paciente de redes. Aos poucos,acreditamos, será possível substituir as redações industriais e ultracentralizadas do velho jornalismo por relações de troca não-merantil de saberes – inclusive os jornalísticos. Vislumbramos uma sociedade capaz de se informar reciprocamente, se enxergar de modo crítico e se transformar com ousadia.

Democracia e Jornalismo estão em crise. É hora de reinventá-los. Queremos sua companhia, nesta empreitada.

Name: The Prince Albert Daily Herald
Description:
The Prince Albert Daily Herald began as the Prince Albert Advocate weekly newspaper in 1894.  As the community changed, so did the paper.  In 1908, the paper became the Prince Albert Weekly Herald and went daily in 1911 when W.F. Herman bought the Herald.  In one of the ironies of history, the exact date on which the Herald was first published as a daily has been lost.  The paper was in local hands until 1949 when the Thompson Newspapers chain purchased the paper.  In 1995, it was sold to the Hollinger chain and in 2000, it was sold to the CanWest chain.  In 2002, it was sold to Montreal-based Transcontinental Inc.  In June 2016, Star News Publishing Inc. purchased a group of newspapers in Saskatchewan, including the Prince Albert Daily Herald.

In December 2017, it was announced that a group of employees had reached a tentative agreement to buy out the Prince Albert Daily Herald from Star News Publishing Inc., preventing the paper from folding.  On May 1, 2018, the deal was completed and the Prince Albert Daily Herald began operation under FolioJumpline Publishing Inc., owned and operated by its employees, publishing with a community focus.  The Daily Herald provides local news, arts and sports every day and publishes in print Tuesday to Saturday.  It is a community newspaper at heart that provides more than 50 local stories and photos per week.  All employees of the Daily Herald live and work in the Prince Albert area, and are proud to be a part of the local community.

Description:
Welcome to The Sentinel, a media enterprise whose main goal is to help the 100,000 or so people living in southwestern New Hampshire know what's going on - and what will go on - immediately around them and in the world.

The Sentinel frequently references the past, about which it knows more than a little. The paper was founded by 21-year-old John Prentiss in March, 1799, and it remains one of the oldest news organizations in the country continuously published under the same name.

About 100 people work here, in all sorts of jobs: advertising, printing, news, circulation, online operations, business and so on.

The paper is locally owned, which is a rarity these days. The publisher, Tom Ewing, lives in Keene and occupies the corner office. He, like all the other members of The Sentinel team, are answerable to an enterprise that's been serving the community for more than two centuries. But, acknowledging the public nature of their work, they are also answerable to you.

Name: Riviera Chablais Hebdo
Description:
"Riviera-Chablais, votre région" aborde tous les aspects de la vie des habitants de sa zone de diffusion (actualité, économie, sport, politique, services, etc.).

Chaque mois, un tous ménages couvre l'ensemble des deux régions. Mais l’activité de nos régions est riche et ainsi, tous les mercredis, une édition "Riviera" s'adresse aux habitants de Vevey, Montreux et environ alors qu'une édition "Chablais" est destinée à la population du Chablais vaudois et valaisan. 

Si le tous ménages sera distribué gratuitement à l’ensemble des foyers (98'000), les versions hebdomadaires dédiées à chacune des régions seront réservées aux abonnés. 

Cette approche doit permettre non seulement d’être au plus proche de votre actualité mais également d’assurer la pérennité et la qualité du journal.

Cette nouvelle proposition éditoriale régionale est complémentaire aux quotidiens cantonaux et se veut le reflet des habitants de ce coin de pays, entre plaine, lac et montagne. Les trois éditions sont le trait d'union entre:

   - la Riviera et le Chablais (édition tous ménages, une fois par mois)
   - les régions de Vevey à Montreux (édition Riviera, chaque mercredi)
   - le Chablais vaudois et le Chablais valaisan (édition Chablais, chaque mercredi)

Global Financial Chronicle is a premium business and finance publication that brings sharp insights, global trends and regional expertise into one powerful narrative. Beyond publishing, Global Financial Chronicle offers integrated services across public relations, brand storytelling and executive profiling - making us a strategic ally for businesses aiming to strengthen thought leadership and market visibility in South Asia and the Middle East.

We believe finance is not just about numbers - it’s about narratives that move economies. And through credible content and compelling coverage, we are committed to informing decisions, inspiring growth and elevating voices across the global financial spectrum.

Name: The Epoch Times Australia
Description:
We are an international, independent, award-winning, multi-language media company in print and online, spanning 35 countries and 21 language editions. Epoch Times is the only multi-national newspaper that spans the entire globe. It is also the most widely distributed Chinese newspaper in the world.



Freedom of the press and humanity are fundamental to the Epoch Times. Our newspaper was born to fill the void of truthful news coverage of events in China, where previously only propaganda and censorship existed.



Having personally witnessed human rights tragedies like the Tiananmen Square Massacre and the persecution of the spiritual movement Falun Gong, and at great risk to themselves and their loved ones, a group of Chinese-Americans began publishing the Epoch Times in Chinese in the United States. Some reporters in China were subsequently jailed, and some suffered severe torture before disappearing altogether.



Integrity and truthfulness in reporting, together with covering stories that really matter, are the central tenets of the Epoch Times. Our beginnings have instilled in Epoch Times staff an unwavering commitment to objective reporting and socially responsible business practices, as well as respect for human rights and freedom.

Name: UMBRIA report
Description:
UMBRIAreport è  il punto di riferimento per chi cerca le ultime notizie del territorio umbro. 
Da Perugia a Terni, da Spoleto a Città di Castello, ogni angolo dell'Umbria trova voce e rappresentanza su UmbriaReport. La nostra missione? Fornire un servizio giornalistico preciso, puntuale e soprattutto vicino alle esigenze della comunità locale. La vostra fiducia è la nostra forza motrice, e per questo ci impegniamo a offrire contenuti di qualità giorno dopo giorno.
Dai vicoli di Assisi, dove le pietre raccontano storie di spiritualità, alle sale espositive di Perugia che ospitano opere d'arte contemporanea, UmbriaReport è al tuo fianco. Seguiamo festival, inaugurazioni, eventi teatrali e tutto ciò che fa vibrare il cuore culturale della regione.
In un mondo in continuo cambiamento, stare al passo con le decisioni politiche è fondamentale. UmbriaReport si immerge nelle dinamiche locali e regionali, offrendo analisi, interviste e reportage che aiutano i cittadini a navigare nel complesso panorama politico.
Dalle gesta delle squadre di calcio locali alle competizioni amatoriali, lo sport è passione, impegno e orgoglio. UmbriaReport è sul campo, pronta a raccontare vittorie, sconfitte e momenti indimenticabili.
Feste, sagre, incontri e manifestazioni. L'Umbria è viva e pulsante, e ogni weekend offre qualcosa di nuovo. UmbriaReport è la tua guida, con una sezione dedicata agli eventi, per non perdere nulla di ciò che accade intorno a te.
In un'era digitale dove l'informazione corre veloce, è fondamentale avere una bussola affidabile.

Name: Baylis Community Media CIC
Description:
Baylis Media Ltd is a well respected and long established independent publisher providing news and information in print and online to the east Berkshire area.

Established in 1869, we produce three core newspaper titles every week - the  Maidenhead Advertiser, the award-winning Slough & South Bucks Express and the Windsor & Eton Express -  giving a combined weekly readership of over 110,000. 

Online, our website www.maidenhead-advertiser.co.uk, has over 300,000 unique visitors every month. 

We also produce two property supplements every week, Advertiser Property and the Property News, as well as a number of special printed publications through out the year.

We also also offer a number of other publishing related services including leaflet insertion, contract printing, graphic design, feature writing and photographic skills.

Baylis Media Ltd is unique in that its independence is guaranteed by its status as a trust. In 1962 Louis Baylis, the Maidenhead Advertiser's proprietor, created a charitable trust which bears his name.

This effectively made a gift of the newspaper to the town with the aim of keeping alive the invaluable tradition of public service it had established. Each year the trust distributes money to local good causes while the newspaper's values of public service and providing an independent voice for the community remain as strong today as ever.

The family name continues its legacy within the firm, with Norman Baylis' eldest grandson Jeremy Spooner holding the position of Chief Executive Officer, and Gerald Baylis' eldest son Jason Baylis being the Chairman and IT and production director.

The company,  is committed to the principles of fair, accurate and impartial reporting of local issues and aims to provide its readers with unrivalled coverage of the area.

Name: Le DDV - Le Droit de Vivre
Description:
LE DDV • UNIVERSALISME & ANTIRACISME. Le Droit de Vivre est depuis 1932 le journal de la Ligue internationale contre le racisme et l’antisémitisme (la Lica lors de sa création). Rebaptisée Le DDV, cette publication est aujourd’hui une revue trimestrielle.

Histoire

Le Droit de Vivre est créé en 1932 par le journaliste Bernard Lecache, fondateur en 1927 de la Lica (Ligue internationale contre l’antisémitisme). Paraissant irrégulièrement à ses débuts, le Droit de Vivre devient un hebdomadaire en novembre 1935. 
Le Droit de Vivre est un journal antifasciste qui documente les exactions nazies et l’activité des agents pro-hitlériens en France. Il dénonce les manifestations de la haine « raciale ».
182 numéros paraissent entre novembre 1935 et le 8 juin 1940. Le 14 juin de cette année fatidique, les troupes allemandes pénètrent dans Paris. Les locaux de la Lica sont investis par une commission spéciale qui s’empare des archives de l’organisation. La Lica est dissoute par le gouvernement de Vichy. Ses militants sont pourchassés.
Si la Lica est reconstituée en octobre 1944, deux mois après la Libération, le Droit de Vivre ne reparaît qu’au début de l’année 1947. Il conserve durablement un rythme de parution mensuel. Il est diffusé auprès des adhérents de la Lica (devenue Licra en 1979) et vendu sur abonnement.

Le DDV aujourd’hui

En décembre 2020 paraît une nouvelle formule du Droit de Vivre dont l’historien Emmanuel Debono est le rédacteur en chef.
Le DDV devient une revue d’une centaine de pages qui part à la conquête d’un lectorat plus large que les seuls adhérents de l’association antiraciste. 
La revue entend nourrir les débats actuels qui intéressent directement la lutte contre le racisme, l’antisémitisme, les discriminations et les extrémismes, par des analyses de spécialistes, des enquêtes journalistiques, des tribunes et de nombreux entretiens.

Lancé en mars 2021, leddv.fr, le média en ligne du DDV, vient compléter la mue de ce journal historique.

Name: HKGoodPost 好報
Description:
點解叫《好。報》？
《好。報》的「好」字是由 Social Good 轉換過來，好心善心能夠化為強大能量，好心自有好報，讓我們一同重建香港。

《好。報》是一群熱衷社會創新的朋友共同創作（co-create）的網上平台，當中有來自香港及台灣的學者、社創創辦人、企業傳訊及企業社會責任（CSR）管理人、社會福利界同工，以至慈善基金管理人及學生。

《好。報》一眾博客抱著共創、共享丶公平丶公義丶公開的價值觀共同交流。透過分享香港本地和國際的的社會創新及公益項目，以及對可持續發展目標(SDGs) 的思考，促進大家對未來的想像和思考，並將之轉化為行動，惠及社會。

《好。報》由意念到創刊只有一個月時間，也是我們的第一次，希望得到各方提點，協助香港找回好報。

Name: Kuensel
Description:
Kuensel is the oldest newspaper in the Himalayan Kingdom of Bhutan. Until 2006, Kuensel was the only print medium in the country. Due to the history of its origins, the newspaper is considered close to the government.

Kuensel, which roughly means clarity or accuracy, was founded in 1965 as an internal government bulletin. The oldest documented edition is that of June 15, 1967. [1] In 1974 a printing press was imported from India and installed in Thimphu. Kuensel was initially published in English, but soon an issue of the newsletter in Dzongkha followed, which was printed with Dzongkha block letters specially designed for this purpose.

In 1986, the Kuensel government bulletin was converted into Bhutan's first and at that time only newspaper published weekly by the Ministry of Communications' Department of Information. In 1988 Kuensel had a total print run of 12,500 and was published in Dzongkha, Nepali and English. The Nepalese voice output was discontinued after the conflict over the deportation of members of the Nepalese minority ( Lhotshampas ). [2] By royal decree, the integration was resolved in 1992 with the government and Kuenseltransferred to an independent company in order to create the conditions for the development of professional media. In 1998 state financial support ran out. Since then, Kuensel has supported itself through print jobs and income from advertising. On April 18, 2001, Kuensel Online was launched as the first online newspaper in Bhutan. Kuensel Online operates an internet forum with more than 100,000 participants. This platform enables the Bhutanese to discuss important aspects of social change in Bhutan.

In addition to the central production facility in Thimphu, Kuensel set up another printing plant in eastern Bhutan in 2005 to ensure daily delivery and availability of the newspaper far from the capital. In addition to its headquarters in the capital Thimphu, Kuensel has correspondent offices in 8 districts.

Name: The Canary
Description:
The Canary is a radical working-class media outlet that is run by the workers. We are a co-operative with a structure that is run democratically. We pass decisions in open meetings, where everyone gets a say and everyone’s voice counts – and we make decisions transparently and collectively..

We are completely independent of any advertisers, funders, companies, political organisations, or political parties.

We produce high-quality, well-researched and incisive journalism that aims to bring us closer to our vision – the dismantling of power structures and the empowerment of working class and marginalised communities – being a reality. 

Today, a handful of powerful moguls control our mainstream media. As such, its coverage is largely conservative. But we are striving to be a truly radical and viable alternative. It’s one that isn’t afraid to challenge the status quo, to ask the hard questions, and to have an opinion. This has only been possible because of the support from you – our readers.

Name: The Berkeley Beacon
Description:
The Berkeley Beacon is Emerson College’s only independent, student-run newspaper. The Beacon is consistently heralded as one of the top student news organizations in the country, with our focus on editorial excellence and newsroom innovation. Through daily publication of content online, a weekly print newspaper, a semesterly magazine, and other forms of multimedia distribution, The Beacon is the leading source for Emerson-centric news.

Founded in 1947, the paper was named after the college’s former location in Back Bay, at the confluence of Berkeley Street and Beacon Street.

The paper is a chronicle of life at Emerson — covering student government politics, on- and off-campus events, administrative initiatives and sports. 

In recent years, our staff has reported on a wide range of topics, covering everything from the expansion and renovation of Emerson’s campus to protests in Boston and at Emerson.

In 2011, The Beacon became the first college newspaper website with a responsive design, and in 2018 transitioned from its role as a weekly print paper to a daily, digital-first model. The Beacon has won multiple Associated Collegiate Press awards for our redesigned daily website. 

In 2024, The Beacon was recognized by Emerson’s Journalism Department for its coverage of the Cutler Majestic arrests. The Beacon’s reporting on the pro-Palestinian encampment on campus in the spring 2024 semester generated more than 10,000 page views and was the most cited story on the event on Google.

Name: Capital News
Description:
O Capital News é um veículo de notícias online com sede em Campo Grande, que tem como pressuposto buscar a realização de um jornalismo crítico fundamentado na procura pela verdade.

É um veículo independente e apartidário. Baseada nestes conceitos, nossa equipe procura em todos os setores privar pela imparcialidade.

Apesar de se caracterizar como empresa, não acredita que informação seja apenas mercadoria, mas ferramenta de ampliação de conhecimento, educação, cultura e cidadania. Por isso, nossa equipe busca desempenhar suas atividades baseada na transparência junto a seu público e produzir material jornalístico com conteúdo diversificado e com rigor técnico.

O Capital News também tem o intuito de contribuir para o desenvolvimento sócio–econômico e cultural de Mato Grosso do Sul, e o bem-estar de sua população, com a disseminação de informações noticiosas ou de entretenimento, dentro das mais diversas editorias cobertas por nossa equipe.

Mesmo tendo sede em Campo Grande, o interior do Estado também não foge ao nosso olhar. No Capital News, você também pode ficar antenado em tudo que rola nos principais locais do mundo. Mesmo dando ênfase às histórias que acontecem aqui, sempre buscando estar atenta, nossa equipe pesquisa e traz para você aquilo que é de repercussão nacional ou mundial.

Com o Capital News no ar, a população pode contar com o apoio de um jornalismo sério, comprometido com a procura da verdade.

Name: 遠見天下文化事業群
Description:
遠見‧天下文化事業群創辦於1982年。在創辦人高希均教授、王力行發行人的領導下，堅持「傳播進步觀念」，與國際接軌，期待透過更多元豐富的內容展現形式，將優質的觀念推介給台灣及華文世界的廣大讀者。

遠見‧天下文化事業群，旗下事業涵蓋：
雜誌事業體：《遠見雜誌》、《哈佛商業評論》全球繁體中文版
出版事業體：天下文化出版公司
未來親子學習平台：未來小天下出版公司、《未來少年月刊》、《未來兒童月刊》、《未來Family週刊》

其他單位包括：
■遠見民意研究調查：台灣最具公信力的調查中心，每年發布經濟發展與社會議題調查，均引起重大迴響。
■遠見創意製作：因應行動影音數位時代成立的新媒體事業以美感及影音驅動傳遞，致力於提升東方價值與典範、人類性靈、環境永續。
■50+數位媒體：國內最具影響力的專屬50歲以上族群之數位媒體，力求用「新的方法，創造自己的理想老後」。
■1號課堂：台灣首創音頻行動學習平台，利用現代人不離身的手機，成為最佳知識充電器。
■遠見創意製作：集合了優質影音製作團隊，致力推出高質感的影片。
■93巷人文空間：人文薈萃的台北地標，結合書香、咖啡香、美味健康的自製餐點、豐富課程的複合式空間。
■遠見‧天下文化教育基金會：由遠見天下文化事業群支持成立，結合公益與知識推廣，為培育國際化菁英人才創造實質助益。

經營理念: 傳播進步觀念，豐富閱讀世界。

Name: Libnanews
Description:
Le média citoyen francophone du Liban a été fondé en 2006 et présente l’actualité politique, économique, judiciaire, culturelle et sociale du Pays des Cèdres.

Genèse de Libnanews en 2006 : Absence d’un flux d’informations francophones Libnanews est un site d’informations en français sur le Liban né d’une initiative citoyenne et présent sur la toile depuis 2006. Disposant des ressources et des moyens nécessaires, et constatant le manque d’un flux d’actualité francophone consacré au Liban durant le conflit de juillet-août 2006, un blog d’information a été mis en place selon ce concept. Ce blog a évolué en site d’information. L’équipe de Libnanews : Des bénévoles d’horizons divers Libnanews est un média citoyen basé à l’étranger, et formé uniquement de jeunes bénévoles de divers horizons politiques, œuvrant ensemble pour la promotion d’une information factuelle neutre, refusant tout financement d’un parti quelconque, pour préserver sa crédibilité dans le secteur de l’information. Libnanews poursuit sa mission d’information En raison de l’attachement et de la fidélité des lecteurs, ainsi que de la poursuite de l’instabilité politique et des défis auxquels le Liban fait face, Libnanews a décidé de poursuivre sa mission, selon le concept de flux d’informations francophones au service du Liban, et cela en raison notamment des lignes de plus en plus partisanes des médias traditionnels libanais. En plus des articles rédigés par l’équipe, des communiqués de diverses organisations locales et internationales sont publiés dans leur intégralité en citant leur source, de façon à préserver l’authenticité de l’information, invitant le lecteur à faire sa propre analyse, sans volonté aucune d’imposer une analyse du site. Par ailleurs, nos membres peuvent partager leurs analyses de situation afin d’inciter au débat. Notre mission : Révolutionner le concept d’information libanaise Attentifs aux besoins de ses lecteurs, l’objectif de ce site est de révolutionner l’information consacrée

Description: Initié par un groupe de jeunes dynamiques et ambitieux, L’économiste est édité par l’agence Conseil en Communication, Stratégie et Marketing « CHEZ VOUS » qui a déjà fait ses preuves au Bénin et au Togo  avec des émissions Télévisées comme La Rue des Décideurs, le journal de la CAN et de la Coupe du Monde sur l’ORTB et l’émission Graines des Stars sur Canal 3 Bénin. L’économiste est animé par une équipe de journalistes engagés pour les recherches et les investigations économiques dans le respect de la déontologie du métier. Ce quotidien spécialisé, une première au Bénin, a pour objectifs la promotion du secteur privé par une  analyse objective sur l’économie et les finances publiques ; Communiquer la vérité des chiffres avec professionnalisme, la réalisation, l’étude et l’analyse d’un certain nombre de statistiques sur le rôle et la mission des entreprises béninoises dans le développement et la croissance économique du Bénin et des pays de l’espace UEMOA.

Name: Ekometre Gazetesi & ekometre.com
Description:
2002 yılında Ali Kenan SERTALP'in girişimiyle yayın hayatına başlayan EKOMETRE Gazetesi, 15 yıl boyunca her hafta pazartesi günleri okurlarıyla buluştu.. Basılı medyanın geldiği nokta ve dijital haberciliğe ağırlık veren yayın politikası sonucunda son yıllarda aylık olarak yayımlanmaktadır. EKOMETRE, ülkemizin ekonomi yayıncılığında önemli bir temel taşını oluşturuyor. 

İş dünyasının sesi olmak mottosuyla yayın hayatına başlayan EKOMETRE, yayın ilkelerinden taviz vermeden bugünlere taşıdığı bayrağı sürdürme kararlığında.

Name: RANDOM Mag
Description:
A magazine unlike any other. In a world where order and predictability often rule the day, we have carved out a space for the delightful, the unexpected, and the serendipitous. "Random" is your portal to a world of unscripted stories, eccentric discoveries, and the delightful chaos that life has to offer.

Our mission at "Random" is simple: to celebrate the unpredictability of life and the beauty of happenstance. In these pages, you will find a symphony of the unexpected, where chaos and creativity coexist, and serendipity reigns supreme.

Each issue of "Random" is a journey into the uncharted territories of human experience, filled with diverse and eclectic content. We explore the fascinating stories of people, places, and events that are often overlooked or underestimated, yet prove to be incredibly captivating. Our magazine is a testament to the inherent charm of life's quirks and oddities.

From exploring the whimsical hobbies of people who defy convention to delving into the extraordinary tales of individuals whose lives have taken unexpected and extraordinary turns, "Random" is your companion for embracing the unknown. We celebrate the delightful surprises, the strange encounters, and the magic of life's unplanned adventures.

In the pages of "Random," you'll encounter features, profiles, and narratives that will inspire your curiosity, challenge your assumptions, and ignite your sense of wonder. We believe that randomness is where innovation and creativity thrive, where the ordinary transforms into the extraordinary.

Name: NAFS Magazine
Description: NAFS Magazine est la première revue marocaine dédiée à l'épanouissement personnel et profesionnel. Psychologie, coaching, yoga, spiritualité, autant de portes qui donnent sur une seule cour, celle du bien être de l'homme et de la femme marocaine.

Name: The Paducah Sun
Description: The Paducah Sun covers western Kentucky from the Mississippi River to the Tennessee state line to the lakes region and the far southern Illinois counties.

Name: lavozdelsur.es
Description: lavozdelsur.es es un diario digital nacido en la provincia de Cádiz del que forman parte un grupo de redactores, fotoperiodistas y colaboradores que aportan otra perspectiva de la información provincial, la actualidad política, social, económica y cultural, ocupando un espacio editorial huérfano hasta ahora. La herramienta para alcanzar este ambicioso objetivo es lavozdelsur.es, un medio de comunicación moderno, con valores sociales, igualitarios y ecológicos, plural, innovador y combativo conectado a los ciudadanos a los que sirve y que fomenta el debate de las ideas.

Name: AlJarida Newspaper
Description:
Founded in 2007, AlJarida is a leading independent Arabic-language daily newspaper based in Kuwait. Known for its liberal editorial stance, AlJarida delivers high-quality journalism that values credibility, transparency, and press freedom. Our coverage spans local politics, regional developments, international affairs, business, sports, and culture, offering readers insightful analysis and reliable news.

With a commitment to responsible media, AlJarida has built a reputation as a trusted source for thought-provoking content and balanced reporting. The newspaper is headquartered in Kuwait City and maintains a strong digital presence through its website and social platforms, ensuring timely access to information across audiences.

Name: La Perla del Sur
Description:
La Perla del Sur es el custodio del legado periodístico de la Ciudad Señorial y el medio de récord para la región sur de Puerto Rico. 

Nuestra misión es, y siempre será, servir de portavoz para nuestras comunidades, hacer valer la rendición de cuentas del poder y luchar por las causas justas y nobles de los puertorriqueños.

Name: RNSNS News
Description:
RNSNS News is your go-to source for reliable and timely news coverage. We deliver well-researched stories that keep you informed on current events, technology, business, culture, and more.

Our commitment is to provide accurate, unbiased news that empowers and connects our readers to the world.

Name: Haber Ulaşım
Description: ‘haberulasim.com’ 2016 yılında sosyal medya üzerinden yayın hayatına başladı. Türkiye’nin en geniş kapsamlı sektörel sosyal medya platformu özelliğine sahip. Ulaşım sektörüne yönelik üretici, yan sanayi, tüketici, ilgili bakanlıklar ve ilgili federasyon ve dernek haberlerini tüm sektör paydaşlarına ulaştırıyor. 2020 yılına gelindiğinde ise ‘Haber Ulaşım Gazetesi’ olarak sektörel yayın yapan gazete statüsüne kavuştu. 2020 yılı itibariyle ulaşım sektörü’nün nabzını tutarak haberleri en kısa sürede en doğru şekilde sektör paydaşlarına ulaştırmaya devam ediyor.

Name: Publimetro Perú
Description: Somos un diario gratuito con presencia en 24 países. De lectura rápida y concisa, Publimetro informa con noticias de actualidad, deportes y entretenimiento. Nuestro diseño innovador está pensado en todos aquellos que no cuentan con mucho tiempo y necesitan estar informados.

Name: NFT News Today
Description: NFT News Today is a digital media platform dedicated to providing up-to-date news and analysis on the world of NFTs.We cover a wide range of topics including NFT art, gaming, collectibles, and more. Our team of experienced journalists and industry experts curate and report on the latest developments, trends, and insights in the NFT space. Whether you're a seasoned NFT investor, a curious newcomer, or just interested in the latest happenings in the world of digital assets, NFT News Today has something for you.

Name: Observer Jobs
Description:
ObserverJOBS is the only recruitment product that brings together print, web and social media to create a comprehensive, easy to access employment network that has become the first and only choice for employers and job seekers alike. With the largest database of job opportunities and the widest coverage of all districts in Sri Lanka, ObserverJOBS offers unique features that makes it an indispensable HR tool.
To all jobseekers, our goal is to help you fulfill the dream of finding the best job. Our huge volume of vacancies covering key job categories and wide range of industries is tailor made to suit your preferences. Dedicated to the continuous development of the candidates, Observerjobs career guidance is an excellent source for updating yourself in a fast changing environment.
For Employers, we guarantee that you get connected with the best pool of candidates for your published vacancies. With 3 premium packages now employers get the exclusive rights to streamline the entire recruitment process right up to the interview stage. Going beyond, we also partner with leading learning institutes in the country to provide necessary trainings to ensure your selected candidate is a best fit for the organization.
Initiated by Sri Lankaâ€s largest print media powerhouse in partnership with the most widely used HR system, our slogan says it all - no one else can do, what we do. ObserverJOBS is the only way forward for your perfect recruitment match.

Name: start.land.flow
Description: start.land.flow ist das Digitale Magzin von LAGARDE1 - dem Digitalen Gründungszentrum in Bamberg. Hier gibt es Themen rund um Digitalisierung, Gründung, Startups, Trends und Events.

Name: Parallaxi Mag
Description:
Η Parallaxi είναι ένα από τα παλαιότερα Free Press στην Ελλάδα. Ιδρύθηκε το Νοέμβριο του 1989 ως κινηματογραφικό περιοδικό.

Μέσα στο πέρασμα αυτών των 25 χρόνων το ιστορικό free press της Θεσσαλονίκης, που άνοιξε το δρόμο σε δεκάδες που ακολούθησαν, πειραματίστηκε αρκετές φορές δημιουργικά πάνω στη φόρμα και οδήγησε με επιτυχία την κούρσα των free press στο μέλλον.

Σήμερα αποτελεί ένα πρωτοποριακό περιοδικό πόλης στο ύφος των αμερικάνικων και ευρωπαϊκών δωρεάν διανεμόμενων περιοδικών γνώμης, με στήλες που υπογράφουν κορυφαίοι δημοσιογράφοι, columnists και άνθρωποι γνωστοί στη Θεσσαλονίκη για την παρέμβαση τους στα κοινά.

Η αισθητική του περιοδικού ανανεώνεται διαρκώς κι έχει χαρίσει στο περιοδικό στο παρελθόν τα βραβεία γραφιστικής στον ετήσιο διαγωνισμό ΕΒΓΕ (βραβείο σχεδιασμού καλύτερου περιοδικού της χρονιάς και βραβείο καλύτερου εξωφύλλου). Ο μοντέρνος κόσμος της τέχνης, της μόδας, της καλής ζωής, οι νέες τάσεις, η αρχιτεκτονική, η καθημερινή ζωή, τα ταξίδια, συναντούν τη σύγχρονη σκέψη στις σελίδες του περιοδικού κάθε μήνα. Παρέα με σπουδαίες υπογραφές από το χώρο των πολιτιστικών, των αθλητικών, του life style, της μόδας και της γεύσης. Οι σημαντικότεροι άνθρωποι αυτής της πόλης είναι κάθε μήνα στις σελίδες της.

Στο πρόγραμμα του 2009 του ΜEGA Chanel συμπεριλαμβάνονταν το σίριαλ «Αγρια Παιδιά» το σενάριο του οποίου βασίζεται στην ομώνυμη στήλη του Παναγιώτη Ιωσηφέλη που φιλοξενούταν για τέσσερα χρόνια στην Parallaxi. Μια στήλη που αφορά πρόσωπα, κυρίους νέους της διπλανής πόρτας.

Name: Al-Watan Newspaper  جريدة الوطن
Description:
Al Watan is an independent political daily published by Dar Al Watan Newspaper, Publishing and Distribution, Qatar's oldest and most prestigious media and marketing company. It is currently distributed extensively in the Qatari market and is broadcast reaches Internet Media number on in Qatar and has followers throughout the world, from the Middle East to Africa, America and the Far East, According newspaper's website visitors and social media.
Dar Al Watan was founded in 1995 and its first issue was issued on September 3rd of the same year. The text of its founding decree was to be an independent press organization, publishing daily newspapers, publishing specialized publications, books and magazines.

دار الوطن
الوطن صحيفة يومية سياسية مستقلة تصدر عن دار الوطن للطباعة والنشر والتوزيع أقدم وأعرق شركات قطر للاعلام والتسويق ، وتوزع حاليا وبشكل مكثف في السوق القطري وتبث على شبكة الانترنت وأصبح لها متابعون في كل دول العالم بدءا من الشرق الاوسط وامتدادا الى افريقيا واميركا والشرق الاقصى وصولا الى استراليا وذلك وفق رسائل زوار موقع الصحيفة على الشبكة.
تأسسست دار الوطن في العام 1995 وصدر العدد الاول منها في الثالث من سبتمبر من نفس العام ونص قرار تأسيسها على ان تكون مؤسسة صحفية مستقلة ونشاطها اصدار صحيفة يومية واصدار مطبوعات متخصصة وكتب ومجلات .

Name: Traverse City Record-Eagle
Description: Traverse City Record-Eagle is a newspaper that publishes information and news about local events, celebrations, obituaries, and sports.

Name: TOPO revue
Description:
Pour réconcilier les ados avec l'information, TOPO est une revue d’actualité qui fait le pari d’associer au plaisir de la bande dessinée le sérieux du journalisme.

Une information accessible
L’information est systématiquement contextualisée. Dans TOPO, le vocabulaire est simple et les articles s’appuient sur les connaissances des élèves de 4e et de 3e.

Une revue qui prend le temps
TOPO raconte le monde actuel à travers des reportages réalisés par des journalistes et des dessinateurs qui confrontent leurs points de vue et font dialoguer leurs pratiques.
Les auteurs abordent l’actualité sous des angles différents, à chaque fois singuliers, mais toujours avec une approche rigoureuse, précise et engagée.
Les reportages se terminent par des dessins de presse, une pédagogie du dessin d’actualité qui nous paraît, aujourd’hui, nécessaire.

TOPO donne aussi la parole à des adolescents dont le témoignage constitue le fil conducteur du récit. Un traitement sensible et incarné qui permet d’aborder des sujets complexes.

Un dessin vaut mieux qu'un long discours
La grammaire de TOPO, c’est le dessin : il offre de multiples possibilités narratives et permet d’expliquer de façon didactique des sujets complexes.

La culture générale
Les chroniques de TOPO s’appuient sur la culture adolescente en y puisant ses références et ses codes.
Elles sont informatives, ludiques, drôles, voire subversives. Et toujours en bande dessinée.

Une revue sans pub...
... Mais une revue qui s’amuse à glisser des fausses pubs dans ses numéros. La publicité modèle nos comportements et oriente nos choix. Les fausses pubs de TOPO dénoncent l’ensemble des techniques employées pour attirer l’attention du consommateur. Édifiant !

Où trouver la revue ?
TOPO se vend uniquement en librairie/Relay et par abonnement :
12,50 € le numéro — 75 € l’abonnement annuel (6 numéros).

Name: Interview by Ringier
Description: Eine Zeitschrift mit den Besten aus Kunst, Kultur, Politik, Wissenschaft, Mode, Musik und Sport. Interviews mit Menschen, die die Schweiz bewegen.

Name: Africa Eco News
Description:
AFRICA ECO NEWS has a dedicated spotlight on issues concerning the environment and ecology; specifically environmental degradation and conservation by ensuring they get the deserved attention from all the stakeholders in Africa and internationally.
Africa Eco News www.africaeconews.co.ke critically looks at environmental degradation, deforestation, pollution, diminishing glaciers and mangrove forests, wildlife and poaching, illegal fishing, support clean energy initiatives and campaigns to phase out fossil fuels, dumping of toxic waste, illegal mining, charcoal trade and impacts of climate change on different sectors of the economy and communities, not only in Africa, but also across the globe.

Name: PORTAL DE SINOP
Description:
O Site portaldesinop.com.br foi criado com o objetivo de ser uma ferramenta para toda sociedade de Sinop e região, dispondo de conteúdo dinâmico e variado, onde o usuário encontra: notícias, guia comercial, classificados grátis, vagas de emprego, agenda de eventos, cobertura de eventos, ensaios fotográficos, entrevistas, agenda de cursos e muito mais. Tornando o Portal um site completo, sendo referência para nossa cidade e região.
Internautas são potenciais formadores de opinião e consumidores de produtos de diversos segmentos de mercado, entre eles: financeiro, automobilístico, alimentício, têxtil, cultural, móveis, eletro-eletrônicos, entre outros. Nosso Site possui ferramentas para aproximar empresas e consumidores, e logo alavancar suas vendas.

Name: La Fringale Culturelle
Description: Magazine de rencontres avec des acteurs de la culture française et internationale.

Name: Stampa Sera
Description: Stampa Sera vuole essere il tuo portale di riferimento su tutto quello che accade nella città di Torino. Cronaca, sport, politica e tutte le ultime notizie a portata di click!

Name: The Daily Athenaeum
Description: West Virginia University's official student newspaper since 1887. For 129 years, The Daily Athenaeum has been the voice of the Mountaineers. It is published Monday-Friday and is the 11th largest circulation newspaper in the state of West Virginia. This newspaper is staffed entirely by students with supervision from a set of six full-time staff employees.

Name: Texarkana Gazette, Inc.
Description: We're not just your local newspaper. We're part of your community.

Name: Plaza Pública
Description:
Plaza Pública es un periódico digital de análisis, investigación y debates, que reivindica los derechos humanos, la democracia y el desarrollo integral sostenible.
Los cinco retos que guiarán nuestras publicaciones periodísticas y los análisis y debates que promoveremos serán: la lucha por la equidad social; la lucha contra la impunidad y la corrupción; la lucha a favor de la interculturalidad y contra toda forma de discriminación; la lucha por la preservación del medio ambiente; y la lucha contra la fragmentación social.
Contribuiremos al ejercicio de un periodismo serio, en profundidad, sin aspiraciones de infalibilidad y con el compromiso de trabajar tesonera y honestamente para buscar la verdad. En esta búsqueda de la verdad ofrecemos balance, contexto y transparencia. 
Queremos ser una plataforma para el diálogo propositivo y crítico entre ciudadanos, y para que los diversos poderes del país expongan sus propuestas y rindan cuenta de sus responsabilidades. Tomamos el nombre de la tradición del ágora griega y de la filosofía social de Jürgen Habermas, quien considera que los medios de comunicación en democracia tienen un insustituible rol de ser plazas públicas, donde los ciudadanos debaten y se fiscalizan entre sí y fiscalizan a los diversos poderes sociales.
Contribuiremos a la formación de la siguiente generación de periodistas, promoviendo los valores en los que creemos para convertirnos en una referencia de periodismo de calidad y de profundidad en la región.

Name: FFF Firenze Fast Forward
Description: A magazine devoted to design and politics in Florence, Italy.

Name: El Botiquín Natural
Description: El Botiquín Natural es el informativo mensual independiente y gratuito de divulgación de las terapias naturales. Cada mes puedes encontrar El Botiquín Natural en formato impreso en más de 5.000 puntos de venta y farmacias.

Name: The HBCU Advocate
Description: The HBCU Advocate is a monthly publication with a circulation that reaches across the country and throughout the world. Our distribution locations include high schools, Historically Black Colleges and Universities, HBCU alumni, online, special events and more. We feature HBCUs, HBCU alumni, faculty and students. Our mission is to support HBCUs in every way possible because our future depends on it.

Name: Packaging Industry Research
Description: Welcome to our Packaging Industry Research page, your ultimate resource for the latest trends, technologies, and insights in the packaging sector. Dive deep into market analysis to understand growth forecasts and competitive landscapes, and explore sustainable packaging solutions with eco-friendly materials and innovative recycling technologies. Stay updated on technological advancements such as smart packaging, automation, and digital printing, and gain insights into the latest developments in packaging materials, from bioplastics to flexible composites. Understand evolving consumer preferences, navigate global regulations, and learn from detailed case studies showcasing successful strategies. Our regularly updated research provides expert recommendations and strategic insights, ensuring you have the most current information to stay competitive and informed in the dynamic world of packaging. Explore our comprehensive resources to innovate, comply with regulations, and understand market dynamics, equipping you with the knowledge and tools for success.

Name: Dharitri Newspaper Oriya Daily
Description:
The Oriya daily Dharitri was started on November 24 1974 by the Samajbadi Society from Bhubaneswar, the capital city of Orissa, India. During 1986, Dharitri started web offset printing. The real growth of Dharitri started during late eighties and early nineties. This is the only newspaper of Orissa which caters to both urban and rural, young and upwardly mobile readers and also to the cream population of Orissa. This is the reason for which Dharitri is both quantitatively and qualitatively No.1 not only in the capital city of Bhubaneswar but also in a majority of the districts and towns of the state. Dharitri is, today, the largest daily in Cuttack from where the oldest newspaper of the state emanates. Dharitri is the only newspaper in Orissa which provides different special feature pages to its readers, such as:
Monday        :  "Health and Science"
Tuesday        : "Nari" the special page for women carrying articles on social problems, modelling and fashion designing, beauty care, health, education & civil rights
Wednesday   :  "Krushi Jeevan" a special page on agriculture
Thursday      :  "Vichitra" page on entertainment and film and "Yuva Dharitri" page for the youth and the young
Friday          : "Krida" - page on sports
Saturday      : "Pilanka Dharitri" the special page for children.
Sunday         :  Chhutidina
Tuesday to Friday & Sunday : Buisness Page
Fortnight : Automobile Page
Everyday : Metro Page & Phoorsat page
With all these packages, Dharitri has got an additional feature to make itself even more special and that is the bilingual business page everyday except Sunday. This page has created a sizable readership within the non Oriya reading community residing in Orissa. Due to these attractive features, Dharitri has achieved 150% readership growth as seen in the National Readership Survey( NRS) VI, which is the highest in the country. Being the only neutral publication in the State, Dharitri enjoys the trust and confidence of the people of Orissa.

Name: Daily The Nation
Description:
The Nation is a daily newspaper, in print and online, that publishes news updates and editorials on issues related to Pakistan. It is published in five editions daily from three stations: Lahore, Karachi, and Islamabad.

Apart from the main news events on the outside pages, the newspaper provides separate sections for city, national, sports, foreign, and commerce news. It provides a special daily feature section, The Nation Plus, which covers the world of glamour, showbiz, entertainment, performing arts and literature; a special Young Nation section for the younger readers; and a special Log On section for those interested in IT, whether rank new beginners or hardcore professionals.

The Nation has a separate On Campus edition for the new generation of Pakistanis, while its Sunday package comprises the Review: covers politics and society; a special section on the environment and science; Life: covers lifestyles, social issues, leisure hobbies, and travel; and Style: covers the world of film and fashion.

The Nation is published in Lahore, Pakistan. It is a part of the Nawaiwaqt Group, a Pakistani media company founded in 1940.

Name: Make Announce
Description: MAKE ANNOUNCE is a platform that helps you in building your portfolio for your work. Over here, we are ready to give you an identity as a writer and giving you a platform to meet your readers. Make announce is not restricted to a single niche. Over here we have diversity for our readers to find out the best and latest topic for themselves and keep the knowledge up to date.

Name: FSView & Florida Flambeau
Description:
The independent student newspaper at The Florida State University. Currently, the FSView & Florida Flambeau publishes twice a week. 25,000 copies are printed and distributed to over 475 sites around Tallahassee, making us the sixth-highest circulated college newspaper in the nation, and No. 1 in terms of newspaper sites. We also have the third-highest ratio of newspapers per student in the nation.
The FSView & Florida Flambeau is owned by Gannett Co.

Name: ECO Nord Isere
Description:
Les publications ECO, c’est l’actualité économique en Haute-Savoie (74), en Savoie (73), dans l’Ain (01), le Nord Isère (38), mais aussi en Suisse (canton de Genève). Plus qu’un média, nous sommes un outil de travail au service des acteurs économiques de nos régions. Le but ? Vous permettre de mieux comprendre le monde économique qui nous entoure.

L’ensemble des publications ECO Savoie Mont Blanc, ECO de l’Ain, Le Courrier Liberté (ECO Nord-Isère), l’Extension (Genève), ActivMag et Agence ECO se réunissent sous une seule et même marque : LE GROUPE ECOMEDIA. Attention, décodage immédiat !

Name: The Triangle Tribune
Description:
The Triangle Tribune newspaper is a division of The Charlotte Post Publishing Company, Inc. 

TCPPC has served as a dominant force in providing a print media outlet designed to power, enlighten and impact the Africa American communities throughout our 7 county distribution areas.

North Carolina's only Sunday weekly newspaper specifically targets the African- American market serving the Raleigh, Durham, Chapel Hill and Cary area.

Our Mission:

A print media platform that gives voice to the African American market through in-depth news coverage and information, relevant editorial content, general and special interest stories, and support of minority initiatives and issues that affect our community.

Serve as a direct link for advertisers to effectively and connect with the African American market, establish a rapport by investing into African American targeted forms of media, and appeal to the lucrative buying power of African American consumers.

Name: The Heritage Post
Description: The Heritage Post is a men's magazine with a focus on quality, individuality with a special vintage inspired style. We are based in Düsseldorf, Germany.

Paigam-E-Jagat takes immense pride in being your go-to news channel. Our mission is to deliver accurate, timely, and comprehensive information on all the latest happenings worldwide.

Join us as we continue to provide unparalleled insights and keep you updated on everything that matters!

Name: BARTAMAN PRIVATE LIMITED

The newspaper is published from Kolkata, West Bengal, India. The company also owns and operates the website bartamanpatrika.com, which serves as an online platform for the newspaper. The organization was started by a working journalist named Barun Sengupta. Bartaman Pvt. Ltd is recognized for its innovative and transparent approach in the field of journalism.

Description: The newsletter that aims to give the readers a weekly recap on the major events going on in the Nigerian Business World.

Name: Influencereffect.se
Description:
Om oss: Influencereffect.se – Oberoende nyheter och verktyg för dig som jobbar med marknad och är intresserad av influencer marketing.
Vi är mer än bara en nyhetstjänst, vi är en kunskapshub för alla som arbetar med eller är nyfikna på influencer marketing. Utifrån marknadschefens behov bevakar vi hela industrin och lyfter fram goda exempel och guidar dig som läsare genom utmaningar och servar dig med verktyg som listningar över marknadens aktörer. Kort sagt, vi vill hjälpa dig som marknadsförare att bli framgångsrik och navigera rätt i ett ständigt föränderligt affärslandskap inom influencer marketing.

Vår expertis bygger på en unik kombination av erfarenheter, inklusive att vara influencers själva, ha arbetat som marknadschefer och varit köpare av influencer marketing. Utöver det har vi ett brinnande intresse för denna spännande bransch! Name: Diario La Unión
Description:
Nacido en 1897 en Lomas de Zamora, el Diario La Unión es el quinto en circulación más antiguo de Argentina. Desde entonces, difunde noticias nacionales y regionales, pero sobre todo lomenses. 
En esos años, protagonizó coberturas memorables de más de un siglo de historia, como la llegada del hombre a la Luna, el asesinato de John F. Kennedy, el comienzo y el fin de la Primera y de la Segunda Guerra Mundial junto al desmoronamiento del nazismo, la llegada al poder de Juan Domingo Perón y su fallecimiento, la asunción de Raúl Ricardo Alfonsín tras la vuelta de la democracia, el plebiscito sobre Chile, y los festejos por los 100 y los 200 años de la Patria. La Unión estuvo presente en los dos. 

A nivel local, por ejemplo, La Unión hizo tapa para sus lectores la puesta en funcionamiento del Hospital Gandulfo el 9 de julio de 1906 y la fundación de la Universidad Nacional de Lomas, en 1972. También realizó la cobertura de hechos trágicos, entre ellos, la Masacre de Pasco durante el gobierno de Isabel Perón, el crimen del poeta Sergio Schiavini en el Café Dalí, la muerte de tres jóvenes en Budge a manos de la Policía o el asesinato a sangre fría del futbolista Félix Orte en la puerta de su casa. En sus páginas, se publicaron todos los detalles de la primera Caravana de los Reyes Magos por Lomas, en 1931, que entregaron juguetes para los chicos, tal como lo siguen haciendo hoy. 

Actualmente, el gran desafío de La Unión es estar a la altura de la innovación tecnológica y de una sociedad cada vez más digital, y convertir esos desafíos en oportunidades, lo que nos lleva a plantear escenarios de proyección y transformación permanentes. 

Los invitamos a leernos también en www.launion.com.ar, que cuenta con un acceso directo para celulares, y a través de las redes sociales Facebook, Instagram, Twitter y Tik Tok.

Description:
طالب يمني:
مبادرة تطوعية جاءت من الوسط الطلابي والأكاديمي بهدف نقاش قضايا الطلبة والتعبير عن تطلعاتهم وآمالهم.
رسالتنا: نسعى لأن تكون منصة طالب يمني الصوت المسموع للطلبة اليمنيين.
من أهدافنا:
1. إثارة النقاش حول القضايا التي تهم الطلبة في الفضاءات المدرسية والجامعية.
2. نقل قصص النجاح وإلهام الطلبة من خلالها.
3. نشر ومشاركة فرص التعليم والتدريب المحلية والدولية.
4. تعريف الطلبة بالمهارات الأساسية والرقمية وتعزيز ثقافة الأونلاين في التعليم.
5. تسليط الضوء على المبادرات في الفضاءات المدرسية والجامعية وتحفيز الطلبة على المشاركة المدنية والمجتمعية.
6. تشجيع الطلبة على حرية التعبير.
7. مناصرة الطلبة في الفضاء العام والمساهمة في توصيل صوتهم إلى الجهات المعنية.
8. تحفيز الطلبة من المناطق والفئات المهمشة نحو التعليم وأن التعليم هو مفتاح التمثيل والتمكين في إدارة الشؤون العامة.
9. دعم تعليم الفتاة ولاسيما الفتاة الريفية.
10. توفير فرص تدريبية لطلبة الإعلام من مختلف الجامعات ضمن فريق طالب يمني.

Sintam-se em casa, porque a cidade é sua, nossa.

Gazeta  została stworzona przez Justynę Szawłowską , która z niechęci do  bycia trybikiem w korpo  wpadła na pomysł uruchomienia własnego biznesu.  Kilka lat pracy w największym zagłębiu biurowym przy ul. Domaniewskiej dało jej doświadczenie i własne zdanie na temat korpo. Po sukcesie pierwszej stworzonej przez siebie gazety wydawanej w Warszawie, postanowiła pod nowym tytułem “Korpo Voice” samodzielnie kontynuować projekt i rozszerzyć dystrybucję gazety na kolejne miasta. Dziś wciela się zatem w rolę wydawcy i reaktor naczelnej,  samodzielnie zarządzając całą gazetą.  

 Korpo Voice poza działalnością redakcyjną uruchomiło również dział organizacji wyjazdów dla czytelników. Na przełomie października i listopada odbył się pierwszy wyjazd weekendowy na mazury pod hasłem " Kopo Woman na Chilloucie".  W planie kolejne edycje oraz zimowy wypad narciarski w Alpy.

Name: Current Affairs Times
Description:
Founded in 2020, the Current Affairs Times is a small team of passionate journalists and editors working to make media access widely available to the public. It seeks to report the news weekly in a clear, professional way.

Our mission is to report the news objectively, concisely, and clearly. We don’t just focus on objectivity—we have the right tools to select our stories among hundreds of topics, without compromising on fact-checking. 

Our topics are stories that ring true from injustices, political strategies, personal experiences, and stories that truly deserve to be exposed in an unbiased manner. We are committed to finding stories that are uplifting and educative. We are particularly interested in politics, finance, international news, sports, wellness, and travel content. We also focus on investigative stories that deal with political and financial accountability. Our editors are interested in covering stories and not just relaying them. We strive to report constructively with compassion, intelligence, teamwork, and collaboration.

Team Current Affairs Times is committed to getting more diverse voices into our coverage. Our team is unified in decision-making across our newsroom while telling our readers what to expect. We hold ourselves accountable for the information we publish and write with great integrity. Our collaborative values guide us every day. We want to strengthen journalism and foster a healthy news culture. Our core values include – unbiased stories, integrity, collaboration, teamwork, respect, presentation of facts, and building opportunities.

Through the Current Affairs Times’ international reach, it also aims to help small, local businesses reach their target advertising audiences by providing affordable advertising packages. If you are interested in advertising with us, click here to get in touch.

El Diari del Vallès s'edita en paper tots els divendres, amb una audiència de 27.500 lectors/es en l’actualitat i, durant l’any, augmentant la tirada per a totes les poblacions del Vallès fins arribar als 30.000 exemplars per edició.

La segmentació dels 899.532 habitants serà la mateixa que fins ara: les 3 ciutats amb més de 75.000 habitants tindran secció fixa i, les altres 20 ciutats aniran inserides a la secció Vallès. El suplement VALLÈSeconòmic sortirà cada edició i, el suplement OCIvallès, un cop cada mes.
Les columnes dels experts en la matèria seguiran creixent segons les demandes del moment i, el mateix amb els reportatges de la ciutats, empreses i persones de renom, alcaldes, empresaris representatius o directius destacats que siguin entrevistats amb la nostra acreditada professionalitat.

Name: Philadelphia City Paper
Description:
Philadelphia City Paper is a prize-winning alternative weekly newspaper that publishes fresh perspectives on local news, arts, music, movies and food. The paper is free and publishes every Thursday in print and daily online at citypaper.net. Staff reporters focus on labor issues, politics, education and poverty. Critics review the city’s arts, entertainment, literary and restaurant scene. Listings of concerts, art exhibits, dance performances and other events are carried in the paper and in a comprehensive online events calendar. A popular weekly feature, the I LoveYou/IHate You column, is a distinctive collection of reader-submitted musings and rants on the frustrations and small victories of city life.

The publication was established in November 1981 as a spinoff of the now defunct WXPN Express newsletter. Philadelphia City Paper distributes 70,000 copies in more than 2,000 locations throughout Philadelphia, its Pennsylvania suburbs and South Jersey. It is the most-read weekly in Pennsylvania. Its signature orange-colored boxes and wire racks can be found in more than 2,000 high-traffic areas in Center City Philadelphia, in cafes, small businesses and on many university campuses.

Each year, City Paper publishes a City Guide that is a handy resource for college students and new residents, providing information about music venues, restaurants, shopping, transportation and the city’s history.

It’s a different approach, but it is one that works. Our team will explore the best ways to showcase your business, establish your return on investment, and work towards successful and measurable results. We don’t simply ‘sell space’ - we are an extension of your marketing, and offer a fully bespoke service to blend editorial, digital presence and key message promotion to your target audience. 

Our B2B Business Networking Events will be select and highly-focused, with prequalification and no time-wasters. They offer the chance to invite your own VIP clients to meet and mingle with other advertisers’ clients in convivial and luxurious surroundings: a unique B2C opportunity.

Name: Le Journal des psychologues
Description:
Le Journal des psychologues s’adresse à l’ensemble des professionnels de la psychologie, quels que soient leur domaine d’activité ou leur parcours : praticiens, universitaires, étudiants, praticiens-chercheurs, ainsi qu’à tous ceux dont la pratique intègre une dimension psychologique. 

Créé en 1982 par des psychologues désireux de fédérer la profession autour d’une revue émanant de ses propres acteurs, il s’est voulu d’emblée différent des publications scientifiques spécialisées comme des simples revues de vulgarisation. Son ambition : fournir l’information essentielle à une profession en mouvement, consolider l’identité d’un métier multiforme et nourrir sa cohérence autour de « fondamentaux » partagés.

Lieu d’échanges, de réflexion et de débats, le Journal permet à la profession de se reconnaître, de revisiter son histoire, mais aussi de questionner ses pratiques, ses aspirations et ses évolutions. Il constitue une source de formation continue en confrontant les pratiques, en proposant des éclairages théoriques et en ouvrant de nouveaux axes de recherche.

La revue aborde l’ensemble des disciplines de la psychologie à travers des articles et rubriques variés, ainsi qu’un dossier central qui, à chaque numéro, explore un thème majeur ou une question cruciale. Sans prétendre à l’exhaustivité, ces dossiers invitent à la réflexion et au débat. Aucun point de vue n’est écarté : la seule exigence est l’intérêt du sujet, sa clarté et sa rigueur professionnelle.

Le Journal accorde aussi une place importante à la recherche et à l’Université, valorise les travaux étudiants et propose des repères pratiques : sélection critique d’ouvrages et de revues, agenda des principales manifestations et congrès. Son indépendance vis-à-vis de toute organisation syndicale ou professionnelle garantit l’objectivité de l’information, la sincérité des prises de position et la pluralité des regards.

Enfin, il offre un espace où chacun peut partager son expérience et son point de vue.

Name: The Georgetown Voice
Description:
The Georgetown Voice is Georgetown University’s premiere, student-run newsmagazine, with commentary and coverage on news, arts, and sports. Our alumni have gone on to work at The New York Times, The Washington Post, The New Yorker, The Atlantic, NPR, NBC, FiveThirtyEight, SportsIllustrated, Vulture, POLITICO, The Huffington Post, and several other news organizations.

The Voice was founded in 1969 by former editors from The Hoya who objected to that paper’s refusal at the time to cover the Vietnam War and off-campus issues affecting students. The paper’s debut editorial on March 4, 1969, explained the paper’s goals and mission:

"Our editorial policy will view and analyze issues in a liberal light. We shall not limit our editorial content to campus topics. We promise to present and analyze national and local issues of concern to the student, whose concern should spread beyond the campus. We shall attempt with all our energy to inform the community, to make the community conscious of controversial subjects by an open presentation and discussion of relevant issues, to communicate a culture, and to entertain our readers."

While the editorial page explicitly comes from a progressive perspective, news and feature stories take a non-ideological stance and give voice to all sides of the issue. Without exception, the Voice is committed to providing campus with critical journalism that doesn’t defer to those in power.

Like us on Facebook (@TheGeorgetownVoice) and follow us on Twitter (@gtownvoice) and on Instagram (@georgetownvoice).

Email editor@georgetownvoice.com or managing@georgetownvoice.com for questions or inquiries.

Intramuros Agence :

Name: Honi Soit
Description:
Honi Soit is the weekly student newspaper of the University of Sydney. First published in 1929, the paper is produced by an elected editorial team and a select group of reporters sourced from the University's populace. The publication has a circulation of 52,000 and a reach of over 1 million hits online. It is the only weekly student publication in Australia.

UBITENNIS.com ha un database unico al mondo, con dati incrociati su oltre 7000 tornei (1877-2017) e per questo è stato scelto come partner ufficiale dall’ATP, il circuito dei tennisti professionisti per 60 tornei in 30 nazioni.

Description:

AZCIR holds powerful people and institutions accountable by exposing injustice and systemic inequities through investigative journalism.

AZCIR covers state and local government, education, public health, the environment, and public policy issues that impact the lives of Arizona residents. AZCIR publishes content online at AZCIR.org, and through a distribution network of newsrooms in print and on television and radio. AZCIR releases its content under a creative commons license, meaning it’s free for other newsrooms to use with appropriate credit.

AZCIR is funded by individual donors, foundations, fee-for-service revenue from collaborative data work with partner newsrooms, through training and corporate underwriting of events. As a matter of policy, funders exercise no control over AZCIR editorial decisions, and all funders are publicly identified.

Name: The Dong-A Ilbo (동아일보)
Description:
The Dong-A Ilbo is a leading newspaper in Seoul, South Korea, founded and published in 1920. The Dong-A Ilbo has a daily circulation of 1,000,000 copies, targeting opinion leaders along with the general public as its main readers. In all areas of its domain, The Dong-A Ilbo strives to report the truth and with journalistic integrity.

The Dong-A Ilbo is the parent company of The Dong-A Media Group, composed of 16 affiliates including Dong-A Business Review, Sports Dong-A, Dong-A Science, DUNet, and dongA.com. In December 2011, The Dong-A Media Group also added a broadcasting company Channel A, to provide a wide variety of media content with a focus on news, dramas, entertainment variety programs, sports, and more. The Dong-A Ilbo is comprised of approximately 700 employees, and The Dong-A Media Group is comprised of approximately 1500 employees.

As a multiple award-winning newspaper for journalism excellence, The Dong-A Ilbo has garnered critical acclaim domestically, and has gained recognition globally. Along with its partnerships with internationally renowned news organizations such as the Asashi Shimbun of Japan and the People?s Daily of China, the Dong-A Ilbo also has international correspondents stationed in 5 cities worldwide including New York City, Washington D.C., Tokyo, Beijing, and Paris. The Dong-A Ilbo also prints global editions in 90 cities internationally, and provides digital copies in Korean, English, Japanese, and Chinese.

It's up to you whether or not you want to join the trend. NewsRme is an open platform that encourages you to share your thoughts and feelings.

To stay up to date on the latest news, download NewsRme today!

Better knowledge leads to a better life.

Name: IME Egészségügyi vezetők szaklapja / Journal for Healthcare managers

Az IME Innováció Menedzsment Egészségügy – Egészségügyi vezetők szaklapja az egészségügyi szakemberek mindennapi munkáját segítő tudományos folyóirat. 

Az egészségügyi vezetők szaklapja olvasóinak az általános egészségpolitikai kérdésektől az irányítási feladatokon keresztül, a gyakorlati orvosi és klinikai-technikai információkig terjedve széles körű ismereteket közvetít.

Az IME küldetése, hogy a magyar egészségügy vezető szakemberei számára olyan értékes és naprakész szakmai fejlesztésekről és tapasztalatokról közvetítsen, melyek által gazdagodnak és hatékonyabbá válnak gyakorlati ismereteik.

Name: Les Publications du Quartier Libre
Description:
Fondé en 1993, Quartier Libre est le principal journal des étudiants de l’Université de Montréal (UdeM). Organe de diffusion indépendant de la direction de l’UdeM,Quartier Libre est un bimensuel distribué à 6000 exemplaires sur et autour du campus.

Quartier Libre compte sur la collaboration des étudiants de l’UdeM venus de différents domaines d’étude. Il se veut un journal école, un tremplin pour les étudiants qui souhaitent faire carrière en journalisme. Il se donne comme mandat de traiter des sujets du campus de l’UdeM et d’ailleurs, de faire des analyses sur des thèmes de société, nationaux et internationaux et de promouvoir la culture émergente.

Name: The Scholars' Avenue
Description: The Scholars’ Avenue is the independent student-run campus newspaper of the Indian Institute of Technology, Kharagpur. Now in its fifth year, copies of The Scholars’ Avenue are now delivered to over 4000 students on campus and soft copies are mailed to all the faculty and 8,000 odd alumni. The team is drawn entirely from among the students of the institute, and its mission is to report and analyze events that affect the campus, and to be the voice of the IIT Kharagpur student community. We are a non-profit organization supported by sponsorships; independent of, and not endorsed by, the administration of IIT Kharagpur.

Name: Mediehuset iTromsø
Description:
Uavhengig mediehus etablert 24. januar 1898 i Tromsø. 

Mediehuset iTromsø AS er en del av Harstad Tidende Gruppen (HTG) og mediekonsernet Polaris Media. 

Mediehuset har hatt en meget sterk vekst digitalt de siste årene, og har i dag 48.000 daglige lesere på papir og nett. Selskapet sysselsetter i dag cirka 40 personer.

Name: Oslobođenje
Description:
Medijsku grupaciju Oslobođenje čine: dnevni list Oslobođenje, TV stanica O kanal, mjesečni magazin BH Dani, Dječija i omladinska štampa i web portali oslobodjenje.ba, sport1.oslobodjenje.ba, okanal.oslobodjenje.ba i mojabih.oslobodjenje.ba.

Poslovni sistem "Oslobođenje" osnovan je 30. augusta 1943. godine u Donjoj Trnovi kod Bijeljine, kada je štampan prvi broj lista "Oslobođenje". Ipak, tradicija ove kuće seže dalje u prošlost. Još 1866. godine u Sarajevu je osnovana štamparija zanatskog tipa koja, neposredno poslije Drugog svjetskog rata, postaje organizacioni dio novinske kuće "Oslobođenje". Osnovna djelatnost je bila oslonjena na novinsku štampariju, ali je sa godinama polje djelovanja prošireno: osnovana je televizijska kuća Okanal, a svi sadržaji su digitalizirani aktiviranjem web-portala. Za dugogodišnji plodan rad i intenzivan razvoj, kuća "Oslobođenje" dobila je veliki broj kolektivnih nagrada i odlikovanja, ali i individualnih priznanja za svoje novinare i novinarke: Nagrada evropskih rektora za borbu protiv ksenofobije, Nagrada za dostignuća u novinarstvu agencije Inter Press Service, Međunarodna nagrada za slobodu štampe (1995.), Nagrada za ljudska prava „Saharov“ (1995.), Nagrada fondacije Alfons Kamin (1993.), Nagrada Oskar Romero (1993.), Nagrada List godine u Velikoj Britaniji (1992.), Nagrada za najbolju novinu u SFRJ (1989.), Orden rada sa crvenom zastavom (1983.), Nagrada ZAVNOBiH (1978.), Nagrada Zlatni Merkur (1977.), Orden bratstva i jedinstva sa zlatnim vijencom (1963.)... U jeku ratnih dešavanja, dnevni list Oslobođenje isprintan je u rekordnih 21.8 miliona primjeraka (16. septembar 1993.), zahvaljujući planetarnoj solidarnosti kolega.

"Oslobođenje" je u regiji i svijetu prepoznatljivo ime jer je renomirana bosanskohercegovačka medijska kuća koja je opstala, uprkos posljednjem ratu u BiH (’92.-95.) i raznim drugim pritiscima, zahvaljujući entuzijazmu i privrženosti zaposlenih. Zahvaljujući organizacionim, menadžerskim, poduzetničkim i drugi

Name: Yorkshire Times
Description:
The online Yorkshire newspaper for Yorkshire people and by Yorkshire people. We're liberal with a small L, environmentally friendly - but we cook our lentils. We're not misogynistic, racist, ageist, sexist, bigoted, arrogant or self-righteous - except when we're right of course.

We make a serious attempt to do 'the right thing' - whatever that means in any absolute sense - and we try to get through life by illuminating the facts rather than destroying the players.

We're massive fans of Yorkshire and we hope that our paper will reveal some of the enormous depth and breadth of talent across our county.

We very much hope you like our style of presentation and our editorial position but we're open to criticism.

Please feel free to contact us about any matter by emailing editor@yorkshiretimes.co.uk
