Name: Neos Magazine
Description:
Neos è un think magazine nato con lo scopo di analizzare la situazione politica ed economica attuale.
È creato e gestito da studenti universitari che, utilizzando gli strumenti acquisiti lungo il loro percorso accademico, vogliono offrire un punto di vista giovane e dinamico, ma anche tecnico e meticoloso.

Ispirati dal principio "conoscere per deliberare", studenti da università di tutta Italia si riuniscono così su Neos per costruire una nuova opinione, e per indagare in profondità la realtà che ci circonda.

Name: Wydawnictwo Czasopism i Książek Technicznych SIGMA-NOT Sp. z o.o.
Description:
Wydawnictwo SIGMA-NOT, należące do Federacji Stowarzyszeń Naukowo-Technicznych - Naczelnej Organizacji Technicznej, to największy polski wydawca prasy fachowej o ukierunkowaniu technicznym. Jako zorganizowana oficyna działa od 1949 r., a najstarszy wydawany tytuł - „Przegląd Techniczny” - liczy sobie ponad150 lat.

W portfolio Wydawnictwa SIGMA-NOT znajdują się obecnie 32 unikalne tytuły prasy fachowej. Czasopisma te działają na wielu płaszczyznach i są skierowane do wszystkich zainteresowanych tematami naukowo-technicznymi zarówno zawodowo, jak i czysto hobbystycznie, poszerzając ich kulturę techniczną. Czyta je miesięcznie ponad 200 tys. osób, które mogą w nich odnaleźć interesujące ich artykuły o nowinkach technicznych, najświeższych osiągnięciach naukowych, popularnych problemach w danej dziedzinie, a także analizy rynku, komentarze do bieżących wydarzeń gospodarczych oraz relacje z imprez i konferencji naukowo-technicznych.

Ofertę Wydawnictwa poszerzają publikacje książkowe; obecnie w sprzedaży jest pozycja książkowa „22 zadania służby BHP – standardy działania” autorstwa Lesława Zielińskiego oraz "ADR, REACH, CLP Niebezpieczne Chemikalia Poradnik" Bolesława Hancyka.

Wszystkie artykuły opublikowane w czasopismach SIGMA-NOT począwszy od 2004 roku dostępne są także w wersji elektronicznej na Portalu Informacji Technicznej www.sigma-not.pl, który przeglądają Państwo w tej chwili. Każdy artykuł można kupić poprzez e-płatności, lub posługując się tradycyjnym przelewem, a także w ramach dostępu do „Portalu Informacji Technicznej”. Prenumeratorzy czasopism w wersji PLUS mogą korzystać za pośrednictwem „Portalu Informacji Technicznej” z bazy artykułów zaprenumerowanego tytułu bez ograniczeń.

Wydawnictwo SIGMA-NOT ma w swoich strukturach Drukarnię oraz Zakład Kolportażu, które świadczą także usługi klientom zewnętrznym.

Name: Dublin Gazette Newspaper
Description: The Dublin Gazette is Dublin's leading free newspaper, published every Thursday, providing comprehensive coverage of the greater Dublin area. Known for its local news, sport and entertainment coverage, the Dublin Gazette serves as a critical source of information for Dublin residents. Name: Salto Mag
Description:
Salto Mag le premier magazine éducatif et gratuit dédié au sport de vos enfants !

Créé en 2017 par Frédérique Bangué, ancienne athlète de haut niveau, Salto Mag a pour vocation d’orienter au mieux les parents dans la pratique sportive de leurs enfants. 
Il aborde toutes les facettes du sport chez les jeunes : 

- Sport compétition, 
- Sport loisirs & santé, 
- Sport & scolarité,
- Et Salto Kidz.

A travers un registre pédagogique, et par le biais de témoignages de parents, d’enfants, d’interviews de champions et sans oublier de conseils d’experts, Salto vous embarque à la découverte des dessous du sport !

Bien plus qu’un magazine, Salto Mag est un univers comprenant : 
- Des contenus rédactionnels, photos et vidéo,
- L'élaboration de programmes pour chaînes YouTube,
- Des conférences et des animations d’événements.

L’offre de Salto permet aux marques de se différencier sur leur communication autour des valeurs du sport.

Clubs sportifs & groupes scolaires, abonnez-vous et offrez gratuitement Salto Mag à vos licenciés & élèves ! 
Si vous êtes particulier, commandez également gratuitement (sous conditions). 
Toutes les informations sur : www.saltomag.com

Name: Columbia Basin Bulletin
Description:
Since 1997, The Columbia Basin Bulletin has kept readers informed about significant developments related to salmon and steelhead recovery and other important Columbia/Snake River Basin fish and wildlife issues. Find us at https://columbiabasinbulletin.org/. 

Since 2018, the Columbia Basin Bulletin has been 100% subscriber-supported. We encourage anyone who is concerned about the health of the Columbia and Snake River watersheds and associated fish, wildlife and environmental issues to subscribe and support us in our mission.

We believe it is important stakeholders continue to have access to complete, fair and independent news coverage of the key developments in fish and wildlife policymaking, litigation, research, river operations, harvest management, fish passage, habitat restoration and much more.

We urge you to consider becoming a Columbia Basin Bulletin Member. Your membership will allow us to continue reporting the important details of Columbia Basin salmon and steelhead recovery and other fish and wildlife issues, and maintain the historical record through the Columbia Basin Bulletin Archives.

The Columbia Basin Bulletin offers a free newsletter, delivered by e-mail to subscribers interested in timely, straightforward, complete news about Basin fish and wildlife issues. The newsletter will keep you posted on the important stories published on the website. If not already a subscriber, please consider signing up with the sign up box on the home page.

The Columbia Basin Bulletin website (https://columbiabasinbulletin.org/) offers key news and information about Columbia/Snake River Basin fish and wildlife issues, along with complete Archives reaching back to 1997. The Columbia Basin Bulletin Archive is the most complete news record and background of Columbia/Snake River Basin salmon recovery and natural resource issues available anywhere.

The Columbia Basin Bulletin is published independently by AA Progressive, LLC, headquartered in Tacoma, Washington.

PGP (Les Publications Grand Public) est une filiale du groupe Reworld Média qui édite notamment les revues Science & Vie, Auto Plus, Closer, Pleine Vie, Nous Deux, Dr Good… visitez notre site de vente en ligne de nos magazines.

PGP édite et distribue ses magazines depuis plus de 35 ans principalement en Hyper et Supermarchés.



Nous travaillons aujourd'hui avec plus de 5200 points de vente en France, Belgique et Luxembourg.

Tous les ans nous gérons l’édition, l’impression, la livraison et la commercialisation de plus de 140 titres dont le magazine de cuisine le plus vendu en Europe : Gourmand. 

Nos imprimeurs sont certifiés Imp’vert, FSC et PEFC et tous les papiers que nous choisissons ont la certification PEFC (Protection et gestion durable des forêts).

Nous accompagnons également certains clients dans la production de contenu print (magazines, carnets, livrets, etc.)

Enfin nous donnons l'opportunité aux annonceurs de communiquer sur les couvertures de certains de nos magazines qui bénéficient d'une exposition unique en magasin.

En 2021, PGP a complété sa gamme de magazines en devant de caisse par une collection complète de presse Ludique (Sudoku, Mots Fléchés…) : la collection Cogite.

Leclerc, Casino, Géant, Cora, Intermarché, Match, Monoprix, Market, Carrefour, Système U

Name: Colac Herald
Description:
The award-winning Colac Herald is Colac and district’s newspaper of choice, overflowing with local news, sport and advertising.
Produced by a dedicated team based in Colac, the Colac Herald arrives each Monday, Wednesday and Friday with the district’s most up-to-date and in-depth news and sports reports and advertising that’s a proven winner.
A newspaper created for Colac and district by people who make Colac and district their home, the Colac Herald continues a tradition dating back 159 years to the launch of the Colac Observer in 1866.
The Colac Herald rolled off the presses in 1868 and absorbed the Observer in 1874.
Other newspapers have come and gone during the Colac Herald’s history but the Herald has stood the test of time and proudly continues to serve Colac and district as one of the few truly independent media outlets remaining in Australia.
The Colac Herald is much more than simply words and pictures and has won a string of international, national and state awards, including the Victorian Country Press Association’s Overall Newspaper Excellence Award.
The journalism, photography and advertising awards which fill the Herald’s bulging trophy cabinet are proof that the Colac Herald is a shining light in regional Victoria’s media industry.
You’ll find the Colac Herald at 37-41 Bromfield Street, Colac,. Give us a call on 03 5231 5322,

Name: The Gray Matter
Description:
Welcome to The Gray Matter, your premier source for expert-driven health journalism. We are a team of seasoned health professionals and journalists dedicated to delivering authoritative and insightful articles to our readers.

Our Mission:

At The Gray Matter, we are on a mission to provide our readers with the highest caliber of health information. We believe that well-researched and expertly written articles can empower individuals to take control of their health and well-being. Our commitment is to be a trusted resource for accurate, evidence-based, and up-to-date health content.

What Sets Us Apart:
1. Expert Contributors: Our articles are crafted by a team of experts in the field, including medical professionals, researchers, and specialists. Their expertise ensures that our content is not only informative but also reliable.

2. In-Depth Analysis: We go beyond the surface to deliver in-depth analysis and insights into various health topics. Whether it's the latest medical advancements, wellness trends, or lifestyle choices, our articles provide a comprehensive understanding.

3. Reader Education: In addition to reporting the news, we prioritize reader education. Our goal is to demystify complex health concepts, making them accessible to a wide audience. We believe that an informed reader is an empowered reader.

Connect with Our Experts:
Engage with our expert contributors and dive into meaningful discussions on LinkedIn. Follow The Gray Matter for articles authored by our experts, covering a spectrum of health-related subjects. We encourage questions, feedback, and an interactive exchange of knowledge.

Your Source for Expert Health Insights:
When you choose The Gray Matter, you are choosing a source that values expertise, accuracy, and the well-being of its readers. Join us in navigating the ever-evolving landscape of health with confidence and knowledge.

Name: מגזין אפוק - Epoch Magazine
Description:
מגזין אפוק הוא המגזין המוביל בישראל לתוכן איכותי ומעורר מחשבה.

המגזין מציע מדי חודש כתבות מרחיבות דעת, מעוררות מחשבה ועשירות בתוכן מהארץ ומהעולם, במגוון נושאים: גיאו-פוליטיקה, פילוסופיה, פסיכולוגיה, מדע, חברה ותרבות.

המגזין בוחן את המגמות המשפיעות על חיינו, מנסה להבין את התמונה הרחבה ולגלות את הנקודות היוצרות אותה. הוא נבדל מעיתונים ומגזינים אחרים במקוריות, בעומק שלו ובקו הערכי-מוסרי, ולכן קוראים אותו מדי חודש אלפי מנויים, ביניהם מנהיגים בקהילה העסקית, בפוליטיקה, וכן מדענים ואנשי רוח.

Name: Herald-Mail Media
Description:
Herald-Mail Media is a newspaper and communications company owned by Schurz Communications, a family-owner, multi-media company based in South Bend/Mishawaka, Indiana. 

Founded: The Morning Herald was the first daily newspaper in Hagerstown, beginning publication in 1873. The Mail converted to daily in 1890. The two newspapers merged in 1920 and were purchased by Schurz Communications in 1960. The Daily Mail, published in the afternoon, and The Morning Herald were merged into one morning paper, The Herald-Mail, in October 2007. The Herald-Mail newspaper is published daily Monday through Sunday.

Herald Mail Media has an array of daily, weekly, monthly and quarterly publications, websites and social media platforms that bring news and information to the community covering Washington County, MD, parts of Franklin County, PA, and the Eastern Panhandle of West Virginia.

Circulation Area: Hagerstown is located in Western Maryland. About 20% of our newspaper readership is in Pennsylvania and West Virginia. The newspaper is distributed in all three states, with the most circulation in Maryland.

Customers: More customers rely on The Herald-Mail as the primary source of advertising information for every major category than all other media combined in the Hagerstown market area.

The Washington County Market: According to the Hagerstown-Washington County Economic Development Commission there are 3,550 businesses in the county including manufacturers, financial services and distribution companies. The distribution of employment by industry: 25% in trade, transportation and utilities; 14% in education and health services; 12% in manufacturing; and 10% in financial services. Hagerstown-Washington County is one of the top tourism destinations in Maryland, with Antietam National Battlefield drawing tourists from around the world and Prime Outlets attracting shoppers from throughout the Mid-Atlantic region.

Key Executives: Andy Bruns, president and publisher; Jake Womer, executive editor; Brittney Hamilton, advertising director; Kim Reno, controller; Liz Thompson, digital director; Brian Tedrick, circulation director.
Online

heraldmailmedia.com
heraldmailmedia.com is the online site for The Herald-Mail newspaper. The site is the most viewed, up-to-the-minute source of local information for the Herald Mail coverage area and includes information on regional and national news, entertainment, sports, business, weather, shopping, as well as videos, photos and readers comments.

Average Monthly Statistics: 2.6 million page views; 550,000 unique visitors

Social Media
Herald Mail Media has several social media sites on Facebook, Twitter and Instagram, connecting with and liked by about 75,000 people.

Name: Toronto Standard
Description:
Toronto Standard Media Company Limited 
Owns and operates media brands. The flagship media property is a digital newspaper: TorontoStandard.com 
The brand was established in 1848 and is now a daily digital briefing on the life of the city. 
Toronto Standard also operates Daily Cable and Daily Cable TV, featured brands within the site.

Name: The Pioneer
Description:
The Pioneer was founded in Allahabad in 1865 by George Allen, an Englishman who ran a tea business but whose sharp mind ensured the newspaper exercised great influence in British India. Since 1865, The Pioneer has been at the forefront of Indian journalism, shaping public opinion and delivering trusted content. With a legacy of 160 years, The Pioneer stands as a symbol of journalistic excellence, offering unparalleled reach and credibility.

The Pioneer group, owned by CMYK Printech Limited, has inherited a rich tradition of journalism and is carrying on the same pursuit of excellence for today's times. The Pioneer is one of the oldest national papers in the country, a heritage that we are proud to have been entrusted with, and one we are synchronising with modern readership. At a time when information and knowledge are a flood on digital platforms, The Pioneer stands apart, offering views rather than news, generating diverse opinions, encouraging analysis, making sense of the noise, and fostering independent thoughts and implementable solutions for the great Indian conundrum.

The newspaper has been the first national paper to introduce colour editions, revolutionise layouts, conceptualise a separate Sunday edition, and develop its news website with live updates. Over the years, the paper diversified into other media platforms and opened a magazine and book division.

The Pioneer lives up to its masthead. Throughout our years in Delhi, we have broken stories like the fodder scam, the 2G scam, and found newer sub-plots in the coal scam. Not only that, Sir Winston Churchill was The Pioneer's war correspondent, while author Rudyard Kipling (1865-1936), in his early 20s, worked at the newspaper office in Allahabad as an assistant editor from November 1887 to March 1889.

Name: The Appalachian student news
Description:
The Appalachian has been Appalachian State University’s independent student-run news organization since 1934. We publish a print publication monthly, and send out twice weekly email newsletters during the regular academic year. We are the recipient of the ACP Pacemaker Award, the CMA Pinnacle Award and the NC College Media Association Best of Show award.

Mission:

The Appalachian, a student-run publication at Appalachian State University, strives to provide fair and accurate news for the campus community; to inform, entertain and create a forum for ideas; to provide an outlet for readers’ opinions; to be a champion for student, faculty, staff, and community interests; and to remain editorially independent, by exercising and ensuring the First Amendment rights of students, faculty, staff and the broader community.

Name: MobiliCites.com / Transport Public
Description:
Groupe de presse spécialisé dans la mobilité des personnes - Transport public et nouvelles mobilités -
Transport Public est un mensuel papier
MobiliCités.com est un portail internet diffusant une information quotidienne

Name: CRIMINOLOGIE ET DE POLICE
Description: La revue comprend des articles concernant la physique, l'Astrophysique, l'Astronomie, l'Espace, la Météorologie, l'Electronique, l'Horlogerie ainsi que la vie des entreprises.

Name: Dossier
Description:
Unsere Recherchen handeln von Korruption in Politik und Wirtschaft, von der Ausbeutung Schwächerer, vom Missbrauch durch Stärkere, vom Versagen Einzelner und ganzer Systeme. Wir greifen Themen von öffentlichem Interesse auf, recherchieren diese umfassend und stellen sie übersichtlich und ausgewogen dar. Unsere Artikel erscheinen frei zugänglich auf unserer Website und in Medien unserer Kooperationspartner. DOSSIER verbindet bewährtes journalistisches Handwerk mit modernen, multimedialen Zugängen – in der Recherche, der Analyse und Darstellung von Daten und bei der Aufbereitung von Geschichten.

Was uns antreibt

Hinter der Idee, DOSSIER zu gründen, steht die Erkenntnis, dass Recherchen, die tief gehen, die Zeit brauchen, die Themen und Sachverhalte gründlich untersuchen, immer seltener werden. Ökonomische Zwänge verhindern in zu vielen Fällen, dass Journalistinnen und Journalisten jene Ressourcen bekommen, die sie für ihre Arbeit brauchen: Zeit, Geld und Unabhängigkeit. Auf der Strecke bleiben Journalismus, Demokratie und Gesellschaft. DOSSIER versucht diese Lücke mit investigativem und mit Datenjournalismus ein Stück weit zu schließen.

Was wir wollen

Journalismus, der wirkt und einen Unterschied macht – das ist unsere Agenda. Wir wollen Ihnen, unseren Leserinnen und Lesern, gründlich recherchierte Informationen liefern, gesellschaftliche Missstände sichtbar machen und zu deren Beseitigung beitragen. Wir schulden Ihnen die Wahrheit. Sie können darauf vertrauen, nichts Geringeres als diese von uns zu bekommen.

Name: Hétéroclite
Description: Hétéroclite est un bimestriel transpédégouine mais pas que... distribué à Lyon, Grenoble et Saint-Étienne traitant de l'actualité culturelle par le prisme des questions LGBT+ et féministes.

Name: Hersam Acorn Newspapers
Description:

We publish 18 weekly publications in CT, NY, MA and VT - reaching more than 130,000 homes. We also publish more than 100 special interest publications.

Our web presence encompasses 21 CT news and lifestyle sites and our FCIAC high school sports website - Generating average unique pageviews of more than 700,000 each month.

We provide mobile solutions (specializing in QR code, text and mobile web site marketing) for a wide variety of clients. Hersam Acorn is expert at building a "mobile experience" for your business - one that your customers will love. We give our clients the ability to treat their customers to a fast and efficient mobile web experience including SMS promotions, mobile couponing and opt-in loyalty programs.

Our commercial printing division operates out of a 56,000 square foot facility in Trumbull, CT as well as smaller printing facility in Bennington VT. We operate 24/7 producing our own publications as well as publications for a wide variety of outside clients.

Name: Los Altos Town Crier
Description: The Los Altos Town Crier, a locally owned weekly newspaper, is located at 138 Main Street in the picturesque village of Los Altos. Published since 1947, we're the only newspaper to offer in-depth, local news relevant to the communities of Los Altos and Los Altos Hills. Mailed directly to households in Los Altos, Los Altos Hills and selected areas of Mountain View, we have thousands of paid subscribers among the weekly circulation of 16,500. Hundreds of subscribers in neighboring communities and out-of-state also receive our news paper.

Name: Magazynowanie i Dystrybucja
Description: Magazynowanie i Dystrybucja to jedyne na rynku polskim branżowe czasopismo poświęcone zagadnieniom magazynowania i dystrybucji towarów. Tematykę dwumiesięcznika programowo wyznaczają dwa kręgi zagadnień, które w zarządzaniu gospodarką magazynową są nieodłączne, a spośród pojęć całego systemu logistycznego na tyle szerokie, że wymagają kompleksowego i zarazem osobnego opisu. Magazyn jest newralgicznym miejscem najważniejszych procesów dla logistyki – zintegrowanego przepływu towarów i informacji o nich – tak aby mogły one bezbłędnie, tanio i szybko trafić do odbiorcy, dzięki sprawnej dystrybucji. Zatem procesy magazynowania i dystrybucji pod względem operacyjnym należą do najistotniejszych elementów efektywnego funkcjonowania przedsiębiorstw na rynku, niezależnie od rodzaju branży. Co za tym idzie, wymagają stosowania nowoczesnych i niezawodnych rozwiązań technicznych w zakresie składowania, transportu wewnętrznego i informatyzacji gospodarki magazynowej.

Name: The Tribune
Description: The (New Albany) Tribune was started in 1851 as The Ledger, which combined with The Tribune in the late 1930s. It has served the Floyd County, Indiana, population as a daily newspaper. The award-winning newsroom operation was combined in 2011 with The Evening News of Jeffersonville as The News and Tribune.

Name: Watertown Daily Times
Description:
Johnson Newspaper Corp. is a family-owned multimedia company with local news coverage of the north country, Hudson Valley and Batavia, N.Y.

The story of the Watertown Daily Times as a newspaper dates back to 1861, evolving from the weekly New York Reformer, which had been established in Watertown eleven years before. With the advent of the Civil War, and the necessity of getting news quicker being an urgent matter, a daily paper was created.

The original daily Reformer of 1861 was a four-page publication of about 1,500 circulation during the Civil War and less in the years following. It was edited from offices at the east end of the Paddock Arcade and moved into a new location on Arcade Street in 1861. The paper took its present name in 1870.

The paper has the largest news gathering staff in the north country, and covers news in Jefferson, Lewis, St. Lawrence, and Oswego counties. It is Northern New York’s leader in reporting and advertising in print and online.

Name: Arizona Local Media
Description:
Arizona Local Media is a part of 10/13 Communications.  Our innovative publications and digital platforms fill a distinct niche in suburban communities in the Phoenix and Tucson area; one that is not being met by the areas' more traditional media sources. Our operations boast strong local reporting, innovative distribution models and unique digital products.  

We are tied to our communities through our products histories and reputations. Arizona Local Media has community newspapers, niche magazines and related websites in Phoenix and Tucson that include Ahwatukee Foothills News, East Valley Tribune, Glendale-Peoria Today, Surprise Today, Daily News Sun, Explorer News, Marana News, Foothills News, Desert Times, Inside Tucson Business, Tucson Weekly, Clipper Marketplace and U and Your Home.

Name: The Glasgow Guardian
Description:
The Glasgow Guardian is a volunteer newspaper at the University of Glasgow and has been independently informing its students for the best part of a century. Founded in 1932 as The Gilmorehill Globe, the newspaper has undergone four name changes in its existence. First changed to The Gilmorehill Guardian, then to the Glasgow University Guardian in 1959 under editor Neil MacCormick and most recently changed to Glasgow Guardian in 2011. The Glasgow Guardian has a long history of investigative journalism and holding the university to account. 

The Glasgow Guardian has a history of producing talented individuals. You can find a list of our Alumni on our Wikipedia page : http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Glasgow_University_Guardian#Alumni

The paper has won Newspaper of the Year at the Herald Scottish Student Press Awards on multiple occasions.

Name: Ammon News - وكالة عمون الإخبارية
Description:
"عمون نيوز" ليست موقعا او صحيفة او مدونة او وكالة انباء عربية او عالمية اومحلية الكترونية فحسب انها فكرة طموحة لاعلام بديل يؤسس لصوت اغلبية صامتة لسنوات طويله التزمت ذلك خشية املاق لحظة او طمس وملاحقة لحظات اخر ... انها محاولة جادة لابداع وطني يفتح الافاق لكل الذين اغلق الاعلام ابوابه لقولهم الحق الملتزم المهني البعيد عن الشتيمة والابتزاز والسقوط في حضن ليلة ... لينتقل الى آخر في التي تليها ، وهي بلا شك مشروع متواضع بدأ بفكرة تحولت الى واقع فرض نفسه على الساحة كجزء من هيكل ومكون عربي ملموس. 
و"عمون" الاسم التاريخي للعاصمة الاردنية عمان اختير بعناية فائقة ليعطي دلائل وقرائن تؤشر على صدقية الانتماء الى الارض وناسها ، فهي ليست لمالك بعينه ولا لمجموعة تعتقد انها تحتكر المعرفة والمعلومة فتلعب في صياغتها وتركيبها تطوعها لمصلحة فئة دون اخرى او تحرك الرأي العام وفقا لارادة موجهة نحو الجهل والمجهول ..
ولأن الساحة العربية فارغة المحتوى من صحافة "الانترنت"الجادة المستقلة التي بدأت تشق طريقها في الغرب جنبا الى جنب مع الصحافة الورقية تم اعلان فكرة "عمون" عل وعسى ان تفتح الشهوة الى تكنولوجيا الشبكة العنكبوتية فتلحق مؤسسات وشركات وافراد وجهات بركب اعلام صار عندهم محجا لكل الناس الذين يبحثون عن افق اوسع وفضاء ارحب وقراءة ورأي مباشر يقدم من خلاله المستفيد مايريد دون رقيب او حسيب فيكون مسؤولا مباشرا عن رأيه ويتحمل تبعات الردود والتعليقات التي لا تجعل مقص الرقيب ان يطالها او يلعب في محتواها ...
و"عمون نيوز" .. كأي مرئية في الارض تتيح لك قراءة خبر و معلومة و تعليق ورؤية صورة و كاريكاتور في الحال ، لا تنتظر الى اليوم التالي حتى تظهر بائتة. 
و"عمون نيوز" لا تلتزم الا في ما تكتب عليه مسؤوليتها المباشرة امام القاريء الذي يملك الآن وسائل متاحة بالمجان ليعبر ويكتب ويعلق بحرية دون ادنى مسؤولية الا مايمليه عليه ضميره واخلاقه العامة خاصة وانه يكتب دون ان يعلم بشر من هو وهل هو شخص حقيقي ام ينتحل صفة الغير وهو ما عاد سرا او ماشابه في عالم سقفه لامحدود ولا مشروط. 
ولهذا كله نجد انفسنا في تحد مهم امام القاريء الذي يريد المزيد من المعلومات والاخباروالصور وربما "الشائعات" ويريد المساهمة في صنع القرار والرأي والحراك الشعبي لكل ما يجري على ارضه وهو حق طبيعي ودستوري وملك له .

Name: Fonds de dotation Rustica
Description:
Le Fonds de dotation Rustica participe à la transition écologique à travers les pratiques de jardinage et de gestion du paysage, domaines d’expertise de Rustica depuis 1928. 
Une démarche tournée vers le grand public (bénéficiaire final des actions initiées ou soutenues par la Fondation) et les parties prenantes de l’écosystème des jardins et paysages. A travers ses initiatives et ses soutiens, elle accompagne les jardiniers experts ou néophytes dans leurs préoccupations écologiques quotidiennes, pour susciter l’envie d’agir concrètement et simplement.
La Fondation d’entreprise Rustica déploie trois leviers au service d’une transition écologique des jardins et paysages :
- Le soutien de projets en faveur d’une approche plus durable du jardin et des paysages, quels que soient les milieux. Ces projets peuvent concerner la création de jardins partagés ou urbains, le développement d’initiatives en permaculture, les actions d’éducation au jardinage naturel… 
- La formation : le Fonds Rustica souhaite accompagner et éduquer les jardiniers, experts ou néophytes, dans leurs préoccupations écologiques quotidiennes, mais aussi sensibiliser le grand public aux enjeux de l’utilisation de méthodes de culture durables.
- La contribution à l'enrichissement des connaissances scientifiques et le partage des enseignements, à travers la production et la mise à disposition de propositions, d’actualités, d’actes de colloques, de points de vue, outils…

Name: Latestly AI
Description:
Latestly AI delivers tool breakdowns, tutorials, comparisons, and news for a rapidly scaling audience of tech decision-makers.

Brands like HubSpot, Notion, and Zapier already partner with us to reach professionals adopting AI at scale.

Name: Groupe Presse et Médias du Sud-Ouest (PMSO)
Kultura Liberalna
Description:
Kultura Liberalna to polityczno-kulturalny tygodnik internetowy. Tworzymy silny, wrażliwy i demokratyczny głos w sferze publicznej. Nie zamykamy się we własnej bańce i rozmawiamy ze wszystkimi stronami sporu politycznego. W swoich działaniach jesteśmy niezależni od polityków i reklamodawców. 

W każdym numerze prezentujemy pełnowymiarowy pakiet analiz politycznych, wywiadów z najciekawszymi intelektualistami, politykami i dziennikarzami, a także tekstów o literaturze, sztukach wizualnych oraz muzyce. 

Wideopodcasty Kultury Liberalnej
W naszych wideopodcastach prezentujemy rozmowy z przedstawicielami świata nauki, mediów i polityki. Z osobami takimi jak Ewa Łętowska, Witold Jurasz, czy Antoni Dudek dyskutujemy o polityce krajowej i międzynarodowej, prawie, ekonomii, historii oraz aktualnych wydarzeniach kulturalnych. 
Nasze materiały publikujemy na m.in. na YouTube, Spotify i Apple Podcast!

Wydawnictwo Kultury Liberalnej 
Wśród książek z serii Biblioteka Kultury Liberalnej prezentujemy eseje polityczne najlepszych polskich autorów oraz tłumaczenia klasycznych i współczesnych publikacji z zakresu filozofii politycznej, socjologii i ekonomii.
Sprawdź naszą ofertę -> https://www.motyleksiazkowe.pl/1904_fundacja-kultura-liberalna

Zapisz się na Newsletter Kultury Liberalnej, aby nie przegapić tego, co najważniejsze -> https://kulturaliberalna.pl/newsletter/

Buduj z nami lepszą Polskę dla przyszłych pokoleń i dla nas samych. Dołącz do nas na Patronite -> https://patronite.pl/KL

„Kultura Liberalna” (Liberal Culture) is an intellectual milieu created around a non-profit, socio-political, weekly magazine established in 2009 by a group of young academics, artists, journalists, students and freelancers. Devoted to modernize liberal thought according to the forthcoming theoretical and practical challenges it also strives to apply liberal ideals to the specific, Central European historical experience.

Name: La Région
Description:
La Région Nord vaudois est née en mars 2006. Elle est fruit de la réflexion d’un groupe de journalistes, appuyés par des personnalités du Nord vaudois, qui regrettaient la disparition de La Presse Nord vaudois, quotidien édité par la Société anonyme du Journal d’Yverdon (SAJY), créée en 1901.

Edité par La Région S.A., La Région Nord vaudois a d’abord paru au rythme bi-hebdomadaire, le mardi et le jeudi, avant de passer à trois parutions par semaine dès le printemps 2007, soit le lundi, le mercredi et le vendredi. Cette dernière édition, diffusée à 43 000 exemplaires, est distribuée à tous les ménages du district Jura-Nord vaudois, issu de la fusion des anciens districts de La Vallée, Orbe, Grandson et Yverdon-les-Bains, et dans les communes situées à l’est d’Yverdon-les-Bains, dans le bassin commercial versant, compris entre le canton de Fribourg, les Hautes-Crêtes (Thierrens) et le nord d’Echallens. Depuis le 5 septembre 2013, à l’occasion du Forum économique du Nord vaudois, La Région Nord vaudois paraît 5 fois par semaine et le tous-ménages est distribué le jeudi.

La Région S.A. est une société indépendante détenue par une soixantaine d’actionnaires de la région de diffusion, essentiellement des particuliers et des acteurs économiques.

Depuis septembre 2008, La Région S.A. édite les deux éditions du lundi et du mercredi et depuis septembre 2013, les éditions de lundi, mardi, mercredi et vendredi. La Région Hebdo S.A., détenue à 52% par La Région S.A., compte deux autres actionnaires minoritaires, la Société Neuchâteloise de Presse (SNP SA) et Tamedia Publications Romandes. Cette filiale édite La Région Nord vaudois Hebdo du jeudi.

Name: The Medium
Description: Since 1974, The Medium II Publications has served as the official campus newspaper of the University of Toronto Mississauga. We publish a new issue online and in print weekly, offering coverage and insight on stories that matter to our local community. The Medium is entirely student-run, and is funded through advertising and a student levy.

Name: The Gauntlet Publications Society
Description: We aim to introduce students and volunteers to journalism at the U of C. As there is no journalism program at the U of C, we hope to show volunteers tricks of the trade and to inspire them towards journalistic integrity.

Name: Prensmart SAC
Description:
Misión:
Entregar las mejores opciones y experiencia de comunicación multimedia a los lectores y empresas de todo el mundo a través de plataformas interactivas e información dinámica. 
 
Visión:
Ser los líderes a nivel de todas las plataformas de comunicación interactiva digital e impresa.  Esto lo lograremos con un equipo brillante, frecuentemente superando las expectativa de nuestros clientes y generando riqueza para nuestra sociedad y accionistas.

Name: The Post
Description: The Post delivers comprehensive national coverage from Wellington, focusing on politics, business, and lifestyle content. With expert journalism, we provide readers with reliable news, insightful analysis, and engaging features that cover key issues shaping New Zealand. As part of the Stuff Group, The Post is dedicated to informing and connecting Kiwis with the stories that matter.

Name: Mouthing Off Magazine
Description:
Mouthing Off is an online magazine which focuses on stimulating fresh ideas. We publish articles focused on Politics & News, Art and Creative writing daily. 

Our publication aims to create a conversation with our readers, promoting innovative ideas and provocative thinking. Mainstream media outlets have become (on the whole) outdated means of communicating in-depth opinions and news in the age of the internet. Mouthing Off, as an alternative media source, hopes to provide a voice for students, artists and free-thinkers from around the world. 

We take submissions from anyone. As long as you have something interested to say, we are interested. No prior experience is required, just an idea. Send us your submission today and become part of our growing community and writing team!

Name: ze.tt

ze.tt ist ein Magazin des ZEIT-Verlags für Menschen zwischen 16 und  35 Jahren.

Die meisten Beiträge haben wir in den vergangenen Monaten zu politischen Themen veröffentlicht, unter anderem zu der Bundestagswahl, Trump und zu Protestbewegungen in aller Welt. Wir setzen uns für Gleichberechtigung ein, für Frauen, für queere Menschen, für Menschen mit Behinderung. Wir zeigen, wie Menschen ihr Glück im Leben, in der Liebe, in der Arbeitswelt, im Alltag, am Esstisch, im Bett und auf Reisen finden.

Vi är din lokala mediepartner i Varberg och Falkenberg som erbjuder ett stort utbud av marknadsföringskanaler, allt från traditionell annonsering till digitala  kampanjer på sociala medier. Vi är Google-certifierade och erbjuder dig och ditt företag köpt sökordsannonsering, Google Shopping, Googles display-nätverk och marknadsföring på Youtube.

Oavsett hur dina utmaningar, mål och möjligheter ser ut, så hjälper vi dig att ta fram en skräddarsydd marknadsstrategi anpassad efter just ditt företag och optimerar löpande för bästa tänkbara resultat. Vi hjälper även till med all produktion, från hemsidor till kampanjmaterial. Och med vårt oslagbara nätverk av kanaler når vi ut till 9 av 10 på den lokala marknaden. Mäktigt, eller hur? Med oss som mediepartner hjälper vi dig att bli bäst på hemmaplan! 

Hallands Nyheter når varje dag 101 000 läsare i våra digitala kanaler och i papperstidningen. Det primära utgivningsområdet är Falkenberg och Varberg.  

HN är en del av Stampen Media som bland annat består av Hallandsposten, Göteborgs-Posten, Bohusläningen, Ttela och Strömstads Tidning. Tillsammans når vi 1.307.000 läsare varje vecka.

Name: Fokus – Sveriges nyhetsmagasin
Description:
Fokus är ett nyhetsmagasin som har ett annorlunda löfte till dig som läsare. Vår ambition, vårt löfte är att vi ska börja vår redaktionella bevakning där morgontidningarna slutar.
Kanske tycker du att din morgontidning består av många telegram från TT eller att rapporteringen blir alltmer ensidig. De långa reportagen, de specialiserade reportrarna som kunde skriva reportage värda att tala om – hittar du dem längre?
Eller så kanske du upptäcker att du mer och mer konsumerar din journalistik via kvällstidningssajterna samtidigt som du saknar ett nav, en fast punkt som kan erbjuda något annat än den snabba rapporteringen.
På Fokus tror vi mer på fler nya perspektiv än på gamla sanningar. På djuplodande, berättande och inkluderande journalistik. Vi är trötta på snäv självrefererad kunskap. De vida perspektiven, berättande och fakta. Det är kärnan i Fokus.
Vi skriver, analyserar och försöker skapa förståelse för vår omvärld.
Men vi är inte bara en tidning utan också en sajt och en digital publikation. Vi finns där du finns när du vill att vi ska finnas.
I brevlådan, i paddan eller på mobilen.

UN MAGAZINE DE SOCIÉTÉ NOUVELLE GÉNÉRATION : 

Les entrepreneurs et les acteurs de la société actuelles sont les nouveaux explorateurs. Ils sortent constamment de leur zone de confort, repoussent les limites et ne cessent d'innover.

Name: Mediengruppe Attenkofer
Description:
Das Mediengeschäft ist unsere Kernkompetenz. Im Laufe unserer über 170-jährigen Geschichte haben wir uns vom traditionellen Druck- und Verlagshaus zum Medienhaus entwickelt: Tageszeitungen, Anzeigenblätter, Magazine, Druckdienstleistungen, Radio, Fernsehen und ein umfassendes Kaleidoskop von Angeboten im Digital-Bereich sind Grundstock und Entwicklungsfelder der Mediengruppe Attenkofer.

Name: İhlas Gazetecilik A.Ş.
Description:
Yayın hayatına 22 Nisan 1970 tarihinde başlayan Türkiye Gazetesi, kuruluşundan bugüne sahibi ve yayın politikası değişmemiş tek ulusal gazete olarak faaliyetlerine devam etmektedir. 

Türkiye Gazetesi, içeriğin yanı sıra güçlü bir teknik ve dağıtım altyapısına da sahiptir. İstanbul, Ankara, İzmir, Adana, Trabzon ve Antalya’da baskı tesisleri bulunan Türkiye Gazetesi’nin sadece İstanbul tesisinin kapasitesi saatte 55,000 adet gazetedir. Ankara, İzmir, Adana, Trabzon ve Antalya’da bulunan baskı tesisleri sayesinde, yerel haberlerle desteklenen sayfalar üreterek her bölgenin gündemine hitap edilmektedir. 

İhlas Gazetecilik A.Ş. bünyesindeki matbaa işletmeleri ile yayın yönetiminin entegrasyonunu güçlendiren yeni yapı, ulusal ve yerel gazetelere, yayınevlerine ve reklam ajanslarına verilen baskı hizmetinin daha nitelikli hale gelmesini sağlamıştır.

Şirket dinamiklerini çok daha aktif hale getiren bu yeni yönetim modeli, grafik tasarımdan baskıya kadar komple baskı çözümleri sunma imkanı sağlamıştır. Ulusal ve yerel gazetelerin yanında birçok dergi, insert, broşür ve kitabın baskıları da baskı tesislerinde yapılmaktadır.

Name: Ventura County Star
Description: The Ventura County Star, part of Gannett and the USA TODAY NETWORK, is an award-winning daily print newspaper and 24/7 online publication that covers Ventura County, California. It is a trusted news organization with a loyal following, bringing news and information that people need to stay informed about important issues, live their daily lives and improve their communities. It's known for local investigative and watchdog journalism, breaking news, local sports, entertainment and opinion. In addition to the print publication, The Star offers two apps and a website, and has an engaging presence on the most popular social media channels and other platforms where it can reach an audience interested in local news. A subscriber is treated as a member and receives access to e-newsletters, local podcasts, discounted offers and other perks. Breaking news alerts and personalized alerts come directly to subscribers' mobile devices to keep them informed. Its advertising department provides a wide range of solutions for businesses' advertising and marketing needs.

Name: L'Automobile Magazine
Description:
L'Automobile Magazine est un média automobile de référence en France, reconnu depuis plus de 80 ans pour la rigueur de ses essais, la fiabilité de ses analyses et la crédibilité de son regard sur l’industrie automobile.

Notre singularité repose sur une expertise éditoriale forte : des journalistes spécialisés qui testent, mesurent et analysent les véhicules avec une approche factuelle et indépendante. Motorisations thermiques, hybrides et électriques, innovations technologiques, marché, usages, réglementation, nouvelles mobilités : nous aidons nos audiences à comprendre l’automobile dans toute sa complexité.

L’Automobile Magazine s’adresse à une audience engagée et qualifiée, composée de passionnés, d’acheteurs en réflexion et de professionnels du secteur. Présent en print et en digital, le média combine puissance de diffusion, qualité des contenus et environnement premium pour les marques. 

L'Automobile Magazine développe également son exigence et son expertise éditoriale dans des domaines mécaniques comme l'horlogerie ou les deux-roues.

L'Automobile Magazine est membre français du comité d'organisation de l'élection de la voiture de l'année "Car Of The Year" (COTY).

Intégré au groupe Webedia, Acteur majeur des médias digitaux, L’Automobile Magazine bénéficie d’un écosystème puissant mêlant data, innovation et amplification multicanale. Cette synergie permet de concevoir des dispositifs sur mesure, alliant visibilité, crédibilité éditoriale et performance.

Informer, décrypter, analyser avec exigence : c’est la promesse de L’Automobile Magazine au service des marques et de leurs enjeux.

Name: Community Matters Media Ltd
Description:
Community Matters Media Ltd - telling stories that matter

As south London changes we’re still here, fighting to make sure our community has a voice and stays in the know. 

We’re known for holding those in power to account and bringing you the stories you won’t find anywhere else, from exclusive investigations to our history long reads. 

We are proud to be the home of:

Southwark News - London’s only independent, paid for newspaper. Everyone ‘round here reads it. 

NewsAtDen - Exclusive insight and analysis from the only paper with a dedicated Millwall reporter.

South London Weekly - A new quality paper for south London

The South Londoner magazine - your guide to unmissable south London

Bermondsey Biscuit and Rotherhithe Docker magazine - the people and places that make Bermondsey and Rotherhithe

Greenwich & Lewisham Weekender magazine - what's on and arts and entertainment

Dagen ges ut av Tidnings AB Nya Dagen, som ägs av den nordiska medieföretaget Mentor Medier A/S, med huvudkontor i Oslo. Dagen bevakar det som händer inom svensk kristenhet och följer samhällsfrågor utifrån ett kristet perspektiv. Vi ger nyheter från två världar.

Tidningen skriver ofta om sociala frågor, kämpar mot utsatthet och främlingskap, såväl i Sverige som i världen. Vi värnar familjen som en viktig del i samhällsbygget och följer frågor som rör barn, äldre och sjuka.

Här finns också en fri debatt där olika åsikter kommer till tals. Det senaste året har tidningen ökat debattsidorna och blivit den självklara samtalsplatsen inom svensk kristenhet.

Name: Positive News Bites
Description:
Positive News Bites is non-profit initiative, founded in Aug 2020 with intention to curate and spread news which shows the positive world around us.
...............................................
Watch what's fed into your mind and see how it feels?

The news we hear is generally marketable, commercial, most of which is negative, making people subconsciously depressed, demoralized and sad. While a lot of people like to watch it, others feel they don’t really have a choice and end up watching what is accessible. 

We always consider how the food we eat impacts our body and make a conscious choice. Similarly, what we hear is a choice as well. The background noise in everyone's house is a news channel talking about floods, cases of corona virus, burglary, suicides and what not. 

We want people to realize the power of choosing the right content and what they watch is not good for them because besides those hard facts across the world, there is always a silver lining reinstating the belief of a better world. The overall well-being of us and our family is quite dependent on how we feel. This is the time to make a shift because the humanity exists to make a positive change and until we feel positive we can't do positive.

The world could be a better place if we shift to hearing, feeling and appreciating the good around...because what we hear is how we feel!

Name: ContraRegra
Description:
Em 11 de março de 2019, abrimos este espaço para exercer nosso senso crítico. Depois de muitas idas e vindas na universidade, conseguimos enfim organizar um projeto e fazer o ContraRegra.

Temos nosso podcast semanal de notícias internacionais, que complementamos com drops diários dos mais importantes fatos do mundo em nossas redes.

Para nos ouvir, basta entrar no Spotify e nos procurar (ou clicar em nossos links).

Ouvir é uma missão fundamental do jornalismo. Conscientes dessa obrigação, julgamos necessário aproximar as fontes do público e assumir o papel de mediação. Queremos ouvir personagens, testemunhas, especialistas, contadores de histórias que o mundo nos oferece a fim de cumprir o objetivo proposto daqui para frente.

As boas intenções jornalísticas não sustentam por conta própria um produto de qualidade. Com a meta de deixar o nosso conteúdo mais agradável e acessível, decidimos também testar novos formatos. Uniremos texto e áudio nessa proposta. Notícias pontuais e trabalhos mais elaborados irão dividir espaço com entrevistas e podcasts. E tudo sempre com a informação em primeiro lugar.

Le format de cette revue basée sur une version papier à laquelle vous êtes habitués, évoluera aussi résolument et rapidement vers une version web, plus facilement interrogeable et navigable. Vous retrouverez les dossiers scientifiques, thématiques ou régionaux, qui ont beaucoup de succès et des articles plus courts sur des sujets d’actualité. Nous avons également souhaité nos pages aux questions sociétales à un moment où les usages du sous-sol n’ont jamais été aussi importants et discutés. La philosophie et l’histoire des sciences, essentielles à la compréhension des enjeux de la géologie au XXIe siècle, seront aussi abordées de façon résolue. Terre & Sciences sera ainsi un lieu d’explicitation de débats sociétaux actuels.

Description:
NewstrAid provides financial, emotional and practical support to people who are, or have been, employed in the sale and distribution of newspapers and magazines in the UK. This includes their immediate family and dependents who are in need, hardship or distress.

The Charity has been in existence for over 180 years. It was founded in 1839 to provide welfare for the desperately poor newspaper sellers of London and one of the founding fathers was Charles Dickens who was president from 1854 until his death in 1870.

Today NewstrAid supports those involved in newspaper and magazine retail, wholesale and distribution in the UK. This means people who deal with newspapers and magazines from the time they leave the printing press until they reach the reader. The charity is integral to the trade and is there to assist when colleagues fall on hard times, including those who have suffered long term sickness or disability or faced redundancy, family breakdown or difficulty in supporting dependent children. 

If you, your immediate family or your dependents are in need, hardship or distress and you have worked in this area of the news trade, please contact us.

Name: Plaza Pública
Description:
Plaza Pública es un periódico digital de análisis, investigación y debates, que reivindica los derechos humanos, la democracia y el desarrollo integral sostenible.
Los cinco retos que guiarán nuestras publicaciones periodísticas y los análisis y debates que promoveremos serán: la lucha por la equidad social; la lucha contra la impunidad y la corrupción; la lucha a favor de la interculturalidad y contra toda forma de discriminación; la lucha por la preservación del medio ambiente; y la lucha contra la fragmentación social.
Contribuiremos al ejercicio de un periodismo serio, en profundidad, sin aspiraciones de infalibilidad y con el compromiso de trabajar tesonera y honestamente para buscar la verdad. En esta búsqueda de la verdad ofrecemos balance, contexto y transparencia. 
Queremos ser una plataforma para el diálogo propositivo y crítico entre ciudadanos, y para que los diversos poderes del país expongan sus propuestas y rindan cuenta de sus responsabilidades. Tomamos el nombre de la tradición del ágora griega y de la filosofía social de Jürgen Habermas, quien considera que los medios de comunicación en democracia tienen un insustituible rol de ser plazas públicas, donde los ciudadanos debaten y se fiscalizan entre sí y fiscalizan a los diversos poderes sociales.
Contribuiremos a la formación de la siguiente generación de periodistas, promoviendo los valores en los que creemos para convertirnos en una referencia de periodismo de calidad y de profundidad en la región.

Name: El Periòdic d'Andorra
Description: El Periòdic d'Andorra és el principal diari del Principat d'Andorra, s'edita en paper i en format digital, fundat el 3 de febrer de 1997 per part del Grupo Zeta, com la filial andorrana d'El Periódico de Catalunya. Té la seva oficina central a l'avinguda Fiter i Rosell número 4 d'Escaldes-Engordany i s'imprimeix a Parets del Vallès. Aquest rotatiu es ven de manera conjunta i inseparable amb El Periódico de Catalunya al Principat d'Andorra i també a les comarques catalanes del Pirineu, principalment l'Alt Urgell i la Cerdanya. L'abril de 2015 va reestrenar el seu espai web, que ja té més de 250.000 lectures mensuals segons ODM de Google.

Name: Hindi Patrika
Description: Hindi Patrika is weekly news & magazine portal that’s provide latest and unique information related carrier, yoga, sport, Health, technology, Entertainment.

Name: The Emory Wheel
Description:
The Emory Wheel was founded in 1919 and is currently the only independent, student-run newspaper of Emory University. The Wheel publishes weekly (Wednesday) during the academic year, except during University holidays and scheduled publication intermissions.

The Wheel is financially and editorially independent from the University. All of its content is generated by the Wheel‘s more than 100 student staff members and contributing writers, and its printing costs are covered by profits from self-generated advertising sales.

Name: Assabah - الصباح
Description:
تعد “إيكوميديا” أول مجموعة إعلامية في المغرب. إنها مجموعة خاصة، تضم في رأسمالها مستثمرين مؤسساتيين وأفرادا ذاتيين، بمن فيهم الأطر المسيرة.

تنشر المجموعة الصحيفتين اليوميتين المرجعيتين في البلاد: “ليكونوميست” بالفرنسية، و”الصباح” بالعربية، وتبث “راديو أطلنتيك” ذا التغطية الوطنية الشاملة.

بالإضافة إلى مكتب دائم في الرباط، لدى مجموعة “إيكوميديا” شبكة مراسلين في عدة مدن بالمغرب، وفي كبريات العواصم العالمية.

تصدر المجموعة أيضا “ليكونوميست دو فاسو”، وهي صحيفة اقتصادية أسبوعية، تصدر من بوركينا فاسو، وتم تأسيسها في 2013.

تملك المجموعة مطابعها الخاصة “إيكو برنت”، ومدرسة للصحافة (المدرسة العليا للصحافة والاتصال)، التي تم إنشاؤها في 2008، وتوفر تكوينين: “البكالوريا + 3″ و”الماستر”.

Name: Africa 24 Monde
Description:
Africa24monde.com est un service du groupe Africom-services dont la mission est d’informer et d’inspirer la communauté noire francophone. Par et sur l'Afrique agrégeant, produisant et distribuant plus de 1,100 articles et nouvelles par jour provenant de plus de 120 organes de presse africaine et de nos propres journalistes à un public africain, diaspora et au reste du monde.

         Notre site fonctionne sur trois versions

1)-Actualité: Africa24monde.com/actualite.html
2)-Economie: Africa24monde.com/economie.html
3)-Sport: Africa24monde.com/sport.html

Nous opérons à partir des villes ; Alger, Abidjan, Barcelone, Bruxelles, Douala, Dakar,Johannesburg, Kinshasa, Lagos, Nairobi, Paris, Yaoundé et Washington DC.

Animés d’histoires originales, d’opinions diverses, photos et vidéos. Laissez Africa24monde vous informer et vous inspirer au quotidien de ce qui ce passe tout près de vous.

Le site www.africa24monde.com est donc consacrée à l’information et à l’inspiration de la communauté noire du monde entier.

Name: Burnaby Now
Description:
The Burnaby Now is your go-to choice for news coverage in print and online 24/7 with breaking news, informed opinions and stories that will enlighten you about our community.

On Nov. 23, 1983 a 12-page broadsheet newspaper called the Burnaby Now first hit the streets of the city. Started out of the ashes of The Columbian newspaper, which published its final edition Nov. 15, 1983 after 123 years in the business, the paper’s founders believed in a community newspaper which cared about the city, its people and commerce. Three decades later, the Burnaby Now is your news leader with more than 40 fresh stories posted each day – from news to community to entertainment to features to sports. We’ve even added extensive coverage of the growing foodie scene.

The Now has grown to a large tabloid newspaper with a dynamic website and informative social media feeds. It is delivered to over 44,000 doorsteps on Thursdays and thousands of readers count on the Burnaby Now’s team to deliver fresh content all day, every day.

To assist our crack team of seasoned journalists, we also rely on our readers to tell us what stories are important to them and why.

Description: An English language monthly newspaper covering Lithuania, Latvia and Estonia. With offices in Tallinn and Vilnius and its headquarters in Riga, The Baltic Times remains the only pan-Baltic English language newspaper offering complete coverage of regional events.

Name: Phoenix Media/Communications Group
Description:
The Phoenix Media/Communications Group is the only true converged media company in New England, providing an array of multi-media marketing solutions including print, radio, web, mobile, events, college and more. We own the 21-44 market in New England and reach them like no other media company can.

Our readers are intelligent, active, educated consumers ranging from 21-44 and beyond. We deliver award winning, incisive and thought provoking journalism, plus the best and most comprehensive arts and entertainment listings. We create converged media campaigns for our clients that include print, web, mobile, events, radio, and more, and deliver sound, measurable results.

Name: Collegiate Times
Description:
The Collegiate Times, Blacksburg's oldest newspaper, was established in 1903 at Virginia Tech. It began as a sports-oriented newspaper but has grown into a student-run, daily publication covering campus news, features, sports and opinions. The newspaper stopped receiving university funds in 1979 and has since supported its operations with advertising and subscription revenues.

The paper is published Monday and Thursdays of the academic year, except during exams and breaks, and has a circulation of 14,000 with a readership of more than 26,000. The Collegiate Times editorial staff maintains its offices in 365 Squires Student Center. Collegiate Times advertising is managed by Collegiate Times sister company College Media Solutions.

The Collegiate Times holds membership in the Associated Collegiate Press, the Virginia Press Association, Southern University Newspapers, College Media Advisers, and the College Newspaper Business and Advertising Manager Association.

The Collegiate Times is a division of the Educational Media Company at Virginia Tech Inc., a student-run corporation also consisting of the Bugle, WUVT, VTTV, SPPS, College Media Solutions, and the Silhouette.

Name: Richardson Media Group
Description:
Richardson Media Group exists to serve local communities by providing a great source for community news, information, and entertainment. RMG, established in 2023, is a forward thinking media company that isn't afraid to respect the traditions that have proved themselves over decades, or even centuries, of changes in market dynamics and technologies. 

Yes, this means we embrace and celebrate the value of print media as the bedrock our our offerings, though we technically reach more readers online. There is a difference between readership and engagement. Our customers are engaged in their community and engaged in our product, spending hours per week with our print and digital products. You can't get here with click-bate faux journalism. 

It only comes with developing an audience over time as a trusted news source. This is something newspapers have done better than any other type of media organizations. There are more reasons for this than can be included here. But those reasons are as real as ever in 2024 and we're looking forward to a long and bright future of print media with the accent of the supplemental digital tools such as websites, mobile apps, e-newsletters, and more.

Name: Børneavisen
Description:
Børneavisen is Denmark's only newspaper for children between 9-12 years. The newspaper is published in print every Tuesday, filled with news and entertainment for children.

Børneavisen is an independent media published by JP / Politikens Hus.

Name: Kyodo News International, Inc
Description:
Kyodo News International (KNI), a New York-based subsidiary of Kyodo News (http://english.kyodonews.jp/), is responsible for worldwide marketing of Kyodo's news and photo services. Since its inception in 1982, KNI has steadily expanded its market base from traditional media to government, business and financial circles with transmission means convenient for their specific needs.

KNI serves as an outlet for concluding subscription contracts with news media, government agencies, international organizations, and corporations. Major subscribers include the Financial Times, Bloomberg, BBC, the Nation (Thailand), International Monetary Fund (IMF), the World Trade Organization (WTO) and the International Olympic Committee (IOC).

KNI also handles the international distribution of photos. KNI's photo customers include Time-Life, Business Week, Newsweek, Forbes, Fortune, Economist, Sports Illustrated, to mention only a few.

Name: ParisBerlin Magazine
Description:
ParisBerlin a été fondé en 2004. Il est le seul newsmagazine qui informe tous les deux mois sur l’actualité franco-allemande dans tous les domaines : politique, économie, modes de vie, culture, éducation, médias...
ParisBerlin s’adresse à tous ceux qui, de près ou de loin, s’intéressent à l’actualité franco-allemande et européenne.

ParisBerlin ist das einzige zweimonatliche Nachrichtenmagazin, das zweisprachig über die deutsch-französische und europäische Aktualität berichtet. Dabei liefert es Analysen und Hintergründe aus den Bereichen Politik, Wirtschaft, Gesellschaft, Kultur und Medien.
Das Magazin wurde 2004 gegründet und richtet sich an alle, die sich für die beiden Länder und ihre Beziehungen interessieren.

Name: Hamshahri Press
Description: Hamshahri is a national Iranian daily newspaper published by Tehran Municipality in 1991. The newspaper has the widest circulation of any newspaper in Iran, with 450,000 copies daily, a position held for 15 years. Hamshahri is distributed in all major Iranian cities and townships same day and according to the latest survey by an independent audit organization approximately 2 million people read Hamshahri daily. Hamshahri is the only newspaper in the country that has no return and all copies are sold. Newspaper’s large circulation, diverse topics, fine color print and 250 page classified ad supplement has established its formidable position in the paper media industry. Hamshahri’s popularity and readers' trust has greatly influenced the development of advertisement business in Iran, and second only to The State Television, has the largest ad viewers in media industry. Hamshahri is considered by 80% of Tehran residents as the most reliable and trustworthy source for their selection of goods and services

Name: Näringslivets Medieinstitut
Description:
Näringslivets medieinstitut (NMI) ska bidra till kvalitetshöjning i svenska nyhetsmedier genom kritisk granskning och öppen diskussion. Vi är experter på svensk medieetik.

NMI fokuserar på frågor som är relevanta för näringslivet, exempelvis rapporteringen om ekonomi och arbetsmarknad, samt medieetikens utveckling. När enskilda personer och företag blir oförtjänt uthängda kan vi ge en möjlighet till upprättelse. Vi tar vår utgångspunkt i de medieetiska reglerna som medieföretagen lovat att leva efter. Vi vill lyfta fram den enskilde journalistens ansvar att leva upp till medieetikens krav.

NMI finansieras till stor del av Stiftelsen Fritt Näringsliv och åtar sig även uppdragsfinansierade granskningar.

NMI drivs och ägs av Mats Olin. Han har arbetat med mediegranskning sedan 2008, tidigare som chef för Timbro medieinstitut och för företaget Second Opinion.

Name: RGNUL Cosmos
Description:
RGNUL Cosmos is an online student magazine established under the aegis of Rajiv Gandhi National University of Law, Punjab. It aims to be a student run blog-site functioning for and out of the University to provide a platform for all news and content relevant to the faculty and students. 

The purpose of the RGNUL Cosmos is to provide an appropriate forum for discussing various issues of the students, from latest legal news to brilliant achievements to the best food in campus! Cosmos seeks to provide a platform for all news, updates and discussions relevant to the RGNUL community. A constantly evolving space, we aim to equip the student body with a medium to express themselves, connect with professionals and make a positive difference.

Further, it would also set the stage for beneficial interactions between the students and the alumni and also amongst students from different batches. Moreover, the RGNUL Cosmos will also encourage legal discussions on any and all legal issues under the sun, thus fostering an environment of curiosity and research in the University. Thus, the RGNUL Cosmos will equip the student body with the platform to constructively engage with relevant issues, ask the right questions and be the lawyer they set out to be.

Name: Neue Schweizer Medienmacher*innen
Description:
Die Neuen Schweizer Medienmacher*innen sind ein Netzwerk von Medienschaffenden mit und ohne Migrationsgeschichte. 
Wir streben die Öffnung der Institutionen und Diversität in den Medienhäusern an, wir führen Projekte durch und stossen Initiativen an, die unter anderem auf Nachwuchsförderung, eine ausgewogene Berichterstattung und stärkere Präsenz von Migrant*innen in den Medien zielen. Wir mischen uns in aktuelle Debatten ein, tragen unsere Positionen und Forderungen in relevante Gremien und in die Öffentlichkeit, und treten an die Entscheidungsträger in Medien und Politik heran, ebenso an Ausbildungsstätten. Wir arbeiten darauf hin, dass Regeln eingeführt werden, die eine transparente, diversitätsbezogene, nicht diskriminierende und antirassistische, im besten Sinn «inkludierende» Berichterstattung über die diverse Schweiz und die diverse Welt ermöglichen. Damit möchten wir zum Entstehen einer wahrhaft demokratischen Medienlandschaft und einer entsprechend inklusiven gesellschaftlichen Debatte beitragen.
NCHM* sieht sich als Teil einer breiten Allianz diversitätsfördernder Initiativen in der Schweiz.

Name: The Riverdale Press
Description: The Riverdale Press is a Pulitzer Prize-winning weekly covering the northwest Bronx.

Name: seventeen goals Magazin

Das redaktionelle Konzept des seventeen goals Magazins: Zeigen, wie Menschen die Welt bewegen!
Wir erzählen positive und motivierende Geschichten Geschichten von Menschen, Organisationen, wissenschaftlichen Errungenschaften und Unternehmen und machen so die Nachhaltigkeitsziele (SDGs) für immer mehr Menschen nachvollziehbar, erlebbar und relevant. Am Ende jedes Beitrages geben wir Anregung, wie Leserinnen und Leser selbst aktiv werden können (Calls to Action). In unserer Rubrik LÖSUNGEN stellen wir  erfolgreiche Initiativen, innovative Wege und mutige Entscheidungen vor, die zum Erreichen der 17 Nachhaltigkeitsziele beitragen. Zudem haben wir im Webmagazin eine mfangreiche Darstellung der Nachhaltigkeitsziele und stellen dort auch unsere Ziele-Partner vor.

Name: Scientia Naturalis
Description:
Scientia Naturalis est une revue de sciences naturelles s’adressant aux lecteurs curieux, amateurs ou non, spécialisés ou non, mais toujours en soif d’apprendre. Elle offre en toute simplicité l’opportunité de parcourir d’un coup d’œil quelques branches de l’étonnant éventail d’innovations que nous offre la nature. Au travers d’articles et de sources croisées, la revue concrétise l’ambition de faire converger un savoir non exhaustif sur des thématiques multiples, et ainsi de tracer une diagonale dans le champ de la biologie et de la géologie dont les lois régissent le monde qui nous entoure – et nous constitue.

À l’image de la nature, les sujets traités sont divers et variés afin de satisfaire les goûts et les préférences de chacun. Chaque article fait l’objet d’un travail sérieux et s’appuie sur des sources bibliographiques vérifiées et vérifiables. La relecture par les paires soutient les valeurs de rigueur, d’humilité et de remise en question dans lesquelles s’inscrit la revue et assure ainsi la production d’un travail de qualité la plus pointue possible.

La genèse de tels travaux a lieu dans l’idée que le savoir nous donne les clés de l’autonomie et du progrès : Scientia Naturalis prend à cœur sa mission de rendre accessibles les notions qu’elle aborde sans dévaloriser la rigueur scientifique fondatrice des recherches qui mènent à ce savoir. Elle espère montrer que la biologie et la géologie sont des sources d’inspiration et de surprises inépuisables. Il s’agit d’offrir aux lecteurs un moment enrichissant et agréable dans l’assurance que les meilleures intentions ont été disposées dans ces parutions. Et, bien sûr, il s’agit d’honorer et de respecter la nature en lui montrant que nous sommes attentifs, admiratifs et surtout respectueux des merveilles (parfois pourtant si banales !) que nous sommes amenés à observer.

Name: Pack & Label Around
Description:
Le journal Pack and Label Around constitue une référence dans le monde de l’impression. Nous ciblons principalement les acteurs participant à la chaîne de production de l’impression, ainsi que les évènements et innovations dans le secteur.

Name: مقالات.مصر
Description:
تقوم فكرة مقالات.مصر على جمع المقالات الصحفية التي تنشر على صفحات الجرائد اليومية المصرية والعربية في مكان واحد تيسيرًا على محبي قراءة هذا النوع من الأدب الصحفي والفكر الحر، وذلك لما يواجهه كثير من القراء من العنت والصعوبة في متابعة كُتَّابهم المفضلين في جميع الصحف والمجلات المصرية والعربية. 

فمن ذا الذي يستطيع أن يتابع يوميًا جميع الصحف المطبوعة ليفتش بينها عن مقال لكاتبه المحبوب، ومن ذا الذي يقدر على التقلب يوميًا بين المواقع الإلكترونية المتعددة ليطالع ما يشاء من المقالات الهامة المتنوعة؛ خاصةً في ظل بطء سرعة الانترنت وانقطاعاته المتكررة فضلًا عن ارتفاع ثمن باقات الانترنت على الهواتف الخلوية.

نحن في مقالات.مصر لا نقدم أخبارًا حصرية، ولا انفرادات صحفية، ولا خبطات إعلامية، بل حتى لا نقدم محتوىً حصريًا لم يُنشر من قبل!! لا شئ من هذا كله.
نحن في مقالات.مصر لا نقدم إلا فكرة جديدة، فكرة جمع المقالات الصحفية لكبار الكتاب وعمالقة الأدب الصحفي في مصر والعالم العربي؛ كل ما كتبوه ويكتبونه يوميًا تجده عندنا في مكان واحد؛ تنتقل من مقالة إلى أخرى، ومن كاتب إلى آخر، ومن موضوع إلى موضوع، ومن صحيفة إلى صحيفة.

 نحن في مقالات.مصر نحرص كل الحرص على صيانة الحقوق الفكرية والأدبية لكُتَّابنا الكبار وللصحف العريقة التي تنشر مقالاتهم، لذلك فإننا حريصون كل الحرص ليس فقط على ذكر مصادر المقالات؛ بل أيضًا على وضع رابط مباشر لكل مقالة في نهايتها.

نهتم في مقالات.مصر بتعليقات القراء، لذلك أفردنا لها مساحةً في نهاية كل مقال. ولأننا نعلم أن كل محب للقراءة ليس بالضرورة أن يكون محبًا للكتابة أيضًا، لذلك قمنا بوضع نظام للتقييمات بحيث يقوم القارئ بتسجيل رأيه وتقييمه للمقال من خلال مجموعة سريعة من الأسئلة، نخرج من خلالها برأي وتقييم واضح، ثم نقوم بإضافته إلى بقية التقييمات للمقالات الأخرى، فنخرج بإحصائية لطيفة عن آراء القراء حول المقالات المنشورة وأكثرها أهمية وأشدها قبولًا لديهم.

يمكنكم زيارتنا من خلال الرابط:    "مقالات.مصر"
فقط اكتب اسم الموقع في شريط العنوان URL باللغة العربية، واستمتع بمتابعة أهم المقالات لكبار الكُتَّاب والصحفيين في العالم العربي.

Name: Creative Circle Media Solutions
Description:

Since 2004, we've also become a leader in developing innovative software for the web. We have created specialized web software for media companies, including a content-driven CMS, classified online entry and display, social networking, user-contributed content, reverse publishing, self-service display advertising, pay wall, tourism, press release and directory platforms.

We have a strong reputation for increasing audience and readership, both in print and online. 

We've won several international awards for our branding and re-branding of media companies.

We are increasingly applying our deep knowledge of content, design, engagement and web software development to other industries, including associations, businesses, universities and government agencies.

Each offers multi-channel campaigns including print and digital display, as well as Facebook and Instagram for local advertisers.

In fact, most leading newspaper groups rely on iPublish Media Solutions for their self-serve e-commerce strategy and  classified order input, and continue to renew agreements at a 95% rate year over year.  Our agile development culture is bolstered by a flat organizational structure that allows us to remain extremely close to customers’ needs and provide the highest quality and fastest customer support in the industry.  
 
We continue to innovate based on customer requirements, enabling partners to increase revenue and decrease operational costs at a compelling ROI.  We are grateful for our customers’ continued support and loyalty to the iPublish platform, and look forward to helping the media industry transition toward a more digital future.

Description:

RMS is the official francophone publication of the Swiss Officer Society (SOG/SSO). It is owned by the cantonal societies of the French speaking cantons. RMS is a bi-monthly publication and comes out 8 times a year, including 2 thematic issues.

RMS focuses on security, defence, strategic and policy issues. It is a significant contribution to the field of International relations, History and Geopolitics.

Name: Augere
Description:
Välkommen till Augere – din partner inom aktiv börshandel och finansiell utbildning. Vi är en svensk koncern med ett tydligt mål: att erbjuda en pålitlig och gedigen marknadsplats för aktiv handel i en tid av ökad osäkerhet.

Med starka samarbeten med globala emittenter som Vontobel och Societe Generale samt etablerade börser som NGM Markets erbjuder vi dig en omfattande handelsbaserad infrastruktur med unika möjligheter. Hos oss hittar du allt du behöver för din handel. Augere är din resurs för att navigera i börshandelns komplexitet, med jämförelselistor, realtidsnyheter och utbildningsmaterial. Helt gratis.

Vi förstår att framgång handlar om mer än bara verktyg – det handlar om kunskap och utveckling. Därför är utbildning en kärnpunkt i vår filosofi. Vi är stolta över att vara Sveriges ledande virtuella handelsgolv och trading-community. Våra ledord är transparens och pålitlighet. 

Vår resa har bara börjat. Tillsammans växer vi vidare och skapar ett hållbart och långsiktigt handelsklimat för alla. 

Augere främjar demokratiserad ETP-handel för dig som slutkund. Genom att jämföra emittenternas produkter på Marketmate på ett rättvist och för alla parter identiskt vis kan vi försäkra dig som handlare att du hittar den bäst lämpade ETP-produkten i enlighet med dina personliga handelspreferenser. Vidare delar våra traders alltid de, för dig som kund, bästa produktrekommendationerna i samband med deras handelsinspiration.

Genom nära samarbeten direkt med emittenterna arbetar vi för att kontinuerligt förbättra utbudet till dig som slutkund.

Name: The Boca Raton Tribune
Description:
“Your Closest Neighbor”, to us that’s much more than just a simple tagline.

Founded in January of 2010, The Boca Raton Tribune is currently the longest-running print newspaper publication in the City of Boca Raton. With over 400 editions, The Boca Raton Tribune has become a woven part of the community in Boca Raton.

Family owned and operated, The Boca Raton Tribune boasts an array of columnists and writers all who have deep ties to the city. 

Since its inception in 2010, The Boca Raton Tribune has always prided itself on being 100 percent community-oriented with news that matters to the residents of Boca Raton.

The Boca Raton Tribune is the leading source of local news in Boca Raton for nine years. The Tribune is the place readers go-to for the latest hyper-local news about Boca Raton, and during the last six municipal elections, the Tribune’s election survey has been able to correctly predict the way residents would cast their votes before the official election ballots were ever counted, showcasing the newspaper’s relevance in the community.

Winners of three Independent Free Papers of America awards, as well as the prestigious Community Newspapers of Florida Milton & Bernice Beckerman Award, which is presented to a member paper for community service that benefited a community charity, The Boca Raton Tribune’s main focus, is not only informing residents up the latest news, but also being an active voice in the community in creating change.

Printed weekly and distributed to over 30,000 readers in homes and businesses throughout the city, The Tribune also has a one-of-a-kind website with news updated regularly so readers never miss a beat.

Welcome to The Boca Raton Tribune, we truly are “Your Closest Neighbor”.

Name: Nuevo Diario de Santiago del Estero
Description:
NUEVO DIARIO nació en 1991, como la extensión de un proyecto más amplio que surgió en 1970, con la creación de LV11. Esta emisora de amplitud Modulada con 25 Kw de potencia y un radio de cobertura que alcanza los 600 km., nos permitió llegar con nuestra voz a todos los hogares santiagueños.

La pronta aceptación que tuvimos por parte de la comunidad posibilitó ampliar nuestros horizontes y fue así como en el año 1973 incorporamos la primera FM de la provincia, en el 89.5 del dial.

Las preferencias y necesidades de nuestra creciente audiencia nos llevó aincorporar cuatro emisoras más, cada una de ellas dirigida a distintos segmentos de la sociedad.

De este modo, fue casi natural nuestra necesidad de llegar a los santiagueños a través de un medio gráfico, sueño que se concretó a comienzos de la década del 90. Tras años de esfuerzo empresarial y profesional del plantel periodístico del Multimedio, NUEVO DIARIO es hoy el principal medio de información grafico de nuestra provincia.

Hoy asumimos el desafío de llegar a todo el mundo a través de NUEVO DIARIO WEB para superar las fronteras de un crecimiento sin límites, en nuestra misión de garantizar el derecho a la información de todos los santiagueños.
Location: Santiago del Estero, Santiago del Estero

Name: The Journal of Nature Studies - Annals of Agrarian Science
Description:
The English-language scientific journal "The Journal of Nature Studies - Annals of Agrarian Science" (former "Annals of Agrarian Science") was founded in 2003.

The journal publishes scientific research and review articles, book reviews, and conference materials in mainly in agricultural and biological sciences, as well as agricultural-related engineering and chemistry. 

The editorial board members, authors and reviewers represent scientists from a wide range of countries. 

From 2016 to 2018, the Journal was published under the auspices of the international electronic publishing house Elsevier.

Since 2024, the journal is being published under a modified name: "The Journal of Nature Studies - Annals of Agrarian Science".

Name: Charleston Daily Mail
Description:
The Charleston Daily Mail merged with the Charleston Gazette on July 20, 2015, to form the Charleston Gazette-Mail.

Founded in 1880, the Charleston Daily Mail was a long-time producer of multi-platform news products serving West Virginia.

The Daily Mail was given stable ownership in 1914 by former governor of Alaska, Walter Eli Clark. The newspaper's motto, as chosen by Gov. Clark, is "Without, or With, Offence to Friends or Foes, I Sketch Your World Exactly as It Goes." 

The Daily Mail for many years was owned by the Clay family, which sold it to Thompson Newspapers in 1987. The newspaper was also owned by Media News Group, a subsidiary of Digital First Media.

J.D. Maurice, its editor of many years until his retirement in 1978, won the Sigma Delta Chi award for editorial writing in 1958 and the Pulitzer Prize for distinguished editorial writing in 1975.

The paper featured an "everyman" cartoon character, Charley West (or occasionally his wife, Virginia "Ginny" West, or their dog, Cap West) who has a one-line comment on the news of the day on its front page.

The Daily Mail traditionally was an afternoon newspaper with a conservative editorial page. In January 2009 it switched to morning publication.

Up until July 2015, the Daily Mail was in a joint operating agreement with the Gazette. They are located in the same building in Charleston, W.Va. The Daily Mail published independently Monday through Friday. The two newspapers published the combined Saturday Gazette-Mail and Sunday Gazette-Mail.

Inner Secrets enjoys a strong readership among Indian and International retailers, distributors, manufacturers of raw materials and intimate apparel brands, etc. Its Hindi edition has a circulation strength of 25,000 copies whereas its English edition takes flight abroad with a strong reader base overseas along with loyal readers in the country giving it a circulation of 35,000 copies.
