Over the years, the magazine has cautiously harboured its main objective of bringing the Indian intimate apparel industry at par with the global scenario. In accordance, Inner Secrets values innovation, conceptualization and education with regards to intimate apparels and this colossal purchasing nation. As an ode to the growing prowess of the intimate apparel sector, Inner Secrets aspires to help customers grow their businesses, while contributing its significant share towards the whole industry.

Offering a complete overview of the entire intimate apparel industry, Inner Secrets encompasses news about lingerie, swimwear, shapewear, hosiery and sleepwear. Inner secrets delivers industry-specific facts, technological innovations, interviews of business tycoons, coverage of various international trade fairs, expansive cover-stories, business figures, and trends. The publication offers a level of information, which is critical to an industry member’s business decisions. Designed with the busy professional in mind, Inner Secrets is easily accessible and aesthetically pleasing.

Tendo em seu portfólio 8 edições do periódico mensal, a Rio Lapa teve seu projeto aprovado pela Lei Rouanet, e busca no mercado empresa/profissional especializado na captação de recursos de incentivo à cultura.
Location: Rio de Janeiro, Rio de Janeiro

Name: NewsChain
Description: A better View of the News. Watch the latest breaking news, sport, celebrity and entertainment online. PPA Award finalist for the Diversity of Year Initiative 2020.

Name: The Teen Tribune
Description:
The Teen Tribune is a weekly newspaper that serves as an adolescent coffee accompaniment to talk about anything and everything, unfiltered and unapologetic. 

In our weeklee e-newspaper, we discuss current affairs, finance, science & technology, fashion, food, fitness and basically anything that’s happening today and needs our attention. We even have columns for anonymous advice by our resident ‘Nextpert: Not an expert but the next best thing!’ and our in-house corporate wiz ‘Miss Futuristic: Adulting the real way!’

We also feature new initiatives teens may be part of along with their creative endeavours like art, articles, songs and dance. From curated Spotify playlists for issue themes, hilariously relatable Instagram posts, fortnightly livestreams and career fairs, our content is relatable and relevant.

Name: Startup Voice
Description: Startup Voice to portal informacyjny, który z zainteresowaniem śledzi rozwój polskiego środowiska startupowego. Zespół Startup Voice tworzą ludzie, którzy są zafascynowani nowymi technologiami, innowacyjnością oraz przemysłem i biznesem. Dzięki wieloletniej współpracy ze startupami Startup Voice potrafi dotrzeć do najważniejszych i najciekawszych informacji.

Name: Correio do Estado
Description: Leia o Correio do Estado na palma da sua mão. Acabou a desculpa que não tem ou tinha tempo para ler, leve o Correio do Estado para onde preferir.

Description: rédactionfinanciere.com se positionne comme le spécialiste du contenu premium SEO en gestion de patrimoine, finance, économie, immobilier, bourse et Fintech.

Name: Zeeuwse Carrièrekrant
Description: De Zeeuwse Carrièrekrant is een nieuw gezamenlijk initiatief van Uitgeverij De Bode, LMG strategie+creatie en de Zeeuwse Vacaturebank: een krant met Zeeuwse verhalen over werken, werkgevers, achtergronden, carrière en vacatures. Gratis op de mat door heel Zeeland.

Name: HNA Hessische/Niedersächsische Allgemeine
Description:
Die Hessische/Niedersächsische Allgemeine (HNA) ist DAS Medienhaus in Nordhessen und Südniedersachsen. Meinungsstark, weltoffen - und vor allem fest in der Region verwurzelt. Wir erscheinen gedruckt von montags bis samstags und gehören zum Verlag Dierichs.

Unseren Hauptsitz haben wir in Kassel. Außerdem gibt es zwölf Außenstellen.

Unser tägliches Geschäft beschränkt sich schon lange nicht mehr nur auf Herstellung und Verbreitung der HNA auf Papier. Heutzutage gehört es dazu, dass unsere Nutzer das Wichtigste aus der Region und dem Rest der Welt einfach und bequem auf dem PC, Tablet und Smartphone abrufen können. Mit unserer HNA.de-App, der Kassel-Live-App und dem ePaper informieren wir unsere Leser völlig unabhängig davon, wo sie sich gerade befinden.

In den Sozialen Netzwerken finden Sie uns bei Facebook (https://www.facebook.com/HNA/ plus weitere Seiten der Lokalausgaben), bei Instagram (https://www.instagram.com/hnanews/), bei Twitter (https://twitter.com/HNA_online) und bei Youtube (https://www.youtube.com/hnaonline).

Als innovatives Unternehmen bilden wir seit mehr als 50 Jahren verschiedene Berufsfelder aus:
- im Bereich Redaktion bieten wir Volontariate an
- es gibt die kaufmännische Ausbildung zur/zum Medienkauffrau/-mann Digital und Print
- in der Druckerei bilden wir zur/zum Mechatroniker/in aus.

Zudem bietet die HNA Jobs für Zusteller an (hna-zusteller.de/). Als Zusteller knüpfst du den direkten Kontakt zu den Lesern unserer Zeitung. So sorgst du dafür, dass die HNA jeden Morgen druckfrisch bei unseren Abonnenten ankommt. 

Wer uns erreichen möchte, findet hier alle Kontaktmöglichkeiten: hna.de/ueber-uns/kontakt/

Name: DEHRADUN CLASSIFIED _ Classified Newspaper
Description: National News Agency _ Dehradun Bazaar Weekly

Name: LoneStarLive.com
Description: LoneStarLive.com’s mission is to provide original, inclusive reporting on the stories that matter most to Texans and to celebrate the people of this great state.

Name: Ecopress
Description:
Vydavateľstvo ekonomickej a odbornej tlače Ecopress bolo založené v roku
1992. Je členom Európskej asociácie ekonomickej tlače (European Business
Press). 100-percentným akcionárom spoločnosti je Agrofert Holding, ktorej jediným akcionárom je podnikateľ Andrej Babiš.. Ten v apríli 2013 kúpil 100% akcií Ecopressu od českej Economie, ktorá patrí do portfólia spoločností investora Zdenka Bakalu.

Printové periodiká
Na slovenskom trhu je Ecopress vydavateľom denníka Hospodárske noviny, lifestylového
magazínu Prečo nie?! a špecializovaných časopisov Stratégie,
Obchod, Horeca, RUN, Golf SKGA, Student life, Zdravotnícke noviny, Sestra,
Diabetik a ďalších odborných titulov. Čítanosť titulov vydavateľstva Ecopress je
pravidelne meraná výskumom MML-TGI.

HN Online
Ecopress prevádzkuje spravodajský portál HNonline, finančný portál Finweb,
poradenský portál HNporadňa a platformu HNblogy. Poskytuje tiež on-line archív
a servis.

HN events
Konferencie sú zamerané na vyšší a stredný manažment. Vystúpenia skúsených
prednášajúcich s praktickými znalosťami sa striedajú s interaktívnou moderovanou
diskusiou. Konferencie sú vždy zacielené na určité odvetvie a ich program
zahŕňa aktuálnu tematiku.

HNClub a HNClub – Fórum
Pre členov HNClubu organizuje Ecopress odborné konferencie s významnými
zahraničnými i domácimi osobnosťami.

Name: Angers Info
Description: Depuis plus de 13 ans en ligne , Angers Info c'est l'essentiel de l'actualité dans l'Ouest de la France 24h24 et 7J/7

Name: Photojournalist
Description: We produce human interest features which we then syndicate to publications in Europe and Far East.

Name: Skar Finans
Description:
Om Skar Finans

Skar Finans er en plattform dedikert til å gi deg den nyeste innsikten innen økonomi, lån og finans. Vi fokuserer på å levere kvalitetsinnhold som hjelper deg med å ta bedre økonomiske beslutninger.

Vårt mål er å være en pålitelig kilde til informasjon, enten du er interessert i å lære mer om forbrukslån, sammenligne ulike lånemuligheter, eller få innsikt i finansmarkedets trender.

Med daglige artikler og oppdateringer jobber vi for å skape en brukervennlig og informativ nyhetsportal som dekker alt fra personlig økonomi til bredere finansielle temaer.

Hos Skar Finans handler det om å gjøre økonomi enkelt og tilgjengelig for alle. 

#Finans #Økonomi #Lån #Nyheter

Name: The Star Of Zion
Description: The Star of Zion is an award winning newspaper and journalistic media organization, published by the A.M.E. Zion Church as its official organ since 1876. Being guided by the core values; truth, faith, and love, the Star seeks to raise the consciousness of readers with news that is current, relevant, and dependable.

Name: Mountain Xpress
Description:
Mountain Xpress is the keen-eyed, eloquent voice of the Asheville metro area (pop. 225,000) and surrounding southern Appalachian counties, providing an indispensable guide for residents and visitors alike.

We focus on local politics, civic issues and the area's vibrant arts-and-entertainment scene -- reporting the news with a magazine flair. Our opinion section offers a popular forum for the debate of local issues, thanks in large part to the lively submissions of our readers, who constitute a diverse blend of the region's most active and independent-minded residents. We also publish the area's most comprehensive calendar --- a one-stop guide to what's happening in the region.

While the bulk of our readers are 25-to-49 years old, Mountain Xpress is read by a diverse audience that includes a 21 percent readership over age 60. Our readers are, primarily, active professionals who enjoy a greater-than-average amount of leisure time.

The paper's editorial goal is to provide a forum for debate and to help citizens of all political persuasions play an active part in the community.

Name: The Brown and White
Description:
The Brown and White is Lehigh University’s student news publication based in Bethlehem, Pennsylvania. Founded in 1894, the publication is produced entirely by Lehigh students. Editorial oversight and decision making falls to the student editorial board.

The Brown and White publishes a print edition on Tuesdays and Fridays during the school year, and it provides 24/7 online coverage of Lehigh’s campus and the surrounding community on its website. It aims to serve as a platform for conversation and idea exchange.

Continue to read, watch and share at:
www.thebrownandwhite.com
www.facebook.com/thebrownandwhite
www.twitter.com/lubrownwhite
www.instagram.com/lubrownwhite

Sign up for the weekly newsletter at:
http://thebrownandwhite.com/newsletter-signup/

The Brown and White print edition is published on Tuesdays and Fridays during the fall and spring semesters except during holiday periods. If you would like to subscribe to receive print versions delivered to your home or business, or if you have questions regarding your existing subscription, please contact Kathy Throne, the coordinator of the Lehigh University Department of Journalism and Communication, at kat404@lehigh.edu.

Name: The Fordham Ram
Description: Fordham University's student-run journal of public record.

Name: Business Lexington
Description:
Business Lexington is an independent, subscription and ad-based print and online publication focused on business and economic issues in the central Kentucky region. All content is locally originated.

The print edition is published monthly, and is distributed by mail. A weekly online version featuring its own fresh content is emailed to subscribers every Tuesday.

Name: Zawsze Pomorze
Description: Niezależny portal regionalny ZAWSZE POMORZE jest tworzony przez byłych dziennikarzy „Dziennika Bałtyckiego", którzy w sposób bezstronny, rzetelny i staranny codziennie dostarczają Państwu najważniejszych informacji, najlepszych reportaży, wywiadów i wnikliwych analiz istotnych dla mieszkańców Pomorza. Informujemy, radzimy, uczymy, tłumaczymy, bawimy i patrzymy władzy na ręce. Każdej władzy. Zawsze kierujemy się dobrem ludzi tu mieszkających, troską o utrzymanie wolności słowa i dojrzałej debaty publicznej oraz promujemy mądre decyzje, działania i słowa w przestrzeni społecznej. Zawsze będziemy zwierciadłem pomorskich małych ojczyzn i społeczności oraz strażnikiem praworządności i demokracji. A czasem po prostu zwyczajnej, elementarnej sprawiedliwości i ostatnią deską ratunku dla zwykłego człowieka. Nasz zespół gwarantuje, że tak będzie. Zawsze. Zawsze po stronie Czytelnika. Zawsze dla Was!

Name: Semi14
Description:
Founded in 2022 by Editor-in-Chief Jacob Hugosson and publisher Jonas Klar, Semi14 aims to provide Swedish industry and the Swedish public with news on an under-explained subject; the semiconductor industry.

At Semi14, visitors can expect daily, high-quality news, interviews and bylines with and from industry profiles as well as periodical reviews of hardware aimed at professionals.

Name: Baron Mag
Description:
BaronMag est un média indépendant qui a vu le jour en décembre 2009 grâce aux entrepreneurs Nelson Roberge et Leonardo Calcagno. On y parle affaire, design, bouffe et culture. 
Autrefois papier, BaronMag sévit maintenant uniquement sur le web, et est chapeauté par la compagnie de création de contenu Extra Caramel.

Name: The State Journal-Register
Description:
We are the No. 1 news source in Springfield and central Illinois, featuring the best local coverage of state government, municipal government, crime and public safety. We're known for our award-winning photography and featured columnists Bernard Schoenburg and Dave Bakke.

SJ-R.com, our online presence, is the No. 1 website in the region and can be counted on for the latest breaking news.

Name: Jefferson City News Tribune
Description: Central Missouri Newspapers, Inc. is a group of newspapers including the Jefferson City News Tribune, Fulton Sun, California Democrat, HER Magazine and JC Parents Magazine. We are a subsidiary of WEHCO Media. We also have websites that compliment each of our newspapers as well as magazines and specialty products. We offer marketing expertise, commercial printing with our state of the art press facility and graphic design capabilities. We are proud to serve the Mid Missouri market.

Name: eviathema.gr
Description: Eviathema.gr is the No1 News Media for Evia Greece

Name: Alsadaranews الصدارة نيوز
Description:
الصدارة نيوز.. موقع اخباري عربي متنوع... 

الوصف: 

أن العمل الصحفي مسؤولية بالغة الأهمية ويتحمل كل صحفي وناشط في ميدان الاعلام مسؤولية نقل الخبر بدقة و امانة وتحليله بموضوعية وبمهنية عالية .. خاصة واننا نحن في لبنان والعالم العربي نمر بمرحلة عصيبة وبالغة الدقة والخطورة، ولا يجب ان نغفل ان تعدد الآراء والالتزام بنقل مختلف وجهات النظر للقارئ الكريم واجب والتزام في الوقت عينه، لاننا نرفض الاعلام الموجه الذي يهدف لتعليب وجهات النظر والموقف السياسية في مسار واحد واتجها محدد.

لذلك فنحن في موقع الصدارة نيوز نرى ان من واجبنا الالتزام بما اشرنا إليه والتأكيد عل ان دورنا هو نقل الخبر لكل قارئ مهما كان انتماؤه او التزامه او توجهه السياسي، وبان التفاعل بين مختلف الاطراف السياسية و جماهيرها على صفحات الاعلام وفي الميدان السياسي هو المدخل الحقيقي لبناء عالم ديمقراطي حقيقي ولإبراز الوجه الحقيقي للإعلام الحر المستقل

الصدارة نيوز موقع مرخصة بموجب علم وخبر رقم /31/ صادر عن المجلس الوطني للاعلام

Name: NaeTaze
Description:
The team of NAETAZE is committed to providing the most recent news on global issues. 
Readers can trust the authenticity of our content.  
Our focus will be on the most trending issues that reader from All over the world wants to read. 
We will cover so many global topics including politics, showbiz (national, international), Politics (national, international),   Sports (national, international), Education (scholarships, national, international, guideline, interest building, guide yourself, researches),  Business/industries,  Debates / Discussions/analysis,    Food,   Tech & technologies, Defense/military/ aviation’s, Lifestyle/ health/ fitness.

Name: The Province
Description: The Province serves an audience and advertisers in Vancouver, B.C., by publishing news, sports and entertainment content on a variety of platforms -- including mobile apps, a website at theprovince.com, and a daily tabloid newspaper. It is part of Pacific Newspaper Group, a division of Postmedia Network. The Province has been Vancouver's daily newspaper since 1898.

Name: Al Roya Press & Publishing
Description:
Al Roya Press and Publishing is the Sultanate of Oman’s leading independent publishing house. Along with Oman's best daily newspaper, magazines like Al Roya, Automan, Crème de la Crème, Car Guide and Pride, we publish books, guides and maps that focus on communicating Oman to the world in a range of languages.

Set up in 1993 by our Chairman and CEO, Sh. Hatim Al Taie, Al Roya was founded to promote Oman's unique identity in the global sense. The company's titles reflect that initiative, having allowed the company to grow multifold to its leadership position in the Oman media.

Al Roya Daily is Oman's first in-depth Arabic Business Newspaper. Launched in 2009, it has set the standard for independent reporting, a decidedly Oman focussed editorial and for becoming Oman's second largest read newspaper in its first two years. 

Al Roya Magazine is an monthly Arabic lifestyle magazine with a circulation of 15,000. Automan (in English) is Oman's only car magazine and sets the standard for its editorial, production quality and loyal readership. It has a circulation of 11,000. Crème de la Crème is Oman's luxury magazine - and is the benchmark for the genré in Oman. This by-invitation magazine has a circulation of 5,000 copies. 

Pride is Oman's oldest bi-lingual National Day publication, with a theme based approach to Oman's culture and heritage that is showcased in a high-quality annual publication.

In addition, new age media platforms keep AL ROYA at the head of the media revolution, with award winning media portals, social media and apps.

The company also gives back to society in equal measure, having instituted the AL ROYA Business Awards and the Youth Awards in addition to sponsoring the unique SINDBAD mobile lending library that takes books to every corner of Oman.

This also holds true with our commitment to our advertising partners and book sponsors; we seek to maximize the effectiveness, reach and ultimately, value that our advertising partners get.

Name: Jornal Caderno
Description:
O CADERNO é um jornal de informação, orientando para servir a jovens e seus legítimos interesses e promoção do empreendedorismo e cultura de trabalho.
O CADERNO tem uma linha editorial é orientada por critérios de rigor e seriedade, sem qualquer dependência de ordem ideológica, política ou económica.
O CADERNO é responsável unicamente perante os leitores, com os quais mantém uma relação de permanente diálogo e abertura. Cria espaços apropriados para expressão de opiniões.
O jornal estabelece como únicos limites à sua intervenção, os interesses da juventude e aqueles que são impostos pela lei, pela deontologia jornalística, pela ética profissional, bem como pelo espaço privado dos cidadãos de uma forma geral.
O CADERNO defende um jornalismo de qualidade, com profundo sentido deontológico, baseado no rigor e na isenção, e recusa o sensacionalismo, a perseguição pessoal, o boato e a calúnia.
O jornal defende que uma juventude e opinião pública informada e esclarecida é essencial a uma sociedade democrática, aberta onde as oportunidades são distribuídas com base em critérios de comeptência e empenho, e entende contribuir para o aprofundamento da democracia económica e social no País através da prática de um jornalismo exigente, crítico, objectivo e plural.
O CADERNO oferece aos jovens e leitores em geral uma informação variada, mantendo-se atento às preocupações e aos interesses do público-alvo. Entende o CADERNO contribuir para uma cultura que valorize a liberdade enquanto valor absoluto e incontornável, o pluralismo político e de ideias, a tolerância, a democracia, o Estado de Direito e o primado da lei.
O CADERNO participa e contribui para o debate das grandes questões nacionais, com plena autonomia, na perspectiva de construção de uma sociedade aberta e interveniente, obedecendo apenas ao propósito de bem informar e esclarecer a opinião pública e os cidadãos.

Name: The Star newspaper (Sun Prairie WI)
Description:
Serving the Sun Prairie Area School District since 1876, The Star newspaper and website remains the area's primary source for information, including news, local sports, features and opinion. The Star has won several Wisconsin Newspaper Association (WNA) Better Newspaper Contest awards throughout its history.
Our special marketing sections and niche publications tell unique stories and get their supporting advertisers noticed.
The Star also offers print and deliver; social media consulting, online media sales, and more!
Check us out online!

Name: Highland News & Media Ltd
Description:
Highland News & Media Ltd (HNM), is a privately-owned company with newsbrands covering the Highlands, Moray and Grampian. Dedicated to Connecting Communities and Empowering Businesses. 

Learn more about our Digital subscriptions.

Name: Kingsport Times News
Description: The Kingsport Times News is a daily newspaper serving Northeast Tennessee and Southwest Virginia.

Name: The Fayetteville Observer
Description:
North Carolina’s oldest newspaper publishing since 1816, The Fayetteville Observer is our region’s premier daily news source. The Fayetteville Observer is a leader and early adopter of cutting-edge technology. In 1995, The Fayetteville Observer was one of the first newspapers in the state with its own website and was named “Best in the State” by The North Carolina Press association. The publication was recognized as one of “10 Newspapers That Do It Right” by Editor & Publisher magazine in 2018 for its work in the digital landscape due to a dedicated team that produces original content, engages with readers online and collaborates with the reporting staff.

Likewise, the company’s print product has thrived, also being named “Best in the State” numerous times for both news coverage and advertising by The North Carolina Press Association. The state-of-the-art printing press has earned the company worldwide recognition for print quality.

The Fayetteville Observer has broadened its portfolio of products to include community newspapers in Hope Mills, The Sandspur; and three weekly publications serving the military at Fort Bragg and Camp Lejeune. The Fayetteville Observer boldly moves into the future as the region’s multi-media leader - serving readers when, where and how they wish to receive their information, while allowing our advertisers’ marketing solutions to reach their desired audience.

As a Gannett publication, The Fayetteville Observer’s digital marketing solutions are powered by ThriveHive, an award-winning team of digital experts who provide leading-edge technology and highly customized programs that help small and mid-sized business succeed in today’s ever-changing marketing landscape

Name: Kalgoorlie Miner
Description:
The Kalgoorlie Miner is the only regional daily newspaper published in Western Australia. The newspaper was established over 125 years ago and enjoys one of the strongest readerships and most loyal following of any newspaper in Australia.

It is published Monday to Saturday each week, and is packed full of local news and sport, mining related stories and social pages, as well as world, national and entertainment pages.

Name: MeeT and TRaVeL MaG
Description: Le magazine de la Meeting Industry !

Name: Telegraph & Argus (Bradford)
Description: The Telegraph & Argus is the daily newspaper for Bradford and surrounding areas in West Yorkshire

Name: The Suburban Newspaper
Description:
The Suburban newspaper was founded on March 1, 1963, in Sophie Wollock's basement on Davies Avenue in Côte Saint-Luc. Wollock vowed at the time that the paper would be uncompromising in reporting the news and getting the truth out to the public.

In subsequent years, The Suburban would expand its coverage and launch additional editions in the surrounding communities, including Hampstead, Notre-Dame-de-Grâce, Côte-des-Neiges and Snowdon, Westmount, Town of Mount Royal, and Saint-Laurent. It also spread to the West Island in Dollard-des-Ormeaux, Beaconsfield, Kirkland, and Point Claire, and north into Chomedey, Laval.

The Suburban expanded even further in the 2000s to include an east-end edition that covered in Saint-Leonard and Rivière-des-Prairies, as well as going west to Vaudreuil-Dorion and south to LaSalle and Verdun.

The Wollock family owned the newspaper until 1987, when it was purchased by the Sochaczevski family, who own it to this day.

The Suburban has won numerous Quebec, Canada-wide and international awards for its top-notch editorials, news coverage, sports reporting, photography, opinions, community activism, feature stories and editorial cartooning. The Suburban is a repeat winner in the Quebec Community Newspaper Awards’ (QCNA) best overall newspaper category, and the first Canadian winner of the Suburban Newspapers of America’s (SNA) best community service award.

The Suburban has also kept up with the times by continually implementing new innovations, including putting the entire newspaper online as a digital e-edition, and expanding its website to include much more content, including videos and webcasts.

Today, The Suburban has a print circulation of 50,000 copies and is the largest English-language newspaper in Quebec.

To advertise in The Suburban, call 514-484-1107.

Name: Industry Slice
Description:
Feel confident with your industry knowledge to innovate and make decisions knowing you have the best intelligence possible. 

Our monitoring intelligence and industry experts navigate the worldwide news for you.  We provide you with an easy-to-read slice of relevant, trusted, quality information all in one place – daily.   

Each newsletter is an industry slice of the 100,000s of news articles on the business industries we monitor every day.

Name: Manager Magazine
Description:
Le support d’information « Le Magazine du Manager » est un bimestriel spécialisé à vocation sous régionale qui se propose de répondre à un besoin pressant des organisations et surtout de leurs dirigeants, en mettant à leur disposition une information centrée sur le management des organisations. 
Ce nouveau-né de la presse magazine sénégalaise porté sur les fonts baptismaux par une équipe éditoriale ayant capitalisé une expérience d’une vingtaine d’années dans le management et la presse magazine vient, sans aucun doute, combler un vide dans le landerneau médiatique sénégalais.
Chaque édition de ce magazine propose aussi un « Plus » qui est un dossier spécial.

Name: Editions Fitamant
Description: Editions Fitamant est une société d'éditions familiale de presse professionnelle depuis 1995.

Name: Food World/ Food Trade News
Description:
Food World is the authoritative source for news about the grocery industry in the Baltimore-Washington, Richmond-Norfolk, North Carolina and Central Pennsylvania markets, the third-largest in the country.

Food Trade News is the authoritative source for news about the grocery industry in the Pennsylvania, Delaware, New Jersey and metro New York markets (and now touching upon the New England market), considered to be the country’s largest.

Name: Tri-City News
Description: Local News serving the Tri-Cities in British Columbia since 1984.  We cover Port Moody, Port Coquitlam, Coquitlam, Anmore and Belcarra.  Award winning journalists and coverage.

Name: Dayton City Paper
Description:
Dayton City Paper offers pages full of challenges to prevailing notions, investigations of local institutions and voices that are not those of the usual figureheads in the community. Our entertainment pages are filled with local talent — jazz musicians, filmmakers and musicians. The paper is unabashedly local, unashamedly grassroots and absolutely alternative. And the Dayton market loves it.

Dayton City Paper consistently delivers a valuable audience mix of professionals, community leaders and university students. This is an audience interested in our unique coverage of music, art and independent thought. These are readers that other print media wish they could have: professional women, young adults, the highly educated and those with high disposable incomes and the imagination to spend creatively.

Our commitment to provide quality readership, content and design unmatched in the market makes us indispensable to an ever-increasing number of readers and advertisers.

The Dayton City Paper is distributed free to well over 500+ pickup locations throughout the metropolitan Dayton region including Beavercreek, Bellbrook, Centerville, Clayton, Englewood, Fairborn, Franklin, Huber Heights,  Kettering, Miamisburg, Moraine, Oakwood, Springboro, Springfield, Tipp City, Troy, Vandalia, West Carrollton, Xenia, Yellow Springs, and much more.

Name: The Euroculturer
Description: The Euroculturer Magazine was created in June 2012 and is mostly managed by current students of the Euroculture MA programme. Our articles are written by Euroculture students and alumni and cover a variety of topics related to European and the world culture, society and politics. We also have a blog section where students talk about their Euroculture experience. The Euroculturer Magazine is a student initiative and has the official support from the Euroculture Consortium.

Name: TV Cidade Verde
Description: Informações sobre os projetos especiais que são desenvolvidos e exibidos na programação da TV Cidade Verde, Cidadeverde.com e Revista Cidade Verde.

Name: Res Publica Nowa
Description:
Res Publica Nowa is Polish quarterly magazine issued since 1979. Res Publica Nowa publish articles on politics, economy, culture and cities. In addition to Res Publica Nowa quarterly, we publish couple of additional magazines - every six months Visehrad Insight and Magazyn Miasta.

***
Fundacja Res Publica wspiera rozwój kultury i poziomu debaty publicznej poprzez wydawanie 3 tytułów: kwartalnika Res Publica Nowa, półrocznika Visegrad Insight oraz Magazynu Miasta. Prowadzi projekty tj. DNA Miasta, Partnerstwo Wolnego Słowa, New Europe 100, debaty i wydarzenia. Fundacja jest operatorem Koalicji na rzecz Polskich Innowacji.

Name: Star Community Newspapers
Description: American Community Newspapers II, LLC is one of the top community newspaper publishers in the United States based on circulation, and operates in four of the most attractive major U.S. markets: Minneapolis - St. Paul, Columbus, Dallas - Fort Worth and Suburban Washington, D.C. - Northern Virginia. The Company's award winning group of 86 newspapers and fourteen niche publications reaches approximately 1.4 million households in the suburban communities surrounding these major cities and enjoys market leading circulation penetration in all of its markets. ACN serves some of the most affluent, high growth markets in the United States, and is strategically positioned in the wealthiest counties in each market, including Hennepin County in Minnesota, Delaware and Union Counties in Columbus, Collin County in Texas and Fairfax, Arlington and Loudoun Counties in Northern Virginia. The Company is focused on providing high quality, local editorial content to its readers, and targeted advertising packages to local and national advertisers. ACN's goal is to be the preeminent provider of local content and advertising in any market it serves. The Company is widely recognized and admired for its editorial content and value it offers its advertising customers.

Name: Pique Newsmagazine
Description:
Located in the mountain resort town of Whistler, British Columbia, Pique Newsmagazine is the unequivocal leader in reporting, interpreting and understanding the culture of the Coast Mountains and what it means to those who live, work and play in Whistler. Established in 1994, Pique's success is derived from hard work, quality design, insightful editorial and an impressive list of regular advertisers. Our readers are informed, enlightened and entertained, and our advertisers receive the exposure and the results they expect.

With award winning art covers and a well-structured editorial design, Pique's contemporary newsmagazine style is accessible to a broad demographic and connects easily to our readers, who have a strong connection with mountain culture.

Name: Henrico Citizen
Description: The Henrico Citizen has been the award-winning, hometown news source of Henrico County since 2001. Now fully digital, the Citizen publishes daily on HenricoCitizen.com and daily on weekdays through an email news update and podcast. The Citizen reaches nearly 80,000 readers monthly and provides the most comprehensive coverage of Henrico County of any outlet.

Name: Style-Republik.com
Description:
Style-Republik.com - Chuyên trang trực tuyến uy tín về thời trang, sáng tạo & kinh doanh

Style-Republik.com ra đời năm 2016, là chuyên trang giám tuyển thời trang & sáng tạo đầu tiên ở Việt Nam. Tạp chí trực tuyến Style-Republik.com có định hướng mang tính học thuật cao, tập trung vào đối tượng độc giả chuyên ngành như các sinh viên thời trang, các nhà thiết kế, người kinh doanh thời trang thiết kế, Fashionista, Blogger, Stylist, Fashion Illustrator, Fashion Marketer,...Mục tiêu của Style-Republik là tạo nên một kênh thông tin cho những bạn trẻ đam mê thời trang, những nhà kinh doanh thương hiệu thời trang Việt, trở thành là tiếng nói chính thống của thời trang ViệtNam, mang đến những thông tin bổ ích, hấp dẫn về kinh doanh và sáng tạo trong lĩnh vực thời trang và nghệ thuật ở Việt Nam và trên thế giới. SR muốn được góp phần chuyên nghiệp hoá ngành thời trang nội địa qua những bài viết mới nhất, những bài phân tích chuyên sâu để người đọc có cái nhìn đúng đắn và sâu sắc tồn tại và phát triển trong ngành công nghiệp thời trang.

Name: BVDA Bundesverband kostenloser Wochenzeitungen
Description: Der Bundesverband kostenloser Wochenzeitungen e. V. (BVDA) vertritt als Spitzenorganisation seit seiner Gründung am 3. Juli 1987 die Interessen der Verlage kostenloser Wochenzeitungen in Deutschland. Dem BVDA gehören 113 Verlage mit insgesamt 332 Titeln und einer Wochenauflage von 25,3 Millionen Exemplaren an. Damit repräsentiert der BVDA  54 Prozent der Gesamtauflage der kostenlosen Wochenzeitungen in Deutschland. Kostenlose Wochenzeitungen werden bundesweit von rund 50 Millionen Menschen über 14 Jahren gelesen.

Name: الحياة الجديدة | New Life Magazine
Description:
الحياة الجديدة هي مجلة ثقافية اجتماعية شهرية تصدر من العاصمة السورية دمشق، وتوزع في سورية ولبنان مبدئياً.

تحاول المجلة من خلال تنوّع ألوان موادها الصحفية أن تسلط الضوء على الأحداث والقضايا الاجتماعية والثقافية في سورية ولبنان خصوصاً والشرق الأوسط عموماً، وكما إلى تغطيتها بعض النشاطات الفكرية والفنية داخل وخارج سورية بما يتفق مع اهتمامات المجتمع السوري ووعيه، وخصوصاً الأنشطة التي يقوم عليها ويديرها السوريون أنفسهم.

تناقش المجلة بعض الموضوعات العامة المتعلقة بالأدب والمسرح والسينما وتكنولوجيا المعلومات في العالم.

على عكس المجلات ووسائل الإعلام السابقة في سورية، تحاول (الحياة الجديدة) التركيز على الحركة الثقافية والفنية المحلية وخصوصاً الشبابية منها، والتي ترى أنها لا تحظى بالاهتمام الإعلامي اللازم عادة، لبعدها عن النشاطات الفنية بصورتها التجارية المعروفة، والتي تحظى عادة باهتمام وسائل الإعلام الكبرى.

تسعى إدارة المجلة من خلال إدارتها وفريق تحريرها الشابين أن تقدم لقرائها رؤية حديثة تعكس بالدرجة الأولى اهتمامات الجيل الشاب السوري والعربي باستخدام لغة لينة وبعيدة قدر الإمكان عن القواعد الرتيبة المتبعة في المتوفر من وسائل الإعلام المطبوعة التقليدية.

Name: GenealogyBank
Description:
GenealogyBank.com is a leading genealogy website from NewsBank, Inc.  GenealogyBank’s searchable online database features over 1 billion genealogy records for in-depth family history research. This vast collection of exclusive digitized content includes modern obituaries, historical newspapers, rare books, pamphlets, military records, government documents and more. 

In addition to more than 300 years of extensive news coverage, GenealogyBank features a streamlined interface and a fast, accurate search engine, allowing genealogy researchers to easily trace ancestry and uncover previously hard-to-find family history information.

Name: Hojemais Araçatuba
Description:
O site Hojemais Araçatuba abrange a região de Araçatuba e Birigui. Inicialmente em formato digital, as notícias chegarão ao leitor gratuitamente e com rapidez. A marca Hojemais é uma franquia, que atua com independência editorial em diferentes municípios.

Em Araçatuba (SP), o veículo de comunicação tem à frente um grupo de investidores locais. A equipe de reportagem é formada por jornalistas com anos de atuação na região, que trabalham com imparcialidade e informações precisas.
No setor de negócios, profissionais com conhecimentos da área de publicidade, tanto digital quanto no impresso. O suporte tecnológico conta com núcleo especializado.

Missão e visão

A nossa missão é oferecer soluções inovadoras e informações seguras, contribuindo com a difusão de notícias, cultura e entretenimento para melhoria da qualidade de vida.

A nossa visão é ser reconhecido como um grupo de comunicação de credibilidade, líder na gestão e difusão de conteúdo nas cidades do interior do Brasil, que proporciona resultado por meio da combinação de produtos e serviços na área, com profissionais comprometidos e qualificados.

Name: The Taiwan Times 台灣國際報
Journal La Revue
Description:
La Revue de Terrebonne, un journal hebdomadaire fondé par Aimé Despatis en mai 1959, a fêté ses 50 ans en 2009. Sa fille Marie-France a pris la relève jusqu'en 2004, alors que Gilles Bordonado, son propriétaire actuel, en a fait l'acquisition.
Plus important hebdomadaire indépendant et gratuit au Québec, il paraît le mercredi. Son tirage est de 57 800 exemplaires. Il emploie trente employés et collaborateurs. 
Au cœur de l'action, La Revue valorise les réalisations des gens, des institutions, des organismes, des industries et commerces de Terrebonne et Mascouche. Les articles sont nombreux et variés, la plupart des primeurs se retrouvant dans nos pages chaque semaine. 
Membre d'Hebdos Québec, La Revue imprimée en grand tabloïde (8 x 225) édite une vingtaine de brochures et cahiers thématiques, deux magazines Le Reflet économique des Moulins, dont la version automnale a fêté ses 25 ans en 2008, les magazines Mariage et Destination Lanaudière, ainsi que le cahier hebdomadaire Nous, à vocation culturelle portant sur les arts et le patrimoine. 
En 2008, Gilles Bordonado a acquis le bottin téléphonique le Guide Rouge (Guide des adresses) et le Guide Gourmand, publié en format brochure.
Le journal gère cinq sites Internet : www.larevue.qc.ca, www.guiderouge.ca, www.guidegourmand.com,  www.boutiquelarevue.com, un centre commercial virtuel de vente de certificats-cadeaux, et www.menusvirtuels.com, un site Internet présentant des menus de restaurants de la MRC Les Moulins.

Name: Fallimenti e Società
Description:
Fallimenti e Società - Osservatorio Triveneto di Diritto Fallimentare e Societario

A seguito dell'evoluzione normativa che negli anni ha tentato di interpretare nel migliore dei modi possibili la realtà imprenditoriale e la crisi che questa sta attraversando, da qualche tempo si avverte l’esigenza di costituire un soggetto che si occupi di analizzare settori importanti dell'universo giuridico-economico che mostrano una dinamicità sempre più crescente e non sempre coordinata e coerente.

Per far fronte a tale esigenza alcuni Studi professionali con Sede in Veneto si sono detti disponibili a condividere risorse e competenze per dar vita a un Osservatorio Triveneto di Diritto Societario e Fallimentare, scegliendo appositamente il nome di “Fallimenti & Società”, garantendone la struttura e la continuità nel tempo, coinvolgendo qualificati professionisti, autorevoli esperti di livello nazionale, nonché docenti universitari.

Tramite lo strumento della Rivista elettronica, l’Osservatorio si propone, innanzi tutto, di mettere a disposizione di un pubblico qualificato di operatori i singoli provvedimenti (decreti, ordinanze e sentenze) emanati dalle Sezioni Specializzate per le Imprese e dalle Sezioni Fallimentari dei Tribunali del Veneto, del Friuli Venezia Giulia e del Trentino Alto-Adige come pure di altre regioni e cercando di affiancare l’approfondimento di settori sempre più collaterali come il diritto societario, fallimentare, tributario e penale.

L’Osservatorio si propone come luogo di incontro, organizzando Seminari, Tavole Rotonde e Convegni in materia di diritto fallimentare e societario e mettendosi così al servizio degli Operatori per confrontare prospettive e idee risolutive circa una casistica sempre più vasta ed esigente.

Name: Sanayi Gazetecilik Ltd. Şti.
Description:
Sanayi Gazetecilik olarak endüstri camiasındaki müşterilerimizin ihtiyaç ve talepleri doğrultusunda en kaliteli ve doğru hizmeti planlamaya ve tanıtım yönetimine dayalı en hızlı bir biçimde sunmayı ilke edindik. Bu bağlamda teknoloji ve görselliğin bir arada bulunduğu bir çok projeyi gerçekleştirdik.

Dinamik ve profesyonel kadromuzla sizlere en iyi hizmeti hep daha yüksek kalitede verebilme anlayışı içinde çalıştık. Grafik tasarım, internet ve basılı medya konularında görsel hizmetleri sizlere ve hedef kitlenize sunduk.

* Kurumsal Kimlik Çalışmaları : Bir kurumun, şirket içi/dışında duruşunu ve davranışlarını temsil etme biçimlerinin tümüne verilen addır. Günümüzde birçok kuruluş, artık toplum kalite anlayışını benimsemiş ve kurumsal bir stratejiyle kurumsallığını sunma çabası ve gayreti içine girmiştir. Sizin sesinizi daha çok kişiye duyurabilmek için bu görevi biz üstleniyoruz.

* Yayım ve Tasarım Hizmetleri : Kurumsal kimlik kapsamında endüstri camiasında hizmet veren kurumların; kurumsal dergi, tanıtım kataloğu, rehber, internet reklamı, basılı medya reklamları,
gazete, el ilanı, broşür, kitap vb. tanıtım ve organizasyonlarınızın kurum olarak tasarım çalışmalarını hazırlayıp gazetemizde, web sitemizde, dergilerimizde yayımlayarak hedef kitleye ulaştırıyoruz.

* Organize Yayın Dağıtım : Dergi, Bülten, Gazete, Rehber, Katalog vb. yayın organlarınızı güncel listeyle 3000 sanayi noktasına, kurum ve kuruluşlara kişiye özel olarak teslim ediyoruz. Yayınlarınızı hedef kitlenizin kapısına değil masasına kurye fiyatına kargo dağıtımıyla ulaştırıyoruz.

Name: Minnesota Spokesman-Recorder
Description:
The Minnesota Spokesman-Recorder (MSR) enjoys a living legacy as the oldest Black-owned news outlet in the state of Minnesota and one of the longest-standing, family-owned news organizations in the country.

Name: Chance for Success, Street Newspaper
Description:
OUR MISSION
Chance for Success, Street Newspaper provides opportunities to the homeless, marginalized, re-entry, and low-income individuals in the Tucson community to help create their stories and sell the newspaper to the community with dignity, respect, and advocacy.

OUR VALUES
Creativity. We celebrate resourcefulness and imagination.
Dignity. We lift each other up through the quality of our work and our engagement with each other.
Equity. We hold the work of anti-racism and anti-oppression as central to our aspirations of justice.
Grace. We regard each other not by our worst moment, but our best future.
Integrity. We hold truth and justice paramount in telling our stories.
Relation. We build solidarity by knowing each other across difference.

Name: National Newspaper Publishers Association
Description:
The National Newspaper Publishers Association (NNPA) is the organization for all African-American owned newspapers in the United States. The organization, also known as "The Black Press of America," was founded in 1940 by a coalition of 20 Black newspapers and their publishers.

The organization now comprised of over 180 newspapers and a collective readership of over 19 million people. We currently run NNPA.org, our organization's website, and BlackPressUSA.com, our website that covers African-American news and showcases the work of our individual member papers.

The NNPA Foundation is a 501c(3) non-profit that coincides with the work of the NNPA. The foundation is also a member of Act Against AIDS Leadership Initiative (AAALI), a grant with the Centers of Disease Control and Prevention (CDC) that encompasses 19 minority organizations to further the work of HIV/AIDS prevention and education in the African-American, Latino and same-sex communities.

Name: Bon à Savoir
Description:
Informer et défendre les intérêts des consommateurs en Suisse romande! Telle est la mission du magazine Bon à Savoir (400'000 lecteurs REMP 2017/1), édité par Editions Plus sàrl, une entreprise à but non lucratif.

INFORMER – pour permettre à chacun de faire de choix éclairés:
- Par des tests de produits, achetés auprès des distributeurs tel un consommateur lambda, puis confiés à des laboratoires indépendants de l'industrie.
- Par des comparatifs de services, permettant à chacun de se faire une idée simple et rapide sur les meilleurs choix du moment.
- Par des enquêtes journalistiques approfondies.

DEFENDRE – lorsque l'information seule ne suffit pas:
- Nous intervenons auprès des politiques et des entreprises afin de faire évoluer la cause des consommateurs.
- Nous n'hésitons pas à défendre la cause de nos abonnés en justice afin qu'une jugement serve au plus grand nombre.

Crédible et indépendant, Bon à Savoir s'appuie sur une équipe de professionnels composée de journalistes, de juristes et de graphistes, épaulés par une équipe administrative qui assure, chaque jour ouvrable, un service de qualité aux abonnés.
Nos cinq valeurs essentielles sont: indépendance, transparence, objectivité, intégrité et responsabilité!

Description: Em Tempo, portal de conteúdo e notícias do Amazonas, traz com credibilidade e agilidade as notícias de Manaus, do Amazonas, da Amazônia, do Brasil, do mundo sobre economia, política, ciência e tecnologia, concursos, empregos, educação, Esportes, carros, ciência, saúde, natureza, cultura, cinema, turismo, viagem, cidades, polícia, trânsito, vídeos do SBT Manaus, vídeos dos telejornais do SBT Manaus.

Name: The Herald-Palladium
Description:
The Herald-Palladium has held its current name since 1975, but it can trace its genealogy back to 1868.

Leonard G. Merchant started the Benton Harbor Palladium as a weekly in 1868, and sold it the following year to J.P. Thresher. The Palladium went through several ownerships until being acquired by Frank Gibson, who in 1886 converted it into the Daily Palladium. Merchant left Benton Harbor for St. Joseph in 1877. He bought a weekly, The Traveler and Herald and renamed it the St. Joseph Herald. Shortly after the turn of the century, Merchant and his son, Leonard E., sold their property to Ephriam W. Moore who published as The Evening Herald.

Competing dailies moved into both cities around the turn of the century. John Nellis Klock, J. Stanley Morton and Humphrey S. Gray established The Evening News in Benton Harbor in 1895.

In 1905, Willard Brewer, Moore's nephew, bought The St. Joseph Press, a weekly created in 1888, and changed it to a daily. By 1904, The Evening News had displaced The Daily Palladium as the dominant paper in Benton Harbor. Gibson that year sold his paper to Klock, who consolidated the two papers into The News-Palladium. In 1910, the paper was sold to Moore. In 1916, Brewer and Moore merged their St. Joseph publications into The Herald-Press.

In 1919, Moore retired and sold The News-Palladium to Palladium Publishing Co. incorporated that year by Klock, Stanley R. Banyon and Willard J. Banyon Sr. In 1928, the company bought out The Herald-Press Co.

The two companies continued to publish two papers. In 1965, the company shifted production of The Herald-Press to The News-Palladium's plant. In 1975,  The Herald-Press and The News-Palladium became The Herald-Palladium.

In 1985, Palladium Publishing sold the newspaper to Thomson Inc. Thomson operated the paper until 1996, when it sold The Herald-Palladium to the Community Newspapers Division of Hollinger International. Hollinger sold the newspaper in 2000 to Paxton Media Group Inc. of Paducah, Ky.

Description: Economic news

Name: The Daily Catch
Description: We are a non-profit digital newspaper in the town of Red Hook, New York in the Hudson River Valley. We focus on journalism in the public interest and on mentoring young journalists.

Name: postnoon
Description:
With 32 colour pages of hyper-local, national and international, entertainment, sports, lifestyle, health, fashion and business news; postnoon offers a succinct mix of national, international news interspersed with local information. The compact daily is designed to appeal to teens / college students, corporate executives, homemakers, business and retired persons. The articles are concise and precise so that the reader can take in all the key facts quickly, and news is chosen for its relevance to the lives of its target audience and for its ability to stimulate the readers.

As the preeminent daily newspaper in the competitive Hyderabad market, the mission of postnoon is to chronicle the triumphs and tragedies of this great city through a bold, irreverent and edgy tabloid design that readers know and love. 

From city-specific news and business to interesting human interest stories, trend stories, sports and opinion all on the local, national and international levels, postnoon is committed to being Hyderabad’s source for essential information and entertainment.

The power of postnoon brand extends beyond newspaper to its online presence www.postnoon.com . This additional medium bring the same flavor and style as the original newspaper, while keeping pace with technology and consumer demands.

postnoon knows its readers, and readers love the postnoon.

Name: The Laborecon
Description:
The Voice of Economics Students in Bangladesh

Welcome to Laborecon, the premier newsletter published by the Economics Students Society of Bangladesh. Our mission is to provide insightful analysis, foster informed discussions, and share the latest developments in the field of economics, both locally and globally. Through expert articles, student research, and engaging content, Laborecon aims to bridge the gap between academic knowledge and real-world economic challenges.

Name: Move News
Description: O Move News é portal de informações do Grupo Insight Trade, que está há 30 anos no mercado e tem no DNA o mercado automobilístico e de transportes, alguns dos segmentos pelo Move.

Name: La Opinión de Santiago
Description:
La Opinión de Santiago es un medio digital que busca informar a los jovenes de las cosas que pasan en Querétaro, México y el Mundo, con la idea de innovar en los medios de distribución de información siempre basandonos en hechos y informando la verdad.
Valoramos la credibilidad siendo esta una de las bases que nos distingue y diferencia a nuestra empresa, todo trabajo periodístico debe contar con diferentes ángulos de la noticia (todas las notas pueden ser susceptibles a replica). Debido a que buscamos atraer a jovenes para que se informen y puedan crear su propio criterio basado en información con hechos.

Name: The Chicago Maroon
Description:
The Chicago Maroon, the independent student newspaper of The University of Chicago, is a twice-weekly publication that traces its founding to 1892. 

During autumn, winter, and spring quarters of the academic year, The Maroon publishes every Tuesday and Friday. The paper consists of four sections: News, Viewpoints (opinion), Arts, and Sports. The Maroon prints its quarterly news magazine, Grey City, before every reading period. In the late summer, it publishes its annual orientation Issue (O-Issue) for entering first-year students, including sections on the university and the city of Chicago.

Name: Pakistan Press International (PPI)
Description: Pakistan Press International (PPI), the country’s independent news agency, was established in 1956 with a view to providing the media in Pakistan with an objective news service. Since then, it has carried out its mission under most trying circumstances.

Name: Marie Claire Suisse
Description:
Marie Claire Suisse se décline en version suisse pour une plus grande
proximité. Marie Claire Suisse tisse un lien fort avec ses lectrices en abordant
ides thématiques de leur quotidien. 

Tous les mois, retrouvez les dernières tendances, les meilleures adresses, des conseils, des témoignages, des reportages, etc. 

La magazine Marie Claire est leader des mensuels féminins, avec une présence mondiale dans 34 pays, en 18 langues, sur 5 continents.

Name: Eure Infos / La Dépêche d'Evreux
Description:
Deux hebdos : Eure Infos le mardi, La Dépêche le vendredi. 
Un site internet.
L'actualité d'Evreux et de ses alentours.

Name: Jiji Press
Description: Jiji Press is an online portal that features news, information, and data. It was founded in 1945 and is headquartered in Japan.

Name: Réseau.Presse
Description:
Réseau.Presse est une organisation nationale qui regroupe 21 journaux francophones en situation minoritaire à travers le Canada. Nous sommes dédiés à la promotion et au soutien du journalisme local en français, un élément essentiel pour la vitalité des communautés francophones et acadiennes.

Notre mission : renforcer la voix de nos membres en leur offrant des outils, des ressources et un soutien stratégique pour relever les défis uniques auxquels ils font face. En tant que porte-parole des médias communautaires francophones, nous favorisons la collaboration, l'innovation et l'excellence dans le secteur de l'information.

Réseau.Presse joue un rôle crucial dans la défense de la diversité médiatique et la préservation de la langue française au Canada. Nos actions incluent la formation des équipes rédactionnelles, le développement de modèles économiques durables et la représentation des intérêts de nos membres auprès des instances gouvernementales et des partenaires clés.

Nous croyons en la puissance de l'information locale pour inspirer, éduquer et mobiliser les communautés, tout en valorisant les histoires uniques qui façonnent leur identité.
 Découvrez comment nous soutenons le journalisme francophone et faisons rayonner les communautés à travers le Canada.

Name: Réforme
Description:
Chaque semaine, le journal Réforme offre un regard protestant sur l'actualité nationale et internationale, politique, religieuse, économique, sociale et culturelle. C'est aussi un média en ligne qui vous informe quotidiennement et rejoint près de 320 000 internautes par mois.
Retrouvez-nous sur les réseaux sociaux et recevez tous les samedis matin la newsletter Culture (les coups de coeurs du week-end, films, livres, musique...).
Sur le site éditorial Réforme, il est également possible de s'abonner en ligne, de déposer une demande de publication d'annonce, d'acheter le journal ou hors-serie au numéro ou encore de soutenir la fondation Réforme.

Name: BYU-Idaho Scroll
Description: Student journalism organization for Brigham Young University-Idaho.

Name: Accueillir Magazine
Description:
Tout savoir sur les maisons d’hôtes

Presse, Edition et Formation pour les créateurs et propriétaires de chambres d'hôtes.
Accueillir Magazine est un bimestriel pratique. Il informe les propriétaires de maison d’hôtes de façon complète et aborde tous les sujets qui sont leur quotidien. 
Des ouvrages techniques permettent de faire des choix  sur des sujets majeurs comme le choix du statut juridique ou les problématiques internet.
Les journalistes de la rédaction proposent également des formations, "2 jours pour ouvrir sa maison d'hôtes" pour réussir son intallation et éviter les pièges quand on crée une maison d'hôtes.

Name: Sir Harry Evans Investigative Journalism Summit
Description:
Truth Tellers, the Sir Harry Evans Investigative Journalism Summit, is co-hosted by editor and author Tina Brown CBE, Reuters Editor-in-Chief Alessandra Galloni, and Durham University Vice Chancellor Karen O’Brien. The summit takes place in London on 15 May, 2024 from 9.30am-6.30pm.

The summit brings together the world’s most dogged and diverse truth-seekers, both seasoned and innovative: unsung reporters who risk their lives and reputations, intrepid war photographers, digital data sleuths, relentless documentarians, and enterprising investigators in podcasting, publishing, TV, and streaming media. What they share is a moral commitment to the truth – not the sanctioned story, the acceptable version or the cosmetic spin – but the unvarnished account of what really happened.

Name: Caring for the Ages
Description: Caring for the Ages provides post-acute and long-term care professionals with timely and relevant news and commentary. It is the official newspaper of the Post-Acute and Long-Term Care Medical Association (PALTmed).

Name: The Two River Times
Description:
Founded in September 1990, approved as an IRS 501(c)(3) nonprofit charity in February 2024 and donated to the community by Domenic DiPiero in September 2024, the TRT is a full broadsheet, paid circulation weekly newspaper based in Red Bank and covering towns on or near the Navesink and Shrewsbury Rivers in Monmouth County, NJ. 
 
The Two River Times has converted operations into a community-first approach to journalism by becoming a community-funded 501(c)(3) nonprofit news organization. Donations and contributions made to The Two River Times are tax deductible.
 
The Two River Times is dedicated to local community news. The TRT consistently has been recognized for excellence in editorial coverage, community service, photography, advertising and design, earning top competitive journalistic awards from the New Jersey Press Association.
 
Published every Thursday, The Two River Times covers the news, art, culture and lifestyles of the communities it serves with the caliber of editorial coverage, photography and design most often associated with the finest dailies.
 
But most importantly, it's the place thousands of readers turn for local community news. What's happening next door and down the street. Across the back fence and at the last board meeting. It's where Two River residents connect with news and features on their hometowns.

Name: Jornal O MIRANTE
Description: O Mirante foi fundado por Joaquim António Emídio a 16 de novembro de 1987, na Chamusca, com publicação mensal e tiragem de dois mil exemplares. Quatro anos depois, o jornal passa a quinzenário contendo 24 páginas, e só nesse ano ocorreu a profissionalização des seus contribuidores como jornalistas. Em setembro de 1995, o jornal muda-se para Santarém e passa a semanário. Entretanto, a abrangência regional das notícias, já se alargara aos concelhos de Golegã, Entroncamento, Torres Novas, Alpiarça, Almeirim, Salvaterra de Magos, Benavente, Coruche, Azambuja e Vila Franca de Xira.[1] A versão on-line surgiu em novembro de 2002 e, no ano seguinte, funde-se com o Jornal do Vale do Tejo e dá origem às edições O Mirante Vale do Tejo, O Mirante Médio do Tejo e O Mirante Lezíria do Tejo, chegando à tiragem de 35 mil exemplares.[1] Em abril de 2016, O Mirante abre parceria com o jornal Expresso, a revista Visão e emissora de televisão SIC pertencentes ao grupo Impresa.

Name: Bioenergitidningen
Description: Vi arbetar brett över alla områden i bioenerginäringen och har ett nära samarbete med framstående personer i företag, myndigheter och organisationer. Tidningen BIOENERGI är Nordens största tidskrift i sitt slag och innehåller alla aspekter av produktion och användning av bioenergi för att ge värme, el, ånga och drivmedel.

Name: Purgatory Sandwich
Description:
Some people call the Purgatory Sandwich a Quantum Anxiety Guide to Loud Thoughts, others introduce us as The Nuclear Paranoia Fitness Class, Peter’s grandma describes us as a Radical Empathy Optimization Software, and Gean’s wife considers us as the Disposable Neurology Department of Second Life Brains. Ultimately, we call ourselves an unidentified creative fuckaroundery, which happened to be an unhinged imagination experiment.  

We started as a zine with our 'experimental fuckaroundery for lunchbreaks'; then we made the ultimate carb sandwich to go against every healthy New Year's Eve resolutions and restore peace in your tummy & brain against aggressive political philosophies called: 'The Legally Sinful Choice' for Inbread, created an illegal poster tribute on the streets of Amsterdam to Oliviero Toscani: 'Slapping Creativity Awake', and recently for Stean's Beans we introduced a limited edition coffee brand called 'Liquid Madness For Beautiful Insomniacs' by The Purgatory Sandwich Acid Lab where we position as the coffee that flows like lifeblood, fuelling the twilight hours with a potent brew and freshly-roasted coffee packed in authentic blood bags. And who knows what comes next?

DM us for collabs or send us an email at purgatorysandwich@gmail.com.

Name: TENNESSEE PRESS ASSOCIATION
Description: TENNESSEE PRESS ASSOCIATION is the chief advocate for member newspapers in Tennessee. We help Tennessee newspapers evolve and thrive.

Name: The Concordian
Description: Since 1984, The Concordian has been Concordia University's independent student newspaper, serving the university community in Montreal, Canada. Published every Tuesday on both the downtown and Loyola campuses, it reaches over 45,000 students. Written and edited by students, The Concordian provides in-depth coverage of issues and events relevant to the Concordia community.

Name: Entrepreneur cd
Description:
Entrepreneur cd est un magazine dédié à l’entrepreneuriat.
Vous y trouverez des articles, astuces, interview, focus et encore plus; Le tout dans le but de former, informer l’entreprenant.

Name: Burlington Free Press
Description:
The Burlington Free Press is a daily newspaper located in Burlington, Vermont. 

The Burlington Free Press originally began as the Free Press Weekly, publishing its first issue in 1827. With use of the telegraph, the newspaper became an evening daily in 1848, although it did not publish a Sunday newspaper until 1965. With the purchase of the Burlington Times in 1868, the Free Press Association was founded. In 1882 the evening edition was canceled due to poor sales and an influx of morning edition readers. In 1961 a new corporation, Free Press Association, Inc., was organized by high-positioned Free Press personnel who purchased it from 50 stockholders. In 1971 the Free Press changed hands, merging with the Public Opinion and becoming a part of the Gannett Company.

Name: The Indian Weekender
Description: The Indian Weekender is New Zealand’s first weekend publication that is targeted at the 170,000-strong ethnic Indian readership in the country. The online edition is accessed by readers in Fiji, Australia, India, the US, the UK, Canada, Singapore and Malaysia besides other countries. Indian Weekender is published by Kiwi Media Publishing Ltd. With special correspondents in India and Fiji and wide ranging niche content arrangements, Indian Weekender brings you the latest in news of interest to the Indian diaspora, fresh perspectives through its analytical columns, weekend leisure reading for the entire family.
